<file path="js/cosmetics-system.js">
  1: // ============================================================
  2: // COSMETICS SYSTEM  (js/cosmetics-system.js)
  3: // Currently: name colours only.  No XP impact.
  4: //
  5: // Public API: window.cosmeticsSystem
  6: // ============================================================
  7: 
  8: (function () {
  9:     'use strict';
 10: 
 11:     const NAME_COLORS = [
 12:         { id: 'name_gold',    name: 'Gold',         cost: 50,  value: '#FFD700' },
 13:         { id: 'name_crimson', name: 'Crimson',       cost: 50,  value: '#ff3355' },
 14:         { id: 'name_blue',    name: 'Electric Blue', cost: 50,  value: '#00aaff' },
 15:         { id: 'name_emerald', name: 'Emerald',       cost: 50,  value: '#00ee88' },
 16:         { id: 'name_purple',  name: 'Royal Purple',  cost: 75,  value: '#cc44ff' },
 17:         { id: 'name_rainbow', name: 'Rainbow',       cost: 200, value: 'rainbow' },
 18:     ];
 19: 
 20:     // ── Storage ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 21: 
 22:     function getUserId() { return window.gami?.userId || null; }
 23: 
 24:     function storageKey() {
 25:         const uid = getUserId();
 26:         return uid ? `godaigo_cosmetics_${uid}` : null;
 27:     }
 28: 
 29:     function loadData() {
 30:         const key = storageKey();
 31:         if (!key) return { owned: [], equipped: {} };
 32:         try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || '{"owned":[],"equipped":{}}'); }
 33:         catch { return { owned: [], equipped: {} }; }
 34:     }
 35: 
 36:     function saveData(data) {
 37:         const key = storageKey();
 38:         if (key) localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(data));
 39:     }
 40: 
 41:     function getEquipped(catKey) { return loadData().equipped[catKey] || null; }
 42:     function getEquippedAll()    { return loadData().equipped || {}; }
 43: 
 44:     // ── Purchase / equip ──────────────────────────────────────
 45: 
 46:     async function purchaseItem(id) {
 47:         const item = NAME_COLORS.find(i => i.id === id);
 48:         if (!item) return { ok: false, msg: 'Item not found' };
 49: 
 50:         const data = loadData();
 51:         if (data.owned.includes(id)) return { ok: false, msg: 'Already owned' };
 52: 
 53:         const userId = getUserId();
 54:         if (!userId) return { ok: false, msg: 'Not logged in' };
 55: 
 56:         const gold = window.gami?.profile?.gold || 0;
 57:         if (gold < item.cost) return { ok: false, msg: `Need ${item.cost}g (you have ${gold}g)` };
 58: 
 59:         const { error } = await supabase.rpc('award_gold', {
 60:             p_user_id:     userId,
 61:             p_gold_amount: -item.cost,
 62:             p_description: `Name colour: ${item.name}`
 63:         });
 64:         if (error) return { ok: false, msg: 'Purchase failed' };
 65: 
 66:         if (window.gami?.profile) window.gami.profile.gold -= item.cost;
 67:         data.owned.push(id);
 68:         saveData(data);
 69:         return { ok: true };
 70:     }
 71: 
 72:     function equipItem(id) {
 73:         const data = loadData();
 74:         if (!data.owned.includes(id)) return;
 75:         data.equipped.namecolor = (data.equipped.namecolor === id) ? null : id;
 76:         if (!data.equipped.namecolor) delete data.equipped.namecolor;
 77:         saveData(data);
 78:     }
 79: 
 80:     // ── Name color helper ─────────────────────────────────────
 81: 
 82:     function getNameColorStyle(equippedId) {
 83:         const nc   = equippedId || getEquipped('namecolor');
 84:         const item = NAME_COLORS.find(i => i.id === nc);
 85:         if (!item) return '';
 86:         if (item.value === 'rainbow') {
 87:             return [
 88:                 'background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f00,#f70,#ff0,#0f0,#00f,#80f,#f00)',
 89:                 'background-size:200%',
 90:                 '-webkit-background-clip:text',
 91:                 '-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent',
 92:                 'background-clip:text',
 93:                 'animation:nameRainbow 3s linear infinite',
 94:             ].join(';') + ';';
 95:         }
 96:         return `color:${item.value};`;
 97:     }
 98: 
 99:     // ── Panel UI ──────────────────────────────────────────────
100: 
101:     let panelEl = null;
102:     let isPanelOpen = false;
103: 
104:     function buildPanel() {
105:         if (panelEl) return;
106:         panelEl = document.createElement('div');
107:         panelEl.id = 'cosmetics-panel';
108:         panelEl.innerHTML = `
109:             <div class="cos-header">
110:                 <span class="cos-title">Name Colours</span>
111:                 <button class="cos-close" onclick="window.cosmeticsSystem.closePanel()">✕</button>
112:             </div>
113:             <div class="cos-gold-bar"><span id="cos-gold-amt">—</span>g</div>
114:             <div class="cos-body" id="cos-body"></div>
115:         `;
116:         document.body.appendChild(panelEl);
117:     }
118: 
119:     function renderPanel() {
120:         const data     = loadData();
121:         const equipped = data.equipped.namecolor;
122:         const gold     = window.gami?.profile?.gold || 0;
123: 
124:         const goldEl = document.getElementById('cos-gold-amt');
125:         if (goldEl) goldEl.textContent = window.gami?.profile?.gold ?? '—';
126: 
127:         const body = document.getElementById('cos-body');
128:         if (!body) return;
129: 
130:         body.innerHTML = NAME_COLORS.map(item => {
131:             const owned      = data.owned.includes(item.id);
132:             const isEquipped = equipped === item.id;
133:             const canAfford  = gold >= item.cost;
134: 
135:             const previewStyle = item.value === 'rainbow'
136:                 ? 'background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f00,#f70,#ff0,#0f0,#00f,#80f);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;background-size:200%;animation:nameRainbow 3s linear infinite;'
137:                 : `color:${item.value};`;
138: 
139:             let actionHTML;
140:             if (owned) {
141:                 actionHTML = `<button class="cos-btn ${isEquipped ? 'cos-equipped-btn' : 'cos-equip-btn'}"
142:                     onclick="window.cosmeticsSystem.handleEquip('${item.id}')">
143:                     ${isEquipped ? '✓ On' : 'Equip'}
144:                 </button>`;
145:             } else {
146:                 actionHTML = `<button class="cos-btn cos-buy-btn ${canAfford ? '' : 'cos-cant-afford'}"
147:                     onclick="window.cosmeticsSystem.handleBuy('${item.id}')">
148:                     ${item.cost}g
149:                 </button>`;
150:             }
151: 
152:             return `
153:                 <div class="cos-item ${isEquipped ? 'cos-item-equipped' : ''}">
154:                     <div class="cos-preview">
155:                         <span style="${previewStyle}font-weight:bold;font-size:15px;line-height:36px;">Aa</span>
156:                     </div>
157:                     <div class="cos-info">
158:                         <div class="cos-name">${item.name}</div>
159:                     </div>
160:                     <div class="cos-action">${actionHTML}</div>
161:                 </div>
162:             `;
163:         }).join('');
164:     }
165: 
166:     // ── Public API ────────────────────────────────────────────
167: 
168:     window.cosmeticsSystem = {
169:         togglePanel() { isPanelOpen ? this.closePanel() : this.openPanel(); },
170: 
171:         openPanel() {
172:             buildPanel();
173:             renderPanel();
174:             panelEl.classList.add('open');
175:             isPanelOpen = true;
176:         },
177: 
178:         closePanel() {
179:             panelEl?.classList.remove('open');
180:             isPanelOpen = false;
181:         },
182: 
183:         async handleBuy(id) {
184:             const result = await purchaseItem(id);
185:             renderPanel();
186:             window.gami?.notify(result.ok ? 'Purchased!' : result.msg, 0, 'gold');
187:         },
188: 
189:         handleEquip(id) {
190:             equipItem(id);
191:             renderPanel();
192:         },
193: 
194:         getEquippedAll,
195:         getEquipped,
196:         getNameColorStyle,
197:         getItems() { return NAME_COLORS; },
198:         getData:    loadData,
199:     };
200: 
201: })();
</file>

<file path="js/emoji-system.js">
  1: // ============================================================
  2: // EMOJI SYSTEM — Godaigo Elements
  3: // Players purchase emojis with gold and display them over their
  4: // pawn during gameplay.  Emojis broadcast to all clients so
  5: // everyone sees the reaction.
  6: // ============================================================
  7:

116:         { id: 'E80', tier: 1, cost: 400, display: 'GOAT',  name: 'Greatest of All Time',   isText: true },
117:         { id: 'E81', tier: 1, cost: 400, display: 'LFG',   name: "Let's Freaking Go",      isText: true },

119:         { id: 'E83', tier: 1, cost: 400, display: 'OP',    name: 'Overpowered',            isText: true },
120:     ];
121: 
122:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
123:     // STATE
124:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
125: 
126:     let emojiInventoryIds = new Set();
127:     let isPanelOpen       = false;
128:     let currentView       = 'inventory'; // 'inventory' | 'shop'
129:     let emojiCooldown     = false;
130:     let emojiCooldownTimer = null;
131: 
132:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
133:     // STORAGE — localStorage keyed by user ID so purchases persist
134:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
135: 
136:     function storageKey() {
137:         const uid = window.gami?.userId || 'local';
138:         return 'godaigo_emojis_' + uid;
139:     }
140: 
141:     function loadInventory() {
142:         try {
143:             const saved = localStorage.getItem(storageKey());
144:             emojiInventoryIds = saved ? new Set(JSON.parse(saved)) : new Set();
145:         } catch (e) {
146:             emojiInventoryIds = new Set();
147:         }
148:     }
149: 
150:     function saveInventory() {
151:         try {
152:             localStorage.setItem(storageKey(), JSON.stringify([...emojiInventoryIds]));
153:         } catch (e) {}
154:     }
155: 
156:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
157:     // PANEL OPEN / CLOSE
158:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
159: 
160:     function togglePanel() {
161:         isPanelOpen ? closePanel() : openPanel();
162:     }
163: 
164:     function openPanel() {
165:         isPanelOpen = true;
166:         loadInventory();
167:         const panel = document.getElementById('emoji-panel');
168:         if (panel) panel.classList.add('open');
169:         const btn = document.getElementById('emoji-panel-btn');
170:         if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
171:         // Sync gold display then render
172:         renderCurrentView();
173:     }
174: 
175:     function closePanel() {
176:         isPanelOpen = false;
177:         const panel = document.getElementById('emoji-panel');
178:         if (panel) panel.classList.remove('open');
179:         const btn = document.getElementById('emoji-panel-btn');
180:         if (btn) btn.classList.remove('active');
181:     }
182: 
183:     function switchView(view) {
184:         currentView = view;
185:         document.querySelectorAll('.emoji-tab-btn').forEach(b => {
186:             b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.view === view);
187:         });
188:         renderCurrentView();
189:     }
190: 
191:     function renderCurrentView() {
192:         const content = document.getElementById('emoji-panel-content');
193:         if (!content) return;
194:         currentView === 'shop' ? renderShop(content) : renderInventory(content);
195:     }
196: 
197:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
198:     // RENDER — My Emojis (inventory)
199:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
200: 
201:     function renderInventory(container) {
202:         const owned = EMOJI_ITEMS.filter(e => emojiInventoryIds.has(e.id));
203:         const inGame = isInGame();
204: 
205:         if (owned.length === 0) {
206:             container.innerHTML = `
207:               <div class="emoji-empty-state">
208:                 <div style="font-size:42px;margin-bottom:10px;"></div>
209:                 <div style="color:#ccc;font-weight:bold;">No emojis yet!</div>
210:                 <div style="font-size:12px;color:#888;margin-top:6px;">Head to the Shop tab to get started.</div>
211:               </div>`;
212:             return;
213:         }
214: 
215:         let html = '<div class="emoji-grid">';
216:         for (const item of owned) {
217:             const isText = item.isText;
218:             const cls = 'emoji-btn' + (isText ? ' text-emoji' : '');
219:             if (inGame) {
220:                 html += `<button class="${cls}" onclick="window.emojiSystem.useEmoji('${item.id}')" title="${_esc(item.name)}">${_esc(item.display)}</button>`;
221:             } else {
222:                 html += `<div class="${cls} emoji-btn-inactive" title="${_esc(item.name)} (join a game to use)">${_esc(item.display)}</div>`;
223:             }
224:         }
225:         html += '</div>';
226: 
227:         if (!inGame) {
228:             html += '<p class="emoji-no-game-note">Join a game to use emojis</p>';
229:         }
230: 
231:         container.innerHTML = html;
232:     }
233: 
234:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
235:     // RENDER — Shop
236:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
237: 
238:     function renderShop(container) {
239:         // Pull cached gold — refreshed when gami is ready
240:         const gold = (window.gami?.profile?.gold != null) ? window.gami.profile.gold : '…';
241: 
242:         let html = `<div class="shop-gold-display">${gold}g</div>`;
243: 
244:         for (const tier of EMOJI_TIERS) {
245:             const items = EMOJI_ITEMS.filter(e => e.tier === tier.id);
246:             html += `
247:               <div class="shop-tier-section">
248:                 <div class="shop-tier-header" style="border-left-color:${tier.color}">
249:                   <span style="color:${tier.color};font-weight:bold;font-size:12px;">${tier.badge}</span>
250:                   <span class="shop-tier-name">${tier.name}</span>
251:                   <span class="shop-tier-cost" style="color:${tier.color}">${tier.cost}g</span>
252:                 </div>
253:                 <div class="emoji-shop-grid">`;
254: 
255:             for (const item of items) {
256:                 const owned = emojiInventoryIds.has(item.id);
257:                 const btnCls = 'shop-emoji-btn' + (item.isText ? ' text-emoji' : '');
258: 
259:                 if (owned) {
260:                     html += `
261:                       <div class="shop-item owned" title="${_esc(item.name)} (owned)">
262:                         <span class="${btnCls}">${_esc(item.display)}</span>
263:                         <div class="shop-item-name">${_esc(item.name)}</div>
264:                         <div class="owned-badge">✓ Owned</div>
265:                       </div>`;
266:                 } else {
267:                     html += `
268:                       <div class="shop-item" title="${_esc(item.name)} — ${item.cost}g">
269:                         <button class="${btnCls}" onclick="window.emojiSystem.purchaseEmoji('${item.id}')">${_esc(item.display)}</button>
270:                         <div class="shop-item-name">${_esc(item.name)}</div>
271:                         <button class="shop-buy-btn" style="border-color:${tier.color};color:${tier.color}" onclick="window.emojiSystem.purchaseEmoji('${item.id}')">${item.cost}g</button>
272:                       </div>`;
273:                 }
274:             }
275: 
276:             html += '</div></div>';
277:         }
278: 
279:         container.innerHTML = html;
280:     }
281: 
282:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
283:     // PURCHASE
284:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
285: 
286:     async function purchaseEmoji(emojiId) {
287:         const item = EMOJI_ITEMS.find(e => e.id === emojiId);
288:         if (!item) return;
289:         if (emojiInventoryIds.has(emojiId)) return; // already owned
290: 
291:         if (!window.gami?.userId) {
292:             alert('Please sign in to purchase emojis.');
293:             return;
294:         }
295: 
296:         // Refresh gold from cache
297:         const profile = window.gami.profile;
298:         const currentGold = profile?.gold ?? 0;
299: 
300:         if (currentGold < item.cost) {
301:             if (window.gami.notify) {
302:                 window.gami.notify(`Need ${item.cost}g — you have ${currentGold}g`, null, 'gold');
303:             } else {
304:                 alert(`Not enough gold! Need ${item.cost}g but you have ${currentGold}g.`);
305:             }
306:             return;
307:         }
308: 
309:         if (!confirm(`Buy "${item.name}" for ${item.cost}g?`)) return;
310: 
311:         try {
312:             // Deduct gold atomically via the existing RPC
313:             const { error } = await supabase.rpc('award_gold', {
314:                 p_user_id:    window.gami.userId,
315:                 p_gold_amount: -item.cost,
316:                 p_description: 'Emoji purchase: ' + item.name
317:             });
318: 
319:             if (error) throw error;
320: 
321:             // Optimistically update local cache
322:             if (window.gami.profile) {
323:                 window.gami.profile.gold = Math.max(0, (window.gami.profile.gold || 0) - item.cost);
324:             }
325: 
326:             // Persist to inventory
327:             emojiInventoryIds.add(emojiId);
328:             saveInventory();
329: 
330:             // Toast notification
331:             if (window.gami.notify) {
332:                 window.gami.notify(`${item.display}  ${item.name} unlocked!`, item.cost, 'gold');
333:             }
334: 
335:             // Re-render to reflect new state
336:             renderCurrentView();
337: 
338:         } catch (err) {
339:             console.error('Emoji purchase failed:', err);
340:             alert('Purchase failed: ' + (err.message || 'Unknown error'));
341:         }
342:     }
343: 
344:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
345:     // USE EMOJI — show locally + broadcast to other players
346:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
347: 
348:     function useEmoji(emojiId) {
349:         if (!isInGame()) return;
350: 
351:         const item = EMOJI_ITEMS.find(e => e.id === emojiId);
352:         if (!item) return;
353: 
354:         // Per-user cooldown to prevent spam (2 s)
355:         if (emojiCooldown) return;
356:         emojiCooldown = true;
357:         clearTimeout(emojiCooldownTimer);
358:         emojiCooldownTimer = setTimeout(() => { emojiCooldown = false; }, 2000);
359: 
360:         const myIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined') ? myPlayerIndex : 0;
361: 
362:         // Show over my own pawn
363:         showEmojiOverPawn(myIdx, item.display, item.isText);
364: 
365:         // Broadcast to all other players
366:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer &&
367:             typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
368:             broadcastGameAction('emoji', {
369:                 playerIndex: myIdx,
370:                 display: item.display,
371:                 isText: !!item.isText
372:             });
373:         }
374: 
375:         // Close panel for clean UX
376:         closePanel();
377:     }
378: 
379:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
380:     // SHOW EMOJI OVER PAWN  (called locally + by broadcast receiver)
381:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
382: 
383:     function showEmojiOverPawn(playerIndex, display, isText) {
384:         if (typeof playerPositions === 'undefined') return;
385:         const player = playerPositions[playerIndex];
386:         if (!player?.element) return;
387: 
388:         const rect = player.element.getBoundingClientRect();
389:         if (!rect || (rect.width === 0 && rect.height === 0)) return;
390: 
391:         // Centre horizontally on pawn, anchor just above it
392:         const cx = rect.left + rect.width  / 2;
393:         const cy = rect.top  + rect.height / 2;
394: 
395:         const el = document.createElement('div');
396:         el.className = 'emoji-float' + (isText ? ' emoji-float-text' : '');
397:         el.textContent = display;
398:         el.style.left = cx + 'px';
399:         el.style.top  = cy + 'px';
400: 
401:         document.body.appendChild(el);
402: 
403:         // Remove once CSS animation finishes (5.5 s to let fade complete)
404:         setTimeout(() => el.remove(), 5500);
405:     }
406: 
407:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
408:     // HELPERS
409:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
410: 
411:     function isInGame() {
412:         const gl = document.getElementById('game-layout');
413:         return !!(gl && gl.classList.contains('active'));
414:     }
415: 
416:     function _esc(str) {
417:         return String(str)
418:             .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
419:             .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
420:             .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
421:             .replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
422:     }
423: 
424:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
425:     // PANEL DOM — injected once on init
426:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
427: 
428:     function createPanelDOM() {
429:         const panel = document.createElement('div');
430:         panel.id = 'emoji-panel';
431:         panel.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Emoji panel');
432:         panel.innerHTML = `
433:           <div class="emoji-panel-header">
434:             <div class="emoji-panel-tabs">
435:               <button class="emoji-tab-btn active" data-view="inventory"
436:                       onclick="window.emojiSystem.switchView('inventory')">My Emojis</button>
437:               <button class="emoji-tab-btn" data-view="shop"
438:                       onclick="window.emojiSystem.switchView('shop')">Shop</button>
439:             </div>
440:             <button class="emoji-panel-close" onclick="window.emojiSystem.closePanel()" title="Close">✕</button>
441:           </div>
442:           <div id="emoji-panel-content" class="emoji-panel-body"></div>
443:         `;
444:         document.body.appendChild(panel);
445: 
446:         // Close on click outside
447:         document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
448:             if (!isPanelOpen) return;
449:             const p = document.getElementById('emoji-panel');
450:             const b = document.getElementById('emoji-panel-btn');
451:             const lb = document.getElementById('emoji-lobby-btn');
452:             if (p && !p.contains(e.target) &&
453:                 b  && !b.contains(e.target)  &&
454:                 (!lb || !lb.contains(e.target))) {
455:                 closePanel();
456:             }
457:         });
458:     }
459: 
460:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
461:     // INIT (called after DOM ready)
462:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
463: 
464:     function init() {
465:         createPanelDOM();
466:         loadInventory();
467:         renderCurrentView();
468:         console.log('✅ Emoji system ready —', EMOJI_ITEMS.length, 'emojis in', EMOJI_TIERS.length, 'tiers');
469:     }
470: 
471:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
472:     // PUBLIC API
473:     // ----------------------------------------------------------------
474: 
475:     window.emojiSystem = {
476:         init,
477:         togglePanel,
478:         openPanel,
479:         closePanel,
480:         switchView,
481:         purchaseEmoji,
482:         useEmoji,
483:         showEmojiOverPawn,
484:         reloadInventory: loadInventory,
485:         getItems()     { return EMOJI_ITEMS; },
486:         getTiers()     { return EMOJI_TIERS; },
487:         getInventory() { return new Set(emojiInventoryIds); },
488:     };
489: 
490:     // Auto-init when DOM is ready
491:     if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
492:         document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
493:     } else {
494:         init();
495:     }
496: 
497: })();
</file>

<file path="js/gamification-ui.js">
  1: // ============================================================
  2: // GAMIFICATION UI  (js/gamification-ui.js)
  3: // Vanilla JS modal panel: Profile · Cosmetics · Emojis · Badges · Leaderboard
  4: //
  5: // Entry point: gami_openPanel()
  6: //   Called from the "👤 Profile" button in the auth bar (index.html).
  7: // ============================================================
  8: 
  9: /** Toggle the profile panel open / closed */
 10: function gami_openPanel() {
 11:     const existing = document.getElementById('gami-panel');
 12:     if (existing) { existing.remove(); return; }
 13:     if (!window.gami?.userId) return;
 14: 
 15:     const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 16:     overlay.id        = 'gami-panel';
 17:     overlay.className = 'gami-overlay';
 18:     overlay.innerHTML = `
 19:         <div class="gami-modal" role="dialog" aria-label="Profile panel">
 20:             <div class="gami-header">
 21:                 <h2 class="gami-title">Profile</h2>
 22:                 <button class="gami-close" aria-label="Close" onclick="document.getElementById('gami-panel').remove()">×</button>
 23:             </div>
 24:             <div class="gami-tabs" role="tablist">
 25:                 <button class="gami-tab active" role="tab" onclick="gami_switchTab('profile')">Stats</button>
 26:                 <button class="gami-tab"        role="tab" onclick="gami_switchTab('cosmetics')">Colours</button>
 27:                 <button class="gami-tab"        role="tab" onclick="gami_switchTab('emojis')">Emojis</button>
 28:                 <button class="gami-tab"        role="tab" onclick="gami_switchTab('badges')">Badges</button>
 29:                 <button class="gami-tab"        role="tab" onclick="gami_switchTab('leaderboard')">Board</button>
 30:                 <button class="gami-tab"        role="tab" onclick="gami_switchTab('settings')">Settings</button>
 31:             </div>
 32:             <div id="gami-content" class="gami-content">
 33:                 <div class="gami-loading">Loading…</div>
 34:             </div>
 35:         </div>
 36:     `;
 37: 
 38:     overlay.addEventListener('click', e => {
 39:         if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove();
 40:     });
 41: 
 42:     document.body.appendChild(overlay);
 43:     gami_switchTab('profile');
 44: }
 45: 
 46: /** Switch the active tab and load its content */
 47: async function gami_switchTab(tab) {
 48:     const panel = document.getElementById('gami-panel');
 49:     if (!panel) return;
 50: 
 51:     const tabs   = panel.querySelectorAll('.gami-tab');
 52:     const tabIdx = ['profile', 'cosmetics', 'emojis', 'badges', 'leaderboard', 'settings'].indexOf(tab);
 53:     tabs.forEach((btn, i) => btn.classList.toggle('active', i === tabIdx));
 54: 
 55:     const content = document.getElementById('gami-content');
 56:     content.innerHTML = '<div class="gami-loading">Loading…</div>';
 57: 
 58:     try {
 59:         if      (tab === 'profile')     await _renderProfile(content);
 60:         else if (tab === 'cosmetics')        _renderCosmetics(content);
 61:         else if (tab === 'emojis')           _renderEmojis(content);
 62:         else if (tab === 'badges')      await _renderBadges(content);
 63:         else if (tab === 'settings')         _renderSettings(content);
 64:         else                            await _renderLeaderboard(content);
 65:     } catch (err) {
 66:         console.error('[gami-ui] render error:', err);
 67:         content.innerHTML = '<div class="gami-loading">Failed to load. Please try again.</div>';
 68:     }
 69: }
 70: 
 71: // ── Profile tab ──────────────────────────────────────────────
 72: 
 73: async function _renderProfile(content) {
 74:     const profile = await window.gami.getProfile();
 75:     if (!profile) {
 76:         content.innerHTML = '<div class="gami-loading">Could not load profile.</div>';
 77:         return;
 78:     }
 79: 
 80:     const xpIntoLevel = profile.total_xp % 1000;
 81:     const xpPercent   = Math.round(xpIntoLevel / 10);
 82:     const stats       = profile.stats || {};
 83:     const winRate     = stats.games_played > 0
 84:         ? Math.round((stats.games_won / stats.games_played) * 100)
 85:         : 0;
 86:     const earnedCount = (profile.badges_earned || []).length;
 87: 
 88:     content.innerHTML = `
 89:         <div class="gami-profile-row">
 90:             <div class="gami-level-badge">
 91:                 <span class="gami-level-num">${profile.current_level}</span>
 92:                 <span class="gami-level-label">Level</span>
 93:             </div>
 94:             <div class="gami-profile-info">
 95:                 <div class="gami-display-name">${_esc(profile.display_name)}</div>
 96:                 <div class="gami-xp-bar-wrap">
 97:                     <div class="gami-xp-bar" style="width:${xpPercent}%"></div>
 98:                 </div>
 99:                 <div class="gami-xp-text">${xpIntoLevel.toLocaleString()} / 1,000 XP to next level</div>
100:             </div>
101:         </div>
102: 
103:         <div class="gami-stats-grid">
104:             <div class="gami-stat">
105:                 <span class="gami-stat-val">${(profile.total_xp || 0).toLocaleString()}</span>
106:                 <span class="gami-stat-lbl">Total XP</span>
107:             </div>
108:             <div class="gami-stat">
109:                 <span class="gami-stat-val">${(profile.gold || 0).toLocaleString()}</span>
110:                 <span class="gami-stat-lbl">Gold</span>
111:             </div>
112:             <div class="gami-stat">
113:                 <span class="gami-stat-val">${stats.games_played || 0}</span>
114:                 <span class="gami-stat-lbl">Games Played</span>
115:             </div>
116:             <div class="gami-stat">
117:                 <span class="gami-stat-val">${stats.games_won || 0}</span>
118:                 <span class="gami-stat-lbl">Games Won</span>
119:             </div>
120:             <div class="gami-stat">
121:                 <span class="gami-stat-val">${winRate}%</span>
122:                 <span class="gami-stat-lbl">Win Rate</span>
123:             </div>
124:             <div class="gami-stat">
125:                 <span class="gami-stat-val">${earnedCount}</span>
126:                 <span class="gami-stat-lbl">Badges Earned</span>
127:             </div>
128:         </div>
129:     `;
130: }
131: 
132: // ── Cosmetics tab ────────────────────────────────────────────
133: 
134: function _renderCosmetics(content) {
135:     const cs = window.cosmeticsSystem;
136:     if (!cs) { content.innerHTML = '<div class="gami-loading">Cosmetics not loaded.</div>'; return; }
137: 
138:     const items    = cs.getItems();
139:     const data     = cs.getData();
140:     const equipped = data.equipped?.namecolor || null;
141:     const owned    = data.owned || [];
142:     const gold     = window.gami?.profile?.gold || 0;
143: 
144:     content.innerHTML = `
145:         <div class="gami-cos-header">
146:             <span style="color:#eee;font-size:15px;font-weight:bold;">Name Colours</span>
147:             <span style="color:#d9b08c;font-size:14px;">${gold}g</span>
148:         </div>
149:         <div class="gami-cos-list">
150:             ${items.map(item => {
151:                 const isOwned    = owned.includes(item.id);
152:                 const isEquipped = equipped === item.id;
153:                 const canAfford  = gold >= item.cost;
154: 
155:                 const previewStyle = item.value === 'rainbow'
156:                     ? 'background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f00,#f70,#ff0,#0f0,#00f,#80f);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;animation:nameRainbow 3s linear infinite;font-weight:bold;font-size:18px;'
157:                     : `color:${item.value};font-weight:bold;font-size:18px;`;
158: 
159:                 let actionHTML;
160:                 if (isOwned) {
161:                     actionHTML = `<button class="gami-cos-btn${isEquipped ? ' equipped' : ''}"
162:                         onclick="_gami_cosmeticsEquip('${item.id}')">
163:                         ${isEquipped ? '✓ On' : 'Equip'}
164:                     </button>`;
165:                 } else {
166:                     actionHTML = `<button class="gami-cos-btn buy${canAfford ? '' : ' cant-afford'}"
167:                         onclick="_gami_cosmeticsBuy('${item.id}')">
168:                         ${item.cost}g
169:                     </button>`;
170:                 }
171: 
172:                 return `
173:                     <div class="gami-cos-item${isEquipped ? ' active' : ''}">
174:                         <div class="gami-cos-preview"><span style="${previewStyle}">Aa</span></div>
175:                         <div class="gami-cos-name">${item.name}</div>
176:                         <div class="gami-cos-action">${actionHTML}</div>
177:                     </div>`;
178:             }).join('')}
179:         </div>`;
180: }
181: 
182: // ── Emojis tab ───────────────────────────────────────────────
183: 
184: function _renderEmojis(content) {
185:     const es = window.emojiSystem;
186:     if (!es) { content.innerHTML = '<div class="gami-loading">Emoji system not loaded.</div>'; return; }
187: 
188:     es.reloadInventory();
189:     const inventory = es.getInventory();
190:     const items     = es.getItems();
191:     const tiers     = es.getTiers();
192:     const gold      = window.gami?.profile?.gold || 0;
193:     const inGame    = !!document.getElementById('game-layout')?.classList.contains('active');
194: 
195:     const owned = items.filter(e => inventory.has(e.id));
196: 
197:     let html = '<div class="gami-section-title">My Emojis</div>';
198: 
199:     if (owned.length === 0) {
200:         html += `<div style="color:#666;font-style:italic;padding:8px 0 16px;">No emojis yet — buy some below!</div>`;
201:     } else {
202:         html += `<div class="gami-emoji-grid">`;
203:         for (const item of owned) {
204:             const cls = 'gami-emoji-btn' + (item.isText ? ' text-emoji' : '');
205:             if (inGame) {
206:                 html += `<button class="${cls}" onclick="_gami_emojisUse('${item.id}')" title="${_esc(item.name)}">${_esc(item.display)}</button>`;
207:             } else {
208:                 html += `<div class="${cls} inactive" title="${_esc(item.name)} (join a game to use)">${_esc(item.display)}</div>`;
209:             }
210:         }
211:         html += `</div>`;
212:         if (!inGame) html += `<div style="color:#666;font-size:12px;padding:4px 0 14px;">Join a game to use emojis</div>`;
213:     }
214: 
215:     html += `<div class="gami-section-title" style="margin-top:4px;">Shop <span style="color:#d9b08c;float:right;">${gold}g</span></div>`;
216: 
217:     for (const tier of tiers) {
218:         const tierItems = items.filter(e => e.tier === tier.id);
219:         html += `
220:             <div class="gami-tier-section">
221:                 <div class="gami-tier-header" style="border-left-color:${tier.color};">
222:                     <span style="color:${tier.color};font-weight:bold;font-size:11px;">${tier.badge}</span>
223:                     <span style="color:#ccc;margin-left:6px;font-size:13px;">${tier.name}</span>
224:                     <span style="color:${tier.color};margin-left:auto;font-size:12px;">${tier.cost}g</span>
225:                 </div>
226:                 <div class="gami-emoji-shop-grid">`;
227:         for (const item of tierItems) {
228:             const isOwned = inventory.has(item.id);
229:             const cls = 'gami-shop-emoji' + (item.isText ? ' text-emoji' : '');
230:             if (isOwned) {
231:                 html += `
232:                     <div class="gami-shop-item owned" title="${_esc(item.name)}">
233:                         <span class="${cls}">${_esc(item.display)}</span>
234:                         <div class="gami-shop-name">${_esc(item.name)}</div>
235:                         <div class="gami-shop-owned">✓</div>
236:                     </div>`;
237:             } else {
238:                 html += `
239:                     <div class="gami-shop-item" title="${_esc(item.name)} — ${item.cost}g">
240:                         <button class="${cls}" onclick="_gami_emojisBuy('${item.id}')">${_esc(item.display)}</button>
241:                         <div class="gami-shop-name">${_esc(item.name)}</div>
242:                         <button class="gami-shop-buy-btn" style="border-color:${tier.color};color:${tier.color};"
243:                                 onclick="_gami_emojisBuy('${item.id}')">${item.cost}g</button>
244:                     </div>`;
245:             }
246:         }
247:         html += `</div></div>`;
248:     }
249: 
250:     content.innerHTML = html;
251: }
252: 
253: // ── Badges tab ───────────────────────────────────────────────
254: 
255: async function _renderBadges(content) {
256:     const badges = await window.gami.getBadgesWithStatus();
257:     if (!badges.length) {
258:         content.innerHTML = '<div class="gami-loading">No badges available.</div>';
259:         return;
260:     }
261: 
262:     const cards = badges.map(b => `
263:         <div class="gami-badge-card ${b.earned ? 'earned' : 'locked'}" title="${_esc(b.description)}">
264:             <div class="gami-badge-icon">${b.earned ? b.icon : '?'}</div>
265:             <div class="gami-badge-name">${_esc(b.name)}</div>
266:             <div class="gami-badge-desc">${_esc(b.description)}</div>
267:             ${b.gold_reward ? `<div class="gami-badge-reward">+${b.gold_reward}g</div>` : ''}
268:         </div>
269:     `).join('');
270: 
271:     content.innerHTML = `<div class="gami-badges-grid">${cards}</div>`;
272: }
273: 
274: // ── Leaderboard tab ──────────────────────────────────────────
275: 
276: async function _renderLeaderboard(content) {
277:     const rows = await window.gami.getLeaderboard(10);
278:     if (!rows.length) {
279:         content.innerHTML = '<div class="gami-loading">No players yet.</div>';
280:         return;
281:     }
282: 
283:     const medals = ['#1', '#2', '#3'];
284:     const items  = rows.map((row, i) => {
285:         const isMe = row.user_id === window.gami.userId;
286:         const rank = medals[i] || `#${i + 1}`;
287:         return `
288:             <div class="gami-lb-row ${isMe ? 'gami-lb-me' : ''}">
289:                 <span class="gami-lb-rank">${rank}</span>
290:                 <span class="gami-lb-name">${_esc(row.display_name)}</span>
291:                 <span class="gami-lb-xp">${(row.total_xp || 0).toLocaleString()} XP</span>
292:                 <span class="gami-lb-level">Lv.${row.current_level}</span>
293:             </div>
294:         `;
295:     }).join('');
296: 
297:     content.innerHTML = `<div class="gami-leaderboard">${items}</div>`;
298: }
299: 
300: // ── Main-page leaderboard widget ──────────────────────────────
301: 
302: async function loadMainLeaderboard() {
303:     const el = document.getElementById('main-leaderboard-body');
304:     if (!el) return;
305:     el.innerHTML = '<div class="gami-loading">Loading…</div>';
306: 
307:     const raw = await window.gami?.getLeaderboard(20);
308:     const rows = (raw || []).filter(r => (r.total_xp || 0) > 0).slice(0, 10);
309:     if (!rows.length) {
310:         el.innerHTML = '<div class="gami-loading" style="padding:12px;">No ranked players yet.</div>';
311:         return;
312:     }
313: 
314:     const medals = ['#1', '#2', '#3'];
315:     el.innerHTML = rows.map((row, i) => {
316:         const isMe = row.user_id === window.gami.userId;
317:         const rank = medals[i] || `#${i + 1}`;
318:         return `
319:             <div class="gami-lb-row ${isMe ? 'gami-lb-me' : ''}">
320:                 <span class="gami-lb-rank">${rank}</span>
321:                 <span class="gami-lb-name">${_esc(row.display_name)}</span>
322:                 <span class="gami-lb-xp">${(row.total_xp || 0).toLocaleString()} XP</span>
323:                 <span class="gami-lb-level">Lv.${row.current_level}</span>
324:             </div>`;
325:     }).join('');
326: }
327: 
328: window.loadMainLeaderboard = loadMainLeaderboard;
329: 
330: // ── Profile modal action helpers (called from onclick) ────────
331: 
332: async function _gami_cosmeticsBuy(id) {
333:     await window.cosmeticsSystem.handleBuy(id);
334:     gami_switchTab('cosmetics');
335: }
336: 
337: function _gami_cosmeticsEquip(id) {
338:     window.cosmeticsSystem.handleEquip(id);
339:     gami_switchTab('cosmetics');
340: }
341: 
342: function _gami_emojisUse(id) {
343:     window.emojiSystem.useEmoji(id);
344:     document.getElementById('gami-panel')?.remove();
345: }
346: 
347: async function _gami_emojisBuy(id) {
348:     await window.emojiSystem.purchaseEmoji(id);
349:     gami_switchTab('emojis');
350: }
351: 
352: // ── Settings tab ─────────────────────────────────────────────
353: 
354: function _renderSettings(content) {
355:     const uiSound   = localStorage.getItem('godaigo_ui_sound')   !== 'false';
356:     const gameSound = localStorage.getItem('godaigo_game_sound') !== 'false';
357: 
358:     content.innerHTML = `
359:         <div class="gami-settings-list">
360:             <div class="gami-settings-row">
361:                 <div class="gami-settings-label">
362:                     <div class="gami-settings-name">UI Sounds</div>
363:                     <div class="gami-settings-desc">Button click sound effects</div>
364:                 </div>
365:                 <button class="gami-toggle ${uiSound ? 'on' : 'off'}"
366:                         onclick="_gami_toggleSetting('ui_sound', this)">${uiSound ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</button>
367:             </div>
368:             <div class="gami-settings-row">
369:                 <div class="gami-settings-label">
370:                     <div class="gami-settings-name">Game Sounds</div>
371:                     <div class="gami-settings-desc">In-game audio effects</div>
372:                 </div>
373:                 <button class="gami-toggle ${gameSound ? 'on' : 'off'}"
374:                         onclick="_gami_toggleSetting('game_sound', this)">${gameSound ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</button>
375:             </div>
376:         </div>
377:     `;
378: }
379: 
380: function _gami_toggleSetting(key, btn) {
381:     const current = localStorage.getItem(`godaigo_${key}`) !== 'false';
382:     const newVal  = !current;
383:     localStorage.setItem(`godaigo_${key}`, newVal ? 'true' : 'false');
384:     if (key === 'ui_sound')   window.uiSoundEnabled   = newVal;
385:     if (key === 'game_sound') window.gameSoundEnabled = newVal;
386:     btn.textContent = newVal ? 'ON' : 'OFF';
387:     btn.className   = `gami-toggle ${newVal ? 'on' : 'off'}`;
388: }
389: 
390: // ── Utility ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
391: 
392: function _esc(str) {
393:     if (!str) return '';
394:     return String(str)
395:         .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
396:         .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
397:         .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
398:         .replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
399: }
</file>

<file path="js/gamification.js">
  1: // ============================================================
  2: // GAMIFICATION SERVICE  (js/gamification.js)
  3: // Adapted from Gamify/gamification_service.js for Godaigo.
  4: //
  5: // Uses the global `supabase` client (config.js).
  6: // Exposes window.gami for lobby.js / game-core.js to call.
  7: //
  8: // XP rewards:
  9: //   game_complete     : 20 + (numPlayers-1)×10  (loss)
 10: //   game_win          : 75 + (numPlayers-1)×25  (win)
 11: //
 12: // Gold rewards (no leaderboard impact):
 13: //   daily_login       : +20 gold (once per calendar day)
 14: //   level_up          : +50 gold per level (handled in DB function)
 15: // ============================================================
 16: 
 17: window.gami = (function () {
 18: 
 19:     // ── Internal state ────────────────────────────────────────
 20:     let _userId  = null;
 21:     let _profile = null;   // cached user_profiles row
 22: 
 23:     // ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 24: 
 25:     function _log(...args) {
 26:         console.log('[gami]', ...args);
 27:     }
 28: 
 29:     /** Fire-and-forget INSERT into user_activities */
 30:     function _logActivity(activityType, xpAwarded, goldAwarded, description, metadata) {
 31:         if (!_userId) return;
 32:         supabase.from('user_activities').insert({
 33:             user_id:       _userId,
 34:             activity_type: activityType,
 35:             xp_awarded:    xpAwarded    || 0,
 36:             gold_awarded:  goldAwarded  || 0,
 37:             description:   description  || activityType,
 38:             metadata:      metadata     || {}
 39:         }).then(({ error }) => {
 40:             if (error) console.error('[gami] activity log error:', error);
 41:         });
 42:     }
 43: 
 44:     /** Update a subset of profile.stats in the DB (fire-and-forget) */
 45:     function _patchStats(patch) {
 46:         if (!_userId || !_profile) return;
 47:         const stats = Object.assign({}, _profile.stats || {}, patch);
 48:         _profile.stats = stats;
 49:         supabase.from('user_profiles')
 50:             .update({ stats, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
 51:             .eq('user_id', _userId)
 52:             .then(({ error }) => {
 53:                 if (error) console.error('[gami] stats patch error:', error);
 54:             });
 55:     }
 56: 
 57:     // ── Public API ────────────────────────────────────────────
 58: 
 59:     const api = {
 60: 
 61:         // Expose userId for UI (read-only intent)
 62:         get userId() { return _userId; },
 63:         get profile() { return _profile; },
 64: 
 65:         /**
 66:          * init(userId, displayName)
 67:          * Called from onAuthSuccess in lobby.js.
 68:          * Gets or creates the user_profiles row.
 69:          */
 70:         async init(userId, displayName) {
 71:             _userId = userId;
 72: 
 73:             let { data: profile, error } = await supabase
 74:                 .from('user_profiles')
 75:                 .select('*')
 76:                 .eq('user_id', userId)
 77:                 .single();
 78: 
 79:             if (error && error.code === 'PGRST116') {
 80:                 // Profile doesn't exist yet — create it
 81:                 const { data: newProfile, error: createErr } = await supabase
 82:                     .from('user_profiles')
 83:                     .insert({
 84:                         user_id:      userId,
 85:                         display_name: displayName || 'Player',
 86:                         total_xp:     0,
 87:                         current_level: 1,
 88:                         gold:         0,
 89:                         badges_earned: [],
 90:                         inventory:    [],
 91:                         stats: {
 92:                             games_played:      0,
 93:                             games_won:         0,
 94:                             scrolls_cast:      0,
 95:                             elements_activated: 0,
 96:                             streak:            0,
 97:                             last_active:       null
 98:                         }
 99:                     })
100:                     .select()
101:                     .single();
102: 
103:                 if (createErr) {
104:                     console.error('[gami] profile create error:', createErr);
105:                     return;
106:                 }
107:                 profile = newProfile;
108:                 _log('new profile created for', displayName);
109:             } else if (error) {
110:                 console.error('[gami] profile fetch error:', error);
111:                 return;
112:             }
113: 
114:             _profile = profile;
115:             _log('init complete — level', profile.current_level, 'xp', profile.total_xp);
116:         },
117: 
118:         /**
119:          * onDailyLogin()
120:          * Awards 20 gold once per calendar day.
121:          * Does NOT award XP (login is not a meaningful game action).
122:          */
123:         async onDailyLogin() {
124:             if (!_userId || !_profile) return;
125: 
126:             const today     = new Date().toDateString();
127:             const lastActive = _profile.stats?.last_active;
128:             if (lastActive === today) return; // Already collected today
129: 
130:             const { error } = await supabase.rpc('award_gold', {
131:                 p_user_id:     _userId,
132:                 p_gold_amount: 20,
133:                 p_description: 'Daily login reward'
134:             });
135:             if (error) { console.error('[gami] daily login gold error:', error); return; }
136: 
137:             // Log a daily_login activity so the "Dedicated" badge can count it
138:             _logActivity('daily_login', 0, 20, 'Daily login');
139: 
140:             // Update streak and last_active in stats
141:             const yesterday = new Date(Date.now() - 86_400_000).toDateString();
142:             const streak    = (lastActive === yesterday)
143:                 ? (_profile.stats?.streak || 0) + 1
144:                 : 1;
145: 
146:             _patchStats({ last_active: today, streak });
147:             if (_profile) _profile.gold = (_profile.gold || 0) + 20;
148: 
149:             api.notify('Daily reward! +20', 20, 'gold');
150:             _log('daily login gold awarded');
151:         },
152: 
153:         /**
154:          * onScrollCast(scrollName, element)
155:          * Called via window.logScrollEvent (already fired from game-core.js).
156:          * Tracks count for badge purposes only — no XP.
157:          */
158:         onScrollCast(scrollName, element) {
159:             if (!_userId) return;
160:             // Fire-and-forget
161:             _logActivity('scroll_cast', 0, 0, `Cast ${scrollName || element || 'scroll'}`);
162:             _patchStats({ scrolls_cast: (_profile?.stats?.scrolls_cast || 0) + 1 });
163:         },
164: 
165:         /**
166:          * onElementActivated(element, allActivated)
167:          * Tracks activations for badge purposes only — no XP.
168:          */
169:         onElementActivated(element, allActivated) {
170:             if (!_userId) return;
171:             _logActivity('element_activated', 0, 0, `Activated ${element}`, { element });
172:             _patchStats({ elements_activated: (_profile?.stats?.elements_activated || 0) + 1 });
173:         },
174: 
175:         /**
176:          * onGameComplete(isWinner, numPlayers)
177:          * XP scales with player count:
178:          *   Loss: 20 + (n-1)*10   →  2p=30, 3p=40, 4p=50, 5p=60
179:          *   Win:  75 + (n-1)*25   →  2p=100, 3p=125, 4p=150, 5p=175
180:          */
181:         async onGameComplete(isWinner, numPlayers) {
182:             if (!_userId) return;
183:             const n   = Math.max(2, numPlayers || 2);
184:             const xp  = isWinner
185:                 ? 75  + (n - 1) * 25
186:                 : 20  + (n - 1) * 10;
187: 
188:             try {
189:                 // Award XP
190:                 const { error: xpErr } = await supabase.rpc('update_user_xp', {
191:                     p_user_id:     _userId,
192:                     p_xp_points:   xp,
193:                     p_description: isWinner
194:                         ? `Game win (${n} players)`
195:                         : `Game complete — ${n} players`
196:                 });
197:                 if (xpErr) { console.error('[gami] game complete xp error:', xpErr); return; }
198: 
199:                 // Log game_complete (badge: First Steps, Veteran)
200:                 _logActivity('game_complete', xp, 0,
201:                     `Completed game with ${n} players`, { num_players: n, won: isWinner });
202: 
203:                 // Log game_win (badge: First Victory, Champion, Master)
204:                 if (isWinner) {
205:                     _logActivity('game_win', 0, 0,
206:                         `Won game with ${n} players`, { num_players: n });
207:                 }
208: 
209:                 // Update stats
210:                 const stats = Object.assign({}, _profile?.stats || {});
211:                 stats.games_played = (stats.games_played || 0) + 1;
212:                 if (isWinner) stats.games_won = (stats.games_won || 0) + 1;
213:                 _patchStats(stats);
214:                 if (_profile) _profile.total_xp = (_profile.total_xp || 0) + xp;
215: 
216:                 const msg = isWinner
217:                     ? `Victory! +${xp} XP`
218:                     : `Game complete. +${xp} XP`;
219:                 api.notify(msg, xp, 'xp');
220:                 _log('game complete —', msg);
221:             } catch (err) {
222:                 console.error('[gami] onGameComplete error:', err);
223:             }
224:         },
225: 
226:         /** Fetch a fresh profile from the DB */
227:         async getProfile() {
228:             if (!_userId) return null;
229:             const { data, error } = await supabase
230:                 .from('user_profiles')
231:                 .select('*')
232:                 .eq('user_id', _userId)
233:                 .single();
234:             if (error) { console.error('[gami] getProfile error:', error); return _profile; }
235:             _profile = data;
236:             return data;
237:         },
238: 
239:         /** Top N players ordered by total XP */
240:         async getLeaderboard(limit) {
241:             const { data, error } = await supabase
242:                 .from('user_profiles')
243:                 .select('display_name, total_xp, current_level, user_id')
244:                 .order('total_xp', { ascending: false })
245:                 .limit(limit || 10);
246:             if (error) { console.error('[gami] leaderboard error:', error); return []; }
247:             return data || [];
248:         },
249: 
250:         /** All badges merged with the current user's earned status */
251:         async getBadgesWithStatus() {
252:             const { data: badges, error } = await supabase
253:                 .from('badges')
254:                 .select('*')
255:                 .eq('is_active', true)
256:                 .order('xp_reward', { ascending: true });
257:             if (error) { console.error('[gami] badges error:', error); return []; }
258: 
259:             const earnedIds = _profile?.badges_earned || [];
260:             return (badges || []).map(b => ({
261:                 ...b,
262:                 earned: earnedIds.includes(b.id)
263:             }));
264:         },
265: 
266:         /**
267:          * Show a slide-in toast at the bottom-right.
268:          * type: 'xp' | 'gold'
269:          */
270:         notify(message, amount, type) {
271:             const toast = document.createElement('div');
272:             toast.className = 'gami-toast';
273:             toast.innerHTML =
274:                 `<span class="gami-toast-icon">${type === 'gold' ? '💰' : '⚡'}</span>${message}`;
275:             document.body.appendChild(toast);
276: 
277:             requestAnimationFrame(() => toast.classList.add('gami-toast-show'));
278: 
279:             setTimeout(() => {
280:                 toast.classList.remove('gami-toast-show');
281:                 setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 400);
282:             }, 3000);
283:         }
284:     };
285: 
286:     return api;
287: })();
288: 
289: // ── Hook into window.logScrollEvent (already called by game-core.js executeSpell) ──
290: // This intercepts scroll casts with zero changes to game-core.js.
291: window.logScrollEvent = function (eventType, data) {
292:     if (eventType === 'cast_execute' && window.gami?.userId) {
293:         window.gami.onScrollCast(data?.scrollName, data?.element);
294:     }
295: };
</file>

<file path="js/game-core.js">
   1: // ========================================
   2:         // GAME CONSTANTS
   3:         // ========================================
   4:         const TILE_SIZE = 20;
   5:         const SNAP_THRESHOLD = 40;
   6:         const STONE_SIZE = 12;
   7: 
   8:         const STONE_TYPES = {
   9:             earth: { color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲' },
  10:             water: { color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯' },
  11:             fire: { color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦' },
  12:             wind: { color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋' },
  13:             void: { color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺' },
  14:             catacomb: { color: '#8b4513', symbol: '🔅' }
  15:         };
  16: 
  17:         // Spell System for pattern-based stone generation
  18:         class SpellSystem {
  19:             constructor() {
  20:                 this.SPELL_AP_COST = 2;
  21: 
  22:                 // Per-player scroll inventories: { hand: Set, active: Set, activated: Set }
  23:                 // hand = scrolls in player's hand (private, max 4)
  24:                 // active = scrolls in active area (visible to opponents: name + element only, max 2)
  25:                 // activated = elements that have been used for win condition tracking
  26:                 this.playerScrolls = [];
  27:                 this.MAX_HAND_SIZE = 2;
  28:                 this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE = 2;
  29: 
  30:                 // Common area - shared scrolls any player can activate
  31:                 // Max 1 scroll per element type. When a new scroll of same element enters,
  32:                 // the old one goes to bottom of deck
  33:                 this.commonArea = {
  34:                     earth: null,
  35:                     water: null,
  36:                     fire: null,
  37:                     wind: null,
  38:                     void: null,
  39:                     catacomb: null
  40:                 };
  41: 
  42:                 // Scroll decks - use external definitions if available, otherwise use defaults
  43:                 if (typeof SCROLL_DECKS !== 'undefined') {
  44:                     // Deep copy the external deck definitions
  45:                     this.scrollDecks = {};
  46:                     Object.keys(SCROLL_DECKS).forEach(element => {
  47:                         this.scrollDecks[element] = [...SCROLL_DECKS[element]];
  48:                     });
  49:                 } else {
  50:                     // Fallback to inline definitions
  51:                     this.scrollDecks = {
  52:                         earth: ['EARTH_SCROLL_1', 'EARTH_SCROLL_2', 'EARTH_SCROLL_3', 'EARTH_SCROLL_4', 'EARTH_SCROLL_5'],
  53:                         water: ['WATER_SCROLL_1', 'WATER_SCROLL_2', 'WATER_SCROLL_3', 'WATER_SCROLL_4', 'WATER_SCROLL_5'],
  54:                         fire: ['FIRE_SCROLL_1', 'FIRE_SCROLL_2', 'FIRE_SCROLL_3', 'FIRE_SCROLL_4', 'FIRE_SCROLL_5'],
  55:                         wind: ['WIND_SCROLL_1', 'WIND_SCROLL_2', 'WIND_SCROLL_3', 'WIND_SCROLL_4', 'WIND_SCROLL_5'],
  56:                         void: ['VOID_SCROLL_1', 'VOID_SCROLL_2', 'VOID_SCROLL_3', 'VOID_SCROLL_4', 'VOID_SCROLL_5'],
  57:                         catacomb: ['CATACOMB_SCROLL_1', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_2', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_3', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_4', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_5', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_6', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_7', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_8', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_9', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_10']
  58:                     };
  59:                 }
  60: 
  61:                 // Shuffle all decks at initialization
  62:                 this.shuffleAllDecks();
  63: 
  64:                 this.initializePatterns();
  65:                 this.updateScrollCount();
  66: 
  67:                 // Initialize response window system
  68:                 this.responseWindow = null;
  69:                 if (typeof ResponseWindowSystem !== 'undefined') {
  70:                     this.responseWindow = new ResponseWindowSystem(this);
  71:                     console.log('Response window system initialized');
  72:                 }
  73: 
  74:                 // Initialize scroll effects system (use window.ScrollEffects – set by scroll-effects.js)
  75:                 this.scrollEffects = null;
  76:                 const SE = (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.ScrollEffects) || (typeof ScrollEffects !== 'undefined' && ScrollEffects);
  77:                 if (SE) {
  78:                     SE.init(this);
  79:                     this.scrollEffects = SE;
  80:                     console.log('Scroll effects system initialized');
  81:                 }
  82: 
  83:                 // Pending cascade state - blocks all actions until resolved
  84:                 // Stored per player: { playerIndex: { scrollName, scrollInfo, shrineType, canCascadeToActive } }
  85:                 this.pendingCascades = {};
  86:             }
  87: 
  88:             // Check if a player has a pending cascade that must be resolved
  89:             hasPendingCascade(playerIndex) {
  90:                 return !!this.pendingCascades[playerIndex];
  91:             }
  92: 
  93:             // Get the pending cascade for a player
  94:             getPendingCascade(playerIndex) {
  95:                 return this.pendingCascades[playerIndex] || null;
  96:             }
  97: 
  98:             // Set a pending cascade for a player
  99:             setPendingCascade(playerIndex, cascadeData) {
 100:                 this.pendingCascades[playerIndex] = cascadeData;
 101:                 console.log(`📜 Pending cascade set for player ${playerIndex}:`, cascadeData?.scrollName);
 102:             }
 103: 
 104:             // Clear a pending cascade for a player
 105:             clearPendingCascade(playerIndex) {
 106:                 delete this.pendingCascades[playerIndex];
 107:                 console.log(`📜 Pending cascade cleared for player ${playerIndex}`);
 108:             }
 109: 
 110:             // Show the cascade prompt for a player (used when they try to take an action with pending cascade)
 111:             showPendingCascadePrompt(playerIndex) {
 112:                 const cascade = this.pendingCascades[playerIndex];
 113:                 if (!cascade) return false;
 114: 
 115:                 this.showCascadePrompt(
 116:                     cascade.scrollName,
 117:                     cascade.scrollInfo,
 118:                     cascade.shrineType,
 119:                     cascade.canCascadeToActive
 120:                 );
 121:                 return true;
 122:             }
 123: 
 124:             // Fisher-Yates shuffle algorithm
 125:             shuffleDeck(deck) {
 126:                 for (let i = deck.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
 127:                     const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
 128:                     [deck[i], deck[j]] = [deck[j], deck[i]];
 129:                 }
 130:                 return deck;
 131:             }
 132: 
 133:             shuffleAllDecks() {
 134:                 Object.keys(this.scrollDecks).forEach(element => {
 135:                     this.shuffleDeck(this.scrollDecks[element]);
 136:                 });
 137:                 console.log('🎴 All scroll decks shuffled');
 138:             }
 139: 
 140:             // Draw a scroll from the top of a specific element's deck
 141:             drawFromDeck(element) {
 142:                 if (!this.scrollDecks[element] || this.scrollDecks[element].length === 0) {
 143:                     return null;
 144:                 }
 145:                 return this.scrollDecks[element].shift(); // Remove and return first element
 146:             }
 147: 
 148:             // Discard a scroll to the common area
 149:             // If a scroll of the same element is already there, it goes to bottom of deck
 150:             discardToCommonArea(scrollName) {
 151:                 const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 152:                 if (!element) return;
 153: 
 154:                 let replacedScroll = null;
 155: 
 156:                 // If there's already a scroll of this element in common area, send it to deck
 157:                 // Guard: don't push to deck if it's the same scroll being discarded (avoids duplicates)
 158:                 if (this.commonArea[element] && this.commonArea[element] !== scrollName) {
 159:                     replacedScroll = this.commonArea[element];
 160:                     this.scrollDecks[element].push(replacedScroll); // Add old scroll to bottom of deck
 161:                     console.log(`📜 Common area: Replaced ${replacedScroll} with ${scrollName} (old scroll to deck)`);
 162:                 } else {
 163:                     console.log(`📜 Common area: Added ${scrollName}`);
 164:                 }
 165: 
 166:                 // Place new scroll in common area
 167:                 this.commonArea[element] = scrollName;
 168: 
 169:                 // Update the scroll deck UI
 170:                 try {
 171:                     if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
 172:                 } catch (e) {}
 173: 
 174:                 // Broadcast in multiplayer
 175:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
 176:                     broadcastGameAction('common-area-update', {
 177:                         element: element,
 178:                         scrollName: scrollName,
 179:                         replacedScroll: replacedScroll
 180:                     });
 181:                 }
 182:             }
 183: 
 184:             // Direct discard to deck (used internally, not for player discards)
 185:             discardToDeck(scrollName) {
 186:                 const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 187:                 if (element && this.scrollDecks[element]) {
 188:                     this.scrollDecks[element].push(scrollName); // Add to end of deck
 189:                     console.log(`📜 Discarded ${scrollName} to bottom of ${element} deck`);
 190: 
 191:                     // Update the scroll deck UI
 192:                     try {
 193:                         if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
 194:                     } catch (e) {}
 195:                 }
 196:             }
 197: 
 198:             // Get all scrolls in common area (returns array of scroll names)
 199:             getCommonAreaScrolls() {
 200:                 return Object.values(this.commonArea).filter(scroll => scroll !== null);
 201:             }
 202: 
 203:             // Get the element type from a scroll name
 204:             getScrollElement(scrollName) {
 205:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('EARTH')) return 'earth';
 206:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('WATER')) return 'water';
 207:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('FIRE')) return 'fire';
 208:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('WIND')) return 'wind';
 209:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('VOID')) return 'void';
 210:                 if (scrollName.startsWith('CATACOMB')) return 'catacomb';
 211:                 return null;
 212:             }
 213:             
 214:             // Get active player's scroll collection
 215:             // In multiplayer, show MY scrolls for display, but use activePlayerIndex for game logic
 216:             getPlayerScrolls(forDisplay = false) {
 217:                 // For display in multiplayer, show my own scrolls
 218:                 const displayIndex = (forDisplay && isMultiplayer && myPlayerIndex !== null) ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
 219: 
 220:                 this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(displayIndex);
 221:                 return this.playerScrolls[displayIndex];
 222:             }
 223: 
 224:             // Reinforce scroll state: ensure hand/active/activated are Sets (prevents "disappearing" from bad state)
 225:             ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex) {
 226:                 if (playerIndex == null || playerIndex < 0) return;
 227:                 if (!this.playerScrolls[playerIndex]) {
 228:                     this.playerScrolls[playerIndex] = {
 229:                         hand: new Set(),
 230:                         active: new Set(),
 231:                         activated: new Set()
 232:                     };
 233:                     return;
 234:                 }
 235:                 const p = this.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
 236:                 if (!(p.hand instanceof Set)) p.hand = new Set(Array.isArray(p.hand) ? p.hand : []);
 237:                 if (!(p.active instanceof Set)) p.active = new Set(Array.isArray(p.active) ? p.active : []);
 238:                 if (!(p.activated instanceof Set)) p.activated = new Set(Array.isArray(p.activated) ? p.activated : []);
 239:             }
 240: 
 241:             // Validate scroll state and log warnings (helps catch sync bugs)
 242:             validateScrollState() {
 243:                 const n = typeof totalPlayers !== 'undefined' ? totalPlayers : Math.max(2, (this.playerScrolls && this.playerScrolls.length) || 0);
 244:                 for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
 245:                     this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(i);
 246:                 }
 247:                 const inHand = new Map();
 248:                 const inActive = new Map();
 249:                 let errorsFound = false;
 250: 
 251:                 for (let i = 0; i < (this.playerScrolls && this.playerScrolls.length) || 0; i++) {
 252:                     const p = this.playerScrolls[i];
 253:                     if (!p || !p.hand || !p.active) continue;
 254:                     p.hand.forEach(name => {
 255:                         if (inHand.has(name)) {
 256:                             console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in hand of both player', inHand.get(name), 'and', i);
 257:                             errorsFound = true;
 258:                         }
 259:                         inHand.set(name, i);
 260:                     });
 261:                     p.active.forEach(name => {
 262:                         if (inActive.has(name)) {
 263:                             console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in active of both player', inActive.get(name), 'and', i);
 264:                             errorsFound = true;
 265:                         }
 266:                         if (inHand.has(name)) {
 267:                             console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in both hand and active areas');
 268:                             errorsFound = true;
 269:                         }
 270:                         inActive.set(name, i);
 271:                     });
 272:                 }
 273:                 const commonElements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'];
 274:                 commonElements.forEach(element => {
 275:                     const name = this.commonArea[element];
 276:                     if (!name) return;
 277:                     if (inHand.has(name)) {
 278:                         console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in common area (' + element + ') and in hand of player', inHand.get(name));
 279:                         errorsFound = true;
 280:                     }
 281:                     if (inActive.has(name)) {
 282:                         console.warn('[Scroll state] ⚠️ DUPLICATE:', name, 'in common area (' + element + ') and in active of player', inActive.get(name));
 283:                         errorsFound = true;
 284:                     }
 285:                 });
 286: 
 287:                 // If errors found in multiplayer and we're not the host, request sync
 288:                 if (errorsFound && typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) {
 289:                     console.warn('⚠️ Scroll state errors detected! Requesting sync from host...');
 290:                     if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function' && typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== 0) {
 291:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-state-sync-request', { playerIndex: myPlayerIndex });
 292:                     }
 293:                 }
 294: 
 295:                 return errorsFound;
 296:             }
 297: 
 298:             // Generate complete scroll state snapshot for syncing
 299:             getScrollStateSnapshot() {
 300:                 const snapshot = {
 301:                     players: [],
 302:                     commonArea: {},
 303:                     decks: {}
 304:                 };
 305: 
 306:                 // Capture each player's scrolls
 307:                 for (let i = 0; i < this.playerScrolls.length; i++) {
 308:                     const p = this.playerScrolls[i];
 309:                     if (!p) continue;
 310:                     snapshot.players[i] = {
 311:                         hand: Array.from(p.hand || []),
 312:                         active: Array.from(p.active || []),
 313:                         activated: Array.from(p.activated || [])
 314:                     };
 315:                 }
 316: 
 317:                 // Capture common area
 318:                 ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'].forEach(element => {
 319:                     snapshot.commonArea[element] = this.commonArea[element] || null;
 320:                 });
 321: 
 322:                 // Capture full decks (host is authoritative, clients should match exactly)
 323:                 Object.keys(this.scrollDecks || {}).forEach(element => {
 324:                     snapshot.decks[element] = [...(this.scrollDecks[element] || [])];
 325:                 });
 326: 
 327:                 return snapshot;
 328:             }
 329: 
 330:             // Apply scroll state snapshot from authoritative source
 331:             applyScrollStateSnapshot(snapshot) {
 332:                 let corrected = false;
 333:                 const activatedChangedPlayers = [];
 334: 
 335:                 // Apply player scrolls
 336:                 if (snapshot.players) {
 337:                     for (let i = 0; i < snapshot.players.length; i++) {
 338:                         if (!snapshot.players[i]) continue;
 339:                         this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(i);
 340:                         const p = this.playerScrolls[i];
 341:                         const snap = snapshot.players[i];
 342: 
 343:                         // Sync hand
 344:                         const newHand = new Set(snap.hand || []);
 345:                         if (!this.setsEqual(p.hand, newHand)) {
 346:                             console.log(`🔄 Player ${i} hand corrected:`, Array.from(p.hand), '→', Array.from(newHand));
 347:                             p.hand = newHand;
 348:                             corrected = true;
 349:                         }
 350: 
 351:                         // Sync active
 352:                         const newActive = new Set(snap.active || []);
 353:                         if (!this.setsEqual(p.active, newActive)) {
 354:                             console.log(`🔄 Player ${i} active corrected:`, Array.from(p.active), '→', Array.from(newActive));
 355:                             p.active = newActive;
 356:                             corrected = true;
 357:                         }
 358: 
 359:                         // Sync activated (win condition tracking) - additive only.
 360:                         // Never remove locally-tracked activations: a non-host player may have
 361:                         // pre-tracked an element during an interactive scroll (e.g. Take Flight)
 362:                         // before the host's periodic sync fires, which would otherwise wipe it.
 363:                         const newActivated = new Set(snap.activated || []);
 364:                         const prevActivatedSize = p.activated.size;
 365:                         newActivated.forEach(el => p.activated.add(el));
 366:                         if (p.activated.size !== prevActivatedSize) {
 367:                             console.log(`🔄 Player ${i} activated updated (additive):`, Array.from(newActivated), '→', Array.from(p.activated));
 368:                             corrected = true;
 369:                             activatedChangedPlayers.push(i);
 370:                         }
 371:                     }
 372:                 }
 373: 
 374:                 // Apply common area
 375:                 if (snapshot.commonArea) {
 376:                     ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'].forEach(element => {
 377:                         const newScroll = snapshot.commonArea[element] || null;
 378:                         if (this.commonArea[element] !== newScroll) {
