 379:                             console.log(`🔄 Common area ${element} corrected:`, this.commonArea[element], '→', newScroll);
 380:                             this.commonArea[element] = newScroll;
 381:                             corrected = true;
 382:                         }
 383:                     });
 384:                 }
 385: 
 386:                 // Apply decks (sync full deck contents from host)
 387:                 if (snapshot.decks) {
 388:                     Object.keys(snapshot.decks).forEach(element => {
 389:                         const newDeck = snapshot.decks[element] || [];
 390:                         const currentDeck = this.scrollDecks[element] || [];
 391: 
 392:                         // Compare deck contents (order matters for deck draw)
 393:                         if (!this.arraysEqual(currentDeck, newDeck)) {
 394:                             console.log(`🔄 ${element} deck corrected: ${currentDeck.length} scrolls → ${newDeck.length} scrolls`);
 395:                             this.scrollDecks[element] = [...newDeck];
 396:                             corrected = true;
 397:                         }
 398:                     });
 399:                 }
 400: 
 401:                 if (corrected) {
 402:                     // Only update UI and validate, no console spam
 403:                     this.validateScrollState();
 404:                     this.updateScrollCount();
 405:                     if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
 406:                     if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
 407:                     // Refresh win-condition markers and check win condition for any player
 408:                     // whose activated set gained elements via this sync
 409:                     if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
 410:                         activatedChangedPlayers.forEach(playerIdx => {
 411:                             updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIdx);
 412:                             // Win condition: all 5 elements activated
 413:                             if (this.playerScrolls?.[playerIdx]?.activated?.size === 5) {
 414:                                 console.log(`🏆 Win condition met for player ${playerIdx} (detected via state sync)`);
 415:                                 this.showLevelComplete(playerIdx);
 416:                                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer &&
 417:                                     typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
 418:                                     handleGameOver(playerIdx);
 419:                                 }
 420:                             }
 421:                         });
 422:                     }
 423:                 }
 424: 
 425:                 return corrected;
 426:             }
 427: 
 428:             // Helper: compare two sets for equality
 429:             setsEqual(set1, set2) {
 430:                 if (set1.size !== set2.size) return false;
 431:                 for (const item of set1) {
 432:                     if (!set2.has(item)) return false;
 433:                 }
 434:                 return true;
 435:             }
 436: 
 437:             // Helper: compare two arrays for equality (order matters)
 438:             arraysEqual(arr1, arr2) {
 439:                 if (arr1.length !== arr2.length) return false;
 440:                 for (let i = 0; i < arr1.length; i++) {
 441:                     if (arr1[i] !== arr2[i]) return false;
 442:                 }
 443:                 return true;
 444:             }
 445: 
 446:             // Comprehensive scroll audit - finds ALL scrolls and reports discrepancies
 447:             auditScrolls() {
 448:                 const allScrolls = new Map(); // scrollName -> locations[]
 449:                 const issues = [];
 450: 
 451:                 // Count scrolls in each location
 452:                 const countScroll = (scrollName, location) => {
 453:                     if (!scrollName) return;
 454:                     if (!allScrolls.has(scrollName)) {
 455:                         allScrolls.set(scrollName, []);
 456:                     }
 457:                     allScrolls.get(scrollName).push(location);
 458:                 };
 459: 
 460:                 // Check player hands and active areas
 461:                 for (let i = 0; i < (this.playerScrolls?.length || 0); i++) {
 462:                     const p = this.playerScrolls[i];
 463:                     if (!p) continue;
 464:                     const playerName = typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function' ? getPlayerColorName(i) : `Player ${i}`;
 465: 
 466:                     (p.hand || new Set()).forEach(scroll => countScroll(scroll, `${playerName} hand`));
 467:                     (p.active || new Set()).forEach(scroll => countScroll(scroll, `${playerName} active`));
 468:                 }
 469: 
 470:                 // Check common area
 471:                 ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'].forEach(element => {
 472:                     const scroll = this.commonArea[element];
 473:                     if (scroll) countScroll(scroll, `Common (${element})`);
 474:                 });
 475: 
 476:                 // Check decks
 477:                 Object.keys(this.scrollDecks || {}).forEach(element => {
 478:                     (this.scrollDecks[element] || []).forEach(scroll => {
 479:                         countScroll(scroll, `${element} deck`);
 480:                     });
 481:                 });
 482: 
 483:                 // Analyze results
 484:                 console.log('\n🔍 SCROLL AUDIT REPORT\n');
 485: 
 486:                 let duplicates = 0;
 487:                 allScrolls.forEach((locations, scrollName) => {
 488:                     if (locations.length > 1) {
 489:                         console.warn(`⚠️  DUPLICATE: ${scrollName} exists in ${locations.length} locations:`, locations);
 490:                         issues.push({ scroll: scrollName, issue: 'duplicate', locations });
 491:                         duplicates++;
 492:                     }
 493:                 });
 494: 
 495:                 if (duplicates === 0) {
 496:                     console.log('✅ No duplicates found');
 497:                 } else {
 498:                     console.warn(`⚠️  Found ${duplicates} duplicated scrolls!`);
 499:                 }
 500: 
 501:                 // Count total scrolls by element
 502:                 const elementCounts = { earth: 0, water: 0, fire: 0, wind: 0, void: 0, catacomb: 0 };
 503:                 allScrolls.forEach((locations, scrollName) => {
 504:                     const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 505:                     if (element && elementCounts.hasOwnProperty(element)) {
 506:                         elementCounts[element] += locations.length; // Count all instances (including duplicates)
 507:                     }
 508:                 });
 509: 
 510:                 console.log('\n📊 Total Scroll Counts (across all locations):');
 511:                 Object.entries(elementCounts).forEach(([element, count]) => {
 512:                     console.log(`  ${element}: ${count} scrolls found`);
 513:                 });
 514: 
 515:                 console.log('\n');
 516: 
 517:                 return { issues, elementCounts, allScrolls };
 518:             }
 519: 
 520:             // Compatibility getters for existing code
 521:             // collectedScrolls now returns both hand AND active scrolls combined
 522:             get collectedScrolls() {
 523:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(true);
 524:                 const combined = new Set([...scrolls.hand, ...scrolls.active]);
 525:                 return combined;
 526:             }
 527: 
 528:             get activatedScrollTypes() {
 529:                 return this.getPlayerScrolls(true).activated;
 530:             }
 531: 
 532:             // Get scrolls in hand only
 533:             get handScrolls() {
 534:                 return this.getPlayerScrolls(true).hand;
 535:             }
 536: 
 537:             // Get scrolls in active area only
 538:             get activeScrolls() {
 539:                 return this.getPlayerScrolls(true).active;
 540:             }
 541: 
 542:             // Move scroll from hand to active area (0 AP cost)
 543:             moveToActive(scrollName) {
 544:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false); // Use active player for game logic
 545: 
 546:                 // Check active area limit
 547:                 if (scrolls.active.size >= this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE) {
 548:                     updateStatus(`Active area full! Max ${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE} scrolls. Move one back to hand first.`);
 549:                     return false;
 550:                 }
 551: 
 552:                 if (scrolls.hand.has(scrollName)) {
 553:                     scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
 554:                     scrolls.active.add(scrollName);
 555:                     console.log(`📜 Moved ${scrollName} to active area`);
 556:                     this.updateScrollCount();
 557: 
 558:                     // Broadcast in multiplayer
 559:                     if (isMultiplayer) {
 560:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-move', {
 561:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 562:                             scrollName: scrollName,
 563:                             toLocation: 'active'
 564:                         });
 565:                     }
 566:                     return true;
 567:                 }
 568:                 return false;
 569:             }
 570: 
 571:             // Move scroll from active area back to hand - DISABLED
 572:             // Scrolls cannot be returned to hand once placed in active area
 573:             moveToHand(scrollName) {
 574:                 // Per game rules, scrolls cannot be moved back to hand once in active area
 575:                 updateStatus(`Scrolls cannot be returned to hand! Discard to Common Area instead.`);
 576:                 return false;
 577:             }
 578: 
 579:             // Discard a scroll from hand or active area to common area
 580:             discardScroll(scrollName) {
 581:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false);
 582:                 let removed = false;
 583: 
 584:                 if (scrolls.hand.has(scrollName)) {
 585:                     scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
 586:                     removed = true;
 587:                 } else if (scrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
 588:                     scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
 589:                     removed = true;
 590:                 }
 591: 
 592:                 if (removed) {
 593:                     // Send to common area instead of deck
 594:                     this.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
 595:                     this.updateScrollCount();
 596:                     try {
 597:                         if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
 598:                     } catch (e) {}
 599: 
 600:                     // Broadcast in multiplayer
 601:                     if (isMultiplayer) {
 602:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-discard', {
 603:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 604:                             scrollName: scrollName
 605:                         });
 606:                     }
 607:                     return true;
 608:                 }
 609:                 return false;
 610:             }
 611: 
 612:             initializePatterns() {
 613:                 // Use external scroll definitions if available
 614:                 if (typeof SCROLL_DEFINITIONS !== 'undefined') {
 615:                     this.patterns = SCROLL_DEFINITIONS;
 616:                     console.log('📜 Loaded scroll definitions from external file');
 617:                     return;
 618:                 }
 619: 
 620:                 // Fallback to inline definitions
 621:                 console.log('📜 Using inline scroll definitions (external file not loaded)');
 622: 
 623:                 // Corrected patterns from user's visual editor
 624:                 const level1Patterns = [
 625:                     [{ q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }],
 626:                     [{ q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }],
 627:                     [{ q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 0 }]
 628:                 ];
 629: 
 630:                 const level2Patterns = [
 631:                     [{ q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }],
 632:                     [{ q: 1, r: -2 }, { q: -1, r: 2 }],
 633:                     [{ q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: -2, r: 1 }]
 634:                 ];
 635: 
 636:                 const level3Patterns = [
 637:                     [{ q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }],
 638:                     [{ q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }]
 639:                 ];
 640: 
 641:                 const level4Patterns = [
 642:                     [{ q: 1, r: -2 }, { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }],
 643:                     [{ q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 }]
 644:                 ];
 645: 
 646:                 const level5Patterns = [
 647:                     [{ q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: -2, r: 1 }],
 648:                     [{ q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }],
 649:                     [{ q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }, { q: -1, r: 2 }]
 650:                 ];
 651: 
 652:                 this.patterns = {};
 653:                 const elementTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
 654: 
 655:                 elementTypes.forEach(element => {
 656:                     [level1Patterns, level2Patterns, level3Patterns, level4Patterns, level5Patterns].forEach((patterns, level) => {
 657:                         const scrollName = `${element.toUpperCase()}_SCROLL_${level + 1}`;
 658:                         this.patterns[scrollName] = {
 659:                             name: `${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} Scroll ${toRoman(level + 1)}`,
 660:                             description: `Stand in pattern to gain +${level + 1} ${element} stones (2 AP)`,
 661:                             level: level + 1,
 662:                             element: element,
 663:                             patterns: patterns.map(pattern =>
 664:                                 pattern.map(pos => ({ ...pos, type: element }))
 665:                             ),
 666:                             // Earth II can counter any scroll
 667:                             canCounter: (element === 'earth' && level === 1) ? 'any' : null
 668:                         };
 669:                     });
 670:                 });
 671: 
 672:                 // Add catacomb scrolls (multi-element patterns)
 673:                 // Each gets 3 rotational variations like level 2 scrolls
 674:                 const catacombBase = {
 675:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_1: [
 676:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "water" },
 677:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "water" },
 678:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "earth" },
 679:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "earth" }
 680:                     ],
 681:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_2: [
 682:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "earth" },
 683:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "earth" },
 684:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "fire" },
 685:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "fire" }
 686:                     ],
 687:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_3: [
 688:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "wind" },
 689:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "wind" },
 690:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "earth" },
 691:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "earth" }
 692:                     ],
 693:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_4: [
 694:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "void" },
 695:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "void" },
 696:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "earth" },
 697:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "earth" }
 698:                     ],
 699:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_5: [
 700:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "water" },
 701:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "water" },
 702:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "fire" },
 703:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "fire" }
 704:                     ],
 705:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_6: [
 706:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "wind" },
 707:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "wind" },
 708:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "water" },
 709:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "water" }
 710:                     ],
 711:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_7: [
 712:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "void" },
 713:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "void" },
 714:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "water" },
 715:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "water" }
 716:                     ],
 717:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_8: [
 718:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "fire" },
 719:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "fire" },
 720:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "wind" },
 721:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "wind" }
 722:                     ],
 723:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_9: [
 724:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "void" },
 725:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "void" },
 726:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "wind" },
 727:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "wind" }
 728:                     ],
 729:                     CATACOMB_SCROLL_10: [
 730:                         { q: -1, r: -1, type: "fire" },
 731:                         { q: 1, r: 1, type: "fire" },
 732:                         { q: 1, r: -2, type: "void" },
 733:                         { q: -1, r: 2, type: "void" }
 734:                     ]
 735:                 };
 736: 
 737:                 // Generate 3 rotational variations for each catacomb scroll
 738:                 Object.entries(catacombBase).forEach(([scrollName, basePattern]) => {
 739:                     const scrollNum = parseInt(scrollName.split('_')[2]);
 740: 
 741:                     // Helper function to rotate hex coordinate by 60 degrees
 742:                     const rotateHex = (q, r, steps) => {
 743:                         // Rotate counter-clockwise by steps * 60 degrees
 744:                         let nq = q, nr = r;
 745:                         for (let i = 0; i < steps; i++) {
 746:                             const tempQ = nq;
 747:                             nq = -nr;
 748:                             nr = -(-tempQ - nr);
 749:                         }
 750:                         return { q: nq, r: nr };
 751:                     };
 752: 
 753:                     // Create 3 rotational variations (0°, 120°, 240°)
 754:                     const variations = [
 755:                         basePattern, // 0° rotation
 756:                         basePattern.map(pos => ({ // 120° rotation (2 steps)
 757:                             ...rotateHex(pos.q, pos.r, 2),
 758:                             type: pos.type
 759:                         })),
 760:                         basePattern.map(pos => ({ // 240° rotation (4 steps)
 761:                             ...rotateHex(pos.q, pos.r, 4),
 762:                             type: pos.type
 763:                         }))
 764:                     ];
 765: 
 766:                     this.patterns[scrollName] = {
 767:                         name: `Catacomb Scroll ${scrollNum}`,
 768:                         description: `Multi-element pattern: gain +2 of each stone type (2 AP)`,
 769:                         level: 2,
 770:                         element: 'catacomb',
 771:                         patterns: variations
 772:                     };
 773:                 });
 774:             }
 775: 
 776:             onTileRevealed(shrineType) {
 777:                 if (shrineType === 'player') return null;
 778:                 if (!this.scrollDecks[shrineType] || this.scrollDecks[shrineType].length === 0) {
 779:                     return null;
 780:                 }
 781: 
 782:                 // Draw from top of the element's deck
 783:                 const selected = this.drawFromDeck(shrineType);
 784:                 if (!selected) return null;
 785: 
 786:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false);
 787:                 const scrollInfo = this.patterns[selected];
 788: 
 789:                 // Always add to hand immediately so the player can still act this turn.
 790:                 // If the hand now exceeds the limit the end-of-turn overflow modal will
 791:                 // prompt for a cascade before the turn advances.
 792:                 scrolls.hand.add(selected);
 793:                 this.updateScrollCount();
 794: 
 795:                 // Broadcast scroll collection in multiplayer
 796:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
 797:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 798:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 799:                         scrollName: selected,
 800:                         shrineType: shrineType
 801:                     });
 802:                 }
 803: 
 804:                 if (scrolls.hand.size > this.MAX_HAND_SIZE) {
 805:                     // Over limit — remind the player they must cascade before ending their turn
 806:                     updateStatus(`Picked up "${scrollInfo?.name || selected}" — hand is over the limit. Cascade a scroll before ending your turn!`);
 807:                 } else {
 808:                     this.showScrollNotification(scrollInfo, shrineType);
 809:                 }
 810: 
 811:                 return scrollInfo;
 812:             }
 813: 
 814:             // Show cascade prompt when hand is full
 815:             // canCascadeToActive: true = Active area has room, false = must go to Common Area
 816:             showCascadePrompt(newScrollName, newScrollInfo, shrineType, canCascadeToActive) {
 817:                 // Store as pending cascade so it blocks actions and can be re-shown
 818:                 const playerIdx = isMultiplayer ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
 819:                 this.setPendingCascade(playerIdx, {
 820:                     scrollName: newScrollName,
 821:                     scrollInfo: newScrollInfo,
 822:                     shrineType: shrineType,
 823:                     canCascadeToActive: canCascadeToActive
 824:                 });
 825: 
 826:                 // Create overlay backdrop (prevents clicking elsewhere)
 827:                 const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 828:                 overlay.id = 'cascade-overlay';
 829:                 Object.assign(overlay.style, {
 830:                     position: 'fixed',
 831:                     top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
 832:                     backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)',
 833:                     zIndex: '1001'
 834:                 });
 835: 
 836:                 const popup = document.createElement('div');
 837:                 popup.id = 'cascade-popup';
 838:                 Object.assign(popup.style, {
 839:                     position: 'fixed', left: '50%', top: '50%',
 840:                     transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
 841:                     backgroundColor: '#2c3e50', padding: '20px',
 842:                     borderRadius: '10px', boxShadow: '0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
 843:                     zIndex: '1002', minWidth: '400px', maxWidth: '600px',
 844:                     maxHeight: '80vh', overflowY: 'auto', color: 'white'
 845:                 });
 846: 
 847:                 const title = document.createElement('h2');
 848:                 title.textContent = canCascadeToActive
 849:                     ? 'Hand Full! Cascade a Scroll'
 850:                     : 'All Slots Full! Cascade to Common Area';
 851:                 title.style.textAlign = 'center';
 852:                 title.style.color = canCascadeToActive ? '#f39c12' : '#e74c3c';
 853:                 title.style.marginTop = '0';
 854:                 popup.appendChild(title);
 855: 
 856:                 const subtitle = document.createElement('p');
 857:                 if (canCascadeToActive) {
 858:                     subtitle.innerHTML = `You found "<strong>${newScrollInfo.name}</strong>" but your hand is full (${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE}/${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE}).<br>Choose a scroll to cascade to your <strong>Active Area</strong> or <strong>Common Area</strong>:`;
 859:                 } else {
 860:                     subtitle.innerHTML = `You found "<strong>${newScrollInfo.name}</strong>" but hand (${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE}/${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE}) and active (${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}/${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}) are full.<br>Choose a scroll to cascade to the <strong>Common Area</strong>:`;
 861:                 }
 862:                 subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
 863:                 subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
 864:                 popup.appendChild(subtitle);
 865: 
 866:                 const self = this;
 867:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false);
 868: 
 869:                 // Create a card for each scroll in hand + active (if applicable) + the new scroll
 870:                 let allScrollOptions = [...scrolls.hand, newScrollName];
 871:                 if (!canCascadeToActive) {
 872:                     // When both are full, also include active scrolls as cascade options
 873:                     allScrollOptions = [...scrolls.hand, ...scrolls.active, newScrollName];
 874:                 }
 875: 
 876:                 allScrollOptions.forEach(scrollName => {
 877:                     const pattern = this.patterns[scrollName];
 878:                     const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 879:                     const isNew = scrollName === newScrollName;
 880:                     const isInActive = scrolls.active.has(scrollName);
 881:                     const elementColor = element === 'catacomb' ? '#9b59b6' : STONE_TYPES[element]?.color || '#666';
 882: 
 883:                     const card = document.createElement('div');
 884:                     Object.assign(card.style, {
 885:                         backgroundColor: isNew ? '#1a3a1a' : (isInActive ? '#3a2a1a' : '#34495e'),
 886:                         border: isNew ? '2px solid #27ae60' : (isInActive ? '2px solid #f39c12' : '1px solid #555'),
 887:                         borderRadius: '8px',
 888:                         padding: '12px',
 889:                         marginBottom: '10px',
 890:                         color: 'white'
 891:                     });
 892: 
 893:                     const header = document.createElement('div');
 894:                     header.style.display = 'flex';
 895:                     header.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
 896:                     header.style.alignItems = 'center';
 897:                     header.style.marginBottom = '8px';
 898: 
 899:                     const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');
 900:                     let prefix = '';
 901:                     if (isNew) prefix = 'NEW: ';
 902:                     else if (isInActive) prefix = '⚡ ACTIVE: ';
 903:                     nameSpan.textContent = prefix + (pattern ? pattern.name : scrollName);
 904:                     nameSpan.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
 905:                     nameSpan.style.color = elementColor;
 906:                     header.appendChild(nameSpan);
 907:                     card.appendChild(header);
 908: 
 909:                     if (pattern) {
 910:                         const desc = document.createElement('div');
 911:                         desc.textContent = pattern.description;
 912:                         desc.style.fontSize = '12px';
 913:                         desc.style.color = '#95a5a6';
 914:                         desc.style.marginBottom = '10px';
 915:                         card.appendChild(desc);
 916:                     }
 917: 
 918:                     // Button container
 919:                     const buttonRow = document.createElement('div');
 920:                     buttonRow.style.display = 'flex';
 921:                     buttonRow.style.gap = '10px';
 922:                     buttonRow.style.justifyContent = 'flex-end';
 923: 
 924:                     // Cascade to Active button (only if active has room and scroll isn't already in active)
 925:                     if (canCascadeToActive && !isInActive) {
 926:                         const toActiveBtn = document.createElement('button');
 927:                         toActiveBtn.textContent = 'To Active';
 928:                         Object.assign(toActiveBtn.style, {
 929:                             backgroundColor: '#f39c12',
 930:                             color: 'white',
 931:                             border: 'none',
 932:                             padding: '8px 12px',
 933:                             borderRadius: '5px',
 934:                             cursor: 'pointer',
 935:                             fontWeight: 'bold'
 936:                         });
 937:                         toActiveBtn.onmouseenter = () => toActiveBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#e67e22';
 938:                         toActiveBtn.onmouseleave = () => toActiveBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#f39c12';
 939: 
 940:                         toActiveBtn.onclick = () => {
 941:                             if (scrollName === newScrollName) {
 942:                                 // Cascade new scroll directly to active
 943:                                 scrolls.active.add(newScrollName);
 944: 
 945:                                 if (isMultiplayer) {
 946:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 947:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 948:                                         scrollName: newScrollName,
 949:                                         shrineType: shrineType
 950:                                     });
 951:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-move', {
 952:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 953:                                         scrollName: newScrollName,
 954:                                         toLocation: 'active'
 955:                                     });
 956:                                 }
 957:                                 updateStatus(`Cascaded new scroll "${newScrollInfo.name}" to Active Area`);
 958:                             } else {
 959:                                 // Cascade existing scroll to active, add new to hand
 960:                                 scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
 961:                                 scrolls.active.add(scrollName);
 962:                                 scrolls.hand.add(newScrollName);
 963: 
 964:                                 if (isMultiplayer) {
 965:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-move', {
 966:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 967:                                         scrollName: scrollName,
 968:                                         toLocation: 'active'
 969:                                     });
 970:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 971:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 972:                                         scrollName: newScrollName,
 973:                                         shrineType: shrineType
 974:                                     });
 975:                                 }
 976:                                 updateStatus(`Cascaded "${self.patterns[scrollName]?.name || scrollName}" to Active, kept "${newScrollInfo.name}" in hand`);
 977:                             }
 978: 
 979:                             self.updateScrollCount();
 980:                             self.clearPendingCascade(playerIdx);
 981:                             document.body.removeChild(overlay);
 982:                         };
 983:                         buttonRow.appendChild(toActiveBtn);
 984:                     }
 985: 
 986:                     // Cascade to Common Area button
 987:                     const toCommonBtn = document.createElement('button');
 988:                     toCommonBtn.textContent = 'To Common';
 989:                     Object.assign(toCommonBtn.style, {
 990:                         backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
 991:                         color: 'white',
 992:                         border: 'none',
 993:                         padding: '8px 12px',
 994:                         borderRadius: '5px',
 995:                         cursor: 'pointer',
 996:                         fontWeight: 'bold'
 997:                     });
 998:                     toCommonBtn.onmouseenter = () => toCommonBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#c0392b';
 999:                     toCommonBtn.onmouseleave = () => toCommonBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#e74c3c';
1000: 
1001:                     toCommonBtn.onclick = () => {
1002:                         if (scrollName === newScrollName) {
1003:                             // Cascade new scroll to common area
1004:                             self.discardToCommonArea(newScrollName);
1005:                             updateStatus(`Cascaded new scroll "${newScrollInfo.name}" to Common Area`);
1006:                         } else {
1007:                             // Cascade existing scroll to common, add new to hand
1008:                             if (isInActive) {
1009:                                 scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
1010:                             } else {
1011:                                 scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
1012:                             }
1013:                             self.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
1014:                             scrolls.hand.add(newScrollName);
1015: 
1016:                             if (isMultiplayer) {
1017:                                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-discard', {
1018:                                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1019:                                     scrollName: scrollName
1020:                                 });
1021:                                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
1022:                                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1023:                                     scrollName: newScrollName,
1024:                                     shrineType: shrineType
1025:                                 });
1026:                             }
1027:                             updateStatus(`Cascaded "${self.patterns[scrollName]?.name || scrollName}" to Common Area, kept "${newScrollInfo.name}"`);
1028:                         }
1029: 
1030:                         self.updateScrollCount();
1031:                         self.clearPendingCascade(playerIdx);
1032:                         document.body.removeChild(overlay);
1033:                     };
1034:                     buttonRow.appendChild(toCommonBtn);
1035: 
1036:                     card.appendChild(buttonRow);
1037:                     popup.appendChild(card);
1038:                 });
1039: 
1040:                 overlay.appendChild(popup);
1041:                 document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1042:             }
1043: 
1044:             // End-of-turn overflow: hand or active over capacity. Player must move scrolls to active or common until within limits.
1045:             // Smart flow: if active is full, they can move active→common first to "make space", then move hand→active.
1046:             showEndTurnOverflowModal(onResolved) {
1047:                 const overlay = document.createElement('div');
1048:                 overlay.id = 'end-turn-overflow-overlay';
1049:                 Object.assign(overlay.style, {
1050:                     position: 'fixed',
1051:                     top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
1052:                     backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)',
1053:                     zIndex: '1001'
1054:                 });
1055: 
1056:                 const popup = document.createElement('div');
1057:                 popup.id = 'end-turn-overflow-popup';
1058:                 Object.assign(popup.style, {
1059:                     position: 'fixed', left: '50%', top: '50%',
1060:                     transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
1061:                     backgroundColor: '#2c3e50', padding: '20px',
1062:                     borderRadius: '10px', boxShadow: '0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
1063:                     zIndex: '1002', minWidth: '400px', maxWidth: '600px',
1064:                     maxHeight: '80vh', overflowY: 'auto', color: 'white'
1065:                 });
1066: 
1067:                 const title = document.createElement('h2');
1068:                 title.textContent = 'Scroll Overflow – Resolve Before Ending Turn';
1069:                 title.style.textAlign = 'center';
1070:                 title.style.color = '#f39c12';
1071:                 title.style.marginTop = '0';
1072:                 popup.appendChild(title);
1073: 
1074:                 const subtitle = document.createElement('p');
1075:                 subtitle.id = 'end-turn-overflow-subtitle';
1076:                 subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
1077:                 subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
1078:                 subtitle.style.marginBottom = '12px';
1079:                 popup.appendChild(subtitle);
1080: 
1081:                 const content = document.createElement('div');
1082:                 content.id = 'end-turn-overflow-content';
1083:                 popup.appendChild(content);
1084: 
1085:                 const self = this;
1086: 
1087:                 // Single delegated click: read scroll name from button so the right scroll is always used
1088:                 content.addEventListener('click', function overflowContentClick(e) {
1089:                     const btn = e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest('button[data-scroll-name]');
1090:                     if (!btn) return;
1091:                     e.preventDefault();
1092:                     e.stopPropagation();
1093:                     const name = btn.getAttribute('data-scroll-name');
1094:                     const action = btn.getAttribute('data-action');
1095:                     if (!name) return;
1096:                     if (action === 'to-common') {
1097:                         if (self.discardScroll(name)) {
1098:                             self.updateScrollCount();
1099:                             try { if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI(); } catch (err) {}
1100:                             renderContent();
1101:                         }
1102:                     } else if (action === 'to-active') {
1103:                         if (self.moveToActive(name)) {
1104:                             self.updateScrollCount();
1105:                             renderContent();
1106:                         }
1107:                     }
1108:                 });
1109: 
1110:                 function renderContent() {
1111:                     content.innerHTML = '';
1112:                     const scrolls = self.getPlayerScrolls(false);
1113:                     const handOver = scrolls.hand.size > self.MAX_HAND_SIZE;
1114:                     const activeOver = scrolls.active.size > self.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
1115:                     const hasRoomInActive = scrolls.active.size < self.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
1116: 
1117:                     subtitle.textContent = `Hand: ${scrolls.hand.size}/${self.MAX_HAND_SIZE}  |  Active: ${scrolls.active.size}/${self.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}`;
1118:                     if (handOver) subtitle.textContent += '  (hand over limit)';
1119:                     if (activeOver) subtitle.textContent += '  (active over limit)';
1120: 
1121:                     const stillOverflow = handOver || activeOver;
1122: 
1123:                     // Hand scrolls: can move to Active (if room) or Common
1124:                     [...scrolls.hand].forEach(scrollName => {
1125:                         const pattern = self.patterns[scrollName];
1126:                         const element = self.getScrollElement(scrollName);
1127:                         const elementColor = element === 'catacomb' ? '#9b59b6' : STONE_TYPES[element]?.color || '#666';
1128: 
1129:                         const card = document.createElement('div');
1130:                         Object.assign(card.style, {
1131:                             backgroundColor: '#34495e',
1132:                             border: '1px solid #555',
1133:                             borderRadius: '8px',
1134:                             padding: '12px',
1135:                             marginBottom: '10px',
1136:                             color: 'white'
1137:                         });
1138: 
1139:                         const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');
1140:                         nameSpan.textContent = 'Hand: ' + (pattern ? pattern.name : scrollName);
1141:                         nameSpan.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
1142:                         nameSpan.style.color = elementColor;
1143:                         card.appendChild(nameSpan);
1144:                         if (pattern) {
1145:                             const desc = document.createElement('div');
1146:                             desc.textContent = pattern.description;
1147:                             desc.style.fontSize = '12px';
1148:                             desc.style.color = '#95a5a6';
1149:                             desc.style.marginTop = '4px';
1150:                             desc.style.marginBottom = '8px';
1151:                             card.appendChild(desc);
1152:                         }
1153: 
1154:                         const buttonRow = document.createElement('div');
1155:                         buttonRow.style.display = 'flex';
1156:                         buttonRow.style.gap = '10px';
1157:                         buttonRow.style.justifyContent = 'flex-end';
1158: 
1159:                         if (hasRoomInActive) {
1160:                             const toActiveBtn = document.createElement('button');
1161:                             toActiveBtn.type = 'button';
1162:                             toActiveBtn.setAttribute('data-scroll-name', scrollName);
1163:                             toActiveBtn.setAttribute('data-action', 'to-active');
1164:                             toActiveBtn.textContent = 'To Active';
1165:                             Object.assign(toActiveBtn.style, {
1166:                                 backgroundColor: '#f39c12', color: 'white', border: 'none',
1167:                                 padding: '8px 12px', borderRadius: '5px', cursor: 'pointer', fontWeight: 'bold'
1168:                             });
1169:                             buttonRow.appendChild(toActiveBtn);
1170:                         }
1171: 
1172:                         const toCommonBtn = document.createElement('button');
1173:                         toCommonBtn.type = 'button';
1174:                         toCommonBtn.setAttribute('data-scroll-name', scrollName);
1175:                         toCommonBtn.setAttribute('data-action', 'to-common');
1176:                         toCommonBtn.textContent = 'To Common';
1177:                         Object.assign(toCommonBtn.style, {
1178:                             backgroundColor: '#e74c3c', color: 'white', border: 'none',
1179:                             padding: '8px 12px', borderRadius: '5px', cursor: 'pointer', fontWeight: 'bold'
1180:                         });
1181:                         buttonRow.appendChild(toCommonBtn);
1182: 
1183:                         card.appendChild(buttonRow);
1184:                         content.appendChild(card);
1185:                     });
1186: 
1187:                     // Active scrolls: can move to Common only (frees space so hand→active becomes possible)
1188:                     [...scrolls.active].forEach(scrollName => {
1189:                         const pattern = self.patterns[scrollName];
1190:                         const element = self.getScrollElement(scrollName);
1191:                         const elementColor = element === 'catacomb' ? '#9b59b6' : STONE_TYPES[element]?.color || '#666';
1192: 
1193:                         const card = document.createElement('div');
1194:                         Object.assign(card.style, {
1195:                             backgroundColor: '#3a2a1a',
1196:                             border: '2px solid #f39c12',
1197:                             borderRadius: '8px',
1198:                             padding: '12px',
1199:                             marginBottom: '10px',
1200:                             color: 'white'
1201:                         });
1202: 
1203:                         const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');
1204:                         nameSpan.textContent = '⚡ Active: ' + (pattern ? pattern.name : scrollName);
1205:                         nameSpan.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
1206:                         nameSpan.style.color = elementColor;
1207:                         card.appendChild(nameSpan);
1208:                         if (pattern) {
1209:                             const desc = document.createElement('div');
1210:                             desc.textContent = pattern.description;
1211:                             desc.style.fontSize = '12px';
1212:                             desc.style.color = '#95a5a6';
1213:                             desc.style.marginTop = '4px';
1214:                             desc.style.marginBottom = '8px';
1215:                             card.appendChild(desc);
1216:                         }
1217: 
1218:                         const toCommonBtn = document.createElement('button');
1219:                         toCommonBtn.type = 'button';
1220:                         toCommonBtn.setAttribute('data-scroll-name', scrollName);
1221:                         toCommonBtn.setAttribute('data-action', 'to-common');
1222:                         toCommonBtn.textContent = 'To Common';
1223:                         Object.assign(toCommonBtn.style, {
1224:                             backgroundColor: '#e74c3c', color: 'white', border: 'none',
1225:                             padding: '8px 12px', borderRadius: '5px', cursor: 'pointer', fontWeight: 'bold'
1226:                         });
1227:                         card.appendChild(toCommonBtn);
1228:                         content.appendChild(card);
1229:                     });
1230: 
1231:                     const doneRow = document.createElement('div');
1232:                     doneRow.style.marginTop = '16px';
1233:                     doneRow.style.textAlign = 'center';
1234: 
1235:                     const doneBtn = document.createElement('button');
1236:                     doneBtn.type = 'button';
1237:                     doneBtn.textContent = stillOverflow ? 'Resolve overflow first' : 'Done – End Turn';
1238:                     doneBtn.disabled = stillOverflow;
1239:                     Object.assign(doneBtn.style, {
1240:                         backgroundColor: stillOverflow ? '#555' : '#27ae60',
1241:                         color: 'white',
1242:                         border: 'none',
1243:                         padding: '10px 20px',
1244:                         borderRadius: '5px',
1245:                         cursor: stillOverflow ? 'not-allowed' : 'pointer',
1246:                         fontWeight: 'bold',
1247:                         fontSize: '14px'
1248:                     });
1249:                     doneBtn.onclick = () => {
1250:                         if (stillOverflow) return;
1251:                         document.body.removeChild(overlay);
1252:                         onResolved();
1253:                     };
1254:                     doneRow.appendChild(doneBtn);
1255:                     content.appendChild(doneRow);
1256:                 }
1257: 
1258:                 renderContent();
1259:                 overlay.appendChild(popup);
1260:                 document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1261:             }
1262: 
1263:             showScrollNotification(scrollInfo, elementType) {
1264:                 const stoneType = STONE_TYPES[elementType];
1265:                 const color = stoneType ? stoneType.color : '#9458f4';
1266:                 const symbol = stoneType ? stoneType.symbol : '✺';
1267: 
1268:                 const overlay = document.createElement('div');
1269:                 overlay.className = 'retro-dlg-overlay';
1270:                 overlay.id = 'scroll-found-overlay';
1271: 
1272:                 const box = document.createElement('div');
1273:                 box.className = 'retro-dlg-box wide';
1274: 
1275:                 const title = document.createElement('div');
1276:                 title.textContent = 'New Scroll Found!';
1277:                 title.className = 'retro-dlg-title';
1278:                 title.style.color = color;
1279:                 box.appendChild(title);
1280: 
1281:                 const card = document.createElement('div');
1282:                 card.className = 'si-card';
1283: 
1284:                 const nameRow = document.createElement('div');
1285:                 nameRow.className = 'si-card-header';
1286:                 const nameEl = document.createElement('div');
1287:                 nameEl.innerHTML = `<span style="color:${color}">${symbol}</span> ${scrollInfo.name}`;
1288:                 nameEl.className = 'si-card-name';
1289:                 nameRow.appendChild(nameEl);
1290:                 card.appendChild(nameRow);
1291: 
1292:                 const desc = document.createElement('div');
1293:                 desc.textContent = scrollInfo.description;
1294:                 desc.className = 'si-card-desc';
1295:                 card.appendChild(desc);
1296: 
1297:                 const patternVisual = this.createPatternVisual(scrollInfo, elementType);
1298:                 card.appendChild(patternVisual);
1299: 
1300:                 box.appendChild(card);
1301: 
1302:                 const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
1303:                 closeBtn.textContent = 'Got it!';
1304:                 closeBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn ok';
1305:                 closeBtn.style.width = '100%';
1306:                 closeBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
1307:                 box.appendChild(closeBtn);
1308: 
1309:                 overlay.appendChild(box);
1310:                 document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1311:             }
1312: 
1313:             checkPattern(patternName) {
1314:                 // Use the active player's position by default
1315:                 return this.checkPatternForPlayer(patternName, activePlayerIndex);
1316:             }
1317: 
1318:             // Check pattern for a specific player (used by response window)
1319:             checkPatternForPlayer(patternName, playerIndex) {
1320:                 const pattern = this.patterns[patternName];
1321:                 if (!pattern) return false;
1322: 
1323:                 // Get the player's position
1324:                 let pos;
1325:                 if (playerIndex === activePlayerIndex && playerPosition) {
1326:                     // Use global playerPosition for active player
1327:                     pos = playerPosition;
1328:                 } else if (playerPositions && playerPositions[playerIndex]) {
1329:                     // Use playerPositions array for other players
1330:                     pos = playerPositions[playerIndex];
1331:                 } else {
1332:                     return false;
1333:                 }
1334: 
1335:                 const playerHex = pixelToHex(pos.x, pos.y, TILE_SIZE);
1336: 
1337:                 console.log(`  Checking ${patternName} for player ${playerIndex}...`);
1338: 
1339:                 return pattern.patterns.some((patternVariant, variantIdx) => {
1340:                     const allMatch = patternVariant.every((req, reqIdx) => {
1341:                         const checkHex = hexToPixel(playerHex.q + req.q, playerHex.r + req.r, TILE_SIZE);
1342:                         const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
1343:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - checkHex.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - checkHex.y, 2));
1344:                             const matches = dist < 5 && s.type === req.type;
1345:                             if (matches) {
1346:                                 console.log(`    ✓ Found ${s.type} stone at (${req.q}, ${req.r})`);
1347:                             }
1348:                             return matches;
1349:                         });
1350:                         if (!stone) {
1351:                             console.log(`    ✗ Missing ${req.type} stone at (${req.q}, ${req.r})`);
1352:                         }
1353:                         return !!stone;
1354:                     });
1355: 
1356:                     if (allMatch) {
1357:                         console.log(`    ✓✓✓ PATTERN VARIANT ${variantIdx + 1} MATCHED!`);
1358:                     }
1359:                     return allMatch;
1360:                 });
1361:             }
1362: 
1363:             // Get current spell AP cost (may be reduced by buffs)
1364:             getSpellCost(spell = null, playerIndex = activePlayerIndex) {
1365:                 // Quick Reflexes: level 1 scrolls cost 0 until caster's next turn
1366:                 if (spell && spell.level === 1 && this.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.quickReflexes) {
1367:                     const qr = this.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.quickReflexes;
1368:                     if (qr.playerIndex === playerIndex) {
1369:                         return 0;
1370:                     }
1371:                 }
1372:                 // Simplify: scrolls cost 1 for the caster this turn
1373:                 if (this.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.simplify) {
1374:                     const buff = this.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.simplify;
1375:                     if (buff.playerIndex === playerIndex) {
1376:                         return 1;
1377:                     }
1378:                 }
1379:                 return this.SPELL_AP_COST;
1380:             }
1381: 
1382:             castSpell() {
1383:                 // Scrolls in Active Area OR Common Area can be activated
1384:                 const activeScrollsList = Array.from(this.getPlayerScrolls(false).active);
1385:                 const commonAreaScrolls = this.getCommonAreaScrolls();
1386:                 const allCastableScrolls = [...activeScrollsList, ...commonAreaScrolls];
1387:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
1388:                     window.logScrollEvent('cast_attempt', {
1389:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1390:                         active: activeScrollsList,
1391:                         common: commonAreaScrolls
1392:                     });
1393:                 }
1394: 
1395:                 if (allCastableScrolls.length === 0) {
1396:                     updateStatus("No scrolls available! Move scrolls to Active Area or use Common Area scrolls.");
1397:                     return false;
1398:                 }
1399: 
1400:                 // Debug: Log player position and nearby stones (throttled)
1401:                 if (shouldDebugLog('castSpellDebug', 1000)) {
1402:                     console.log('✨ Attempting to cast spell...');
1403:                     console.log(`Player position: (${playerPosition.x.toFixed(1)}, ${playerPosition.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1404:                     console.log(`Active scrolls: ${activeScrollsList.join(', ')}`);
1405:                     console.log(`Common area scrolls: ${commonAreaScrolls.join(', ')}`);
1406: 
1407:                     if (playerPosition) {
1408:                         const playerHex = pixelToHex(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y, TILE_SIZE);
1409:                         console.log(`Player hex: q=${playerHex.q}, r=${playerHex.r}`);
1410: 
1411:                         // Log nearby stones
1412:                         console.log('Nearby stones:');
1413:                         const nearbyStones = [];
1414:                         placedStones.forEach(stone => {
1415:                             const stoneHex = pixelToHex(stone.x, stone.y, TILE_SIZE);
1416:                             const relQ = stoneHex.q - playerHex.q;
1417:                             const relR = stoneHex.r - playerHex.r;
1418:                             nearbyStones.push({ type: stone.type, q: relQ, r: relR });
1419:                             console.log(`  ${stone.type} at relative (${relQ}, ${relR})`);
1420:                         });
1421: 
1422:                         // Check each castable scroll and show why it doesn't match
1423:                         console.log('\nChecking castable scrolls (Active + Common Area):');
1424:                         for (const scrollName of allCastableScrolls) {
1425:                             const pattern = this.patterns[scrollName];
1426:                             console.log(`\n${scrollName} requires:`);
1427:                             pattern.patterns.forEach((patternVariant, idx) => {
1428:                                 const coords = patternVariant.map(p => `(${p.q},${p.r}) ${p.type}`).join(' + ');
1429:                                 const matches = patternVariant.every(req => {
1430:                                     return nearbyStones.some(s => s.q === req.q && s.r === req.r && s.type === req.type);
1431:                                 });
1432:                                 console.log(`  Pattern ${idx + 1}: ${coords} - ${matches ? '✓ MATCH' : '✗ no match'}`);
1433:                             });
1434:                         }
1435:                     }
1436:                 }
1437: 
1438:                 const matchingSpells = [];
1439:                 // Check scrolls in Active Area AND Common Area
1440:                 for (const scrollName of allCastableScrolls) {
1441:                     if (this.checkPattern(scrollName)) {
1442:                         console.log(`\n✓ Pattern match found: ${scrollName}`);
1443:                         const isFromCommonArea = commonAreaScrolls.includes(scrollName);
1444:                         matchingSpells.push({ name: scrollName, spell: this.patterns[scrollName], fromCommonArea: isFromCommonArea });
1445:                     }
1446:                 }
1447: 
1448:                 if (matchingSpells.length === 0) {
1449:                     updateStatus("No valid spell pattern found! Check console for details.");
1450:                     console.log('\n✗ No matching patterns');
1451:                     return false;
1452:                 }
1453: 
1454:                 matchingSpells.sort((a, b) => b.spell.level - a.spell.level);
1455: 
1456:                 // Level 1 scrolls can only be used during the response window
1457:                 const mainPhaseSpells = matchingSpells.filter(s => s.spell.level !== 1);
1458:                 if (mainPhaseSpells.length === 0) {
1459:                     updateStatus('Level 1 scrolls can only be used as responses.');
1460:                     return false;
1461:                 }
1462: 
1463:                 // Filter by affordability based on each spell's actual cost
1464:                 const affordableSpells = mainPhaseSpells.filter(({ spell }) => {
1465:                     const cost = this.getSpellCost(spell, activePlayerIndex);
1466:                     return canAfford(cost);
1467:                 });
1468: 
1469:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
1470:                     window.logScrollEvent('cast_matches', {
1471:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1472:                         matches: matchingSpells.map(m => ({ name: m.name, level: m.spell.level, element: m.spell.element })),
1473:                         affordable: affordableSpells.map(m => ({ name: m.name, level: m.spell.level, element: m.spell.element }))
1474:                     });
1475:                 }
1476: 
1477:                 if (affordableSpells.length === 0) {
1478:                     const minCost = Math.min(...matchingSpells.map(({ spell }) => this.getSpellCost(spell, activePlayerIndex)));
1479:                     updateStatus(`Not enough AP! Need ${minCost} AP to cast.`);
1480:                     return false;
1481:                 }
1482: 
1483:                 if (affordableSpells.length > 1) {
1484:                     // Always show selection when multiple scrolls match
1485:                     this.showSpellSelection(affordableSpells);
1486:                 } else {
1487:                     this.executeSpell(affordableSpells[0]);
1488:                 }
1489:                 return true;
1490:             }
1491: 
1492:             showSpellSelection(spells) {
1493:                 const popup = document.createElement('div');
1494:                 Object.assign(popup.style, {
1495:                     position: 'fixed', left: '50%', top: '50%',
1496:                     transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
1497:                     backgroundColor: '#2c3e50', padding: '20px',
1498:                     borderRadius: '10px', boxShadow: '0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
1499:                     zIndex: '1000', color: 'white', minWidth: '300px'
1500:                 });
1501: 
1502:                 const header = document.createElement('div');
1503:                 header.style.display = 'flex';
1504:                 header.style.alignItems = 'center';
1505:                 header.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
1506:                 header.style.marginBottom = '12px';
1507:                 const title = document.createElement('h3');
1508:                 title.textContent = 'Select Scroll to Cast';
1509:                 title.style.textAlign = 'center';
1510:                 title.style.margin = '0';
1511:                 title.style.flex = '1';
1512:                 header.appendChild(title);
1513:                 const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
1514:                 closeBtn.textContent = '\u00D7';
1515:                 closeBtn.title = 'Close';
1516:                 closeBtn.style.cssText = 'background:none;border:none;color:white;font-size:24px;cursor:pointer;line-height:1;padding:0 8px;';
1517:                 closeBtn.onclick = () => document.body.removeChild(popup);
1518:                 header.appendChild(closeBtn);
1519:                 popup.appendChild(header);
1520: 
1521:                 spells.forEach(({name, spell, fromCommonArea}) => {
1522:                     const btn = document.createElement('button');
1523:                     const sourceLabel = fromCommonArea ? ' [Common]' : '';
1524:                     btn.textContent = `${spell.name} (+${spell.level} ${spell.element})${sourceLabel}`;
1525:                     btn.style.width = '100%';
1526:                     btn.style.marginBottom = '10px';
1527:                     if (fromCommonArea) {
1528:                         btn.style.borderLeft = '4px solid #9b59b6'; // Purple border for common area
1529:                     }
1530:                     btn.onclick = () => {
1531:                         document.body.removeChild(popup);
1532:                         this.executeSpell({name, spell, fromCommonArea});
1533:                     };
1534:                     popup.appendChild(btn);
1535:                 });
1536: 
1537:                 document.body.appendChild(popup);
1538:             }
1539: 
1540:             executeSpell({name, spell, fromCommonArea = false}) {
1541:                 const cost = this.getSpellCost(spell, activePlayerIndex);
1542:                 if (!canAfford(cost)) {
1543:                     updateStatus(`Not enough AP! Need ${cost} AP to cast.`);
1544:                     return false;
1545:                 }
1546:                 // Spend AP first (may be reduced by buffs)
1547:                 spendAP(cost);
1548:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
1549:                     window.logScrollEvent('cast_execute', {
1550:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1551:                         scrollName: name,
1552:                         element: spell.element,
1553:                         level: spell.level,
1554:                         cost,
1555:                         fromCommonArea
1556:                     });
1557:                 }
1558: 
1559:                 const scrollData = { name, spell, fromCommonArea, casterIndex: activePlayerIndex };
1560: 
1561:                 // Open response window when 2+ players so the react phase always runs (others can respond or pass)
1562:                 const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 0;
1563:                 if (this.responseWindow && numPlayers > 1) {
1564:                     console.log('Opening response window (react phase)');
1565:                     this.responseWindow.openResponseWindow(scrollData, activePlayerIndex, (result) => {
1566:                         this.handleResponseWindowComplete(scrollData, result);
1567:                     });
1568:                     return; // Don't apply effects yet
1569:                 }
1570: 
1571:                 // No response window needed - apply effects immediately
1572:                 console.log('Response window skipped - no valid responses available');
1573:                 this.applyScrollEffects(name, spell, fromCommonArea);
1574:             }
1575: 
1576:             // Handle the completion of response window
1577:             handleResponseWindowComplete(originalScrollData, result) {
1578:                 if (result.skipped) {
1579:                     // No responses - apply original scroll effects
1580:                     this.applyScrollEffects(originalScrollData.name, originalScrollData.spell, originalScrollData.fromCommonArea);
1581:                     return;
1582:                 }
1583: 
1584:                 // Process resolved scrolls from the stack
1585:                 // The response window already handles the LIFO resolution
1586:                 // We just need to check if the original scroll was countered
1587:                 const wasCountered = result.responses.some(r =>
1588:                     r.isOriginal && r.result === 'countered'
1589:                 );
1590: 
1591:                 if (wasCountered) {
1592:                     updateStatus(`Your ${originalScrollData.spell.name} was countered!`);
1593:                     // Broadcast the counter in multiplayer
1594:                     if (isMultiplayer) {
1595:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-countered', {
1596:                             scrollName: originalScrollData.name,
1597:                             casterIndex: originalScrollData.casterIndex
1598:                         });
1599:                     }
1600:                     // Still need to handle scroll disposition for countered scroll
1601:                     this.handleScrollDisposition(originalScrollData.name, originalScrollData.fromCommonArea);
1602:                 } else {
1603:                     // Original not countered: already applied by scroll-resolved listener when event fired.
1604:                     // Nothing to do here (avoids double-apply).
1605:                 }
1606:             }
1607: 
1608:             // Apply the actual scroll effects (separated from executeSpell for response window support)
1609:             applyScrollEffects(name, spell, fromCommonArea = false) {
1610:                 // Handle scroll disposition (remove from player and decide where it goes)
1611:                 this.handleScrollDisposition(name, fromCommonArea);
1612: 
1613:                 // Save the previous scroll cast (before recording this one) for effects like Sigh of Recollection
1614:                 const previousScrollCast = this.scrollEffects ? this.scrollEffects.lastScrollCastThisTurn : null;
1615: 
1616:                 // Track this scroll for Reflect (Water I) effect
1617:                 if (this.scrollEffects) {
1618:                     this.scrollEffects.recordScrollCast(name, spell);
1619:                 }
1620: 
1621:                 // Check if this scroll has a special effect (Earth scrolls, etc.)
1622:                 // Lazy-init: get ScrollEffects from window or global (in case load order / scope hid it at construction)
1623:                 if (!this.scrollEffects) {
1624:                     const SE = (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.ScrollEffects) || (typeof ScrollEffects !== 'undefined' && ScrollEffects);
1625:                     if (SE) {
1626:                         SE.init(this);
1627:                         this.scrollEffects = SE;
1628:                         console.log('Scroll effects system initialized (lazy)');
1629:                     }
1630:                 }
1631:                 if (this.scrollEffects) {
1632:                     console.log(`📜 Looking up effect for: "${name}", effects keys:`, Object.keys(this.scrollEffects.effects));
1633:                     const effect = this.scrollEffects.getEffect(name);
1634:                     console.log(`📜 getEffect("${name}") returned:`, effect ? effect.name : null);
1635:                     if (effect) {
1636:                         console.log(`📜 Executing special effect for ${name}: ${effect.name}`);
1637:                         // Wrap execute in try/catch so win-condition tracking always runs even if the
1638:                         // effect throws (e.g. DOM error inside enterTransmuteMode or similar)
1639:                         let result = { success: false, requiresSelection: false };
1640:                         try {
1641:                             result = this.scrollEffects.execute(name, activePlayerIndex, { spell, scrollName: name, previousScrollCast }) || result;
1642:                         } catch (execErr) {
1643:                             console.error(`❌ Effect execute threw for "${name}":`, execErr);
1644:                             // Continue below to still track win condition and broadcast
1645:                         }
1646:                         if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
1647:                             window.logScrollEvent('effect_execute', {
1648:                                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1649:                                 scrollName: name,
1650:                                 effectName: effect.name,
1651:                                 success: result?.success,
1652:                                 requiresSelection: !!result?.requiresSelection,
1653:                                 message: result?.message
1654:                             });
1655:                         }
1656: 
1657:                         // Refresh all stone count UI after scroll effect (effects may modify pools)
1658:                         ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(t => updateStoneCount(t));
1659: 
1660:                         // Track activated element(s) for win condition regardless of effect result
1661:                         if (spell.element === 'catacomb' && spell.patterns && spell.patterns[0]) {
1662:                             // Catacomb scrolls activate each component element
1663:                             const elements = new Set(spell.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type));
1664:                             elements.forEach(el => {
1665:                                 this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.add(el);
1666:                                 if (typeof window.gami?.onElementActivated === 'function') {
1667:                                     window.gami.onElementActivated(el, Array.from(this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated));
1668:                                 }
1669:                             });
1670:                         } else {
1671:                             this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.add(spell.element);
1672:                             if (typeof window.gami?.onElementActivated === 'function') {
1673:                                 window.gami.onElementActivated(spell.element, Array.from(this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated));
1674:                             }
1675:                         }
1676:                         updatePlayerElementSymbols(activePlayerIndex);
1677: 
1678:                         // If effect requires selection, don't continue with broadcast yet
1679:                         if (result.requiresSelection) {
1680:                             return; // Selection mode will call onSelectionEffectComplete when done
1681:                         }
1682: 
1683:                         // Broadcast the effect in multiplayer
1684:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
1685:                             // For catacomb scrolls, send component elements for win condition tracking
1686:                             const activatedElements = (spell.element === 'catacomb' && spell.patterns && spell.patterns[0])
1687:                                 ? [...new Set(spell.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
1688:                                 : [spell.element];
1689:                             broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
1690:                                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1691:                                 scrollName: name,
1692:                                 effectName: effect.name,
1693:                                 element: spell.element,
1694:                                 activatedElements: activatedElements
1695:                             });
1696:                             syncPlayerState();
1697:                         }
1698: 
1699:                         // Check win condition
1700:                         if (this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.size === 5) {
1701:                             this.showLevelComplete(activePlayerIndex);
1702:                             if (isMultiplayer) {
1703:                                 handleGameOver(activePlayerIndex);
1704:                             }
1705:                         }
1706:                         return;
1707:                     } else {
1708:                         console.warn(`📜 No effect defined for scroll "${name}" – using default (give stones). Add effect in scroll-effects.js for "${name}".`);
1709:                     }
1710:                 } else {
1711:                     console.warn('📜 Scroll effects not available – using default (give stones). Is js/scrolls/effects/scroll-effects.js loaded?');
1712:                 }
1713: 
1714:                 // Default behavior: give stones based on scroll level
1715:                 if (spell.element === 'catacomb') {
1716:                     // Catacomb scrolls give +2 of each element type in the pattern
1717:                     const elementCounts = {};
1718:                     spell.patterns[0].forEach(pos => {
1719:                         elementCounts[pos.type] = (elementCounts[pos.type] || 0) + 1;
1720:                     });
1721: 
1722:                     const rewards = [];
1723:                     Object.entries(elementCounts).forEach(([element, count]) => {
1724:                         playerPool[element] = Math.min(
1725:                             playerPoolCapacity[element],
1726:                             playerPool[element] + count
1727:                         );
1728:                         updateStoneCount(element);
1729: 
1730:                         // Track activated element for win condition (for active player)
1731:                         this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.add(element);
1732:                         rewards.push(`+${count} ${element}`);
1733:                     });
1734: 
1735:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(activePlayerIndex);
1736:                     updateStatus(`Catacomb spell cast! Added ${rewards.join(', ')} stones!`);
1737:                 } else {
1738:                     // Regular element scrolls
1739:                     playerPool[spell.element] = Math.min(
1740:                         playerPoolCapacity[spell.element],
1741:                         playerPool[spell.element] + spell.level
1742:                     );
1743:                     updateStoneCount(spell.element);
1744: 
1745:                     // Track activated element for win condition (for active player)
1746:                     this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.add(spell.element);
1747:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(activePlayerIndex);
1748:                     updateStatus(`Spell cast! Added +${spell.level} ${spell.element} stones!`);
1749:                 }
1750: 
1751:                 // Broadcast spell cast in multiplayer
1752:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
1753:                     if (spell.element === 'catacomb') {
1754:                         const elementCounts = {};
1755:                         spell.patterns[0].forEach(pos => {
1756:                             elementCounts[pos.type] = (elementCounts[pos.type] || 0) + 1;
1757:                         });
1758:                         broadcastGameAction('spell-cast', {
1759:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1760:                             spellName: name,
