1761:                             elements: Object.keys(elementCounts),
1762:                             isCatacomb: true
1763:                         });
1764:                     } else {
1765:                         broadcastGameAction('spell-cast', {
1766:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1767:                             spellName: name,
1768:                             element: spell.element,
1769:                             level: spell.level,
1770:                             isCatacomb: false
1771:                         });
1772:                     }
1773: 
1774:                     // Sync resources after spell adds stones
1775:                     syncPlayerState();
1776:                 }
1777: 
1778:                 // Check if THIS player has won (activated all 5 elements)
1779:                 if (this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.size === 5) {
1780:                     this.showLevelComplete(activePlayerIndex);
1781: 
1782:                     // In multiplayer, mark game as finished in database
1783:                     if (isMultiplayer) {
1784:                         handleGameOver(activePlayerIndex);
1785:                     }
1786:                 }
1787:             }
1788: 
1789:             // Called by scroll effects when a selection-based effect (e.g. Shifting Sands) is completed
1790:             onSelectionEffectComplete(scrollName, effectName, spell) {
1791:                 // Update element symbols on player tile
1792:                 if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
1793:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(activePlayerIndex);
1794:                 }
1795: 
1796:                 // Gamification hook for element activation via interactive scroll
1797:                 if (typeof window.gami?.onElementActivated === 'function') {
1798:                     const activatedEl = (spell.element === 'catacomb' && spell.patterns && spell.patterns[0])
1799:                         ? [...new Set(spell.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
1800:                         : [spell.element];
1801:                     activatedEl.forEach(el => {
1802:                         window.gami.onElementActivated(el, Array.from(this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated));
1803:                     });
1804:                 }
1805: 
1806:                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
1807:                     // Determine activated elements (for catacomb scrolls)
1808:                     const activatedElements = (spell.element === 'catacomb' && spell.patterns && spell.patterns[0])
1809:                         ? [...new Set(spell.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
1810:                         : [spell.element];
1811: 
1812:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
1813:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1814:                         scrollName: scrollName,
1815:                         effectName: effectName,
1816:                         element: spell.element,
1817:                         activatedElements: activatedElements
1818:                     });
1819:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
1820:                 }
1821:                 if (this.getPlayerScrolls(false).activated.size === 5) {
1822:                     this.showLevelComplete(activePlayerIndex);
1823:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
1824:                         handleGameOver(activePlayerIndex);
1825:                     }
1826:                 }
1827:             }
1828: 
1829:             // Handle scroll disposition after casting
1830:             // Scrolls normally stay in active area after being cast
1831:             // If Unbidden Lamplight was used in response, the scroll goes to common area
1832:             handleScrollDisposition(scrollName, fromCommonArea = false, forceToCommonArea = false) {
1833:                 const scrolls = this.getPlayerScrolls(false);
1834: 
1835:                 // If the scroll came from common area, remove it from there
1836:                 // (it was "borrowed" from common area to cast)
1837:                 if (fromCommonArea) {
1838:                     // Remove from commonArea object (keyed by element)
1839:                     const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
1840:                     if (element && this.commonArea[element] === scrollName) {
1841:                         this.commonArea[element] = null;
1842:                     }
1843:                 }
1844: 
1845:                 // Check if Unbidden Lamplight has marked this scroll to go to caster's hand
1846:                 const redirect = this.scrollEffects?.pendingHandRedirect;
1847:                 if (redirect && redirect.scrollName === scrollName) {
1848:                     // Remove from the ORIGINAL CASTER's active area
1849:                     const originalCasterIndex = redirect.originalCasterIndex;
1850:                     if (originalCasterIndex !== undefined && this.playerScrolls[originalCasterIndex]) {
1851:                         const originalCasterScrolls = this.playerScrolls[originalCasterIndex];
1852:                         if (originalCasterScrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
1853:                             originalCasterScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
1854:                         }
1855:                     } else if (scrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
1856:                         scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
1857:                     }
1858: 
1859:                     // Add to lamplight caster's hand
1860:                     const lamplightCasterIndex = redirect.redirectToPlayerIndex;
1861:                     this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(lamplightCasterIndex);
1862:                     this.playerScrolls[lamplightCasterIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
1863: 
1864:                     // Clear the pending redirect
1865:                     this.scrollEffects.pendingHandRedirect = null;
1866: 
1867:                     updateStatus('Unbidden Lamplight sent the scroll to your hand!');
1868:                 } else if (forceToCommonArea) {
1869:                     // Explicit request to send to common area
1870:                     if (scrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
1871:                         scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
1872:                     }
1873:                     this.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
1874:                 }
1875:                 // Otherwise, scroll remains in player's active area - NO auto-discard!
1876: 
1877:                 // Update scroll UI
1878:                 this.updateScrollCount();
1879:                 updateCommonAreaUI();
1880: 
1881:                 // Broadcast in multiplayer
1882:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
1883:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-used', {
1884:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1885:                         scrollName: scrollName,
1886:                         fromCommonArea: fromCommonArea,
1887:                         forceToCommonArea: forceToCommonArea
1888:                     });
1889:                 }
1890:             }
1891: 
1892:             showLevelComplete(playerIndex) {
1893:                 const overlay = document.createElement('div');
1894:                 overlay.className = 'game-over-overlay';
1895: 
1896:                 const box = document.createElement('div');
1897:                 box.className = 'game-over-box';
1898: 
1899:                 const title = document.createElement('div');
1900:                 title.textContent = 'VICTORY';
1901:                 title.className = 'game-over-title';
1902:                 box.appendChild(title);
1903: 
1904:                 const playerColor = playerPositions[playerIndex]?.color;
1905:                 const colorNames = {
1906:                     '#9458f4': 'Purple wins!',
1907:                     '#ffce00': 'Yellow wins!',
1908:                     '#ed1b43': 'Red wins!',
1909:                     '#5894f4': 'Blue wins!',
1910:                     '#69d83a': 'Green wins!'
1911:                 };
1912:                 const playerName = document.createElement('div');
1913:                 playerName.textContent = colorNames[playerColor] || `Player ${playerIndex + 1} wins!`;
1914:                 playerName.className = 'game-over-winner';
1915:                 playerName.style.color = playerColor || '#d9b08c';
1916:                 box.appendChild(playerName);
1917: 
1918:                 const msg = document.createElement('div');
1919:                 msg.textContent = 'You have mastered all five elements!';
1920:                 msg.className = 'game-over-msg';
1921:                 box.appendChild(msg);
1922: 
1923:                 const elements = document.createElement('div');
1924:                 elements.className = 'game-over-elements';
1925:                 elements.innerHTML = '▲ ◯ ♦ ≋ ✺';
1926:                 box.appendChild(elements);
1927: 
1928:                 const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
1929:                 subtitle.textContent = 'The path of balance is complete.';
1930:                 subtitle.className = 'game-over-subtitle';
1931:                 box.appendChild(subtitle);
1932: 
1933:                 const btnRow = document.createElement('div');
1934:                 btnRow.className = 'game-over-btns';
1935: 
1936:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
1937:                     const lobbyBtn = document.createElement('button');
1938:                     lobbyBtn.textContent = 'Return to Lobby';
1939:                     lobbyBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn ok';
1940:                     lobbyBtn.onclick = () => window.location.reload();
1941:                     btnRow.appendChild(lobbyBtn);
1942:                 } else {
1943:                     const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
1944:                     closeBtn.textContent = 'Continue Playing';
1945:                     closeBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn cancel';
1946:                     closeBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
1947:                     btnRow.appendChild(closeBtn);
1948:                 }
1949: 
1950:                 box.appendChild(btnRow);
1951:                 overlay.appendChild(box);
1952:                 document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1953:             }
1954: 
1955:             createPatternVisual(scroll, elementType) {
1956:                 const container = document.createElement('div');
1957:                 container.style.display = 'flex';
1958:                 container.style.justifyContent = 'center';
1959:                 container.style.alignItems = 'center';
1960:                 container.style.padding = '15px';
1961:                 container.style.backgroundColor = '#2c3e50';
1962:                 container.style.borderRadius = '5px';
1963:                 container.style.marginTop = '10px';
1964:                 container.style.position = 'relative';
1965: 
1966:                 // Create SVG
1967:                 const svg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'svg');
1968:                 svg.setAttribute('width', '200');
1969:                 svg.setAttribute('height', '200');
1970:                 svg.setAttribute('viewBox', '-100 -100 200 200');
1971: 
1972:                 const hexSize = 15;
1973: 
1974:                 // Helper to create hex points
1975:                 const createHexPoints = (cx, cy, size) => {
1976:                     const points = [];
1977:                     for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
1978:                         const angle = (Math.PI / 3) * i - Math.PI / 6;
1979:                         points.push(`${cx + size * Math.cos(angle)},${cy + size * Math.sin(angle)}`);
1980:                     }
1981:                     return points.join(' ');
1982:                 };
1983: 
1984:                 // Helper to convert axial to pixel
1985:                 const axialToPixel = (q, r) => {
1986:                     const x = hexSize * (Math.sqrt(3) * q + Math.sqrt(3)/2 * r);
1987:                     const y = hexSize * (3/2 * r);
1988:                     return { x, y };
1989:                 };
1990: 
1991:                 // Draw background hexes in a grid (static layer)
1992:                 const backgroundGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
1993:                 for (let q = -2; q <= 2; q++) {
1994:                     for (let r = -2; r <= 2; r++) {
1995:                         if (Math.abs(q + r) <= 2) {
1996:                             const pos = axialToPixel(q, r);
1997:                             const hex = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
1998:                             hex.setAttribute('points', createHexPoints(pos.x, pos.y, hexSize));
1999:                             hex.setAttribute('fill', '#34495e');
2000:                             hex.setAttribute('stroke', '#2c3e50');
2001:                             hex.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
2002:                             backgroundGroup.appendChild(hex);
2003:                         }
2004:                     }
2005:                 }
2006:                 svg.appendChild(backgroundGroup);
2007: 
2008:                 // Draw player hex (static layer)
2009:                 const playerHex = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
2010:                 playerHex.setAttribute('cx', '0');
2011:                 playerHex.setAttribute('cy', '0');
2012:                 playerHex.setAttribute('r', hexSize * 0.5);
2013:                 playerHex.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
2014:                 playerHex.setAttribute('stroke', '#333');
2015:                 playerHex.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
2016:                 svg.appendChild(playerHex);
2017: 
2018:                 // Create pattern groups for each variation (animated layers)
2019:                 const patternGroups = [];
2020:                 scroll.patterns.forEach((patternVariation, idx) => {
2021:                     const group = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
2022:                     group.style.opacity = idx === 0 ? '1' : '0';
2023:                     group.style.transition = 'opacity 0.5s ease-in-out';
2024: 
2025:                     patternVariation.forEach(pos => {
2026:                         const pixelPos = axialToPixel(pos.q, pos.r);
2027:                         const stoneHex = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2028:                         stoneHex.setAttribute('points', createHexPoints(pixelPos.x, pixelPos.y, hexSize));
2029:                         // Use pos.type if available (for catacomb multi-element), otherwise use elementType
2030:                         const stoneType = pos.type || elementType;
2031:                         stoneHex.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[stoneType].color);
2032:                         stoneHex.setAttribute('stroke', '#fff');
2033:                         stoneHex.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
2034:                         group.appendChild(stoneHex);
2035: 
2036:                         // Add symbol
2037:                         const symbol = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
2038:                         symbol.setAttribute('x', pixelPos.x);
2039:                         symbol.setAttribute('y', pixelPos.y);
2040:                         symbol.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
2041:                         symbol.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
2042:                         symbol.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
2043:                         symbol.setAttribute('font-size', '12');
2044:                         symbol.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
2045:                         symbol.textContent = STONE_TYPES[stoneType].symbol;
2046:                         group.appendChild(symbol);
2047:                     });
2048: 
2049:                     patternGroups.push(group);
2050:                     svg.appendChild(group);
2051:                 });
2052: 
2053:                 // Add pattern indicator text
2054:                 const indicatorText = document.createElement('div');
2055:                 indicatorText.style.position = 'absolute';
2056:                 indicatorText.style.bottom = '5px';
2057:                 indicatorText.style.right = '10px';
2058:                 indicatorText.style.fontSize = '11px';
2059:                 indicatorText.style.color = '#95a5a6';
2060:                 indicatorText.style.fontStyle = 'italic';
2061:                 indicatorText.textContent = `Pattern 1/${patternGroups.length}`;
2062:                 container.appendChild(indicatorText);
2063: 
2064:                 // Cycle through patterns
2065:                 let currentPatternIdx = 0;
2066:                 const cycleInterval = setInterval(() => {
2067:                     // Fade out current
2068:                     patternGroups[currentPatternIdx].style.opacity = '0';
2069:                     
2070:                     // Move to next
2071:                     currentPatternIdx = (currentPatternIdx + 1) % patternGroups.length;
2072:                     
2073:                     // Fade in next
2074:                     patternGroups[currentPatternIdx].style.opacity = '1';
2075:                     
2076:                     // Update indicator
2077:                     indicatorText.textContent = `Pattern ${currentPatternIdx + 1}/${patternGroups.length}`;
2078:                 }, 2500); // Change pattern every 2.5 seconds
2079: 
2080:                 // Store interval ID so we can clean it up if needed
2081:                 container.dataset.intervalId = cycleInterval;
2082: 
2083:                 container.appendChild(svg);
2084:                 return container;
2085:             }
2086: 
2087:             showInventory() {
2088:                 // Remove any existing inventory popup so we don't stack them
2089:                 const existingPopup = document.getElementById('scroll-inventory-popup');
2090:                 if (existingPopup) existingPopup.remove();
2091: 
2092:                 const popup = document.createElement('div');
2093:                 popup.id = 'scroll-inventory-popup'; // used by Transmute to refresh this popup
2094:                 Object.assign(popup.style, {
2095:                     position: 'fixed', left: '50%', top: '50%',
2096:                     transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
2097:                     zIndex: '1001', minWidth: '450px', maxWidth: '600px', maxHeight: '80vh',
2098:                     overflowY: 'auto'
2099:                 });
2100: 
2101:                 const title = document.createElement('h2');
2102:                 title.textContent = 'Scroll Inventory';
2103:                 title.className = 'si-title';
2104:                 title.style.color = '#3498db';
2105:                 popup.appendChild(title);
2106: 
2107:                 const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
2108:                 subtitle.textContent = `Hand: ${this.handScrolls.size}/${this.MAX_HAND_SIZE} | Active: ${this.activeScrolls.size}/${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}`;
2109:                 subtitle.className = 'si-subtitle';
2110:                 popup.appendChild(subtitle);
2111: 
2112:                 const closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
2113:                 closeBtn.textContent = '×';
2114:                 closeBtn.className = 'si-close';
2115:                 closeBtn.onclick = () => document.body.removeChild(popup);
2116:                 popup.appendChild(closeBtn);
2117: 
2118:                 const self = this;
2119: 
2120:                 // Helper to create a scroll card with move button
2121:                 const createScrollCard = (scrollName, scroll, element, location) => {
2122:                     const scrollDiv = document.createElement('div');
2123:                     scrollDiv.className = 'si-card' + (location === 'active' ? ' si-card-active' : '');
2124: 
2125:                     const headerRow = document.createElement('div');
2126:                     headerRow.className = 'si-card-header';
2127: 
2128:                     const nameDiv = document.createElement('div');
2129:                     nameDiv.textContent = scroll.name;
2130:                     nameDiv.className = 'si-card-name';
2131:                     headerRow.appendChild(nameDiv);
2132: 
2133:                     const canModify = !isMultiplayer || (myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex);
2134:                     if (canModify) {
2135:                         if (location === 'hand') {
2136:                             const moveBtn = document.createElement('button');
2137:                             moveBtn.textContent = 'To Active';
2138:                             moveBtn.className = 'si-btn si-btn-active-area';
2139:                             moveBtn.onclick = () => {
2140:                                 self.moveToActive(scrollName);
2141:                                 document.body.removeChild(popup);
2142:                                 self.showInventory();
2143:                             };
2144:                             headerRow.appendChild(moveBtn);
2145:                         }
2146: 
2147:                         const discardBtn = document.createElement('button');
2148:                         discardBtn.textContent = 'To Common';
2149:                         discardBtn.className = 'si-btn si-btn-common';
2150:                         discardBtn.onclick = () => {
2151:                             self.discardScroll(scrollName);
2152:                             document.body.removeChild(popup);
2153:                             self.showInventory();
2154:                         };
2155:                         headerRow.appendChild(discardBtn);
2156:                     }
2157: 
2158:                     scrollDiv.appendChild(headerRow);
2159: 
2160:                     const scrollDesc = document.createElement('div');
2161:                     scrollDesc.textContent = scroll.description;
2162:                     scrollDesc.className = 'si-card-desc';
2163:                     scrollDiv.appendChild(scrollDesc);
2164: 
2165:                     const patternVisual = this.createPatternVisual(scroll, element);
2166:                     scrollDiv.appendChild(patternVisual);
2167: 
2168:                     const patternInfo = document.createElement('div');
2169:                     patternInfo.className = 'si-pattern-box';
2170: 
2171:                     const patternTitle = document.createElement('div');
2172:                     patternTitle.textContent = 'Required Pattern (one of these):';
2173:                     patternTitle.className = 'si-pattern-title';
2174:                     patternInfo.appendChild(patternTitle);
2175: 
2176:                     const isCatacomb = element === 'catacomb';
2177:                     scroll.patterns.slice(0, 3).forEach((pattern, idx) => {
2178:                         const patternLine = document.createElement('div');
2179:                         const coords = isCatacomb
2180:                             ? pattern.map(pos => `${pos.type.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}(${pos.q},${pos.r})`).join(' + ')
2181:                             : pattern.map(pos => `(${pos.q},${pos.r})`).join(' + ');
2182:                         patternLine.textContent = `${idx + 1}. Stones at: ${coords}`;
2183:                         patternLine.className = 'si-pattern-line';
2184:                         patternInfo.appendChild(patternLine);
2185:                     });
2186: 
2187:                     if (scroll.patterns.length > 3) {
2188:                         const moreText = document.createElement('div');
2189:                         moreText.textContent = `... and ${scroll.patterns.length - 3} more rotations`;
2190:                         moreText.className = 'si-pattern-more';
2191:                         patternInfo.appendChild(moreText);
2192:                     }
2193: 
2194:                     scrollDiv.appendChild(patternInfo);
2195:                     return scrollDiv;
2196:                 };
2197: 
2198:                 // ACTIVE AREA SECTION
2199:                 const activeSection = document.createElement('div');
2200:                 activeSection.className = 'si-section si-active';
2201: 
2202:                 const activeHeader = document.createElement('h3');
2203:                 activeHeader.textContent = `Active Area (${this.activeScrolls.size}/${this.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE}) - Visible to opponents`;
2204:                 activeHeader.className = 'si-section-header';
2205:                 activeSection.appendChild(activeHeader);
2206: 
2207:                 const activeScrollsList = Array.from(this.activeScrolls);
2208:                 if (activeScrollsList.length === 0) {
2209:                     const emptyMsg = document.createElement('div');
2210:                     emptyMsg.textContent = 'No scrolls in active area. Move scrolls here to prepare for activation.';
2211:                     emptyMsg.className = 'si-empty';
2212:                     activeSection.appendChild(emptyMsg);
2213:                 } else {
2214:                     activeScrollsList.forEach(scrollName => {
2215:                         const scroll = this.patterns[scrollName];
2216:                         const element = this.getScrollElement(scrollName);
2217:                         activeSection.appendChild(createScrollCard(scrollName, scroll, element, 'active'));
2218:                     });
2219:                 }
2220:                 popup.appendChild(activeSection);
2221: 
2222:                 // COMMON AREA SECTION
2223:                 const commonSection = document.createElement('div');
2224:                 commonSection.className = 'si-section si-common';
2225: 
2226:                 const commonAreaScrolls = this.getCommonAreaScrolls();
2227:                 const commonHeader = document.createElement('h3');
2228:                 commonHeader.textContent = `Common Area (${commonAreaScrolls.length}/6) - Shared`;
2229:                 commonHeader.className = 'si-section-header';
2230:                 commonSection.appendChild(commonHeader);
2231: 
2232:                 const commonSubtitle = document.createElement('div');
2233:                 commonSubtitle.textContent = 'Discarded scrolls go here. Any player can activate these on their turn.';
2234:                 commonSubtitle.className = 'si-common-note';
2235:                 commonSection.appendChild(commonSubtitle);
2236: 
2237:                 if (commonAreaScrolls.length === 0) {
2238:                     const emptyMsg = document.createElement('div');
2239:                     emptyMsg.textContent = 'No scrolls in common area yet. Discarded scrolls will appear here.';
2240:                     emptyMsg.className = 'si-empty';
2241:                     commonSection.appendChild(emptyMsg);

2300:                             elementLabel.className = 'si-element-label';

2302:

2442:         // Mobile detection and touch support
2443:         let isMobile = false;
2444:         let mobileUIInitialized = false;
2445:         function computeIsMobile() {
2446:             return (/Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent)
2447:                 || window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').matches
2448:                 || (navigator.maxTouchPoints && navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0)
2449:                 || window.matchMedia('(pointer: coarse)').matches);
2450:         }
2451:         function updateIsMobile() {
2452:             const next = computeIsMobile();
2453:             if (next === isMobile && mobileUIInitialized) return;
2454:             isMobile = next;
2455: 
2456:             // Initialize mobile UI once when we enter mobile mode
2457:             if (isMobile && !mobileUIInitialized) {
2458:                 initializeMobileUI();
2459:                 mobileUIInitialized = true;
2460:             }
2461: 
2462:             // Keep mobile decks in sync if mobile is active
2463:             if (isMobile) {
2464:                 syncMobileTileDeck();
2465:                 syncMobileStoneDeck();
2466:             }
2467:         }

2482:         // Helper function to get event coordinates (works for both mouse and touch)
2483:         function getEventCoords(e) {
2484:             if (e.touches && e.touches.length > 0) {
2485:                 return { x: e.touches[0].clientX, y: e.touches[0].clientY };
2486:             }
2487:             return { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
2488:         }
2489: 
2490:         // Calculate angle between two touch points
2491:         function getTouchAngle(touch1, touch2) {
2492:             const dx = touch2.clientX - touch1.clientX;
2493:             const dy = touch2.clientY - touch1.clientY;
2494:             return Math.atan2(dy, dx) * (180 / Math.PI);
2495:         }
2496: 
2497:         // Snap angle to nearest 60 degrees (6 positions for hexagon)
2498:         function snapToHexRotation(degrees) {
2499:             const step = 60;
2500:             return Math.round(degrees / step) % 6;
2501:         }
2502: 
2503:         function updateVoidAP() {
2504:             // Void AP display only — does NOT increase voidAP beyond current value.
2505:             // New void stones load as "spent" so they don't grant extra AP mid-turn.
2506:             // voidAP can only decrease here (if stones were lost/broken).
2507:             const oldVoidAP = voidAP;
2508:             const poolVoid = playerPool.void;
2509:             if (voidAP > poolVoid) {
2510:                 // Stones were lost — clamp voidAP down
2511:                 voidAP = poolVoid;
2512:             }
2513:             // Otherwise leave voidAP as-is (new stones are "spent" until next turn)
2514:             console.log(`📄 updateVoidAP: ${oldVoidAP} → ${voidAP} (pool=${poolVoid})`);
2515:             const display = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
2516:             if (display) {
2517:                 if (voidAP > 0) {
2518:                     display.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
2519:                     display.style.display = 'inline';
2520:                 } else {
2521:                     display.style.display = 'none';
2522:                 }
2523:             }
2524: 
2525:             // Update HUD
2526:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2527:         }
2528: 
2529:         // Refresh void AP to match pool — called only at turn start
2530:         function refreshVoidAP() {
2531:             voidAP = playerPool.void;
2532:             console.log(`🔄 refreshVoidAP: voidAP set to ${voidAP} (pool=${playerPool.void})`);
2533:             const display = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
2534:             if (display) {
2535:                 if (voidAP > 0) {
2536:                     display.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
2537:                     display.style.display = 'inline';
2538:                 } else {
2539:                     display.style.display = 'none';
2540:                 }
2541:             }
2542:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2543:         }
2544: 
2545:         function getTotalAP() {
2546:             return currentAP + voidAP;
2547:         }
2548: 
2549:         function spendAP(cost) {
2550:             console.log(`⚡ spendAP called: cost=${cost}, before: voidAP=${voidAP}, currentAP=${currentAP}`);
2551:             // Spend void AP first, then regular AP
2552:             if (voidAP >= cost) {
2553:                 voidAP -= cost;
2554:             } else {
2555:                 const remainingCost = cost - voidAP;
2556:                 voidAP = 0;
2557:                 currentAP -= remainingCost;
2558:             }
2559:             console.log(`⚡ spendAP after: voidAP=${voidAP}, currentAP=${currentAP}, total=${getTotalAP()}`);
2560:             const apCountEl = document.getElementById('ap-count');
2561:             if (apCountEl) apCountEl.textContent = currentAP;
2562: 
2563:             // Update void AP display (but don't reset from pool - that would undo the spend!)
2564:             const display = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
2565:             if (display) {
2566:                 if (voidAP > 0) {
2567:                     display.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
2568:                     display.style.display = 'inline';
2569:                 } else {
2570:                     display.style.display = 'none';
2571:                 }
2572:             }
2573: 
2574:             // Update HUD
2575:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2576: 
2577:             // Sync AP state in multiplayer
2578:             syncPlayerState();
2579: 
2580:             // Prompt to end turn if out of AP (only on active player's turn)
2581:             try {
2582:                 const canPrompt = (typeof isMyTurn === 'function') ? isMyTurn() : true;
2583:                 if (canPrompt && (typeof isPlacementPhase === 'undefined' || !isPlacementPhase) && getTotalAP() === 0) {
2584:                     if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.showEndTurnPrompt === 'function') {
2585:                         window.showEndTurnPrompt();
2586:                     }
2587:                 }
2588:             } catch (e) {}
2589:         }
2590: 
2591:         function addAP(amount) {
2592:             if (amount <= 0) return;
2593:             const maxAP = 5;
2594:             const roomInCurrent = maxAP - currentAP;
2595:             const addToCurrent = Math.min(amount, roomInCurrent);
2596:             currentAP += addToCurrent;
2597:             const overflow = amount - addToCurrent;
2598:             // Overflow can only recharge void AP if the player has void stones (void AP cap = playerPool.void)
2599:             if (overflow > 0 && typeof playerPool !== 'undefined' && playerPool.void > 0) {
2600:                 const maxVoidAP = playerPool.void;
2601:                 const addToVoid = Math.min(overflow, maxVoidAP - voidAP);
2602:                 if (addToVoid > 0) voidAP += addToVoid;
2603:             }
2604:             const apCountEl = document.getElementById('ap-count');
2605:             if (apCountEl) apCountEl.textContent = currentAP;
2606:             const voidDisplay = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
2607:             if (voidDisplay) {
2608:                 if (voidAP > 0) {
2609:                     voidDisplay.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
2610:                     voidDisplay.style.display = 'inline';
2611:                 } else {
2612:                     voidDisplay.style.display = 'none';
2613:                 }
2614:             }
2615:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2616:             if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2617:         }
2618:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') window.addAP = addAP;
2619: 
2620:         function canAfford(cost) {
2621:             return getTotalAP() >= cost;
2622:         }
2623: 
2624:         function attemptBreakStone(stoneId) {
2625:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
2626:             if (!stone) {
2627:                 console.log('❌ Stone not found');
2628:                 return;
2629:             }
2630: 
2631:             console.log(`🔨 attemptBreakStone called for stone id=${stoneId}, type=${stone.type}, position=(${stone.x.toFixed(1)}, ${stone.y.toFixed(1)})`);
2632: 
2633:             // Check if stone is adjacent to player
2634:             if (!playerPosition) {
2635:                 updateStatus('❌ No player on board!');
2636:                 console.log('❌ No player on board!');
2637:                 return;
2638:             }
2639: 
2640:             const isAdj = isAdjacentToPlayer(stone.x, stone.y);
2641:             console.log(`🔨 Adjacency check: ${isAdj}`);
2642:             
2643:             if (!isAdj) {
2644:                 updateStatus('❌ Stone must be adjacent to player to break!');
2645:                 console.log('❌ Stone must be adjacent to player to break!');
2646:                 return;
2647:             }
2648: 
2649:             // Calculate break cost based on stone rank
2650:             const STONE_RANK = {
2651:                 'void': 1,
2652:                 'wind': 2,
2653:                 'fire': 3,
2654:                 'water': 4,
2655:                 'earth': 5
2656:             };
2657: 
2658:             const breakCost = STONE_RANK[stone.type];
2659: 
2660:             if (!canAfford(breakCost)) {
2661:                 updateStatus(`❌ Not enough AP! Need ${breakCost} AP to break ${stone.type} stone (have ${getTotalAP()} AP)`);
2662:                 return;
2663:             }
2664: 
2665:             // Break the stone
2666:             spendAP(breakCost);
2667: 
2668:             // Broadcast stone break to other players
2669:             if (isMultiplayer) {
2670:                 broadcastGameAction('stone-break', {
2671:                     stoneId: stoneId
2672:                 });
2673:             }
2674: 
2675:             // Remove stone from board
2676:             const stoneElement = stone.element;
2677:             if (stoneElement && stoneElement.parentNode) {
2678:                 stoneElement.remove();
2679:             }
2680: 
2681:             // Remove from placedStones array
2682:             const index = placedStones.findIndex(s => s.id === stoneId);
2683:             if (index !== -1) {
2684:                 placedStones.splice(index, 1);
2685:             }
2686: 
2687:             // Return stone to source pool
2688:             returnStoneToPool(stone.type);
2689: 
2690:             // Update interactions since a stone was removed
2691:             updateTileClasses();
2692:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
2693:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
2694:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
2695: 
2696:             updateStatus(`🔨 Broke ${stone.type} stone! Cost: ${breakCost} AP (${getTotalAP()} AP remaining)`);
2697:             console.log(`🔨 Broke ${stone.type} stone (id=${stoneId}), cost=${breakCost} AP`);
2698:         }
2699: 
2700:         let isDraggingTile = false;
2701:         let isDraggingStone = false;
2702:         let draggedTileId = null;
2703:         let draggedTileRotation = 0;
2704:         let draggedTileFlipped = false;
2705:         let draggedTileShrineType = null;
2706:         let draggedTileOriginalPos = null; // Store original position for snap-back
2707:         let draggedStoneId = null;
2708:         let draggedStoneType = null;
2709:         let draggedStoneOriginalPos = null; // Store original position for stone move
2710:         let ghostTile = null;
2711:         let ghostStone = null;
2712:         let currentRotation = 0;
2713:         let currentFlipped = true; // Start with tiles hidden (flipped)
2714:         let tileMoveMode = false; // Tiles are locked by default
2715: 
2716:         // Telekinesis state — set by Void Scroll III to track tile moves
2717:         // { active: true, movesLeft: 3, maxMoves: 3, casterIndex: N, movedTiles: [] }
2718:         window.telekinesisState = null;
2719: 
2720: 
2721:         // Tile deck - 4 of each shrine type (24 tiles total for 1 player)
2722:         let tileDeck = [];
2723:         let deckIndex = 0;
2724:         let deckSeed = null; // Shared seed for multiplayer deck synchronization
2725: 
2726:         // Player tile deck
2727:         let playerTilesAvailable = 0;
2728:         let playerTileElements = [];
2729: 
2730:         // Seeded random number generator (Mulberry32)
2731:         // This ensures all players get the same shuffle with the same seed
2732:         function seededRandom(seed) {
2733:             return function() {
2734:                 let t = seed += 0x6D2B79F5;
2735:                 t = Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 15, t | 1);
2736:                 t ^= t + Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 7, t | 61);
2737:                 return ((t ^ t >>> 14) >>> 0) / 4294967296;
2738:             };
2739:         }
2740: 
2741:         function initializeDeck(numPlayers = 1, seed = null) {
2742:             const shrineTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'];
2743:             const tilesPerType = numPlayers; // 1 of each type per player
2744: 
2745:             tileDeck = [];
2746: 
2747:             shrineTypes.forEach(type => {
2748:                 for (let i = 0; i < tilesPerType; i++) {
2749:                     tileDeck.push(type);
2750:                 }
2751:             });
2752: 
2753:             // Use seeded shuffle if seed provided (multiplayer), otherwise random
2754:             if (seed !== null) {
2755:                 deckSeed = seed;
2756:                 const rng = seededRandom(seed);
2757:                 // Seeded Fisher-Yates shuffle
2758:                 for (let i = tileDeck.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
2759:                     const j = Math.floor(rng() * (i + 1));
2760:                     [tileDeck[i], tileDeck[j]] = [tileDeck[j], tileDeck[i]];
2761:                 }
2762:                 console.log(`🎴 Deck initialized with seed ${seed}:`, tileDeck.join(', '));
2763:             } else {
2764:                 // Random shuffle for single player
2765:                 for (let i = tileDeck.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
2766:                     const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
2767:                     [tileDeck[i], tileDeck[j]] = [tileDeck[j], tileDeck[i]];
2768:                 }
2769:                 console.log(`🎴 Deck initialized (random):`, tileDeck.join(', '));
2770:             }
2771: 
2772:             deckIndex = 0;
2773:         }
2774: 
2775:         function drawNextTileFromDeck() {
2776:             if (deckIndex >= tileDeck.length) {
2777:                 updateStatus('No more tiles in deck!');
2778:                 return null;
2779:             }
2780:             const shrineType = tileDeck[deckIndex];
2781:             deckIndex++;
2782:             document.getElementById('deck-count').textContent = `${deckIndex}/${tileDeck.length}`;
2783:             updateStatus(`Drew ${shrineType} tile (${deckIndex}/${tileDeck.length} used)`);
2784:             return shrineType;
2785:         }
2786: 
2787:         let viewportX = 0;
2788:         let viewportY = 0;
2789:         let viewportScale = 1;
2790:         let viewportRotation = 0;
2791:         let isPanning = false;
2792:         let panStartX = 0;
2793:         let panStartY = 0;
2794:         let lastPanX = 0;
2795:         let lastPanY = 0;
2796:         let isRotatingBoard = false;
2797:         let rotateStartX = 0;
2798:         let rotateStartRotation = 0;
2799:         let isRotatingTile = false;
2800:         let rotateTileStartX = 0;
2801:         let rotateTileStartRotation = 0;
2802:         let leftButtonDown = false;
2803:         let rightButtonDown = false;
2804: 
2805:         function updateViewport() {
2806:             const centerX = boardSvg.clientWidth / 2;
2807:             const centerY = boardSvg.clientHeight / 2;
2808:             viewport.setAttribute('transform',
2809:                 `translate(${centerX}, ${centerY}) rotate(${viewportRotation}) translate(${viewportX - centerX}, ${viewportY - centerY}) scale(${viewportScale})`);
2810:         }
2811: 
2812:         // Fit all placed tiles into view, centered
2813:         function fitBoardToView() {
2814:             if (placedTiles.length === 0) return;
2815: 
2816:             // Calculate bounding box of all tiles
2817:             let minX = Infinity, maxX = -Infinity;
2818:             let minY = Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;
2819: 
2820:             placedTiles.forEach(tile => {
2821:                 // Each tile is roughly TILE_SIZE * 2.5 in radius
2822:                 const tileRadius = TILE_SIZE * 2.5;
2823:                 minX = Math.min(minX, tile.x - tileRadius);
2824:                 maxX = Math.max(maxX, tile.x + tileRadius);
2825:                 minY = Math.min(minY, tile.y - tileRadius);
2826:                 maxY = Math.max(maxY, tile.y + tileRadius);
2827:             });
2828: 
2829:             const boardWidth = maxX - minX;
2830:             const boardHeight = maxY - minY;
2831:             const boardCenterX = (minX + maxX) / 2;
2832:             const boardCenterY = (minY + maxY) / 2;
2833: 
2834:             // Get available screen space
2835:             const svgRect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
2836:             const screenWidth = svgRect.width;
2837:             const screenHeight = svgRect.height;
2838: 
2839:             // Add padding (10% on each side)
2840:             const paddingFactor = 0.8;
2841:             const scaleX = (screenWidth * paddingFactor) / boardWidth;
2842:             const scaleY = (screenHeight * paddingFactor) / boardHeight;
2843:             const newScale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, 2); // Cap at 2x zoom
2844: 
2845:             // Center the board
2846:             const screenCenterX = screenWidth / 2;
2847:             const screenCenterY = screenHeight / 2;
2848: 
2849:             viewportScale = newScale;
2850:             viewportX = screenCenterX - boardCenterX * newScale;
2851:             viewportY = screenCenterY - boardCenterY * newScale;
2852: 
2853:             console.log(`📐 fitBoardToView: board=(${boardWidth.toFixed(0)}x${boardHeight.toFixed(0)}), screen=(${screenWidth.toFixed(0)}x${screenHeight.toFixed(0)}), scale=${newScale.toFixed(2)}`);
2854: 
2855:             updateViewport();
2856:         }
2857: 
2858:         function screenToWorld(screenX, screenY) {
2859:             const centerX = boardSvg.clientWidth / 2;
2860:             const centerY = boardSvg.clientHeight / 2;
2861:             let x = screenX - centerX;
2862:             let y = screenY - centerY;
2863:             const rad = -viewportRotation * Math.PI / 180;
2864:             const cos = Math.cos(rad);
2865:             const sin = Math.sin(rad);
2866:             const rotatedX = x * cos - y * sin;
2867:             const rotatedY = x * sin + y * cos;
2868:             const scaledX = rotatedX / viewportScale;
2869:             const scaledY = rotatedY / viewportScale;
2870:             const worldX = scaledX - (viewportX - centerX) / viewportScale;
2871:             const worldY = scaledY - (viewportY - centerY) / viewportScale;
2872:             return { x: worldX, y: worldY };
2873:         }
2874: 
2875:         function hexToPixel(q, r, s) {
2876:             const width = s * Math.sqrt(3);
2877:             const height = 2 * s;
2878:             const x = width * (q + r / 2);
2879:             const y = height * (3/4) * r;
2880:             return { x, y };
2881:         }
2882: 
2883:         function pixelToHex(x, y, s) {
2884:             const q = (x * Math.sqrt(3)/3 - y / 3) / s;
2885:             const r = (y * 2/3) / s;
2886:             return hexRound(q, r);
2887:         }
2888: 
2889:         function hexRound(q, r) {
2890:             let s = -q - r;
2891:             let rq = Math.round(q);
2892:             let rr = Math.round(r);
2893:             let rs = Math.round(s);
2894:             const qDiff = Math.abs(rq - q);
2895:             const rDiff = Math.abs(rr - r);
2896:             const sDiff = Math.abs(rs - s);
2897:             if (qDiff > rDiff && qDiff > sDiff) rq = -rr - rs;
2898:             else if (rDiff > sDiff) rr = -rq - rs;
2899:             return { q: rq, r: rr };
2900:         }
2901: 
2902:         function createHexagonPoints(cx, cy, s) {
2903:             const points = [];
2904:             for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
2905:                 const angle = (Math.PI / 3) * i - Math.PI / 6;
2906:                 const x = cx + s * Math.cos(angle);
2907:                 const y = cy + s * Math.sin(angle);
2908:                 points.push(`${x},${y}`);
2909:             }
2910:             return points.join(' ');
2911:         }
2912: 
2913:         function createTrapezoidPoints(cx, cy, s, direction) {
2914:             const hexVertices = [];
2915:             for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
2916:                 const angle = (Math.PI / 3) * i - Math.PI / 6;
2917:                 hexVertices.push({
2918:                     x: cx + s * Math.cos(angle),
2919:                     y: cy + s * Math.sin(angle)
2920:                 });
2921:             }
2922:             const indices = [
2923:                 [1, 2, 3, 4], [2, 3, 4, 5], [3, 4, 5, 0],
2924:                 [4, 5, 0, 1], [5, 0, 1, 2], [0, 1, 2, 3]
2925:             ][direction];
2926:             return indices.map(idx => `${hexVertices[idx].x},${hexVertices[idx].y}`).join(' ');
2927:         }
2928: 
2929:         function createTileGroup(s, rotation = 0, flipped = false) {
2930:             const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
2931:             g.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(${rotation * 60})`);
2932: 
2933:             if (flipped) {
2934:                 // Flipped side: only outer ring of hexagons + trapezoids (no center, no inner ring)
2935:                 const hexagons = [
2936:                     { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
2937:                     { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
2938:                 ];
2939: 
2940:                 hexagons.forEach(hex => {
2941:                     const pos = hexToPixel(hex.q, hex.r, s);
2942:                     const points = createHexagonPoints(pos.x, pos.y, s);
2943:                     const polygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2944:                     polygon.setAttribute('points', points);
2945:                     polygon.setAttribute('class', 'hex-tile flipped');
2946:                     g.appendChild(polygon);
2947:                 });
2948: 
2949:                 const trapezoids = [
2950:                     { q: 2, r: 0, dir: 1 }, { q: 0, r: 2, dir: 2 },
2951:                     { q: -2, r: 2, dir: 3 }, { q: -2, r: 0, dir: 4 },
2952:                     { q: 0, r: -2, dir: 5 }, { q: 2, r: -2, dir: 0 }
2953:                 ];
2954: 
2955:                 trapezoids.forEach(trap => {
2956:                     const pos = hexToPixel(trap.q, trap.r, s);
2957:                     const points = createTrapezoidPoints(pos.x, pos.y, s, trap.dir);
2958:                     const polygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2959:                     polygon.setAttribute('points', points);
2960:                     polygon.setAttribute('class', 'hex-tile trapezoid flipped');
2961:                     g.appendChild(polygon);
2962:                 });
2963: 
2964:                 // Add empty center hex for visual reference (no fill)
2965:                 const centerPos = hexToPixel(0, 0, s);
2966:                 const centerPoints = createHexagonPoints(centerPos.x, centerPos.y, s);
2967:                 const centerPolygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2968:                 centerPolygon.setAttribute('points', centerPoints);
2969:                 centerPolygon.setAttribute('class', 'hex-tile empty-center');
2970:                 g.appendChild(centerPolygon);
2971:             } else {
2972:                 // Normal side: all hexagons
2973:                 const hexagons = [
2974:                     { q: 0, r: 0, class: 'center-hex' },
2975:                     { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
2976:                     { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 },
2977:                     { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
2978:                     { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
2979:                 ];
2980: 
2981:                 hexagons.forEach(hex => {
2982:                     const pos = hexToPixel(hex.q, hex.r, s);
2983:                     const points = createHexagonPoints(pos.x, pos.y, s);
2984:                     const polygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
2985:                     polygon.setAttribute('points', points);
2986:                     polygon.setAttribute('class', `hex-tile ${hex.class || ''}`);
2987:                     g.appendChild(polygon);
2988:                 });
2989: 
2990:                 const trapezoids = [
2991:                     { q: 2, r: 0, dir: 1 }, { q: 0, r: 2, dir: 2 },
2992:                     { q: -2, r: 2, dir: 3 }, { q: -2, r: 0, dir: 4 },
2993:                     { q: 0, r: -2, dir: 5 }, { q: 2, r: -2, dir: 0 }
2994:                 ];
2995: 
2996:                 trapezoids.forEach(trap => {
2997:                     const pos = hexToPixel(trap.q, trap.r, s);
2998:                     const points = createTrapezoidPoints(pos.x, pos.y, s, trap.dir);
2999:                     const polygon = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polygon');
3000:                     polygon.setAttribute('points', points);
3001:                     polygon.setAttribute('class', 'hex-tile trapezoid');
3002:                     g.appendChild(polygon);
3003:                 });
3004:             }
3005: 
3006:             return g;
3007:         }
3008: 
3009:         function drawDeckTile() {
3010:             deckTileSvg.innerHTML = '';
3011:             const tile = createTileGroup(6, currentRotation, currentFlipped);
3012:             tile.setAttribute('transform', 'translate(75, 75)');
3013:             deckTileSvg.appendChild(tile);
3014:         }

3016:         function initializePlayerTiles(numPlayers) {
3017:             const playerTileDeck = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-deck') || document.getElementById('player-tile-deck');
3018:             playerTileDeck.innerHTML = '';
3019:             playerTileElements = [];
3020:             playerTilesAvailable = numPlayers;
3021:             const countEl = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-count') || document.getElementById('player-tile-count');
3022:             if (countEl) countEl.textContent = numPlayers;
3023: 
3024:             for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
3025:                 const svg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'svg');
3026:                 svg.setAttribute('width', '150');
3027:                 svg.setAttribute('height', '150');
3028:                 svg.setAttribute('class', 'deck-tile player-tile-deck-item');
3029:                 svg.setAttribute('data-player-index', i);
3030: 
3031:                 const tile = createTileGroup(6, 0, false); // Player tiles are not flipped
3032:                 tile.setAttribute('transform', 'translate(75, 75)');
3033:                 svg.appendChild(tile);
3034: 
3035:                 playerTileDeck.appendChild(svg);
3036:                 playerTileElements.push(svg);
3037: 
3038:                 // Add mousedown event for dragging
3039:                 svg.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
3040:                     if (playerTilesAvailable <= 0) return;
3041:                     if (e.button === 0) {
3042:                         startPlayerTileDrag(i, e);
3043:                     }
3044:                 });
3045: 
3046:                 // Add touch support for mobile
3047:                 svg.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
3048:                     if (playerTilesAvailable <= 0) return;
3049:                     e.preventDefault();
3050:                     startPlayerTileDrag(i, e);
3051:                 }, { passive: false });
3052:             }
3053:             if (isMobile) syncMobileTileDeck();
3054: 
3055:         }
3056: 
3057:         // Initialize a single player tile for multiplayer (only MY tile)
3058:         function initializeMyPlayerTile(playerIndex, color) {
3059:             const playerTileDeck = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-deck') || document.getElementById('player-tile-deck');
3060:             playerTileDeck.innerHTML = '';
3061:             playerTileElements = [];
3062:             playerTilesAvailable = 1;
3063:             const countEl = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-count') || document.getElementById('player-tile-count');
3064:             if (countEl) countEl.textContent = '1';
3065: 
3066:             const svg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'svg');
3067:             svg.setAttribute('width', '150');
3068:             svg.setAttribute('height', '150');
3069:             svg.setAttribute('class', 'deck-tile player-tile-deck-item');
3070:             svg.setAttribute('data-player-index', playerIndex);
3071: 
3072:             const tile = createTileGroup(6, 0, false);
3073:             tile.setAttribute('transform', 'translate(75, 75)');
3074:             svg.appendChild(tile);
3075: 
3076:             // Add color indicator to show which player this is
3077:             const colorCircle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
3078:             colorCircle.setAttribute('cx', '75');
3079:             colorCircle.setAttribute('cy', '75');
3080:             colorCircle.setAttribute('r', '12');
3081:             colorCircle.setAttribute('fill', color);
3082:             colorCircle.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
3083:             colorCircle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
3084:             svg.appendChild(colorCircle);
3085: 
3086:             playerTileDeck.appendChild(svg);
3087:             playerTileElements.push(svg);
3088: 
3089:             // Add mousedown event for dragging
3090:             svg.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
3091:                 if (playerTilesAvailable <= 0) return;
3092:                 // Placement tiles can only be dragged during the placement phase
3093:                 if (!isPlacementPhase) return;
3094:                 // In multiplayer, only allow drag if it's your turn to place
3095:                 if (isMultiplayer && !canPlaceTile()) {
3096:                     notYourTurn();
3097:                     return;
3098:                 }
3099:                 if (e.button === 0) {
3100:                     startPlayerTileDrag(playerIndex, e);
3101:                 }
3102:             });
3103: 
3104:             // Add touch support for mobile
3105:             svg.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
3106:                 if (playerTilesAvailable <= 0) return;
3107:                 if (!isPlacementPhase) return;
3108:                 if (isMultiplayer && !canPlaceTile()) {
3109:                     notYourTurn();
3110:                     return;
3111:                 }
3112:                 e.preventDefault();
3113:                 startPlayerTileDrag(playerIndex, e);
3114:             }, { passive: false });
3115:             if (isMobile) syncMobileTileDeck();
3116: 
3117:         }
3118: 
3119:         function startPlayerTileDrag(playerIndex, e) {
3120:             isDraggingTile = true;
3121:             draggedTileId = null;
3122:             draggedTileRotation = 0;
3123:             draggedTileFlipped = false;
3124:             draggedTileShrineType = 'player'; // Mark as player tile
3125:             draggedTileOriginalPos = null;
3126: 
3127:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
3128:             const coords = getEventCoords(e);
3129:             const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
3130:             const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
3131:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
3132: 
3133:             ghostTile = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
3134:             ghostTile.setAttribute('class', 'ghost-tile');
3135:             ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
3136:             const tile = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, 0, false);
3137:             ghostTile.appendChild(tile);
3138:             viewport.appendChild(ghostTile);
3139:         }
3140: 
3141:         function getAllHexagonPositions() {
3142:             const positions = new Map();
3143:             const trapezoidMap = new Map();
3144: 
3145:             placedTiles.forEach(tile => {
3146:                 const s = TILE_SIZE;
3147: 
3148:                 // For flipped tiles, only include outer ring hexagons
3149:                 // For normal tiles and player tiles, include all hexagons
3150:                 // Player tiles look revealed but allow walking off them
3151:                 let hexagons;
3152:                 if (tile.flipped && !tile.isPlayerTile) {
3153:                     hexagons = [
3154:                         { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
3155:                         { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
3156:                     ];
3157:                 } else {
3158:                     hexagons = [
3159:                         { q: 0, r: 0 },
3160:                         { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
3161:                         { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 },
3162:                         { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
3163:                         { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
3164:                     ];
3165:                 }
3166: 
3167:                 hexagons.forEach(hex => {
3168:                     const localPos = hexToPixel(hex.q, hex.r, s);
3169:                     const globalX = tile.x + localPos.x;
3170:                     const globalY = tile.y + localPos.y;
3171:                     const roundedX = Math.round(globalX * 100) / 100;
3172:                     const roundedY = Math.round(globalY * 100) / 100;
3173:                     const key = `${roundedX},${roundedY}`;
3174:                     if (!positions.has(key)) {
3175:                         positions.set(key, { x: globalX, y: globalY, key, tiles: [tile] });
3176:                     } else {
3177:                         // Track which tiles contribute to this position
3178:                         const existing = positions.get(key);
3179:                         if (!existing.tiles.includes(tile)) {
3180:                             existing.tiles.push(tile);
3181:                         }
3182:                     }
3183:                 });
3184: 
3185:                 const trapezoids = [
3186:                     { q: 2, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 2 }, { q: -2, r: 2 },
3187:                     { q: -2, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -2 }, { q: 2, r: -2 }
3188:                 ];
3189: 
3190:                 trapezoids.forEach(trap => {
3191:                     const localPos = hexToPixel(trap.q, trap.r, s);
3192:                     const globalX = tile.x + localPos.x;
3193:                     const globalY = tile.y + localPos.y;
3194:                     const roundedX = Math.round(globalX * 100) / 100;
3195:                     const roundedY = Math.round(globalY * 100) / 100;
3196:                     const key = `${roundedX},${roundedY}`;
3197:                     if (!trapezoidMap.has(key)) {
3198:                         trapezoidMap.set(key, { count: 1, x: globalX, y: globalY, key, tiles: [tile] });
3199:                     } else {
3200:                         const existing = trapezoidMap.get(key);
3201:                         existing.count += 1;
3202:                         if (!existing.tiles.includes(tile)) {
3203:                             existing.tiles.push(tile);
3204:                         }
3205:                         if (existing.count >= 2 && !positions.has(key)) {
3206:                             positions.set(key, { x: globalX, y: globalY, key, tiles: existing.tiles });
3207:                         }
3208:                     }
3209:                 });
3210:             });
3211: 
3212:             return Array.from(positions.values());
3213:         }
3214: 
3215:         function isPositionOnFlippedTile(x, y, hexPositions) {
3216:             // Find the hex position that matches this x,y
3217:             const matchingPos = hexPositions.find(pos => {
3218:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(pos.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(pos.y - y, 2));
3219:                 return dist < 5;
3220:             });
3221: 
3222:             if (!matchingPos || !matchingPos.tiles) return false;
3223: 
3224:             // Check if ANY of the tiles contributing to this position are flipped (and not player tile)
3225:             return matchingPos.tiles.some(tile => tile.flipped && !tile.isPlayerTile);
3226:         }
3227: 
3228:         function findValidStonePosition(x, y) {
3229:             const hexPositions = getAllHexagonPositions();
3230:             let nearest = null;
3231:             let minDist = Infinity;
3232: 
3233:             hexPositions.forEach(pos => {
3234:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(y - pos.y, 2));
3235:                 if (dist < minDist) {
3236:                     minDist = dist;
3237:                     nearest = pos;
3238:                 }
3239:             });
3240: 
3241:             if (nearest && minDist < TILE_SIZE * 2) {
3242:                 const occupied = placedStones.some(stone => {
3243:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - nearest.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - nearest.y, 2));
3244:                     return dist < 5;
3245:                 });
3246: 
3247:                 // Block placement on any player (active or other players)
3248:                 let anyPlayerHere = false;
3249:                 if (playerPosition) {
3250:                     const d = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(playerPosition.x - nearest.x, 2) + Math.pow(playerPosition.y - nearest.y, 2));
3251:                     if (d < 5) anyPlayerHere = true;
3252:                 }
3253:                 if (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions.length) {
3254:                     playerPositions.forEach(pos => {
3255:                         if (pos && pos.x != null && pos.y != null) {
3256:                             const d = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(pos.x - nearest.x, 2) + Math.pow(pos.y - nearest.y, 2));
3257:                             if (d < 5) anyPlayerHere = true;
3258:                         }
3259:                     });
3260:                 }
3261: 
3262:                 const onFlippedTile = isPositionOnFlippedTile(nearest.x, nearest.y, hexPositions);
3263: 
3264:                 // Check if position is valid for placement based on active buffs
3265:                 const inPlacementRange = playerPosition && isInPlacementRange(nearest.x, nearest.y, draggedStoneType);
3266: 
3267:                 if (!occupied && !anyPlayerHere && !onFlippedTile && inPlacementRange) {
3268:                     return { x: nearest.x, y: nearest.y, valid: true };
3269:                 }
3270:             }
3271: 
3272:             return { x: x, y: y, valid: false };
3273:         }
3274: 
3275:         // Lightweight log throttling for noisy debug statements
3276:         const _debugLogTimes = {};
3277:         function shouldDebugLog(key, minIntervalMs = 250) {
3278:             if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.DEBUG_LOG_VERBOSE) return true;
3279:             const now = Date.now();
3280:             const last = _debugLogTimes[key] || 0;
3281:             if (now - last >= minIntervalMs) {
3282:                 _debugLogTimes[key] = now;
3283:                 return true;
3284:             }
3285:             return false;
3286:         }
3287:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
3288:             window.shouldDebugLog = shouldDebugLog;
3289:         }
3290: 
3291:         // Scroll event log buffer (low-noise timeline for debugging)
3292:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
3293:             window._scrollEventLog = window._scrollEventLog || [];
3294:             window.logScrollEvent = function logScrollEvent(type, details = {}) {
3295:                 const entry = {
3296:                     ts: new Date().toISOString(),
3297:                     type,
3298:                     details
3299:                 };
3300:                 window._scrollEventLog.push(entry);
3301:                 if (window._scrollEventLog.length > 200) {
3302:                     window._scrollEventLog.shift();
3303:                 }
3304:             };
3305:             window.dumpScrollEvents = function dumpScrollEvents() {
3306:                 const log = window._scrollEventLog || [];
3307:                 console.group(`📜 Scroll Event Log (${log.length} events)`);
3308:                 log.forEach((e, i) => {
3309:                     const time = new Date(e.ts).toLocaleTimeString();
3310:                     const type = e.type.padEnd(20);
3311:                     const details = JSON.stringify(e.details);
3312:                     console.log(`#${i + 1} [${time}] ${type} ${details}`);
3313:                 });
3314:                 console.groupEnd();
3315:             };

3365:                         'scroll_collected': '📥',

3370:                         'response_counter': '🛡️',
3371:                         'response_resolved': '⚔️',
3372:                         'original_countered': '❌',
3373:                         'original_resolved': '✅'

3507:         // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
3508:         // COMPREHENSIVE GAME DEBUG TOOL  (replaces the old dumpScrollDebug)
3509:         // ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
3510:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
3511:             window.dumpGameDebug = function dumpGameDebug() {
3512:                 try {
3513:                     const ss = spellSystem;
3514:                     const activeIdx  = typeof activePlayerIndex  !== 'undefined' ? activePlayerIndex  : null;
3515:                     const myIdx      = typeof myPlayerIndex      !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex      : null;
3516:                     const numP       = typeof totalPlayers       !== 'undefined' ? totalPlayers       : 0;
3517:                     const poolsArr   = typeof playerPools        !== 'undefined' ? playerPools        : [];
3518:                     const posArr     = typeof playerPositions    !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions    : [];
3519: 
3520:                     // ── helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
3521:                     const sumScrolls = (idx) => {
3522:                         if (!ss?.playerScrolls?.[idx]) return { hand: [], active: [], activated: [] };
3523:                         const p = ss.playerScrolls[idx];
3524:                         return {
3525:                             hand:      p.hand      ? Array.from(p.hand)      : [],
3526:                             active:    p.active    ? Array.from(p.active)    : [],
3527:                             activated: p.activated ? Array.from(p.activated) : []
3528:                         };
3529:                     };
3530: 
3531:                     // Turn order reconstruction
3532:                     const COLOR_RANK_D = { '#9458f4': 1, '#ffce00': 2, '#ed1b43': 3, '#5894f4': 4, '#69d83a': 5 };
3533:                     const sortedD = posArr
3534:                         .map((p, idx) => ({ index: idx, color: p?.color, rank: COLOR_RANK_D[p?.color] || 999 }))
3535:                         .filter((_, idx) => posArr[idx] != null)
3536:                         .sort((a, b) => a.rank - b.rank);
3537:                     const curSortIdx = sortedD.findIndex(p => p.index === activeIdx);
3538: 
3539:                     // Timer
3540:                     const turnStarted = typeof turnStartedAtMs !== 'undefined' ? turnStartedAtMs : null;
3541:                     const elapsed     = turnStarted ? Math.floor((Date.now() - turnStarted) / 1000) : null;
3542:                     const limitSec    = typeof TURN_TIME_LIMIT_MS !== 'undefined' ? TURN_TIME_LIMIT_MS / 1000 : '?';
3543: 
3544:                     // Response window
3545:                     const rw = ss?.responseWindow;
3546:                     const rwState = rw ? {
3547:                         open:      rw.isResponseWindowOpen,
3548:                         caster:    rw.currentCaster,
3549:                         pending:   rw.pendingScrollData?.name || null,
3550:                         responded: Array.from(rw.respondingPlayers || []),
3551:                         stack:     (rw.responseStack || []).map(e => ({
3552:                             name:       e.scrollData?.name,
3553:                             caster:     e.casterIndex,
3554:                             isCounter:  !!e.isCounter,
3555:                             isResponse: !!e.isResponse,
3556:                             isOriginal: !!e.isOriginal,
3557:                             result:     e.result
3558:                         }))
3559:                     } : null;
3560: 
3561:                     // ── output ────────────────────────────────────────────────
3562:                     console.group('%c🔍 dumpGameDebug() — Full Game Snapshot', 'color:#d4ac0d;font-weight:bold;font-size:14px');
3563: 
3564:                     // Players & multiplayer
3565:                     console.group('👥 Players & Multiplayer');
3566:                     console.log('activePlayerIndex:', activeIdx, ' | myPlayerIndex:', myIdx, ' | totalPlayers:', numP);
3567:                     console.log('isMultiplayer:', typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' ? isMultiplayer : '?',
3568:                                 ' | isHost:',   typeof isHost          !== 'undefined' ? isHost         : '?');
3569:                     console.log('currentGameId:', typeof currentGameId  !== 'undefined' ? currentGameId  : '?');
3570:                     console.log('allPlayersData:', typeof allPlayersData !== 'undefined' ? allPlayersData : []);
3571:                     console.groupEnd();
3572: 
3573:                     // Turn state
3574:                     console.group('⏱️ Turn State');
3575:                     console.log('currentTurnNumber:',      typeof currentTurnNumber       !== 'undefined' ? currentTurnNumber       : '?');
3576:                     console.log('lastReceivedTurnNumber:', typeof lastReceivedTurnNumber  !== 'undefined' ? lastReceivedTurnNumber  : '?');
3577:                     console.log('turnStartedAt:',          turnStarted ? new Date(turnStarted).toISOString() + ' (' + elapsed + 's elapsed, limit ' + limitSec + 's)' : '?');
3578:                     console.log('isEndingTurn:',    typeof isEndingTurn    !== 'undefined' ? isEndingTurn    : '?');
3579:                     console.log('isPlacementPhase:', typeof isPlacementPhase !== 'undefined' ? isPlacementPhase : '?');
3580:                     console.log('playerTilesPlaced:', typeof playerTilesPlaced !== 'undefined' ? Array.from(playerTilesPlaced) : '?');
3581:                     console.groupEnd();
3582: 
3583:                     // Turn order
3584:                     console.group('🔄 Turn Order');
3585:                     console.log('sorted:', sortedD.map(p => '[' + p.index + '] ' + (p.color || '?') + ' rank' + p.rank).join(' → '));
3586:                     console.log('currentSortedIndex:', curSortIdx,
3587:                         curSortIdx === -1 ? ' ⚠️ ACTIVE PLAYER NOT FOUND IN SORT — TURN ORDER BUG' :
3588:                         curSortIdx >= 0 && sortedD.length > 0 ? ' → next: [' + sortedD[(curSortIdx + 1) % sortedD.length].index + ']' : '');
3589:                     console.groupEnd();
3590: 
3591:                     // AP
3592:                     console.group('⚡ AP');
3593:                     console.log('currentAP:', typeof currentAP !== 'undefined' ? currentAP : '?',
3594:                                 ' | voidAP:', typeof voidAP   !== 'undefined' ? voidAP     : '?');
3595:                     console.groupEnd();
3596: 
3597:                     // Scroll state per player
3598:                     console.group('📜 Scroll State (all players)');
3599:                     const printCount = Math.max(numP, ss?.playerScrolls?.length || 0, posArr.length);
3600:                     for (let i = 0; i < printCount; i++) {
3601:                         const scrollData = sumScrolls(i);
3602:                         const isMe       = i === myIdx    ? ' ← ME'          : '';
3603:                         const isActive   = i === activeIdx ? ' ← ACTIVE TURN' : '';
3604:                         const cascade    = ss?.hasPendingCascade?.(i) ? ' ⚠️ CASCADE PENDING' : '';

3619:                     }

3636:                     console.groupEnd();
3637: 
3638:                     // Response window

3640:                     if (!rwState) console.log('(not initialized)');
3641:                     else {
3642:                         console.log('open:', rwState.open, ' | caster:', rwState.caster, ' | pending:', rwState.pending);
3643:                         console.log('responded:', rwState.responded);

3645:                     }
3646:                     console.groupEnd();
3647:

3650:                     posArr.forEach(function(p, i) {

3652:                         else   console.log('Player ' + i + ': (not placed)');
3653:                     });
3654:                     console.groupEnd();
3655:
