3677: 
3678:         function isAdjacentToPlayer(x, y) {
3679:             if (!playerPosition) return false;
3680: 
3681:             // Get hex coordinates for both positions
3682:             const playerHex = pixelToHex(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y, TILE_SIZE);
3683:             const targetHex = pixelToHex(x, y, TILE_SIZE);
3684: 
3685:             // Calculate axial distance
3686:             const dq = Math.abs(playerHex.q - targetHex.q);
3687:             const dr = Math.abs(playerHex.r - targetHex.r);
3688:             const ds = Math.abs((-playerHex.q - playerHex.r) - (-targetHex.q - targetHex.r));
3689: 
3690:             // Adjacent means distance = 1 in hex coordinates
3691:             const hexDistance = Math.max(dq, dr, ds);
3692: 
3693:             const isAdj = hexDistance === 1;
3694:             if (shouldDebugLog('isAdjacentToPlayer', 500)) {
3695:                 console.log(`📍 isAdjacentToPlayer: player=(${playerHex.q},${playerHex.r}), target=(${targetHex.q},${targetHex.r}), distance=${hexDistance}, adjacent=${isAdj}`);
3696:             }
3697: 
3698:             return isAdj;
3699:         }
3700: 
3701:         // Check if a position is within valid stone placement range (considering buffs)
3702:         function isInPlacementRange(x, y, stoneType) {
3703:             if (!playerPosition) return false;
3704: 
3705:             // Get current player index (use activePlayerIndex in single player, myPlayerIndex in multiplayer)
3706:             const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null) ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
3707: 
3708:             // Check for global placement buff (Avalanche - any stone anywhere)
3709:             if (spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasGlobalPlacement(currentPlayerIdx)) {
3710:                 console.log(`ℹ️ Global placement active - allowing stone at any position`);
3711:                 return true;
3712:             }
3713: 
3714:             // Seed the Skies: allow water/wind stones anywhere this turn
3715:             if (stoneType && spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
3716:                 const buff = spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs?.waterWindGlobalPlacement;
3717:                 if (buff && buff.playerIndex === currentPlayerIdx && (stoneType === 'water' || stoneType === 'wind')) {
3718:                     console.log(`ℹ️ Seed the Skies active - allowing ${stoneType} stone at any position`);
3719:                     return true;
3720:                 }
3721:             }
3722: 
3723:             // Check for extended placement buff (Mason's Savvy - earth stones within 5 hexes)
3724:             if (stoneType && spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
3725:                 const extended = spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasExtendedPlacement(stoneType, currentPlayerIdx);
3726:                 if (extended.active) {
3727:                     // Calculate hex distance
3728:                     const playerHex = pixelToHex(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y, TILE_SIZE);
3729:                     const targetHex = pixelToHex(x, y, TILE_SIZE);
3730: 
3731:                     const dq = Math.abs(playerHex.q - targetHex.q);
3732:                     const dr = Math.abs(playerHex.r - targetHex.r);
3733:                     const ds = Math.abs((-playerHex.q - playerHex.r) - (-targetHex.q - targetHex.r));
3734:                     const hexDistance = Math.max(dq, dr, ds);
3735: 
3736:                     if (hexDistance <= extended.range) {
3737:                         console.log(`🎯 Extended placement active - allowing ${stoneType} stone at distance ${hexDistance} (max ${extended.range})`);
3738:                         return true;
3739:                     }
3740:                 }
3741:             }
3742: 
3743:             // Default: must be adjacent to player
3744:             return isAdjacentToPlayer(x, y);
3745:         }
3746: 
3747:         function findNearestHexPosition(x, y) {
3748:             // Similar to findValidStonePosition, but doesn't care about stones/player
3749:             // Used for player movement pathfinding
3750:             const hexPositions = getAllHexagonPositions();
3751:             let nearest = null;
3752:             let minDist = Infinity;
3753: 
3754:             hexPositions.forEach(pos => {
3755:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(y - pos.y, 2));
3756:                 if (dist < minDist) {
3757:                     minDist = dist;
3758:                     nearest = pos;
3759:                 }
3760:             });
3761: 
3762:             if (nearest && minDist < TILE_SIZE * 2) {
3763:                 return { x: nearest.x, y: nearest.y, valid: true };
3764:             }
3765: 
3766:             return { x: x, y: y, valid: false };
3767:         }
3768: 
3769:         function findNearestSnapPoint(x, y, isPlayerTile = false) {
3770:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3771:             const hexCoords = pixelToHex(x, y, largeHexSize);
3772:             const snapPos = hexToPixel(hexCoords.q, hexCoords.r, largeHexSize);
3773:             const distance = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x - snapPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(y - snapPos.y, 2));
3774: 
3775:             if (distance < SNAP_THRESHOLD) {
3776:                 // Check if a tile already exists at this position
3777:                 const tileExists = placedTiles.some(tile => {
3778:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - snapPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - snapPos.y, 2));
3779:                     return dist < TILE_SIZE; // Tiles are considered overlapping if centers are very close
3780:                 });
3781: 
3782:                 if (tileExists) {
3783:                     return { x: x, y: y, snapped: false }; // Don't snap if position is occupied
3784:                 }
3785: 
3786:                 // PLAYER TILE SPECIAL RULE: Must touch at least 2 unrevealed tiles
3787:                 if (isPlayerTile) {
3788:                     const touchingUnrevealedCount = countTouchingUnrevealedTiles(snapPos.x, snapPos.y);
3789:                     if (touchingUnrevealedCount < 2) {
3790:                         console.log(`❌ Player tile at (${snapPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${snapPos.y.toFixed(1)}) only touches ${touchingUnrevealedCount} unrevealed tile(s), need 2+`);
3791:                         return { x: x, y: y, snapped: false }; // Don't allow placement
3792:                     }
3793:                     console.log(`✅ Player tile at (${snapPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${snapPos.y.toFixed(1)}) touches ${touchingUnrevealedCount} unrevealed tiles`);
3794:                 }
3795: 
3796:                 // TELEKINESIS RULE: Must touch at least 1 other tile
3797:                 if (window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active) {
3798:                     const touchingCount = countTouchingTiles(snapPos.x, snapPos.y);
3799:                     if (touchingCount < 1) {
3800:                         console.log(`❌ Telekinesis: tile at (${snapPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${snapPos.y.toFixed(1)}) touches ${touchingCount} tile(s), need 1+`);
3801:                         return { x: x, y: y, snapped: false };
3802:                     }
3803:                     console.log(`✅ Telekinesis: tile at (${snapPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${snapPos.y.toFixed(1)}) touches ${touchingCount} tiles`);
3804:                 }
3805: 
3806:                 return { x: snapPos.x, y: snapPos.y, snapped: true };
3807:             }
3808:             return { x: x, y: y, snapped: false };
3809:         }
3810: 
3811:         function countTouchingUnrevealedTiles(tileX, tileY) {
3812:             // Get the 6 adjacent tile positions in the large hex grid
3813:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3814:             const tileHex = pixelToHex(tileX, tileY, largeHexSize);
3815:             
3816:             const adjacentOffsets = [
3817:                 { q: 1, r: 0 },   // East
3818:                 { q: 0, r: 1 },   // Southeast
3819:                 { q: -1, r: 1 },  // Southwest
3820:                 { q: -1, r: 0 },  // West
3821:                 { q: 0, r: -1 },  // Northwest
3822:                 { q: 1, r: -1 }   // Northeast
3823:             ];
3824: 
3825:             let unrevealedCount = 0;
3826: 
3827:             adjacentOffsets.forEach(offset => {
3828:                 const adjQ = tileHex.q + offset.q;
3829:                 const adjR = tileHex.r + offset.r;
3830:                 const adjPos = hexToPixel(adjQ, adjR, largeHexSize);
3831: 
3832:                 // Check if there's an unrevealed (flipped) tile at this position
3833:                 const adjacentTile = placedTiles.find(tile => {
3834:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - adjPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - adjPos.y, 2));
3835:                     return dist < TILE_SIZE;
3836:                 });
3837: 
3838:                 if (adjacentTile && adjacentTile.flipped) {
3839:                     unrevealedCount++;
3840:                 }
3841:             });
3842: 
3843:             return unrevealedCount;
3844:         }
3845: 
3846:         // Count ALL adjacent tiles (revealed or unrevealed) — used by Telekinesis
3847:         function countTouchingTiles(tileX, tileY) {
3848:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3849:             const tileHex = pixelToHex(tileX, tileY, largeHexSize);
3850:             const adjacentOffsets = [
3851:                 { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
3852:                 { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 }
3853:             ];
3854:             let count = 0;
3855:             adjacentOffsets.forEach(offset => {
3856:                 const adjPos = hexToPixel(tileHex.q + offset.q, tileHex.r + offset.r, largeHexSize);
3857:                 const found = placedTiles.find(t => {
3858:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(t.x - adjPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(t.y - adjPos.y, 2));
3859:                     return dist < TILE_SIZE;
3860:                 });
3861:                 if (found) count++;
3862:             });
3863:             return count;
3864:         }
3865: 
3866:         function tileHasStones(tileId) {
3867:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
3868:             if (!tile) return false;
3869: 
3870:             const s = TILE_SIZE;
3871:             const hexagons = [
3872:                 { q: 0, r: 0 },
3873:                 { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
3874:                 { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 },
3875:                 { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 },
3876:                 { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }
3877:             ];
3878: 
3879:             return hexagons.some(hex => {
3880:                 const localPos = hexToPixel(hex.q, hex.r, s);
3881:                 const globalX = tile.x + localPos.x;
3882:                 const globalY = tile.y + localPos.y;
3883: 
3884:                 return placedStones.some(stone => {
3885:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - globalX, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - globalY, 2));
3886:                     return dist < 5;
3887:                 });
3888:             });
3889:         }
3890: 
3891:         // Check if any player is standing on a tile (by tile id)
3892:         function tileHasPlayersById(tileId) {
3893:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
3894:             if (!tile || typeof playerPositions === 'undefined') return false;
3895:             const tileRadius = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3896:             return playerPositions.some(pos => {
3897:                 if (!pos) return false;
3898:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(pos.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(pos.y - tile.y, 2));
3899:                 return dist < tileRadius;
3900:             });
3901:         }
3902: 
3903:         // Bridge check: would removing this tile leave any of its neighbors with 0 neighbors?
3904:         // Used by Telekinesis to prevent stranding tiles (and players on them).
3905:         function tileIsBridge(tileId) {
3906:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
3907:             if (!tile) return false;
3908:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4;
3909:             const tileHex = pixelToHex(tile.x, tile.y, largeHexSize);
3910:             const adjacentOffsets = [
3911:                 { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 },
3912:                 { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: -1 }
3913:             ];
3914: 
3915:             // Find all neighbors of this tile
3916:             const neighbors = [];
3917:             adjacentOffsets.forEach(offset => {
3918:                 const adjPos = hexToPixel(tileHex.q + offset.q, tileHex.r + offset.r, largeHexSize);
3919:                 const found = placedTiles.find(t => {
3920:                     if (t.id === tileId) return false; // exclude self
3921:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(t.x - adjPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(t.y - adjPos.y, 2));
3922:                     return dist < TILE_SIZE;
3923:                 });
3924:                 if (found) neighbors.push(found);
3925:             });
3926: 
3927:             // For each neighbor, count how many neighbors IT would have without this tile
3928:             for (const neighbor of neighbors) {
3929:                 const nHex = pixelToHex(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, largeHexSize);
3930:                 let otherNeighborCount = 0;
3931:                 adjacentOffsets.forEach(offset => {
3932:                     const adjPos = hexToPixel(nHex.q + offset.q, nHex.r + offset.r, largeHexSize);
3933:                     const found = placedTiles.find(t => {
3934:                         if (t.id === tileId) return false; // exclude the tile being removed
3935:                         if (t.id === neighbor.id) return false; // exclude self
3936:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(t.x - adjPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(t.y - adjPos.y, 2));
3937:                         return dist < TILE_SIZE;
3938:                     });
3939:                     if (found) otherNeighborCount++;
3940:                 });
3941:                 if (otherNeighborCount === 0) return true; // This neighbor would be stranded
3942:             }
3943:             return false;
3944:         }
3945: 
3946:         function updateTileClasses() {
3947:             placedTiles.forEach(tile => {
3948:                 if (tileHasStones(tile.id)) {
3949:                     tile.element.classList.add('has-stones');
3950:                 } else {
3951:                     tile.element.classList.remove('has-stones');
3952:                 }
3953:             });
3954:         }
3955: 
3956:         function createShrineMarker(shrineType) {
3957:             const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
3958:             g.setAttribute('class', 'shrine-marker');
3959: 
3960:             // Color mapping for shrine types
3961:             const shrineColors = {
3962:                 'earth': '#69d83a',
3963:                 'water': '#5894f4',
3964:                 'fire': '#ed1b43',
3965:                 'wind': '#ffce00',
3966:                 'void': '#9458f4',
3967:                 'catacomb': '#8b4513'
3968:             };
3969: 
3970:             // Symbol mapping for shrine types
3971:             const shrineSymbols = {
3972:                 'earth': '▲',
3973:                 'water': '◯',
3974:                 'fire': '♦',
3975:                 'wind': '≋',
3976:                 'void': '✺',
3977:                 'catacomb': '🔅'
3978:             };
3979: 
3980:             // Create a circle background
3981:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
3982:             circle.setAttribute('cx', '0');
3983:             circle.setAttribute('cy', '0');
3984:             circle.setAttribute('r', '8');
3985:             circle.setAttribute('fill', shrineColors[shrineType]);
3986:             circle.setAttribute('opacity', '0.6');
3987:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', shrineColors[shrineType]);
3988:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
3989:             g.appendChild(circle);
3990: 
3991:             // Create the symbol text
3992:             const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
3993:             text.setAttribute('x', '0');
3994:             text.setAttribute('y', '0');
3995:             text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
3996:             text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
3997:             text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
3998:             text.setAttribute('font-size', '10');
3999:             text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
4000:             text.textContent = shrineSymbols[shrineType];
4001:             g.appendChild(text);
4002: 
4003:             return g;
4004:         }
4005: 
4006:         let nextTileId = 1; // Global counter for unique tile IDs
4007: 
4008:         function placeTile(x, y, rotation = 0, flipped = false, shrineType = null, isPlayerTile = false, skipMultiplayerLogic = false, forcedTileId = null) {
4009:             console.log(`   placeTile called: x=${x.toFixed(1)}, y=${y.toFixed(1)}, rotation=${rotation}, flipped=${flipped}, shrineType=${shrineType}, isPlayerTile=${isPlayerTile}, skipMP=${skipMultiplayerLogic}`);
4010:             const tileId = (forcedTileId !== null && forcedTileId !== undefined) ? forcedTileId : nextTileId++;
4011:             if (forcedTileId !== null && forcedTileId !== undefined) {
4012:                 nextTileId = Math.max(nextTileId, forcedTileId + 1);
4013:             }
4014:             console.log(`   Assigned tileId: ${tileId}`);
4015:             let tilePlayerIndex = null; // Will be set if this is a player tile
4016:             const tileGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4017:             tileGroup.setAttribute('class', isPlayerTile ? 'placed-tile player-tile' : 'placed-tile');
4018:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-tile-id', tileId);
4019:             tileGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
4020: 
4021:             const tile = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, rotation, flipped);
4022:             tileGroup.appendChild(tile);
4023: 
4024:             // Draw from deck if shrine type not provided
4025:             if (shrineType === null) {
4026:                 shrineType = drawNextTileFromDeck();
4027:                 if (shrineType === null) {
4028:                     // No more tiles in deck
4029:                     return null;
4030:                 }
4031:             }
4032: 
4033:             // Check if this is the player tile
4034:             if (shrineType === 'player') {
4035:                 isPlayerTile = true;
4036: 
4037:                 const playerIndex = playerPositions.length;
4038:                 let assignedColor;
4039: 
4040:                 // In multiplayer, use the pre-assigned playerColor
4041:                 // In local mode, assign colors in rank order
4042:                 // skipMultiplayerLogic = true means playerColor is already hex (from placePlayerTileVisually),
4043:                 // so skip the name→hex lookup to avoid PLAYER_COLORS[hexValue] = undefined.
4044:                 if (isMultiplayer && playerColor && !skipMultiplayerLogic) {
4045:                     assignedColor = PLAYER_COLORS[playerColor];
4046:                     playerColor = assignedColor; // Normalise to hex so placePlayer always gets a hex value
4047:                     console.log(`🎨 Multiplayer - Using assigned color: ${playerColor}`);
4048:                 } else if (isMultiplayer && playerColor && skipMultiplayerLogic) {
4049:                     assignedColor = playerColor; // already hex
4050:                     console.log(`🎨 Multiplayer (visual-only) - Color already hex: ${playerColor}`);
4051:                 } else {
4052:                     // Local game - assign next color in rank order
4053:                     const colorRankOrder = ['purple', 'yellow', 'red', 'blue', 'green'];
4054:                     if (playerIndex < 5) {
4055:                         const colorName = colorRankOrder[playerIndex];
4056:                         assignedColor = PLAYER_COLORS[colorName];
4057:                         gameSessionColors.add(colorName);
4058:                         playerColor = assignedColor;
4059:                         console.log(`🎨 Local game - Player ${playerIndex + 1} color assigned: ${colorName} (${assignedColor})`);
4060:                     } else {
4061:                         console.warn('⚠️ Maximum 5 players reached!');
4062:                         assignedColor = '#fff'; // Fallback to white
4063:                         playerColor = assignedColor;
4064:                     }
4065:                 }
4066: 
4067:                 // Add color tint overlay to player tile
4068:                 const tintOverlay = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4069:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4070:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4071:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 2); // Cover the whole tile
4072:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('fill', assignedColor);
4073:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('opacity', '0.15'); // Light tint
4074:                 tintOverlay.setAttribute('pointer-events', 'none'); // Don't interfere with clicks
4075:                 tileGroup.appendChild(tintOverlay);
4076: 
4077:                 // Store the player index for later use
4078:                 tilePlayerIndex = playerIndex;
4079:                 
4080:                 // Add a group for element symbols on the player tile
4081:                 const symbolsGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4082:                 symbolsGroup.setAttribute('class', 'player-tile-element-symbols');
4083:                 tileGroup.appendChild(symbolsGroup);
4084:             }
4085: 
4086:             // Only add shrine marker if NOT flipped and NOT player tile (revealed tiles show shrine)
4087:             if (!flipped && shrineType !== 'player') {
4088:                 const shrineMarker = createShrineMarker(shrineType);
4089:                 tileGroup.appendChild(shrineMarker);
4090:             }
4091: 
4092:             tileGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4093:                 // Don't interfere with player dragging
4094:                 if (isDraggingPlayer) return;
4095: 
4096:             if (shouldDebugLog('tileClicked', 500)) {
4097:                 console.log(`🖱️ Tile clicked: tileId=${tileId}, position=(${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}), shrine=${shrineType}, flipped=${flipped}, isPlayerTile=${isPlayerTile}, tileMoveMode=${tileMoveMode}`);
4098:             }
4099: 
4100:                 // Player tiles cannot be dragged once placed
4101:                 if (isPlayerTile) {
4102:                     console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: player tiles are locked in place`);
4103:                     return;
4104:                 }
4105: 
4106:                 // Only allow dragging placed tiles if tileMoveMode is enabled
4107:                 if (!tileMoveMode) {
4108:                     console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: tile move mode is OFF`);
4109:                     return;
4110:                 }
4111: 
4112:                 // During Telekinesis, also block tiles that have players on them or are bridges
4113:                 const tkActive = window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active;
4114:                 const tkBlockPlayer = tkActive && tileHasPlayersById(tileId);
4115:                 const tkBlockBridge = tkActive && tileIsBridge(tileId);
4116: 
4117:                 if (e.button === 0 && !tileHasStones(tileId) && !tkBlockPlayer && !tkBlockBridge && !isPanning && !isDraggingStone && !isDraggingPlayer) {
4118:                     console.log(`   ✓ Starting drag for tile ${tileId} at (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
4119:                     e.stopPropagation();
4120:                     e.preventDefault();
4121:                     startTileDrag(tileId, e);
4122:                 } else {
4123:                     if (tkBlockPlayer) {
4124:                         console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: tile has a player on it`);
4125:                         updateStatus('Cannot move a tile with a player on it!');
4126:                     } else if (tkBlockBridge) {
4127:                         console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: removing tile would strand a neighbor`);
4128:                         updateStatus('Cannot move this tile — it would strand an adjacent tile!');
4129:                     } else {
4130:                         console.log(`   ✗ Cannot drag: hasStones=${tileHasStones(tileId)}, isPanning=${isPanning}, isDraggingStone=${isDraggingStone}`);
4131:                     }
4132:                 }
4133:             });
4134: 
4135:             // Touch support: start tile drag on tap/drag
4136:             tileGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
4137:                 // Don't interfere with player dragging
4138:                 if (isDraggingPlayer) return;
4139:                 // Player tiles cannot be dragged once placed
4140:                 if (isPlayerTile) return;
4141:                 // Only allow dragging if tileMoveMode is enabled
4142:                 if (!tileMoveMode) return;
4143:                 if (tileHasStones(tileId) || isPanning || isDraggingStone || isDraggingPlayer) return;
4144:                 // During Telekinesis, block tiles that have players on them or are bridges
4145:                 if (window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active) {
4146:                     if (tileHasPlayersById(tileId) || tileIsBridge(tileId)) return;
4147:                 }
4148: 
4149:                 if (e.touches && e.touches.length === 1) {
4150:                     e.stopPropagation();
4151:                     e.preventDefault();
4152:                     const t = e.touches[0];
4153:                     startTileDrag(tileId, {
4154:                         clientX: t.clientX,
4155:                         clientY: t.clientY,
4156:                         button: 0,
4157:                         preventDefault: () => {},
4158:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
4159:                     });
4160:                 }
4161:             }, { passive: false });
4162: 
4163: 
4164:             // Add hover tooltip for player tiles in multiplayer
4165:             if (isPlayerTile && isMultiplayer) {
4166:                 let tooltip = null;
4167: 
4168:                 tileGroup.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
4169:                     tooltip = showPlayerTooltip(tilePlayerIndex, e.clientX, e.clientY);
4170:                 });
4171: 
4172:                 tileGroup.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
4173:                     if (tooltip) {
4174:                         tooltip.style.left = (e.clientX + 15) + 'px';
4175:                         tooltip.style.top = (e.clientY + 15) + 'px';
4176:                     }
4177:                 });
4178: 
4179:                 tileGroup.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
4180:                     if (tooltip && tooltip.parentNode) {
4181:                         tooltip.parentNode.removeChild(tooltip);
4182:                         tooltip = null;
4183:                     }
4184:                 });
4185:             }
4186: 
4187:             viewport.insertBefore(tileGroup, snapIndicator);
4188: 
4189:             placedTiles.push({
4190:                 id: tileId,
4191:                 x: x,
4192:                 y: y,
4193:                 rotation: rotation,
4194:                 flipped: flipped,
4195:                 element: tileGroup,
4196:                 shrineType: shrineType,
4197:                 isPlayerTile: isPlayerTile,
4198:                 playerIndex: isPlayerTile ? tilePlayerIndex : null // Track which player owns this tile
4199:             });
4200: 
4201:             updateTileClasses();
4202: 
4203:             // Place player marker on player tile
4204:             if (isPlayerTile) {
4205:                 // Create new player pawn at this tile's position.
4206:                 // playerColor is always hex by this point (normalised above for both
4207:                 // multiplayer and local paths), so playerPositions stores hex values
4208:                 // and COLOR_RANK lookups in game-ui.js work correctly.
4209:                 placePlayer(x, y, playerColor);
4210: 
4211:                 // In multiplayer, ensure this player's pawn ends up at playerPositions[myPlayerIndex]
4212:                 // regardless of simultaneous placements by other players.  placePlayer() always
4213:                 // push()es to the end; if another player's broadcast arrived first, the index is wrong.
4214:                 if (isMultiplayer && !skipMultiplayerLogic &&
4215:                         myPlayerIndex !== null && myPlayerIndex !== undefined) {
4216:                     const placed = playerPositions.pop();
4217:                     if (placed) {
4218:                         placed.index = myPlayerIndex;
4219:                         while (playerPositions.length < myPlayerIndex) playerPositions.push(null);
4220:                         playerPositions[myPlayerIndex] = placed;
4221:                         console.log(`🔧 Relocated local pawn to playerPositions[${myPlayerIndex}]`);
4222:                     }
4223:                 }
4224: 
4225:                 // In multiplayer, broadcast tile placement and track placement phase
4226:                 // Skip this logic if we're just placing visually from a broadcast
4227:                 if (isMultiplayer && !skipMultiplayerLogic) {
4228:                     console.log(`🎮 Player ${tilePlayerIndex} placed tile. Before: activePlayerIndex=${activePlayerIndex}, placed=${Array.from(playerTilesPlaced)}`);
4229:                     playerTilesPlaced.add(tilePlayerIndex);
4230: 
4231:                     // Broadcast that this player placed their tile
4232:                     broadcastGameAction('player-tile-placed', {
4233:                         playerIndex: tilePlayerIndex
4234:                     });
4235: 
4236:                     // Check if all players have placed tiles
4237:                     if (playerTilesPlaced.size === totalPlayers) {
4238:                         isPlacementPhase = false;
4239:                         activePlayerIndex = 0; // Reset to first player for normal gameplay
4240:                         console.log('✅ All players have placed their tiles. Game begins!');
4241: 
4242:                         // Broadcast placement phase end and turn reset
4243:                         const startedAt = Date.now();
4244:                         turnStartedAtMs = startedAt;
4245:                         broadcastGameAction('placement-complete', {
4246:                             playerIndex: 0,
4247:                             turnStartedAt: startedAt
4248:                         });
4249: 
4250:                         if (isMyTurn()) {
4251:                             updateStatus(`All tiles placed! It's your turn!`);
4252:                         } else {
4253:                             const nextColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
4254:                             updateStatus(`All tiles placed! Waiting for ${nextColorName}'s turn...`);
4255:                         }
4256:                     } else {
4257:                         // Advance to next player in turn order
4258:                         const oldIndex = activePlayerIndex;
4259:                         activePlayerIndex = (activePlayerIndex + 1) % totalPlayers;
4260:                         console.log(`📄 Advancing turn: ${oldIndex} -> ${activePlayerIndex} (total: ${totalPlayers})`);
4261: 
4262:                         // Broadcast turn change during placement phase
4263:                         const startedAt = Date.now();
4264:                     turnStartedAtMs = startedAt;
4265:                     currentTurnNumber++;
4266:                     broadcastGameAction('turn-change', {
4267:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
4268:                         turnStartedAt: startedAt,
4269:                         turnNumber: currentTurnNumber
4270:                     });
4271:                         console.log(`📡 Broadcasted turn-change to player ${activePlayerIndex}`);
4272: 
4273:                         if (canPlaceTile()) {
4274:                             updateStatus(`Your turn! Place your player tile (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers} placed)`);
4275:                         setInventoryOpen(true);
4276:                             console.log(`✅ My turn to place (myPlayerIndex=${myPlayerIndex})`);
4277:                         } else {
4278:                             const nextColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
4279:                             updateStatus(`Waiting for ${nextColorName} to place their tile... (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers})`);
4280:                             console.log(`⏳ Waiting for player ${activePlayerIndex} (myPlayerIndex=${myPlayerIndex})`);
4281:                         }
4282:                     }
4283:                 } else {
4284:                     updateStatus(`Player ${tilePlayerIndex + 1} tile placed!`);
4285:                 }
4286:             }
4287: 
4288:             return tileId;
4289:         }
4290: 
4291:         // Find the tile at a given world position
4292:         function findTileAtPosition(worldX, worldY) {
4293:             // A tile covers 19 hexes; use a large radius so clicking anywhere on the tile counts
4294:             // TILE_SIZE * 5.5 ensures the whole tile (including edges) is clickable
4295:             const tileRadius = TILE_SIZE * 5.5;
4296:             let closestTile = null;
4297:             let closestDist = Infinity;
4298: 
4299:             for (const tile of placedTiles) {
4300:                 if (tile.isPlayerTile) continue; // Skip player tiles
4301:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - worldX, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - worldY, 2));
4302:                 if (dist < tileRadius && dist < closestDist) {
4303:                     closestTile = tile;
4304:                     closestDist = dist;
4305:                 }
4306:             }
4307:             return closestTile;
4308:         }
4309: 
4310:         // Handle board clicks when in selection mode (for scroll effects like tile swap/flip)
4311:         function handleSelectionModeClick(worldX, worldY) {
4312:             if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollEffects) return false;
4313:             const selectionMode = spellSystem.scrollEffects.selectionMode;
4314:             if (!selectionMode) return false;
4315: 
4316:             // Check if this is a stone selection mode (e.g., Water V - Control the Current)
4317:             if (selectionMode.handleStoneClick) {
4318:                 // Find the stone at the click position
4319:                 const stone = findStoneAtPosition(worldX, worldY);
4320:                 if (stone) {
4321:                     selectionMode.handleStoneClick(stone);
4322:                     return true; // Click was handled
4323:                 }
4324:             }
4325: 
4326:             // Check if this is a hex selection mode (e.g., Excavate teleport — any hex, not just tile center)
4327:             if (selectionMode.handleHexClick) {
4328:                 const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
4329:                 let closestHex = null;
4330:                 let minDist = Infinity;
4331:                 allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
4332:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - worldX, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - worldY, 2));
4333:                     if (dist < minDist) {
4334:                         minDist = dist;
4335:                         closestHex = hexPos;
4336:                     }
4337:                 });
4338:                 if (closestHex && minDist < TILE_SIZE * 1.5) {
4339:                     selectionMode.handleHexClick(closestHex);
4340:                 } else {
4341:                     updateStatus('No hex at that position.');
4342:                 }
4343:                 return true;
4344:             }
4345: 
4346:             // Check if this is a tile selection mode
4347:             if (selectionMode.handleTileClick) {
4348:                 // Find the tile at the click position
4349:                 const tile = findTileAtPosition(worldX, worldY);
4350:                 if (!tile) {
4351:                     updateStatus('No tile at that position.');
4352:                     return true; // Still consumed the click
4353:                 }
4354: 
4355:                 // Pass to selection mode handler
4356:                 selectionMode.handleTileClick(tile);
4357:             }
4358:             return true; // Click was handled
4359:         }
4360: 
4361:         // Find a stone at a world position
4362:         function findStoneAtPosition(worldX, worldY) {
4363:             if (typeof placedStones === 'undefined') return null;
4364: 
4365:             // Increased radius for more permissive stone clicking
4366:             const stoneRadius = typeof HEX_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? HEX_SIZE * 2.5 : 50;
4367:             let closestStone = null;
4368:             let closestDist = Infinity;
4369: 
4370:             for (const stone of placedStones) {
4371:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - worldX, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - worldY, 2));
4372:                 if (dist < stoneRadius && dist < closestDist) {
4373:                     closestStone = stone;
4374:                     closestDist = dist;
4375:                 }
4376:             }
4377:             return closestStone;
4378:         }
4379: 
4380:         function revealTile(tileId) {
4381:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
4382:             if (!tile || !tile.flipped) {
4383:                 console.log(`⚠️ revealTile called for tile ${tileId}, but tile is ${tile ? 'already revealed' : 'not found'}`);
4384:                 return; // Already revealed or doesn't exist
4385:             }
4386: 
4387:             console.log(`📡 Broadcasting tile flip: tileId=${tileId}, shrineType=${tile.shrineType}`);
4388:             // Broadcast tile flip to other players
4389:             broadcastGameAction('tile-flip', {
4390:                 tileId: tileId,
4391:                 shrineType: tile.shrineType
4392:             });
4393: 
4394:             // Remove the old tile element
4395:             tile.element.remove();
4396: 
4397:             // Create new revealed tile group
4398:             const tileGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4399:             tileGroup.setAttribute('class', 'placed-tile');
4400:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-tile-id', tileId);
4401:             tileGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile.x}, ${tile.y})`);
4402: 
4403:             const tileGraphic = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, tile.rotation, false);
4404:             tileGroup.appendChild(tileGraphic);
4405: 
4406:             // Add shrine marker
4407:             const shrineMarker = createShrineMarker(tile.shrineType);
4408:             tileGroup.appendChild(shrineMarker);
4409: 
4410:             tileGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4411:                 if (e.button === 0 && !tileHasStones(tileId) && !isPanning && !isDraggingStone) {
4412:                     e.stopPropagation();
4413:                     e.preventDefault();
4414:                     startTileDrag(tileId, e);
4415:                 }
4416:             });
4417: 
4418:             viewport.insertBefore(tileGroup, snapIndicator);
4419: 
4420:             // Update tile data
4421:             tile.flipped = false;
4422:             tile.element = tileGroup;
4423: 
4424:             // Scroll discovery: use effective element (Wandering River) so transformed tiles give the chosen element's scroll
4425:             const effectiveType = spellSystem.scrollEffects?.getEffectiveTileElement?.(tile) ?? tile.shrineType;
4426:             const scrollInfo = spellSystem.onTileRevealed(effectiveType);
4427: 
4428:             // Call to Adventure: immediately draw shrine stones when revealing a tile
4429:             const ctaBuff = spellSystem.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.callToAdventure;
4430:             const elementalTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
4431:             let ctaDrawn = 0;
4432:             if (ctaBuff && ctaBuff.playerIndex === activePlayerIndex && elementalTypes.includes(effectiveType)) {
4433:                 const STONE_RANK = { 'void': 1, 'wind': 2, 'fire': 3, 'water': 4, 'earth': 5 };
4434:                 const amount = STONE_RANK[effectiveType] || 0;
4435:                 ctaDrawn = spellSystem.scrollEffects.drawStonesToPool(effectiveType, amount, activePlayerIndex);
4436:                 if (ctaDrawn > 0) {
4437:                     syncPlayerState();
4438:                     console.log(`🗺️ Call to Adventure: drew ${ctaDrawn} ${effectiveType} stones on tile reveal`);
4439:                 }
4440:             }
4441: 
4442:             if (scrollInfo && ctaDrawn > 0) {
4443:                 updateStatus(`Revealed ${effectiveType} shrine! Found ${scrollInfo.name}! Call to Adventure: +${ctaDrawn} ${effectiveType} stone${ctaDrawn > 1 ? 's' : ''}!`);
4444:             } else if (scrollInfo) {
4445:                 updateStatus(`Revealed ${effectiveType} shrine! Found ${scrollInfo.name}!`);
4446:             } else if (ctaDrawn > 0) {
4447:                 updateStatus(`Revealed ${effectiveType} shrine! Call to Adventure: +${ctaDrawn} ${effectiveType} stone${ctaDrawn > 1 ? 's' : ''}!`);
4448:             } else {
4449:                 updateStatus(`Revealed ${effectiveType} shrine!`);
4450:             }
4451: 
4452:             // Re-apply Wandering River indicator on the new element (reveal replaced tile.element)
4453:             const wr = spellSystem.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.wanderingRiver;
4454:             if (Array.isArray(wr)) {
4455:                 const entry = wr.find(e => Number(e.tileId) === Number(tile.id));
4456:                 if (entry && entry.newElement && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.applyWanderingRiverIndicator === 'function') {
4457:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tile, entry.newElement);
4458:                 }
4459:             }
4460:         }
4461: 
4462:         // Make revealTile available globally for scroll effects
4463:         window.revealTile = revealTile;
4464:         // Expose placePlayer and movePlayerVisually for scroll effects (e.g. Take Flight)
4465:         window.placePlayer = placePlayer;
4466:         window.movePlayerVisually = movePlayerVisually;
4467:         // Expose tileMoveMode for scroll effects (e.g. Telekinesis)
4468:         Object.defineProperty(window, 'tileMoveMode', {
4469:             get() { return tileMoveMode; },
4470:             set(v) { tileMoveMode = v; },
4471:             configurable: true
4472:         });
4473: 
4474:         // Visual-only tile flip (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
4475:         function flipTileVisually(tileElement, shrineType) {
4476:             const tileId = parseInt(tileElement.getAttribute('data-tile-id'));
4477:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
4478:             if (!tile || !tile.flipped) return;
4479: 
4480:             // Same visual logic as revealTile but without broadcasting
4481:             tile.element.remove();
4482: 
4483:             const tileGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4484:             tileGroup.setAttribute('class', 'placed-tile');
4485:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-tile-id', tileId);
4486:             tileGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile.x}, ${tile.y})`);
4487: 
4488:             const tileGraphic = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, tile.rotation, false);
4489:             tileGroup.appendChild(tileGraphic);
4490: 
4491:             const shrineMarker = createShrineMarker(shrineType);
4492:             tileGroup.appendChild(shrineMarker);
4493: 
4494:             tileGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4495:                 if (e.button === 0 && !tileHasStones(tileId) && !isPanning && !isDraggingStone) {
4496:                     e.stopPropagation();
4497:                     e.preventDefault();
4498:                     startTileDrag(tileId, e);
4499:                 }
4500:             });
4501: 
4502:             viewport.insertBefore(tileGroup, snapIndicator);
4503: 
4504:             tile.flipped = false;
4505:             tile.element = tileGroup;
4506:             tile.shrineType = shrineType; // Update the tile's shrine type to match the revealed type
4507:             console.log(`📄 flipTileVisually: Updated tile ${tileId} shrineType to ${shrineType}`);
4508:         }
4509: 
4510:         // Recreate a revealed tile as flipped (hidden) - used by Heavy Stomp scroll effect
4511:         function recreateTileAsFlipped(tile) {
4512:             if (!tile || tile.flipped) return; // Already flipped
4513: 
4514:             const tileId = tile.id;
4515:             console.log(`🙈 recreateTileAsFlipped: Hiding tile ${tileId} (${tile.shrineType})`);
4516: 
4517:             // Remove old tile element
4518:             if (tile.element) {
4519:                 tile.element.remove();
4520:             }
4521: 
4522:             // Create new flipped tile group
4523:             const tileGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4524:             tileGroup.setAttribute('class', 'placed-tile');
4525:             tileGroup.setAttribute('data-tile-id', tileId);
4526:             tileGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile.x}, ${tile.y})`);
4527: 
4528:             // Create flipped (hidden) tile graphic
4529:             const tileGraphic = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, tile.rotation, true);
4530:             tileGroup.appendChild(tileGraphic);
4531: 
4532:             // Add mousedown handler for tile dragging
4533:             tileGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4534:                 if (e.button === 0 && !tileHasStones(tileId) && !isPanning && !isDraggingStone) {
4535:                     e.stopPropagation();
4536:                     e.preventDefault();
4537:                     startTileDrag(tileId, e);
4538:                 }
4539:             });
4540: 
4541:             viewport.insertBefore(tileGroup, snapIndicator);
4542: 
4543:             // Update tile data
4544:             tile.flipped = true;
4545:             tile.element = tileGroup;
4546:         }
4547: 
4548:         // Make it available globally for scroll effects
4549:         window.recreateTileAsFlipped = recreateTileAsFlipped;
4550: 
4551:         function startTileDrag(tileId, e) {
4552:             if (tileHasStones(tileId)) return;
4553:             isDraggingTile = true;
4554:             draggedTileId = tileId;
4555:             draggedTileShrineType = null;
4556:             draggedTileOriginalPos = null;
4557:             const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
4558:             if (tile) {
4559:                 draggedTileRotation = tile.rotation;
4560:                 draggedTileFlipped = tile.flipped || false;
4561:                 draggedTileShrineType = tile.shrineType; // Preserve shrine type
4562:                 draggedTileOriginalPos = { x: tile.x, y: tile.y }; // Store original position
4563:                 tile.element.remove();
4564:                 placedTiles = placedTiles.filter(t => t.id !== tileId);
4565:             }
4566: 
4567:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
4568:             const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
4569:             const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
4570:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
4571: 
4572:             ghostTile = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4573:             ghostTile.setAttribute('class', 'ghost-tile');
4574:             ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
4575:             const tileContent = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped);
4576:             ghostTile.appendChild(tileContent);
4577:             viewport.appendChild(ghostTile);
4578:         }
4579: 
4580:         let isDraggingPlayer = false;
4581:         let ghostPlayer = null;
4582:         let playerPath = [];
4583:         let pathLine = null;
4584:         let pathCostLabels = [];
4585: 
4586:         
4587:         // Finalize a pawn move based on the currently drawn playerPath (used by touch + mouse).
4588:         function movePlayerAlongPath() {
4589:             if (!isDraggingPlayer || !ghostPlayer || playerPath.length < 2) return;
4590: 
4591:             const activePlayer = playerPositions[activePlayerIndex];
4592:             if (!activePlayer) return;
4593: 
4594:             const finalPos = playerPath[playerPath.length - 1];
4595: 
4596:             // Basic legality check for destination (revealed/unrevealed rules are enforced in canPlayerMoveToHex)
4597:             const canMoveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(finalPos.x, finalPos.y, true);
4598:             if (!canMoveCheck.canMove) {
4599:                 console.log(`❌ Invalid move end: ${canMoveCheck.reason || 'cannot move there'}`);
4600:                 // cleanup happens below
4601:             } else {
4602:                 // Total cost for the selected path (Steam Vents discount applied inside)
4603:                 const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
4604: 
4605:                 // Make sure player has enough AP
4606:                 const availableAP = getCurrentAP ? getCurrentAP() : currentAP;
4607:                 if (totalCost > availableAP) {
4608:                     console.log(`❌ Not enough AP: need ${totalCost}, have ${availableAP}`);
4609:                 } else {
4610:                     // Update Steam Vents alternation state before spending AP
4611:                     commitSteamVentsState(playerPath);
4612:                     // Spend AP and apply the move
4613:                     if (typeof spendAP === 'function') spendAP(totalCost);
4614: 
4615:                     // Move pawn visually + state
4616:                     activePlayer.x = finalPos.x;
4617:                     activePlayer.y = finalPos.y;
4618:                     activePlayer.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${finalPos.x}, ${finalPos.y})`);
4619:                     if (ghostPlayer) ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${finalPos.x}, ${finalPos.y})`);
4620: 
4621:                     console.log(`✅ Movement successful: ${playerPath.length - 1} hexes, cost ${totalCost} AP`);
4622: 
4623:                     // Record activity + broadcast movement (multiplayer)
4624:                     try {
4625:                         recordActivity && recordActivity('move', { x: finalPos.x, y: finalPos.y, apSpent: totalCost });
4626:                     } catch (e) {}
4627: 
4628:                     if (typeof broadcastPlayerMovement === 'function' && !isSpectator) {
4629:                         try {
4630:                             broadcastPlayerMovement(activePlayerIndex, finalPos.x, finalPos.y, totalCost);
4631:                         } catch (e) {}
4632:                     }
4633: 
4634:                     // Tile reveal / shrine resolution (reuse existing landing handler if present)
4635:                     try {
4636:                         if (typeof handlePlayerLanding === 'function') {
4637:                             handlePlayerLanding(finalPos.x, finalPos.y);
4638:                         } else if (typeof checkTileRevealsAtPosition === 'function') {
4639:                             checkTileRevealsAtPosition(finalPos.x, finalPos.y);
4640:                         }
4641:                     } catch (e) {
4642:                         console.warn('Landing/reveal handler error:', e);
4643:                     }
4644:                 }
4645:             }
4646: 
4647:             // Cleanup (match mouseup behavior)
4648:             isDraggingPlayer = false;
4649:             clearPlayerPath();
4650:             if (ghostPlayer) {
4651:                 ghostPlayer.remove();
4652:                 ghostPlayer = null;
4653:             }
4654:         }
4655: 
4656: function clearPlayerPath() {
4657:             // Remove polyline
4658:             if (pathLine) {
4659:                 pathLine.remove();
4660:                 pathLine = null;
4661:             }
4662:             // Remove step/cost labels
4663:             if (pathCostLabels && pathCostLabels.length) {
4664:                 pathCostLabels.forEach(label => {
4665:                     try { label.remove(); } catch (e) {}
4666:                 });
4667:             }
4668:             pathCostLabels = [];
4669:             playerPath = [];
4670:             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
4671:         }
4672: 
4673: 
4674:         function placePlayer(x, y, color = null) {
4675:             if (color) {
4676:                 // Creating a NEW player pawn with this color
4677:                 console.log(`🎨 Creating new player ${playerPositions.length + 1} at (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}) with color ${color}`);
4678: 
4679:                 const playerGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4680:                 playerGroup.setAttribute('class', 'player');
4681:                 playerGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
4682:                 playerGroup.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4683:                 playerGroup.style.touchAction = 'none';
4684: 
4685:                 // Invisible larger hit area for easier touch targeting
4686:                 const hitArea = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4687:                 hitArea.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4688:                 hitArea.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4689:                 hitArea.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.8); // Much larger touch target
4690:                 hitArea.setAttribute('fill', 'transparent');
4691:                 hitArea.setAttribute('stroke', 'none');
4692:                 hitArea.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4693:                 playerGroup.appendChild(hitArea);
4694: 
4695:                 const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4696:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4697:                 circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4698:                 circle.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.4);
4699:                 circle.setAttribute('class', 'player-marker');
4700:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', color);
4701:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
4702:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
4703: 
4704:                 playerGroup.appendChild(circle);
4705: 
4706:                 // Store the player index for this group
4707:                 const playerIndex = playerPositions.length;
4708: 
4709:                 // Add drag handler
4710:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4711:                     // Only draggable if this is the active player (check dynamically)
4712:                     const thisPlayerIndex = playerPositions.findIndex(p => p && p.element === playerGroup);
4713:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
4714:                     if (tf && tf.active && tf.targetPlayerIndex === thisPlayerIndex) {
4715:                         e.stopPropagation();
4716:                         e.preventDefault();
4717:                         startPlayerDrag(e, { playerIndex: thisPlayerIndex, ignoreTurnCheck: true, isTakeFlight: true });
4718:                         return;
4719:                     }
4720:                     if (thisPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
4721:                         e.stopPropagation();
4722:                         e.preventDefault();
4723:                         startPlayerDrag(e);
4724:                     }
4725:                 });
4726: 
4727:             // Touch support: start player drag on tap/drag
4728: 	            playerGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
4729: 	                console.log('👆 Player pawn touchstart detected!', {touches: e.touches?.length, target: e.target});
4730: 	                if (!(e.touches && e.touches.length === 1)) return;
4731: 	                // Mirror mousedown behavior: only the active player pawn can be dragged
4732: 	                const thisPlayerIndex = playerPositions.findIndex(p => p && p.element === playerGroup);
4733: 	                console.log(`   thisPlayerIndex=${thisPlayerIndex}, activePlayerIndex=${activePlayerIndex}`);
4734:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
4735:                     if (tf && tf.active && tf.targetPlayerIndex === thisPlayerIndex) {
4736:                         // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
4737:                         isDraggingPlayer = true;
4738:                         e.stopPropagation();
4739:                         e.preventDefault();
4740:                         const t = e.touches[0];
4741:                         console.log('   ✅ Starting take-flight drag from touch');
4742:                         startPlayerDrag({
4743:                             clientX: t.clientX,
4744:                             clientY: t.clientY,
4745:                             button: 0,
4746:                             preventDefault: () => {},
4747:                             stopPropagation: () => {}
4748:                         }, { playerIndex: thisPlayerIndex, ignoreTurnCheck: true, isTakeFlight: true });
4749:                         return;
4750:                     }
4751: 	                if (thisPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
4752:                     // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
4753:                     isDraggingPlayer = true;
4754:                     e.stopPropagation();
4755:                     e.preventDefault();
4756:                     const t = e.touches[0];
4757:                     console.log('   ✅ Starting player drag from touch');
4758:                     startPlayerDrag({
4759:                         clientX: t.clientX,
4760:                         clientY: t.clientY,
4761:                         button: 0,
4762:                         preventDefault: () => {},
4763:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
4764:                     });
4765:                 } else {
4766:                     console.log('   ❌ Not active player, ignoring touch');
4767:                 }
4768:             }, { passive: false });
4769: 
4770:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
4771:                     e.stopPropagation();
4772:                 });
4773: 
4774:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
4775:                     e.stopPropagation();
4776:                 });
4777: 
4778:                 viewport.appendChild(playerGroup);
4779:                 playerPositions.push({ x, y, element: playerGroup, color, index: playerIndex });
4780: 
4781:             } else {
4782:                 // Moving the ACTIVE player
4783:                 const activePlayer = playerPositions[activePlayerIndex];
4784:                 if (!activePlayer) {
4785:                     console.error('No active player to move!');
4786:                     return;
4787:                 }
4788:                 
4789:                 activePlayer.element.remove();
4790: 
4791:                 const playerGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4792:                 playerGroup.setAttribute('class', 'player');
4793:                 playerGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
4794:                 playerGroup.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4795:                 playerGroup.style.touchAction = 'none';
4796: 
4797:                 // Invisible larger hit area for easier touch targeting
4798:                 const hitArea = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4799:                 hitArea.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4800:                 hitArea.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4801:                 hitArea.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.8);
4802:                 hitArea.setAttribute('fill', 'transparent');
4803:                 hitArea.setAttribute('stroke', 'none');
4804:                 hitArea.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4805:                 playerGroup.appendChild(hitArea);
4806: 
4807:                 const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4808:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4809:                 circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4810:                 circle.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.4);
4811:                 circle.setAttribute('class', 'player-marker');
4812:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', activePlayer.color);
4813:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
4814:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
4815: 
4816:                 playerGroup.appendChild(circle);
4817: 
4818:                 // Store the player index for event handlers
4819:                 const thisPlayerIdx = activePlayerIndex;
4820: 
4821:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4822:                     // Only draggable if this is the active player
4823:                     const currentIdx = playerPositions.findIndex(p => p && p.element === playerGroup);
4824:                     if (currentIdx === activePlayerIndex) {
4825:                         e.stopPropagation();
4826:                         e.preventDefault();
4827:                         startPlayerDrag(e);
4828:                     }
4829:                 });
4830: 
4831: 	            // Touch support: start player drag on tap/drag
4832: 	            playerGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
4833: 	                console.log('👆 Player pawn touchstart (path2) detected!', {touches: e.touches?.length});
4834: 	                if (!(e.touches && e.touches.length === 1)) return;
4835: 	                // Mirror mousedown behavior: only active player can be dragged
4836: 	                const currentIdx = playerPositions.findIndex(p => p && p.element === playerGroup);
4837: 	                console.log(`   currentIdx=${currentIdx}, activePlayerIndex=${activePlayerIndex}`);
4838: 	                if (currentIdx === activePlayerIndex) {
4839:                     // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
4840:                     isDraggingPlayer = true;
4841:                     e.stopPropagation();
4842:                     e.preventDefault();
4843:                     const t = e.touches[0];
4844:                     console.log('   ✅ Starting player drag from touch (path2)');
4845:                     startPlayerDrag({
4846:                         clientX: t.clientX,
4847:                         clientY: t.clientY,
4848:                         button: 0,
4849:                         preventDefault: () => {},
4850:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
4851:                     });
4852:                 } else {
4853:                     console.log('   ❌ Not active player, ignoring touch (path2)');
4854:                 }
4855:             }, { passive: false });
4856: 
4857:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
4858:                     e.stopPropagation();
4859:                 });
4860: 
4861:                 playerGroup.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
4862:                     e.stopPropagation();
4863:                 });
4864: 
4865:                 viewport.appendChild(playerGroup);
4866: 
4867:                 activePlayer.x = x;
4868:                 activePlayer.y = y;
4869:                 activePlayer.element = playerGroup;
4870: 
4871:                 // Control the Current: update which water stones are highlighted after move
4872:                 if (spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.refreshWaterTransformHighlights === 'function') {
4873:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.refreshWaterTransformHighlights();
4874:                 }
4875:             }
4876: 
4877:             // Update catacomb teleport indicators
4878:             updateCatacombIndicators();
4879:         }
4880: 
4881:         // Visual-only player tile placement (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
4882:         function placePlayerTileVisually(x, y, playerIndex, colorName, cosmetics) {
4883:             console.log(`📄 Placing other player's tile: player ${playerIndex}, color ${colorName}, at (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
4884: 
4885:             // Temporarily set playerColor to the other player's color
4886:             const originalColor = playerColor;
4887:             playerColor = colorName;
4888: 
4889:             // Place the player tile - skip multiplayer logic since this is visual-only
4890:             placeTile(x, y, 0, false, 'player', true, true);
4891: 
4892:             // Relocate the newly pushed pawn from the end of playerPositions to the
4893:             // correct slot.  placeTile → placePlayer always push()es, so simultaneous
4894:             // local placement means index .length is wrong.
4895:             const placed = playerPositions.pop();
4896:             if (placed) {
4897:                 placed.index = playerIndex;
4898:                 while (playerPositions.length < playerIndex) playerPositions.push(null);
4899:                 playerPositions[playerIndex] = placed;
4900:                 console.log(`🔧 Relocated remote pawn to playerPositions[${playerIndex}]`);
4901:             }
4902: 
4903:             // Fix placedTiles entry — placeTile captured playerPositions.length (wrong for
4904:             // remote tiles); patch it to the correct playerIndex so tooltips are right.
4905:             const lastTile = placedTiles[placedTiles.length - 1];
4906:             if (lastTile && lastTile.isPlayerTile) {
4907:                 lastTile.playerIndex = playerIndex;
4908:             }
4909: 
4910:             // Restore our color
4911:             playerColor = originalColor;
4912: 
4913:             console.log(`✅ Other player's tile placed successfully (visual only)`);
4914:         }

4916:         // Visual-only player movement (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
4917:         function movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, apSpent) {
4918:             const player = playerPositions[playerIndex];
4919:             if (!player) {
4920:                 console.error(`Cannot move player ${playerIndex} - not found`);
4921:                 return;
4922:             }
4923: 
4924:             // Remove old player element
4925:             player.element.remove();
4926: 
4927:             // Create new player element at new position
4928:             const playerGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
4929:             playerGroup.setAttribute('class', 'player');
4930:             playerGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
4931:             playerGroup.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4932:             playerGroup.style.touchAction = 'none';
4933: 
4934:             // Invisible larger hit area for easier touch targeting
4935:             const hitArea = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4936:             hitArea.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4937:             hitArea.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4938:             hitArea.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.8);
4939:             hitArea.setAttribute('fill', 'transparent');
4940:             hitArea.setAttribute('stroke', 'none');
4941:             hitArea.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
4942:             playerGroup.appendChild(hitArea);
4943: 
4944:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
4945:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
4946:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
4947:             circle.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.4);
4948:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'player-marker');
4949:             circle.setAttribute('fill', player.color);
4950:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
4951:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
4952: 
4953:             playerGroup.appendChild(circle);
4954: 
4955:             playerGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
4956:                 const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
4957:                 if (tf && tf.active && tf.targetPlayerIndex === playerIndex) {
4958:                     e.stopPropagation();
4959:                     e.preventDefault();
4960:                     startPlayerDrag(e, { playerIndex, ignoreTurnCheck: true, isTakeFlight: true });
4961:                     return;
4962:                 }
4963:                 if (activePlayerIndex === playerIndex) {
4964:                     e.stopPropagation();
4965:                     e.preventDefault();
4966:                     startPlayerDrag(e);
4967:                 }
4968:             });
4969: 
4970: 	            // Touch support: start player drag on tap/drag
4971: 	            playerGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
4972: 	                console.log('👆 Player pawn touchstart (path3) detected!', {touches: e.touches?.length, playerIndex});
4973: 	                if (!(e.touches && e.touches.length === 1)) return;
4974:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
4975:                     if (tf && tf.active && tf.targetPlayerIndex === playerIndex) {
4976:                         // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
4977:                         isDraggingPlayer = true;
4978:                         e.stopPropagation();
4979:                         e.preventDefault();
4980:                         const t = e.touches[0];
4981:                         console.log('   ✅ Starting take-flight drag from touch (path3)');
4982:                         startPlayerDrag({
4983:                             clientX: t.clientX,
4984:                             clientY: t.clientY,
4985:                             button: 0,
4986:                             preventDefault: () => {},
4987:                             stopPropagation: () => {}
4988:                         }, { playerIndex, ignoreTurnCheck: true, isTakeFlight: true });
4989:                         return;
4990:                     }
4991: 	                // Mirror mousedown behavior: only active player can be dragged
4992: 	                console.log(`   playerIndex=${playerIndex}, activePlayerIndex=${activePlayerIndex}`);
4993: 	                if (activePlayerIndex === playerIndex) {
4994:                     // Set flag IMMEDIATELY to prevent other handlers from interfering
4995:                     isDraggingPlayer = true;
4996:                     e.stopPropagation();
4997:                     e.preventDefault();
4998:                     const t = e.touches[0];
4999:                     console.log('   ✅ Starting player drag from touch (path3)');
5000:                     startPlayerDrag({
5001:                         clientX: t.clientX,
5002:                         clientY: t.clientY,
5003:                         button: 0,
5004:                         preventDefault: () => {},
5005:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
5006:                     });
5007:                 } else {
5008:                     console.log('   ❌ Not active player, ignoring touch (path3)');
5009:                 }
5010:             }, { passive: false });
5011: 
5012:             viewport.appendChild(playerGroup);
5013:

5015:             player.x = x;
5016:             player.y = y;
5017:             player.element = playerGroup;
5018:

5020:         }
