5022:         // Visual-only stone break (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
5023:         function breakStoneVisually(stoneId) {
5024:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
5025:             if (!stone) {
5026:                 console.log(`⚠️ Cannot break stone ${stoneId} - not found`);
5027:                 return;
5028:             }
5029: 
5030:             console.log(`🔨 Breaking stone visually: id=${stoneId}, type=${stone.type}`);
5031: 
5032:             // Remove stone from board
5033:             const stoneElement = stone.element;
5034:             if (stoneElement && stoneElement.parentNode) {
5035:                 stoneElement.remove();
5036:             }
5037: 
5038:             // Remove from placedStones array
5039:             const index = placedStones.findIndex(s => s.id === stoneId);
5040:             if (index !== -1) {
5041:                 placedStones.splice(index, 1);
5042:             }
5043: 
5044:             // Return stone to source pool
5045:             returnStoneToPool(stone.type);
5046: 
5047:             // Update interactions since a stone was removed
5048:             updateTileClasses();
5049:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
5050:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
5051:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
5052: 
5053:             console.log(`✅ Stone ${stoneId} broken visually`);
5054:         }
5055: 
5056:         // Record player activity (kept for analytics/debug; NOT used for kicking)
5057:         function recordActivity() {
5058:             if (!myPlayerId) return;
5059:             myLastActivity = Date.now();
5060:             playerLastActivity[myPlayerId] = myLastActivity;
5061:             // Turn timeout is based on turn start time, not activity.
5062:             console.log('📡 Activity recorded locally');
5063:         }
5064: 
5065: 
5066:         // Update turn timer display (shared by everyone; enforced by host)
5067:         function updateTimerDisplay() {
5068:             const timerElement = document.getElementById('inactivity-timer');
5069:             const hudTimer = document.getElementById('hud-timer');
5070:             const hudTimerValue = document.getElementById('hud-timer-value');
5071: 
5072:             if (!gameInactivityTimeout || gameInactivityTimeout === 0) {
5073:                 if (timerElement) timerElement.style.display = 'none';
5074:                 if (hudTimer) hudTimer.style.display = 'none';
5075:                 return;
5076:             }
5077: 
5078:             // Only show timer when it's my turn (during placement phase, this means "canPlaceTile()")
5079:             const isMyActiveTurn = isPlacementPhase ? canPlaceTile() : isMyTurn();
5080:             if (!isMyActiveTurn) {
5081:                 if (timerElement) timerElement.style.display = 'none';
5082:                 // Keep HUD timer visible but show waiting state
5083:                 if (hudTimerValue) hudTimerValue.textContent = '--:--';
5084:                 if (hudTimer) hudTimer.classList.remove('warning');
5085:                 return;
5086:             }
5087: 
5088:             const now = Date.now();
5089:             const elapsed = now - (turnStartedAtMs || now);
5090:             const timeRemaining = gameInactivityTimeout - elapsed;
5091: 
5092:             if (timeRemaining <= 0) {
5093:                 if (timerElement) timerElement.style.display = 'none';
5094:                 if (hudTimerValue) hudTimerValue.textContent = '0:00';
5095:                 return;
5096:             }
5097: 
5098:             // Show timer
5099:             if (timerElement) timerElement.style.display = 'inline-block';
5100: 
5101:             // Calculate percentage remaining
5102:             const percentRemaining = (timeRemaining / gameInactivityTimeout) * 100;
5103: 
5104:             // Format time
5105:             const secondsRemaining = Math.ceil(timeRemaining / 1000);
5106:             const minutes = Math.floor(secondsRemaining / 60);
5107:             const seconds = secondsRemaining % 60;
5108:             const timeText = minutes > 0 ? `${minutes}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}` : `${seconds}s`;
5109: 
5110:             // Update HUD timer
5111:             if (hudTimerValue) hudTimerValue.textContent = timeText;
5112:             if (hudTimer) {
5113:                 if (percentRemaining <= 25) {
5114:                     hudTimer.classList.add('warning');
5115:                 } else {
5116:                     hudTimer.classList.remove('warning');
5117:                 }
5118:             }
5119: 
5120:             // Color-code old timer based on time remaining
5121:             let color, bgColor, label;
5122:             if (percentRemaining > 75) {
5123:                 color = '#fff';
5124:                 bgColor = '#4CAF50';
5125:                 label = '⚠️';
5126:             } else if (percentRemaining > 50) {
5127:                 color = '#000';
5128:                 bgColor = '#FFEB3B';
5129:                 label = '⚠️';
5130:             } else if (percentRemaining > 25) {
5131:                 color = '#fff';
5132:                 bgColor = '#FF9800';
5133:                 label = '⚠️';
5134:             } else {
5135:                 color = '#fff';
5136:                 bgColor = '#f44336';
5137:                 label = '💎';
5138:             }
5139: 
5140:             if (timerElement) {
5141:                 timerElement.style.backgroundColor = bgColor;
5142:                 timerElement.style.color = color;
5143:                 timerElement.textContent = `${label} ${timeText}`;
5144:             }
5145:         }
5146: 
5147:         // Start timer display updates
5148:         function startTimerDisplay() {
5149:             // Clear any existing interval
5150:             if (timerDisplayInterval) {
5151:                 clearInterval(timerDisplayInterval);
5152:             }
5153: 
5154:             // Update display every second
5155:             timerDisplayInterval = setInterval(updateTimerDisplay, 1000);
5156:             updateTimerDisplay(); // Initial update
5157:         }
5158: 
5159:         // Stop timer display
5160:         function stopTimerDisplay() {
5161:             if (timerDisplayInterval) {
5162:                 clearInterval(timerDisplayInterval);
5163:                 timerDisplayInterval = null;
5164:             }
5165:             const timerElement = document.getElementById('inactivity-timer');
5166:             if (timerElement) {
5167:                 timerElement.style.display = 'none';
5168:             }
5169:         }
5170: 
5171:         // Turn timeout enforcement (host only)
5172:         async function checkTurnTimeout() {
5173:             if (!isMultiplayer) return;
5174:             if (!isHost) return;
5175:             if (!gameInactivityTimeout || gameInactivityTimeout === 0) return; // disabled
5176: 
5177:             // Only enforce during active game
5178:             const { data: room, error: roomErr } = await supabase
5179:                 .from('game_room')
5180:                 .select('status')
5181:                 .eq('id', currentGameId)
5182:                 .single();
5183: 
5184:             if (roomErr) {
5185:                 console.warn('⚠️ Turn timeout: failed to read room status', roomErr);
5186:                 return;
5187:             }
5188: 
5189:             if (!room || room.status !== 'playing') return;
5190: 
5191:             const now = Date.now();
5192:             const elapsed = now - (turnStartedAtMs || now);
5193:             if (elapsed < gameInactivityTimeout) return;
5194: 
5195:             // Time is up — either kick active player or auto-advance
5196:             console.log('⏰ Turn timer expired. kickOnTurnTimeout:', kickOnTurnTimeout, 'activePlayerIndex:', activePlayerIndex, 'isPlacementPhase:', isPlacementPhase);
5197: 
5198:             // SPECIAL CASE: During placement phase, timeout should kick all players back to lobby
5199:             if (isPlacementPhase) {
5200:                 console.log('⏰ Turn timeout during placement phase — resetting game to lobby');
5201:                 updateStatus('⏰ Player tile placement timed out — returning all players to lobby');
5202: 
5203:                 // First, kick the AFK player from the lobby
5204:                 const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
5205:                     .from('players')
5206:                     .select('id, username, player_index');
5207: 
5208:                 const afkPlayer = allPlayers?.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex);
5209: 
5210:                 if (afkPlayer) {
5211:                     console.log(`👢 Kicking AFK player: ${afkPlayer.username} (index ${afkPlayer.player_index})`);
5212:                     const { error: kickErr } = await supabase
5213:                         .from('players')
5214:                         .delete()
5215:                         .eq('id', afkPlayer.id);
5216: 
5217:                     if (kickErr) {
5218:                         console.error('❌ Failed to kick AFK player:', kickErr);
5219:                     } else {
5220:                         console.log(`✅ AFK player ${afkPlayer.username} removed from lobby`);
5221:                     }
5222:                 }
5223: 
5224:                 // Reset game room to waiting status
5225:                 const { error: resetErr } = await supabase
5226:                     .from('game_room')
5227:                     .update({ status: 'waiting' })
5228:                     .eq('id', currentGameId);
5229: 
5230:                 if (resetErr) {
5231:                     console.error('❌ Failed to reset game room:', resetErr);
5232:                 }
5233: 
5234:                 // Wait a moment for DELETE event to propagate to all clients
5235:                 await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
5236: 
5237:                 // Broadcast game-reset event to all players
5238:                 if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
5239:                     broadcastGameAction('game-reset', {
5240:                         reason: 'placement-timeout',
5241:                         kickedPlayerIndex: activePlayerIndex
5242:                     });
5243:                 }
5244: 
5245:                 // Reset local game state (host)
5246:                 if (typeof resetToLobby === 'function') {
5247:                     resetToLobby();
5248:                 }
5249:                 return;
5250:             }
5251: 
5252:             // SPECIAL CASE: If the active player has an unresolved scroll cascade, they forfeit.
5253:             // (They must place the overflowing scroll before ending their turn; if time runs out, they lose.)
5254:             const hasCascade = typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.hasPendingCascade(activePlayerIndex);
5255:             if (hasCascade) {
5256:                 const forfeiterName = typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function'
5257:                     ? getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex) : `Player ${activePlayerIndex + 1}`;
5258:                 console.log(`⏰ Cascade forfeit: ${forfeiterName} ran out of time with unresolved cascade`);
5259:                 updateStatus(`⏰ ${forfeiterName} ran out of time with an unresolved scroll cascade — forfeiting!`);
5260:                 if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
5261:                     broadcastGameAction('cascade-forfeit', { playerIndex: activePlayerIndex });
5262:                 }
5263:                 // Remove the forfeiting player from the game (same as kick path)
5264:                 const { data: forfeitPlayers } = await supabase
5265:                     .from('players')
5266:                     .select('id, username, player_index')
5267:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
5268:                 const forfeitPlayer = forfeitPlayers?.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex);
5269:                 if (forfeitPlayer) {
5270:                     await supabase.from('players').delete().eq('id', forfeitPlayer.id);
5271:                 }
5272:                 await hostAdvanceToNextPlayerAndRestartTimer();
5273:                 return;
5274:             }
5275: 
5276:             // NORMAL GAME PHASE: Use existing kick/auto-advance logic
5277:             if (kickOnTurnTimeout) {
5278:                 // Kick active player
5279:                 const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
5280:                     .from('players')
5281:                     .select('id, username, player_index');
5282: 
5283:                 const activePlayer = allPlayers?.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex);
5284: 
5285:                 if (activePlayer) {
5286:                     const { error: kickErr } = await supabase
5287:                         .from('players')
5288:                         .delete()
5289:                         .eq('id', activePlayer.id);
5290: 
5291:                     if (kickErr) {
5292:                         console.error('❌ Failed to kick player (turn timeout):', kickErr);
5293:                         return;
5294:                     }
5295: 
5296:                     updateStatus(`⏰ ${activePlayer.username} was kicked (turn timer expired)`);
5297:                 } else {
5298:                     console.warn('⚠️ Turn timeout expired but active player not found in DB');
5299:                 }
5300:             } else {
5301:                 updateStatus('⏰ Turn timer expired — auto-passing turn.');
5302:             }
5303: 
5304:             // Advance to next available player and restart the timer
5305:             await hostAdvanceToNextPlayerAndRestartTimer();
5306:         }
5307: 
5308:         async function hostAdvanceToNextPlayerAndRestartTimer() {
5309:             // Fetch remaining players and choose the next index based on player_index ordering
5310:             const { data: remainingPlayers, error } = await supabase
5311:                 .from('players')
5312:                 .select('player_index')
5313:                 .order('player_index', { ascending: true });
5314: 
5315:             if (error) {
5316:                 console.error('❌ Failed to read players to advance turn:', error);
5317:                 return;
5318:             }
5319: 
5320:             const indices = (remainingPlayers || [])
5321:                 .map(p => p.player_index)
5322:                 .filter(i => i !== null && i !== undefined)
5323:                 .sort((a, b) => a - b);
5324: 
5325:             if (indices.length === 0) return;
5326: 
5327:             // Find next index after current; wrap around
5328:             let nextIndex = indices.find(i => i > activePlayerIndex);
5329:             if (nextIndex === undefined) nextIndex = indices[0];
5330: 
5331:             activePlayerIndex = nextIndex;
5332: 
5333:             // Restart timer anchored to host time
5334:             const started = Date.now();
5335:             turnStartedAtMs = started;
5336:             currentTurnNumber++;
5337: 
5338:             // Broadcast turn change with shared turn start timestamp and turn number
5339:             broadcastGameAction('turn-change', {
5340:                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
5341:                 turnStartedAt: started,
5342:                 turnNumber: currentTurnNumber
5343:             });
5344: 
5345:             // Update local display as host
5346:             if (isPlacementPhase) {
5347:                 // During placement phase, turn display is handled in the turn-change receiver
5348:             } else {
5349:                 updateTurnDisplay();
5350:             }
5351:         }
5352: 
5353:         // Start turn timer monitoring (host enforcement + local display)
5354:         function startTurnTimerMonitoring() {
5355:             // Stop any existing
5356:             stopTurnTimerMonitoring();
5357: 
5358:             // Ensure we have a baseline turn start
5359:             if (!turnStartedAtMs) turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
5360: 
5361:             // Host enforces every second
5362:             if (isHost) {
5363:                 turnTimeoutInterval = setInterval(() => {
5364:                     // avoid unhandled promise rejections
5365:                     checkTurnTimeout().catch(err => console.error('Turn timeout check failed:', err));
5366:                 }, 1000);
5367: 
5368:                 // Host also broadcasts periodic sync every 5 seconds
5369:                 turnSyncInterval = setInterval(() => {
5370:                     if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
5371:                         broadcastGameAction('turn-sync', {
5372:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
5373:                             turnNumber: currentTurnNumber,
5374:                             turnStartedAt: turnStartedAtMs
5375:                         });
5376:                         console.log(`🔄 Turn sync broadcast: turn ${currentTurnNumber}, player ${activePlayerIndex}`);
5377:                     }
5378:                 }, 5000);
5379: 
5380:                 // Host also broadcasts common area sync every 10 seconds
5381:                 commonAreaSyncInterval = setInterval(() => {
5382:                     if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function' && typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined') {
5383:                         // Get current common area state
5384:                         const commonAreaState = {};
5385:                         Object.keys(spellSystem.commonArea).forEach(element => {
5386:                             commonAreaState[element] = spellSystem.commonArea[element];
5387:                         });
5388: 
5389:                         broadcastGameAction('common-area-sync', {
5390:                             commonArea: commonAreaState
5391:                         });
5392:                         console.log(`🔄 Common area sync broadcast:`, commonAreaState);
5393:                     }
5394:                 }, 10000);
5395:             }
5396: 
5397:             // Everyone updates display every second
5398:             startTimerDisplay();
5399:         }
5400: 
5401:         // Stop turn timer monitoring
5402:         function stopTurnTimerMonitoring() {
5403:             if (turnTimeoutInterval) {
5404:                 clearInterval(turnTimeoutInterval);
5405:                 turnTimeoutInterval = null;
5406:             }
5407:             if (turnSyncInterval) {
5408:                 clearInterval(turnSyncInterval);
5409:                 turnSyncInterval = null;
5410:             }
5411:             if (commonAreaSyncInterval) {
5412:                 clearInterval(commonAreaSyncInterval);
5413:                 commonAreaSyncInterval = null;
5414:             }
5415:             stopTimerDisplay();
5416:         }
5417: 
5418:         // Sync current player state (AP and resources) in multiplayer
5419:         function syncPlayerState() {
5420:             if (!isMultiplayer) return;
5421: 
5422:             // Record activity
5423:             recordActivity();
5424: 
5425:             // Use global currentAP/voidAP only when we ARE the active player;
5426:             // otherwise fall back to last-known stored values for that player.
5427:             const isMyTurn = (myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex);
5428:             const apToSend = isMyTurn ? currentAP : (playerAPs[activePlayerIndex]?.currentAP ?? 5);
5429:             const voidApToSend = isMyTurn ? voidAP : (playerAPs[activePlayerIndex]?.voidAP ?? 0);
5430: 
5431:             // Update local tracking
5432:             if (!playerAPs[activePlayerIndex]) {
5433:                 playerAPs[activePlayerIndex] = { currentAP: 5, voidAP: 0 };
5434:             }
5435:             if (isMyTurn) {
5436:                 playerAPs[activePlayerIndex].currentAP = currentAP;
5437:                 playerAPs[activePlayerIndex].voidAP = voidAP;
5438:             }
5439: 
5440:             // Only broadcast resources when it's our own turn.
5441:             // When it's not our turn, we must not broadcast the other player's
5442:             // resource pool — we may have modified it locally (e.g. during
5443:             // processPsychicPending), and broadcasting those values would cause
5444:             // the active player's client to double-apply pool changes (e.g.
5445:             // Respirate drawing wind stones twice).
5446:             const activeResources = isMyTurn
5447:                 ? (playerPools[activePlayerIndex] || { ...INITIAL_PLAYER_STONES })
5448:                 : null;
5449:             broadcastGameAction('player-state-update', {
5450:                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
5451:                 currentAP: apToSend,
5452:                 voidAP: voidApToSend,
5453:                 resources: activeResources
5454:             });
5455:         }
5456: 
5457:         // Show tooltip with player's AP and resources
5458:         function showPlayerTooltip(playerIndex, mouseX, mouseY) {
5459:             const tooltip = document.createElement('div');
5460:             tooltip.className = 'player-tooltip';
5461:             tooltip.style.left = (mouseX + 15) + 'px';
5462:             tooltip.style.top = (mouseY + 15) + 'px';
5463: 
5464:             // Get player name
5465:             const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
5466: 
5467:             // Get player's resources
5468:             const playerPool = playerPools[playerIndex] || { ...INITIAL_PLAYER_STONES };
5469:             const playerAP = playerAPs[playerIndex] || { currentAP: 5, voidAP: 0 };
5470: 
5471:             // Build tooltip content
5472:             let html = `<div class="tooltip-header">${playerName}</div>`;
5473: 
5474:             // AP info
5475:             html += `<div class="tooltip-row">
5476:                 <span class="tooltip-label">AP:</span>
5477:                 <span>${playerAP.currentAP}/5</span>
5478:             </div>`;
5479: 
5480:             if (playerAP.voidAP > 0) {
5481:                 html += `<div class="tooltip-row">
5482:                     <span class="tooltip-label" style="color: #9458f4;">Void AP:</span>
5483:                     <span style="color: #9458f4;">${playerAP.voidAP}</span>
5484:                 </div>`;
5485:             }
5486: 
5487:             // Resources
5488:             html += `<div style="margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #555;">`;
5489:             html += `<div style="margin-bottom: 5px; color: #999;">Stone Resources:</div>`;
5490: 
5491:             const elementSymbols = { earth: '▲', water: '◯', fire: '♦', wind: '≋', void: '✺' };
5492:             const elementColors = { earth: '#69d83a', water: '#5894f4', fire: '#ed1b43', wind: '#ffce00', void: '#9458f4' };
5493: 
5494:             ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(element => {
5495:                 if (playerPool[element] > 0) {
5496:                     html += `<div class="tooltip-row">
5497:                         <span style="color: ${elementColors[element]};">${elementSymbols[element]} ${element}:</span>
5498:                         <span>${playerPool[element]}/5</span>
5499:                     </div>`;
5500:                 }
5501:             });
5502: 
5503:             html += `</div>`;
5504: 
5505:             // Scrolls
5506:             const playerScrollData = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
5507:             const totalScrolls = playerScrollData ?
5508:                 (playerScrollData.hand ? playerScrollData.hand.size : 0) +
5509:                 (playerScrollData.active ? playerScrollData.active.size : 0) : 0;
5510:             if (playerScrollData && totalScrolls > 0) {
5511:                 html += `<div style="margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #555;">`;
5512:                 html += `<div style="margin-bottom: 5px; color: #999;">Scrolls (Hand: ${playerScrollData.hand ? playerScrollData.hand.size : 0}, Active: ${playerScrollData.active ? playerScrollData.active.size : 0}):</div>`;
5513: 
5514:                 // Count scrolls by element type (combine hand + active)
5515:                 const scrollCounts = { earth: 0, water: 0, fire: 0, wind: 0, void: 0, catacomb: 0 };
5516:                 const allScrolls = new Set([
5517:                     ...(playerScrollData.hand || []),
5518:                     ...(playerScrollData.active || [])
5519:                 ]);
5520:                 allScrolls.forEach(scrollName => {
5521:                     const element = scrollName.split('_')[0].toLowerCase();
5522:                     if (scrollCounts[element] !== undefined) {
5523:                         scrollCounts[element]++;
5524:                     }
5525:                 });
5526: 
5527:                 // Display scroll counts
5528:                 ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(element => {
5529:                     if (scrollCounts[element] > 0) {
5530:                         html += `<div class="tooltip-row">
5531:                             <span style="color: ${elementColors[element]};">${element}:</span>
5532:                             <span>${scrollCounts[element]}</span>
5533:                         </div>`;
5534:                     }
5535:                 });
5536: 
5537:                 if (scrollCounts.catacomb > 0) {
5538:                     html += `<div class="tooltip-row">
5539:                         <span style="color: #8b4513;">catacomb:</span>
5540:                         <span>${scrollCounts.catacomb}</span>
5541:                     </div>`;
5542:                 }
5543: 
5544:                 html += `</div>`;
5545:             }
5546:             tooltip.innerHTML = html;
5547: 
5548:             document.body.appendChild(tooltip);
5549:             return tooltip;
5550:         }
5551: 
5552:         function updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex = null) {
5553:             // If no player index specified, use active player
5554:             if (playerIndex === null) {
5555:                 playerIndex = activePlayerIndex;
5556:             }
5557:             
5558:             // Find THIS player's tile
5559:             const playerTile = placedTiles.find(t => t.isPlayerTile && t.playerIndex === playerIndex);
5560:             if (!playerTile) {
5561:                 console.log(`No player tile found for player ${playerIndex}`);
5562:                 return;
5563:             }
5564: 
5565:             const symbolsGroup = playerTile.element.querySelector('.player-tile-element-symbols');
5566:             if (!symbolsGroup) return;
5567: 
5568:             // Clear existing symbols
5569:             symbolsGroup.innerHTML = '';
5570: 
5571:             // Get activated elements for THIS specific player
5572:             const playerScrollData = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
5573:             if (!playerScrollData) return;
5574:             
5575:             const activatedElements = Array.from(playerScrollData.activated);
5576:             
5577:             if (activatedElements.length === 0) return;
5578: 
5579:             // Arrange symbols in a tight pentagon pattern inside the tile's center hex
5580:             // Keep radius well within TILE_SIZE (20) so symbols never bleed outside the tile
5581:             const radius = TILE_SIZE * 0.75; // ~15 units — inside the center hex (r=20)
5582:             const angleStep = (Math.PI * 2) / 5;
5583:             const elementOrder = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
5584: 
5585:             activatedElements.forEach(element => {
5586:                 const index = elementOrder.indexOf(element);
5587:                 const angle = angleStep * index - Math.PI / 2; // Start at top
5588:                 const x = Math.cos(angle) * radius;
5589:                 const y = Math.sin(angle) * radius;
5590: 
5591:                 // Create symbol with background circle
5592:                 const symbolBg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
5593:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('cx', x);
5594:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('cy', y);
5595:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('r', '9');
5596:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[element].color);
5597:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('stroke', '#fff');
5598:                 symbolBg.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1.5');
5599:                 symbolsGroup.appendChild(symbolBg);
5600: 
5601:                 // Create symbol
5602:                 const symbol = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
5603:                 symbol.setAttribute('x', x);
5604:                 symbol.setAttribute('y', y);
5605:                 symbol.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
5606:                 symbol.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
5607:                 symbol.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
5608:                 symbol.setAttribute('font-size', '10');
5609:                 symbol.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
5610:                 symbol.textContent = STONE_TYPES[element].symbol;
5611: 
5612:                 symbolsGroup.appendChild(symbol);
5613:             });
5614: 
5615:             console.log(`🎨 Updated player ${playerIndex}'s TILE with ${activatedElements.length} element symbol(s): ${activatedElements.join(', ')}`);
5616:         }
5617: 
5618:         // Expose on window so scroll-effects.js (outside this IIFE) can call it
5619:         window.updatePlayerElementSymbols = updatePlayerElementSymbols;
5620: 
5621:         function startPlayerDrag(e, options = {}) {
5622:             const takeFlight = !!options.isTakeFlight || ((typeof window !== 'undefined') && window.takeFlightState?.active);
5623:             const playerIndex = (typeof options.playerIndex === 'number') ? options.playerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
5624: 
5625:             // Check if it's this player's turn (unless Take Flight drag)
5626:             if (!takeFlight && !isMyTurn()) {
5627:                 notYourTurn();
5628:                 return;
5629:             }
5630: 
5631:             const draggedPlayer = playerPositions[playerIndex];
5632:             if (!draggedPlayer) {
5633:                 console.warn('startPlayerDrag: player not found', playerIndex);
5634:                 return;
5635:             }
5636: 
5637:             isDraggingPlayer = true;
5638:             playerPath = [{ x: draggedPlayer.x, y: draggedPlayer.y, cost: 0 }];
5639:             lastAttemptedHex = null; // Reset logging state
5640:             draggedPlayer.element.remove();
5641: 
5642:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
5643:             const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
5644:             const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
5645:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
5646: 
5647:             ghostPlayer = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
5648:             ghostPlayer.setAttribute('class', 'player stone-ghost');
5649:             ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
5650: 
5651:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
5652:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
5653:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
5654:             circle.setAttribute('r', TILE_SIZE * 0.4);
5655:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'player-marker');
5656: 
5657:             ghostPlayer.appendChild(circle);
5658:             viewport.appendChild(ghostPlayer);
5659: 
5660:             // Create path line (normal movement only)
5661:             if (!takeFlight) {
5662:                 pathLine = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'polyline');
5663:                 pathLine.setAttribute('id', 'player-path');
5664:                 pathLine.setAttribute('fill', 'none');
5665:                 pathLine.setAttribute('stroke', '#58a4f4');
5666:                 pathLine.setAttribute('stroke-width', '3');
5667:                 pathLine.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray', '5,5');
5668:                 pathLine.setAttribute('opacity', '0.7');
5669:                 viewport.insertBefore(pathLine, ghostPlayer);
5670:             }
5671:         }
5672: 
5673:         let lastAttemptedHex = null;
5674: 
5675:         // Find if target is reachable through a chain of wind stones/water-with-wind
5676:         function findWindPath(startX, startY, targetX, targetY) {
5677:             // BFS to find path through wind stones
5678:             const queue = [{x: startX, y: startY, path: []}];
5679:             const visited = new Set();
5680:             visited.add(`${startX.toFixed(1)},${startY.toFixed(1)}`);
5681: 
5682:             while (queue.length > 0) {
5683:                 const current = queue.shift();
5684: 
5685:                 // Get all wind stones and water-with-wind adjacent to current position
5686:                 const windStones = getAdjacentWindStones(current.x, current.y);
5687: 
5688:                 // Also check water with chained wind
5689:                 const neighbors = getNeighborStones(current.x, current.y);
5690:                 const waterWithWind = neighbors.filter(n => {
5691:                     if (n.type !== 'water') return false;
5692:                     const chainedAbility = getChainedAbility(n.x, n.y);
5693:                     return chainedAbility === 'wind';
5694:                 });
5695: 
5696:                 const allWindSources = [...windStones, ...waterWithWind];
5697: 
5698:                 for (const windSource of allWindSources) {
5699:                     const key = `${windSource.x.toFixed(1)},${windSource.y.toFixed(1)}`;
5700: 
5701:                     // Skip if nullified by void
5702:                     const hasVoid = hasAdjacentStoneType(windSource.x, windSource.y, 'void');
5703:                     if (hasVoid) continue;
5704: 
5705:                     // Check if target is adjacent to this wind source
5706:                     const windNeighbors = getNeighborHexPositions(windSource.x, windSource.y);
5707:                     const canReachTarget = windNeighbors.some(n =>
5708:                         Math.sqrt(Math.pow(n.x - targetX, 2) + Math.pow(n.y - targetY, 2)) < 5
5709:                     );
5710: 
5711:                     if (canReachTarget) {
5712:                         // Found a path!
5713:                         return [...current.path, windSource];
5714:                     }
5715: 
5716:                     // Continue searching through this wind source
5717:                     if (!visited.has(key)) {
5718:                         visited.add(key);
5719:                         queue.push({
5720:                             x: windSource.x,
5721:                             y: windSource.y,
5722:                             path: [...current.path, windSource]
5723:                         });
5724:                     }
5725:                 }
5726:             }
5727: 
5728:             return null; // No path found
5729:         }
5730: 
5731:         function findGeneralPath(startX, startY, targetX, targetY, maxCost) {
5732:             // A* pathfinding to find cheapest path through any hex
5733:             const openSet = [{x: startX, y: startY, path: [], cost: 0, priority: 0}];
5734:             const visited = new Map();
5735: 
5736:             while (openSet.length > 0) {
5737:                 // Get node with lowest priority (cost + heuristic)
5738:                 openSet.sort((a, b) => a.priority - b.priority);
5739:                 const current = openSet.shift();
5740: 
5741:                 const key = `${current.x.toFixed(1)},${current.y.toFixed(1)}`;
5742: 
5743:                 // Skip if we've visited this with lower cost
5744:                 if (visited.has(key) && visited.get(key) <= current.cost) continue;
5745:                 visited.set(key, current.cost);
5746: 
5747:                 // Check if we reached the target
5748:                 const distToTarget = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(current.x - targetX, 2) + Math.pow(current.y - targetY, 2));
5749:                 if (distToTarget < 5) {
5750:                     return { path: current.path, cost: current.cost };
5751:                 }
5752: 
5753:                 // Explore neighbors
5754:                 const neighbors = getNeighborHexPositions(current.x, current.y);
5755:                 for (const neighbor of neighbors) {
5756:                     const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(neighbor.x, neighbor.y);
5757: 
5758:                     if (moveCheck.canMove) {
5759:                         const newCost = current.cost + moveCheck.cost;
5760: 
5761:                         // Skip if would exceed max cost
5762:                         if (newCost > maxCost) continue;
5763: 
5764:                         const neighborKey = `${neighbor.x.toFixed(1)},${neighbor.y.toFixed(1)}`;
5765: 
5766:                         // Skip if already visited with lower cost
5767:                         if (visited.has(neighborKey) && visited.get(neighborKey) <= newCost) continue;
5768: 
5769:                         // Calculate heuristic (straight-line distance to target)
5770:                         const heuristic = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(neighbor.x - targetX, 2) + Math.pow(neighbor.y - targetY, 2)) / TILE_SIZE;
5771: 
5772:                         openSet.push({
5773:                             x: neighbor.x,
5774:                             y: neighbor.y,
5775:                             path: [...current.path, {x: neighbor.x, y: neighbor.y, cost: moveCheck.cost}],
5776:                             cost: newCost,
5777:                             priority: newCost + heuristic
5778:                         });
5779:                     }
5780:                 }
5781:             }
5782: 
5783:             return null; // No path found
5784:         }
5785: 
5786:         function getAdjacentWindStones(x, y) {
5787:             const neighbors = getNeighborHexPositions(x, y);
5788:             const windStones = [];
5789: 
5790:             neighbors.forEach(neighborPos => {
5791:                 const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
5792:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - neighborPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - neighborPos.y, 2));
5793:                     if (dist >= 5) return false;
5794: 
5795:                     // Check if it's wind or water mimicking wind
5796:                     const effectiveType = getEffectiveStoneType(s);
5797:                     return effectiveType === 'wind';
5798:                 });
5799:                 if (stone) {
5800:                     windStones.push(stone);
5801:                 }
5802:             });
5803: 
5804:             return windStones;
5805:         }
5806: 
5807:         function getAdjacentEarthStones(x, y) {
5808:             const neighbors = getNeighborHexPositions(x, y);
5809:             const earthStones = [];
5810: 
5811:             neighbors.forEach(neighborPos => {
5812:                 const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
5813:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - neighborPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - neighborPos.y, 2));
5814:                     if (dist >= 5) return false;
5815: 
5816:                     // Check if it's earth or water mimicking earth
5817:                     const effectiveType = getEffectiveStoneType(s);
5818:                     return effectiveType === 'earth';
5819:                 });
5820:                 if (stone) {
5821:                     earthStones.push(stone);
5822:                 }
5823:             });
5824: 
5825:             return earthStones;
5826:         }
5827: 
5828:         // Get the chained ability for a water stone by flood-filling through connected water
5829:         function getChainedAbility(x, y) {
5830:             // Only water stones can receive chained abilities
5831:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
5832:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - y, 2));
5833:                 return dist < 5;
5834:             });
5835: 
5836:             if (!stone || stone.type !== 'water') {
5837:                 return null; // Not a water stone
5838:             }
5839: 
5840:             // Check if THIS water stone is nullified by void
5841:             const waterNullified = hasAdjacentStoneType(x, y, 'void');
5842:             if (waterNullified) {
5843:                 return null; // Water's chaining ability is nullified by adjacent void
5844:             }
5845: 
5846:             // Flood fill through connected water to find wind/earth sources
5847:             const visited = new Set();
5848:             const queue = [{x, y}];
5849:             visited.add(`${x.toFixed(1)},${y.toFixed(1)}`);
5850: 
5851:             let hasWind = false;
5852:             let hasEarth = false;
5853: 
5854:             while (queue.length > 0) {
5855:                 const current = queue.shift();
5856:                 const neighbors = getNeighborStones(current.x, current.y);
5857: 
5858:                 for (const neighbor of neighbors) {
5859:                     const key = `${neighbor.x.toFixed(1)},${neighbor.y.toFixed(1)}`;
5860: 
5861:                     // Check if this neighbor is a source stone (wind or earth, not nullified by void)
5862:                     if (neighbor.type === 'wind') {
5863:                         const voidNullified = hasAdjacentStoneType(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, 'void');
5864:                         if (!voidNullified) {
5865:                             hasWind = true;
5866:                         }
5867:                     } else if (neighbor.type === 'earth') {
5868:                         const voidNullified = hasAdjacentStoneType(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, 'void');
5869:                         if (!voidNullified) {
5870:                             hasEarth = true;
5871:                         }
5872:                     }
5873: 
5874:                     // If neighbor is water and not visited, add to queue to continue flood fill
5875:                     if (neighbor.type === 'water' && !visited.has(key)) {
5876:                         // Check if this water is nullified by void
5877:                         const neighborWaterNullified = hasAdjacentStoneType(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, 'void');
5878:                         if (!neighborWaterNullified) {
5879:                             visited.add(key);
5880:                             queue.push({x: neighbor.x, y: neighbor.y});
5881:                         }
5882:                     }
5883:                 }
5884:             }
5885: 
5886:             // Wind outranks earth
5887:             if (hasWind) return 'wind';
5888:             if (hasEarth) return 'earth';
5889:             return null; // No chained ability
5890:         }
5891: 
5892:         function updatePlayerPath(x, y) {
5893:             const targetPos = findNearestHexPosition(x, y);
5894:             if (!targetPos.valid) return;
5895: 
5896:             const startPos = playerPath[0];
5897:             if (!startPos) return;
5898: 
5899:             const targetKey = `${Math.round(targetPos.x)},${Math.round(targetPos.y)}`;
5900: 
5901:             // No-op if cursor hasn't moved to a different hex
5902:             if (targetKey === lastAttemptedHex) return;
5903:             lastAttemptedHex = targetKey;
5904: 
5905:             // Cursor on start hex → reset path to just the origin
5906:             if (Math.hypot(targetPos.x - startPos.x, targetPos.y - startPos.y) < 5) {
5907:                 playerPath = [{ x: startPos.x, y: startPos.y, cost: 0 }];
5908:                 _applyPathToLine();
5909:                 updatePathLabels();
5910:                 return;
5911:             }
5912: 
5913:             // Cursor is on an existing path node → backtrack to that point
5914:             for (let i = playerPath.length - 1; i >= 1; i--) {
5915:                 if (Math.hypot(playerPath[i].x - targetPos.x, playerPath[i].y - targetPos.y) < 5) {
5916:                     playerPath = playerPath.slice(0, i + 1);
5917:                     _applyPathToLine();
5918:                     updatePathLabels();
5919:                     return;
5920:                 }
5921:             }
5922: 
5923:             // Cursor is already at the end of the path → nothing to do
5924:             const lastPos = playerPath[playerPath.length - 1];
5925:             if (Math.hypot(lastPos.x - targetPos.x, lastPos.y - targetPos.y) < 5) return;
5926: 
5927:             // Find the shortest affordable path from start to the cursor hex using Dijkstra
5928:             const newPath = _dijkstraPath(startPos, targetPos);
5929:             if (newPath) playerPath = newPath;
5930: 
5931:             _applyPathToLine();
5932:             updatePathLabels();
5933:         }
5934: 
5935:         /**
5936:          * Dijkstra shortest-path from startPos to targetPos across placed hexes.
5937:          * Returns a playerPath array [{x, y, cost}] or null if unreachable / unaffordable.
5938:          */
5939:         function _dijkstraPath(startPos, targetPos) {
5940:             const hexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
5941:             const SNAP_R = TILE_SIZE * 0.6;
5942:             const key = (x, y) => `${Math.round(x)},${Math.round(y)}`;
5943:             const startKey = key(startPos.x, startPos.y);
5944:             const targetKey = key(targetPos.x, targetPos.y);
5945:             const totalAP = getTotalAP();
5946: 
5947:             // Snap a theoretical neighbour position to the nearest actual placed hex
5948:             const snapNeighbor = (nx, ny) => {
5949:                 let best = null, bestD = SNAP_R;
5950:                 for (const h of hexes) {
5951:                     const d = Math.hypot(h.x - nx, h.y - ny);
5952:                     if (d < bestD) { bestD = d; best = h; }
5953:                 }
5954:                 return best;
5955:             };
5956: 
5957:             const dist     = new Map([[startKey, 0]]);
5958:             const prev     = new Map([[startKey, null]]);
5959:             const costMap  = new Map([[startKey, 0]]);
5960:             const posMap   = new Map([[startKey, startPos]]);
5961:             const queue    = [{ cost: 0, key: startKey }];
5962: 
5963:             while (queue.length) {
5964:                 // Simple priority queue — board is small so this is fast enough
5965:                 queue.sort((a, b) => a.cost - b.cost);
5966:                 const curr = queue.shift();
5967:                 if (curr.key === targetKey) break;
5968:                 if (curr.cost > (dist.get(curr.key) ?? Infinity)) continue;
5969: 
5970:                 const currPos = posMap.get(curr.key);
5971:                 for (const nb of getNeighborHexPositions(currPos.x, currPos.y)) {
5972:                     const snapped = snapNeighbor(nb.x, nb.y);
5973:                     if (!snapped) continue;
5974: 
5975:                     const nKey = key(snapped.x, snapped.y);
5976:                     const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(snapped.x, snapped.y);
5977:                     if (!moveCheck.canMove) continue;
5978: 
5979:                     const newDist = curr.cost + moveCheck.cost;
5980:                     if (newDist > totalAP) continue;
5981:                     if (newDist >= (dist.get(nKey) ?? Infinity)) continue;
5982: 
5983:                     dist.set(nKey, newDist);
5984:                     prev.set(nKey, curr.key);
5985:                     costMap.set(nKey, moveCheck.cost);
5986:                     posMap.set(nKey, snapped);
5987:                     queue.push({ cost: newDist, key: nKey });
5988:                 }
5989:             }
5990: 
5991:             if (!dist.has(targetKey)) return null;
5992: 
5993:             // Reconstruct path by following parent pointers
5994:             const path = [];
5995:             let k = targetKey;
5996:             while (k !== null) {
5997:                 const p = posMap.get(k);
5998:                 path.unshift({ x: p.x, y: p.y, cost: costMap.get(k) });
5999:                 k = prev.get(k);
6000:             }
6001:             return path;
6002:         }
6003: 
6004:         /** Sync the SVG polyline to the current playerPath */
6005:         function _applyPathToLine() {
6006:             if (!pathLine) return;
6007:             if (playerPath.length > 1) {
6008:                 pathLine.setAttribute('points', playerPath.map(p => `${p.x},${p.y}`).join(' '));
6009:             } else {
6010:                 pathLine.setAttribute('points', '');
6011:             }
6012:         }
6013: 
6014:         function updatePathLabels() {
6015:             // Remove old labels
6016:             pathCostLabels.forEach(label => label.remove());
6017:             pathCostLabels = [];
6018: 
6019:             if (playerPath.length < 2) return;
6020: 
6021:             // Calculate cumulative costs and remaining AP for each segment
6022:             const steamBuff = getSteamVentsBuff();
6023:             let cumulativeCost = 0;
6024:             let banked = steamBuff ? steamBuff.freeStepBanked : false;
6025: 
6026:             for (let i = 1; i < playerPath.length; i++) {
6027:                 const currentSegment = playerPath[i];
6028:                 const stepCost = currentSegment.cost;
6029:                 if (steamBuff && stepCost > 0 && banked) {
6030:                     banked = false; // free step
6031:                 } else {
6032:                     cumulativeCost += stepCost;
6033:                     if (steamBuff && stepCost > 0) banked = true;
6034:                 }
6035:                 const remainingAP = currentAP - cumulativeCost;
6036: 
6037:                 // Calculate midpoint between this segment and previous
6038:                 const prevSegment = playerPath[i - 1];
6039:                 const midX = (currentSegment.x + prevSegment.x) / 2;
6040:                 const midY = (currentSegment.y + prevSegment.y) / 2;
6041: 
6042:                 // Create label
6043:                 const label = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
6044:                 label.setAttribute('x', midX);
6045:                 label.setAttribute('y', midY - 8); // Offset above the line
6046:                 label.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
6047:                 label.setAttribute('fill', remainingAP >= 0 ? '#2ecc71' : '#e74c3c');
6048:                 label.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
6049:                 label.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
6050:                 label.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
6051:                 label.setAttribute('stroke-width', '0.5');
6052:                 label.setAttribute('paint-order', 'stroke');
6053:                 label.textContent = remainingAP;
6054: 
6055:                 viewport.appendChild(label);
6056:                 pathCostLabels.push(label);
6057:             }
6058:         }
6059: 
6060:         function getNeighborHexPositions(x, y) {
6061:             const neighbors = [];
6062:             const s = TILE_SIZE;
6063:             const dirs = [
6064:                 { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: 0, r: -1 },
6065:                 { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }
6066:             ];
6067: 
6068:             for (const dir of dirs) {
6069:                 const pos = hexToPixel(dir.q, dir.r, s);
6070:                 neighbors.push({ x: x + pos.x, y: y + pos.y });
6071:             }
6072:             return neighbors;
6073:         }
6074: 
6075:         function calculatePathCost() {
6076:             let totalCost = 0;
6077:             const steamBuff = getSteamVentsBuff();
6078:             if (steamBuff) {
6079:                 // Steam Vents: every other AP-costing step is free
6080:                 // Start from the buff's current banked state
6081:                 let banked = steamBuff.freeStepBanked;
6082:                 for (let i = 1; i < playerPath.length; i++) {
6083:                     const stepCost = playerPath[i].cost;
6084:                     if (stepCost > 0 && banked) {
6085:                         // This step is free (banked from previous paid step)
6086:                         banked = false;
6087:                     } else {
6088:                         totalCost += stepCost;
6089:                         if (stepCost > 0) banked = true; // Bank a free step for next
6090:                     }
6091:                 }
6092:             } else {
6093:                 for (let i = 1; i < playerPath.length; i++) {
6094:                     totalCost += playerPath[i].cost;
6095:                 }
6096:             }
6097:             return totalCost;
6098:         }
6099: 
6100:         function getSteamVentsBuff() {
6101:             const buff = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.steamVents;
6102:             return (buff && buff.playerIndex === activePlayerIndex) ? buff : null;
6103:         }
6104: 
6105:         function hasSteamVentsBuff() {
6106:             return !!getSteamVentsBuff();
6107:         }
6108: 
6109:         // After committing movement, update the Steam Vents banked state
6110:         // so future moves in the same turn remember the alternation
6111:         function commitSteamVentsState(path) {
6112:             const buff = getSteamVentsBuff();
6113:             if (!buff) return;
6114:             let banked = buff.freeStepBanked;
6115:             for (let i = 1; i < path.length; i++) {
6116:                 const stepCost = path[i].cost;
6117:                 if (stepCost > 0 && banked) {
6118:                     banked = false;
6119:                 } else if (stepCost > 0) {
6120:                     banked = true;
6121:                 }
6122:             }
6123:             buff.freeStepBanked = banked;
6124:             console.log(`♨️ Steam Vents: freeStepBanked now = ${banked}`);
6125:         }
6126:         if (typeof window !== 'undefined') window.commitSteamVentsState = commitSteamVentsState;
6127: 
6128:         // Calculate movement cost for tap-to-move (simple BFS pathfinding)
6129:         function calculateTapMoveCost(startPos, endPos) {
6130:             const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
6131:             if (allHexes.length === 0) return -1;
6132: 
6133:             // Find start and end hexes
6134:             let startHex = null, endHex = null;
6135:             allHexes.forEach(hex => {
6136:                 const startDist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hex.x - startPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(hex.y - startPos.y, 2));
6137:                 const endDist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hex.x - endPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(hex.y - endPos.y, 2));
6138:                 if (startDist < 5) startHex = hex;
6139:                 if (endDist < 5) endHex = hex;
6140:             });
6141: 
6142:             if (!startHex || !endHex) return -1;
6143:             if (startHex.key === endHex.key) return 0;
6144: 
6145:             // BFS to find shortest path
6146:             const visited = new Set();
6147:             const steamBuff = getSteamVentsBuff();
6148:             const startBanked = steamBuff ? steamBuff.freeStepBanked : false;
6149:             const queue = [{ hex: startHex, cost: 0, banked: startBanked }];
6150:             visited.add(startHex.key);
6151: 
6152:             while (queue.length > 0) {
6153:                 const { hex, cost, banked } = queue.shift();
6154: 
6155:                 // Find adjacent hexes (within ~35 units - one hex step)
6156:                 const neighbors = allHexes.filter(h => {
6157:                     if (visited.has(h.key)) return false;
6158:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(h.x - hex.x, 2) + Math.pow(h.y - hex.y, 2));
6159:                     return dist > 5 && dist < 40; // Adjacent hex distance
6160:                 });
6161: 
6162:                 for (const neighbor of neighbors) {
6163:                     const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, false);
6164:                     if (!moveCheck.canMove) continue;
6165: 
6166:                     let newCost = cost;
6167:                     let newBanked = banked;
6168:                     const stepCost = moveCheck.cost || 1;
6169:                     if (steamBuff && stepCost > 0 && newBanked) {
6170:                         newBanked = false; // free step
6171:                     } else {
6172:                         newCost += stepCost;
6173:                         if (steamBuff && stepCost > 0) newBanked = true;
6174:                     }
6175:                     visited.add(neighbor.key);
6176: 
6177:                     if (neighbor.key === endHex.key) {
6178:                         return newCost;
6179:                     }
6180: 
6181:                     queue.push({ hex: neighbor, cost: newCost, banked: newBanked });
6182:                 }
6183:             }
6184: 
6185:             return -1; // No path found
6186:         }
6187: 
6188:         let nextStoneId = 1; // Global counter for unique stone IDs
6189: 
6190:         function placeStone(x, y, type) {
6191:             const stoneId = nextStoneId++;
6192:             console.log(`   Placing stone: id=${stoneId}, type=${type}, position=(${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
6193: 
6194:             // Broadcast stone placement to other players
6195:             broadcastGameAction('stone-place', {
6196:                 x: x,
6197:                 y: y,
6198:                 stoneType: type
6199:             });
6200: 
6201:             const stoneGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
6202:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('class', 'stone');
6203:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('data-stone-id', stoneId);
6204:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
6205: 
6206:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
6207:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
6208:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
6209:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
6210:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
6211:             circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
6212: 
6213:             const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
6214:             text.setAttribute('x', 0);
6215:             text.setAttribute('y', 0);
6216:             text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
6217:             text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
6218:             text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
6219:             text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
6220:             text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
6221:             text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[type].symbol;
6222: 
6223:             stoneGroup.appendChild(circle);
6224:             stoneGroup.appendChild(text);
6225: 
6226:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
6227:                 e.stopPropagation();
6228:                 e.preventDefault();
6229:                 if (e.button !== 0) return;
6230: 
6231:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6232:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6233:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6234:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6235:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6236:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6237:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6238: 
6239:                 if (canMoveStone) {
6240:                     startStoneDrag(stoneId, e);
6241:                     return;
6242:                 }
6243: 
6244:                 // Stone dragging disabled - stones can only be placed from pool or broken (right-click)
6245:                 updateStatus('Right-click to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6246:             });
6247: 
6248:             // Touch support: long-press to break stone
6249:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
6250:                 e.stopPropagation();
6251:                 e.preventDefault();
6252: 
6253:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6254:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6255:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6256:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6257:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6258:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6259:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6260: 
6261:                 if (canMoveStone && e.touches && e.touches.length === 1) {
6262:                     const t = e.touches[0];
6263:                     startStoneDrag(stoneId, {
6264:                         clientX: t.clientX,
6265:                         clientY: t.clientY,
6266:                         button: 0,
6267:                         preventDefault: () => {},
6268:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
6269:                     });
6270:                     return;
6271:                 }
6272: 
6273:                 updateStatus('Long-press to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6274:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6275:                 stoneLongPressTimer = setTimeout(() => {
6276:                     attemptBreakStone(stoneId);
6277:                 }, 650);
6278:             }, { passive: false });
6279: 
6280:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
6281:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6282:                 stoneLongPressTimer = null;
6283:             });
6284: 
6285:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
6286:                 e.stopPropagation();
6287:                 e.preventDefault();
6288:                 attemptBreakStone(stoneId);
6289:             });
6290: 
6291:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
6292:                 e.stopPropagation();
6293:                 
6294:                 // Check if stone is adjacent to player and show break cost
6295:                 const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
6296:                 if (stone && playerPosition && isAdjacentToPlayer(stone.x, stone.y)) {
6297:                     const STONE_RANK = { 'void': 1, 'wind': 2, 'fire': 3, 'water': 4, 'earth': 5 };
6298:                     const breakCost = STONE_RANK[stone.type];
6299:                     const canAffordBreak = getTotalAP() >= breakCost;
6300:                     
6301:                     stoneGroup.style.cursor = 'pointer';
6302:                     stoneGroup.style.filter = canAffordBreak ? 'brightness(1.3)' : 'brightness(0.7)';
6303:                     
6304:                     updateStatus(`Right-click to break ${stone.type} stone (${breakCost} AP)${canAffordBreak ? '' : ' - Not enough AP!'}`);
6305:                 }
6306:             });
6307: 
6308:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mouseleave', (e) => {
6309:                 e.stopPropagation();
6310:                 stoneGroup.style.filter = '';
6311:             });
6312: 
6313:             viewport.appendChild(stoneGroup);
6314: 
6315:             placedStones.push({
6316:                 id: stoneId,
6317:                 x: x,
6318:                 y: y,
6319:                 type: type,
6320:                 element: stoneGroup
6321:             });
6322: 
6323:             // Track for Burning Motivation: grant AP per stone placed (until end of turn, stacks)
6324:             if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
6325:                 const buff = spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs?.burningMotivation;
6326:                 if (buff && buff.playerIndex === activePlayerIndex && buff.stacks > 0) {
6327:                     const apGain = buff.stacks * 2;
6328:                     if (apGain > 0 && typeof addAP === 'function') {
6329:                         addAP(apGain);
6330:                         if (typeof updateStatus === 'function') {
6331:                             updateStatus(`Burning Motivation! +${apGain} AP for placing a stone.`);
6332:                         }
6333:                     }
6334:                 }
6335:             }
6336: 
6337:             updateTileClasses();
6338:             processStoneInteractions(x, y, type);
6339: 
6340:             // Re-check all fire stones in case void was moved away
6341:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
6342: 
6343:             // Update visuals for all water stones (mimicry indicators)
6344:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
6345: 
6346:             // Control the Current: if a water stone was just placed during water-transform mode,
6347:             // refresh highlights so the new stone gets its click handler attached immediately
6348:             if (type === 'water' &&
6349:                 spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.selectionMode?.type === 'water-transform') {
6350:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.refreshWaterTransformHighlights();
6351:             }
6352: 
6353:             // Update void nullification indicators
6354:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
6355: 
6356:             return stoneId;
6357:         }
6358: 
6359:         // Place a moved stone without broadcasting or pool changes
6360:         function placeMovedStone(x, y, type, stoneId) {
6361:             const resolvedId = (stoneId != null) ? stoneId : nextStoneId++;
6362:             if (resolvedId >= nextStoneId) nextStoneId = resolvedId + 1;
6363: 
6364:             const stoneGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
6365:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('class', 'stone');
6366:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('data-stone-id', resolvedId);
6367:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
6368: 
6369:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
6370:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
6371:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
6372:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
6373:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
6374:             circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
6375: 
6376:             const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
6377:             text.setAttribute('x', 0);
6378:             text.setAttribute('y', 0);
6379:             text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
6380:             text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
6381:             text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
6382:             text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
6383:             text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
6384:             text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[type].symbol;
6385: 
6386:             stoneGroup.appendChild(circle);
6387:             stoneGroup.appendChild(text);
6388: 
6389:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
6390:                 e.stopPropagation();
6391:                 e.preventDefault();
6392:                 if (e.button !== 0) return;
6393: 
6394:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6395:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6396:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6397:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6398:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6399:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6400:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6401: 
6402:                 if (canMoveStone) {
6403:                     startStoneDrag(resolvedId, e);
6404:                     return;
6405:                 }
6406: 
6407:                 updateStatus('Right-click to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6408:             });
6409: 
6410:             // Touch support: long-press to break stone (or drag if Wind II is active)
6411:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
6412:                 e.stopPropagation();
6413:                 e.preventDefault();
6414: 
6415:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6416:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6417:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6418:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6419:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6420:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6421:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6422: 
6423:                 if (canMoveStone && e.touches && e.touches.length === 1) {
6424:                     const t = e.touches[0];
6425:                     startStoneDrag(resolvedId, {
6426:                         clientX: t.clientX,
6427:                         clientY: t.clientY,
6428:                         button: 0,
6429:                         preventDefault: () => {},
6430:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
6431:                     });
6432:                     return;
6433:                 }
6434: 
6435:                 updateStatus('Long-press to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6436:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6437:                 stoneLongPressTimer = setTimeout(() => {
6438:                     attemptBreakStone(resolvedId);
6439:                 }, 650);
6440:             }, { passive: false });
6441: 
6442:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
6443:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6444:                 stoneLongPressTimer = null;
6445:             });
6446: 
6447:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
6448:                 e.stopPropagation();
6449:                 e.preventDefault();
6450:                 attemptBreakStone(resolvedId);
6451:             });
6452: 
6453:             viewport.appendChild(stoneGroup);
6454: 
6455:             placedStones.push({
6456:                 id: resolvedId,
6457:                 x: x,
6458:                 y: y,
6459:                 type: type,
6460:                 element: stoneGroup
6461:             });
6462: 
6463:             updateTileClasses();
6464:             processStoneInteractions(x, y, type);
6465:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
6466:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
6467:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
6468: 
6469:             return resolvedId;
6470:         }
6471: 
6472:         // Visual-only stone move (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
6473:         function moveStoneVisually(stoneId, x, y, stoneType) {
6474:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
6475:             if (stone) {
6476:                 stone.x = x;
6477:                 stone.y = y;
6478:                 if (stone.element) {
6479:                     stone.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
6480:                 }
6481:                 updateTileClasses();
6482:                 processStoneInteractions(x, y, stone.type);
6483:                 recheckAllStoneInteractions();
6484:                 updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
6485:                 updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
6486:                 return;
6487:             }
6488: 
6489:             if (stoneType) {
6490:                 placeMovedStone(x, y, stoneType, stoneId);
6491:             } else {
6492:                 console.log(`⚠️ Cannot move stone ${stoneId} - not found`);
6493:             }
6494:         }
6495: 
6496:         // Visual-only stone placement (called when receiving broadcast from other players)
6497:         function placeStoneVisually(x, y, stoneType) {
6498:             // Same logic as placeStone but without broadcasting
6499:             const stoneId = nextStoneId++;
6500:             const stoneGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
6501:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('class', 'stone');
6502:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('data-stone-id', stoneId);
6503:             stoneGroup.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
6504:

6506:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
6507:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
6508:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
6509:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
6510:             circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[stoneType].color);
6511:

6513:             text.setAttribute('x', 0);
6514:             text.setAttribute('y', 0);
6515:             text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
6516:             text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
6517:             text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
6518:             text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
6519:             text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
6520:             text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[stoneType].symbol;
6521: 
6522:             stoneGroup.appendChild(circle);
6523:             stoneGroup.appendChild(text);
6524: 
6525:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
6526:                 e.stopPropagation();
6527:                 e.preventDefault();
6528:                 if (e.button !== 0) return;
6529: 
6530:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6531:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6532:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6533:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6534:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6535:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6536:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6537: 
6538:                 if (canMoveStone) {
6539:                     startStoneDrag(stoneId, e);
6540:                     return;
6541:                 }
6542: 
6543:                 updateStatus('Right-click to break this stone (costs AP based on rank)');
6544:             });
6545: 
6546:             // Touch support: long-press to break stone
6547:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
6548:                 e.stopPropagation();
6549:                 e.preventDefault();
6550: 
6551:                 const currentPlayerIdx = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
6552:                     ? myPlayerIndex
6553:                     : activePlayerIndex;
6554:                 const canMoveStone = spellSystem
6555:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects
6556:                     && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove === 'function'
6557:                     && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasWindStoneMove(currentPlayerIdx);
6558: 
6559:                 if (canMoveStone && e.touches && e.touches.length === 1) {
6560:                     const t = e.touches[0];
6561:                     startStoneDrag(stoneId, {
6562:                         clientX: t.clientX,
6563:                         clientY: t.clientY,

6565:                         preventDefault: () => {},
6566:                         stopPropagation: () => {}
6567:                     });

6569:                 }
6570:

6572:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6573:                 stoneLongPressTimer = setTimeout(() => {
6574:                     attemptBreakStone(stoneId);
6575:                 }, 650);
6576:             }, { passive: false });
6577:

6579:                 clearTimeout(stoneLongPressTimer);
6580:                 stoneLongPressTimer = null;
6581:             });
6582: 
6583:             stoneGroup.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
6584:                 e.stopPropagation();
6585:                 e.preventDefault();
6586:                 attemptBreakStone(stoneId);
6587:             });
6588: 
6589:             viewport.appendChild(stoneGroup);
6590:
