6592:                 id: stoneId,
6593:                 x: x,
6594:                 y: y,
6595:                 type: stoneType,
6596:                 element: stoneGroup
6597:             });
6598: 
6599:             updateTileClasses();
6600:             processStoneInteractions(x, y, stoneType);
6601:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
6602:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
6603:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
6604:         }
6605: 
6606:         function updateAllWaterStoneVisuals() {
6607:             // Update all water stones to show what they're mimicking
6608:             placedStones.forEach(stone => {
6609:                 if (stone.type === 'water') {
6610:                     updateWaterStoneVisual(stone);
6611:                 }
6612:             });
6613:         }
6614: 
6615:         function updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals() {
6616:             // Update all stones to show if they're nullified by void
6617:             placedStones.forEach(stone => {
6618:                 // Remove any existing nullification indicator
6619:                 const existingNullIndicator = stone.element.querySelector('.void-nullification-indicator');
6620:                 if (existingNullIndicator) {
6621:                     existingNullIndicator.remove();
6622:                 }
6623: 
6624:                 // Check if this stone is nullified by adjacent void
6625:                 // (Only fire, wind, and earth have abilities that can be nullified)
6626:                 if (stone.type === 'fire' || stone.type === 'wind' || stone.type === 'earth') {
6627:                     const hasVoid = hasAdjacentStoneType(stone.x, stone.y, 'void');
6628:                     if (hasVoid) {
6629:                         // Add nullification indicator (X or crossed-out effect)
6630:                         const nullIndicator = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
6631:                         nullIndicator.setAttribute('cx', 0);
6632:                         nullIndicator.setAttribute('cy', 0);
6633:                         nullIndicator.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE + 3);
6634:                         nullIndicator.setAttribute('class', 'void-nullification-indicator');
6635:                         nullIndicator.setAttribute('fill', 'none');
6636:                         nullIndicator.setAttribute('stroke', STONE_TYPES['void'].color);
6637:                         nullIndicator.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
6638:                         nullIndicator.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray', '2,2');
6639:                         nullIndicator.setAttribute('opacity', '0.6');
6640: 
6641:                         // Insert before other elements
6642:                         stone.element.insertBefore(nullIndicator, stone.element.firstChild);
6643: 
6644:                         console.log(`✨ ${stone.type} at (${stone.x.toFixed(1)}, ${stone.y.toFixed(1)}) is nullified by void`);
6645:                     }
6646:                 }
6647:             });
6648:         }
6649: 
6650:         function updateWaterStoneVisual(waterStone) {
6651:             const effectiveType = getEffectiveStoneType(waterStone);
6652:             const chainedAbility = getChainedAbility(waterStone.x, waterStone.y);
6653: 
6654:             // Remove any existing indicators
6655:             const existingIndicator = waterStone.element.querySelector('.mimicry-indicator');
6656:             if (existingIndicator) {
6657:                 existingIndicator.remove();
6658:             }
6659:             const existingChainIndicator = waterStone.element.querySelector('.chain-indicator');
6660:             if (existingChainIndicator) {
6661:                 existingChainIndicator.remove();
6662:             }
6663: 
6664:             // Determine what to show: chained ability takes precedence over mimicry
6665:             // because chaining uses wind-outranks-earth logic
6666:             const displayAbility = chainedAbility || (effectiveType !== 'water' ? effectiveType : null);
6667: 
6668:             if (displayAbility) {
6669:                 const isChained = !!chainedAbility;
6670:                 const indicator = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
6671:                 indicator.setAttribute('cx', 0);
6672:                 indicator.setAttribute('cy', 0);
6673:                 indicator.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE + 3);
6674:                 indicator.setAttribute('class', isChained ? 'chain-indicator' : 'mimicry-indicator');
6675:                 indicator.setAttribute('fill', 'none');
6676:                 indicator.setAttribute('stroke', STONE_TYPES[displayAbility].color);
6677:                 indicator.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
6678:                 indicator.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray', isChained ? '5,2' : '3,3');
6679:                 if (isChained) {
6680:                     indicator.setAttribute('opacity', '0.7');
6681:                 }
6682: 
6683:                 // Insert before other elements
6684:                 waterStone.element.insertBefore(indicator, waterStone.element.firstChild);
6685: 
6686:                 if (isChained) {
6687:                     console.log(`💧 Water at (${waterStone.x.toFixed(1)}, ${waterStone.y.toFixed(1)}) has chained ${displayAbility} ability`);
6688:                 } else {
6689:                     console.log(`💧 Water at (${waterStone.x.toFixed(1)}, ${waterStone.y.toFixed(1)}) is mimicking ${displayAbility}`);
6690:                 }
6691:             }
6692:         }
6693: 
6694:         function getNeighborStones(x, y) {
6695:             const neighbors = [];
6696:             const hexPositions = getAllHexagonPositions();
6697: 
6698:             hexPositions.forEach(pos => {
6699:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(y - pos.y, 2));
6700:                 if (dist > 5 && dist < TILE_SIZE * 2.5) {
6701:                     const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
6702:                         const stoneDist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - pos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - pos.y, 2));
6703:                         return stoneDist < 5;
6704:                     });
6705:                     if (stone) {
6706:                         neighbors.push(stone);
6707:                     }
6708:                 }
6709:             });
6710: 
6711:             return neighbors;
6712:         }
6713: 
6714:         function hasAdjacentStoneType(x, y, type) {
6715:             const neighbors = getNeighborStones(x, y);
6716:             return neighbors.some(s => s.type === type);
6717:         }
6718: 
6719:         // Stone rank for water mimicry priority (lower = higher priority)
6720:         const STONE_RANK = {
6721:             'void': 1,
6722:             'wind': 2,
6723:             'fire': 3,
6724:             'water': 4,
6725:             'earth': 5
6726:         };
6727: 
6728:         // Get the effective type of a stone (considering water mimicry)
6729:         function getEffectiveStoneType(stone) {
6730:             if (stone.type !== 'water') {
6731:                 return stone.type;
6732:             }
6733: 
6734:             // Water mimics adjacent stones
6735:             const neighbors = getNeighborStones(stone.x, stone.y);
6736:             if (neighbors.length === 0) {
6737:                 return 'water'; // No neighbors, just water
6738:             }
6739: 
6740:             // Find highest-ranked adjacent stone (lowest rank number)
6741:             let bestRank = Infinity;
6742:             let mimicType = 'water';
6743: 
6744:             neighbors.forEach(neighbor => {
6745:                 const rank = STONE_RANK[neighbor.type] || 999;
6746:                 if (rank < bestRank && neighbor.type !== 'water') {
6747:                     bestRank = rank;
6748:                     mimicType = neighbor.type;
6749:                 }
6750:             });
6751: 
6752:             return mimicType;
6753:         }
6754: 
6755:         function recheckAllStoneInteractions() {
6756:             // Re-check interactions for all fire stones on the board
6757:             // This ensures fire destroys adjacent stones when void is removed
6758:             const fireStones = placedStones.filter(s => s.type === 'fire');
6759: 
6760:             fireStones.forEach(stone => {
6761:                 const fireHasVoid = hasAdjacentStoneType(stone.x, stone.y, 'void');
6762:                 if (!fireHasVoid) {
6763:                     // Fire is not nullified, check what it should destroy
6764:                     const neighbors = getNeighborStones(stone.x, stone.y);
6765:                     const stonesToDestroy = [];
6766:                     neighbors.forEach(neighbor => {
6767:                         // Fire destroys ALL stones except void and fire
6768:                         // (Water is NOT protected - fire destroys water)
6769:                         if (neighbor.type !== 'void' && neighbor.type !== 'fire') {
6770:                             stonesToDestroy.push(neighbor.id);
6771:                         }
6772:                     });
6773: 
6774:                     // Destroy adjacent stones (using direct removal to avoid recursion)
6775:                     stonesToDestroy.forEach(targetId => {
6776:                         const target = placedStones.find(s => s.id === targetId);
6777:                         if (target) {
6778:                             target.element.remove();
6779:                             placedStones = placedStones.filter(s => s.id !== targetId);
6780:                             returnStoneToPool(target.type);
6781:                             updateStatus(`Fire destroyed ${target.type} stone!`);
6782:                         }
6783:                     });
6784:                 }
6785:             });
6786:         }
6787: 
6788:         function processStoneInteractions(x, y, type) {
6789:             const neighbors = getNeighborStones(x, y);
6790: 
6791:             // Special case: water stone placed with both fire and a higher-priority stone
6792:             // Water mimics the higher-priority stone, then gets destroyed by fire
6793:             if (type === 'water') {
6794:                 const hasActiveFire = neighbors.some(n => n.type === 'fire' && !hasAdjacentStoneType(n.x, n.y, 'void'));
6795:                 if (hasActiveFire) {
6796:                     // Check what the water would mimic
6797:                     const effectiveType = getEffectiveStoneType({ x, y, type: 'water' });
6798:                     // If water is mimicking something other than water or fire, it gets destroyed
6799:                     if (effectiveType !== 'water' && effectiveType !== 'fire') {
6800:                         const stoneToRemove = placedStones.find(s => s.x === x && s.y === y);
6801:                         if (stoneToRemove) {
6802:                             setTimeout(() => {
6803:                                 removeStone(stoneToRemove.id);
6804:                                 updateStatus(`Water mimicked ${effectiveType}, then was destroyed by fire!`);
6805:                             }, 100);
6806:                         }
6807:                         return; // Stop processing other interactions
6808:                     }
6809:                 }
6810:             }
6811: 
6812:             // Fire destroys adjacent non-void, non-fire stones
6813:             // But only if fire itself is not nullified by an adjacent void
6814:             if (type === 'fire') {
6815:                 const fireHasVoid = hasAdjacentStoneType(x, y, 'void');
6816: 
6817:                 if (!fireHasVoid) {
6818:                     const stonesToDestroy = [];
6819:                     neighbors.forEach(neighbor => {
6820:                         // Don't destroy void or fire
6821:                         // Fire destroys ALL other stones, even if they're voided
6822:                         if (neighbor.type !== 'void' && neighbor.type !== 'fire') {
6823:                             stonesToDestroy.push(neighbor);
6824:                         }
6825:                     });
6826: 
6827:                     // Destroy all adjacent stones (voided or not)
6828:                     stonesToDestroy.forEach(stone => {
6829:                         removeStone(stone.id);
6830:                         updateStatus(`Fire destroyed ${stone.type} stone!`);
6831:                     });
6832:                 }
6833:             }
6834: 
6835:             // Fire also checks incoming threats
6836:             neighbors.forEach(neighbor => {
6837:                 if (neighbor.type === 'fire' && type !== 'void' && type !== 'fire') {
6838:                     const hasVoid = hasAdjacentStoneType(neighbor.x, neighbor.y, 'void');
6839:                     if (!hasVoid) {
6840:                         const stoneToRemove = placedStones.find(s => s.x === x && s.y === y);
6841:                         if (stoneToRemove) {
6842:                             removeStone(stoneToRemove.id);
6843:                             updateStatus(`Fire destroyed ${type} stone!`);
6844:                         }
6845:                     }
6846:                 }
6847:             });
6848:         }
6849: 
6850:         function removeStone(stoneId) {
6851:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
6852:             if (stone) {
6853:                 stone.element.remove();
6854:                 placedStones = placedStones.filter(s => s.id !== stoneId);
6855:                 returnStoneToPool(stone.type);
6856:                 updateTileClasses();
6857: 
6858:                 // Re-check all fire stones to see if they should activate
6859:                 recheckAllStoneInteractions();
6860: 
6861:                 // Update all water stone visuals since chaining may have changed
6862:                 updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
6863: 
6864:                 // Update void nullification indicators
6865:                 updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
6866:             }
6867:         }
6868: 
6869:         
6870:         function isHexOccupiedByOtherPlayer(x, y) {
6871:             if (!Array.isArray(playerPositions) || typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'number') return false;
6872:             return playerPositions.some((p, idx) => {
6873:                 if (!p) return false;
6874:                 if (idx === activePlayerIndex) return false; // ignore self
6875:                 const dist = Math.hypot(p.x - x, p.y - y);
6876:                 return dist < 5; // same positional threshold used elsewhere
6877:             });
6878:         }
6879: 
6880:         function canPlayerMoveToHex(x, y, logBlocked = false) {
6881:             // Block movement onto hexes occupied by other players (prevents moving "through" players as pathing is step-wise)
6882:             if (isHexOccupiedByOtherPlayer(x, y)) {
6883:                 if (logBlocked) console.log(`❌ Cannot move to (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}): occupied by another player`);
6884:                 return { canMove: false, cost: Infinity };
6885:             }
6886: 
6887:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => {
6888:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - y, 2));
6889:                 return dist < 5;
6890:             });
6891: 
6892:             if (!stone) return { canMove: true, cost: 1 };
6893: 
6894:             // Mudslide buff: earth and water stones act as wind stones (free movement)
6895:             const mudslideBuff = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.mudslide;
6896:             if (mudslideBuff && mudslideBuff.playerIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
6897:                 if (stone.type === 'earth' || stone.type === 'water') {
6898:                     // Treat as wind stone — free movement, unless nullified by void
6899:                     const hasVoid = hasAdjacentStoneType(x, y, 'void');
6900:                     if (hasVoid) return { canMove: true, cost: 1 };
6901:                     console.log(`🌊 Mudslide: ${stone.type} stone at (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}) acts as wind (free movement)`);
6902:                     return { canMove: true, cost: 0 };
6903:                 }
6904:             }
6905: 
6906:             // Handle water stones with chaining
6907:             if (stone.type === 'water') {
6908:                 const chainedAbility = getChainedAbility(x, y);
6909:                 console.log(`💧 Water at (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}) has chained ability: ${chainedAbility || 'none'}`);
6910: 
6911:                 if (chainedAbility === 'wind') {
6912:                     // Wind chains through water - free movement
6913:                     console.log(`✓ Wind chaining active - water becomes free movement`);
6914:                     return { canMove: true, cost: 0 };
6915:                 } else if (chainedAbility === 'earth') {
6916:                     // Earth chains through water - blocks movement
6917:                     console.log(`✓ Earth chaining active - water blocks movement`);
6918:                     if (logBlocked) console.log(`❌ Cannot move to (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}): Water has chained Earth ability (blocks movement)`);
6919:                     return { canMove: false, cost: Infinity };
6920:                 }
6921: 
6922:                 // No chaining effects, normal water cost
6923:                 console.log(`💧 No chaining - normal water cost (2 AP)`);
6924:                 return { canMove: true, cost: 2 };
6925:             }
6926: 
6927:             // Handle non-water stones based on their ACTUAL type, not mimicry
6928:             // (Mimicry is visual only, doesn't affect movement)
6929: 
6930:             // Earth blocks movement (unless nullified by void)
6931:             if (stone.type === 'earth') {
6932:                 const hasVoid = hasAdjacentStoneType(x, y, 'void');
6933:                 if (hasVoid) return { canMove: true, cost: 1 }; // Nullified by void, reverts to baseline
6934:                 if (logBlocked) console.log(`❌ Cannot move to (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}): Earth stone blocks movement (needs adjacent Void to nullify)`);
6935:                 return { canMove: false, cost: Infinity };
6936:             }
6937: 
6938:             // Wind is free (0 cost) - ability overrides baseline
6939:             if (stone.type === 'wind') {
6940:                 const hasVoid = hasAdjacentStoneType(x, y, 'void');
6941:                 if (hasVoid) return { canMove: true, cost: 1 }; // Nullified by void, reverts to baseline
6942:                 return { canMove: true, cost: 0 }; // Wind ability: free movement
6943:             }
6944: 
6945:             // All other stones (void, fire, etc.) cost 1 AP (baseline)
6946:             return { canMove: true, cost: 1 };
6947:         }
6948: 
6949:         function startStoneDrag(stoneId, e) {
6950:             // Check if it's this player's turn and no pending cascade
6951:             if (!canTakeAction()) {
6952:                 notYourTurn();
6953:                 return;
6954:             }
6955: 
6956:             const stone = placedStones.find(s => s.id === stoneId);
6957:             if (!stone) {
6958:                 console.log('❌ Stone not found for dragging');
6959:                 return;
6960:             }
6961: 
6962:             // Check if stone is adjacent to player
6963:             if (!playerPosition) {
6964:                 updateStatus('❌ No player on board!');
6965:                 return;
6966:             }
6967: 
6968:             if (!isAdjacentToPlayer(stone.x, stone.y)) {
6969:                 updateStatus('❌ Can only move stones adjacent to player!');
6970:                 console.log(`❌ Cannot drag stone id=${stoneId}: not adjacent to player`);
6971:                 return;
6972:             }
6973: 
6974:             console.log(`✅ Starting drag for stone id=${stoneId}, type=${stone.type} (adjacent to player)`);
6975: 
6976:             isDraggingStone = true;
6977:             draggedStoneId = stoneId;
6978:             draggedStoneType = stone.type;
6979:             draggedStoneOriginalPos = { x: stone.x, y: stone.y };
6980:             stone.element.remove();
6981:             placedStones = placedStones.filter(s => s.id !== stoneId);
6982:             updateTileClasses();
6983: 
6984:             // Re-check all fire stones to see if they should activate/deactivate
6985:             recheckAllStoneInteractions();
6986: 
6987:             // Update all water stone visuals since chaining may have changed
6988:             updateAllWaterStoneVisuals();
6989: 
6990:             // Update void nullification indicators
6991:             updateAllVoidNullificationVisuals();
6992: 
6993:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
6994:             const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
6995:             const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
6996:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
6997: 
6998:             ghostStone = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
6999:             ghostStone.setAttribute('class', 'stone stone-ghost');
7000:             ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
7001: 
7002:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
7003:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
7004:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
7005:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
7006:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
7007:             circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[draggedStoneType].color);
7008: 
7009:             const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
7010:             text.setAttribute('x', 0);
7011:             text.setAttribute('y', 0);
7012:             text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
7013:             text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
7014:             text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
7015:             text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
7016:             text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
7017:             text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[draggedStoneType].symbol;
7018: 
7019:             ghostStone.appendChild(circle);
7020:             ghostStone.appendChild(text);
7021:             viewport.appendChild(ghostStone);
7022:         }
7023: 
7024:         function updateStoneCount(type) {
7025:             // Update old UI
7026:             const oldEl = document.getElementById(type + '-count');
7027:             if (oldEl) oldEl.textContent = stoneCounts[type] + '/' + stoneCapacity[type];
7028:             updateSourceCount(type);
7029: 
7030:             // Update new UI
7031:             const newCountEl = document.getElementById('new-' + type + '-count');
7032:             if (newCountEl) newCountEl.textContent = stoneCounts[type] + '/' + stoneCapacity[type];
7033:             const newSourceEl = document.getElementById('new-' + type + '-source');
7034:             if (newSourceEl) newSourceEl.textContent = sourcePool[type] + '/' + (sourcePoolCapacity[type] ?? 25);
7035: 
7036:             // Update void AP whenever void stones change
7037:             if (type === 'void') {
7038:                 // If Transmute is open, suppress void AP auto-sync for that player
7039:                 const displayIndex = (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && myPlayerIndex !== null)
7040:                     ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
7041:                 const suppress = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.suppressVoidAPSync;
7042:                 if (suppress && suppress.playerIndex === displayIndex) {
7043:                     console.log(`💨 Void stones changed to ${playerPool.void}, suppressing void AP sync`);
7044:                 } else {
7045:                     console.log(`💨 Void stones changed to ${playerPool.void}, updating void AP to match`);
7046:                     updateVoidAP();
7047:                 }
7048:             }
7049:         }
7050: 
7051:         // Expose updateStoneCount for scroll effects system
7052:         window.updateStoneCount = updateStoneCount;
</file>

<file path="js/game-ui.js">

   5:         function initializeNewUI() {
   6:             console.log('🎨 Initializing new UI...');
   7: 
   8:             // Setup panel toggle buttons
   9:             const toggleLeftBtn = document.getElementById('toggle-left-panel');
  10:             const toggleRightBtn = document.getElementById('toggle-right-panel');
  11:             const gameLayout = document.getElementById('game-layout');
  12: 
  13:             if (toggleLeftBtn) {
  14:                 toggleLeftBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  15:                     gameLayout.classList.toggle('left-collapsed');
  16:                     toggleLeftBtn.textContent = gameLayout.classList.contains('left-collapsed') ? '\u25B6' : '\u25C0';
  17:                 });
  18:                 toggleLeftBtn.textContent = gameLayout.classList.contains('left-collapsed') ? '\u25B6' : '\u25C0';
  19:             }
  20: 
  21:             if (toggleRightBtn) {
  22:                 toggleRightBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  23:                     gameLayout.classList.toggle('right-collapsed');
  24:                     toggleRightBtn.textContent = gameLayout.classList.contains('right-collapsed') ? '\u25C0' : '\u25B6';
  25:                 });
  26:                 toggleRightBtn.textContent = gameLayout.classList.contains('right-collapsed') ? '\u25C0' : '\u25B6';
  27:             }
  28: 
  29:             // Setup stone card drag handlers for new UI
  30:             const stoneCards = document.querySelectorAll('.stone-card');
  31:             stoneCards.forEach(card => {
  32:                 const element = card.dataset.element;
  33:                 if (element) {
  34:                     setupStoneDragFromCard(card, element);
  35:                 }
  36:             });
  37: 
  38:             // Setup scroll deck UI
  39:             initializeScrollDeckUI();
  40: 
  41:             // Common area popout: expanded = show stone patterns, minimized = names only
  42:             let commonAreaExpanded = false;
  43:             const toggleCommonAreaBtn = document.getElementById('toggle-common-area');
  44:             const commonAreaContainer = document.getElementById('common-area-container');
  45:             if (toggleCommonAreaBtn && commonAreaContainer) {
  46:                 function setCommonAreaToggleLabel() {
  47:                     toggleCommonAreaBtn.textContent = commonAreaExpanded ? '\u25C0' : '\u25B6';
  48:                     toggleCommonAreaBtn.title = commonAreaExpanded ? 'Minimize common area (hide patterns)' : 'Expand common area (show stone patterns)';
  49:                     commonAreaContainer.classList.toggle('common-area-expanded', commonAreaExpanded);
  50:                     commonAreaContainer.dataset.expanded = commonAreaExpanded ? 'true' : 'false';
  51:                 }
  52:                 toggleCommonAreaBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  53:                     commonAreaExpanded = !commonAreaExpanded;
  54:                     setCommonAreaToggleLabel();
  55:                     updateCommonAreaUI();
  56:                 });
  57:                 setCommonAreaToggleLabel();
  58:             }
  59: 
  60:             // Opponent active scrolls: show/hide stone patterns (same idea as common area popout)
  61:             let opponentPatternsExpanded = false;
  62:             const toggleOpponentPatternsBtn = document.getElementById('toggle-opponent-patterns');
  63:             const rightPanel = document.getElementById('right-panel');
  64:             if (toggleOpponentPatternsBtn && rightPanel) {
  65:                 function setOpponentPatternsToggleLabel() {
  66:                     toggleOpponentPatternsBtn.textContent = opponentPatternsExpanded ? '\u25C0' : '\u25B6';
  67:                     toggleOpponentPatternsBtn.title = opponentPatternsExpanded ? 'Hide opponent scroll patterns' : 'Show opponent active scroll patterns';
  68:                     rightPanel.dataset.opponentPatternsExpanded = opponentPatternsExpanded ? 'true' : 'false';
  69:                 }
  70:                 toggleOpponentPatternsBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
  71:                     opponentPatternsExpanded = !opponentPatternsExpanded;
  72:                     setOpponentPatternsToggleLabel();
  73:                     updateOpponentPanel();
  74:                 });
  75:                 setOpponentPatternsToggleLabel();
  76:             }
  77: 
  78:             // Initial HUD update
  79:             updateHUD();
  80:         }
  81: 
  82:         // Initialize scroll deck UI with right-click handlers
  83:         function initializeScrollDeckUI() {
  84:             const deckCards = document.querySelectorAll('.scroll-deck-card');
  85:             deckCards.forEach(card => {
  86:                 const element = card.dataset.element;
  87:                 if (element) {
  88:                     // Right-click to browse deck (gated by console flag)
  89:                     card.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
  90:                         e.preventDefault();
  91:                         if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.SHOW_SCROLL_DECK_BROWSER) {
  92:                             showScrollDeckBrowser(element);
  93:                         } else {
  94:                             updateStatus('Scroll deck browser is disabled. Use showScrollDeckBrowserUI() to enable.');
  95:                         }
  96:                     });
  97: 
  98:                     // Left-click also opens browser for convenience (gated)
  99:                     card.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
 100:                         if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.SHOW_SCROLL_DECK_BROWSER) {
 101:                             showScrollDeckBrowser(element);
 102:                         } else {
 103:                             updateStatus('Scroll deck browser is disabled. Use showScrollDeckBrowserUI() to enable.');
 104:                         }
 105:                     });
 106:                 }
 107:             });
 108: 
 109:             // Update deck counts initially
 110:             updateScrollDeckUI();
 111:         }
 112: 
 113:         // Update scroll deck UI to show current deck counts and common area
 114:         function updateScrollDeckUI() {
 115:             if (!spellSystem) return;
 116: 
 117:             const elements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'];
 118:             elements.forEach(element => {
 119:                 const countEl = document.getElementById(`${element}-deck-count`);
 120:                 const cardEl = document.getElementById(`${element}-scroll-deck`);
 121:                 if (countEl && spellSystem.scrollDecks) {
 122:                     const count = spellSystem.scrollDecks[element]?.length || 0;
 123:                     countEl.textContent = count;
 124: 
 125:                     // Add empty class if deck is empty
 126:                     if (cardEl) {
 127:                         cardEl.classList.toggle('empty', count === 0);
 128:                     }
 129:                 }
 130:             });
 131: 
 132:             // Update common area display
 133:             updateCommonAreaUI();
 134:         }
 135: 
 136:         // Update common area UI
 137:         function updateCommonAreaUI() {
 138:             if (!spellSystem) return;
 139: 
 140:             const container = document.getElementById('common-area-container');
 141:             if (!container) return;
 142:             if (container.dataset.expanded === undefined) container.dataset.expanded = 'false';
 143: 
 144:             const commonScrolls = spellSystem.getCommonAreaScrolls();
 145: 
 146:             if (commonScrolls.length === 0) {
 147:                 container.innerHTML = '<div class="common-area-empty">No scrolls in common area</div>';
 148:                 return;
 149:             }
 150: 
 151:             container.innerHTML = '';
 152:             commonScrolls.forEach(scrollName => {
 153:                 const scrollInfo = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName] || SCROLL_DEFINITIONS?.[scrollName];
 154:                 if (!scrollInfo) return;
 155: 
 156:                 const element = spellSystem.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 157:                 const scrollEl = document.createElement('div');
 158:                 scrollEl.className = `common-area-scroll ${element}`;
 159:                 scrollEl.title = scrollInfo.description || '';
 160: 
 161:                 const nameEl = document.createElement('div');
 162:                 nameEl.className = 'common-area-scroll-name';
 163:                 nameEl.textContent = scrollInfo.name || scrollName;
 164:                 scrollEl.appendChild(nameEl);
 165: 
 166:                 // Stone formation / pattern display only when common area is expanded (popout mode)
 167:                 const isExpanded = container.dataset.expanded === 'true';
 168:                 if (isExpanded && scrollInfo.patterns && typeof spellSystem.createPatternVisual === 'function') {
 169:                     const patternVisual = spellSystem.createPatternVisual(scrollInfo, element);
 170:                     patternVisual.classList?.add?.('common-area-pattern');
 171:                     patternVisual.style.marginTop = '6px';
 172:                     patternVisual.style.padding = '8px';
 173:                     if (patternVisual.style) patternVisual.style.maxWidth = '100%';
 174:                     scrollEl.appendChild(patternVisual);
 175:                 }
 176: 
 177:                 // Click to view details or take from common area
 178:                 scrollEl.addEventListener('click', () => {
 179:                     showCommonAreaScrollDetails(scrollName, scrollInfo, element);
 180:                 });
 181: 
 182:                 container.appendChild(scrollEl);
 183:             });
 184:         }
 185: 
 186:         // Show details for a common area scroll
 187:         function showCommonAreaScrollDetails(scrollName, scrollInfo, element) {
 188:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
 189:             modal.className = 'scroll-browse-modal';
 190:             modal.innerHTML = `
 191:                 <div class="scroll-browse-content">
 192:                     <div class="scroll-browse-header">
 193:                         <h3>${scrollInfo.name || scrollName}</h3>
 194:                         <button class="scroll-browse-close">&times;</button>
 195:                     </div>
 196:                     <div style="padding: 16px;">
 197:                         <div style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 8px;">
 198:                             <strong>Element:</strong> ${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)}
 199:                         </div>
 200:                         <div style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 8px;">
 201:                             <strong>Level:</strong> ${scrollInfo.level || 'N/A'}
 202:                         </div>
 203:                         <div style="color: var(--text-primary); line-height: 1.5;">
 204:                             ${scrollInfo.description || 'No description available.'}
 205:                         </div>
 206:                         <div id="common-area-detail-pattern" style="margin-top: 12px;"></div>
 207:                     </div>
 208:                     <div class="scroll-browse-footer">
 209:                         <button class="btn-close">Close</button>
 210:                     </div>
 211:                 </div>
 212:             `;
 213: 
 214:             document.body.appendChild(modal);
 215: 
 216:             // Add stone formation / pattern display (match other scrolls)
 217:             const patternContainer = modal.querySelector('#common-area-detail-pattern');
 218:             if (patternContainer && scrollInfo.patterns && typeof spellSystem.createPatternVisual === 'function') {
 219:                 const patternVisual = spellSystem.createPatternVisual(scrollInfo, element);
 220:                 patternContainer.appendChild(patternVisual);
 221:             }
 222: 
 223:             // Close handlers
 224:             modal.querySelector('.scroll-browse-close').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
 225:             modal.querySelector('.btn-close').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
 226:             modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
 227:                 if (e.target === modal) modal.remove();
 228:             });
 229:         }
 230: 
 231:         // Show scroll deck browser modal
 232:         function showScrollDeckBrowser(element) {
 233:             if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollDecks) return;
 234: 
 235:             const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks[element];
 236:             if (!deck || deck.length === 0) {
 237:                 updateStatus(`The ${element} scroll deck is empty!`);
 238:                 return;
 239:             }
 240: 
 241:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
 242:             modal.className = 'scroll-browse-modal';
 243:             modal.innerHTML = `
 244:                 <div class="scroll-browse-content">
 245:                     <div class="scroll-browse-header">
 246:                         <h3>${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} Scroll Deck (${deck.length})</h3>
 247:                         <button class="scroll-browse-close">&times;</button>
 248:                     </div>
 249:                     <div class="scroll-browse-list" id="scroll-browse-list">
 250:                         <!-- Scrolls will be added here -->
 251:                     </div>
 252:                     <div class="scroll-browse-footer">
 253:                         <button class="btn-shuffle">Shuffle Deck</button>
 254:                         <button class="btn-close">Close</button>
 255:                     </div>
 256:                 </div>
 257:             `;
 258: 
 259:             const listEl = modal.querySelector('#scroll-browse-list');
 260: 
 261:             // Add each scroll in the deck
 262:             deck.forEach((scrollName, index) => {
 263:                 const scrollInfo = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName] || SCROLL_DEFINITIONS?.[scrollName];
 264:                 if (!scrollInfo) return;
 265: 
 266:                 const item = document.createElement('div');
 267:                 item.className = 'scroll-browse-item';
 268:                 item.innerHTML = `
 269:                     <div class="scroll-name">${scrollInfo.name || scrollName}</div>
 270:                     <div class="scroll-desc">${scrollInfo.description || 'No description'}</div>
 271:                     <div class="scroll-level">Level ${scrollInfo.level || '?'} • Position ${index + 1} in deck</div>
 272:                 `;
 273: 
 274:                 // Click to draw this scroll
 275:                 item.addEventListener('click', () => {
 276:                     drawScrollFromDeck(element, scrollName, index);
 277:                     modal.remove();
 278:                 });
 279: 
 280:                 listEl.appendChild(item);
 281:             });
 282: 
 283:             document.body.appendChild(modal);
 284: 
 285:             // Close handlers
 286:             modal.querySelector('.scroll-browse-close').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
 287:             modal.querySelector('.btn-close').addEventListener('click', () => modal.remove());
 288:             modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
 289:                 if (e.target === modal) modal.remove();
 290:             });
 291: 
 292:             // Shuffle handler
 293:             modal.querySelector('.btn-shuffle').addEventListener('click', () => {
 294:                 if (spellSystem.shuffleDeck && spellSystem.scrollDecks[element]) {
 295:                     spellSystem.shuffleDeck(spellSystem.scrollDecks[element]);
 296:                     updateStatus(`${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} scroll deck shuffled!`);
 297:                     modal.remove();
 298:                     // Reopen to show new order
 299:                     showScrollDeckBrowser(element);
 300:                 }
 301:             });
 302:         }
 303: 
 304:         // Draw a specific scroll from a deck (for testing)
 305:         function drawScrollFromDeck(element, scrollName, index) {
 306:             if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollDecks) return;
 307: 
 308:             const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks[element];
 309:             if (!deck || index >= deck.length) return;
 310: 
 311:             // Remove scroll from deck at specified index
 312:             deck.splice(index, 1);
 313: 
 314:             // Add to player's hand
 315:             const scrolls = spellSystem.getPlayerScrolls(false);
 316: 
 317:             // Check hand limit
 318:             if (scrolls.hand.size >= 4) {
 319:                 updateStatus(`❌ Your hand is full (4 scrolls max)! Discard or use a scroll first.`);
 320:                 // Put scroll back
 321:                 deck.splice(index, 0, scrollName);
 322:                 return;
 323:             }
 324: 
 325:             scrolls.hand.add(scrollName);
 326:             spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
 327:             updateScrollDeckUI();
 328:             updateHUD();
 329: 
 330:             const scrollInfo = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName] || SCROLL_DEFINITIONS?.[scrollName];
 331:             updateStatus(`Drew ${scrollInfo?.name || scrollName} from the ${element} deck!`);
 332: 
 333:             // Shuffle the deck after drawing (as requested)
 334:             if (spellSystem.shuffleDeck) {
 335:                 spellSystem.shuffleDeck(deck);
 336:                 console.log(`📜 ${element} deck shuffled after drawing`);
 337:             }
 338: 
 339:             // Broadcast so other clients update their deck/hand state
 340:             if (isMultiplayer) {
 341:                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 342:                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
 343:                     scrollName: scrollName,
 344:                     shrineType: element
 345:                 });
 346:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
 347:             }
 348:         }
 349: 
 350:         function updateHUD() {
 351:             // Guard: Don't update if game variables aren't initialized yet
 352:             try {
 353:                 if (typeof currentAP === 'undefined' || typeof voidAP === 'undefined') {
 354:                     return;
 355:                 }
 356:             } catch (e) {
 357:                 return; // Variables not ready yet
 358:             }
 359: 
 360:             // Update AP
 361:             const hudApValue = document.getElementById('hud-ap-value');
 362:             if (hudApValue) hudApValue.textContent = currentAP;
 363: 
 364:             // Update Void AP display
 365:             const hudVoidAp = document.getElementById('hud-void-ap');
 366:             if (hudVoidAp) {
 367:                 hudVoidAp.textContent = voidAP > 0 ? `+${voidAP}` : '';
 368:             }
 369: 
 370:             // Update scroll counts - only if spellSystem is fully initialized
 371:             try {
 372:                 if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem && spellSystem.handScrolls) {
 373:                     const hudHandCount = document.getElementById('hud-hand-count');
 374:                     const hudActiveCount = document.getElementById('hud-active-count');
 375:                     const hudCommonCount = document.getElementById('hud-common-count');
 376: 
 377:                     if (hudHandCount) hudHandCount.textContent = spellSystem.handScrolls.size || 0;
 378:                     if (hudActiveCount) hudActiveCount.textContent = spellSystem.activeScrolls ? spellSystem.activeScrolls.size : 0;
 379:                     if (hudCommonCount && spellSystem.getCommonAreaScrolls) hudCommonCount.textContent = spellSystem.getCommonAreaScrolls().length;
 380:                 }
 381:             } catch (e) {
 382:                 // spellSystem not ready yet
 383:             }
 384: 
 385:             // Update player name/turn indicator
 386:             try {
 387:                 const hudPlayerName = document.getElementById('hud-player-name');
 388:                 const hudPlayerDot  = document.getElementById('hud-player-dot');
 389:                 const hudPlayer     = hudPlayerName?.closest('.hud-player');
 390:                 if (hudPlayerName && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
 391:                     const isMyTurnNow = typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer
 392:                         && myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex;
 393:                     if (isMyTurnNow) {
 394:                         hudPlayerName.textContent = 'Your Turn';
 395:                     } else {
 396:                         const name = typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function'
 397:                             ? getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex)
 398:                             : `Player ${activePlayerIndex + 1}`;
 399:                         hudPlayerName.textContent = `${name}'s Turn`;
 400:                     }
 401:                     if (hudPlayer) hudPlayer.classList.toggle('your-turn', isMyTurnNow);
 402:                 }
 403: 
 404:                 // Update player dot color — must reflect the ACTIVE player, not the local player
 405:                 if (hudPlayerDot) {
 406:                     const colorMap = {
 407:                         'purple': '#9458f4',
 408:                         'yellow': '#ffce00',
 409:                         'red': '#ed1b43',
 410:                         'blue': '#5894f4',
 411:                         'green': '#69d83a'
 412:                     };
 413:                     // Prefer the active player's colour from allPlayersData
 414:                     const activePlayerData = typeof allPlayersData !== 'undefined'
 415:                         ? allPlayersData.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex)
 416:                         : null;
 417:                     const activeColorKey = activePlayerData?.color
 418:                         || (typeof playerColor !== 'undefined' ? playerColor : null);
 419:                     hudPlayerDot.style.background = (activeColorKey && colorMap[activeColorKey])
 420:                         ? colorMap[activeColorKey]
 421:                         : '#d9b08c';
 422:                 }
 423:             } catch (e) {
 424:                 // Variables not ready yet
 425:             }
 426:         }
 427: 
 428:         function setupStoneDragFromCard(card, element) {
 429:             card.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
 430:                 if (stoneCounts[element] <= 0) {
 431:                     updateStatus(`No ${element} stones available!`);
 432:                     return;
 433:                 }
 434:                 // Start dragging a new stone from the deck
 435:                 startStoneDragFromDeck(e, element);
 436:             });
 437:         }
 438: 
 439:         function startStoneDragFromDeck(e, type) {
 440:             // Check if it's this player's turn and no pending cascade
 441:             if (!canTakeAction()) {
 442:                 notYourTurn();
 443:                 return;
 444:             }
 445: 
 446:             if (stoneCounts[type] <= 0) {
 447:                 updateStatus(`No ${type} stones available!`);
 448:                 return;
 449:             }
 450: 
 451:             e.preventDefault();
 452:             isDraggingFromDeck = true;
 453:             isDraggingStone = true;
 454:             draggedStoneId = null;
 455:             draggedStoneType = type;
 456: 
 457:             // Create ghost stone at cursor position
 458:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
 459:             const coords = getEventCoords(e);
 460:             const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
 461:             const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
 462:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
 463: 
 464:             ghostStone = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
 465:             ghostStone.setAttribute('class', 'stone stone-ghost');
 466:             ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
 467: 
 468:             const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
 469:             circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
 470:             circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
 471:             circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
 472:             circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
 473:             circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
 474: 
 475:             const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
 476:             text.setAttribute('x', 0);
 477:             text.setAttribute('y', 0);
 478:             text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
 479:             text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
 480:             text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
 481:             text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
 482:             text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
 483:             text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[type].symbol;
 484: 
 485:             ghostStone.appendChild(circle);
 486:             ghostStone.appendChild(text);
 487:             viewport.appendChild(ghostStone);
 488:         }
 489: 
 490:         function updateSourceCount(type) {
 491:             document.getElementById(type + '-source').textContent = 'Source: ' + sourcePool[type] + '/' + sourcePoolCapacity[type];
 492:         }
 493: 
 494:         function returnStoneToPool(type) {
 495:             // Return a stone to the SOURCE pool (not player pool)
 496:             // This happens when stones are removed from board or destroyed
 497:             const maxStones = sourcePoolCapacity[type];
 498:             if (sourcePool[type] < maxStones) {
 499:                 sourcePool[type]++;
 500:                 updateSourceCount(type);
 501:                 console.log(`♻️ Returned ${type} stone to source pool (${sourcePool[type]}/${maxStones})`);
 502:             } else {
 503:                 console.log(`⚠️ Cannot return ${type} stone to source pool: already at maximum (${maxStones})`);
 504:             }
 505:         }
 506: 
 507:         let lastStatusMessage = null;
 508:         let _statusFlashTimer = null;
 509:         function updateStatus(msg) {
 510:             if (msg === lastStatusMessage) return;
 511:             lastStatusMessage = msg;
 512:             const el = document.getElementById('status');
 513:             if (!el) return;
 514:             el.textContent = msg;
 515:             // Brief gold flash to draw attention to new messages
 516:             el.style.color = '#d9b08c';
 517:             clearTimeout(_statusFlashTimer);
 518:             _statusFlashTimer = setTimeout(() => { el.style.color = ''; }, 1800);
 519:         }
 520: 
 521:         let endTurnPromptShown = false;
 522:         function resetEndTurnPrompt() {
 523:             endTurnPromptShown = false;
 524:         }
 525: 
 526:         window.showEndTurnPrompt = function () {
 527:             if (endTurnPromptShown) return;
 528:             const endTurnBtn = document.getElementById('end-turn');
 529:             if (!endTurnBtn || endTurnBtn.disabled) return;
 530: 
 531:             endTurnPromptShown = true;
 532: 
 533:             const existing = document.getElementById('end-turn-empty-ap-modal');
 534:             if (existing) existing.remove();
 535: 
 536:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 537:             overlay.id = 'end-turn-empty-ap-modal';
 538:             overlay.className = 'retro-dlg-overlay';
 539: 
 540:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
 541:             modal.className = 'retro-dlg-box';
 542: 
 543:             const title = document.createElement('div');
 544:             title.textContent = 'Out of AP';
 545:             title.className = 'retro-dlg-title';
 546:             modal.appendChild(title);
 547: 
 548:             const message = document.createElement('div');
 549:             message.textContent = "You're out of AP. Do you want to end your turn?";
 550:             message.className = 'retro-dlg-line';
 551:             modal.appendChild(message);
 552: 
 553:             const btnRow = document.createElement('div');
 554:             btnRow.className = 'retro-dlg-btns';
 555: 
 556:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
 557:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Keep Playing';
 558:             cancelBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn cancel';
 559:             cancelBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
 560: 
 561:             const confirmBtn = document.createElement('button');
 562:             confirmBtn.textContent = 'End Turn';
 563:             confirmBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn ok';
 564:             confirmBtn.onclick = () => { overlay.remove(); endTurnBtn.click(); };
 565: 
 566:             btnRow.appendChild(cancelBtn);
 567:             btnRow.appendChild(confirmBtn);
 568:             modal.appendChild(btnRow);
 569: 
 570:             overlay.appendChild(modal);
 571:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
 572:         };
 573: 
 574:         // Update the opponent panel with current game state
 575:         function updateOpponentPanel() {
 576:             const panel = document.getElementById('opponent-panel');
 577:             const rightPanelEl = document.getElementById('right-panel');
 578:             const cardsContainer = document.getElementById('opponent-cards');
 579:             const newCardsContainer = document.getElementById('new-opponent-cards');
 580:             if (rightPanelEl && rightPanelEl.dataset.opponentPatternsExpanded === undefined) {
 581:                 rightPanelEl.dataset.opponentPatternsExpanded = 'false';
 582:             }
 583: 
 584:             // Only show in multiplayer with more than 1 player
 585:             if (!isMultiplayer || totalPlayers <= 1) {
 586:                 if (panel) panel.classList.remove('visible');
 587:                 return;
 588:             }
 589: 
 590:             if (panel) {
 591:                 panel.classList.add('visible');
 592:             }
 593:             if (cardsContainer) cardsContainer.innerHTML = '';
 594:             if (newCardsContainer) newCardsContainer.innerHTML = '';
 595: 
 596:             // Get all players except myself
 597:             for (let i = 0; i < totalPlayers; i++) {
 598:                 if (i === myPlayerIndex) continue; // Skip myself
 599: 
 600:                 const playerData = allPlayersData.find(p => p.player_index === i);
 601:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(i);
 602:                 const playerColor = playerData ? PLAYER_COLORS[playerData.color] : '#666';
 603:                 const isActiveTurn = (i === activePlayerIndex);
 604: 
 605:                 // Get player resources
 606:                 const pool = playerPools[i] || { earth: 0, water: 0, fire: 0, wind: 0, void: 0 };
 607:                 const ap = playerAPs[i] || { currentAP: 5, voidAP: 0 };
 608:                 const scrollData = spellSystem.playerScrolls[i] || { hand: new Set(), active: new Set() };
 609: 
 610:                 const card = document.createElement('div');
 611:                 card.className = 'opponent-card' + (isActiveTurn ? ' active-turn' : '');
 612:                 card.style.borderLeftColor = playerColor;
 613: 
 614:                 // Header with name and AP
 615:                 const header = document.createElement('div');
 616:                 header.className = 'opponent-header';
 617:                 header.innerHTML = `
 618:                     <span class="opponent-name" style="color: ${playerColor};">${playerName}</span>
 619:                     <span class="opponent-ap">AP: ${ap.currentAP}${ap.voidAP > 0 ? ` +${ap.voidAP}✺` : ''}</span>
 620:                 `;
 621:                 card.appendChild(header);
 622: 
 623:                 // Stones
 624:                 const stonesDiv = document.createElement('div');
 625:                 stonesDiv.className = 'opponent-stones';
 626:                 const stoneElements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
 627:                 stoneElements.forEach(element => {
 628:                     if (pool[element] > 0) {
 629:                         const stoneSpan = document.createElement('span');
 630:                         stoneSpan.className = 'opponent-stone';
 631:                         stoneSpan.style.color = STONE_TYPES[element].color;
 632:                         stoneSpan.textContent = `${STONE_TYPES[element].symbol} ${pool[element]}`;
 633:                         stonesDiv.appendChild(stoneSpan);
 634:                     }
 635:                 });
 636:                 if (stonesDiv.children.length === 0) {
 637:                     stonesDiv.innerHTML = '<span style="color: #666; font-size: 11px;">No stones</span>';
 638:                 }
 639:                 card.appendChild(stonesDiv);
 640: 
 641:                 // Scrolls summary (hand count only - hand contents are private)
 642:                 const handSize = scrollData.hand ? scrollData.hand.size : 0;
 643:                 const activeSize = scrollData.active ? scrollData.active.size : 0;
 644: 
 645:                 const scrollsSummary = document.createElement('div');
 646:                 scrollsSummary.className = 'opponent-scrolls-summary';
 647:                 scrollsSummary.textContent = `Hand: ${handSize} scroll${handSize !== 1 ? 's' : ''} (hidden)`;
 648:                 card.appendChild(scrollsSummary);
 649: 
 650:                 // Active scrolls (visible to opponents)
 651:                 if (activeSize > 0) {
 652:                     const activeScrollsDiv = document.createElement('div');
 653:                     activeScrollsDiv.className = 'opponent-active-scrolls';
 654: 
 655:                     const activeTitle = document.createElement('div');
 656:                     activeTitle.className = 'opponent-active-scrolls-title';
 657:                     activeTitle.textContent = `Active Area (${activeSize}):`;
 658:                     activeScrollsDiv.appendChild(activeTitle);
 659: 
 660:                     scrollData.active.forEach(scrollName => {
 661:                         const pattern = spellSystem.patterns[scrollName];
 662:                         const element = spellSystem.getScrollElement(scrollName);
 663:                         const elementColor = element === 'catacomb' ? '#9b59b6' : STONE_TYPES[element]?.color || '#666';
 664:                         const elementSymbol = element === 'catacomb' ? '🔅' : STONE_TYPES[element]?.symbol || '?';
 665: 
 666:                         const scrollCard = document.createElement('div');
 667:                         scrollCard.className = 'opponent-scroll-card';
 668:                         scrollCard.innerHTML = `
 669:                             <div class="opponent-scroll-name">${pattern ? pattern.name : scrollName}</div>
 670:                             <div class="opponent-scroll-element" style="color: ${elementColor};">
 671:                                 ${elementSymbol} ${element ? element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1) : 'Unknown'}
 672:                             </div>
 673:                             <div class="opponent-scroll-pattern-wrap"></div>
 674:                         `;
 675:                         const patternWrap = scrollCard.querySelector('.opponent-scroll-pattern-wrap');
 676:                         const showPatterns = (document.getElementById('right-panel')?.dataset.opponentPatternsExpanded === 'true');
 677:                         if (showPatterns && pattern?.patterns && typeof spellSystem.createPatternVisual === 'function' && patternWrap) {
 678:                             const patternVisual = spellSystem.createPatternVisual(pattern, element);
 679:                             patternVisual.classList?.add?.('opponent-scroll-pattern');
 680:                             patternWrap.appendChild(patternVisual);
 681:                         }
 682:                         activeScrollsDiv.appendChild(scrollCard);
 683:                     });
 684: 
 685:                     card.appendChild(activeScrollsDiv);
 686:                 }
 687: 
 688:                 if (cardsContainer) cardsContainer.appendChild(card);
 689:                 // Clone card for new UI
 690:                 if (newCardsContainer) newCardsContainer.appendChild(card.cloneNode(true));
 691:             }
 692: 
 693:             // If no opponents to show
 694:             if (cardsContainer && cardsContainer.children.length === 0) {
 695:                 cardsContainer.innerHTML = '<div style="color: #666; font-size: 12px; text-align: center;">Waiting for opponents...</div>';
 696:             }
 697:             if (newCardsContainer && newCardsContainer.children.length === 0) {
 698:                 newCardsContainer.innerHTML = '<div style="color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 12px; text-align: center; padding: 20px;">Waiting for opponents...</div>';
 699:             }
 700: 
 701:             // Update HUD
 702:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
 703:         }
 704: 
 705:         function clearBoard(skipConfirm = false) {
 706:             if (!skipConfirm && !confirm('Clear all tiles and stones from the board?')) {
 707:                 return;
 708:             }
 709:             
 710:             placedTiles.forEach(tile => tile.element.remove());
 711:             placedStones.forEach(stone => stone.element.remove());
 712:             
 713:             // Clear all player pawns
 714:             playerPositions.forEach(player => {
 715:                 if (player && player.element) player.element.remove();
 716:             });
 717:             
 718:             placedTiles = [];
 719:             placedStones = [];
 720:             playerPositions = [];
 721:             activePlayerIndex = 0;
 722:             // Reset ID counters so each new game starts from 1 (prevents cross-game ID drift).
 723:             // Both clients must reset in sync — clearBoard is called from startMultiplayerGame
 724:             // before any tile/stone placement, so this is safe.
 725:             if (typeof nextTileId !== 'undefined') nextTileId = 1;
 726:             if (typeof nextStoneId !== 'undefined') nextStoneId = 1;
 727:             updateStatus('Board cleared');
 728:         }
 729: 
 730:         // Event Handlers - Tile Deck
 731:         deckTileSvg.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
 732:             if (e.button === 2) {
 733:                 e.preventDefault();
 734:                 isRotatingTile = true;
 735:                 rotateTileStartX = e.clientX;
 736:                 rotateTileStartRotation = currentRotation;
 737:                 return;
 738:             }
 739: 
 740:             isDraggingTile = true;
 741:             draggedTileId = null;
 742:             draggedTileRotation = currentRotation;
 743:             draggedTileFlipped = currentFlipped;
 744:             draggedTileShrineType = null; // Draw from deck
 745:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
 746:             const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
 747:             const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
 748:             const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
 749: 
 750:             ghostTile = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
 751:             ghostTile.setAttribute('class', 'ghost-tile');
 752:             ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
 753:             const tile = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, currentRotation, currentFlipped);
 754:             ghostTile.appendChild(tile);
 755:             viewport.appendChild(ghostTile);
 756:         });
 757: 
 758:         deckTileSvg.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => e.preventDefault());
 759: 
 760:         // Event Handlers - Stone Decks
 761:         ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(type => {
 762:             const deckElement = document.getElementById(type + '-deck');
 763: 
 764:             // Mouse handler
 765:             deckElement.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
 766:                 if (stoneCounts[type] <= 0) return;
 767: 
 768:                 isDraggingStone = true;
 769:                 draggedStoneId = null;
 770:                 draggedStoneType = type;
 771: 
 772:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
 773:                 const coords = getEventCoords(e);
 774:                 const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
 775:                 const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
 776:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
 777: 
 778:                 ghostStone = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
 779:                 ghostStone.setAttribute('class', 'stone stone-ghost');
 780:                 ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
 781: 
 782:                 const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
 783:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
 784:                 circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
 785:                 circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
 786:                 circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
 787:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
 788: 
 789:                 const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
 790:                 text.setAttribute('x', 0);
 791:                 text.setAttribute('y', 0);
 792:                 text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
 793:                 text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
 794:                 text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
 795:                 text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
 796:                 text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
 797:                 text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[type].symbol;
 798: 
 799:                 ghostStone.appendChild(circle);
 800:                 ghostStone.appendChild(text);
 801:                 viewport.appendChild(ghostStone);
 802:             });
 803: 
 804:             // Touch handler
 805:             deckElement.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
 806:                 if (stoneCounts[type] <= 0) return;
 807:                 e.preventDefault();
 808: 
 809:                 isDraggingStone = true;
 810:                 draggedStoneId = null;
 811:                 draggedStoneType = type;
 812: 
 813:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
 814:                 const coords = getEventCoords(e);
 815:                 const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
 816:                 const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
 817:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
 818: 
 819:                 ghostStone = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
 820:                 ghostStone.setAttribute('class', 'stone stone-ghost');
 821:                 ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
 822: 
 823:                 const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
 824:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
 825:                 circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
 826:                 circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
 827:                 circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
 828:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
 829: 
 830:                 const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
 831:                 text.setAttribute('x', 0);
 832:                 text.setAttribute('y', 0);
 833:                 text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
 834:                 text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
 835:                 text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
 836:                 text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
 837:                 text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
 838:                 text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[type].symbol;
 839: 
 840:                 ghostStone.appendChild(circle);
 841:                 ghostStone.appendChild(text);
 842:                 viewport.appendChild(ghostStone);
 843:             }, { passive: false });
 844:         });
 845: 
 846:         // Event Handlers - Board (throttled to animation frames)
 847:         let pendingBoardMove = false;
 848:         let lastBoardMove = null;
 849:         boardSvg.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
 850:             lastBoardMove = { clientX: e.clientX, clientY: e.clientY };
 851:             if (pendingBoardMove) return;
 852:             pendingBoardMove = true;
 853:             requestAnimationFrame(() => {
 854:                 pendingBoardMove = false;
 855:                 if (!lastBoardMove) return;
 856: 
 857:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
 858:                 const screenX = lastBoardMove.clientX - rect.left;
 859:                 const screenY = lastBoardMove.clientY - rect.top;
 860:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
 861: 
 862:                 if (isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
 863:                     const isPlayerTile = (draggedTileShrineType === 'player');
 864:                     const snapResult = findNearestSnapPoint(world.x, world.y, isPlayerTile);
 865:                     ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${snapResult.x}, ${snapResult.y})`);
 866: 
 867:                     if (snapResult.snapped) {
 868:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', snapResult.x);
 869:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', snapResult.y);
 870:                         snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
 871:                     } else {
 872:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
 873:                     }
 874:                 } else if (isDraggingStone && ghostStone) {
 875:                     const stonePos = findValidStonePosition(world.x, world.y);
 876:                     ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${stonePos.x}, ${stonePos.y})`);
 877: 
 878:                     if (stonePos.valid) {
 879:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', stonePos.x);
 880:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', stonePos.y);
 881:                         snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
 882:                     } else {
 883:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
 884:                     }
 885:                 } else if (isDraggingPlayer && ghostPlayer) {
 886:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
 887:                     const playerPos = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
 888: 
 889:                     if (tf && tf.active) {
 890:                         if (playerPos.valid) {
 891:                             ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${playerPos.x}, ${playerPos.y})`);
 892:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', playerPos.x);
 893:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', playerPos.y);
 894:                             snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
 895:                         } else {
 896:                             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
 897:                         }
 898:                         tf.hoverPos = playerPos;
 899:                         return;
 900:                     }
 901: 
 902:                     // Prevent the ghost and path preview from moving "through" other players.
 903:                     // If the nearest hex is occupied, clamp the ghost to the last valid path node.
 904:                     if (playerPos.valid && isHexOccupiedByOtherPlayer(playerPos.x, playerPos.y)) {
 905:                         const last = (playerPath && playerPath.length) ? playerPath[playerPath.length - 1] : playerPosition;
 906:                         ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${last.x}, ${last.y})`);
 907:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
 908:                         updateStatus('❌ Blocked by another player');
 909:                         return;
 910:                     }
 911: 
 912:                     ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${playerPos.x}, ${playerPos.y})`);
 913: 
 914:                     if (playerPos.valid) {
 915:                         updatePlayerPath(playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
 916: 
 917:                         const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
 918:                         const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
 919: 
 920:                         if (moveCheck.canMove && totalCost <= getTotalAP()) {
 921:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', playerPos.x);
 922:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', playerPos.y);
 923:                             snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
 924:                         } else {
 925:                             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
 926:                         }
 927: 
 928:                         // Update status with path cost
 929:                         updateStatus(`Path cost: ${totalCost} AP (${getTotalAP() - totalCost} remaining)`);
 930:                     } else {
 931:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
 932:                     }
 933:                 }
 934:             });
 935:         });
 936: 
 937:         document.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {
 938:             if (e.button === 0) leftButtonDown = false;
 939:             if (e.button === 2) rightButtonDown = false;
 940: 
 941:             if (isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
 942:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
 943:                 const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
 944:                 const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
 945:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
 946: 
 947:                 const isPlayerTile = (draggedTileShrineType === 'player');
 948:                 const snapResult = findNearestSnapPoint(world.x, world.y, isPlayerTile);
 949:                 if (snapResult.snapped) {
 950:                     if (window.shouldDebugLog ? window.shouldDebugLog('placeTile', 500) : true) {
 951:                         console.log(`📍 Placing tile: rotation=${draggedTileRotation}, flipped=${draggedTileFlipped}, shrine=${draggedTileShrineType}`);
 952:                     }
 953:                     const tileId = placeTile(snapResult.x, snapResult.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
 954:                     console.log(`   Tile placed with ID: ${tileId}`);
 955: 
 956:                     // If this was a player tile from the deck and it was successfully placed
 957:                     if (draggedTileShrineType === 'player' && draggedTileId === null && tileId !== null) {
 958:                         playerTilesAvailable--;
 959:                         const countEl = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-count') || document.getElementById('player-tile-count');
 960:                         if (countEl) countEl.textContent = playerTilesAvailable;
 961: 
 962:                         // Remove the first available player tile from the deck visually
 963:                         if (playerTileElements.length > 0) {
 964:                             const tileToRemove = playerTileElements.shift();
 965:                             tileToRemove.remove();
 966:                         }
 967: 
 968:                         // Broadcast player tile placement in multiplayer
 969:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
 970:                             broadcastGameAction('player-tile-place', {
 971:                                 x: snapResult.x,
 972:                                 y: snapResult.y,
 973:                                 playerIndex: myPlayerIndex,
 974:                                 color: playerColor,
 975:                                 cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
 976:                             });
 977:                         }
 978:                     }
 979: 
 980:                     // TELEKINESIS: track moves
 981:                     const tkState = window.telekinesisState;
 982:                     if (tkState && tkState.active && draggedTileId !== null && draggedTileOriginalPos) {
 983:                         // Broadcast in multiplayer
 984:                         if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 985:                             broadcastGameAction('telekinesis-move', {
 986:                                 tileId: draggedTileId,
 987:                                 newPos: { x: snapResult.x, y: snapResult.y },
 988:                                 oldPos: { x: draggedTileOriginalPos.x, y: draggedTileOriginalPos.y },
 989:                                 movedPlayers: []
 990:                             });
 991:                         }
 992: 
 993:                         tkState.movesLeft--;
 994:                         tkState.movedTiles.push(draggedTileId);
 995:                         console.log(`🔮 Telekinesis: ${tkState.maxMoves - tkState.movesLeft}/${tkState.maxMoves} moves`);
 996:
