 997:                         // Update Done button if present
 998:                         const doneBtn = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
 999:                         if (doneBtn) {
1000:                             const movesDone = tkState.maxMoves - tkState.movesLeft;
1001:                             doneBtn.textContent = `Done (${movesDone}/${tkState.maxMoves})`;
1002:                         }
1003: 
1004:                         updateStatus(`Telekinesis: tile moved! (${tkState.maxMoves - tkState.movesLeft}/${tkState.maxMoves})`);
1005: 
1006:                         // Refresh catacomb indicators
1007:                         if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') updateCatacombIndicators();
1008: 
1009:                         if (tkState.movesLeft <= 0) {
1010:                             // All moves used — finish telekinesis
1011:                             if (typeof window.finishTelekinesis === 'function') {
1012:                                 window.finishTelekinesis();
1013:                             }
1014:                         }
1015:                     }
1016:                 } else if (draggedTileId !== null && draggedTileOriginalPos) {
1017:                     // If this was a placed tile that couldn't be re-placed, restore it to its original position
1018:                     const tkActive = window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active;
1019:                     updateStatus(tkActive
1020:                         ? 'Invalid placement! Tiles must touch at least 2 other tiles. Tile snapped back.'
1021:                         : 'Invalid placement! Tile snapped back to original position.');
1022:                     placeTile(draggedTileOriginalPos.x, draggedTileOriginalPos.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
1023:                 } else if (isPlayerTile) {
1024:                     // Player tile couldn't be placed - show why
1025:                     updateStatus('Player tiles must touch at least 2 unrevealed tiles!');
1026:                 }
1027: 
1028:                 ghostTile.remove();
1029:                 ghostTile = null;
1030:                 isDraggingTile = false;
1031:                 draggedTileId = null;
1032:                 draggedTileOriginalPos = null;
1033:                 snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1034:             } else if (isDraggingStone && ghostStone) {
1035:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1036:                 const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
1037:                 const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
1038:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1039: 
1040:                 const stonePos = findValidStonePosition(world.x, world.y);
1041:                 if (stonePos.valid) {
1042:                     if (draggedStoneId === null) {
1043:                         placeStone(stonePos.x, stonePos.y, draggedStoneType);
1044:                         console.log(`📤 Placing stone from deck: type=${draggedStoneType}, before=${stoneCounts[draggedStoneType]}`);
1045:                         stoneCounts[draggedStoneType]--;
1046:                         console.log(`📤 After decrement: ${draggedStoneType}=${stoneCounts[draggedStoneType]}, playerPool.${draggedStoneType}=${playerPool[draggedStoneType]}`);
1047:                         updateStoneCount(draggedStoneType);
1048: 
1049:                         // Sync resources after placing stone
1050:                         syncPlayerState();
1051:                         updateStatus('Placed ' + draggedStoneType + ' stone');
1052:                     } else {
1053:                         placeMovedStone(stonePos.x, stonePos.y, draggedStoneType, draggedStoneId);
1054:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
1055:                             broadcastGameAction('stone-move', {
1056:                                 stoneId: draggedStoneId,
1057:                                 x: stonePos.x,
1058:                                 y: stonePos.y,
1059:                                 stoneType: draggedStoneType
1060:                             });
1061:                         }
1062:                         updateStatus('Moved ' + draggedStoneType + ' stone');
1063:                     }
1064:                 } else {
1065:                     if (draggedStoneId !== null) {
1066:                         // Was a placed stone, couldn't place back
1067:                         if (draggedStoneOriginalPos) {
1068:                             placeMovedStone(draggedStoneOriginalPos.x, draggedStoneOriginalPos.y, draggedStoneType, draggedStoneId);
1069:                             updateStatus('Invalid placement! Stone returned to original spot.');
1070:                         } else {
1071:                             returnStoneToPool(draggedStoneType);
1072:                         }
1073:                     }
1074:                 }
1075: 
1076:                 ghostStone.remove();
1077:                 ghostStone = null;
1078:                 isDraggingStone = false;
1079:                 draggedStoneId = null;
1080:                 draggedStoneType = null;
1081:                 draggedStoneOriginalPos = null;
1082:                 snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1083:             } else if (isDraggingPlayer && ghostPlayer) {
1084:                 const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
1085:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1086:                 const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
1087:                 const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
1088:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1089: 
1090:                 const playerPos = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1091:                 const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
1092:                 const startPos = playerPath[0];
1093: 
1094:                 if (tf && tf.active) {
1095:                     const targetIndex = tf.targetPlayerIndex;
1096:                     const destPos = playerPos && playerPos.valid ? { x: playerPos.x, y: playerPos.y } : null;
1097:                     const origin = tf.startPos || startPos;
1098: 
1099:                     const hasStone = destPos && placedStones.some(s => {
1100:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - destPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - destPos.y, 2));
1101:                         return dist < 5;
1102:                     });
1103:                     const hasPlayer = destPos && playerPositions.some((p, idx) => {
1104:                         if (!p) return false;
1105:                         if (idx === targetIndex) return false;
1106:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - destPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - destPos.y, 2));
1107:                         return dist < 5;
1108:                     });
1109: 
1110:                     if (!destPos || hasStone || hasPlayer) {
1111:                         if (hasStone) updateStatus('Take Flight: cannot teleport onto a stone.');
1112:                         else if (hasPlayer) updateStatus('Take Flight: another player is in the way.');
1113:                         else updateStatus('Take Flight: invalid destination.');
1114: 
1115:                         if (origin) {
1116:                             if (targetIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
1117:                                 placePlayer(origin.x, origin.y);
1118:                             } else if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1119:                                 movePlayerVisually(targetIndex, origin.x, origin.y, 0);
1120:                             }
1121:                         }
1122:                     } else {
1123:                         if (targetIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
1124:                             placePlayer(destPos.x, destPos.y);
1125:                         } else if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1126:                             movePlayerVisually(targetIndex, destPos.x, destPos.y, 0);
1127:                         }
1128: 
1129:                         if (tf.onComplete) {
1130:                             tf.onComplete(destPos.x, destPos.y);
1131:                         }
1132:                     }
1133: 
1134:                     ghostPlayer.remove();
1135:                     ghostPlayer = null;
1136:                     if (pathLine) {
1137:                         pathLine.remove();
1138:                         pathLine = null;
1139:                     }
1140:                     // Clean up path labels
1141:                     pathCostLabels.forEach(label => label.remove());
1142:                     pathCostLabels = [];
1143:                     playerPath = [];
1144:                     isDraggingPlayer = false;
1145:                     snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1146:                 } else if (playerPos.valid && playerPath.length > 1) {
1147: 
1148:                     const finalPos = playerPath[playerPath.length - 1];
1149:                     const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(finalPos.x, finalPos.y, true);
1150: 
1151:                     // Check if there's a stone at the final position that you CAN'T end turn on
1152:                     const stoneAtFinal = placedStones.find(s => {
1153:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - finalPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - finalPos.y, 2));
1154:                         return dist < 5;
1155:                     });
1156: 
1157:                     // Can't end turn on: earth, wind, water, fire
1158:                     // CAN end turn on: void (or empty hex)
1159:                     const cannotEndTurnHere = stoneAtFinal && stoneAtFinal.type !== 'void';
1160: 
1161:                     if (cannotEndTurnHere) {
1162:                         console.log(`❌ Movement rejected: Cannot end turn on ${stoneAtFinal.type} stone at (${finalPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${finalPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1163:                         placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1164:                         updateStatus('Cannot end movement on a ' + stoneAtFinal.type + ' stone!');
1165:                     } else if (moveCheck.canMove && totalCost <= getTotalAP()) {
1166:                         console.log(`✅ Movement successful: ${playerPath.length - 1} hexes, cost ${totalCost} AP`);
1167:                         // Store the last move for undo
1168:                         lastMove = {
1169:                             prevPos: { x: startPos.x, y: startPos.y },
1170:                             newPos: { x: finalPos.x, y: finalPos.y },
1171:                             apCost: totalCost
1172:                         };
1173:                         placePlayer(finalPos.x, finalPos.y);
1174:                         // Update Steam Vents alternation state before spending AP
1175:                         if (typeof commitSteamVentsState === 'function') commitSteamVentsState(playerPath);
1176:                         spendAP(totalCost); // Use void AP first, then regular AP
1177: 
1178:                         // Broadcast player movement to other players
1179:                         broadcastGameAction('player-move', {
1180:                             playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1181:                             x: finalPos.x,
1182:                             y: finalPos.y,
1183:                             apSpent: totalCost,
1184:                             cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
1185:                         });
1186: 
1187:                         // Check if player stepped on a hidden tile - reveal it!
1188:                         // Use the ACTUAL player position after placement
1189:                         const actualPlayerPos = { x: playerPosition.x, y: playerPosition.y };
1190:                         if (window.shouldDebugLog ? window.shouldDebugLog('playerLanded', 500) : true) {
1191:                             console.log(`📍 Player landed at (${actualPlayerPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${actualPlayerPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1192:                         }
1193:                         console.log(`   finalPos from path: (${finalPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${finalPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1194: 
1195:                         // Use getAllHexagonPositions which properly handles trapezoids
1196:                         const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
1197:                         
1198:                         // Find the hex position where the player landed
1199:                         let playerHex = null;
1200:                         let minDist = Infinity;
1201:                         allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
1202:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - actualPlayerPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - actualPlayerPos.y, 2));
1203:                             if (dist < minDist) {
1204:                                 minDist = dist;
1205:                                 playerHex = hexPos;
1206:                             }
1207:                         });
1208: 
1209:                         if (playerHex && minDist < 5 && playerHex.tiles) {
1210:                             console.log(`   Player is on hex at (${playerHex.x.toFixed(1)}, ${playerHex.y.toFixed(1)}), dist=${minDist.toFixed(2)}`);
1211:                             console.log(`   This hex is contributed to by ${playerHex.tiles.length} tile(s)`);
1212:                             
1213:                             // Find flipped tiles that contribute to this hex position
1214:                             const flippedTiles = playerHex.tiles.filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile);
1215:                             console.log(`   Flipped tiles at this hex:`, flippedTiles.map(t => ({id: t.id, x: t.x, y: t.y, flipped: t.flipped})));
1216: 
1217:                             if (flippedTiles.length > 0) {
1218:                                 // If multiple flipped tiles share this hex, choose the one whose center is closest to player
1219:                                 let tileToReveal = flippedTiles[0];
1220:                                 if (flippedTiles.length > 1) {
1221:                                     let minTileDist = Infinity;
1222:                                     flippedTiles.forEach(tile => {
1223:                                         const tileDist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - actualPlayerPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - actualPlayerPos.y, 2));
1224:                                         console.log(`     Flipped tile id=${tile.id} at (${tile.x.toFixed(1)}, ${tile.y.toFixed(1)}): dist to center=${tileDist.toFixed(1)}`);
1225:                                         if (tileDist < minTileDist) {
1226:                                             minTileDist = tileDist;
1227:                                             tileToReveal = tile;
1228:                                         }
1229:                                     });
1230:                                     console.log(`   Multiple flipped tiles - choosing closest at (${tileToReveal.x.toFixed(1)}, ${tileToReveal.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1231:                                 }
1232:                                 console.log(`✨ Revealing tile id=${tileToReveal.id} at (${tileToReveal.x.toFixed(1)}, ${tileToReveal.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1233:                                 revealTile(tileToReveal.id);
1234:                             } else {
1235:                                 console.log(`   No flipped tiles at this hex position`);
1236:                                 updateStatus(`Moved ${playerPath.length - 1} hexes (cost: ${totalCost} AP, ${getTotalAP()} AP remaining)`);
1237:                             }
1238:                         } else {
1239:                             console.log(`   ❌ Player not on any valid hex (minDist=${minDist.toFixed(2)})`);
1240:                             updateStatus(`Moved ${playerPath.length - 1} hexes (cost: ${totalCost} AP, ${getTotalAP()} AP remaining)`);
1241:                         }
1242:                     } else if (!moveCheck.canMove) {
1243:                         console.log(`❌ Movement rejected: Path blocked at (${finalPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${finalPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1244:                         placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1245:                         updateStatus('Cannot move there!');
1246:                     } else {
1247:                         console.log(`❌ Movement rejected: Insufficient AP (need ${totalCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1248:                         placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1249:                         updateStatus(`Not enough AP! (need ${totalCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1250:                     }
1251:                 } else {
1252:                     placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1253:                 }
1254: 
1255:                 ghostPlayer.remove();
1256:                 ghostPlayer = null;
1257:                 if (pathLine) {
1258:                     pathLine.remove();
1259:                     pathLine = null;
1260:                 }
1261:                 // Clean up path labels
1262:                 pathCostLabels.forEach(label => label.remove());
1263:                 pathCostLabels = [];
1264:                 playerPath = [];
1265:                 isDraggingPlayer = false;
1266:                 snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1267:             }
1268: 
1269:             if (isPanning) {
1270:                 isPanning = false;
1271:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grab';
1272:             }
1273:             if (isRotatingBoard) {
1274:                 isRotatingBoard = false;
1275:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grab';
1276:             }
1277:             if (isRotatingTile) {
1278:                 isRotatingTile = false;
1279:             }
1280:         });
1281: 
1282:         // Clean up ghost when mouse leaves the board
1283:         boardSvg.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
1284:             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1285:         });
1286: 
1287:         // Touch event support for mobile
1288:         
1289:         // Touch handlers extracted for reuse (board + document)
1290:         let touchStartWorldPos = null; // Store world position for tap-to-move
1291: 
1292:         function handleBoardTouchStart(e) {
1293:             touchStartTime = Date.now();
1294:             const coords = getEventCoords(e);
1295:             touchStartPos = { x: coords.x, y: coords.y };
1296: 
1297:             // Store world position for potential tap-to-move
1298:             if (e.touches.length === 1) {
1299:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1300:                 const screenX = coords.x - rect.left;
1301:                 const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;
1302:                 touchStartWorldPos = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1303:             }
1304: 
1305:             // Single-finger pan (only when not interacting with a tile/player/stone)
1306:             if (e.touches.length === 1 && !isDraggingTile && !isDraggingStone && !isDraggingPlayer) {
1307:                 const targetClass = e.target?.getAttribute && e.target.getAttribute('class');
1308:                 const isStone = targetClass && (targetClass.includes('stone') || e.target.closest('.stone'));
1309:                 const isPlayer = targetClass && (targetClass.includes('player') || e.target.closest('.player'));
1310:                 const isTile = e.target && (e.target.closest('.placed-tile') || e.target.closest('.tile'));
1311:                 if (!isStone && !isPlayer && !isTile) {
1312:                     e.preventDefault();
1313:                     isPanning = true;
1314:                     panStartX = coords.x;
1315:                     panStartY = coords.y;
1316:                     lastPanX = viewportX;
1317:                     lastPanY = viewportY;
1318:                     boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
1319:                 }
1320:             }
1321: 
1322: 
1323:             if (e.touches.length === 2 && !isDraggingTile && !isDraggingPlayer) {
1324:                 // Two-finger pinch zoom / pan (board)
1325:                 e.preventDefault();
1326:                 isPinching = true;
1327:                 isGestureRotating = false;
1328: 
1329:                 const dx = e.touches[1].clientX - e.touches[0].clientX;
1330:                 const dy = e.touches[1].clientY - e.touches[0].clientY;
1331:                 pinchStartDist = Math.hypot(dx, dy) || 1;
1332:                 pinchStartScale = viewportScale;
1333: 
1334:                 const midX = (e.touches[0].clientX + e.touches[1].clientX) / 2;
1335:                 const midY = (e.touches[0].clientY + e.touches[1].clientY) / 2;
1336:                 pinchStartMid = { x: midX, y: midY };
1337:                 pinchLastMid = { x: midX, y: midY };
1338:             }
1339:         
1340:         }
1341: 
1342:         function handleBoardTouchMove(e) {
1343:             e.preventDefault(); // Prevent scrolling
1344: 
1345:             if (e.touches.length === 2 && isPinching) {
1346:                 // Pinch zoom / pan board
1347:                 const dx = e.touches[1].clientX - e.touches[0].clientX;
1348:                 const dy = e.touches[1].clientY - e.touches[0].clientY;
1349:                 const dist = Math.hypot(dx, dy) || 1;
1350: 
1351:                 // Midpoint pan
1352:                 const midX = (e.touches[0].clientX + e.touches[1].clientX) / 2;
1353:                 const midY = (e.touches[0].clientY + e.touches[1].clientY) / 2;
1354:                 const midDeltaX = midX - pinchLastMid.x;
1355:                 const midDeltaY = midY - pinchLastMid.y;
1356:                 pinchLastMid = { x: midX, y: midY };
1357: 
1358:                 // Apply pan in world space
1359:                 viewportX += midDeltaX / viewportScale;
1360:                 viewportY += midDeltaY / viewportScale;
1361: 
1362:                 // Apply zoom anchored near screen midpoint (approx)
1363:                 let newScale = pinchStartScale * (dist / pinchStartDist);
1364:                 newScale = Math.max(0.25, Math.min(3.0, newScale));
1365: 
1366:                 const centerX = boardSvg.clientWidth / 2;
1367:                 const centerY = boardSvg.clientHeight / 2;
1368: 
1369:                 // Keep pinch midpoint roughly stable during zoom
1370:                 const k = (1 / viewportScale) - (1 / newScale);
1371:                 viewportX += (midX - centerX) * k;
1372:                 viewportY += (midY - centerY) * k;
1373: 
1374:                 viewportScale = newScale;
1375:                 updateViewport();
1376:                 return;
1377:             }
1378: 
1379:             else if (e.touches.length === 1) {
1380:                 // Single touch - pan or drag
1381:                 if (isPanning && !isDraggingTile && !isDraggingStone && !isDraggingPlayer) {
1382:                     const dx = e.touches[0].clientX - panStartX;
1383:                     const dy = e.touches[0].clientY - panStartY;
1384:                     const rad = -viewportRotation * Math.PI / 180;
1385:                     const cos = Math.cos(rad);
1386:                     const sin = Math.sin(rad);
1387:                     const rotatedDx = dx * cos - dy * sin;
1388:                     const rotatedDy = dx * sin + dy * cos;
1389:                     viewportX = lastPanX + rotatedDx;
1390:                     viewportY = lastPanY + rotatedDy;
1391:                     updateViewport();
1392:                     return;
1393:                 }
1394:                 // Single touch - handle drag
1395:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1396:                 const screenX = e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left;
1397:                 const screenY = e.touches[0].clientY - rect.top;
1398:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1399: 
1400:                 if (isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
1401:                     const isPlayerTile = (draggedTileShrineType === 'player');
1402:                     const snapResult = findNearestSnapPoint(world.x, world.y, isPlayerTile);
1403:                     ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${snapResult.x}, ${snapResult.y})`);
1404: 
1405:                     if (snapResult.snapped) {
1406:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', snapResult.x);
1407:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', snapResult.y);
1408:                         snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1409:                     } else {
1410:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1411:                     }
1412:                 } else if (isDraggingStone && ghostStone) {
1413:                     const stonePos = findValidStonePosition(world.x, world.y);
1414:                     ghostStone.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${stonePos.x}, ${stonePos.y})`);
1415: 
1416:                     if (stonePos.valid) {
1417:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', stonePos.x);
1418:                         snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', stonePos.y);
1419:                         snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1420:                     } else {
1421:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1422:                     }
1423:                 } else if (isDraggingPlayer && ghostPlayer) {
1424:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
1425:                     const playerPos = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1426: 
1427:                     if (tf && tf.active) {
1428:                         if (playerPos.valid) {
1429:                             ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${playerPos.x}, ${playerPos.y})`);
1430:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', playerPos.x);
1431:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', playerPos.y);
1432:                             snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1433:                         } else {
1434:                             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1435:                         }
1436:                         tf.hoverPos = playerPos;
1437:                         return;
1438:                     }
1439: 
1440:                     ghostPlayer.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${playerPos.x}, ${playerPos.y})`);
1441: 
1442:                     if (playerPos.valid) {
1443:                         updatePlayerPath(playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
1444: 
1445:                         const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
1446:                         const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
1447: 
1448:                         if (moveCheck.canMove && totalCost <= getTotalAP()) {
1449:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cx', playerPos.x);
1450:                             snapIndicator.setAttribute('cy', playerPos.y);
1451:                             snapIndicator.classList.add('active');
1452:                         } else {
1453:                             snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1454:                         }
1455: 
1456:                         updateStatus(`Path cost: ${totalCost} AP (${getTotalAP() - totalCost} remaining)`);
1457:                     } else {
1458:                         snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1459:                     }
1460:                 }
1461:             }
1462:         
1463:         }
1464: 
1465:         function handleBoardTouchEnd(e) {
1466:             const touchDuration = Date.now() - touchStartTime;
1467:             const coords = e.changedTouches[0];
1468:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1469:             const screenX = coords.clientX - rect.left;
1470:             const screenY = coords.clientY - rect.top;
1471: 
1472:             // Check if this was a tap (short touch without much movement)
1473:             const distMoved = Math.sqrt(
1474:                 Math.pow(coords.clientX - touchStartPos.x, 2) +
1475:                 Math.pow(coords.clientY - touchStartPos.y, 2)
1476:             );
1477:             const isTap = touchDuration < 300 && distMoved < 10;
1478: 
1479:             if (isPanning) {
1480:                 isPanning = false;
1481:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grab';
1482:             }
1483: 
1484:             // TAP-TO-MOVE: If tapped on a valid hex and not doing anything else, move player there
1485:             console.log(`📱 Tap-to-move check: isTap=${isTap}, isDraggingTile=${isDraggingTile}, isDraggingStone=${isDraggingStone}, isDraggingPlayer=${isDraggingPlayer}, ghostTile=${!!ghostTile}, ghostStone=${!!ghostStone}, playerPosition=${!!playerPosition}, canTakeAction=${canTakeAction()}`);
1486:             if (isTap && !isDraggingTile && !isDraggingStone && !isDraggingPlayer && !ghostTile && !ghostStone && playerPosition && canTakeAction()) {
1487:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1488:                 const targetHex = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1489:                 console.log(`📱 Tap target: world=(${world.x.toFixed(1)}, ${world.y.toFixed(1)}), targetHex valid=${targetHex.valid}`);
1490: 
1491:                 if (targetHex.valid) {
1492:                     // Check if we tapped on the player's current position (within small radius)
1493:                     const distFromPlayer = Math.sqrt(
1494:                         Math.pow(targetHex.x - playerPosition.x, 2) +
1495:                         Math.pow(targetHex.y - playerPosition.y, 2)
1496:                     );
1497: 
1498:                     if (distFromPlayer > 5) { // Not tapping on current position
1499:                         // Calculate path cost using simple distance (1 AP per hex)
1500:                         const hexDist = Math.round(distFromPlayer / 17.3); // Approximate hex distance
1501:                         const pathCost = Math.max(1, hexDist);
1502: 
1503:                         // Check if move is valid
1504:                         const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(targetHex.x, targetHex.y, true);
1505: 
1506:                         // Check for stone at destination
1507:                         const stoneAtTarget = placedStones.find(s => {
1508:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - targetHex.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - targetHex.y, 2));
1509:                             return dist < 5;
1510:                         });
1511:                         const cannotEndTurnHere = stoneAtTarget && stoneAtTarget.type !== 'void';
1512: 
1513:                         if (cannotEndTurnHere) {
1514:                             updateStatus('Cannot end movement on a ' + stoneAtTarget.type + ' stone!');
1515:                         } else if (!moveCheck.canMove) {
1516:                             updateStatus(moveCheck.reason || 'Cannot move there');
1517:                         } else if (pathCost > getTotalAP()) {
1518:                             updateStatus(`Not enough AP (need ~${pathCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1519:                         } else {
1520:                             // Calculate actual path cost by building path
1521:                             const startPos = { x: playerPosition.x, y: playerPosition.y };
1522:                             const actualCost = calculateTapMoveCost(startPos, targetHex);
1523: 
1524:                             if (actualCost > 0 && actualCost <= getTotalAP()) {
1525:                                 console.log(`📱 Tap-to-move: from (${startPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${startPos.y.toFixed(1)}) to (${targetHex.x.toFixed(1)}, ${targetHex.y.toFixed(1)}), cost=${actualCost}`);
1526: 
1527:                                 // Store for undo
1528:                                 lastMove = {
1529:                                     prevPos: { x: startPos.x, y: startPos.y },
1530:                                     newPos: { x: targetHex.x, y: targetHex.y },
1531:                                     apCost: actualCost
1532:                                 };
1533: 
1534:                                 placePlayer(targetHex.x, targetHex.y);
1535:                                 spendAP(actualCost);
1536: 
1537:                                 // Broadcast in multiplayer
1538:                                 if (isMultiplayer) {
1539:                                     broadcastGameAction('player-move', {
1540:                                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1541:                                         x: targetHex.x,
1542:                                         y: targetHex.y,
1543:                                         apSpent: actualCost
1544:                                     });
1545:                                 }
1546: 
1547:                                 // Check for hidden tile reveal
1548:                                 const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
1549:                                 let playerHex = null;
1550:                                 let minDist = Infinity;
1551:                                 allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
1552:                                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - targetHex.x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - targetHex.y, 2));
1553:                                     if (dist < minDist) {
1554:                                         minDist = dist;
1555:                                         playerHex = hexPos;
1556:                                     }
1557:                                 });
1558: 
1559:                                 if (playerHex && minDist < 5 && playerHex.tiles) {
1560:                                     const flippedTiles = playerHex.tiles.filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile);
1561:                                     flippedTiles.forEach(tileInfo => {
1562:                                         revealTile(tileInfo.id);
1563:                                     });
1564:                                 }
1565: 
1566:                                 updateStatus(`Moved (cost: ${actualCost} AP, ${getTotalAP()} AP remaining)`);
1567:                             } else if (actualCost <= 0) {
1568:                                 updateStatus('No valid path to that hex');
1569:                             } else {
1570:                                 updateStatus(`Not enough AP (need ${actualCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1571:                             }
1572:                         }
1573:                     }
1574:                 }
1575:             }
1576: 
1577:             if (isTap && isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
1578:                 // Tap to flip
1579:                 draggedTileFlipped = !draggedTileFlipped;
1580: 
1581:                 // Regenerate ghost tile with new flip state
1582:                 const oldTransform = ghostTile.getAttribute('transform');
1583:                 const translateMatch = oldTransform?.match(/translate\(([^,]+),\s*([^)]+)\)/);
1584:                 const currentX = translateMatch ? parseFloat(translateMatch[1]) : 0;
1585:                 const currentY = translateMatch ? parseFloat(translateMatch[2]) : 0;
1586: 
1587:                 viewport.removeChild(ghostTile);
1588:                 ghostTile = createTileGroup(draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType);
1589:                 ghostTile.classList.add('ghost-tile');
1590:                 ghostTile.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${currentX}, ${currentY})`);
1591:                 viewport.appendChild(ghostTile);
1592:             } else {
1593:                 // Handle drop (same logic as mouseup)
1594:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1595: 
1596:                 if (isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
1597:                     const isPlayerTile = (draggedTileShrineType === 'player');
1598:                     const snapResult = findNearestSnapPoint(world.x, world.y, isPlayerTile);
1599:                     if (snapResult.snapped) {
1600:                         console.log(`Placing tile: rotation=${draggedTileRotation}, flipped=${draggedTileFlipped}, shrine=${draggedTileShrineType}`);
1601:                         const tileId = placeTile(snapResult.x, snapResult.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
1602: 
1603:                         if (draggedTileShrineType === 'player' && draggedTileId === null && tileId !== null) {
1604:                             playerTilesAvailable--;
1605:                             const countEl = document.getElementById('new-player-tile-count') || document.getElementById('player-tile-count');
1606:                             if (countEl) countEl.textContent = playerTilesAvailable;
1607:                             if (isMobile) document.getElementById('mobile-tile-count').textContent = playerTilesAvailable;
1608: 
1609:                             if (playerTileElements.length > 0) {
1610:                                 const tileToRemove = playerTileElements.shift();
1611:                                 tileToRemove.remove();
1612:                             }
1613: 
1614:                             if (isMultiplayer) {
1615:                                 // Broadcast for other clients to place the player tile visually.
1616:                                 broadcastGameAction('player-tile-place', {
1617:                                     x: snapResult.x,
1618:                                     y: snapResult.y,
1619:                                     playerIndex: myPlayerIndex,
1620:                                     color: playerColor,
1621:                                     cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
1622:                                 });
1623:                             }
1624:                         }
1625: 
1626:                         // TELEKINESIS: track moves and move players with tiles (touch handler)
1627:                         const tkStateTouch = window.telekinesisState;
1628:                         if (tkStateTouch && tkStateTouch.active && draggedTileId !== null && draggedTileOriginalPos) {
1629:                             if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
1630:                                 broadcastGameAction('telekinesis-move', {
1631:                                     tileId: draggedTileId,
1632:                                     newPos: { x: snapResult.x, y: snapResult.y },
1633:                                     oldPos: { x: draggedTileOriginalPos.x, y: draggedTileOriginalPos.y },
1634:                                     movedPlayers: []
1635:                                 });
1636:                             }
1637:                             tkStateTouch.movesLeft--;
1638:                             tkStateTouch.movedTiles.push(draggedTileId);
1639:                             const doneBtnT = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
1640:                             if (doneBtnT) doneBtnT.textContent = `Done (${tkStateTouch.maxMoves - tkStateTouch.movesLeft}/${tkStateTouch.maxMoves})`;
1641:                             updateStatus(`Telekinesis: tile moved! (${tkStateTouch.maxMoves - tkStateTouch.movesLeft}/${tkStateTouch.maxMoves})`);
1642:                             if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') updateCatacombIndicators();
1643:                             if (tkStateTouch.movesLeft <= 0 && typeof window.finishTelekinesis === 'function') {
1644:                                 window.finishTelekinesis();
1645:                             }
1646:                         } else if (draggedTileId !== null) {
1647:                             // Moving already-placed non-player tiles is not synced in multiplayer; revert to avoid desync.
1648:                             if (isMultiplayer && draggedTileOriginalPos) {
1649:                                 updateStatus('Tiles cannot be moved in multiplayer.');
1650:                                 placeTile(draggedTileOriginalPos.x, draggedTileOriginalPos.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
1651:                             }
1652:                         }
1653:                     } else if (draggedTileOriginalPos && draggedTileId !== null) {
1654:                         const tkActiveTouch = window.telekinesisState && window.telekinesisState.active;
1655:                         updateStatus(tkActiveTouch
1656:                             ? 'Invalid placement! Tiles must touch at least 2 other tiles. Tile snapped back.'
1657:                             : 'Invalid placement! Tile snapped back to original position.');
1658:                         placeTile(draggedTileOriginalPos.x, draggedTileOriginalPos.y, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped, draggedTileShrineType, false, false, draggedTileId);
1659:                     } else if (draggedTileShrineType === 'player') {
1660:                         updateStatus('Player tiles must touch 2+ adjacent unrevealed tiles');
1661:                     }
1662: 
1663:                     viewport.removeChild(ghostTile);
1664:                     ghostTile = null;
1665:                     isDraggingTile = false;
1666:                     draggedTileId = null;
1667:                     draggedTileOriginalPos = null;
1668:                     snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1669:                 } else if (isDraggingStone && ghostStone) {
1670:                     const stonePos = findValidStonePosition(world.x, world.y);
1671:                     if (stonePos.valid) {
1672:                         const stoneId = placeStone(stonePos.x, stonePos.y, draggedStoneType);
1673: 
1674:                         if (draggedStoneId === null) {
1675:                             playerPool[draggedStoneType]--;
1676:                             updateStoneCountDisplay(draggedStoneType);
1677:                             syncPlayerState();
1678:                         }
1679: 
1680:                         if (isMultiplayer && stoneId) {
1681:                             broadcastStonePlace(stoneId, stonePos.x, stonePos.y, draggedStoneType);
1682:                         }
1683:                     } else if (draggedStoneId !== null) {
1684:                         playerPool[draggedStoneType]++;
1685:                         updateStoneCountDisplay(draggedStoneType);
1686:                         syncPlayerState();
1687:                     }
1688: 
1689:                     viewport.removeChild(ghostStone);
1690:                     ghostStone = null;
1691:                     isDraggingStone = false;
1692:                     draggedStoneId = null;
1693:                     snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1694:                 } else if (isDraggingPlayer && ghostPlayer) {
1695:                     const tf = (typeof window !== 'undefined') ? window.takeFlightState : null;
1696:                     const playerPos = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1697:                     const startPos = playerPath[0];
1698:                     let movementSuccessful = false;
1699: 
1700:                     if (tf && tf.active) {
1701:                         const targetIndex = tf.targetPlayerIndex;
1702:                         const destPos = playerPos && playerPos.valid ? { x: playerPos.x, y: playerPos.y } : null;
1703:                         const origin = tf.startPos || startPos;
1704: 
1705:                         const hasStone = destPos && placedStones.some(s => {
1706:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - destPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - destPos.y, 2));
1707:                             return dist < 5;
1708:                         });
1709:                         const hasPlayer = destPos && playerPositions.some((p, idx) => {
1710:                             if (!p) return false;
1711:                             if (idx === targetIndex) return false;
1712:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - destPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - destPos.y, 2));
1713:                             return dist < 5;
1714:                         });
1715: 
1716:                         if (!destPos || hasStone || hasPlayer) {
1717:                             if (hasStone) updateStatus('Take Flight: cannot teleport onto a stone.');
1718:                             else if (hasPlayer) updateStatus('Take Flight: another player is in the way.');
1719:                             else updateStatus('Take Flight: invalid destination.');
1720: 
1721:                             if (origin) {
1722:                                 if (targetIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
1723:                                     placePlayer(origin.x, origin.y);
1724:                                 } else if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1725:                                     movePlayerVisually(targetIndex, origin.x, origin.y, 0);
1726:                                 }
1727:                             }
1728:                         } else {
1729:                             if (targetIndex === activePlayerIndex) {
1730:                                 placePlayer(destPos.x, destPos.y);
1731:                             } else if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1732:                                 movePlayerVisually(targetIndex, destPos.x, destPos.y, 0);
1733:                             }
1734: 
1735:                             if (tf.onComplete) {
1736:                                 tf.onComplete(destPos.x, destPos.y);
1737:                             }
1738:                         }
1739:                     } else if (playerPath.length > 1 && playerPos.valid) {
1740:                         const totalCost = calculatePathCost();
1741:                         const finalPos = playerPath[playerPath.length - 1];
1742:                         const moveCheck = canPlayerMoveToHex(finalPos.x, finalPos.y, true);
1743: 
1744:                         // Check if there's a stone at the final position that you CAN'T end turn on
1745:                         const stoneAtFinal = placedStones.find(s => {
1746:                             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - finalPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - finalPos.y, 2));
1747:                             return dist < 5;
1748:                         });
1749:                         const cannotEndTurnHere = stoneAtFinal && stoneAtFinal.type !== 'void';
1750: 
1751:                         if (cannotEndTurnHere) {
1752:                             updateStatus('Cannot end movement on a ' + stoneAtFinal.type + ' stone!');
1753:                         } else if (!moveCheck.canMove) {
1754:                             updateStatus(moveCheck.reason || 'Cannot move to this position');
1755:                         } else if (totalCost > getTotalAP()) {
1756:                             updateStatus(`Not enough AP (need ${totalCost}, have ${getTotalAP()})`);
1757:                         } else {
1758:                             // Store the last move for undo
1759:                             lastMove = {
1760:                                 prevPos: { x: startPos.x, y: startPos.y },
1761:                                 newPos: { x: finalPos.x, y: finalPos.y },
1762:                                 apCost: totalCost
1763:                             };
1764:                             placePlayer(finalPos.x, finalPos.y);
1765:                             spendAP(totalCost);
1766:                             movementSuccessful = true;
1767: 
1768:                             // Broadcast player movement to other players
1769:                             if (isMultiplayer) {
1770:                                 broadcastGameAction('player-move', {
1771:                                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1772:                                     x: finalPos.x,
1773:                                     y: finalPos.y,
1774:                                     apSpent: totalCost,
1775:                                     cosmetics: window.cosmeticsSystem?.getEquippedAll() || null
1776:                                 });
1777:                             }
1778: 
1779:                             // Check if player stepped on a hidden tile - reveal it!
1780:                             const actualPlayerPos = { x: playerPosition.x, y: playerPosition.y };
1781:                             const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
1782: 
1783:                             let playerHex = null;
1784:                             let minDist = Infinity;
1785:                             allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
1786:                                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - actualPlayerPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - actualPlayerPos.y, 2));
1787:                                 if (dist < minDist) {
1788:                                     minDist = dist;
1789:                                     playerHex = hexPos;
1790:                                 }
1791:                             });
1792: 
1793:                             if (playerHex && minDist < 5 && playerHex.tiles) {
1794:                                 const flippedTiles = playerHex.tiles.filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile);
1795:                                 flippedTiles.forEach(tileInfo => {
1796:                                     revealTile(tileInfo.id);
1797:                                 });
1798:                             }
1799:                         }
1800:                     }
1801: 
1802:                     // If movement failed or was cancelled, restore player to start position
1803:                     if (!movementSuccessful && startPos) {
1804:                         placePlayer(startPos.x, startPos.y);
1805:                     }
1806: 
1807:                     if (ghostPlayer) {
1808:                         viewport.removeChild(ghostPlayer);
1809:                         ghostPlayer = null;
1810:                     }
1811:                     clearPlayerPath();
1812:                     isDraggingPlayer = false;
1813:                     snapIndicator.classList.remove('active');
1814:                 }
1815:             }
1816: 
1817:             isGestureRotating = false;
1818:             isPinching = false;
1819:             initialTouches = [];
1820:         
1821:         }
1822: 
1823: boardSvg.addEventListener('touchstart', handleBoardTouchStart, { passive: false });
1824: 
1825:         boardSvg.addEventListener('touchmove', handleBoardTouchMove, { passive: false });
1826: 
1827:         boardSvg.addEventListener('touchend', handleBoardTouchEnd, { passive: false });
1828:         // Ensure deck-origin drags keep updating even when touch target isn't the board SVG
1829:         document.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
1830:             if (isDraggingTile || isDraggingPlayer || isDraggingStone || isPanning || isPinching) {
1831:                 handleBoardTouchMove(e);
1832:             }
1833:         }, { passive: false });
1834: 
1835:         document.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
1836:             if (isDraggingTile || isDraggingPlayer || isDraggingStone || isPanning || isPinching) {
1837:                 handleBoardTouchEnd(e);
1838:             }
1839:         }, { passive: false });
1840: 
1841:         document.addEventListener('touchcancel', (e) => {
1842:             if (isDraggingTile || isDraggingPlayer || isDraggingStone || isPanning || isPinching) {
1843:                 handleBoardTouchEnd(e);
1844:             }
1845:         }, { passive: false });
1846: 
1847: 
1848:         boardSvg.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
1849:             if (window.shouldDebugLog ? window.shouldDebugLog('boardMouseDown', 300) : true) {
1850:                 console.log(`🖱️ boardSvg mousedown: button=${e.button}, shift=${e.shiftKey}, target=${e.target.tagName}`);
1851:             }
1852: 
1853:             if (e.button === 0) leftButtonDown = true;
1854:             if (e.button === 2) rightButtonDown = true;
1855: 
1856:             // Check for scroll effect selection mode (tile swap, tile flip, etc.)
1857:             if (e.button === 0 && spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects && spellSystem.scrollEffects.selectionMode) {
1858:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1859:                 const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
1860:                 const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
1861:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1862: 
1863:                 if (handleSelectionModeClick(world.x, world.y)) {
1864:                     e.preventDefault();
1865:                     e.stopPropagation();
1866:                     return; // Click was handled by selection mode
1867:                 }
1868:             }
1869: 
1870:             // SHIFT+CLICK: Debug mode - pin hex coordinates
1871:             if (e.shiftKey && e.button === 0) {
1872:                 if (window.shouldDebugLog ? window.shouldDebugLog('shiftClick', 500) : true) {
1873:                     console.log(`📍 SHIFT+CLICK DETECTED!`);
1874:                 }
1875:                 e.preventDefault();
1876:                 e.stopPropagation();
1877:                 const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
1878:                 const screenX = e.clientX - rect.left;
1879:                 const screenY = e.clientY - rect.top;
1880:                 const world = screenToWorld(screenX, screenY);
1881:                 
1882:                 if (window.shouldDebugLog ? window.shouldDebugLog('shiftClickPos', 500) : true) {
1883:                     console.log(`📍 DEBUG: Shift+Click at screen (${screenX.toFixed(1)}, ${screenY.toFixed(1)})`);
1884:                 }
1885:                 console.log(`   World coordinates: (${world.x.toFixed(1)}, ${world.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1886:                 
1887:                 // Find nearest hex position
1888:                 const hexPos = findNearestHexPosition(world.x, world.y);
1889:                 if (hexPos.valid) {
1890:                     console.log(`   Nearest hex: (${hexPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${hexPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
1891:                     
1892:                     // Find all hexagon positions to see which tiles contribute
1893:                     const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
1894:                     const matchingHex = allHexes.find(h => {
1895:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(h.x - hexPos.x, 2) + Math.pow(h.y - hexPos.y, 2));
1896:                         return dist < 5;
1897:                     });
1898:                     
1899:                     if (matchingHex && matchingHex.tiles) {
1900:                         console.log(`   This hex is contributed by ${matchingHex.tiles.length} tile(s):`);
1901:                         matchingHex.tiles.forEach((tile, i) => {
1902:                             console.log(`     [${i}] Tile at (${tile.x.toFixed(1)}, ${tile.y.toFixed(1)}): flipped=${tile.flipped}, shrine=${tile.shrineType}, id=${tile.id}`);
1903:                         });
1904:                     }
1905:                 }
1906:                 
1907:                 // Create visual debug marker
1908:                 const marker = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'g');
1909:                 marker.setAttribute('class', 'debug-marker');
1910:                 marker.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${world.x}, ${world.y})`);
1911:                 
1912:                 // Draw crosshair
1913:                 const line1 = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'line');
1914:                 line1.setAttribute('x1', '-10');
1915:                 line1.setAttribute('y1', '0');
1916:                 line1.setAttribute('x2', '10');
1917:                 line1.setAttribute('y2', '0');
1918:                 line1.setAttribute('stroke', '#ff00ff');
1919:                 line1.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
1920:                 marker.appendChild(line1);
1921:                 
1922:                 const line2 = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'line');
1923:                 line2.setAttribute('x1', '0');
1924:                 line2.setAttribute('y1', '-10');
1925:                 line2.setAttribute('x2', '0');
1926:                 line2.setAttribute('y2', '10');
1927:                 line2.setAttribute('stroke', '#ff00ff');
1928:                 line2.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
1929:                 marker.appendChild(line2);
1930:                 
1931:                 // Draw circle
1932:                 const circle = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
1933:                 circle.setAttribute('cx', '0');
1934:                 circle.setAttribute('cy', '0');
1935:                 circle.setAttribute('r', '5');
1936:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', 'none');
1937:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke', '#ff00ff');
1938:                 circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
1939:                 marker.appendChild(circle);
1940:                 
1941:                 // Add text label
1942:                 const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
1943:                 text.setAttribute('x', '12');
1944:                 text.setAttribute('y', '5');
1945:                 text.setAttribute('fill', '#ff00ff');
1946:                 text.setAttribute('font-size', '10');
1947:                 text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
1948:                 text.textContent = `(${world.x.toFixed(0)}, ${world.y.toFixed(0)})`;
1949:                 marker.appendChild(text);
1950:                 
1951:                 viewport.appendChild(marker);
1952:                 debugMarkers.push(marker);
1953:                 
1954:                 updateStatus(`DEBUG: Pinned (${world.x.toFixed(1)}, ${world.y.toFixed(1)}) - Check console for details`);
1955:                 return; // Don't start panning
1956:             }
1957: 
1958:             // Don't start panning if we're already dragging something
1959:             if (isDraggingTile || isDraggingStone || isDraggingPlayer) return;
1960: 
1961:             const targetClass = e.target.getAttribute('class');
1962:             const isStone = targetClass && (targetClass.includes('stone') || e.target.closest('.stone'));
1963:             const isPlayer = targetClass && (targetClass.includes('player') || e.target.closest('.player'));
1964: 
1965:             if (e.button === 0 && (e.target === boardSvg || e.target === viewport || e.target.tagName === 'polygon') && !isStone && !isPlayer) {
1966:                 e.preventDefault();
1967:                 isPanning = true;
1968:                 panStartX = e.clientX;
1969:                 panStartY = e.clientY;
1970:                 lastPanX = viewportX;
1971:                 lastPanY = viewportY;
1972:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
1973:             } else if (e.button === 2 && (e.target === boardSvg || e.target === viewport)) {
1974:                 e.preventDefault();
1975:                 isRotatingBoard = true;
1976:                 rotateStartX = e.clientX;
1977:                 rotateStartRotation = viewportRotation;
1978:                 boardSvg.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
1979:             }
1980:         });
1981: 
1982:         boardSvg.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => e.preventDefault());
1983: 
1984:         let pendingDocumentMove = false;
1985:         let lastDocumentMove = null;
1986:         document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
1987:             lastDocumentMove = { clientX: e.clientX, clientY: e.clientY };
1988:             if (pendingDocumentMove) return;
1989:             pendingDocumentMove = true;
1990:             requestAnimationFrame(() => {
1991:                 pendingDocumentMove = false;
1992:                 if (!lastDocumentMove) return;
1993: 
1994:                 if (isPanning) {
1995:                     const dx = lastDocumentMove.clientX - panStartX;
1996:                     const dy = lastDocumentMove.clientY - panStartY;
1997:                     const rad = -viewportRotation * Math.PI / 180;
1998:                     const cos = Math.cos(rad);
1999:                     const sin = Math.sin(rad);
2000:                     const rotatedDx = dx * cos - dy * sin;
2001:                     const rotatedDy = dx * sin + dy * cos;
2002:                     viewportX = lastPanX + rotatedDx;
2003:                     viewportY = lastPanY + rotatedDy;
2004:                     updateViewport();
2005:                 } else if (isRotatingBoard) {
2006:                     const dx = lastDocumentMove.clientX - rotateStartX;
2007:                     viewportRotation = rotateStartRotation + (dx / 100) * 90;
2008:                     updateViewport();
2009:                 } else if (isRotatingTile) {
2010:                     const dx = lastDocumentMove.clientX - rotateTileStartX;
2011:                     const steps = Math.round(dx / 60);
2012:                     currentRotation = (rotateTileStartRotation - steps + 6) % 6; // Reversed direction: subtract instead of add
2013:                     drawDeckTile();
2014:                 }
2015:             });
2016:         });
2017: 
2018:         // Debug mode: array to store debug markers
2019:         let debugMarkers = [];
2020: 
2021:         document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
2022:             console.log(`Key pressed: ${e.key}, isDraggingTile=${isDraggingTile}, ghostTile=${!!ghostTile}, shift=${e.shiftKey}`);
2023:             if (e.key === 'f' || e.key === 'F') {
2024:                 console.log(`F key detected! isDraggingTile=${isDraggingTile}, ghostTile exists=${!!ghostTile}, shift=${e.shiftKey}`);
2025:                 
2026:                 // SHIFT+F: Debug mode - show tile coordinates
2027:                 if (e.shiftKey && isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
2028:                     if (window.shouldDebugLog ? window.shouldDebugLog('tileDragged', 500) : true) {
2029:                         console.log(`📍 DEBUG: Tile being dragged`);
2030:                     }
2031:                     console.log(`   draggedTileId: ${draggedTileId}`);
2032:                     console.log(`   draggedTileShrineType: ${draggedTileShrineType}`);
2033:                     console.log(`   draggedTileFlipped: ${draggedTileFlipped}`);
2034:                     console.log(`   draggedTileRotation: ${draggedTileRotation}`);
2035:                     if (draggedTileOriginalPos) {
2036:                         console.log(`   Original position: (${draggedTileOriginalPos.x.toFixed(1)}, ${draggedTileOriginalPos.y.toFixed(1)})`);
2037:                     }
2038:                     
2039:                     // Get current ghost position
2040:                     const transform = ghostTile.getAttribute('transform');
2041:                     console.log(`   Current ghost transform: ${transform}`);
2042:                     
2043:                     updateStatus(`DEBUG: Tile ID=${draggedTileId}, shrine=${draggedTileShrineType}, flipped=${draggedTileFlipped}`);
2044:                 }
2045:                 // Normal F: Flip the tile
2046:                 else if (!e.shiftKey && isDraggingTile && ghostTile) {
2047:                     console.log(`Before flip: draggedTileFlipped=${draggedTileFlipped}`);
2048:                     // Flip the tile being dragged
2049:                     draggedTileFlipped = !draggedTileFlipped;
2050:                     console.log(`After flip: draggedTileFlipped=${draggedTileFlipped}`);
2051: 
2052:                     // Update the ghost tile visual
2053:                     ghostTile.innerHTML = '';
2054:                     const tile = createTileGroup(TILE_SIZE, draggedTileRotation, draggedTileFlipped);
2055:                     ghostTile.appendChild(tile);
2056: 
2057:                     updateStatus(`Tile ${draggedTileFlipped ? 'flipped' : 'unflipped'}`);
2058:                     console.log(`Tile visual updated`);
2059:                 } else {
2060:                     console.log(`Cannot flip - not dragging a tile or no ghost tile`);
2061:                 }
2062:             }
2063:         });
2064: 
2065:         boardSvg.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
2066:             e.preventDefault();
2067:             const rect = boardSvg.getBoundingClientRect();
2068:             const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left;
2069:             const mouseY = e.clientY - rect.top;
2070:             const worldBefore = screenToWorld(mouseX, mouseY);
2071:             const zoomFactor = e.deltaY < 0 ? 1.1 : 0.9;
2072:             viewportScale = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(10, viewportScale * zoomFactor));
2073:             const worldAfter = screenToWorld(mouseX, mouseY);
2074:             viewportX += (worldAfter.x - worldBefore.x) * viewportScale;
2075:             viewportY += (worldAfter.y - worldBefore.y) * viewportScale;
2076:             updateViewport();
2077:         });
2078: 
2079:         let isEndingTurn = false; // Double-click guard for end-turn button
2080: 
2081:         document.getElementById('end-turn').onclick = function() {
2082:             resetEndTurnPrompt();
2083:             // Prevent double-click from advancing turn twice
2084:             if (isEndingTurn) return;
2085: 
2086:             // In multiplayer, only allow ending turn if it's your turn
2087:             if (!canTakeAction()) {
2088:                 notYourTurn();
2089:                 return;
2090:             }
2091: 
2092:             // Block end-turn if the player has an unresolved scroll cascade.
2093:             // They must choose where to place the overflowing scroll before ending.
2094:             const turnPlayerIdx = isMultiplayer ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
2095:             if (spellSystem && spellSystem.hasPendingCascade(turnPlayerIdx)) {
2096:                 updateStatus('Resolve your pending scroll cascade before ending your turn!');
2097:                 spellSystem.showPendingCascadePrompt(turnPlayerIdx);
2098:                 return;
2099:             }
2100: 
2101:             isEndingTurn = true;
2102: 
2103:             // Replenish shrine stones BEFORE clearing buffs (Mine buff doubles output)
2104:             if (playerPosition) {
2105:                 const shrine = findShrineAtPosition(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y);
2106:                 if (shrine && shrine.shrineType !== 'catacomb') {
2107:                     const effectiveType = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.getEffectiveTileElement?.(shrine) ?? shrine.shrineType;
2108:                     replenishShrineStones(effectiveType);
2109:                 }
2110:             }
2111: 
2112:             // Cancel any active selection mode (tile swap/flip in progress)
2113:             if (spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
2114:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.cancelSelectionMode();
2115:                 // Clear turn-based buffs (like extended placement, global placement)
2116:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearTurnBuffs();
2117:                 // Clear turn tracking (for Reflect and Burning Motivation)
2118:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearTurnTracking();
2119:             }
2120: 
2121:             // End-of-turn overflow: if hand or active scroll count exceeds capacity, show resolve modal first
2122:             const scrolls = spellSystem.getPlayerScrolls(false);
2123:             const handOver = scrolls.hand.size > spellSystem.MAX_HAND_SIZE;
2124:             const activeOver = scrolls.active.size > spellSystem.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
2125:             if (handOver || activeOver) {
2126:                 spellSystem.showEndTurnOverflowModal(function doEndTurn() {
2127:                     lastMove = null;
2128:                     if (playerPositions.length > 1) {
2129:                         const COLOR_RANK = {
2130:                             '#9458f4': 1, '#ffce00': 2, '#ed1b43': 3, '#5894f4': 4, '#69d83a': 5
2131:                         };
2132:                         // Guard: skip null/undefined entries (e.g. sparse indices after a player disconnects)
2133:                         const sortedPlayers = playerPositions
2134:                             .map((p, idx) => ({ index: idx, color: p?.color, rank: COLOR_RANK[p?.color] || 999 }))
2135:                             .filter((_, idx) => playerPositions[idx] != null)
2136:                             .sort((a, b) => a.rank - b.rank);
2137:                         if (sortedPlayers.length === 0) {
2138:                             console.warn('⚠️ sortedPlayers is empty — cannot advance turn');
2139:                             isEndingTurn = false;
2140:                             return;
2141:                         }
2142:                         let currentSortedIndex = sortedPlayers.findIndex(p => p.index === activePlayerIndex);
2143:                         if (currentSortedIndex === -1) {
2144:                             console.warn('⚠️ activePlayerIndex', activePlayerIndex, 'not found in sortedPlayers — defaulting to first player');
2145:                             currentSortedIndex = sortedPlayers.length - 1; // will wrap to 0
2146:                         }
2147:                         const nextSortedIndex = (currentSortedIndex + 1) % sortedPlayers.length;
2148:                         activePlayerIndex = sortedPlayers[nextSortedIndex].index;
2149: 
2150:                         // Broadcast turn change FIRST in multiplayer
2151:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
2152:                             const startedAt = Date.now();
2153:                             turnStartedAtMs = startedAt;
2154:                             currentTurnNumber++;
2155:                             broadcastGameAction('turn-change', {
2156:                                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
2157:                                 turnStartedAt: startedAt,
2158:                                 turnNumber: currentTurnNumber
2159:                             });
2160:                         }
2161: 
2162:                         // Wandering River ends at the beginning of your next turn: clear when we switch TO that player
2163:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer) {
2164:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2165:                         }
2166:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearFreedomForPlayer) {
2167:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearFreedomForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2168:                         }
2169:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer) {
2170:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2171:                         }
2172:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearExcavateForPlayer) {
2173:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearExcavateForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2174:                         }
2175:                         // Reflect fires first, then Psychic fires after all reflects fully resolve.
2176:                         // Both use sequential onComplete chaining for interactive scrolls.
2177:                         const reflectResult = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processReflectPending
2178:                             ? spellSystem.scrollEffects.processReflectPending(activePlayerIndex, () => {
2179:                                 // All reflects done — now run Psychic stolen scrolls
2180:                                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processPsychicPending) {
2181:                                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.processPsychicPending(activePlayerIndex);
2182:                                 }
2183:                               })
2184:                             : null;
2185:                         // If no reflects, start Psychic immediately
2186:                         if (reflectResult === null && spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processPsychicPending) {
2187:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.processPsychicPending(activePlayerIndex);
2188:                         }
2189:                         // Excavate teleport: if this player has a pending teleport, trigger it
2190:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processExcavateTeleport) {
2191:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.processExcavateTeleport(activePlayerIndex);
2192:                         }
2193:                         // AP resets at the start of the new player's turn (only for the new active player)
2194:                         if (activePlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2195:                             currentAP = 5;
2196:                             document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
2197:                             refreshVoidAP();
2198:                             syncPlayerState();
2199:                         }
2200: 
2201:                         // Note: reflect-triggered and psychic-triggered broadcasts are both sent
2202:                         // inside processReflectPending/processPsychicPending respectively
2203:                         // (one per scroll, immediately before its interactive selection begins), so
2204:                         // remote clients receive them in order and can queue them sequentially.
2205:                         if (isMultiplayer) {
2206:                             if (Array.isArray(reflectResult) && typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') {
2207:                                 syncPlayerState();
2208:                             }
2209:                         }
2210: 
2211:                         const nextPlayerColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
2212:                         Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2213:                         spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2214:                         updateStatus(`Turn ended. Now ${nextPlayerColorName}'s turn! AP restored.`);
2215:                         console.log(`📄 Switched to player ${activePlayerIndex + 1} (${nextPlayerColorName})`);
2216:                     } else {
2217:                         // Single player: AP resets for next turn
2218:                         currentAP = 5;
2219:                         document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
2220:                         refreshVoidAP();
2221:                         updateStatus('Turn ended. AP restored.');
2222:                     }
2223:                     isEndingTurn = false;
2224:                 });
2225:                 return;
2226:             }
2227: 
2228:             // Shrine replenishment already handled above (before clearTurnBuffs, so Mine buff applies)
2229: 
2230:             lastMove = null; // Clear undo history on new turn
2231: 
2232:             // Switch to next player based on color rank
2233:             if (playerPositions.length > 1) {
2234:                 // Color rank order: void(1) -> wind(2) -> fire(3) -> water(4) -> earth(5)
2235:                 const COLOR_RANK = {
2236:                     '#9458f4': 1, // purple/void
2237:                     '#ffce00': 2, // yellow/wind
2238:                     '#ed1b43': 3, // red/fire
2239:                     '#5894f4': 4, // blue/water
2240:                     '#69d83a': 5  // green/earth
2241:                 };
2242: 
2243:                 // Sort players by rank — guard against null/undefined entries (sparse indices after disconnect)
2244:                 const sortedPlayers = playerPositions
2245:                     .map((p, idx) => ({ index: idx, color: p?.color, rank: COLOR_RANK[p?.color] || 999 }))
2246:                     .filter((_, idx) => playerPositions[idx] != null)
2247:                     .sort((a, b) => a.rank - b.rank);
2248: 
2249:                 if (sortedPlayers.length === 0) {
2250:                     console.warn('⚠️ sortedPlayers is empty — cannot advance turn (no placed player positions)');
2251:                     isEndingTurn = false;
2252:                     return;
2253:                 }
2254: 
2255:                 // Find current player in sorted list
2256:                 let currentSortedIndex = sortedPlayers.findIndex(p => p.index === activePlayerIndex);
2257:                 if (currentSortedIndex === -1) {
2258:                     console.warn('⚠️ activePlayerIndex', activePlayerIndex, 'not in sortedPlayers — defaulting to first player. Sorted:', sortedPlayers);
2259:                     currentSortedIndex = sortedPlayers.length - 1; // wraps to 0 below
2260:                 }
2261: 
2262:                 // Move to next player in sorted order (wrap around)
2263:                 const nextSortedIndex = (currentSortedIndex + 1) % sortedPlayers.length;
2264:                 activePlayerIndex = sortedPlayers[nextSortedIndex].index;
2265: 
2266:                 // Broadcast turn change FIRST in multiplayer so the receiver
2267:                 // updates activePlayerIndex before any follow-up broadcasts arrive
2268:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
2269:                     const startedAt = Date.now();
2270:                     turnStartedAtMs = startedAt;
2271:                     currentTurnNumber++;
2272:                     broadcastGameAction('turn-change', {
2273:                         playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
2274:                         turnStartedAt: startedAt,
2275:                         turnNumber: currentTurnNumber
2276:                     });
2277:                 }
2278: 
2279:                 // Wandering River ends at the beginning of your next turn
2280:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer) {
2281:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2282:                 }
2283:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearFreedomForPlayer) {
2284:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearFreedomForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2285:                 }
