2286:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer) {
2287:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2288:                 }
2289:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearExcavateForPlayer) {
2290:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearExcavateForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2291:                 }
2292:                 // Reflect fires first, then Psychic fires after all reflects fully resolve.
2293:                 const reflectResult = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processReflectPending
2294:                     ? spellSystem.scrollEffects.processReflectPending(activePlayerIndex, () => {
2295:                         // All reflects done — now run Psychic stolen scrolls
2296:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processPsychicPending) {
2297:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.processPsychicPending(activePlayerIndex);
2298:                         }
2299:                       })
2300:                     : null;
2301:                 // If no reflects, start Psychic immediately
2302:                 if (reflectResult === null && spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processPsychicPending) {
2303:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.processPsychicPending(activePlayerIndex);
2304:                 }
2305:                 // Excavate teleport: if this player has a pending teleport, trigger it
2306:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processExcavateTeleport) {
2307:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.processExcavateTeleport(activePlayerIndex);
2308:                 }
2309: 
2310:                 // AP resets at the start of the new player's turn (only for the new active player)
2311:                 if (activePlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2312:                     currentAP = 5;
2313:                     document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
2314:                     refreshVoidAP();
2315:                     syncPlayerState();
2316:                 }
2317: 
2318:                 // Note: reflect-triggered and psychic-triggered broadcasts are both handled
2319:                 // inside processReflectPending/processPsychicPending respectively
2320:                 if (isMultiplayer) {
2321:                     if (Array.isArray(reflectResult) && typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') {
2322:                         syncPlayerState();
2323:                     }
2324:                 }
2325: 
2326:                 const nextPlayerColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
2327: 
2328:                 // Update UI to show new player's inventory
2329:                 Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2330:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2331: 
2332:                 updateStatus(`Turn ended. Now ${nextPlayerColorName}'s turn! AP restored.`);
2333:                 console.log(`📄 Switched to player ${activePlayerIndex + 1} (${nextPlayerColorName})`);
2334:                 isEndingTurn = false;
2335:             } else {
2336:                 // Single player: your next turn starts now; clear buffs then restore AP
2337:                 if (spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects && spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer) {
2338:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2339:                 }
2340:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearFreedomForPlayer) {
2341:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearFreedomForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2342:                 }
2343:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer) {
2344:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2345:                 }
2346:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearExcavateForPlayer) {
2347:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearExcavateForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
2348:                 }
2349:                 // Reflect fires first, then Psychic fires after all reflects fully resolve.
2350:                 const reflectResultSingle = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processReflectPending
2351:                     ? spellSystem.scrollEffects.processReflectPending(activePlayerIndex, () => {
2352:                         if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processPsychicPending) {
2353:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.processPsychicPending(activePlayerIndex);
2354:                         }
2355:                       })
2356:                     : null;
2357:                 if (reflectResultSingle === null && spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processPsychicPending) {
2358:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.processPsychicPending(activePlayerIndex);
2359:                 }
2360:                 // Excavate teleport for single player
2361:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processExcavateTeleport) {
2362:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.processExcavateTeleport(activePlayerIndex);
2363:                 }
2364:                 // AP resets at start of new turn
2365:                 currentAP = 5;
2366:                 document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
2367:                 refreshVoidAP();
2368:                 updateStatus('Turn ended. AP restored.');
2369:                 isEndingTurn = false;
2370:             }
2371:         };

2374:         // Inventory toggle button
2375:         const invBtn = document.getElementById('inventory-toggle');
2376:         if (invBtn) invBtn.onclick = toggleInventory;
2377: document.getElementById('undo-move').onclick = function() {
2378:             if (!lastMove) {
2379:                 updateStatus('No move to undo!');
2380:                 return;
2381:             }
2382: 
2383:             // Restore previous position
2384:             placePlayer(lastMove.prevPos.x, lastMove.prevPos.y);
2385: 
2386:             // Restore AP
2387:             currentAP += lastMove.apCost;
2388:             document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
2389: 
2390:             // Refresh void AP display in case void stones changed
2391:             if (typeof refreshVoidAP === 'function') {
2392:                 refreshVoidAP();
2393:             }
2394: 
2395:             updateStatus(`Undid movement. Restored ${lastMove.apCost} AP (now ${currentAP} AP).`);
2396: 
2397:             // Broadcast undo in multiplayer
2398:             if (isMultiplayer) {
2399:                 broadcastGameAction('undo-move', {
2400:                     playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
2401:                     x: lastMove.prevPos.x,
2402:                     y: lastMove.prevPos.y,
2403:                     apRestored: lastMove.apCost
2404:                 });
2405: 
2406:                 // Sync player state so other players see updated AP
2407:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') {
2408:                     syncPlayerState();
2409:                 }
2410:             }
2411: 
2412:             // Clear the undo history (can only undo once)
2413:             lastMove = null;
2414:         };
2415: 
2416:         document.getElementById('scroll-inventory').onclick = function() {
2417:             spellSystem.showInventory();
2418:         };

2421:             if (!canTakeAction()) {
2422:                 notYourTurn();
2423:                 return;
2424:             }
2425:             spellSystem.castSpell();
2426:         };
2427: 
2428:         document.getElementById('leave-game').onclick = function() {
2429:             leaveGame();
2430:         };
2431: 
2432:         function findShrineAtPosition(x, y) {
2433:             // Check each tile to see if player is on the center hex (shrine location)
2434:             // Skip player tiles - we want the actual shrine tile
2435:             for (const tile of placedTiles) {
2436:                 // Skip player tiles (shrineType === 'player')
2437:                 if (tile.shrineType === 'player') continue;
2438: 
2439:                 const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(tile.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(tile.y - y, 2));
2440:                 // Center hex is at the tile's position (0,0 offset)
2441:                 if (dist < 5) {
2442:                     console.log(`🔍 findShrineAtPosition(${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}): Found ${tile.shrineType} shrine at tile ${tile.id}`);
2443:                     return tile;
2444:                 }
2445:             }
2446:             console.log(`🔍 findShrineAtPosition(${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)}): No shrine found`);
2447:             return null;
2448:         }
2449: 
2450:         function replenishShrineStones(shrineType) {
2451:             // Stone rank determines replenishment amount
2452:             const STONE_RANK = {
2453:                 'void': 1,
2454:                 'wind': 2,
2455:                 'fire': 3,
2456:                 'water': 4,
2457:                 'earth': 5
2458:             };
2459: 
2460:             let replenishAmount = STONE_RANK[shrineType];
2461: 
2462:             // Mine buff: double output for the buffed shrine type
2463:             const mineBuff = spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.activeBuffs?.mine;
2464:             if (mineBuff && mineBuff.playerIndex === activePlayerIndex && mineBuff.shrineType === shrineType) {
2465:                 replenishAmount *= 2;
2466:                 console.log(`⛏️ Mine: doubling ${shrineType} shrine output to ${replenishAmount}`);
2467:             }
2468: 
2469:             // Calculate how many stones we can actually transfer
2470:             // Limited by: source pool availability, player pool capacity, and replenish amount
2471:             const availableInSource = sourcePool[shrineType];
2472:             const spaceInPlayer = playerPoolCapacity[shrineType] - playerPool[shrineType];
2473:             const actualReplenished = Math.min(replenishAmount, availableInSource, spaceInPlayer);
2474: 
2475:             if (actualReplenished > 0) {
2476:                 // Transfer from source pool to player pool
2477:                 sourcePool[shrineType] -= actualReplenished;
2478:                 playerPool[shrineType] += actualReplenished;
2479:                 updateStoneCount(shrineType);
2480: 
2481:                 // Sync resources in multiplayer
2482:                 syncPlayerState();
2483: 
2484:                 updateStatus(`Shrine activated! Transferred ${actualReplenished} ${shrineType} stone${actualReplenished > 1 ? 's' : ''} from source to player pool. (Source: ${sourcePool[shrineType]}/${sourcePoolCapacity[shrineType]}, Player: ${playerPool[shrineType]}/${playerPoolCapacity[shrineType]}). AP restored.`);
2485:             } else if (spaceInPlayer === 0) {
2486:                 updateStatus(`Shrine activated but player pool is full! (${playerPool[shrineType]}/${playerPoolCapacity[shrineType]}). AP restored.`);
2487:             } else if (availableInSource === 0) {
2488:                 updateStatus(`Shrine activated but source pool is empty! (${sourcePool[shrineType]}/${sourcePoolCapacity[shrineType]}). AP restored.`);
2489:             }
2490:         }
2491: 
2492:         let activeTeleportIndicators = [];
2493: 
2494:         function updateCatacombIndicators() {
2495:             // Remove existing indicators
2496:             activeTeleportIndicators.forEach(ind => ind.remove());
2497:             activeTeleportIndicators = [];
2498: 
2499:             // Only allow teleport indicators on the active player's turn
2500:             if (typeof canTakeAction === 'function' && !canTakeAction()) return;
2501: 
2502:             // Check if player is on a catacomb shrine
2503:             if (!playerPosition) return;
2504: 
2505:             const currentShrine = findShrineAtPosition(playerPosition.x, playerPosition.y);
2506:             const freedomActive = spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects
2507:                 && typeof spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasFreedomActive === 'function'
2508:                 && spellSystem.scrollEffects.hasFreedomActive(myPlayerIndex);
2509:             const elementalTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
2510:             const isCatacombLike = (tile) => {
2511:                 if (!tile) return false;
2512:                 if (tile.shrineType === 'catacomb') return true;
2513:                 if (freedomActive && elementalTypes.includes(tile.shrineType)) return true;
2514:                 return false;
2515:             };
2516: 
2517:             if (!currentShrine || !isCatacombLike(currentShrine)) return;
2518: 
2519:             // Find all other REVEALED catacomb shrines (not flipped) WITHOUT stones on them
2520:             const otherCatacombs = placedTiles.filter(tile => {
2521:                 if (!isCatacombLike(tile)) return false;
2522:                 if (tile.flipped) return false; // Only revealed catacombs
2523:                 if (Math.abs(tile.x - currentShrine.x) <= 5 && Math.abs(tile.y - currentShrine.y) <= 5) return false; // Same catacomb
2524:                 
2525:                 // Check if there's a stone at the catacomb center
2526:                 const hasStone = placedStones.some(stone => {
2527:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - tile.y, 2));
2528:                     return dist < 5; // Stone is at the center of this catacomb
2529:                 });
2530: 
2531:                 // Check if another player is standing there
2532:                 const hasPlayer = playerPositions.some(p => {
2533:                     if (!p) return false;
2534:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - tile.y, 2));
2535:                     return dist < 5;
2536:                 });
2537:                 
2538:                 return !hasStone && !hasPlayer; // Only allow teleport to unoccupied shrines
2539:             });
2540: 
2541:             if (otherCatacombs.length === 0) {
2542:                 const message = currentShrine.shrineType === 'catacomb'
2543:                     ? '🔅 Standing on catacomb shrine, but no valid destinations! (must be revealed and have no stone on center)'
2544:                     : '🔅 Freedom active, but no valid shrine destinations! (must be revealed and have no stone on center)';
2545:                 updateStatus(message);
2546:                 return;
2547:             }
2548: 
2549:             // Create visual indicators for teleport destinations
2550:             otherCatacombs.forEach(shrine => {
2551:                 const indicator = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'circle');
2552:                 indicator.setAttribute('cx', shrine.x);
2553:                 indicator.setAttribute('cy', shrine.y);
2554:                 indicator.setAttribute('r', '15');
2555:                 indicator.setAttribute('fill', '#8b4513');
2556:                 indicator.setAttribute('opacity', '0.5');
2557:                 indicator.setAttribute('stroke', '#fff');
2558:                 indicator.setAttribute('stroke-width', '2');
2559:                 indicator.setAttribute('class', 'teleport-indicator');
2560:                 indicator.style.cursor = 'pointer';
2561:                 indicator.style.animation = 'pulse 1s infinite';
2562: 
2563:                 // Add click handler for teleportation
2564:                 indicator.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
2565:                     e.stopPropagation();
2566:                     e.preventDefault();
2567:                     if (typeof canTakeAction === 'function' && !canTakeAction()) {
2568:                         updateStatus('Not your turn.');
2569:                         return;
2570:                     }
2571: 
2572:                     // Double-check no stone was placed since indicators were created
2573:                     const hasStoneNow = placedStones.some(stone => {
2574:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - shrine.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - shrine.y, 2));
2575:                         return dist < 5;
2576:                     });
2577:                     
2578:                     if (hasStoneNow) {
2579:                         updateStatus('🔅 Cannot teleport there - a stone is blocking!');
2580:                         updateCatacombIndicators();
2581:                         return;
2582:                     }
2583: 
2584:                     // Double-check no player moved there since indicators were created
2585:                     const hasPlayerNow = playerPositions.some(p => {
2586:                         if (!p) return false;
2587:                         const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - shrine.x, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - shrine.y, 2));
2588:                         return dist < 5;
2589:                     });
2590: 
2591:                     if (hasPlayerNow) {
2592:                         updateStatus('🔅 Cannot teleport there - another player is in the way!');
2593:                         updateCatacombIndicators();
2594:                         return;
2595:                     }
2596: 
2597:                     // Teleport player (no AP cost)
2598:                     placePlayer(shrine.x, shrine.y);
2599:                     updateStatus(`🔅 Teleported to another catacomb shrine!`);
2600: 
2601:                     // Broadcast teleport so other clients stay in sync
2602:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2603:                         const playerIndex = (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null)
2604:                             ? myPlayerIndex
2605:                             : activePlayerIndex;
2606:                         broadcastGameAction('catacomb-teleport', {
2607:                             playerIndex,
2608:                             x: shrine.x,
2609:                             y: shrine.y
2610:                         });
2611:                     }
2612: 
2613:                     // Update indicators for new position
2614:                     updateCatacombIndicators();
2615:                 });
2616: 
2617:                 viewport.appendChild(indicator);
2618:                 activeTeleportIndicators.push(indicator);
2619:             });
2620: 
2621:             const prompt = currentShrine.shrineType === 'catacomb'
2622:                 ? '🔅 Standing on catacomb shrine. Click another revealed catacomb to teleport (free).'
2623:                 : '🔅 Freedom active. Click another revealed shrine to teleport (free).';
2624:             updateStatus(prompt);
2625:         }
2626: 
2627:         // Expose for scroll effects (e.g. Freedom)
2628:         window.updateCatacombIndicators = updateCatacombIndicators;
2629: 
2630:         // Generate spiral tile positions starting from center
2631:         // Based on the spiral pattern from the image: 1(center), 2(SE), 3(SW), 4(W), 5(NW), 6(NE), 7(E), then ring 2...
2632:         function generateSpiralPositions(numTiles) {
2633:             const positions = [];
2634:             const largeHexSize = TILE_SIZE * 4; // Grid size for tile snapping
2635: 
2636:             // Predefined spiral path in axial coordinates (q, r)
2637:             // 6 tiles per player (one of each shrine type)
2638:             const spiralPath = [
2639:                 { q: 0, r: 0 },    // 1 - Center
2640:                 { q: 0, r: 1 },    // 2 - SE
2641:                 { q: -1, r: 1 },   // 3 - SW
2642:                 { q: -1, r: 0 },   // 4 - W
2643:                 { q: 0, r: -1 },   // 5 - NW
2644:                 { q: 1, r: -1 },   // 6 - NE (1 player complete - 6 tiles)
2645:                 { q: 1, r: 0 },    // 7 - E
2646:                 { q: 1, r: 1 },    // 8 - SE (ring 2)
2647:                 { q: 0, r: 2 },    // 9
2648:                 { q: -1, r: 2 },   // 10
2649:                 { q: -2, r: 2 },   // 11
2650:                 { q: -2, r: 1 },   // 12 (2 players complete - 12 tiles)
2651:                 { q: -2, r: 0 },   // 13
2652:                 { q: -1, r: -1 },  // 14
2653:                 { q: 0, r: -2 },   // 15
2654:                 { q: 1, r: -2 },   // 16
2655:                 { q: 2, r: -2 },   // 17
2656:                 { q: 2, r: -1 },   // 18 (3 players complete - 18 tiles)
2657:                 { q: 2, r: 0 },    // 19
2658:                 { q: 2, r: 1 },    // 20
2659:                 { q: 1, r: 2 },    // 21 (ring 3)
2660:                 { q: 0, r: 3 },    // 22
2661:                 { q: -1, r: 3 },   // 23
2662:                 { q: -2, r: 3 },   // 24 (4 players complete - 24 tiles)
2663:                 { q: -3, r: 3 },   // 25
2664:                 { q: -3, r: 2 },   // 26
2665:                 { q: -3, r: 1 },   // 27
2666:                 { q: -3, r: 0 },   // 28
2667:                 { q: -2, r: -1 },  // 29
2668:                 { q: -1, r: -2 },  // 30 (5 players complete - 30 tiles)
2669:                 { q: 0, r: -3 },   // 31 (extra positions for future)
2670:                 { q: 1, r: -3 },   // 32
2671:                 { q: 2, r: -3 },   // 33
2672:                 { q: 3, r: -3 },   // 34
2673:                 { q: 3, r: -2 },   // 35
2674:                 { q: 3, r: -1 },   // 36
2675:             ];
2676: 
2677:             // Convert to pixel positions
2678:             for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(numTiles, spiralPath.length); i++) {
2679:                 const pos = hexToPixel(spiralPath[i].q, spiralPath[i].r, largeHexSize);
2680:                 positions.push({ x: pos.x, y: pos.y });
2681:             }
2682: 
2683:             return positions;
2684:         }
2685: 
2686:         // ─── Hidden cheat panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────
2687:         // Activate: click the "AP" label in the HUD 5 times within 3 seconds
2688:         (function initCheatPanel() {
2689:             let clickCount = 0;
2690:             let clickTimer = null;
2691: 
2692:             function openCheatPanel() {
2693:                 const existing = document.getElementById('cheat-panel');
2694:                 if (existing) { existing.remove(); return; }
2695: 
2696:                 const panel = document.createElement('div');
2697:                 panel.id = 'cheat-panel';
2698:                 Object.assign(panel.style, {
2699:                     position: 'fixed',
2700:                     bottom: '60px',
2701:                     right: '16px',
2702:                     background: '#1a1a2e',
2703:                     border: '1px solid #444',
2704:                     borderRadius: '8px',
2705:                     padding: '10px 14px',
2706:                     zIndex: '9999',
2707:                     display: 'flex',
2708:                     flexDirection: 'column',
2709:                     gap: '8px',
2710:                     boxShadow: '0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.6)',
2711:                     minWidth: '160px'
2712:                 });
2713: 
2714:                 function makeBtn(label, action) {
2715:                     const btn = document.createElement('button');
2716:                     btn.textContent = label;
2717:                     Object.assign(btn.style, {
2718:                         padding: '6px 10px',
2719:                         background: '#2d2d44',
2720:                         color: '#eee',
2721:                         border: '1px solid #555',
2722:                         borderRadius: '5px',
2723:                         cursor: 'pointer',
2724:                         fontSize: '13px',
2725:                         textAlign: 'left'
2726:                     });
2727:                     btn.onclick = action;
2728:                     return btn;
2729:                 }
2730: 
2731:                 panel.appendChild(makeBtn('Fill Stones', () => {
2732:                     if (typeof window.fillstones === 'function') window.fillstones();
2733:                 }));
2734:                 panel.appendChild(makeBtn('Toggle Deck Browser', () => {
2735:                     if (typeof window.showdeck === 'function') window.showdeck();
2736:                 }));
2737:                 panel.appendChild(makeBtn('✕ Close', () => panel.remove()));
2738: 
2739:                 document.body.appendChild(panel);
2740:             }
2741: 
2742:             document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
2743:                 if (!e.target || !e.target.classList.contains('hud-ap-label')) return;
2744:                 clickCount++;
2745:                 clearTimeout(clickTimer);
2746:                 if (clickCount >= 5) {
2747:                     clickCount = 0;
2748:                     openCheatPanel();
2749:                 } else {
2750:                     clickTimer = setTimeout(() => { clickCount = 0; }, 3000);
2751:                 }
2752:             });
2753:         })();
</file>

<file path="js/lobby.js">
   1: // ========================================
   2:         // AUTH SYSTEM (Supabase Auth)
   3:         // ========================================
   4: 
   5:         // On page load: restore an existing session so the user doesn't have to log in again
   6:         async function checkAuthSession() {
   7:             const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();
   8:             if (session) {
   9:                 onAuthSuccess(session.user);
  10:             }
  11:         }
  12: 
  13:         async function authLogin() {
  14:             const username = document.getElementById('auth-username').value.trim();
  15:             const password = document.getElementById('auth-password').value;
  16:             if (!username || !password) { showAuthError('Please enter a username and password.'); return; }
  17: 
  18:             setAuthLoading(true);
  19:             const email = username.toLowerCase() + '@godaigo.game';
  20:             const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password });
  21:             setAuthLoading(false);
  22: 
  23:             if (error) { showAuthError(error.message); return; }
  24:             onAuthSuccess(data.user);
  25:         }
  26: 
  27:         async function authRegister() {
  28:             const username = document.getElementById('auth-username').value.trim();
  29:             const password = document.getElementById('auth-password').value;
  30:             if (!username) { showAuthError('Please enter a username.'); return; }
  31:             if (password.length < 6) { showAuthError('Password must be at least 6 characters.'); return; }
  32:             if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]+$/.test(username)) {
  33:                 showAuthError('Username may only contain letters, numbers, _, -, .');
  34:                 return;
  35:             }
  36: 
  37:             setAuthLoading(true);
  38:             const email = username.toLowerCase() + '@godaigo.game';
  39:             const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({
  40:                 email,
  41:                 password,
  42:                 options: { data: { username } }
  43:             });
  44:             setAuthLoading(false);
  45: 
  46:             if (error) {
  47:                 // Replace the internal fake email with just the username in error messages
  48:                 showAuthError(error.message.replace(email, username));
  49:                 return;
  50:             }
  51:             if (data.session) {
  52:                 onAuthSuccess(data.user);
  53:             } else {
  54:                 // Email confirmation is still enabled in Supabase dashboard
  55:                 showAuthError('Registration failed: email confirmation is required. Please disable it in your Supabase Authentication settings.');
  56:             }
  57:         }
  58: 
  59:         async function authSignOut() {
  60:             await supabase.auth.signOut();
  61:             document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby').style.display = 'none';
  62:             document.getElementById('auth-screen').style.display = 'block';
  63:             document.getElementById('auth-bar').style.display = 'none';
  64:             // Stop browser auto-refresh and hide panels so the next user starts fresh
  65:             stopBrowserRefresh();
  66:             const browserPanel = document.getElementById('game-browser-panel');
  67:             const waitingPanel = document.getElementById('waiting-room-panel');
  68:             if (browserPanel) browserPanel.style.display = 'none';
  69:             if (waitingPanel) waitingPanel.style.display = 'none';
  70:             const readyControls = document.getElementById('ready-controls');
  71:             if (readyControls) readyControls.style.display = 'none';
  72:             document.getElementById('auth-password').value = '';
  73:             document.getElementById('auth-error').style.display = 'none';
  74:         }
  75: 
  76:         function onAuthSuccess(user) {
  77:             // Derive display username from metadata (set on register) or from synthetic email
  78:             const username = user.user_metadata?.username
  79:                 || user.email?.replace('@godaigo.game', '')
  80:                 || 'Player';
  81: 
  82:             // Store globally so all lobby functions use it without reading the DOM
  83:             lobbyUsername = username;
  84: 
  85:             // Keep the hidden input in sync (some code paths still read it as a fallback)
  86:             const usernameInput = document.getElementById('username-input');
  87:             if (usernameInput) usernameInput.value = username;
  88: 
  89:             // Show signed-in bar inside the lobby
  90:             const authBar = document.getElementById('auth-bar');
  91:             const authBarName = document.getElementById('auth-bar-name');
  92:             if (authBarName) authBarName.textContent = `Signed in as ${username}`;
  93:             if (authBar) authBar.style.display = 'flex';
  94: 
  95:             // Swap screens
  96:             document.getElementById('auth-screen').style.display = 'none';
  97:             document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby').style.display = 'block';
  98: 
  99:             // Show the game browser (Panel A)
 100:             showGameBrowser();
 101: 
 102:             // Initialise gamification profile and award daily login gold
 103:             if (window.gami) {
 104:                 window.gami.init(user.id, username).then(() => {
 105:                     window.gami.onDailyLogin();
 106:                     window.loadMainLeaderboard?.();
 107:                 });
 108:             }
 109:         }
 110: 
 111:         function showAuthError(msg) {
 112:             const el = document.getElementById('auth-error');
 113:             if (!el) return;
 114:             el.textContent = msg;
 115:             el.style.display = 'block';
 116:         }
 117: 
 118:         function setAuthLoading(on) {
 119:             const loading = document.getElementById('auth-loading');
 120:             const loginBtn = document.getElementById('auth-login-btn');
 121:             const regBtn = document.getElementById('auth-register-btn');
 122:             if (loading) loading.style.display = on ? 'block' : 'none';
 123:             if (loginBtn) loginBtn.disabled = on;
 124:             if (regBtn) regBtn.disabled = on;
 125:         }

 132:

 143:         function showGameBrowser() {
 144:             const browserPanel = document.getElementById('game-browser-panel');
 145:             const waitingPanel = document.getElementById('waiting-room-panel');
 146:             if (browserPanel) browserPanel.style.display = 'block';
 147:             if (waitingPanel) waitingPanel.style.display = 'none';
 148:             // Unlock + clear room-name-input so the player can choose a fresh name next time
 149:             const roomNameInput = document.getElementById('room-name-input');
 150:             if (roomNameInput) {
 151:                 roomNameInput.disabled = false;
 152:                 roomNameInput.style.opacity = '';
 153:                 roomNameInput.value = '';
 154:             }
 155:             refreshGameBrowser();
 156:             startBrowserRefresh(); // auto-refresh every 5 seconds
 157:         }
 158: 
 159:         function showWaitingRoom(gameId, joinCode, isPrivate, roomName) {
 160:             currentGameId = gameId;
 161:             currentJoinCode = joinCode || null;
 162:             const browserPanel = document.getElementById('game-browser-panel');
 163:             const waitingPanel = document.getElementById('waiting-room-panel');
 164:             if (browserPanel) browserPanel.style.display = 'none';
 165:             if (waitingPanel) waitingPanel.style.display = 'block';
 166:             // Display the room name (static — set once at creation)
 167:             const roomNameValue = document.getElementById('room-name-value');
 168:             if (roomNameValue) roomNameValue.textContent = roomName || 'Game Room';
 169:             // Show/hide room code section
 170:             const codeDisplay = document.getElementById('room-code-display');
 171:             if (isPrivate && joinCode) {
 172:                 codeDisplay.style.display = 'block';
 173:                 document.getElementById('room-code-value').textContent = joinCode;
 174:             } else {
 175:                 if (codeDisplay) codeDisplay.style.display = 'none';
 176:             }
 177:             // Update badge
 178:             const badge = document.getElementById('room-type-badge');
 179:             if (badge) badge.textContent = isPrivate ? 'PRIVATE' : 'PUBLIC';
 180:             stopBrowserRefresh();
 181:         }

 183:         function copyRoomCode() {
 184:             if (currentJoinCode) navigator.clipboard?.writeText(currentJoinCode);
 185:             updateStatus('Room code copied!');
 186:         }

 188:         function setBrowserStatus(msg) {
 189:             const el = document.getElementById('browser-status');
 190:             if (el) el.textContent = msg;
 191:         }
 192: 
 193:         // --- Create room ---
 194: 
 195:         async function hostPublicGame()    { await createRoom(false); }
 196:         async function createPrivateRoom() { await createRoom(true);  }
 197: 
 198:         async function createRoom(isPrivate) {
 199:             const username = lobbyUsername;
 200:             if (!username) { alert('Not signed in — please sign in first'); return; }
 201: 
 202:             // Read custom room name; fall back to "<username>'s Game" if left blank
 203:             const roomNameRaw = document.getElementById('room-name-input')?.value.trim();
 204:             const roomName = roomNameRaw || (username + "'s Game");
 205: 
 206:             // --- Auto-clean stale player entries for this username ---
 207:             const twoMinutesAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 2 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
 208:             const { data: existingPlayers } = await supabase
 209:                 .from('players')
 210:                 .select('id, game_id, created_at')
 211:                 .eq('username', username);
 212:             if (existingPlayers?.length) {
 213:                 const gameIds = existingPlayers.map(p => p.game_id).filter(Boolean);
 214:                 if (gameIds.length) {
 215:                     const { data: waitingRooms } = await supabase
 216:                         .from('game_room')
 217:                         .select('id')
 218:                         .in('id', gameIds)
 219:                         .eq('status', 'waiting');
 220:                     if (waitingRooms?.length) {
 221:                         // Only auto-clean entries older than 2 minutes (stale sessions)
 222:                         const staleIds = existingPlayers
 223:                             .filter(p => p.created_at < twoMinutesAgo)
 224:                             .map(p => p.id);
 225:                         if (staleIds.length) {
 226:                             await supabase.from('players').delete().in('id', staleIds);
 227:                             console.log('🧹 Auto-cleaned stale player entries:', staleIds);
 228:                         } else {
 229:                             setBrowserStatus('You\'re already in a waiting room. Leave it first before creating a new one.');
 230:                             return;
 231:                         }
 232:                     }
 233:                 }
 234:             }
 235: 
 236:             setBrowserStatus('Creating room…');
 237:             await supabase.rpc('cleanup_stale_rooms');
 238:             const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('create_game_room',
 239:                 { p_is_private: isPrivate, p_host_name: roomName });
 240:             if (error || !data?.length) {
 241:                 console.error('❌ create_game_room RPC failed:', error);
 242:                 setBrowserStatus('Error creating room: ' + (error?.message || 'no data returned — see Supabase SQL Editor'));
 243:                 return;
 244:             }
 245:             const { room_id, join_code } = data[0];
 246: 
 247:             // Lock the room-name input — can't rename mid-game; unlocked again on leaveRoom()
 248:             const roomNameInput = document.getElementById('room-name-input');
 249:             if (roomNameInput) {
 250:                 roomNameInput.disabled = true;
 251:                 roomNameInput.style.opacity = '0.5';
 252:             }
 253: 
 254:             const ok = await joinRoomAsPlayer(room_id, username);
 255:             if (!ok) return;
 256:             isHost = true;
 257:             showWaitingRoom(room_id, join_code, isPrivate, roomName);
 258:         }
 259: 
 260:         // --- Join by code ---
 261: 
 262:         async function joinByCode() {
 263:             const code = document.getElementById('join-code-input').value.trim().toUpperCase();
 264:             if (code.length !== 6) { setBrowserStatus('Enter a 6-character room code'); return; }
 265:             setBrowserStatus('Looking up room…');
 266:             const { data: room } = await supabase
 267:                 .from('game_room')
 268:                 .select('id,status,is_private,join_code,host_name')
 269:                 .eq('join_code', code)
 270:                 .single();
 271:             if (!room) { setBrowserStatus('Room not found — check the code and try again'); return; }
 272:             if (room.status !== 'waiting') { setBrowserStatus('That game has already started'); return; }
 273:             const username = lobbyUsername;
 274:             if (!username) { alert('Not signed in — please sign in first'); return; }
 275:             const ok = await joinRoomAsPlayer(room.id, username);
 276:             if (!ok) return;
 277:             showWaitingRoom(room.id, room.join_code, room.is_private, room.host_name);
 278:         }
 279: 
 280:         // --- Join a public game from browser ---
 281: 
 282:         async function joinPublicGame(gameId) {
 283:             const username = lobbyUsername;
 284:             if (!username) { alert('Not signed in — please sign in first'); return; }
 285:             const { data: room } = await supabase
 286:                 .from('game_room')
 287:                 .select('id,status,is_private,join_code,host_name')
 288:                 .eq('id', gameId)
 289:                 .single();
 290:             if (!room || room.status !== 'waiting') { refreshGameBrowser(); return; }
 291:             const ok = await joinRoomAsPlayer(gameId, username);
 292:             if (!ok) return;
 293:             showWaitingRoom(gameId, null, false, room.host_name);
 294:         }
 295: 
 296:         // --- Shared join helper ---
 297: 
 298:         async function joinRoomAsPlayer(gameId, username) {
 299:             // Auto-clean stale entries for this username; block if entry is recent (active session)
 300:             const twoMinutesAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 2 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
 301:             const { data: existing } = await supabase
 302:                 .from('players')
 303:                 .select('id, username, created_at')
 304:                 .eq('game_id', gameId);
 305:             const match = existing?.filter(p => p.username === username) || [];
 306:             if (match.length) {
 307:                 const stale = match.filter(p => p.created_at < twoMinutesAgo);
 308:                 if (stale.length) {
 309:                     await supabase.from('players').delete().in('id', stale.map(p => p.id));
 310:                     console.log('🧹 Auto-cleaned stale entry for', username);
 311:                 } else {
 312:                     setBrowserStatus('That username is already in this room');
 313:                     return false;
 314:                 }
 315:             }
 316:             const { data, error } = await supabase
 317:                 .from('players')
 318:                 .insert([{ username, is_ready: false, game_id: gameId }])
 319:                 .select()
 320:                 .single();
 321:             if (error) { setBrowserStatus('Could not join: ' + error.message); return false; }
 322:             myPlayerId = data.id;
 323:             currentGameId = gameId;  // must be set BEFORE subscribeToLobby so filters use the correct room ID
 324:             isMultiplayer = true;
 325:             // Determine host: first player by creation time
 326:             const { data: all } = await supabase
 327:                 .from('players')
 328:                 .select('*')
 329:                 .eq('game_id', gameId)
 330:                 .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
 331:             isHost = all?.[0]?.id === myPlayerId;
 332:             document.getElementById('ready-controls').style.display = 'block';
 333:             subscribeToLobby();
 334:             updateHeartbeat();
 335:             startLobbyPoll();
 336:             updatePlayerList();
 337:             console.log('✅ Joined room', gameId, 'as', username, isHost ? '(HOST)' : '');
 338:             return true;
 339:         }
 340: 
 341:         // --- Leave room (return to game browser) ---
 342: 
 343:         async function leaveRoom() {
 344:             const leavingRoomId = currentGameId; // capture before we null it out
 345:             const leavingAsHost = isHost;
 346: 
 347:             // If we're mid-game, reset game state first before returning to lobby
 348:             const gameContainer = document.querySelector('.game-container');
 349:             const inGame = gameContainer && gameContainer.style.display !== 'none';
 350:             if (inGame && typeof resetToLobby === 'function') {
 351:                 resetToLobby();
 352:             }
 353: 
 354:             if (myPlayerId) {
 355:                 await supabase.from('players').delete().eq('id', myPlayerId);
 356:             }
 357: 
 358:             // If the host leaves, delete the game_room entirely so it disappears from
 359:             // other players' browser lists immediately rather than lingering as an empty room.
 360:             if (leavingAsHost && leavingRoomId) {
 361:                 const { error: roomDeleteErr } = await supabase
 362:                     .from('game_room')
 363:                     .delete()
 364:                     .eq('id', leavingRoomId);
 365:                 if (roomDeleteErr) {
 366:                     console.warn('⚠️ Could not delete game_room on host leave:', roomDeleteErr.message);
 367:                 } else {
 368:                     console.log('🗑️ Deleted game_room', leavingRoomId, '(host left waiting room)');
 369:                 }
 370:             }
 371: 
 372:             myPlayerId = null;
 373:             currentGameId = null;
 374:             currentJoinCode = null;
 375:             isHost = false;
 376:             isMultiplayer = false;
 377:             isJoining = false;
 378:             stopLobbyPoll();
 379:             if (playersSubscription) { playersSubscription.unsubscribe(); playersSubscription = null; }
 380:             if (gameRoomSubscription) { gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe(); gameRoomSubscription = null; }
 381:             if (gameChannel) { gameChannel.unsubscribe(); gameChannel = null; }
 382:             document.getElementById('ready-controls').style.display = 'none';
 383:             showGameBrowser();
 384:         }
 385: 
 386:         // --- Public game browser ---
 387: 
 388:         let browserRefreshInterval = null;
 389: 
 390:         async function refreshGameBrowser() {
 391:             const refreshBtn = document.getElementById('refresh-browser-btn');
 392:             if (refreshBtn) refreshBtn.textContent = '…';
 393: 
 394:             // Sweep stale players from waiting rooms (disconnected without clean logout)
 395:             const staleTime = new Date(Date.now() - 10 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
 396:             const { data: waitingRooms } = await supabase
 397:                 .from('game_room').select('id').eq('status', 'waiting');
 398:             if (waitingRooms?.length) {
 399:                 await supabase
 400:                     .from('players')
 401:                     .delete()
 402:                     .in('game_id', waitingRooms.map(r => r.id))
 403:                     .lt('last_seen', staleTime);
 404:             }
 405: 
 406:             const { data: rooms } = await supabase
 407:                 .from('game_room')
 408:                 .select('id,host_name,created_at')
 409:                 .eq('status', 'waiting')
 410:                 .eq('is_private', false)
 411:                 .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
 412: 
 413:             if (refreshBtn) refreshBtn.textContent = 'Refresh';
 414: 
 415:             const list = document.getElementById('public-games-list');
 416:             if (!list) return;
 417: 
 418:             if (!rooms?.length) {
 419:                 list.innerHTML = '<p style="color:#666;font-style:italic;text-align:center;padding:20px 0;margin:0;">No public games open. Host one!</p>';
 420:                 return;
 421:             }
 422: 
 423:             // Fetch player counts for each room in one query
 424:             const ids = rooms.map(r => r.id);
 425:             const { data: players } = await supabase
 426:                 .from('players')
 427:                 .select('game_id')
 428:                 .in('game_id', ids);
 429:             const counts = {};
 430:             (players || []).forEach(p => { counts[p.game_id] = (counts[p.game_id] || 0) + 1; });
 431: 
 432:             // Auto-delete ghost rooms (exist in game_room but have no players)
 433:             const ghostIds = ids.filter(id => !counts[id]);
 434:             if (ghostIds.length) {
 435:                 supabase.from('game_room').delete().in('id', ghostIds).then(() => {
 436:                     console.log('🗑️ Cleaned up', ghostIds.length, 'empty ghost room(s):', ghostIds);
 437:                 });
 438:             }
 439: 
 440:             // Only show rooms that actually have players in them
 441:             const liveRooms = rooms.filter(r => (counts[r.id] || 0) > 0);
 442:             if (!liveRooms.length) {
 443:                 list.innerHTML = '<p style="color:#666;font-style:italic;text-align:center;padding:20px 0;margin:0;">No public games open. Host one!</p>';
 444:                 return;
 445:             }
 446: 
 447:             list.innerHTML = liveRooms.map(r => `
 448:                 <div class="game-room-card" onclick="joinPublicGame(${r.id})">
 449:                     <div class="game-room-host">${_esc(r.host_name || 'Unnamed Game')}</div>
 450:                     <div class="game-room-count">${counts[r.id]} / 5</div>
 451:                     <button class="game-room-join-btn">Join</button>
 452:                 </div>`).join('');
 453:         }
 454: 
 455:         function startBrowserRefresh() {
 456:             stopBrowserRefresh();
 457:             browserRefreshInterval = setInterval(refreshGameBrowser, 5000);
 458:         }
 459:         function stopBrowserRefresh() {
 460:             clearInterval(browserRefreshInterval);
 461:             browserRefreshInterval = null;
 462:         }
 463: 
 464:         // Simple HTML escape helper
 465:         function _esc(str) {
 466:             return String(str)
 467:                 .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
 468:                 .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
 469:                 .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
 470:                 .replace(/"/g, '&quot;');
 471:         }
 472: 
 473:         // ── Retro dialog helpers ──────────────────────────────────
 474:         /**
 475:          * Show a retro-styled confirm dialog.
 476:          * onOk is called if the player clicks OK; nothing happens on Cancel.
 477:          */
 478:         function showRetroConfirm(title, lines, onOk) {
 479:             const id = 'retro-confirm-overlay';
 480:             if (document.getElementById(id)) return; // prevent duplicates
 481: 
 482:             const bodyLines = lines.map(l => `<div class="retro-dlg-line">${l}</div>`).join('');
 483:             const el = document.createElement('div');
 484:             el.id        = id;
 485:             el.className = 'retro-dlg-overlay';
 486:             el.innerHTML = `
 487:                 <div class="retro-dlg-box">
 488:                     <div class="retro-dlg-title">${title}</div>
 489:                     <div class="retro-dlg-body">${bodyLines}</div>
 490:                     <div class="retro-dlg-btns">
 491:                         <button class="retro-dlg-btn ok"     id="retro-confirm-ok">OK</button>
 492:                         <button class="retro-dlg-btn cancel" id="retro-confirm-cancel">Cancel</button>
 493:                     </div>
 494:                 </div>`;
 495: 
 496:             document.body.appendChild(el);
 497: 
 498:             document.getElementById('retro-confirm-ok').onclick = () => {
 499:                 el.remove();
 500:                 onOk();
 501:             };
 502:             document.getElementById('retro-confirm-cancel').onclick = () => el.remove();
 503:         }
 504: 
 505:         // ========================================
 506:         // END GAME BROWSER & ROOM MANAGEMENT
 507:         // ========================================
 508: 
 509:         // Sequence tracking for detecting out-of-order messages and deduplication
 510:         let scrollEventSequence = 0;
 511:         const receivedSequences = new Set();
 512: 
 513:         // Periodically clean old sequence IDs (keep last 1000 to prevent memory leak)
 514:         setInterval(() => {
 515:             if (receivedSequences.size > 1000) {
 516:                 const arr = Array.from(receivedSequences);
 517:                 receivedSequences.clear();
 518:                 // Keep most recent 500
 519:                 arr.slice(-500).forEach(id => receivedSequences.add(id));
 520:                 console.log('🧹 Cleaned old event IDs from deduplication cache');
 521:             }
 522:         }, 30000); // Every 30 seconds
 523: 
 524:         // Join the lobby
 525:         async function joinLobby() {
 526:             // Prevent double-joins
 527:             if (isJoining) {
 528:                 console.log('Already joining, please wait...');
 529:                 return;
 530:             }
 531: 
 532:             const username = lobbyUsername;
 533: 
 534:             if (!username) {
 535:                 alert('Not signed in — please sign in first');
 536:                 return;
 537:             }
 538: 
 539:             // Disable input and button, show loading spinner
 540:             isJoining = true;
 541:             const joinButton = document.getElementById('join-button');
 542:             const loadingDiv = document.getElementById('join-loading');
 543:             joinButton.disabled = true;
 544:             usernameInput.disabled = true;
 545:             loadingDiv.style.display = 'block';
 546: 
 547:             try {
 548:                 // First, clean up any stale players (older than 10 minutes)
 549:                 // Increased timeout for development - players won't be kicked while debugging
 550:                 await supabase
 551:                     .from('players')
 552:                     .delete()
 553:                     .lt('last_seen', new Date(Date.now() - 600000).toISOString());
 554: 
 555:                 // Check game room status — only reset if truly abandoned (no players left)
 556:                 const { data: room } = await supabase
 557:                     .from('game_room')
 558:                     .select('status')
 559:                     .eq('id', 1)
 560:                     .single();
 561: 
 562:                 if (room && (room.status === 'playing' || room.status === 'finished')) {
 563:                     // Count how many players are still in the DB
 564:                     const { data: activePlayers } = await supabase
 565:                         .from('players')
 566:                         .select('id');
 567: 
 568:                     if (activePlayers && activePlayers.length > 0) {
 569:                         // Game is in progress with real players — don't nuke it
 570:                         alert('A game is currently in progress with other players.\n\nPlease wait for it to finish, or use "Reset Lobby" to force-clear.');
 571:                         isJoining = false;
 572:                         joinButton.disabled = false;
 573:                         usernameInput.disabled = false;
 574:                         loadingDiv.style.display = 'none';
 575:                         return;
 576:                     }
 577: 
 578:                     // No players left — safe to reset this abandoned game
 579:                     await supabase
 580:                         .from('game_room')
 581:                         .update({ status: 'waiting', current_turn_index: 0 })
 582:                         .eq('id', 1);
 583:                 }
 584: 
 585:                 // Check if username is already taken
 586:                 const { data: existingPlayers } = await supabase
 587:                     .from('players')
 588:                     .select('*')
 589:                     .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
 590: 
 591:                 const usernameTaken = existingPlayers && existingPlayers.some(p => p.username === username);
 592:                 if (usernameTaken) {
 593:                     alert('Username already taken! Please choose a different name.');
 594:                     // Re-enable inputs
 595:                     isJoining = false;
 596:                     joinButton.disabled = false;
 597:                     usernameInput.disabled = false;
 598:                     loadingDiv.style.display = 'none';
 599:                     return;
 600:                 }
 601: 
 602:                 // Insert player into database
 603:                 const { data, error } = await supabase
 604:                     .from('players')
 605:                     .insert([{ username, is_ready: false }])
 606:                     .select()
 607:                     .single();
 608: 
 609:                 if (error) throw error;
 610: 
 611:                 myPlayerId = data.id;
 612:                 isMultiplayer = true;
 613: 
 614:                 // After insertion, check if we're the first player (host)
 615:                 // The host is simply the player with the oldest created_at timestamp
 616:                 const { data: allPlayersAfterInsert } = await supabase
 617:                     .from('players')
 618:                     .select('*')
 619:                     .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
 620: 
 621:                 // We're host if we're the first player (by creation time)
 622:                 isHost = allPlayersAfterInsert && allPlayersAfterInsert[0].id === myPlayerId;
 623: 
 624:                 console.log('✅ Joined lobby as:', username, 'ID:', myPlayerId, isHost ? '(HOST)' : '');
 625: 
 626:                 // Hide join form, show ready controls
 627:                 document.getElementById('join-form').style.display = 'none';
 628:                 document.getElementById('ready-controls').style.display = 'block';
 629: 
 630:                 // Start listening for updates
 631:                 subscribeToLobby();
 632:                 updateHeartbeat();
 633:                 startLobbyPoll(); // Auto-refresh player list every 10s while in lobby
 634:                 updatePlayerList(); // Initial update to show host controls
 635: 
 636:             } catch (error) {
 637:                 console.error('Error joining lobby:', error);
 638:                 alert('Failed to join lobby: ' + error.message);
 639: 
 640:                 // Re-enable inputs on error
 641:                 isJoining = false;
 642:                 joinButton.disabled = false;
 643:                 usernameInput.disabled = false;
 644:                 loadingDiv.style.display = 'none';
 645:             }
 646:         }
 647: 
 648:         // Leave the current game
 649:         function leaveGame() {
 650:             if (!myPlayerId) return;
 651: 
 652:             showRetroConfirm(
 653:                 'Leave Game?',
 654:                 ['You will be removed from this game', 'and cannot rejoin.'],
 655:                 _doLeaveGame
 656:             );
 657:         }
 658: 
 659:         async function _doLeaveGame() {
 660:             try {
 661:                 console.log('👋 Leaving game...');
 662: 
 663:                 // Delete myself from players table
 664:                 const { error } = await supabase
 665:                     .from('players')
 666:                     .delete()
 667:                     .eq('id', myPlayerId);
 668: 
 669:                 if (error) throw error;
 670: 
 671:                 // Reset local state
 672:                 myPlayerId = null;
 673:                 myPlayerIndex = null;
 674:                 isHost = false;
 675:                 isMultiplayer = false;
 676: 
 677:                 // Stop polling and subscriptions
 678:                 stopLobbyPoll();
 679: 
 680:                 // Unsubscribe from channels
 681:                 if (playersSubscription) {
 682:                     playersSubscription.unsubscribe();
 683:                     playersSubscription = null;
 684:                 }
 685:                 if (gameRoomSubscription) {
 686:                     gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe();
 687:                     gameRoomSubscription = null;
 688:                 }
 689:                 if (gameChannel) {
 690:                     gameChannel.unsubscribe();
 691:                     gameChannel = null;
 692:                 }
 693: 
 694:                 // Reset UI state
 695:                 const readyCtrl = document.getElementById('ready-controls');
 696:                 if (readyCtrl) readyCtrl.style.display = 'none';
 697:                 currentGameId = null;
 698:                 currentJoinCode = null;
 699: 
 700:                 // resetToLobby handles: clearBoard, stopTurnTimerMonitoring,
 701:                 // hiding game-layout, showing lobby-wrapper, hiding leave/end-turn buttons
 702:                 resetToLobby();
 703: 
 704:                 // Return to game browser panel
 705:                 showGameBrowser();
 706: 
 707:                 console.log('✅ Left game successfully');
 708: 
 709:             } catch (error) {
 710:                 console.error('Error leaving game:', error);
 711:                 showRetroConfirm('Leave Failed', [error.message], () => {});
 712:             }
 713:         }
 714: 
 715:         // Reset the entire lobby (clear all players and reset game room)
 716:         function resetLobby() {
 717:             showRetroConfirm(
 718:                 'Reset Lobby?',
 719:                 ['Remove all players', 'Reset room to waiting state', 'Clear the board'],
 720:                 _doResetLobby
 721:             );
 722:         }
 723: 
 724:         async function _doResetLobby() {
 725:             try {
 726:                 console.log('📄 Resetting lobby...');
 727: 
 728:                 // Delete all players in the current room
 729:                 const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
 730:                     .from('players')
 731:                     .select('id')
 732:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
 733: 
 734:                 if (allPlayers && allPlayers.length > 0) {
 735:                     const { error: playersError } = await supabase
 736:                         .from('players')
 737:                         .delete()
 738:                         .in('id', allPlayers.map(p => p.id));
 739: 
 740:                     if (playersError) throw playersError;
 741:                 }
 742: 
 743:                 // Reset game room status
 744:                 const { error: roomError } = await supabase
 745:                     .from('game_room')
 746:                     .update({ status: 'waiting', current_turn_index: 0 })
 747:                     .eq('id', currentGameId);
 748: 
 749:                 if (roomError) throw roomError;
 750: 
 751:                 // Reset local state
 752:                 myPlayerId = null;
 753:                 currentGameId = null;
 754:                 currentJoinCode = null;
 755:                 isHost = false;
 756:                 isJoining = false;
 757:                 isMultiplayer = false;
 758: 
 759:                 // Stop lobby polling
 760:                 stopLobbyPoll();
 761: 
 762:                 // Unsubscribe from channels
 763:                 if (playersSubscription) {
 764:                     playersSubscription.unsubscribe();
 765:                     playersSubscription = null;
 766:                 }
 767:                 if (gameRoomSubscription) {
 768:                     gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe();
 769:                     gameRoomSubscription = null;
 770:                 }
 771: 
 772:                 // Reset UI — return to game browser
 773:                 document.getElementById('ready-controls').style.display = 'none';
 774: 
 775:                 // Hide game, show lobby
 776:                 document.querySelector('.game-container').style.display = 'none';
 777:                 document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby').style.display = 'block';
 778: 
 779:                 // Clear the board if it was started
 780:                 clearBoard(true);
 781: 
 782:                 // Return to the game browser
 783:                 showGameBrowser();
 784: 
 785:                 console.log('✅ Lobby reset complete!');
 786:                 alert('Lobby has been reset! You can now host or join again.');
 787: 
 788:             } catch (error) {
 789:                 console.error('Error resetting lobby:', error);
 790:                 alert('Failed to reset lobby: ' + error.message);
 791:             }
 792:         }
 793: 
 794:         // Handle game over - mark game as finished and show win screen
 795:         async function handleGameOver(winnerPlayerIndex, winType = 'scrolls') {
 796:             if (!isMultiplayer) return;
 797: 
 798:             try {
 799:                 console.log('🏆 Game Over! Winner:', winnerPlayerIndex, 'Type:', winType);
 800: 
 801:                 // Show win screen immediately for the winner
 802:                 showGameOverToAll(winnerPlayerIndex, winType);
 803: 
 804:                 // Award gamification XP for this game result
 805:                 if (window.gami?.userId) {
 806:                     const isWinner = (winnerPlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex);
 807:                     window.gami.onGameComplete(isWinner, totalPlayers);
 808:                 }
 809: 
 810:                 // Update game room status to 'finished' and store winner index
 811:                 const { error } = await supabase
 812:                     .from('game_room')
 813:                     .update({
 814:                         status: 'finished',
 815:                         current_turn_index: winnerPlayerIndex
 816:                     })
 817:                     .eq('id', currentGameId);
 818: 
 819:                 if (error) {
 820:                     console.error('Error updating game over state:', error);
 821:                 }
 822:             } catch (error) {
 823:                 console.error('Error handling game over:', error);
 824:             }
 825:         }
 826: 
 827:         // Show game over notification to all players
 828:         function showGameOverToAll(winnerPlayerIndex, winType = 'scrolls') {
 829:             console.log('Game over for winner index:', winnerPlayerIndex, 'Type:', winType);
 830: 
 831:             // Check if notification already exists
 832:             const existingNotification = document.getElementById('game-over-notification');
 833:             if (existingNotification) {
 834:                 return; // Don't show duplicate
 835:             }
 836: 
 837:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 838:             overlay.id = 'game-over-notification';
 839:             overlay.className = 'game-over-overlay';
 840: 
 841:             const box = document.createElement('div');
 842:             box.className = 'game-over-box';
 843: 
 844:             const title = document.createElement('div');
 845:             title.textContent = 'GAME OVER';
 846:             title.className = 'game-over-title';
 847:             box.appendChild(title);
 848: 
 849:             const winnerName = getPlayerColorName(winnerPlayerIndex);
 850:             const playerName = document.createElement('div');
 851:             playerName.textContent = `${winnerName} wins!`;
 852:             playerName.className = 'game-over-winner';
 853:             playerName.style.color = '#d9b08c';
 854:             box.appendChild(playerName);
 855: 
 856:             const msg = document.createElement('div');
 857:             msg.textContent = winType === 'last_standing'
 858:                 ? 'Every other player left. You win!'
 859:                 : 'All five elements have been mastered!';
 860:             msg.className = 'game-over-msg';
 861:             box.appendChild(msg);
 862: 
 863:             if (winType === 'scrolls') {
 864:                 const elements = document.createElement('div');
 865:                 elements.className = 'game-over-elements';
 866:                 elements.innerHTML = '▲ ◯ ♦ ≋ ✺';
 867:                 box.appendChild(elements);
 868:             }
 869: 
 870:             const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
 871:             subtitle.textContent = 'The path of balance is complete.';
 872:             subtitle.className = 'game-over-subtitle';
 873:             box.appendChild(subtitle);
 874: 
 875:             const lobbyBtn = document.createElement('button');
 876:             lobbyBtn.textContent = 'Return to Lobby';
 877:             lobbyBtn.className = 'retro-dlg-btn ok';
 878:             lobbyBtn.onclick = async () => {
 879:                 try {
 880:                     const roomId = currentGameId;
 881:                     if (roomId) {
 882:                         const { data: allP } = await supabase.from('players').select('id').eq('game_id', roomId);
 883:                         if (allP && allP.length > 0) {
 884:                             await supabase.from('players').delete().in('id', allP.map(p => p.id));
 885:                         }
 886:                         await supabase.from('game_room').update({ status: 'waiting', current_turn_index: 0 }).eq('id', roomId);
 887:                     }
 888:                 } catch (err) {
 889:                     console.error('Post-game cleanup error:', err);
 890:                 }
 891:                 window.location.reload();
 892:             };
 893:             box.appendChild(lobbyBtn);
 894: 
 895:             overlay.appendChild(box);
 896:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
 897:         }
 898: 
 899:         // Toggle ready status
 900:         async function toggleReady() {
 901:             if (!myPlayerId) return;
 902:             
 903:             try {
 904:                 // Get current ready state
 905:                 const { data: currentPlayer } = await supabase
 906:                     .from('players')
 907:                     .select('is_ready')
 908:                     .eq('id', myPlayerId)
 909:                     .single();
 910:                 
 911:                 const newReadyState = !currentPlayer.is_ready;
 912:                 
 913:                 // Update ready state
 914:                 const { error } = await supabase
 915:                     .from('players')
 916:                     .update({ is_ready: newReadyState })
 917:                     .eq('id', myPlayerId);
 918:                 
 919:                 if (error) throw error;
 920:                 
 921:                 // Update button
 922:                 const readyButton = document.getElementById('ready-button');
 923:                 if (newReadyState) {
 924:                     readyButton.textContent = 'Not Ready';
 925:                     readyButton.style.background = '#f44336';
 926:                 } else {
 927:                     readyButton.textContent = "I'm Ready!";
 928:                     readyButton.style.background = '#4CAF50';
 929:                 }
 930:                 
 931:             } catch (error) {
 932:                 console.error('Error toggling ready:', error);
 933:             }
 934:         }
 935: 
 936:         // Subscribe to lobby updates
 937:         function subscribeToLobby() {
 938:             // Unsubscribe from any existing channels first
 939:             if (playersSubscription) {
 940:                 playersSubscription.unsubscribe();
 941:             }
 942:             if (gameRoomSubscription) {
 943:                 gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe();
 944:             }
 945:             
 946:             // Subscribe to players table (scoped to this room)
 947:             playersSubscription = supabase
 948:                 .channel('players-' + currentGameId + '-' + Math.random())
 949:                 .on('postgres_changes',
 950:                     { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'players',
 951:                       filter: `game_id=eq.${currentGameId}` },
 952:                     async (payload) => {
 953:                         console.log('Players update:', payload);
 954: 
 955:                         // Handle our own player being deleted (kicked or lobby reset)
 956:                         if (payload.eventType === 'DELETE' && payload.old.id === myPlayerId) {
 957:                             console.log('📄 You were removed from the lobby (kicked or reset detected)');
 958: 
 959:                             // Check if we're in a game - if so, need to reset game state first
 960:                             const gameContainer = document.querySelector('.game-container');
 961:                             const inGame = gameContainer && gameContainer.style.display !== 'none';
 962: 
 963:                             if (inGame) {
 964:                                 console.log('⏰ Kicked during game - resetting to lobby');
 965:                                 // Call resetToLobby to properly clean up game state
 966:                                 if (typeof resetToLobby === 'function') {
 967:                                     resetToLobby();
 968:                                 }
 969:                             }
 970: 
 971:                             // Reset local state
 972:                             myPlayerId = null;
 973:                             myPlayerIndex = null;
 974:                             isHost = false;
 975:                             isMultiplayer = false;
 976: 
 977:                             // Unsubscribe from channels
 978:                             if (playersSubscription) {
 979:                                 playersSubscription.unsubscribe();
 980:                                 playersSubscription = null;
 981:                             }
 982:                             if (gameRoomSubscription) {
 983:                                 gameRoomSubscription.unsubscribe();
 984:                                 gameRoomSubscription = null;
 985:                             }
 986:                             if (gameChannel) {
 987:                                 gameChannel.unsubscribe();
 988:                                 gameChannel = null;
 989:                             }
 990: 
 991:                             // Show alert and reload the page to fully reset
 992:                             alert('You were kicked from the game (timeout). The page will refresh.');
 993: 
 994:                             // Reload the page to return to a clean state
 995:                             setTimeout(() => {
 996:                                 window.location.reload();
 997:                             }, 500);
 998: 
 999:                             return; // Don't update player list since we're no longer in lobby
1000:                         }
1001: 
1002:                         // Handle other players leaving during game
1003:                         if (payload.eventType === 'DELETE' && payload.old.id !== myPlayerId) {
1004:                             console.log('👋 Another player left:', payload.old);
1005: 
1006:                             // Show notification if game is in progress
1007:                             const { data: room } = await supabase
1008:                                 .from('game_room')
1009:                                 .select('status')
1010:                                 .eq('id', currentGameId)
1011:                                 .single();
1012: 
1013:                             if (room && room.status === 'playing') {
1014:                                 const leftPlayer = allPlayersData.find(p => p.id === payload.old.id);
1015:                                 const playerName = leftPlayer ? getPlayerColorName(leftPlayer.player_index) : 'A player';
1016:                                 updateStatus(`${playerName} left the game`);
1017: 
1018:                                 // Check if I'm the only player left (scoped to this room)
1019:                             const { data: remainingPlayers } = await supabase
1020:                                 .from('players')
1021:                                 .select('id, username, player_index, color')
1022:                                 .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
1023: 
1024:                                 console.log('💥 Remaining players after deletion:', remainingPlayers);
1025:                                 console.log('📍 My player ID:', myPlayerId);
1026: 
1027:                                 if (remainingPlayers && remainingPlayers.length === 1 && remainingPlayers[0].id === myPlayerId) {
1028:                                     console.log('I am the last player remaining - win by default!');
1029:                                     console.log('My player index:', myPlayerIndex);
1030: 
1031:                                     // Mark game as finished with me as winner
1032:                                     if (myPlayerIndex !== null && myPlayerIndex !== undefined) {
1033:                                         console.log('Calling handleGameOver with index:', myPlayerIndex);
1034:                                         await handleGameOver(myPlayerIndex, 'last_standing');
1035:                                     } else {
1036:                                         console.error('Cannot win - myPlayerIndex is null/undefined');
1037:                                     }
1038:                                 } else {
1039:                                     console.log('Still', remainingPlayers?.length || 0, 'players in game');
1040:                                 }
1041: 
1042:                                 // Update placement-phase tracking if a player was kicked/left
1043:                                 if (remainingPlayers) {
1044:                                     totalPlayers = remainingPlayers.length;
1045:                                     allPlayersData = remainingPlayers;
1046: 
1047:                                     if (isPlacementPhase) {
1048:                                         const remainingIndices = new Set(
1049:                                             remainingPlayers
1050:                                                 .map(p => p.player_index)
1051:                                                 .filter(i => i !== null && i !== undefined)
1052:                                         );
1053: 
1054:                                         // Drop placements for players that left
1055:                                         playerTilesPlaced = new Set(
1056:                                             Array.from(playerTilesPlaced).filter(idx => remainingIndices.has(idx))
1057:                                         );
1058: 
1059:                                         // If all remaining players have placed, complete placement phase (host only)
1060:                                         if (isHost && playerTilesPlaced.size >= totalPlayers && totalPlayers > 0) {
1061:                                             isPlacementPhase = false;
1062:                                             const sorted = Array.from(remainingIndices).sort((a, b) => a - b);
1063:                                             activePlayerIndex = sorted[0];
1064:                                             const startedAt = Date.now();
1065:                                             turnStartedAtMs = startedAt;
1066:                                             broadcastGameAction('placement-complete', {
