1067:                                                 playerIndex: activePlayerIndex,
1068:                                                 turnStartedAt: startedAt
1069:                                             });
1070:                                             updateTurnDisplay();
1071:                                         }
1072:                                     }
1073:                                 }
1074:                             }
1075:                         }
1076: 
1077:                         // Update our local isHost status when players change
1078:                         // Check if we're now the first player (host) within this room
1079:                         if (myPlayerId) {
1080:                             const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
1081:                                 .from('players')
1082:                                 .select('*')
1083:                                 .eq('game_id', currentGameId)
1084:                                 .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
1085: 
1086:                             if (allPlayers && allPlayers.length > 0) {
1087:                                 const wasHost = isHost;
1088:                                 isHost = allPlayers[0].id === myPlayerId;
1089: 
1090:                                 // Notify if we became host
1091:                                 if (!wasHost && isHost) {
1092:                                     console.log('⚠️ You are now the host!');
1093:                                 }
1094:                             }
1095:                         }
1096: 
1097:                         updatePlayerList();
1098:                     }
1099:                 )
1100:                 .subscribe();
1101:             
1102:             // Subscribe to game_room table (scoped to this room)
1103:             gameRoomSubscription = supabase
1104:                 .channel('game-room-sub-' + currentGameId + '-' + Math.random())
1105:                 .on('postgres_changes',
1106:                     { event: '*', schema: 'public', table: 'game_room',
1107:                       filter: `id=eq.${currentGameId}` },
1108:                     (payload) => {
1109:                         console.log('Game room update:', payload);
1110:                         if (payload.new && payload.new.status === 'playing') {
1111:                             handleGameStart();
1112:                         } else if (payload.new && payload.new.status === 'finished') {
1113:                             // Game ended - show win screen to all players who didn't trigger it themselves
1114:                             console.log('🏁 Game finished!');
1115:                             const winnerIndex = payload.new.current_turn_index ?? 0;
1116:                             // Only show if we're not the winner (winner already saw it via handleGameOver)
1117:                             if (winnerIndex !== myPlayerIndex) {
1118:                                 showGameOverToAll(winnerIndex, 'scrolls');
1119:                             }
1120:                         }
1121:                     }
1122:                 )
1123:                 .subscribe();
1124:             
1125:             // Initial update
1126:             updatePlayerList();
1127:         }
1128: 
1129:         // Update player list display
1130:         async function updatePlayerList() {
1131:             if (!currentGameId) return; // Not in a room yet
1132:             try {
1133:                 const { data: players, error } = await supabase
1134:                     .from('players')
1135:                     .select('*')
1136:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId)
1137:                     .order('created_at', { ascending: true });
1138: 
1139:                 if (error) throw error;
1140: 
1141:                 const container = document.getElementById('players-container');
1142:                 if (!players || players.length === 0) {
1143:                     container.innerHTML = '<p style="color: #999; font-style: italic;">No players yet...</p>';
1144:                     return;
1145:                 }
1146: 
1147:                 container.innerHTML = players.map((p, index) => {
1148:                     const isMe = p.id === myPlayerId;
1149:                     const readyIcon = p.is_ready ? '✓' : '○';
1150:                     const readyColor = p.is_ready ? '#4CAF50' : '#999';
1151:                     const meLabel = isMe ? ' <span style="color: #ffd700;">(You)</span>' : '';
1152:                     // First player in the list (index 0) is the host
1153:                     const hostLabel = index === 0 ? ' <span style="color: #FF9800;">Host</span>' : '';
1154:                     // Apply local player's equipped name colour; other players keep default
1155:                     const nameStyle = isMe
1156:                         ? (window.cosmeticsSystem?.getNameColorStyle() || '')
1157:                         : '';
1158: 
1159:                     return `
1160:                         <div style="padding: 10px; margin: 5px 0; background: ${isMe ? '#444' : '#3a3a3a'}; border-radius: 5px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
1161:                             <span style="${nameStyle}">${p.username}${hostLabel}${meLabel}</span>
1162:                             <span style="color: ${readyColor}; font-size: 20px;">${readyIcon}</span>
1163:                         </div>
1164:                     `;
1165:                 }).join('');
1166: 
1167:                 // Update room player count in the info bar
1168:                 const playerCountEl = document.getElementById('room-player-count');
1169:                 if (playerCountEl) playerCountEl.textContent = `${players.length} / 5`;
1170: 
1171:                 // Show/hide host settings panel
1172:                 const hostSettings = document.getElementById('host-settings');
1173:                 const totalCount = players.length;
1174: 
1175:                 // Host must also click "I'm Ready!" before the Start Game button appears,
1176:                 // so the game can't start while the host is AFK or not yet prepared.
1177:                 const hostPlayerData = players.find(p => p.id === myPlayerId);
1178:                 const hostIsReady = hostPlayerData?.is_ready ?? false;
1179: 
1180:                 if (isHost && totalCount >= 2 && totalCount <= 5 && hostIsReady) {
1181:                     hostSettings.style.display = 'block';
1182:                 } else {
1183:                     hostSettings.style.display = 'none';
1184:                 }
1185: 
1186:                 // Update status
1187:                 const statusDiv = document.getElementById('lobby-status');
1188: 
1189:                 if (totalCount < 2) {
1190:                     statusDiv.textContent = 'Waiting for more players... (need at least 2)';
1191:                     statusDiv.style.color = '#999';
1192:                 } else if (totalCount > 5) {
1193:                     statusDiv.textContent = 'Too many players! Maximum is 5.';
1194:                     statusDiv.style.color = '#f44336';
1195:                 } else if (isHost && !hostIsReady) {
1196:                     statusDiv.textContent = `${totalCount} players in lobby. Click "I\'m Ready!" to reveal the Start button.`;
1197:                     statusDiv.style.color = '#FF9800';
1198:                 } else {
1199:                     statusDiv.textContent = `${totalCount} players in lobby. Host can start the game!`;
1200:                     statusDiv.style.color = '#4CAF50';
1201:                 }
1202:                 
1203:             } catch (error) {
1204:                 console.error('Error updating player list:', error);
1205:             }
1206:         }
1207: 
1208:         // Host starts the game manually
1209:         async function hostStartGame() {
1210:             if (!isHost) {
1211:                 alert('Only the host can start the game!');
1212:                 return;
1213:             }
1214: 
1215:             // Disable the button immediately to prevent double-clicks
1216:             const startBtn = document.getElementById('host-start-button');
1217:             if (startBtn) startBtn.disabled = true;
1218: 
1219:             try {
1220:                 const { data: players, error } = await supabase
1221:                     .from('players')
1222:                     .select('*')
1223:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId);
1224: 
1225:                 if (error) throw error;
1226: 
1227:                 // Validate player count
1228:                 if (players.length < 2) {
1229:                     if (startBtn) startBtn.disabled = false;
1230:                     alert('Need at least 2 players to start!');
1231:                     return;
1232:                 }
1233: 
1234:                 if (players.length > 5) {
1235:                     if (startBtn) startBtn.disabled = false;
1236:                     alert('Too many players! Maximum is 5.');
1237:                     return;
1238:                 }
1239: 
1240:                 console.log('🎮 Host starting game with', players.length, 'players...');
1241: 
1242:                 // Get turn timer settings
1243:                 const timeoutSelect = document.getElementById('timeout-setting');
1244:                 const turnTimeLimit = parseInt(timeoutSelect.value, 10) * 1000; // seconds -> ms
1245:                 const kickCheckbox = document.getElementById('kick-on-timeout');
1246:                 const kickMode = !!(kickCheckbox && kickCheckbox.checked);
1247: 
1248:                 console.log('⚠️ Turn time limit set to:', turnTimeLimit / 1000, 'seconds');
1249:                 console.log('👢 Kick on turn timeout:', kickMode);
1250: 
1251:                 // Randomly assign player indices and colors
1252:                 const colorRankOrder = ['purple', 'yellow', 'red', 'blue', 'green'];
1253:                 const shuffledIndices = [...Array(players.length).keys()].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
1254: 
1255:                 // Update game room status to trigger game start and store turn-timer settings
1256:                 const startedAtIso = new Date().toISOString();
1257: 
1258:                 // Try writing extended fields; if the DB schema doesn't have them, fall back gracefully.
1259:                 let { error: roomError } = await supabase
1260:                     .from('game_room')
1261:                     .update({
1262:                         status: 'playing',
1263:                         current_turn_index: 0,
1264:                         inactivity_timeout: turnTimeLimit,        // reused as turn time limit (ms)
1265:                         kick_on_turn_timeout: kickMode,
1266:                         turn_started_at: startedAtIso
1267:                     })
1268:                     .eq('id', currentGameId);
1269: 
1270:                 if (roomError) {
1271:                     console.warn('⚠️ Failed to write extended turn timer fields to game_room. Trying without optional fields...', roomError);
1272:                     // Try without kick_on_turn_timeout and turn_started_at
1273:                     let fallback = await supabase
1274:                         .from('game_room')
1275:                         .update({
1276:                             status: 'playing',
1277:                             current_turn_index: 0,
1278:                             inactivity_timeout: turnTimeLimit
1279:                         })
1280:                         .eq('id', currentGameId);
1281: 
1282:                     if (fallback.error) {
1283:                         console.warn('⚠️ Second fallback failed, trying minimal update...', fallback.error);
1284:                         // Minimal fallback - just status and turn index
1285:                         fallback = await supabase
1286:                             .from('game_room')
1287:                             .update({
1288:                                 status: 'playing',
1289:                                 current_turn_index: 0
1290:                             })
1291:                             .eq('id', currentGameId);
1292:                     }
1293: 
1294:                     roomError = fallback.error;
1295:                 }
1296: 
1297:                 if (roomError) throw roomError;
1298: 
1299:                 // Also set local host timer baseline immediately
1300:                 gameInactivityTimeout = turnTimeLimit;
1301:                 kickOnTurnTimeout = kickMode;
1302:                 turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1303: 
1304:                 // Assign colors and indices to players
1305:                 for (let i = 0; i < players.length; i++) {
1306:                     const player = players[i];
1307:                     const assignedIndex = shuffledIndices[i];
1308:                     const assignedColor = colorRankOrder[assignedIndex];
1309: 
1310:                     await supabase
1311:                         .from('players')
1312:                         .update({
1313:                             player_index: assignedIndex,
1314:                             color: assignedColor
1315:                         })
1316:                         .eq('id', player.id);
1317:                 }
1318: 
1319:                 console.log('✅ Game started by host!');
1320: 
1321:                 // Host transitions immediately; non-host players receive the trigger via Realtime
1322:                 await handleGameStart();
1323: 
1324:             } catch (error) {
1325:                 console.error('Error starting game:', error);
1326:                 if (startBtn) startBtn.disabled = false; // allow retry
1327:                 alert('Failed to start game: ' + error.message);
1328:             }
1329:         }
1330: 
1331:         // Check if game should start (DEPRECATED - now host-controlled)
1332:         async function checkGameStart() {
1333:             try {
1334:                 const { data: players, error } = await supabase
1335:                     .from('players')
1336:                     .select('*');
1337:                 
1338:                 if (error) throw error;
1339:                 
1340:                 // Need at least 2 players, max 5
1341:                 if (players.length < 2 || players.length > 5) return;
1342:                 
1343:                 // Check if all ready
1344:                 const allReady = players.every(p => p.is_ready);
1345:                 if (!allReady) return;
1346:                 
1347:                 console.log('🎮 All players ready! Starting game...');
1348:                 
1349:                 // Randomly assign player indices and colors
1350:                 const colorRankOrder = ['purple', 'yellow', 'red', 'blue', 'green'];
1351:                 const shuffledIndices = [...Array(players.length).keys()].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5);
1352:                 
1353:                 // Update game room status
1354:                 const { error: roomError } = await supabase
1355:                     .from('game_room')
1356:                     .update({ status: 'playing', current_turn_index: 0 })
1357:                     .eq('id', 1);
1358:                 
1359:                 if (roomError) throw roomError;
1360:                 
1361:                 // Assign colors and indices to players
1362:                 for (let i = 0; i < players.length; i++) {
1363:                     const player = players[i];
1364:                     const assignedIndex = shuffledIndices[i];
1365:                     const assignedColor = colorRankOrder[assignedIndex];
1366:                     
1367:                     await supabase
1368:                         .from('players')
1369:                         .update({ 
1370:                             player_index: assignedIndex, 
1371:                             color: assignedColor 
1372:                         })
1373:                         .eq('id', player.id);
1374:                 }
1375:                 
1376:             } catch (error) {
1377:                 console.error('Error checking game start:', error);
1378:             }
1379:         }
1380: 
1381:         // Handle game start
1382:         async function handleGameStart() {
1383:             // Guard against duplicate calls (host's direct call + Realtime subscription racing)
1384:             if (document.getElementById('game-layout').classList.contains('active')) {
1385:                 console.log('🔁 handleGameStart: game already active — skipping duplicate call');
1386:                 return;
1387:             }
1388:             try {
1389:                 // Wait for player_index to be assigned (retry up to 10 times)
1390:                 let myPlayer = null;
1391:                 let attempts = 0;
1392:                 
1393:                 while (attempts < 10) {
1394:                     const { data, error } = await supabase
1395:                         .from('players')
1396:                         .select('*')
1397:                         .eq('id', myPlayerId)
1398:                         .single();
1399:                     
1400:                     if (error) throw error;
1401:                     
1402:                     if (data.player_index !== null && data.player_index !== undefined) {
1403:                         myPlayer = data;
1404:                         break;
1405:                     }
1406:                     
1407:                     console.log(`⏳ Waiting for player index assignment (attempt ${attempts + 1}/10)...`);
1408:                     await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 300));
1409:                     attempts++;
1410:                 }
1411:                 
1412:                 if (!myPlayer || myPlayer.player_index === null) {
1413:                     throw new Error('Player index was not assigned');
1414:                 }
1415:                 
1416:                 myPlayerIndex = myPlayer.player_index;
1417:                 
1418:                 // Get all players in this room
1419:                 const { data: allPlayers } = await supabase
1420:                     .from('players')
1421:                     .select('*')
1422:                     .eq('game_id', currentGameId)
1423:                     .order('player_index', { ascending: true });
1424:                 
1425:                 console.log('🎮 Starting multiplayer game!');
1426:                 console.log('My index:', myPlayerIndex);
1427:                 console.log('My color:', myPlayer.color);
1428:                 console.log('All players:', allPlayers);
1429:                 
1430:                 // Get game room settings (turn timer)
1431:                 // We select '*' for forward/backward compatibility if columns are missing.
1432:                 const { data: room } = await supabase
1433:                     .from('game_room')
1434:                     .select('*')
1435:                     .eq('id', currentGameId)
1436:                     .single();
1437: 
1438:                 if (room && room.inactivity_timeout !== null && room.inactivity_timeout !== undefined) {
1439:                     gameInactivityTimeout = room.inactivity_timeout; // reused as turn time limit (ms)
1440:                     console.log('⚠️ Loaded turn time limit:', gameInactivityTimeout / 1000, 'seconds');
1441:                 }
1442: 
1443:                 if (room && room.kick_on_turn_timeout !== null && room.kick_on_turn_timeout !== undefined) {
1444:                     kickOnTurnTimeout = !!room.kick_on_turn_timeout;
1445:                     console.log('👢 kickOnTurnTimeout:', kickOnTurnTimeout);
1446:                 }
1447: 
1448:                 // Set turn started time
1449:                 if (room && room.turn_started_at) {
1450:                     const ts = new Date(room.turn_started_at).getTime();
1451:                     if (!Number.isNaN(ts)) {
1452:                         turnStartedAtMs = ts;
1453:                     } else {
1454:                         turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1455:                     }
1456:                 } else {
1457:                     turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1458:                 }
1459: 
1460:                 // Derive deck seed from player IDs - this is deterministic and shared
1461:                 // Sort player IDs and hash them to get a consistent seed
1462:                 const sortedPlayerIds = allPlayers.map(p => p.id).sort().join('');
1463:                 let gameDeckSeed = 0;
1464:                 for (let i = 0; i < sortedPlayerIds.length; i++) {
1465:                     gameDeckSeed = ((gameDeckSeed << 5) - gameDeckSeed + sortedPlayerIds.charCodeAt(i)) | 0;
1466:                 }
1467:                 gameDeckSeed = Math.abs(gameDeckSeed);
1468:                 console.log('🎴 Derived deck seed from player IDs:', gameDeckSeed);
1469: 
1470:                 // Hide lobby, show new game layout
1471:                 document.getElementById('lobby-wrapper').style.display = 'none';
1472:                 document.getElementById('game-layout').classList.add('active');
1473:                 updateDeckIndicatorVisibility();
1474: 
1475:                 // Show leave game and end turn buttons in multiplayer
1476:                 document.getElementById('leave-game').style.display = 'inline-block';
1477:                 document.getElementById('end-turn').style.display = 'inline-block';
1478: 
1479:                 // Show timer HUD element
1480:                 document.getElementById('hud-timer').style.display = 'flex';
1481: 
1482:                 // Initialize new UI elements
1483:                 initializeNewUI();
1484: 
1485:                 // Start turn timer monitoring (turn-based timeout)
1486:                 startTurnTimerMonitoring();
1487: 
1488:                 // Initialize game with multiplayer players and shared deck seed
1489:                 startMultiplayerGame(allPlayers, gameDeckSeed);
1490:                 
1491:             } catch (error) {
1492:                 console.error('Error handling game start:', error);
1493:                 alert('Failed to start game: ' + error.message);
1494:             }
1495:         }
1496: 
1497:         // Update heartbeat (keep player active while in waiting room only)
1498:         let _heartbeatInterval = null;
1499:         function updateHeartbeat() {
1500:             if (!myPlayerId) return;
1501:             if (_heartbeatInterval) clearInterval(_heartbeatInterval);
1502:             _heartbeatInterval = setInterval(async () => {
1503:                 if (!myPlayerId) { clearInterval(_heartbeatInterval); return; }
1504:                 // Skip heartbeat during active game — in-game inactivity timeout uses last_seen
1505:                 if (document.getElementById('game-layout')?.classList.contains('active')) return;
1506:                 try {
1507:                     await supabase
1508:                         .from('players')
1509:                         .update({ last_seen: new Date().toISOString() })
1510:                         .eq('id', myPlayerId);
1511:                 } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
1512:             }, 30000); // Every 30 seconds
1513:         }
1514: 
1515:         // Clean up on page unload (synchronous to ensure it completes)
1516:         window.addEventListener('beforeunload', (e) => {
1517:             if (myPlayerId) {
1518:                 // Use navigator.sendBeacon for reliable cleanup during page unload
1519:                 const supabaseUrl = supabase.supabaseUrl;
1520:                 const supabaseKey = supabase.supabaseKey;
1521: 
1522:                 // Direct REST API call using fetch with keepalive
1523:                 fetch(`${supabaseUrl}/rest/v1/players?id=eq.${myPlayerId}`, {
1524:                     method: 'DELETE',
1525:                     headers: {
1526:                         'apikey': supabaseKey,
1527:                         'Authorization': `Bearer ${supabaseKey}`,
1528:                         'Content-Type': 'application/json'
1529:                     },
1530:                     keepalive: true // This ensures the request completes even if page closes
1531:                 });
1532:             }
1533:         });
1534: 
1535:         // Auto-refresh player list when tab becomes visible again
1536:         // (catches missed real-time events while tab was in background)
1537:         document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
1538:             if (document.visibilityState === 'visible' && myPlayerId) {
1539:                 console.log('🔄 Tab visible — refreshing player list');
1540:                 updatePlayerList();
1541:             }
1542:         });
1543: 
1544:         // Periodic lobby poll — re-fetch player list every 10s while in lobby (not in-game)
1545:         let lobbyPollInterval = null;
1546: 
1547:         function startLobbyPoll() {
1548:             stopLobbyPoll(); // Clear any existing interval
1549:             lobbyPollInterval = setInterval(() => {
1550:                 if (!myPlayerId) {
1551:                     stopLobbyPoll();
1552:                     return;
1553:                 }
1554:                 // Only poll while in lobby phase (not during an active game)
1555:                 const lobbyVisible = document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby').style.display !== 'none';
1556:                 if (lobbyVisible) {
1557:                     updatePlayerList();
1558:                 } else {
1559:                     // Game started — stop polling
1560:                     stopLobbyPoll();
1561:                 }
1562:             }, 10000);
1563:         }
1564: 
1565:         function stopLobbyPoll() {
1566:             if (lobbyPollInterval) {
1567:                 clearInterval(lobbyPollInterval);
1568:                 lobbyPollInterval = null;
1569:             }
1570:         }
1571: 
1572:         // Auto-detect and clean up stale lobby state on page load
1573:         (async function checkLobbyStateOnLoad() {
1574:             try {
1575:                 const { data: room } = await supabase
1576:                     .from('game_room')
1577:                     .select('status')
1578:                     .eq('id', 1)
1579:                     .single();
1580: 
1581:                 if (room && (room.status === 'playing' || room.status === 'finished')) {
1582:                     // Check if any players are actually still in the game
1583:                     const { data: players } = await supabase
1584:                         .from('players')
1585:                         .select('id');
1586: 
1587:                     if (!players || players.length === 0) {
1588:                         // Abandoned game — auto-reset so next joiner gets a clean lobby
1589:                         console.log('🧹 Stale game detected (no players) — auto-resetting lobby');
1590:                         await supabase
1591:                             .from('game_room')
1592:                             .update({ status: 'waiting', current_turn_index: 0 })
1593:                             .eq('id', 1);
1594:                     } else {
1595:                         console.log(`ℹ️ Game in progress with ${players.length} player(s)`);
1596:                     }
1597:                 }
1598:             } catch (err) {
1599:                 console.error('Lobby state check error:', err);
1600:             }
1601:         })();
1602: 
1603:         // Secret keyboard sequence "reset" to reveal the Reset Lobby button
1604:         (function() {
1605:             const SECRET = 'reset';
1606:             let buffer = '';
1607:             document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
1608:                 // Only listen while lobby is visible
1609:                 const lobbyEl = document.getElementById('multiplayer-lobby');
1610:                 if (!lobbyEl || lobbyEl.style.display === 'none') return;
1611:                 // Ignore if user is typing in an input field
1612:                 if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') return;
1613: 
1614:                 buffer += e.key.toLowerCase();
1615:                 // Keep only the last N characters
1616:                 if (buffer.length > SECRET.length) {
1617:                     buffer = buffer.slice(-SECRET.length);
1618:                 }
1619:                 if (buffer === SECRET) {
1620:                     const btn = document.getElementById('reset-lobby-btn');
1621:                     if (btn) {
1622:                         btn.style.display = btn.style.display === 'none' ? '' : 'none';
1623:                         buffer = '';
1624:                     }
1625:                 }
1626:             });
1627:         })();
1628: 
1629:         let gameChannel = null; // Global reference to the game broadcast channel
1630: 
1631:         // Set up broadcast channel for real-time game synchronization
1632:         function setupGameBroadcast() {
1633:             if (gameChannel) {
1634:                 gameChannel.unsubscribe();
1635:             }
1636: 
1637:             // Create a channel scoped to this specific game room
1638:             gameChannel = supabase.channel('game-room-' + currentGameId, {
1639:                 config: {
1640:                     broadcast: { self: false } // Don't receive our own broadcasts
1641:                 }
1642:             });
1643: 
1644:             // Listen for tile flip events
1645:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'tile-flip' }, ({ payload }) => {
1646:                 console.log('📄 Received tile flip broadcast:', payload);
1647:                 const { tileId, shrineType } = payload;
1648:                 // Find the tile and flip it
1649:                 const tile = document.querySelector(`[data-tile-id="${tileId}"]`);
1650:                 if (tile) {
1651:                     console.log(`✅ Found tile ${tileId}, flipping to ${shrineType}`);
1652:                     flipTileVisually(tile, shrineType);
1653:                     // Re-apply Wandering River indicator if this tile was transformed (flip replaced the element)
1654:                     if (typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined' && spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
1655:                         const tileObj = placedTiles.find(t => Number(t.id) === Number(tileId));
1656:                         const wr = spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver;
1657:                         const entry = Array.isArray(wr) ? wr.find(e => Number(e.tileId) === Number(tileId)) : null;
1658:                         if (tileObj && entry && entry.newElement) {
1659:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tileObj, entry.newElement);
1660:                         }
1661:                     }
1662:                 } else {
1663:                     console.error(`❌ Could not find tile with id ${tileId} in DOM`);
1664:                 }
1665:             });
1666: 
1667:             // Wandering River: other players see and are affected by the transformation (clear at caster's next turn)
1668:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'wandering-river-apply' }, ({ payload }) => {
1669:                 console.log('📄 Received wandering-river-apply:', payload);
1670:                 const { tileId, newElement, playerIndex } = payload;
1671:                 if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollEffects) return;
1672:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver = spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver || [];
1673:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver.push({
1674:                     tileId: tileId,
1675:                     newElement: newElement,
1676:                     playerIndex: playerIndex,
1677:                     expiresNextTurn: true
1678:                 });
1679:                 if (typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined') {
1680:                     const tile = placedTiles.find(t => Number(t.id) === Number(tileId));
1681:                     if (tile && tile.element) {
1682:                         spellSystem.scrollEffects.applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tile, newElement);
1683:                     }
1684:                 }
1685:             });
1686: 
1687:             // Take Flight (Wind IV): teleport a player to a new position
1688:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'take-flight' }, ({ payload }) => {
1689:                 console.log('📄 Received take-flight:', payload);
1690:                 const { targetPlayerIndex, x, y } = payload;
1691:                 if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1692:                     movePlayerVisually(targetPlayerIndex, x, y, 0);
1693:                 } else {
1694:                     // Fallback
1695:                     const target = playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex];
1696:                     if (target) {
1697:                         target.x = x;
1698:                         target.y = y;
1699:                         if (target.element) {
1700:                             target.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
1701:                         }
1702:                     }
1703:                 }
1704:                 console.log(`🌬️ Take Flight: player ${targetPlayerIndex} teleported to (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
1705:             });
1706: 
1707:             // Catacomb/Freedom teleport: sync shrine teleports
1708:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'catacomb-teleport' }, ({ payload }) => {
1709:                 console.log('📄 Received catacomb-teleport:', payload);
1710:                 const { playerIndex, x, y } = payload;
1711:                 if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
1712:                     movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, 0);
1713:                 } else {
1714:                     const target = playerPositions[playerIndex];
1715:                     if (target) {
1716:                         target.x = x;
1717:                         target.y = y;
1718:                         if (target.element) {
1719:                             target.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
1720:                         }
1721:                     }
1722:                 }
1723:                 console.log(`🔅 Catacomb teleport: player ${playerIndex} to (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
1724:             });
1725: 
1726:             // Freedom (Wind III): other players receive the buff so shrine teleport works for everyone
1727:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'freedom-apply' }, ({ payload }) => {
1728:                 console.log('📄 Received freedom-apply:', payload);
1729:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
1730:                 if (!spellSystem || !spellSystem.scrollEffects) return;
1731:                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.freedom = {
1732:                     playerIndex: playerIndex,
1733:                     expiresNextTurn: true
1734:                 };
1735:                 if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') {
1736:                     updateCatacombIndicators();
1737:                 }
1738:             });
1739: 
1740:             // Listen for stone placement events
1741:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'stone-place' }, ({ payload }) => {
1742:                 console.log('📄 Received stone placement:', payload);
1743:                 const { x, y, stoneType } = payload;
1744:                 placeStoneVisually(x, y, stoneType);
1745:             });
1746: 
1747:             // Listen for stone move events
1748:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'stone-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
1749:                 console.log('📄 Received stone move:', payload);
1750:                 const { stoneId, x, y, stoneType } = payload;
1751:                 moveStoneVisually(stoneId, x, y, stoneType);
1752:             });
1753: 
1754:             // Listen for stone break events
1755:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'stone-break' }, ({ payload }) => {
1756:                 console.log('📄 Received stone break:', payload);
1757:                 const { stoneId } = payload;
1758:                 breakStoneVisually(stoneId);
1759:             });
1760: 
1761:             // Listen for player tile placement events
1762:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'player-tile-place' }, ({ payload }) => {
1763:                 console.log('📄 Received player tile placement:', payload);
1764:                 const { x, y, playerIndex, color, cosmetics } = payload;
1765:                 placePlayerTileVisually(x, y, playerIndex, color, cosmetics || null);
1766:             });
1767: 
1768:             // Listen for player movement events
1769:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'player-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
1770:                 console.log('📄 Received player movement:', payload);
1771:                 const { playerIndex, x, y, apSpent, cosmetics } = payload;
1772:                 // Cache remote cosmetics so movePlayerVisually can apply landing effects
1773:                 if (cosmetics) {
1774:                     window._remotePlayerCosmetics = window._remotePlayerCosmetics || {};
1775:                     window._remotePlayerCosmetics[playerIndex] = cosmetics;
1776:                 }
1777:                 movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, apSpent);
1778:                 // Defensively flip any hidden tiles at the destination.
1779:                 // This ensures tile reveals are visible even if the tile-flip broadcast
1780:                 // arrives out of order or is lost. Uses the shared deck state to determine
1781:                 // shrine type (both clients drew from the same seed, so shrineType matches).
1782:                 if (typeof getAllHexagonPositions === 'function' && typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined') {
1783:                     const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
1784:                     let nearestHex = null;
1785:                     let nearestDist = Infinity;
1786:                     allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
1787:                         const d = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - y, 2));
1788:                         if (d < nearestDist) { nearestDist = d; nearestHex = hexPos; }
1789:                     });
1790:                     if (nearestHex && nearestDist < 5 && nearestHex.tiles) {
1791:                         nearestHex.tiles
1792:                             .filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile)
1793:                             .forEach(t => {
1794:                                 const el = document.querySelector(`[data-tile-id="${t.id}"]`);
1795:                                 if (el && typeof flipTileVisually === 'function') {
1796:                                     console.log(`🔄 Proactively flipping tile ${t.id} at received player position`);
1797:                                     flipTileVisually(el, t.shrineType);
1798:                                 }
1799:                             });
1800:                     }
1801:                 }
1802:             });
1803: 
1804:             // Listen for turn change events
1805:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'turn-change' }, ({ payload }) => {
1806:                 console.log('📄 Received turn-change:', payload.playerIndex, 'turnNumber:', payload.turnNumber, 'myPlayerIndex:', myPlayerIndex, 'isPlacementPhase:', isPlacementPhase);
1807: 
1808:                 // Validate turn number for desync detection
1809:                 if (typeof payload.turnNumber === 'number') {
1810:                     const expectedTurn = lastReceivedTurnNumber + 1;
1811: 
1812:                     if (payload.turnNumber > expectedTurn) {
1813:                         // We missed some turns! Log warning
1814:                         console.warn(`⚠️ DESYNC DETECTED: Expected turn ${expectedTurn}, received turn ${payload.turnNumber}. Missed ${payload.turnNumber - expectedTurn} turn(s).`);
1815:                         updateStatus(`Turn sync issue detected - auto-correcting...`);
1816:                     } else if (payload.turnNumber < lastReceivedTurnNumber) {
1817:                         // Received an old turn? Ignore it
1818:                         console.warn(`⚠️ Received outdated turn ${payload.turnNumber} (current: ${lastReceivedTurnNumber}). Ignoring.`);
1819:                         return;
1820:                     }
1821: 
1822:                     lastReceivedTurnNumber = payload.turnNumber;
1823:                 }
1824: 
1825:                 activePlayerIndex = payload.playerIndex;
1826:                 if (payload.turnStartedAt) {
1827:                     turnStartedAtMs = payload.turnStartedAt;
1828:                 } else {
1829:                     turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1830:                 }
1831:                 // Wandering River clears at the beginning of the caster's next turn
1832:                 if (spellSystem && spellSystem.scrollEffects && spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer) {
1833:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearWanderingRiverForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
1834:                 }
1835:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearFreedomForPlayer) {
1836:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearFreedomForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
1837:                 }
1838:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer) {
1839:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearQuickReflexesForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
1840:                 }
1841:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearExcavateForPlayer) {
1842:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearExcavateForPlayer(activePlayerIndex);
1843:                 }
1844:                 // Clear all turn-based buffs (expiresThisTurn) on every client when the turn changes.
1845:                 // This is a defensive cleanup: reflect-triggered / psychic-triggered execute() on
1846:                 // ALL clients, so non-caster clients can end up with stale activeBuffs entries
1847:                 // (e.g. steamVents set for the reflect caster). Without this call those entries
1848:                 // linger until the next time clearTurnBuffs() fires on that client.
1849:                 // Safe to call multiple times — idempotent (no-op if already cleared).
1850:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.clearTurnBuffs) {
1851:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.clearTurnBuffs();
1852:                 }
1853:                 // Excavate teleport: if it's my turn and I have a pending teleport, trigger it
1854:                 if (activePlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex && spellSystem?.scrollEffects?.processExcavateTeleport) {
1855:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.processExcavateTeleport(activePlayerIndex);
1856:                 }
1857: 
1858:                 // AP resets at the start of the new player's turn
1859:                 if (activePlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
1860:                     currentAP = 5;
1861:                     document.getElementById('ap-count').textContent = currentAP;
1862:                     if (typeof refreshVoidAP === 'function') refreshVoidAP();
1863:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
1864:                 }
1865: 
1866:                 updateEndTurnButtonVisibility();
1867:             updateDeckIndicatorVisibility();
1868:                 updateOpponentPanel(); // Update opponent panel on turn change
1869: 
1870:                 if (isPlacementPhase) {
1871:                     // During placement, update status for tile placement
1872:                     if (canPlaceTile()) {
1873:                         updateStatus(`Your turn! Place your player tile (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers} placed)`);
1874:                         setInventoryOpen(true);
1875:                         console.log(`✅ My turn to place tile`);
1876:                     } else {
1877:                         const nextColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
1878:                         updateStatus(`Waiting for ${nextColorName} to place their tile... (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers})`);
1879:                         console.log(`⏳ Waiting for player ${activePlayerIndex} to place`);
1880:                     }
1881:                 } else {
1882:                     // Normal gameplay turn display
1883:                     updateTurnDisplay();
1884:                 }
1885:             });
1886: 
1887:             // Listen for player tile placement during placement phase
1888:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'player-tile-placed' }, ({ payload }) => {
1889:                 console.log('📄 Player tile placed:', payload);
1890:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
1891:                 playerTilesPlaced.add(playerIndex);
1892: 
1893:                 // Don't check completion here - let placement-complete event handle it
1894:                 if (isPlacementPhase && playerTilesPlaced.size < totalPlayers) {
1895:                     // Update status during placement phase
1896:                     if (canPlaceTile()) {
1897:                         updateStatus(`Your turn! Place your player tile (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers} placed)`);
1898:                         setInventoryOpen(true);
1899:                     } else {
1900:                         const nextColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
1901:                         updateStatus(`Waiting for ${nextColorName} to place their tile... (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers})`);
1902:                     }
1903:                 }
1904:             });
1905: 
1906:             // Listen for placement phase completion
1907:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'placement-complete' }, ({ payload }) => {
1908:                 console.log('📄 Placement phase complete');
1909:                 isPlacementPhase = false;
1910:                 activePlayerIndex = payload.playerIndex; // Set to first player
1911:                 if (payload.turnStartedAt) {
1912:                     turnStartedAtMs = payload.turnStartedAt;
1913:                 } else {
1914:                     turnStartedAtMs = Date.now();
1915:                 }
1916: 
1917:                 if (isMyTurn()) {
1918:                     updateStatus(`All tiles placed! It's your turn!`);
1919:                 } else {
1920:                     const firstPlayerColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
1921:                     updateStatus(`All tiles placed! Waiting for ${firstPlayerColorName}'s turn...`);
1922:                 }
1923: 
1924:                 // Ensure standard turn UI becomes visible after placement phase
1925:                 updateTurnDisplay();
1926:                 updateDeckIndicatorVisibility();
1927: 
1928:             });
1929: 
1930:             // Listen for spell cast events
1931:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'spell-cast' }, ({ payload }) => {
1932:                 console.log('📄 Received spell cast:', payload);
1933:                 const { playerIndex, spellName, element, elements, level, isCatacomb } = payload;
1934: 
1935:                 // Update that player's activated elements display
1936:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
1937:                 const playerScrollData = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
1938: 
1939:                 if (isCatacomb) {
1940:                     // Catacomb activates multiple elements
1941:                     elements.forEach(el => {
1942:                         playerScrollData.activated.add(el);
1943:                     });
1944:                 } else {
1945:                     // Regular spell activates one element
1946:                     playerScrollData.activated.add(element);
1947:                 }
1948: 
1949:                 // Update the element symbols display for that player
1950:                 updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
1951: 
1952:                 // Show notification
1953:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
1954:                 if (isCatacomb) {
1955:                     updateStatus(`${playerName} cast ${spellName}! Activated: ${elements.join(', ')}`);
1956:                 } else {
1957:                     updateStatus(`${playerName} cast ${spellName}! Activated ${element} (level ${level})`);
1958:                 }
1959:             });
1960: 
1961:             // Listen for scroll effect broadcasts (for scrolls with special effects)
1962:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-effect' }, ({ payload }) => {
1963:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll-effect:', payload);
1964:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, effectName, element, activatedElements } = payload;
1965: 
1966:                 // Update that player's activated elements
1967:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
1968:                 const playerScrollData = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
1969: 
1970:                 if (activatedElements && Array.isArray(activatedElements)) {
1971:                     // Add all activated elements (for catacomb scrolls or multi-element effects)
1972:                     activatedElements.forEach(el => {
1973:                         playerScrollData.activated.add(el);
1974:                     });
1975:                 } else if (element) {
1976:                     // Single element activation
1977:                     playerScrollData.activated.add(element);
1978:                 }
1979: 
1980:                 // Update the element symbols display for that player
1981:                 updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
1982: 
1983:                 // Show notification
1984:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
1985:                 const activatedStr = activatedElements ? activatedElements.join(', ') : element;
1986:                 updateStatus(`${playerName} used ${effectName}! Activated: ${activatedStr}`);
1987: 
1988:                 // Check win condition — all 5 elements activated
1989:                 if (spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated.size === 5) {
1990:                     console.log(`🏆 Win condition met for player ${playerIndex} (detected via scroll-effect broadcast)`);
1991:                     spellSystem.showLevelComplete(playerIndex);
1992:                     handleGameOver(playerIndex);
1993:                 }
1994:             });
1995: 
1996:             // Reflect triggered at start of turn: run the reflected scroll's effect and update activated elements.
1997:             // Multiple reflect-triggered events for the same player are queued and processed one at a time
1998:             // so that interactive scrolls fully resolve before the next one starts.
1999:             {
2000:                 const reflectQueue = []; // pending { playerIndex, scrollName } entries
2001:                 let reflectRunning = false;
2002: 
2003:                 const runNextReflectTrigger = () => {
2004:                     if (reflectRunning || reflectQueue.length === 0) return;
2005:                     const { playerIndex, scrollName } = reflectQueue.shift();
2006:                     reflectRunning = true;
2007: 
2008:                     const advance = () => {
2009:                         reflectRunning = false;
2010:                         runNextReflectTrigger();
2011:                     };
2012: 
2013:                     // Execute the reflected scroll's effect on this client.
2014:                     // Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) should only run on the Reflect caster's
2015:                     // own client (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex). On other clients, skip execute() —
2016:                     // the caster's client handles the UI selection and syncs state via syncPlayerState.
2017:                     let wasInteractive = false;
2018:                     if (spellSystem.scrollEffects && scrollName) {
2019:                         const definition = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName];
2020:                         if (definition) {
2021:                             const isCaster = (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex);
2022:                             console.log(`🪞 Running reflected scroll effect locally: ${scrollName} for player ${playerIndex} (isCaster=${isCaster})`);
2023:                             const result = spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(scrollName, playerIndex, {
2024:                                 spell: definition,
2025:                                 scrollName: scrollName,
2026:                                 onComplete: advance,
2027:                                 // Flag so interactive scroll effects skip UI on non-caster clients
2028:                                 psychicRemoteClient: !isCaster
2029:                             });
2030:                             wasInteractive = !!(result?.requiresSelection);
2031:                             if (wasInteractive && !isCaster) {
2032:                                 console.log(`🪞 Interactive scroll on non-caster client — advancing queue immediately`);
2033:                                 wasInteractive = false;
2034:                             }
2035:                         }
2036:                     }
2037: 
2038:                     // Update activated elements (Reflect only counts as water, not the reflected scroll's elements)
2039:                     spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2040:                     const activated = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated;
2041:                     activated.add('water');
2042:                     console.log(`🪞 Reflect activated water for player ${playerIndex}:`, Array.from(activated));
2043:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
2044: 
2045:                     if (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2046:                         Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2047:                     }
2048: 
2049:                     const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2050:                     const displayName = scrollName ? (scrollName.replace(/_/g, ' ').toLowerCase()) : 'scroll';
2051:                     updateStatus(`🪞 ${playerName}'s Reflect triggered: activated ${displayName} (counts as water only).`);
2052: 
2053:                     if (activated.size === 5 && playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2054:                         spellSystem.showLevelComplete(playerIndex);
2055:                         if (typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
2056:                             handleGameOver(playerIndex);
2057:                         }
2058:                     }
2059: 
2060:                     // For non-interactive scrolls, advance the queue immediately
2061:                     if (!wasInteractive) advance();
2062:                 };
2063: 
2064:                 gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'reflect-triggered' }, ({ payload }) => {
2065:                     console.log('📄 Received reflect-triggered:', payload);
2066:                     const { playerIndex, scrollName } = payload;
2067:                     if (typeof spellSystem === 'undefined') return;
2068: 
2069:                     // Enqueue and start processing if not already running
2070:                     reflectQueue.push({ playerIndex, scrollName });
2071:                     runNextReflectTrigger();
2072:                 });
2073:             }
2074: 
2075:             // Psychic triggered at start of turn: run the stolen scroll's effect and update activated elements.
2076:             // Multiple psychic-triggered events for the same player are queued and processed one at a time
2077:             // so that interactive scrolls (e.g. Heavy Stomp) fully resolve before the next one starts.
2078:             {
2079:                 const psychicQueue = []; // pending { playerIndex, scrollName } entries
2080:                 let psychicRunning = false;
2081: 
2082:                 const runNextPsychicTrigger = () => {
2083:                     if (psychicRunning || psychicQueue.length === 0) return;
2084:                     const { playerIndex, scrollName } = psychicQueue.shift();
2085:                     psychicRunning = true;
2086: 
2087:                     const advance = () => {
2088:                         psychicRunning = false;
2089:                         runNextPsychicTrigger();
2090:                     };
2091: 
2092:                     // Execute the stolen scroll's effect on this client.
2093:                     // Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) should only run on the Psychic caster's
2094:                     // own client (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex). On other clients, skip execute() —
2095:                     // the caster's client handles the UI selection and broadcasts state changes via syncPlayerState.
2096:                     let wasInteractive = false;
2097:                     if (spellSystem.scrollEffects && scrollName) {
2098:                         const definition = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName];
2099:                         if (definition) {
2100:                             const isCaster = (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex);
2101:                             console.log(`🔮 Running psychic scroll effect locally: ${scrollName} for player ${playerIndex} (isCaster=${isCaster})`);
2102:                             const result = spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(scrollName, playerIndex, {
2103:                                 spell: definition,
2104:                                 scrollName: scrollName,
2105:                                 // onComplete advances the queue when interactive effects finish
2106:                                 onComplete: advance,
2107:                                 // Flag so interactive scroll effects can skip UI on non-caster clients
2108:                                 psychicRemoteClient: !isCaster
2109:                             });
2110:                             wasInteractive = !!(result?.requiresSelection);
2111:                             // If the scroll is interactive but we're not the caster, the execute()
2112:                             // should have returned early (due to psychicRemoteClient flag) without
2113:                             // opening any UI. Treat as non-interactive so the queue advances immediately.
2114:                             if (wasInteractive && !isCaster) {
2115:                                 console.log(`🔮 Interactive scroll on non-caster client — advancing queue immediately (state synced via syncPlayerState)`);
2116:                                 wasInteractive = false;
2117:                             }
2118:                         }
2119:                     }
2120: 
2121:                     // Update activated elements (Psychic only counts as void, not the stolen scroll's elements)
2122:                     spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2123:                     const activated = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated;
2124:                     activated.add('void');
2125:                     console.log(`🔮 Psychic activated void for player ${playerIndex}:`, Array.from(activated));
2126:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
2127: 
2128:                     if (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2129:                         Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2130:                     }
2131: 
2132:                     const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2133:                     const displayName = scrollName ? (scrollName.replace(/_/g, ' ').toLowerCase()) : 'scroll';
2134:                     updateStatus(`🔮 ${playerName}'s Psychic triggered: activated ${displayName} (counts as void only).`);
2135: 
2136:                     if (activated.size === 5 && playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2137:                         spellSystem.showLevelComplete(playerIndex);
2138:                         if (typeof handleGameOver === 'function') {
2139:                             handleGameOver(playerIndex);
2140:                         }
2141:                     }
2142: 
2143:                     // For non-interactive scrolls, advance the queue immediately
2144:                     if (!wasInteractive) advance();
2145:                 };
2146: 
2147:                 gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'psychic-triggered' }, ({ payload }) => {
2148:                     console.log('📄 Received psychic-triggered:', payload);
2149:                     const { playerIndex, scrollName } = payload;
2150:                     if (typeof spellSystem === 'undefined') return;
2151: 
2152:                     // Enqueue and start processing if not already running
2153:                     psychicQueue.push({ playerIndex, scrollName });
2154:                     runNextPsychicTrigger();
2155:                 });
2156:             }
2157: 
2158:             // Listen for undo move events
2159:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'undo-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
2160:                 console.log('📄 Received undo move:', payload);
2161:                 const { playerIndex, x, y, apRestored } = payload;
2162: 
2163:                 // Visually move the player back
2164:                 movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, -apRestored); // Negative to show AP restored
2165: 
2166:                 // Note: AP update will come via player-state-update broadcast (from syncPlayerState)
2167:                 // which is sent right after the undo-move broadcast
2168: 
2169:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2170:                 updateStatus(`⟲ ${playerName} undid their move (restored ${apRestored} AP)`);
2171:             });
2172: 
2173:             // Listen for player state updates (AP and resources)
2174:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'player-state-update' }, ({ payload }) => {
2175:                 console.log('📄 Received player state update:', payload);
2176:                 const { playerIndex, currentAP, voidAP, resources } = payload;
2177: 
2178:                 // Update tracked state for this player
2179:                 if (!playerAPs[playerIndex]) {
2180:                     playerAPs[playerIndex] = { currentAP: 5, voidAP: 0 };
2181:                 }
2182:                 playerAPs[playerIndex].currentAP = currentAP;
2183:                 playerAPs[playerIndex].voidAP = voidAP;
2184: 
2185:                 // Update resources only when provided (null means sender is not the
2186:                 // active player and should not overwrite our own pool values)
2187:                 if (resources != null) {
2188:                     if (!playerPools[playerIndex]) {
2189:                         playerPools[playerIndex] = { earth: 0, water: 0, fire: 0, wind: 0, void: 0 };
2190:                     }
2191:                     Object.assign(playerPools[playerIndex], resources);
2192:                 }
2193:                 updateOpponentPanel(); // Update opponent panel when player state changes
2194:             });
2195: 
2196:             // Listen for scroll collection events (with deduplication)
2197:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-collected' }, ({ payload }) => {
2198:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll collection:', payload);
2199:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, shrineType, _seq, _timestamp } = payload;
2200: 
2201:                 // DEDUPLICATION: Check if we've already processed this event
2202:                 const eventId = `scroll-collected-${playerIndex}-${scrollName}-${_timestamp || Date.now()}`;
2203:                 if (receivedSequences.has(eventId)) {
2204:                     console.warn('⚠️  Duplicate scroll-collected event ignored:', eventId);
2205:                     return;
2206:                 }
2207:                 receivedSequences.add(eventId);
2208: 
2209:                 // Check if scroll is already in player's hand (idempotency check)
2210:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2211:                 if (spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].hand.has(scrollName)) {
2212:                     console.warn('⚠️  Scroll already in hand, skipping:', scrollName);
2213:                     return;
2214:                 }
2215: 
2216:                 // Remove from the deck (scroll was drawn by the other player)
2217:                 const deckIndex = spellSystem.scrollDecks[shrineType]?.indexOf(scrollName);
2218:                 if (deckIndex > -1) {
2219:                     spellSystem.scrollDecks[shrineType].splice(deckIndex, 1);
2220:                 } else {
2221:                     console.warn(`⚠️  Scroll ${scrollName} not found in ${shrineType} deck (might have been removed already)`);
2222:                 }
2223: 
2224:                 // Add to that player's hand
2225:                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
2226:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2227:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2228: 
2229:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2230:                 updateStatus(`${playerName} collected a ${shrineType} scroll!`);
2231:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2232:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2233:             });
2234: 
2235:             // Listen for Scholar's Insight (Void II) — remote player searched a deck
2236:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scholars-insight' }, ({ payload }) => {
2237:                 console.log("📄 Received Scholar's Insight:", payload);
2238:                 const { playerIndex, element, scrollName } = payload;
2239: 
2240:                 // Remove chosen scroll from the deck
2241:                 const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks[element];
2242:                 if (deck) {
2243:                     const idx = deck.indexOf(scrollName);
2244:                     if (idx > -1) {
2245:                         deck.splice(idx, 1);
2246:                     }
2247:                     // Shuffle the deck (same as the caster did)
2248:                     if (spellSystem.shuffleDeck) {
2249:                         spellSystem.shuffleDeck(deck);
2250:                     }
2251:                 }
2252: 
2253:                 // Add to that player's hand
2254:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2255:                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
2256:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2257:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2258: 
2259:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2260:                 updateStatus(`${playerName} used Scholar's Insight to search the ${element} deck!`);
2261:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2262:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2263:             });
2264: 
2265:             // Listen for Create (Void V) — remote player drew stones
2266:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'create-stones' }, ({ payload }) => {
2267:                 console.log('📄 Received Create stones:', payload);
2268:                 const { playerIndex, element, count } = payload;
2269: 
2270:                 // Update source pool (stones were drawn from source)
2271:                 if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined' && stonePools[element] !== undefined) {
2272:                     stonePools[element] = Math.max(0, stonePools[element] - count);
2273:                 }
2274: 
2275:                 // If this is OUR player, the stones are already drawn locally
2276:                 // For remote players, update their pool display
2277:                 if (playerIndex !== myPlayerIndex) {
2278:                     const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2279:                     updateStatus(`${playerName} used Create to draw ${count} ${element} stone${count === 1 ? '' : 's'}!`);
2280:                 } else {
2281:                     // Our action — already handled locally, just sync source pool
2282:                 }
2283: 
2284:                 if (typeof updateSourcePoolDisplay === 'function') updateSourcePoolDisplay();
2285:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2286:             });
2287: 
2288:             // Listen for Quick Reflexes deck search — remote player found a level 1 scroll
2289:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'quick-reflexes-search' }, ({ payload }) => {
2290:                 console.log('📄 Received Quick Reflexes search:', payload);
2291:                 const { playerIndex, element, scrollName, stonesDrawn, buffActive } = payload;
2292: 
2293:                 // Remove chosen scroll from that element's deck and shuffle
2294:                 const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks?.[element];
2295:                 if (deck) {
2296:                     const idx = deck.indexOf(scrollName);
2297:                     if (idx > -1) deck.splice(idx, 1);
2298:                     if (spellSystem.shuffleDeck) spellSystem.shuffleDeck(deck);
2299:                 }
2300: 
2301:                 // Add scroll to that player's hand
2302:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2303:                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
2304:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2305:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2306: 
2307:                 // Update source pool (stones were drawn from it)
2308:                 if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined' && stonePools[element] !== undefined) {
2309:                     stonePools[element] = Math.max(0, stonePools[element] - (stonesDrawn || 0));
2310:                 }
2311: 
2312:                 // Update remote player's stone pool display
2313:                 if (playerIndex !== myPlayerIndex) {
2314:                     if (!playerPools[playerIndex]) playerPools[playerIndex] = { earth: 0, water: 0, fire: 0, wind: 0, void: 0 };
2315:                     playerPools[playerIndex][element] = Math.min(5, (playerPools[playerIndex][element] || 0) + (stonesDrawn || 0));
2316:                 }
2317: 
2318:                 // Apply the quickReflexes buff on this client so that getSpellCost()
2319:                 // correctly prices level-1 scrolls at 0 AP during affordability checks
2320:                 // in the response window (canAnyPlayerRespond / canPlayerRespond).
2321:                 if (buffActive && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
2322:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.quickReflexes = {
2323:                         playerIndex: playerIndex
2324:                     };
2325:                     console.log(`⚡ Applied quickReflexes buff for player ${playerIndex} on remote client`);
2326:                 }
2327: 
2328:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2329:                 const scrollDef = spellSystem.patterns?.[scrollName];
2330:                 const displayName = scrollDef?.name || scrollName;
2331:                 updateStatus(`⚡ ${playerName} used Quick Reflexes: found "${displayName}", drew ${stonesDrawn || 0} ${element} stone${stonesDrawn === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
2332: 
2333:                 if (typeof updateSourcePoolDisplay === 'function') updateSourcePoolDisplay();
2334:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2335:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2336:             });
2337: 
2338:             // Listen for scroll move events (hand <-> active)
2339:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
2340:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll move:', payload);
2341:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, toLocation } = payload;
2342: 
2343:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2344:                 const scrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
2345:                 if (toLocation === 'active') {
2346:                     scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
2347:                     scrolls.active.add(scrollName);
2348:                     console.log(`📜 ${getPlayerColorName(playerIndex)} moved ${scrollName} to active area`);
2349:                 } else {
2350:                     scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
2351:                     scrolls.hand.add(scrollName);
2352:                     console.log(`📜 ${getPlayerColorName(playerIndex)} moved ${scrollName} back to hand`);
2353:                 }
2354:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2355:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2356:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2357:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2358:             });
2359:

2364: 
2365:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2366:                 const scrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
2367:                 scrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
2368:                 scrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
2369:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2370:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
