2372:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2373:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2374:             });
2375: 
2376:             // Listen for common area updates
2377:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'common-area-update' }, ({ payload }) => {
2378:                 console.log('📄 Received common area update:', payload);
2379:                 const { element, scrollName, replacedScroll, _timestamp } = payload;
2380: 
2381:                 // DEDUPLICATION: Check if we've already processed this event
2382:                 const eventId = `common-area-${element}-${scrollName}-${_timestamp || Date.now()}`;
2383:                 if (receivedSequences.has(eventId)) {
2384:                     console.warn('⚠️  Duplicate common-area-update event ignored:', eventId);
2385:                     return;
2386:                 }
2387:                 receivedSequences.add(eventId);
2388: 
2389:                 // IDEMPOTENCY: Check if common area already has this scroll
2390:                 if (spellSystem.commonArea[element] === scrollName) {
2391:                     console.warn('⚠️  Common area already has this scroll, skipping update');
2392:                     return;
2393:                 }
2394: 
2395:                 // If there was a scroll being replaced, put it back in the deck
2396:                 if (replacedScroll) {
2397:                     // Check if it's not already in the deck (avoid duplicates)
2398:                     if (!spellSystem.scrollDecks[element]?.includes(replacedScroll)) {
2399:                         spellSystem.scrollDecks[element].push(replacedScroll);
2400:                         console.log(`📜 Common area: ${replacedScroll} returned to deck`);
2401:                     } else {
2402:                         console.warn(`⚠️  ${replacedScroll} already in deck, not adding again`);
2403:                     }
2404:                 }
2405: 
2406:                 spellSystem.commonArea[element] = scrollName;
2407:                 console.log(`📜 Common area: ${scrollName} now in ${element} slot`);
2408:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2409:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2410: 
2411:                 if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
2412:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2413:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2414:             });
2415: 
2416:             // Response window events for scroll responses
2417:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'response-window-opened' }, ({ payload }) => {
2418:                 console.log('📄 Received response window opened:', payload);
2419:                 const { scrollName, casterIndex, commonArea: commonAreaSnapshot } = payload;
2420: 
2421:                 // Only show response window if I'm NOT the caster
2422:                 if (myPlayerIndex !== casterIndex && spellSystem.responseWindow) {
2423:                     // Apply the common area snapshot from the caster's client before
2424:                     // checking canPlayerRespond — prevents a race condition where a
2425:                     // preceding common-area-update (e.g. Psychic moving there) hasn't
2426:                     // arrived yet, causing the response check to miss available scrolls.
2427:                     if (commonAreaSnapshot) {
2428:                         const elements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void', 'catacomb'];
2429:                         elements.forEach(el => {
2430:                             const incomingScroll = commonAreaSnapshot[el] ?? null;
2431:                             if (spellSystem.commonArea[el] !== incomingScroll) {
2432:                                 console.log(`📜 Applying common area snapshot: ${el} = ${incomingScroll}`);
2433:                                 spellSystem.commonArea[el] = incomingScroll;
2434:                             }
2435:                         });
2436:                     }
2437: 
2438:                     const scrollDef = spellSystem.patterns[scrollName];
2439:                     const scrollData = { name: scrollName, spell: scrollDef };
2440: 
2441:                     // Show the response window for this player
2442:                     spellSystem.responseWindow.showResponseModalForOtherPlayer(scrollData, casterIndex);
2443:                 }
2444:             });
2445: 
2446:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'response-pass' }, ({ payload }) => {
2447:                 console.log('📄 Received response pass:', payload);
2448:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
2449: 
2450:                 // Update response window state
2451:                 if (spellSystem.responseWindow) {
2452:                     spellSystem.responseWindow.handleRemotePass(playerIndex);
2453:                 }
2454:             });
2455: 
2456:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-response' }, ({ payload }) => {
2457:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll response:', payload);
2458:                 const { scrollName, playerIndex, isCounter } = payload;
2459: 
2460:                 // Update response window state
2461:                 if (spellSystem.responseWindow) {
2462:                     spellSystem.responseWindow.handleRemoteResponse(scrollName, playerIndex, isCounter);
2463:                 }
2464:             });
2465: 
2466:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-countered' }, ({ payload }) => {
2467:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll countered:', payload);
2468:                 const { scrollName, casterIndex } = payload;
2469:                 updateStatus(`${getPlayerColorName(casterIndex)}'s scroll was countered!`);
2470:             });
2471: 
2472:             // Cascade forfeit: active player timed out with an unresolved scroll cascade
2473:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'cascade-forfeit' }, ({ payload }) => {
2474:                 console.log('📄 Received cascade-forfeit:', payload);
2475:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
2476:                 const playerName = getPlayerColorName(playerIndex);
2477:                 updateStatus(`⏰ ${playerName} ran out of time with an unresolved scroll cascade — they forfeit!`);
2478:             });
2479: 
2480:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'response-resolved' }, ({ payload }) => {
2481:                 console.log('📄 Received response resolved:', payload);
2482:                 // Close the response window on this client
2483:                 if (spellSystem.responseWindow) {
2484:                     spellSystem.responseWindow.handleRemoteResolved();
2485:                 }
2486: 
2487:                 // Process response scroll effects (like Unbidden Lamplight / Reflect)
2488:                 if (payload.results && payload.triggeringScroll) {
2489:                     for (const result of payload.results) {
2490:                         if (result.result === 'response-resolved' && result.isResponse) {
2491:                             console.log(`ℹ️ Processing remote response scroll: ${result.scrollName}`);
2492:                             // Only execute the response scroll effect on the RESPONDER's client.
2493:                             // The responder's client owns the pools/decks that need modifying.
2494:                             if (spellSystem.scrollEffects && result.casterIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2495:                                 const scrollDef = spellSystem.patterns?.[result.scrollName];
2496:                                 // Ensure triggeringScroll has its definition (resolve from
2497:                                 // broadcast payload or local patterns)
2498:                                 const trigScroll = { ...payload.triggeringScroll };
2499:                                 if (!trigScroll.definition && trigScroll.name) {
2500:                                     trigScroll.definition = spellSystem.patterns?.[trigScroll.name];
2501:                                 }
2502:                                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(result.scrollName, result.casterIndex, {
2503:                                     spell: scrollDef,
2504:                                     triggeringScroll: trigScroll
2505:                                 });
2506: 
2507:                                 // Track activated element for win condition (response scrolls count too!)
2508:                                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(result.casterIndex);
2509:                                 const activatedEls = (scrollDef?.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef?.patterns?.[0])
2510:                                     ? [...new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
2511:                                     : scrollDef?.element ? [scrollDef.element] : [];
2512:                                 activatedEls.forEach(el => {
2513:                                     spellSystem.playerScrolls[result.casterIndex].activated.add(el);
2514:                                 });
2515:                                 if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
2516:                                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(result.casterIndex);
2517:                                 }
2518: 
2519:                                 // Broadcast activation so the caster's client (and any others)
2520:                                 // updates this player's shrine win-condition symbols
2521:                                 if (activatedEls.length > 0 && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2522:                                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
2523:                                         playerIndex: result.casterIndex,
2524:                                         scrollName: result.scrollName,
2525:                                         effectName: scrollDef?.name || result.scrollName,
2526:                                         element: scrollDef?.element,
2527:                                         activatedElements: activatedEls
2528:                                     });
2529:                                 }
2530:                             } else {
2531:                                 console.log(`ℹ️ Skipping response effect for ${result.scrollName} (responder is player ${result.casterIndex}, I am ${myPlayerIndex})`);
2532:                             }
2533:                         } else if (result.result === 'countered-original') {
2534:                             // Counter scroll (like Psychic) — execute its effect on this
2535:                             // client so the counter-caster gets psychicPending / buffs set.
2536:                             console.log(`ℹ️ Processing remote counter scroll: ${result.scrollName}, counter-caster: ${result.casterIndex}`);
2537:                             if (spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
2538:                                 const scrollDef = spellSystem.patterns?.[result.scrollName];
2539:                                 const trigScroll = { ...payload.triggeringScroll };
2540:                                 if (!trigScroll.definition && trigScroll.name) {
2541:                                     trigScroll.definition = spellSystem.patterns?.[trigScroll.name];
2542:                                 }
2543:                                 spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(result.scrollName, result.casterIndex, {
2544:                                     spell: scrollDef,
2545:                                     scrollName: result.scrollName,
2546:                                     triggeringScroll: trigScroll
2547:                                 });
2548:                                 // Clear pendingForceCommonArea — the caster's client
2549:                                 // already called discardToCommonArea and broadcast the
2550:                                 // common-area-update, so we must NOT call it again here.
2551:                                 if (spellSystem.scrollEffects.pendingForceCommonArea?.scrollName === result.scrollName) {
2552:                                     delete spellSystem.scrollEffects.pendingForceCommonArea;
2553:                                 }
2554:                             }
2555:                             // If this is MY counter scroll, remove it from my active scrolls.
2556:                             // (The common area update arrives separately via common-area-update broadcast.)
2557:                             if (result.casterIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2558:                                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(myPlayerIndex);
2559:                                 const myScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[myPlayerIndex];
2560:                                 if (myScrolls.active.has(result.scrollName)) {
2561:                                     myScrolls.active.delete(result.scrollName);
2562:                                     console.log(`📜 Removed ${result.scrollName} from my active scrolls (counter sent to common area)`);
2563:                                 }
2564:                                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2565:                             }
2566:                         }
2567:                     }
2568:                 }
2569:             });
2570: 
2571:             // Listen for tile swap events (Shifting Sands scroll effect)
2572:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'tile-swap' }, ({ payload }) => {
2573:                 console.log('📄 Received tile swap:', payload);
2574:                 const { tile1Id, tile2Id, tile1NewPos, tile2NewPos } = payload;
2575: 
2576:                 const tile1 = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tile1Id);
2577:                 const tile2 = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tile2Id);
2578: 
2579:                 if (tile1 && tile2) {
2580:                     // Update positions
2581:                     tile1.x = tile1NewPos.x;
2582:                     tile1.y = tile1NewPos.y;
2583:                     tile2.x = tile2NewPos.x;
2584:                     tile2.y = tile2NewPos.y;
2585: 
2586:                     // Update visuals
2587:                     if (tile1.element) {
2588:                         tile1.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile1.x}, ${tile1.y}) rotate(${tile1.rotation || 0})`);
2589:                     }
2590:                     if (tile2.element) {
2591:                         tile2.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile2.x}, ${tile2.y}) rotate(${tile2.rotation || 0})`);
2592:                     }
2593: 
2594:                     updateStatus('Tiles were swapped by Shifting Sands!');
2595:                 }
2596:             });
2597: 
2598:             // Listen for Telekinesis tile moves (Void III)
2599:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'telekinesis-move' }, ({ payload }) => {
2600:                 console.log('📄 Received telekinesis move:', payload);
2601:                 const { tileId, newPos, movedPlayers } = payload;
2602: 
2603:                 const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
2604:                 if (tile) {
2605:                     tile.x = newPos.x;
2606:                     tile.y = newPos.y;
2607:                     if (tile.element) {
2608:                         tile.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${newPos.x}, ${newPos.y}) rotate(${tile.rotation || 0})`);
2609:                     }
2610:                 }
2611: 
2612:                 // Move players that were on the tile
2613:                 if (movedPlayers && movedPlayers.length > 0) {
2614:                     movedPlayers.forEach(mp => {
2615:                         if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
2616:                             movePlayerVisually(mp.playerIndex, mp.newX, mp.newY, 0);
2617:                         } else if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
2618:                             window.movePlayerVisually(mp.playerIndex, mp.newX, mp.newY, 0);
2619:                         }
2620:                     });
2621:                 }
2622: 
2623:                 // Refresh catacomb indicators in case shrine positions changed
2624:                 if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') {
2625:                     updateCatacombIndicators();
2626:                 }
2627: 
2628:                 updateStatus('A tile was moved by Telekinesis!');
2629:             });
2630: 
2631:             // Listen for tile hide events (Heavy Stomp scroll effect)
2632:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'tile-hide' }, ({ payload }) => {
2633:                 console.log('📄 Received tile hide:', payload);
2634:                 const { tileId } = payload;
2635: 
2636:                 const tile = placedTiles.find(t => t.id === tileId);
2637:                 if (tile && !tile.flipped) {
2638:                     recreateTileAsFlipped(tile);
2639:                     updateStatus(`${tile.shrineType} shrine was hidden by Heavy Stomp!`);
2640:                 }
2641:             });
2642: 
2643:             // Note: scroll-effect handling (activated tracking, symbols, win check, status) is
2644:             // handled by the earlier scroll-effect listener above. No duplicate handler here.
2645: 
2646:             // Listen for Arson stone destruction on opponent's client
2647:             // Listen for Plunder scroll events (Catacomb Scroll 8)
2648:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-plundered' }, ({ payload }) => {
2649:                 console.log('📄 Received scroll-plundered:', payload);
2650:                 const { casterIndex, targetIndex, scrollName } = payload;
2651: 
2652:                 // Remove the scroll from the target's active area
2653:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(targetIndex);
2654:                 const targetScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[targetIndex];
2655:                 if (targetScrolls) {
2656:                     targetScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
2657:                 }
2658: 
2659:                 // Common area update is handled by the separate common-area-update broadcast
2660:                 spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2661:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2662:                 updateOpponentPanel();
2663:                 if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2664: 
2665:                 // If I'm the target, notify me
2666:                 if (targetIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2667:                     const scrollDef = SCROLL_DEFINITIONS?.[scrollName];
2668:                     const scrollDisplayName = scrollDef?.name || scrollName;
2669:                     const casterName = getPlayerColorName(casterIndex);
2670:                     updateStatus(`🏴‍☠️ ${casterName} used Plunder: sent your ${scrollDisplayName} to the common area!`);
2671:                     // Refresh my scroll UI
2672:                     Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2673:                 }
2674:             });
2675: 
2676:             // Listen for Excavate teleport events (Catacomb Scroll 4)
2677:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'excavate-teleport' }, ({ payload }) => {
2678:                 console.log('📄 Received excavate-teleport:', payload);
2679:                 const { playerIndex, x, y } = payload;
2680:                 if (typeof movePlayerVisually === 'function') {
2681:                     movePlayerVisually(playerIndex, x, y, 0);
2682:                 } else {
2683:                     const target = playerPositions[playerIndex];
2684:                     if (target) {
2685:                         target.x = x;
2686:                         target.y = y;
2687:                         if (target.element) {
2688:                             target.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${x}, ${y})`);
2689:                         }
2690:                     }
2691:                 }
2692:                 console.log(`⛏️ Excavate teleport: player ${playerIndex} to (${x.toFixed(1)}, ${y.toFixed(1)})`);
2693:             });
2694: 
2695:             // Listen for Excavate immunity buff (so other clients know player is immune)
2696:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'excavate-immunity' }, ({ payload }) => {
2697:                 console.log('📄 Received excavate-immunity:', payload);
2698:                 const { playerIndex } = payload;
2699:                 if (spellSystem?.scrollEffects) {
2700:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.excavate = {
2701:                         playerIndex: playerIndex
2702:                     };
2703:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.excavateTeleport = {
2704:                         playerIndex: playerIndex
2705:                     };
2706:                 }
2707:             });
2708: 
2709:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'opponent-stone-destroyed' }, ({ payload }) => {
2710:                 console.log('📄 Received opponent-stone-destroyed:', payload);
2711:                 const { opponentIndex, stoneType } = payload;
2712: 
2713:                 // Update the local pool for the targeted player
2714:                 if (playerPools[opponentIndex] && playerPools[opponentIndex][stoneType] > 0) {
2715:                     playerPools[opponentIndex][stoneType]--;
2716:                 }
2717: 
2718:                 // If I'm the targeted opponent, refresh my stone UI
2719:                 if (opponentIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2720:                     Object.keys(stoneCounts).forEach(updateStoneCount);
2721:                     const casterName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
2722:                     updateStatus(`🔥 ${casterName} used Arson: destroyed 1 ${stoneType} stone from your pool!`);
2723:                 }
2724: 
2725:                 if (typeof updateOpponentPanel === 'function') updateOpponentPanel();
2726:             });
2727: 
2728:             // Listen for scroll-used: handles scroll disposition on remote clients
2729:             // Specifically needed for scrolls like Arson that force themselves to common area
2730:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-used' }, ({ payload }) => {
2731:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, fromCommonArea, forceToCommonArea } = payload;
2732:                 if (!forceToCommonArea) return; // Only act when a scroll forces itself to common area
2733:                 if (playerIndex === myPlayerIndex) return; // Caster already handled it locally
2734: 
2735:                 spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2736:                 const playerScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
2737:                 if (playerScrolls && playerScrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
2738:                     playerScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
2739:                     console.log(`📜 Remote scroll-used: moved ${scrollName} from player ${playerIndex}'s active to common area`);
2740:                 }
2741:                 spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
2742:                 spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2743:                 if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
2744:             });
2745: 
2746:             // Listen for water stone transformation (Control the Current - Water V)
2747:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'water-stone-transformed' }, ({ payload }) => {
2748:                 console.log('📄 Received water-stone-transformed:', payload);
2749:                 const { stoneX, stoneY, newElement } = payload;
2750: 
2751:                 // Find the stone at this location
2752:                 if (typeof placedStones !== 'undefined' && typeof STONE_TYPES !== 'undefined') {
2753:                     const stone = placedStones.find(s =>
2754:                         Math.abs(s.x - stoneX) < 1 && Math.abs(s.y - stoneY) < 1
2755:                     );
2756: 
2757:                     if (stone && stone.element && STONE_TYPES[newElement]) {
2758:                         // Update stone type
2759:                         stone.type = newElement;
2760: 
2761:                         // Remove any water stone indicators (mimicry/chain rings) before transformation
2762:                         const mimicryIndicator = stone.element.querySelector('.mimicry-indicator');
2763:                         if (mimicryIndicator) {
2764:                             mimicryIndicator.remove();
2765:                         }
2766:                         const chainIndicator = stone.element.querySelector('.chain-indicator');
2767:                         if (chainIndicator) {
2768:                             chainIndicator.remove();
2769:                         }
2770: 
2771:                         // Update visual appearance - update both color and symbol
2772:                         const circle = stone.element.querySelector('circle');
2773:                         const text = stone.element.querySelector('text');
2774: 
2775:                         if (circle) {
2776:                             circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[newElement].color);
2777:                         }
2778: 
2779:                         if (text) {
2780:                             text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[newElement].symbol;
2781:                         }
2782: 
2783:                         console.log(`🌀 Transformed water stone at (${stoneX.toFixed(1)}, ${stoneY.toFixed(1)}) to ${newElement}`);
2784:                     } else {
2785:                         console.warn(`⚠️ Could not find stone at (${stoneX}, ${stoneY}) to transform`);
2786:                     }
2787:                 }
2788:             });
2789: 
2790:             // Listen for stones destroyed (Combust - Catacomb X)
2791:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'stones-destroyed' }, ({ payload }) => {
2792:                 console.log('📄 Received stones-destroyed:', payload);
2793:                 const { tileId, stoneIds } = payload;
2794: 
2795:                 // Remove the destroyed stones from the board
2796:                 if (typeof placedStones !== 'undefined' && stoneIds && stoneIds.length > 0) {
2797:                     stoneIds.forEach(stoneId => {
2798:                         const stoneIndex = placedStones.findIndex(s => s.id === stoneId);
2799:                         if (stoneIndex !== -1) {
2800:                             const stone = placedStones[stoneIndex];
2801: 
2802:                             // Remove visual element
2803:                             if (stone.element && stone.element.parentNode) {
2804:                                 stone.element.parentNode.removeChild(stone.element);
2805:                             }
2806: 
2807:                             // Remove from array
2808:                             placedStones.splice(stoneIndex, 1);
2809:                             console.log(`💥 Removed stone ${stoneId} from board`);
2810:                         }
2811:                     });
2812: 
2813:                     console.log(`🔥 Combust destroyed ${stoneIds.length} stone${stoneIds.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} on tile ${tileId}`);
2814:                 }
2815:             });
2816: 
2817:             // Listen for periodic turn sync from host (for desync recovery)
2818:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'turn-sync' }, ({ payload }) => {
2819:                 const { playerIndex, turnNumber, turnStartedAt } = payload;
2820: 
2821:                 // Check if we're desynced
2822:                 if (activePlayerIndex !== playerIndex) {
2823:                     console.warn(`⚠️ DESYNC CORRECTED: Local activePlayerIndex was ${activePlayerIndex}, host says ${playerIndex}`);
2824:                     activePlayerIndex = playerIndex;
2825:                     updateTurnDisplay();
2826:                 }
2827: 
2828:                 if (typeof turnNumber === 'number' && lastReceivedTurnNumber !== turnNumber) {
2829:                     console.warn(`⚠️ DESYNC CORRECTED: Local turn was ${lastReceivedTurnNumber}, host says ${turnNumber}`);
2830:                     lastReceivedTurnNumber = turnNumber;
2831:                 }
2832: 
2833:                 if (turnStartedAt && Math.abs(turnStartedAtMs - turnStartedAt) > 2000) {
2834:                     console.warn(`⚠️ Turn timer desync corrected (diff: ${Math.abs(turnStartedAtMs - turnStartedAt)}ms)`);
2835:                     turnStartedAtMs = turnStartedAt;
2836:                 }
2837:             });
2838: 
2839:             // Listen for periodic common area sync from host (for desync recovery)
2840:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'common-area-sync' }, ({ payload }) => {
2841:                 const { commonArea } = payload;
2842: 
2843:                 if (!commonArea || typeof spellSystem === 'undefined') return;
2844: 
2845:                 // Compare and auto-correct any differences
2846:                 let corrected = false;
2847:                 Object.keys(commonArea).forEach(element => {
2848:                     const hostScroll = commonArea[element];
2849:                     const localScroll = spellSystem.commonArea[element];
2850: 
2851:                     if (hostScroll !== localScroll) {
2852:                         console.warn(`⚠️ COMMON AREA DESYNC CORRECTED: ${element} slot was "${localScroll}", host says "${hostScroll}"`);
2853:                         spellSystem.commonArea[element] = hostScroll;
2854:                         corrected = true;
2855:                     }
2856:                 });
2857: 
2858:                 if (corrected) {
2859:                     // Update UI after corrections
2860:                     if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
2861:                     if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2862:                     spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2863:                     spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
2864:                 }
2865:             });
2866: 
2867:             // Listen for Reflect buff applied (passive buff for next turn)
2868:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'reflect-buff-applied' }, ({ payload }) => {
2869:                 console.log('📄 Received reflect-buff-applied:', payload);
2870:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, scrollDefinition } = payload;
2871: 
2872:                 // Apply the Reflect buff to the spell system (push to array)
2873:                 if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
2874:                     if (!Array.isArray(spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.reflectPending)) {
2875:                         spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.reflectPending = [];
2876:                     }
2877:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.reflectPending.push({
2878:                         playerIndex: playerIndex,
2879:                         scrollName: scrollName,
2880:                         definition: scrollDefinition
2881:                     });
2882:                     console.log(`🛡️ Reflect buff applied to player ${playerIndex}: will reflect "${scrollName}" on their next turn`);
2883:                 }
2884:             });
2885: 
2886:             // Listen for Psychic buff applied (passive buff for next turn)
2887:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'psychic-buff-applied' }, ({ payload }) => {
2888:                 console.log('📄 Received psychic-buff-applied:', payload);
2889:                 const { playerIndex, scrollName, scrollDefinition } = payload;
2890: 
2891:                 // Apply the Psychic buff to the spell system (push to array)
2892:                 if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
2893:                     if (!Array.isArray(spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.psychicPending)) {
2894:                         spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.psychicPending = [];
2895:                     }
2896:                     spellSystem.scrollEffects.activeBuffs.psychicPending.push({
2897:                         playerIndex: playerIndex,
2898:                         scrollName: scrollName,
2899:                         definition: scrollDefinition
2900:                     });
2901:                     console.log(`🔮 Psychic buff applied to player ${playerIndex}: will activate "${scrollName}" at start of their next turn`);
2902:                 }
2903:             });
2904: 
2905:             // Listen for scroll state sync from host (authoritative source)
2906:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-state-sync' }, ({ payload }) => {
2907:                 if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.applyScrollStateSnapshot) {
2908:                     const corrected = spellSystem.applyScrollStateSnapshot(payload.snapshot);
2909:                     // Only log if corrections were made
2910:                     if (corrected) {
2911:                         console.log('📊 Scroll state synchronized with host (corrections applied)');
2912:                     }
2913:                 }
2914:             });
2915: 
2916:             // Listen for scroll state sync requests (from clients who detected issues)
2917:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'scroll-state-sync-request' }, ({ payload }) => {
2918:                 // Only host responds to sync requests
2919:                 if (myPlayerIndex === 0 && typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined') {
2920:                     console.log(`⚠️  Sync request from player ${payload.playerIndex} - sending authoritative state`);
2921:                     const snapshot = spellSystem.getScrollStateSnapshot();
2922:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-state-sync', { snapshot });
2923:                 }
2924:             });
2925: 
2926:             // Aggressive scroll state validation and sync (every 3 seconds)
2927:             setInterval(() => {
2928:                 if (!isMultiplayer || !spellSystem) return;
2929: 
2930:                 // Validate current state (only logs if errors found)
2931:                 const hasErrors = spellSystem.validateScrollState();
2932: 
2933:                 // If I'm the host (player 0), broadcast authoritative state
2934:                 if (myPlayerIndex === 0) {
2935:                     const snapshot = spellSystem.getScrollStateSnapshot();
2936:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-state-sync', { snapshot });
2937:                 }
2938: 
2939:                 // If errors found and I'm not the host, immediately request sync
2940:                 if (hasErrors && myPlayerIndex !== 0) {
2941:                     console.warn('⚠️  Errors detected - immediately requesting sync from host');
2942:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-state-sync-request', { playerIndex: myPlayerIndex });
2943:                 }
2944:             }, 3000); // Every 3 seconds (more aggressive)
2945: 
2946:             // Listen for game reset (placement timeout or other critical errors)
2947:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'game-reset' }, ({ payload }) => {
2948:                 console.log('📄 Received game-reset:', payload);
2949:                 const { reason, kickedPlayerIndex } = payload;
2950: 
2951:                 // If I'm the kicked player, skip this - I'll handle it via DELETE event
2952:                 if (typeof kickedPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && kickedPlayerIndex === myPlayerIndex) {
2953:                     console.log('⏰ I am the kicked player - waiting for DELETE event to handle reset');
2954:                     return;
2955:                 }
2956: 
2957:                 if (reason === 'placement-timeout') {
2958:                     const kickedPlayerName = typeof kickedPlayerIndex !== 'undefined'
2959:                         ? getPlayerColorName(kickedPlayerIndex)
2960:                         : 'A player';
2961:                     updateStatus(`⏰ ${kickedPlayerName} timed out during tile placement — returning to lobby`);
2962:                 } else {
2963:                     updateStatus('🔄 Game reset — returning to lobby');
2964:                 }
2965: 
2966:                 // Reset to lobby (for non-kicked players)
2967:                 if (typeof resetToLobby === 'function') {
2968:                     setTimeout(() => {
2969:                         resetToLobby();
2970:                         // Refresh player list to show updated lobby without the kicked player
2971:                         if (typeof refreshPlayerList === 'function') {
2972:                             refreshPlayerList();
2973:                         }
2974:                     }, 1000);
2975:                 }
2976:             });
2977: 
2978:             // ── Emoji reactions ──────────────────────────────────────────
2979:             // Received when another player fires an emoji.
2980:             // Show it floating above their pawn on every client except the sender
2981:             // (sender already called showEmojiOverPawn locally before broadcasting).
2982:             gameChannel.on('broadcast', { event: 'emoji' }, ({ payload }) => {
2983:                 const { playerIndex, display, isText } = payload;
2984:                 if (typeof window.emojiSystem !== 'undefined') {
2985:                     window.emojiSystem.showEmojiOverPawn(playerIndex, display, !!isText);
2986:                 }
2987:             });
2988: 
2989:             // Subscribe to the channel
2990:             gameChannel.subscribe((status) => {
2991:                 if (status === 'SUBSCRIBED') {
2992:                     console.log('✅ Connected to game broadcast channel');
2993:                 }
2994:             });
2995:         }

2997:         // ----------------------------------------------------------------
2998:         // Multiplayer hooks called by game-core.js
2999:         // ----------------------------------------------------------------
3000: 
3001:         // Called by game-core.js executeMovement() after a successful move.
3002:         // game-ui.js drag/tap handlers broadcast directly, but game-core.js uses
3003:         // this function as a named hook so it is safe to define it once here.
3004:         function broadcastPlayerMovement(playerIndex, x, y, apSpent) {
3005:             broadcastGameAction('player-move', { playerIndex, x, y, apSpent });
3006:         }
3007: 
3008:         // Called by game-core.js executeMovement() after landing on a hex.
3009:         // Mirrors the tile-reveal logic in game-ui.js drag/tap handlers so that
3010:         // the game-core.js movement path also reveals hidden tiles correctly.
3011:         function handlePlayerLanding(x, y) {
3012:             if (typeof getAllHexagonPositions !== 'function' || typeof placedTiles === 'undefined') return;
3013:             const allHexes = getAllHexagonPositions();
3014:             let nearestHex = null;
3015:             let nearestDist = Infinity;
3016:             allHexes.forEach(hexPos => {
3017:                 const d = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(hexPos.x - x, 2) + Math.pow(hexPos.y - y, 2));
3018:                 if (d < nearestDist) { nearestDist = d; nearestHex = hexPos; }
3019:             });
3020:             if (nearestHex && nearestDist < 5 && nearestHex.tiles) {
3021:                 nearestHex.tiles
3022:                     .filter(t => t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile)
3023:                     .forEach(t => {
3024:                         if (typeof revealTile === 'function') revealTile(t.id);
3025:                     });
3026:             }
3027:         }

3034:             if (typeof stopTurnTimerMonitoring === 'function') {

3037:

3039:             if (typeof clearBoard === 'function') {
3040:                 clearBoard(true);
3041:             }
3042: 
3043:             // Reset viewport to default position
3044:             if (typeof viewportX !== 'undefined') viewportX = 0;
3045:             if (typeof viewportY !== 'undefined') viewportY = 0;
3046:             if (typeof viewportScale !== 'undefined') viewportScale = 1;
3047:             if (typeof updateViewport === 'function') {

3059:             if (endTurnBtn) endTurnBtn.style.display = 'none';

3080:         // Broadcast a game action to all other players
3081:         function broadcastGameAction(event, payload) {
3082:             if (!gameChannel || !isMultiplayer) return;
3083: 
3084:             // Add sequence number for scroll-related events to detect out-of-order delivery
3085:             const isScrollEvent = event.includes('scroll') || event.includes('shrine') || event.includes('common-area');
3086:             if (isScrollEvent) {
3087:                 scrollEventSequence++;
3088:                 payload._seq = scrollEventSequence;
3089:                 payload._timestamp = Date.now();
3090:             }
3091: 
3092:             gameChannel.send({
3093:                 type: 'broadcast',
3094:                 event: event,
3095:                 payload: payload
3096:             });
3097:         }

3230:         // Mobile UI initialization and tab switching
3231:         function initializeMobileUI() {
3232:             const tabButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-tab-btn');
3233:             const tilesPanel = document.getElementById('mobile-tiles-panel');
3234:             const stonesPanel = document.getElementById('mobile-stones-panel');
3235:             let currentTab = 'tiles';
3236: 
3237:             // Tab switching logic
3238:             tabButtons.forEach(btn => {
3239:                 btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
3240:                     const tab = btn.dataset.tab;
3241: 
3242:                     // Update active tab button
3243:                     tabButtons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
3244:                     btn.classList.add('active');
3245: 
3246:                     // Show/hide panels
3247:                     if (tab === 'tiles') {
3248:                         tilesPanel.classList.add('active');
3249:                         stonesPanel.classList.remove('active');
3250:                         currentTab = 'tiles';
3251:                         syncMobileTileDeck();
3252:                     } else {
3253:                         stonesPanel.classList.add('active');
3254:                         tilesPanel.classList.remove('active');
3255:                         currentTab = 'stones';
3256:                         syncMobileStoneDeck();
3257:                     }
3258:                 });
3259:             });
3260: 
3261:             // Swipe gesture for tab switching
3262:             let touchStartX = 0;
3263:             let touchEndX = 0;
3264: 
3265:             const mobileContainer = document.querySelector('.mobile-deck-container');
3266: 
3267:             mobileContainer.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
3268:                 touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
3269:             }, { passive: true });
3270: 
3271:             mobileContainer.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
3272:                 touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
3273:                 handleSwipe();
3274:             }, { passive: true });
3275: 
3276:             function handleSwipe() {
3277:                 const swipeThreshold = 50;
3278:                 const diff = touchStartX - touchEndX;
3279: 
3280:                 if (Math.abs(diff) > swipeThreshold) {
3281:                     if (diff > 0 && currentTab === 'tiles') {
3282:                         // Swiped left - switch to stones
3283:                         tabButtons[1].click();
3284:                     } else if (diff < 0 && currentTab === 'stones') {
3285:                         // Swiped right - switch to tiles
3286:                         tabButtons[0].click();
3287:                     }
3288:                 }
3289:             }
3290: 
3291:             // Initialize with tiles tab active
3292:             syncMobileTileDeck();
3293:             syncMobileStoneDeck();
3294:         }
3295:

3297:         // Programmatically open a mobile deck tab (tiles/stones)
3298:         function openMobileTab(tab) {
3299:             if (!isMobile) return;
3300:             const tabButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-tab-btn');
3301:             const tilesPanel = document.getElementById('mobile-tiles-panel');
3302:             const stonesPanel = document.getElementById('mobile-stones-panel');
3303: 
3304:             tabButtons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
3305:             const btn = Array.from(tabButtons).find(b => b.dataset.tab === tab);
3306:             if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
3307: 
3308:             if (tab === 'tiles') {
3309:                 tilesPanel.classList.add('active');
3310:                 stonesPanel.classList.remove('active');
3311:                 syncMobileTileDeck();
3312:             } else {
3313:                 stonesPanel.classList.add('active');
3314:                 tilesPanel.classList.remove('active');
3315:                 syncMobileStoneDeck();
3316:             }
3317:         }

3371:                     </svg>

3373:                     <div class="source-count">${stoneCounts[type]}/${Object.keys(shuffledDeck).filter(key => shuffledDeck[key].stoneType === type).length}</div>
3374:                 `;

3388:                     const screenY = coords.y - rect.top;

3394:

3396:                     circle.setAttribute('cx', 0);
3397:                     circle.setAttribute('cy', 0);
3398:                     circle.setAttribute('r', STONE_SIZE);
3399:                     circle.setAttribute('class', 'stone-piece');
3400:                     circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[type].color);
3401: 
3402:                     const text = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
3403:                     text.setAttribute('x', 0);
3404:                     text.setAttribute('y', 0);
3405:                     text.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
3406:                     text.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
3407:                     text.setAttribute('fill', '#fff');
3408:                     text.setAttribute('font-size', '14');
3409:                     text.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');

  9: // Multiplayer state
 10: let myPlayerId = null;
 11: let myPlayerIndex = null;
 12: let totalPlayers = 0; // Total number of players in the game
 13: let playerTilesPlaced = new Set(); // Track which player indices have placed tiles
 14: let isPlacementPhase = false;
 15: // Mobile deck initial state is set later after isMobile is computed
 16: let allPlayersData = []; // Store all player data from database (id, player_index, color, username)
 17: 
 18: // Multi-room state
 19: let currentGameId = null;    // ID of the game_room row we have joined
 20: let currentJoinCode = null;  // 6-char code for private rooms, null for public games
