 23: let currentTurnNumber = 0; // Increments with each turn change (for desync detection)
 24: let lastReceivedTurnNumber = 0; // Last turn number received from broadcast
 25: 
 26: // Helper function to get player display name (Username (Color))
 27: function getPlayerColorName(playerIndex) {
 28:     const colorNames = {
 29:         'purple': 'Purple',
 30:         'yellow': 'Yellow',
 31:         'red': 'Red',
 32:         'blue': 'Blue',
 33:         'green': 'Green'
 34:     };
 35: 
 36:     let username = null;
 37:     let colorName = null;
 38: 
 39:     // Try to get from database player data first
 40:     if (allPlayersData.length > 0) {
 41:         const player = allPlayersData.find(p => p.player_index === playerIndex);
 42:         if (player) {
 43:             username = player.username;
 44:             if (player.color) {
 45:                 colorName = colorNames[player.color] || player.color;
 46:             }
 47:         }
 48:     }
 49: 
 50:     // Fallback to playerPositions if player tile is placed
 51:     if (!colorName && typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[playerIndex]) {
 52:         const hexColorNames = {
 53:             '#9458f4': 'Purple',
 54:             '#ffce00': 'Yellow',
 55:             '#ed1b43': 'Red',
 56:             '#5894f4': 'Blue',
 57:             '#69d83a': 'Green'
 58:         };
 59:         colorName = hexColorNames[playerPositions[playerIndex].color] || 'Player ' + (playerIndex + 1);
 60:     }
 61: 
 62:     // Build display name: "Username (Color)" or just "Color" or "Player X"
 63:     if (username && colorName) {
 64:         return username + ' (' + colorName + ')';
 65:     } else if (colorName) {
 66:         return colorName;
 67:     } else if (username) {
 68:         return username;
 69:     } else {
 70:         return 'Player ' + (playerIndex + 1);
 71:     }
 72: }
 73: 
 74: // Check if it's the current player's turn (for multiplayer)
 75: // This is for GAME ACTIONS (moving, placing stones, etc), NOT tile placement
 76: function isMyTurn() {
 77:     if (!isMultiplayer) return true; // In local mode, always allow actions
 78:     if (isPlacementPhase) return false; // During placement phase, no game actions allowed
 79:     return myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex;
 80: }
 81: 
 82: // Show/hide End Turn button based on whose turn it is
 83: function updateEndTurnButtonVisibility() {
 84:     const btn = document.getElementById('end-turn');
 85:     if (!btn) return;
 86: 
 87:     // Always show the button, but disable when not your turn
 88:     btn.style.display = '';
 89:     if (!isMultiplayer) {
 90:         btn.disabled = false;
 91:         btn.style.opacity = '';
 92:         btn.style.cursor = '';
 93:         return;
 94:     }
 95: 
 96:     const canEnd = isMyTurn();
 97:     btn.disabled = !canEnd;
 98:     btn.style.opacity = canEnd ? '' : '0.5';
 99:     btn.style.cursor = canEnd ? '' : 'not-allowed';
100: }
101: 
102: // Hide deck indicators during play (keep deck panel for stones/player pool)
103: function updateDeckIndicatorVisibility() {
104:     const gameContainer = document.querySelector('.game-container');
105:     const inGame = gameContainer && gameContainer.style.display !== 'none';
106:     const hide = inGame && !isPlacementPhase; // hide during main play
107: 
108:     const tileDeckHeader = document.getElementById('tile-deck-header');
109:     const tileDeckContainer = document.getElementById('tile-deck-container');
110:     const playerTilesHeader = document.getElementById('player-tiles-header');
111: 
112:     if (tileDeckHeader) tileDeckHeader.style.display = hide ? 'none' : '';
113:     if (tileDeckContainer) tileDeckContainer.style.display = hide ? 'none' : '';
114:     if (playerTilesHeader) playerTilesHeader.style.display = hide ? 'none' : '';
115: }
116: 
117: // Inventory panel toggle (unified for desktop + mobile)
118: let isInventoryOpen = false;
119: 
120: function setInventoryOpen(open) {
121:     isInventoryOpen = !!open;
122:     const gameContainer = document.querySelector('.game-container');
123:     if (!gameContainer) return;
124: 
125:     gameContainer.classList.toggle('inventory-open', isInventoryOpen);
126:     gameContainer.classList.toggle('inventory-collapsed', !isInventoryOpen);
127: 
128:     const btn = document.getElementById('inventory-toggle');
129:     if (btn) {
130:         btn.textContent = isInventoryOpen ? '🎒 Inventory (hide)' : '🎒 Inventory';
131:     }
132: }
133: 
134: function toggleInventory() {
135:     setInventoryOpen(!isInventoryOpen);
136: }
137: 
138: // Close button inside inventory (useful on mobile where bottom controls may be off-screen)
139: document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
140:     const closeBtn = document.getElementById('inventory-close');
141:     if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => setInventoryOpen(false));
142: 
143:     // Listen for scroll-resolved events from response window system
144:     window.addEventListener('scroll-resolved', (event) => {
145:         const entry = event.detail;
146:         if (entry && entry.scrollData) {
147:             // Apply the scroll effects for scrolls that resolved from the response stack
148:             if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined') {
149:                 const scrollName = entry.scrollData.name;
150:                 // Resolve scrollDef: may be stored as .definition, .spell, or looked up from patterns
151:                 const scrollDef = entry.scrollData.definition
152:                     || entry.scrollData.spell
153:                     || spellSystem.patterns[scrollName];
154:                 const fromCommonArea = entry.fromCommonArea ?? entry.scrollData?.fromCommonArea ?? false;
155: 
156:                 // For response scrolls (like Unbidden Lamplight / Reflect / Sigh of Recollection),
157:                 // pass the triggering scroll context
158:                 if (entry.result === 'response-resolved' && entry.triggeringScroll) {
159:                     console.log(`Applying response scroll effects: ${scrollName} (triggered by ${entry.triggeringScroll.name})`);
160: 
161:                     // In multiplayer, only execute the response effect on the responder's own client.
162:                     // The caster's client resolves the stack but shouldn't modify another player's pools.
163:                     // Non-caster/non-responder clients receive the effect via the 'response-resolved' broadcast.
164:                     const isLocalPlayer = !isMultiplayer || (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex === entry.casterIndex);
165: 
166:                     if (isLocalPlayer && spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
167:                         const effect = spellSystem.scrollEffects.getEffect(scrollName);
168:                         if (effect) {
169:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(scrollName, entry.casterIndex, {
170:                                 spell: scrollDef,
171:                                 triggeringScroll: entry.triggeringScroll
172:                             });
173: 
174:                             // Track activated element(s) for win condition (response scrolls count too!)
175:                             spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(entry.casterIndex);
176:                             if (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0]) {
177:                                 // Catacomb scrolls activate each component element
178:                                 const elements = new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type));
179:                                 elements.forEach(el => spellSystem.playerScrolls[entry.casterIndex].activated.add(el));
180:                             } else {
181:                                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[entry.casterIndex].activated.add(scrollDef.element);
182:                             }
183:                             if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
184:                                 updatePlayerElementSymbols(entry.casterIndex);
185:                             }
186: 
187:                             // Broadcast the activation in multiplayer
188:                             if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
189:                                 const activatedElements = (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0])
190:                                     ? [...new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
191:                                     : [scrollDef.element];
192:                                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
193:                                     playerIndex: entry.casterIndex,
194:                                     scrollName: scrollName,
195:                                     effectName: effect.name,
196:                                     element: scrollDef.element,
197:                                     activatedElements: activatedElements
198:                                 });
199:                             }
200:                         }
201:                     } else {
202:                         console.log(`Skipping response effect execution for ${scrollName} (responder is player ${entry.casterIndex}, I am ${myPlayerIndex})`);
203:                     }
204: 
205:                     // Handle scroll disposition for the response scroll
206:                     spellSystem.handleScrollDisposition(scrollName, fromCommonArea);
207:                 } else if (entry.result === 'resolved' && entry.isOriginal) {
208:                     // Original scroll resolved (after response window) - apply its full effect
209:                     console.log(`Original scroll resolved: ${scrollName} - applying effects`);
210:                     spellSystem.applyScrollEffects(scrollName, scrollDef, fromCommonArea);
211:                 } else if (entry.result === 'resolved' && !entry.isOriginal) {
212:                     // Regular resolved scroll (non-original)
213:                     console.log(`Applying resolved scroll effects: ${scrollName}`);
214:                     spellSystem.applyScrollEffects(scrollName, scrollDef);
215:                 } else if (entry.result === 'countered') {
216:                     // Original scroll was countered - do NOT apply its effects
217:                     console.log(`Original scroll countered: ${scrollName} - skipping execution`);
218:                     // Still handle scroll disposition (remove from active scrolls, etc.)
219:                     spellSystem.handleScrollDisposition(scrollName, fromCommonArea);
220:                 } else if (entry.result === 'countered-original') {
221:                     // Counter scroll was cast - execute its effect (e.g. Psychic stores the stolen scroll)
222:                     const counterCasterIdx = entry.casterIndex;
223:                     console.log(`Counter scroll resolved: ${scrollName}, counter-caster: ${counterCasterIdx}`);
224:                     if (spellSystem.scrollEffects) {
225:                         const effect = spellSystem.scrollEffects.getEffect(scrollName);
226:                         if (effect) {
227:                             spellSystem.scrollEffects.execute(scrollName, counterCasterIdx, {
228:                                 spell: scrollDef,
229:                                 scrollName: scrollName,
230:                                 triggeringScroll: entry.triggeringScroll
231:                             });
232: 
233:                             // Track activated element(s) for win condition (counter scrolls count too!)
234:                             spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(counterCasterIdx);
235:                             if (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0]) {
236:                                 // Catacomb scrolls activate each component element
237:                                 const elements = new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type));
238:                                 elements.forEach(el => spellSystem.playerScrolls[counterCasterIdx].activated.add(el));
239:                             } else {
240:                                 spellSystem.playerScrolls[counterCasterIdx].activated.add(scrollDef.element);
241:                             }
242:                             if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
243:                                 updatePlayerElementSymbols(counterCasterIdx);
244:                             }
245: 
246:                             // Broadcast the activation in multiplayer
247:                             if (isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
248:                                 const activatedElements = (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0])
249:                                     ? [...new Set(scrollDef.patterns[0].map(pos => pos.type))]
250:                                     : [scrollDef.element];
251:                                 broadcastGameAction('scroll-effect', {
252:                                     playerIndex: counterCasterIdx,
253:                                     scrollName: scrollName,
254:                                     effectName: effect.name,
255:                                     element: scrollDef.element,
256:                                     activatedElements: activatedElements
257:                                 });
258:                             }
259:                         }
260:                     }
261:                     // Check if the effect flagged this scroll to go to common area (e.g. Psychic)
262:                     const forceCommon = spellSystem.scrollEffects?.pendingForceCommonArea;
263:                     const shouldForceCommon = forceCommon && forceCommon.scrollName === scrollName;
264:                     if (shouldForceCommon) {
265:                         delete spellSystem.scrollEffects.pendingForceCommonArea;
266:                     }
267:                     // Handle disposition using the COUNTER-CASTER's scrolls (not the
268:                     // active player's, since the counter scroll belongs to the responder)
269:                     spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(counterCasterIdx);
270:                     const counterScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[counterCasterIdx];
271:                     if (shouldForceCommon) {
272:                         if (counterScrolls.active.has(scrollName)) {
273:                             counterScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
274:                         }
275:                         spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
276:                     }
277:                     spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
278:                     if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
279:                 }
280:             }
281:         }
282:     });
283: });
284: 
285: 
286: 
287: // Check if current player can place their tile during placement phase
288: // This is ONLY for player tile placement
289: function canPlaceTile() {
290:     if (!isMultiplayer) return true;
291:     if (!isPlacementPhase) return false; // Player tiles can only be placed during placement phase
292:     // During placement phase, only the active player can place their tile
293:     return myPlayerIndex === activePlayerIndex && !playerTilesPlaced.has(myPlayerIndex);
294: }
295: 
296: // Check if player can take actions (turn AND no pending cascade)
297: function canTakeAction() {
298:     if (!isMyTurn()) return false;
299:     // Check for pending cascade
300:     const playerIdx = isMultiplayer ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
301:     if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.hasPendingCascade(playerIdx)) {
302:         return false;
303:     }
304:     return true;
305: }
306: 
307: // Show "not your turn" or "cascade pending" message
308: function notYourTurn() {
309:     // First check for pending cascade
310:     const playerIdx = isMultiplayer ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
311:     if (typeof spellSystem !== 'undefined' && spellSystem.hasPendingCascade(playerIdx)) {
312:         updateStatus(`You must cascade a scroll before taking other actions!`);
313:         // Re-show the cascade prompt
314:         spellSystem.showPendingCascadePrompt(playerIdx);
315:         return;
316:     }
317: 
318:     if (isPlacementPhase) {
319:         const activeColor = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
320:         updateStatus(`Waiting for ${activeColor} to place their tile... (${playerTilesPlaced.size}/${totalPlayers})`);
321:     } else {
322:         const activeColor = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
323:         updateStatus(`Not your turn. Waiting for ${activeColor}...`);
324:     }
325: }
326: 
327: // Update turn display when turn changes
328: function updateTurnDisplay() {
329:     if (!isMultiplayer) return;
330: 
331:     updateEndTurnButtonVisibility();
332:     updateDeckIndicatorVisibility();
333: 
334:     const myColorName     = getPlayerColorName(myPlayerIndex);
335:     const activeColorName = getPlayerColorName(activePlayerIndex);
336:     const myTurn          = isMyTurn();
337: 
338:     // Update HUD player name + dot immediately (don't wait for render loop)
339:     const hudPlayerName = document.getElementById('hud-player-name');
340:     const hudPlayerDot  = document.getElementById('hud-player-dot');
341:     const hudPlayer     = hudPlayerName?.closest('.hud-player');
342:     if (hudPlayerName) {
343:         hudPlayerName.textContent = myTurn ? 'Your Turn' : `${activeColorName}'s Turn`;
344:     }
345:     if (hudPlayer) {
346:         hudPlayer.classList.toggle('your-turn', myTurn);
347:     }
348:     // Sync dot color to active player
349:     if (hudPlayerDot && typeof allPlayersData !== 'undefined') {
350:         const colorMap = { purple:'#9458f4', yellow:'#ffce00', red:'#ed1b43', blue:'#5894f4', green:'#69d83a' };
351:         const activeData = allPlayersData.find(p => p.player_index === activePlayerIndex);
352:         const key = activeData?.color;
353:         if (key && colorMap[key]) hudPlayerDot.style.background = colorMap[key];
354:     }
355: 
356:     if (myTurn) {
357:         updateStatus(`Your turn!`);
358:         console.log('My turn now!');
359:     } else {
360:         updateStatus(`Waiting for ${activeColorName}...`);
361:         console.log(`Waiting for player ${activePlayerIndex + 1}`);
362:     }
363: 
364:     // Note: Each player always sees their own inventory (stones/scrolls/AP)
365:     // We don't update inventory here - it stays showing the local player's resources
366: }
367: 
368: let isMultiplayer = false;
369: let gameRoomSubscription = null;
370: let playersSubscription = null;
371: let gameStateSubscription = null;
</file>

<file path="js/scrolls/effects/scroll-effects.js">
   1: /**
   2:  * Scroll Effects System
   3:  *
   4:  * This file contains the effect definitions and execution logic for all scrolls.
   5:  * Each scroll has an execute() function that performs its effect.
   6:  */
   7: 
   8: const ScrollEffects = {
   9:     // Active buffs that persist during a turn
  10:     activeBuffs: {},
  11: 
  12:     // Current selection mode state
  13:     selectionMode: null,
  14: 
  15:     // Initialize the effects system
  16:     init(spellSystem) {
  17:         this.spellSystem = spellSystem;
  18:         this.activeBuffs = {};
  19:         this.selectionMode = null;
  20:         console.log('📜 Scroll Effects system initialized');
  21:     },
  22: 
  23:     // Clear turn-based buffs (called on End Turn)
  24:     clearTurnBuffs() {
  25:         Object.keys(this.activeBuffs).forEach(key => {
  26:             if (this.activeBuffs[key]?.expiresThisTurn) {
  27:                 if (key === 'controlTheCurrent' && this.selectionMode?.type === 'water-transform') {
  28:                     this.selectionMode.cleanup();
  29:                     this.selectionMode = null;
  30:                 }
  31:                 if (key === 'respirateWind') {
  32:                     const buff = this.activeBuffs.respirateWind;
  33:                     const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
  34:                     const source = typeof stonePools !== 'undefined' ? stonePools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.stonePools);
  35:                     const capacity = typeof sourcePoolCapacity !== 'undefined'
  36:                         ? sourcePoolCapacity
  37:                         : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.sourcePoolCapacity);
  38:                     if (buff && pools && source) {
  39:                         const pool = pools[buff.playerIndex];
  40:                         if (pool && typeof pool.wind === 'number' && pool.wind > 0) {
  41:                             const amount = pool.wind;
  42:                             pool.wind = 0;
  43:                             if (capacity && typeof capacity.wind === 'number') {
  44:                                 source.wind = Math.min(capacity.wind, (source.wind || 0) + amount);
  45:                             } else {
  46:                                 source.wind = (source.wind || 0) + amount;
  47:                             }
  48:                             if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') {
  49:                                 updateStoneCount('wind');
  50:                             }
  51:                             if (typeof updateStatus === 'function') {
  52:                                 updateStatus('Respirate: returned all wind stones to the source pool.');
  53:                             }
  54:                             console.log(`🌬️ Respirate returned ${amount} wind stones to source`);
  55:                         }
  56:                     }
  57:                 }
  58:                 delete this.activeBuffs[key];
  59:                 console.log(`📜 Cleared buff: ${key}`);
  60:             }
  61:         });
  62:     },
  63: 
  64:     // Clear Freedom buff for a player when their next turn starts
  65:     clearFreedomForPlayer(playerIndex) {
  66:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.freedom;
  67:         if (!buff || buff.playerIndex !== playerIndex) return;
  68:         delete this.activeBuffs.freedom;
  69:         if (typeof updateCatacombIndicators === 'function') {
  70:             updateCatacombIndicators();
  71:         }
  72:     },
  73: 
  74:     // Clear Quick Reflexes buff for a player when their next turn starts
  75:     clearQuickReflexesForPlayer(playerIndex) {
  76:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.quickReflexes;
  77:         if (!buff || buff.playerIndex !== playerIndex) return;
  78:         delete this.activeBuffs.quickReflexes;
  79:     },
  80: 
  81:     // Cancel any active selection mode
  82:     cancelSelectionMode() {
  83:         if (this.selectionMode) {
  84:             if (typeof this.selectionMode.cleanup === 'function') {
  85:                 this.selectionMode.cleanup();
  86:             } else if (this.selectionMode.cancelBtn && this.selectionMode.cancelBtn.parentNode) {
  87:                 this.selectionMode.cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(this.selectionMode.cancelBtn);
  88:             }
  89:             this.selectionMode = null;
  90:             updateStatus('Selection cancelled.');
  91:         }
  92: 
  93:         // Safety: remove any orphaned cancel button
  94:         const cancelEl = document.getElementById('scroll-cancel-btn');
  95:         if (cancelEl && cancelEl.parentNode) {
  96:             cancelEl.parentNode.removeChild(cancelEl);
  97:         }
  98:     },
  99: 
 100:     // Get the effect handler for a scroll
 101:     getEffect(scrollName) {
 102:         return this.effects[scrollName] || null;
 103:     },
 104: 
 105:     // Execute a scroll's effect
 106:     execute(scrollName, casterIndex, context = {}) {
 107:         const effect = this.getEffect(scrollName);
 108:         if (!effect) {
 109:             console.warn(`No effect defined for scroll: ${scrollName}`);
 110:             return { success: false, reason: 'No effect defined' };
 111:         }
 112: 
 113:         try {
 114:             return effect.execute(casterIndex, context, this);
 115:         } catch (err) {
 116:             console.error(`Error executing scroll effect ${scrollName}:`, err);
 117:             return { success: false, reason: err.message };
 118:         }
 119:     },
 120: 
 121:     // Effect definitions for each scroll
 122:     effects: {
 123:         // ============================================
 124:         // EARTH SCROLLS
 125:         // ============================================
 126: 
 127:         /**
 128:          * Earth Scroll I - Iron Stance
 129:          * Counter the most recently cast scroll.
 130:          */
 131:         EARTH_SCROLL_1: {
 132:             name: 'Iron Stance',
 133:             description: 'Counter the most recently cast scroll. That scroll is cancelled.',
 134:             isCounter: true,
 135:             priority: 1,
 136: 
 137:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 138:                 // This scroll's effect is handled by the response window system
 139:                 // When used as a counter, it marks the target scroll as cancelled
 140:                 console.log(`🛡️ Iron Stance activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 141: 
 142:                 // The actual counter logic is in response-window.js resolveResponseStack
 143:                 // This just needs to signal that it's a counter
 144:                 return {
 145:                     success: true,
 146:                     isCounter: true,
 147:                     message: 'Iron Stance counters the scroll!'
 148:                 };
 149:             }
 150:         },
 151: 
 152:         /**
 153:          * Earth Scroll II - Shifting Sands
 154:          * Swap two tiles on the board.
 155:          */
 156:         EARTH_SCROLL_2: {
 157:             name: 'Shifting Sands',
 158:             description: 'Select two tiles to swap their positions. Tiles must have no stones or players on them.',
 159:             isCounter: false,
 160:             priority: 2,
 161: 
 162:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 163:                 console.log(`🔀 Shifting Sands activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 164: 
 165:                 // If triggered via Psychic on a non-caster client, skip interactive UI
 166:                 if (context?.psychicRemoteClient) {
 167:                     console.log(`🔀 Shifting Sands: skipping tile-swap UI on non-caster remote client`);
 168:                     return { success: true, requiresSelection: true, message: 'Skipped on remote client' };
 169:                 }
 170: 
 171:                 // Enter tile selection mode; pass payload so we can call onSelectionEffectComplete when done
 172:                 const payload = {
 173:                     scrollName: context.scrollName || 'EARTH_SCROLL_2',
 174:                     spell: context.spell,
 175:                     effectName: 'Shifting Sands'
 176:                 };
 177:                 system.enterTileSwapMode(casterIndex, payload);
 178: 
 179:                 return {
 180:                     success: true,
 181:                     requiresSelection: true,
 182:                     message: 'Select two tiles to swap...'
 183:                 };
 184:             }
 185:         },
 186: 
 187:         /**
 188:          * Earth Scroll III - Mason's Savvy
 189:          * Draw earth stones and enable extended placement range.
 190:          */
 191:         EARTH_SCROLL_3: {
 192:             name: "Mason's Savvy",
 193:             description: 'Draw up to 5 earth stones. This turn, place earth stones within 5 hexes of player.',
 194:             isCounter: false,
 195:             priority: 3,
 196: 
 197:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 198:                 console.log(`🪨 Mason's Savvy activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 199: 
 200:                 // Draw up to 5 earth stones
 201:                 const drawn = system.drawStonesToPool('earth', 5, casterIndex);
 202: 
 203:                 // Activate extended placement buff
 204:                 system.activeBuffs.earthExtendedPlacement = {
 205:                     range: 5,
 206:                     expiresThisTurn: true,
 207:                     playerIndex: casterIndex
 208:                 };
 209: 
 210:                 const message = `Drew ${drawn} earth stones! Extended placement (5 hex range) active this turn.`;
 211:                 updateStatus(message);
 212: 
 213:                 return {
 214:                     success: true,
 215:                     stonesDrawn: drawn,
 216:                     message: message
 217:                 };
 218:             }
 219:         },
 220: 
 221:         /**
 222:          * Earth Scroll IV - Heavy Stomp
 223:          * Flip a tile (reveal hidden or hide revealed).
 224:          */
 225:         EARTH_SCROLL_4: {
 226:             name: 'Heavy Stomp',
 227:             description: 'Select a tile to flip. Hidden tiles are revealed (draw scroll). Revealed tiles become hidden.',
 228:             isCounter: false,
 229:             priority: 4,
 230: 
 231:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 232:                 console.log(`👣 Heavy Stomp activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 233: 
 234:                 // If triggered via Psychic on a non-caster client, skip the interactive UI.
 235:                 // The Psychic caster's client handles the tile selection and syncs state.
 236:                 if (context?.psychicRemoteClient) {
 237:                     console.log(`👣 Heavy Stomp: skipping tile-flip UI on non-caster remote client`);
 238:                     return { success: true, requiresSelection: true, message: 'Skipped on remote client' };
 239:                 }
 240: 
 241:                 // Pass completionPayload and onComplete so interactive chaining works
 242:                 // (needed when multiple Heavy Stomps are queued via Psychic)
 243:                 const completionPayload = context?.scrollName ? {
 244:                     scrollName: context.scrollName,
 245:                     effectName: 'Heavy Stomp',
 246:                     spell: context.spell
 247:                 } : null;
 248:                 system.enterTileFlipMode(casterIndex, completionPayload, context?.onComplete);
 249: 
 250:                 return {
 251:                     success: true,
 252:                     requiresSelection: true,
 253:                     message: 'Select a tile to flip...'
 254:                 };
 255:             }
 256:         },
 257: 
 258:         /**
 259:          * Earth Scroll V - Avalanche
 260:          * Enable global stone placement for this turn.
 261:          */
 262:         EARTH_SCROLL_5: {
 263:             name: 'Avalanche',
 264:             description: 'This turn, place any stones anywhere on the board (not just adjacent).',
 265:             isCounter: false,
 266:             priority: 5,

 286: 
 287:         // ============================================
 288:         // WATER SCROLLS
 289:         // ============================================
 290: 
 291:         /**
 292:          * Water Scroll I - Reflect
 293:          * Duplicate the effect of the scroll that was last cast this turn.
 294:          */
 295:         WATER_SCROLL_1: {
 296:             name: 'Reflect',
 297:             description: 'Duplicate the effect of the scroll that was last cast this turn.',
 298:             isCounter: false,
 299:             priority: 1,
 300: 
 301:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 302:                 console.log(`🪞 Reflect activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 303: 
 304:                 // When cast as a response: defer effect to beginning of caster's next turn
 305:                 const triggeringScroll = context?.triggeringScroll;
 306:                 if (triggeringScroll && triggeringScroll.name) {
 307:                     if (triggeringScroll.name === 'WATER_SCROLL_1') {
 308:                         updateStatus('Reflect failed: Cannot reflect Reflect!');
 309:                         return { success: false, reason: 'Cannot reflect Reflect' };
 310:                     }
 311:                     // Initialize array if needed, then push this reflect to the stack
 312:                     if (!Array.isArray(system.activeBuffs.reflectPending)) {
 313:                         system.activeBuffs.reflectPending = [];
 314:                     }
 315:                     system.activeBuffs.reflectPending.push({
 316:                         playerIndex: casterIndex,
 317:                         scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
 318:                         definition: triggeringScroll.definition
 319:                     });
 320:                     updateStatus(`Reflect: At the beginning of your next turn, you will activate ${triggeringScroll.definition?.name || triggeringScroll.name}.`);
 321: 
 322:                     // Broadcast Reflect buff in multiplayer
 323:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 324:                         broadcastGameAction('reflect-buff-applied', {
 325:                             playerIndex: casterIndex,
 326:                             scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
 327:                             scrollDefinition: triggeringScroll.definition
 328:                         });
 329:                     }
 330: 
 331:                     return { success: true, deferred: true };
 332:                 }
 333: 
 334:                 // Get the last scroll cast this turn (main-phase Reflect)
 335:                 const lastScroll = system.lastScrollCastThisTurn;
 336:                 if (!lastScroll || !lastScroll.name) {
 337:                     updateStatus('Reflect failed: No scroll was cast this turn!');
 338:                     return { success: false, reason: 'No scroll cast this turn' };
 339:                 }
 340: 
 341:                 // Cannot reflect itself
 342:                 if (lastScroll.name === 'WATER_SCROLL_1') {
 343:                     updateStatus('Reflect failed: Cannot reflect Reflect!');
 344:                     return { success: false, reason: 'Cannot reflect Reflect' };
 345:                 }
 346: 
 347:                 const scrollDef = lastScroll.definition;
 348:                 const scrollName = lastScroll.name;
 349: 
 350:                 // Execute the reflected scroll's effect
 351:                 const displayName = scrollDef?.name || scrollName;
 352:                 updateStatus(`Reflecting ${displayName}!`);
 353: 
 354:                 // Check if the reflected scroll has a special effect
 355:                 const effect = system.getEffect(scrollName);
 356:                 if (effect) {
 357:                     console.log(`🪞 Reflecting special effect: ${effect.name}`);
 358:                     // Determine if we are the Reflect caster on this client.
 359:                     // If not, interactive scrolls should skip their UI (same as Psychic remote client behavior).
 360:                     const isReflectCaster = (typeof myPlayerIndex === 'undefined' || myPlayerIndex === null || myPlayerIndex === casterIndex);
 361:                     // Execute the reflected scroll's special effect
 362:                     const result = system.execute(scrollName, casterIndex, {
 363:                         ...context,
 364:                         psychicRemoteClient: context?.psychicRemoteClient || !isReflectCaster
 365:                     });
 366:                     return {
 367:                         success: true,
 368:                         reflected: scrollName,
 369:                         message: `Reflected ${displayName}!`,
 370:                         ...result
 371:                     };
 372:                 }
 373: 
 374:                 // No special effect - give base stone rewards
 375:                 if (scrollDef) {
 376:                     const level = scrollDef.level || 1;
 377:                     const element = scrollDef.element;
 378: 
 379:                     if (element && element !== 'catacomb') {
 380:                         // Give stones based on scroll level
 381:                         if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined') {
 382:                             const currentPlayerStones = typeof playerStoneCounts !== 'undefined'
 383:                                 ? playerStoneCounts[casterIndex]
 384:                                 : null;
 385: 
 386:                             if (currentPlayerStones) {
 387:                                 currentPlayerStones[element] = (currentPlayerStones[element] || 0) + level;
 388:                                 updateStatus(`Reflect! Gained +${level} ${element} stones from ${displayName}!`);
 389: 
 390:                                 // Update UI
 391:                                 if (typeof updateStoneCountsUI === 'function') {
 392:                                     updateStoneCountsUI();
 393:                                 }
 394:                             }
 395:                         }
 396:                     } else if (element === 'catacomb' && scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0]) {
 397:                         // Catacomb scroll - give +2 of each element in pattern
 398:                         const elementCounts = {};
 399:                         scrollDef.patterns[0].forEach(pos => {
 400:                             elementCounts[pos.type] = (elementCounts[pos.type] || 0) + 1;
 401:                         });
 402: 
 403:                         const currentPlayerStones = typeof playerStoneCounts !== 'undefined'
 404:                             ? playerStoneCounts[casterIndex]
 405:                             : null;
 406: 
 407:                         if (currentPlayerStones) {
 408:                             Object.entries(elementCounts).forEach(([elem, count]) => {
 409:                                 currentPlayerStones[elem] = (currentPlayerStones[elem] || 0) + 2;
 410:                             });
 411:                             updateStatus(`Reflect! Gained catacomb scroll stones from ${displayName}!`);
 412: 
 413:                             if (typeof updateStoneCountsUI === 'function') {
 414:                                 updateStoneCountsUI();
 415:                             }
 416:                         }
 417:                     }
 418:                 }
 419: 
 420:                 return {
 421:                     success: true,
 422:                     reflected: scrollName,
 423:                     message: `Reflected ${displayName}!`
 424:                 };
 425:             }
 426:         },
 427: 
 428:         /**
 429:          * Water Scroll II - Refreshing Thought
 430:          * Discard a scroll to common area, draw a scroll of that type.
 431:          */
 432:         WATER_SCROLL_2: {
 433:             name: 'Refreshing Thought',
 434:             description: 'Discard a scroll to the common area, then draw a scroll of that element type.',
 435:             isCounter: false,
 436:             priority: 2,
 437: 
 438:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 439:                 console.log(`💧 Refreshing Thought activated by player ${casterIndex}`);

 443:                     console.log(`💧 Refreshing Thought: skipping discard UI on non-caster remote client`);

 445:                 }

 447:                 // Enter scroll selection mode
 448:                 system.enterScrollDiscardMode(casterIndex, 'refreshing-thought');

 452:                     requiresSelection: true,
 453:                     message: 'Select a scroll to discard...'

 474:                         return { success: true, message: 'Inspiring Draught resolved for remote player.' };
 475:                     }
 476:                 }

 480:

 482:                     success: true,
 483:                     requiresSelection: true,
 484:                     message: 'Select a deck, then choose one scroll to put back.'
 485:                 };
 486:             }
 487:         },

 560:         // ============================================
 561:         // FIRE SCROLLS
 562:         // ============================================
 563: 
 564:         /**
 565:          * Fire Scroll I - Unbidden Lamplight
 566:          * Response scroll - when opponent casts a scroll, send it to common area.
 567:          * This is a response scroll (like Iron Stance) but doesn't cancel the scroll.
 568:          */
 569:         FIRE_SCROLL_1: {
 570:             name: 'Unbidden Lamplight',
 571:             description: 'Response: Send the triggering scroll to the common area (scroll still resolves).',
 572:             isCounter: false, // Doesn't cancel the scroll, just redirects it
 573:             isResponseOnly: true, // Can only be cast as a response
 574:             priority: 1,
 575: 
 576:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 577:                 console.log(`🕯️ Unbidden Lamplight activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 578: 
 579:                 // The context should contain the triggering scroll info
 580:                 const triggeringScroll = context?.triggeringScroll;
 581: 
 582:                 if (triggeringScroll) {
 583:                     // Mark the triggering scroll to go to lamplight caster's hand
 584:                     system.pendingHandRedirect = {
 585:                         scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
 586:                         originalCasterIndex: triggeringScroll.casterIndex,
 587:                         redirectToPlayerIndex: casterIndex
 588:                     };
 589: 
 590:                     const scrollDef = system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[triggeringScroll.name];
 591:                     const scrollDisplayName = scrollDef?.name || triggeringScroll.name;
 592:                     const message = `Unbidden Lamplight! ${scrollDisplayName} will go to your hand after resolving.`;
 593:                     updateStatus(message);
 594: 
 595:                     // Count as activating fire for win-condition indicator on player tile
 596:                     if (system.spellSystem) {
 597:                         system.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
 598:                         system.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex].activated.add('fire');
 599:                         if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
 600:                             updatePlayerElementSymbols(casterIndex);
 601:                         }
 602:                     }
 603: 
 604:                     return {
 605:                         success: true,
 606:                         redirectToHand: triggeringScroll.name,
 607:                         message: message
 608:                     };
 609:                 }
 610: 
 611:                 // Fallback if no triggering scroll (shouldn't happen in normal play)
 612:                 const message = 'Unbidden Lamplight activated!';
 613:                 updateStatus(message);
 614:                 if (system.spellSystem) {
 615:                     system.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
 616:                     system.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex].activated.add('fire');
 617:                     if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
 618:                         updatePlayerElementSymbols(casterIndex);
 619:                     }
 620:                 }
 621:                 return {
 622:                     success: true,
 623:                     message: message
 624:                 };
 625:             }
 626:         },
 627: 
 628:         /**
 629:          * Fire Scroll II - Burning Motivation
 630:          * Until end of turn, gain 2 AP for each stone you place. Stacks if activated multiple times.
 631:          */
 632:         FIRE_SCROLL_2: {
 633:             name: 'Burning Motivation',
 634:             description: 'Until end of turn, gain 2 AP for each stone you place. Stacks if activated multiple times.',
 635:             isCounter: false,

 637: 
 638:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 639:                 console.log(`🔥 Burning Motivation activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 640:

 642:                 if (existing && existing.playerIndex === casterIndex) {
 643:                     existing.stacks = (existing.stacks || 1) + 1;
 644:                     updateStatus(`Burning Motivation! Stacks to ${existing.stacks} (gain ${existing.stacks * 2} AP per stone placed this turn).`);
 645:                 } else {
 646:                     system.activeBuffs.burningMotivation = {
 647:                         playerIndex: casterIndex,
 648:                         stacks: 1,
 649:                         expiresThisTurn: true
 650:                     };
 651:                     updateStatus('Burning Motivation! Gain 2 AP for each stone you place until end of turn (stacks if activated again).');
 652:                 }
 653: 
 654:                 return {
 655:                     success: true,
 656:                     message: 'Burning Motivation active until end of turn.'
 657:                 };
 658:             }
 659:         },
 660:

 666:             name: 'Sacrificial Pyre',

 692:          * Fire Scroll IV - Transmute
 693:          * Discard stones or scrolls to regain AP.
 694:          */
 695:         FIRE_SCROLL_4: {
 696:             name: 'Transmute',
 697:             description: 'Discard any number of stones or scrolls to regain 2 AP each.',
 698:             isCounter: false,
 699:             priority: 4,
 700: 
 701:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 702:                 console.log(`🔥 Transmute activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 703: 
 704:                 // Only the caster should run Transmute UI/effects (avoid remote clients)
 705:                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) {
 706:                     if (typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' && myPlayerIndex !== null && myPlayerIndex !== casterIndex) {
 707:                         return { success: true, message: 'Transmute resolved for remote player.' };
 708:                     }
 709:                 }
 710: 
 711:                 // Belt-and-suspenders: track the fire element win condition HERE, before opening the
 712:                 // modal, so it registers even if enterTransmuteMode encounters an error.
 713:                 // applyScrollEffects will also do this tracking after execute() returns, which is
 714:                 // idempotent (Set.add is safe to call twice). This early tracking ensures the symbol
 715:                 // appears on the shrine tile regardless of what happens inside the modal.
 716:                 system.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
 717:                 system.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex].activated.add('fire');
 718:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
 719:                     window.updatePlayerElementSymbols(casterIndex);
 720:                 }
 721: 
 722:                 // Suppress void AP auto-sync while Transmute is open
 723:                 system.activeBuffs.suppressVoidAPSync = {
 724:                     playerIndex: casterIndex
 725:                 };
 726: 
 727:                 system.enterTransmuteMode(casterIndex);
 728: 
 729:                 return {
 730:                     success: true,
 731:                     message: 'Select stones or scrolls to transmute into AP.'
 732:                 };
 733:             }
 734:         },
 735: 
 736:         /**
 737:          * Fire Scroll V - Arson
 738:          * Destroy a stone from opponent's pool.
 739:          */

 741:             name: 'Arson',
 742:             description: "Destroy one elemental stone from an opponent's pool. Move Arson to the common area.",
 743:             isCounter: false,

 769: 
 770:         // ============================================
 771:         // WIND SCROLLS
 772:         // ============================================
 773: 
 774:         /**
 775:          * Wind Scroll I - Sigh of Recollection
 776:          * Draw a scroll and a stone of the type that was just activated.
 777:          * Draw one stone of each element if it was a Catacomb scroll.
 778:          */
 779:         WIND_SCROLL_1: {
 780:             name: 'Sigh of Recollection',
 781:             description: 'Draw a scroll and a stone of the type that was just activated, if available. Draw one stone of each if it was a Catacomb scroll.',
 782:             isCounter: false,
 783:             priority: 1,
 784: 
 785:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
 786:                 console.log(`🌬️ Sigh of Recollection activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
 787: 
 788:                 // Determine the "activated" scroll:
 789:                 // - Response mode: use the triggering scroll
 790:                 // - Main phase: use the last scroll cast this turn
 791:                 let activatedName = null;
 792:                 let activatedDef = null;
 793: 
 794:                 const triggeringScroll = context?.triggeringScroll;
 795:                 const scrollName = context?.scrollName || 'WIND_SCROLL_1';
 796: 
 797:                 if (triggeringScroll && triggeringScroll.name) {
 798:                     // Response mode: use the scroll that triggered this response
 799:                     activatedName = triggeringScroll.name;
 800:                     activatedDef = triggeringScroll.definition
 801:                         || system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[triggeringScroll.name];
 802:                     console.log(`🌬️ Using triggering scroll: ${activatedName}`);
 803:                 } else if (context?.previousScrollCast && context.previousScrollCast.name !== scrollName) {
 804:                     // Main phase: use the scroll cast before this one (not ourselves)
 805:                     activatedName = context.previousScrollCast.name;
 806:                     activatedDef = context.previousScrollCast.definition
 807:                         || system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[context.previousScrollCast.name];
 808:                     console.log(`🌬️ Using previous scroll cast this turn: ${activatedName}`);
 809:                 } else if (system.lastScrollCastThisTurn && system.lastScrollCastThisTurn.name !== scrollName) {
 810:                     // Fallback: use lastScrollCastThisTurn (only if it's not this scroll itself)
 811:                     activatedName = system.lastScrollCastThisTurn.name;
 812:                     activatedDef = system.lastScrollCastThisTurn.definition
 813:                         || system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[system.lastScrollCastThisTurn.name];
 814:                     console.log(`🌬️ Using lastScrollCastThisTurn fallback: ${activatedName}`);
 815:                 }
 816: 
 817:                 if (!activatedName || !activatedDef) {
 818:                     console.log(`🌬️ No valid scroll to recall (previousScrollCast=${context?.previousScrollCast?.name || 'none'}, lastScrollCast=${system.lastScrollCastThisTurn?.name || 'none'}, self=${scrollName})`);
 819:                     updateStatus('Sigh of Recollection: No other scroll was activated to recall!');
 820:                     return { success: false, reason: 'No scroll activated this turn' };
 821:                 }
 822: 
 823:                 const activatedElement = activatedDef.element;
 824:                 const displayName = activatedDef.name || activatedName;
 825:                 console.log(`🌬️ Recalling: ${displayName} (element: ${activatedElement})`);
 826: 
 827:                 // --- Draw a scroll from the activated element's deck ---
 828:                 let drawnScrollName = null;
 829:                 const deckElement = activatedElement === 'catacomb' ? 'catacomb' : activatedElement;
 830:                 if (system.spellSystem && typeof system.spellSystem.drawFromDeck === 'function') {
 831:                     drawnScrollName = system.spellSystem.drawFromDeck(deckElement);
 832:                 }
 833: 
 834:                 if (drawnScrollName) {
 835:                     // Add to caster's hand
 836:                     system.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
 837:                     system.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex].hand.add(drawnScrollName);
 838:                     system.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
 839: 
 840:                     const drawnDef = system.spellSystem.patterns?.[drawnScrollName];
 841:                     console.log(`🌬️ Drew scroll: ${drawnDef?.name || drawnScrollName} from ${deckElement} deck`);
 842: 
 843:                     // Broadcast in multiplayer
 844:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 845:                         broadcastGameAction('scroll-collected', {
 846:                             playerIndex: casterIndex,
 847:                             scrollName: drawnScrollName,
 848:                             shrineType: deckElement
 849:                         });
 850:                     }
 851: 
 852:                     // Update scroll deck UI
 853:                     if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') {
 854:                         try { updateScrollDeckUI(); } catch (e) {}
 855:                     }
 856:                 } else {
 857:                     console.log(`🌬️ No scrolls left in ${deckElement} deck to draw`);
 858:                 }
 859: 
 860:                 // --- Draw stone(s) based on activated element ---
 861:                 let stonesDrawn = {};
 862:                 if (activatedElement === 'catacomb' && activatedDef.patterns?.[0]) {
 863:                     // Catacomb: draw 1 stone of each unique element in the pattern
 864:                     const uniqueElements = [...new Set(activatedDef.patterns[0].map(p => p.type))];
 865:                     uniqueElements.forEach(el => {
 866:                         const drawn = system.drawStonesToPool(el, 1, casterIndex);
 867:                         if (drawn > 0) stonesDrawn[el] = drawn;
 868:                     });
 869:                 } else if (activatedElement) {
 870:                     // Regular element: draw 1 stone of that type
 871:                     const drawn = system.drawStonesToPool(activatedElement, 1, casterIndex);
 872:                     if (drawn > 0) stonesDrawn[activatedElement] = drawn;
 873:                 }
 874: 
 875:                 // Build status message
 876:                 const parts = [];
 877:                 if (drawnScrollName) {
 878:                     const drawnDef = system.spellSystem?.patterns?.[drawnScrollName];
 879:                     parts.push(`drew ${drawnDef?.name || drawnScrollName}`);
 880:                 }
 881:                 const stoneList = Object.entries(stonesDrawn).map(([el, n]) => `${n} ${el}`).join(', ');
 882:                 if (stoneList) {
 883:                     parts.push(`+${stoneList} stone${Object.values(stonesDrawn).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) > 1 ? 's' : ''}`);
 884:                 }
 885:                 if (parts.length === 0) {
 886:                     parts.push('nothing available to draw');
 887:                 }
 888: 
 889:                 const message = `Sigh of Recollection (${displayName}): ${parts.join(', ')}!`;
 890:                 updateStatus(message);
 891: 
 892:                 return {
 893:                     success: true,
 894:                     scrollDrawn: drawnScrollName,
 895:                     stonesDrawn: stonesDrawn,
 896:                     message: message
 897:                 };
 898:             }
 899:         },
 900:         /**
 901:          * Wind Scroll II - Respirate
 902:          * Draw two wind stones. At end of turn, return all wind stones to the source.
 903:          */

1128:         VOID_SCROLL_1: {
1129:             name: 'Psychic',
1130:             description: 'Counter the previous scroll, then play it during your turn. Move Psychic to the common area.',
1131:             isCounter: true,
1132:             priority: 1,
1133: 
1134:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
1135:                 console.log(`🔮 Psychic activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
1136: 
1137:                 // When used as a counter in the response window, context.triggeringScroll
1138:                 // contains the scroll that was cancelled.
1139:                 const triggeringScroll = context?.triggeringScroll;
1140: 
1141:                 if (triggeringScroll && triggeringScroll.name) {
1142:                     // Cannot psychic yourself (edge case)
1143:                     if (triggeringScroll.name === 'VOID_SCROLL_1') {
1144:                         updateStatus('Psychic failed: Cannot psychic Psychic!');
1145:                         return { success: false, reason: 'Cannot psychic Psychic' };
1146:                     }
1147: 
1148:                     // Store the countered scroll to be played at the beginning of
1149:                     // the caster's next turn. Initialize array if needed, then push.
1150:                     if (!Array.isArray(system.activeBuffs.psychicPending)) {
1151:                         system.activeBuffs.psychicPending = [];
1152:                     }
1153:                     system.activeBuffs.psychicPending.push({
1154:                         playerIndex: casterIndex,
1155:                         scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
1156:                         definition: triggeringScroll.definition
1157:                     });
1158: 
1159:                     // Broadcast Psychic buff in multiplayer
1160:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
1161:                         broadcastGameAction('psychic-buff-applied', {
1162:                             playerIndex: casterIndex,
1163:                             scrollName: triggeringScroll.name,
1164:                             scrollDefinition: triggeringScroll.definition
1165:                         });
1166:                     }
1167: 
1168:                     // Mark Psychic itself to go to common area.
1169:                     // The disposition handler in multiplayer-state.js handles
1170:                     // "countered-original" entries; we set a flag so it knows
1171:                     // to force-common-area on the next handleScrollDisposition call.
1172:                     system.pendingForceCommonArea = {
1173:                         scrollName: context?.scrollName || 'VOID_SCROLL_1',
1174:                         playerIndex: casterIndex
1175:                     };
1176: 
1177:                     const displayName = triggeringScroll.definition?.name || triggeringScroll.name;
1178:                     updateStatus(`Psychic! Countered ${displayName}. You will play it at the start of your next turn.`);
1179: 
1180:                     return {
1181:                         success: true,
1182:                         isCounter: true,
1183:                         message: `Psychic countered ${displayName}!`
1184:                     };
1185:                 }
1186: 
1187:                 // Fallback: main-phase cast (no triggering scroll — just acts as counter signal)
1188:                 return {
1189:                     success: true,
1190:                     isCounter: true,
1191:                     message: 'Psychic counters the scroll!'
1192:                 };
1193:             }
1194:         },

1311:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_7: {
1312:             name: 'Reflecting Pool',
1313:             description: 'Regain 2 AP for each different stone type within 5 spaces of you. This can be used once per turn.',
1314:             isCounter: false,
1315:             priority: 7,
1316:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
1317:                 console.log(`💧 Reflecting Pool activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
1318: 
1319:                 // Once per turn guard
1320:                 const existing = system.activeBuffs.reflectingPool;
1321:                 if (existing && existing.playerIndex === casterIndex) {
1322:                     const msg = 'Reflecting Pool already used this turn.';
1323:                     updateStatus(msg);
1324:                     return { success: false, message: msg };
1325:                 }
1326: 
1327:                 const playerPos = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[casterIndex])
1328:                     ? playerPositions[casterIndex] : null;
1329:                 if (!playerPos || typeof pixelToHex !== 'function') {
1330:                     const msg = 'Reflecting Pool failed: player position not found.';
1331:                     updateStatus(msg);
1332:                     return { success: false, message: msg };
1333:                 }
1334: 
1335:                 const playerHex = pixelToHex(playerPos.x, playerPos.y, TILE_SIZE);
1336:                 const types = new Set();
1337:                 if (Array.isArray(placedStones)) {
1338:                     placedStones.forEach(stone => {
1339:                         const stoneHex = pixelToHex(stone.x, stone.y, TILE_SIZE);
1340:                         const dq = Math.abs(playerHex.q - stoneHex.q);
1341:                         const dr = Math.abs(playerHex.r - stoneHex.r);
1342:                         const ds = Math.abs((-playerHex.q - playerHex.r) - (-stoneHex.q - stoneHex.r));
1343:                         const hexDistance = Math.max(dq, dr, ds);
1344:                         if (hexDistance <= 5) types.add(stone.type);
1345:                     });
1346:                 }
1347: 
1348:                 const apGain = types.size * 2;
1349:                 if (typeof addAP === 'function') {
1350:                     addAP(apGain);
1351:                 }
1352: 
1353:                 system.activeBuffs.reflectingPool = {
1354:                     expiresThisTurn: true,
1355:                     playerIndex: casterIndex
1356:                 };
1357: 
1358:                 const message = `Reflecting Pool: regained ${apGain} AP.`;
1359:                 updateStatus(message);
1360: 
1361:                 return { success: true, message: message, apGained: apGain };
1362:             }
1363:         },
1364:

1435:             isCounter: false,
1436:             priority: 8,
1437:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
1438:                 console.log(`🏴‍☠️ Plunder activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
1439: 
1440:                 // If triggered via Psychic on a non-caster client, skip interactive UI
1441:                 if (context?.psychicRemoteClient) {
1442:                     console.log(`🏴‍☠️ Plunder: skipping plunder UI on non-caster remote client`);
1443:                     return { success: true, requiresSelection: true, message: 'Skipped on remote client' };
1444:                 }
1445: 
1446:                 system.enterPlunderMode(casterIndex, {
1447:                     scrollName: context?.scrollName || 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_8',
1448:                     effectName: 'Plunder',
1449:                     spell: context?.spell
1450:                 });
1451: 
1452:                 return {
1453:                     success: true,
1454:                     requiresSelection: true,
1455:                     message: 'Select a target player to plunder an active scroll from...'
1456:                 };
1457:             }
1458:         },
1459: 
1460:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_9: {
1461:             name: 'Quick Reflexes',
1462:             description: 'Search for an available level 1 scroll and add it to your hand. Draw 2 stones of that type. Until your next turn, level 1 scrolls cost 0 AP to activate. Shuffle the deck searched.',
1463:             isCounter: false,
1464:             priority: 9,
1465:             execute(casterIndex, context, system) {
1466:                 console.log(`⚡ Quick Reflexes activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
1467: 
1468:                 // If triggered via Psychic on a non-caster client, skip interactive UI
1469:                 if (context?.psychicRemoteClient) {
1470:                     console.log(`⚡ Quick Reflexes: skipping search UI on non-caster remote client`);
1471:                     return { success: true, requiresSelection: true, message: 'Skipped on remote client' };
1472:                 }
1473:

1475:                 system.activeBuffs.quickReflexes = {
1476:                     playerIndex: casterIndex

1495:             name: 'Combust',
1496:             description: 'Select a tile and destroy all stones on it. Cannot target player tiles.',
1497:             isCounter: false,
1498:             priority: 10,

1500:                 console.log(`🔥 Combust activated by player ${casterIndex}`);
1501:
