1519:     // ============================================
1520:     // TELEKINESIS MODE (Void Scroll III)
1521:     // ============================================
1522: 
1523:     enterTelekinesisMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
1524:         const self = this;
1525:         const MAX_MOVES = 1;
1526: 
1527:         console.log(`🔮 Entering Telekinesis mode for player ${casterIndex}`);
1528: 
1529:         // Set up the telekinesis state so game-core/game-ui know about the rules
1530:         window.telekinesisState = {
1531:             active: true,
1532:             movesLeft: MAX_MOVES,
1533:             maxMoves: MAX_MOVES,
1534:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
1535:             movedTiles: []
1536:         };
1537: 
1538:         // Enable tile dragging
1539:         window.tileMoveMode = true;
1540: 
1541:         // Finish handler — turn off tile move mode and clean up
1542:         const finishTelekinesis = () => {
1543:             window.tileMoveMode = false;
1544:             const movesDone = MAX_MOVES - (window.telekinesisState?.movesLeft ?? 0);
1545:             window.telekinesisState = null;
1546: 
1547:             // Remove buttons
1548:             const doneEl = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
1549:             if (doneEl && doneEl.parentNode) doneEl.parentNode.removeChild(doneEl);
1550:             const cancelEl = document.getElementById('scroll-cancel-btn');
1551:             if (cancelEl && cancelEl.parentNode) cancelEl.parentNode.removeChild(cancelEl);
1552: 
1553:             self.selectionMode = null;
1554: 
1555:             updateStatus(`Telekinesis complete! Moved ${movesDone} tile${movesDone === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
1556: 
1557:             // Signal that selection effect is complete
1558:             if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
1559:                 self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
1560:             }
1561:         };
1562: 
1563:         // Expose so the tile-drop handler in game-ui can call it when moves run out
1564:         window.finishTelekinesis = finishTelekinesis;
1565: 
1566:         // Create cancel button
1567:         const cancelBtn = this.createCancelButton('Cancel', () => {
1568:             window.tileMoveMode = false;
1569:             window.telekinesisState = null;
1570:             window.finishTelekinesis = null;
1571:             const doneEl = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
1572:             if (doneEl && doneEl.parentNode) doneEl.parentNode.removeChild(doneEl);
1573:             self.cancelSelectionMode();
1574:         });
1575: 
1576:         // Create done button
1577:         const doneBtn = document.createElement('button');
1578:         doneBtn.id = 'telekinesis-done-btn';
1579:         doneBtn.textContent = `Done (0/${MAX_MOVES})`;
1580:         Object.assign(doneBtn.style, {
1581:             position: 'fixed',
1582:             bottom: '60px',
1583:             left: '50%',
1584:             transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
1585:             zIndex: '2001',
1586:             padding: '10px 24px',
1587:             backgroundColor: '#27ae60',
1588:             color: 'white',
1589:             border: 'none',
1590:             borderRadius: '8px',
1591:             cursor: 'pointer',
1592:             fontSize: '16px',
1593:             fontWeight: 'bold',
1594:             boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'
1595:         });
1596:         doneBtn.onclick = () => finishTelekinesis();
1597:         document.body.appendChild(doneBtn);
1598: 
1599:         // Minimal selection mode — just for cleanup if cancelSelectionMode is called
1600:         this.selectionMode = {
1601:             type: 'telekinesis',
1602:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
1603:             completionPayload: completionPayload,
1604:             cleanup() {
1605:                 window.tileMoveMode = false;
1606:                 window.telekinesisState = null;
1607:                 window.finishTelekinesis = null;
1608:                 const d = document.getElementById('telekinesis-done-btn');
1609:                 if (d && d.parentNode) d.parentNode.removeChild(d);
1610:                 const c = document.getElementById('scroll-cancel-btn');
1611:                 if (c && c.parentNode) c.parentNode.removeChild(c);
1612:             }
1613:         };
1614: 
1615:         updateStatus(`Telekinesis: drag tiles to move them (0/${MAX_MOVES}). Tiles must touch 2+ other tiles.`);
1616:     },
1617: 
1618:     // ============================================
1619:     // SCHOLAR'S INSIGHT MODE (Void Scroll II)
1620:     // ============================================
1621: 
1622:     enterScholarsInsightMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
1623:         const self = this;
1624:         const STONE_TYPES_LOCAL = {
1625:             earth: { color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲' },
1626:             water: { color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯' },
1627:             fire: { color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦' },
1628:             wind: { color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋' },
1629:             void: { color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺' }
1630:         };
1631: 
1632:         // Step 1: Show deck picker (which element deck to search)
1633:         const showDeckPicker = () => {
1634:             const existing = document.getElementById('scholars-insight-modal');
1635:             if (existing) existing.remove();
1636: 
1637:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
1638:             overlay.id = 'scholars-insight-modal';
1639:             Object.assign(overlay.style, {
1640:                 position: 'fixed',
1641:                 top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
1642:                 backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
1643:                 zIndex: '3000',
1644:                 display: 'flex',
1645:                 justifyContent: 'center',
1646:                 alignItems: 'center'
1647:             });
1648: 
1649:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
1650:             Object.assign(modal.style, {
1651:                 backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
1652:                 border: '2px solid #9458f4',
1653:                 borderRadius: '10px',
1654:                 padding: '20px',
1655:                 color: 'white',
1656:                 minWidth: '250px',
1657:                 maxWidth: '350px'
1658:             });
1659: 
1660:             const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
1661:             titleEl.textContent = "Scholar's Insight: Choose a Deck";
1662:             titleEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
1663:             titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
1664:             titleEl.style.color = '#9458f4';
1665:             modal.appendChild(titleEl);
1666: 
1667:             const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
1668:             subtitle.textContent = 'Select an element deck to search through.';
1669:             subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
1670:             subtitle.style.fontSize = '13px';
1671:             subtitle.style.marginBottom = '15px';
1672:             subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
1673:             modal.appendChild(subtitle);
1674: 
1675:             ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(element => {
1676:                 const deck = self.spellSystem?.scrollDecks?.[element];
1677:                 const deckSize = deck ? deck.length : 0;
1678:                 const info = STONE_TYPES_LOCAL[element];
1679: 
1680:                 const btn = document.createElement('button');
1681:                 btn.textContent = `${info.symbol} ${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} (${deckSize} scrolls)`;
1682:                 Object.assign(btn.style, {
1683:                     display: 'block',
1684:                     width: '100%',
1685:                     padding: '10px',
1686:                     margin: '5px 0',
1687:                     backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
1688:                     color: info.color,
1689:                     border: `1px solid ${info.color}`,
1690:                     borderRadius: '5px',
1691:                     cursor: deckSize > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
1692:                     fontSize: '14px',
1693:                     fontWeight: 'bold',
1694:                     opacity: deckSize > 0 ? '1' : '0.4'
1695:                 });
1696:                 if (deckSize > 0) {
1697:                     btn.onmouseenter = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d55';
1698:                     btn.onmouseleave = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
1699:                     btn.onclick = () => {
1700:                         overlay.remove();
1701:                         showDeckBrowser(element);
1702:                     };
1703:                 }
1704:                 modal.appendChild(btn);
1705:             });
1706: 
1707:             // Cancel button
1708:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
1709:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
1710:             Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
1711:                 display: 'block',
1712:                 width: '100%',
1713:                 padding: '10px',
1714:                 margin: '10px 0 0 0',
1715:                 backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
1716:                 color: 'white',
1717:                 border: 'none',
1718:                 borderRadius: '5px',
1719:                 cursor: 'pointer',
1720:                 fontSize: '14px'
1721:             });
1722:             cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
1723:                 overlay.remove();
1724:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
1725:             };
1726:             modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
1727: 
1728:             overlay.appendChild(modal);
1729:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1730:         };
1731: 
1732:         // Step 2: Show scrolls in chosen deck for selection
1733:         const showDeckBrowser = (element) => {
1734:             const deck = self.spellSystem?.scrollDecks?.[element];
1735:             if (!deck || deck.length === 0) {
1736:                 updateStatus(`The ${element} scroll deck is empty!`);
1737:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
1738:                 return;
1739:             }
1740: 
1741:             const info = STONE_TYPES_LOCAL[element];
1742:             const existing = document.getElementById('scholars-insight-modal');
1743:             if (existing) existing.remove();
1744: 
1745:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
1746:             overlay.id = 'scholars-insight-modal';
1747:             Object.assign(overlay.style, {
1748:                 position: 'fixed',
1749:                 top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
1750:                 backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
1751:                 zIndex: '3000',
1752:                 display: 'flex',
1753:                 justifyContent: 'center',
1754:                 alignItems: 'center'
1755:             });
1756: 
1757:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
1758:             Object.assign(modal.style, {
1759:                 backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
1760:                 border: `2px solid ${info.color}`,
1761:                 borderRadius: '10px',
1762:                 padding: '20px',
1763:                 color: 'white',
1764:                 minWidth: '300px',
1765:                 maxWidth: '450px',
1766:                 maxHeight: '80vh',
1767:                 overflowY: 'auto'
1768:             });
1769: 
1770:             const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
1771:             titleEl.textContent = `${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} Deck (${deck.length} scrolls)`;
1772:             titleEl.style.marginBottom = '5px';
1773:             titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
1774:             titleEl.style.color = info.color;
1775:             modal.appendChild(titleEl);
1776: 
1777:             const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
1778:             subtitle.textContent = 'Click a scroll to add it to your hand.';
1779:             subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
1780:             subtitle.style.fontSize = '13px';
1781:             subtitle.style.marginBottom = '15px';
1782:             subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
1783:             modal.appendChild(subtitle);
1784: 
1785:             deck.forEach((scrollName, index) => {
1786:                 const scrollInfo = self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName];
1787:                 if (!scrollInfo) return;
1788: 
1789:                 const card = document.createElement('div');
1790:                 Object.assign(card.style, {
1791:                     backgroundColor: '#34495e',
1792:                     border: '1px solid #555',
1793:                     borderRadius: '8px',
1794:                     padding: '12px',
1795:                     marginBottom: '8px',
1796:                     cursor: 'pointer',
1797:                     transition: 'border-color 0.15s'
1798:                 });
1799:                 card.onmouseenter = () => card.style.borderColor = info.color;
1800:                 card.onmouseleave = () => card.style.borderColor = '#555';
1801: 
1802:                 const nameEl = document.createElement('div');
1803:                 nameEl.textContent = scrollInfo.name || scrollName;
1804:                 nameEl.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
1805:                 nameEl.style.color = info.color;
1806:                 nameEl.style.marginBottom = '4px';
1807:                 card.appendChild(nameEl);
1808: 
1809:                 const descEl = document.createElement('div');
1810:                 descEl.textContent = scrollInfo.description || 'No description';
1811:                 descEl.style.fontSize = '12px';
1812:                 descEl.style.color = '#95a5a6';
1813:                 card.appendChild(descEl);
1814: 
1815:                 const levelEl = document.createElement('div');
1816:                 levelEl.textContent = `Level ${scrollInfo.level || '?'}`;
1817:                 levelEl.style.fontSize = '11px';
1818:                 levelEl.style.color = '#7f8c8d';
1819:                 levelEl.style.marginTop = '4px';
1820:                 card.appendChild(levelEl);
1821: 
1822:                 card.onclick = () => {
1823:                     overlay.remove();
1824:                     selectScroll(element, scrollName, index);
1825:                 };
1826: 
1827:                 modal.appendChild(card);
1828:             });
1829: 
1830:             // Back button
1831:             const backBtn = document.createElement('button');
1832:             backBtn.textContent = '← Back to Decks';
1833:             Object.assign(backBtn.style, {
1834:                 display: 'inline-block',
1835:                 padding: '8px 14px',
1836:                 margin: '10px 8px 0 0',
1837:                 backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
1838:                 color: 'white',
1839:                 border: '1px solid #555',
1840:                 borderRadius: '5px',
1841:                 cursor: 'pointer',
1842:                 fontSize: '13px'
1843:             });
1844:             backBtn.onclick = () => {
1845:                 overlay.remove();
1846:                 showDeckPicker();
1847:             };
1848:             modal.appendChild(backBtn);
1849: 
1850:             // Cancel button
1851:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
1852:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
1853:             Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
1854:                 display: 'inline-block',
1855:                 padding: '8px 14px',
1856:                 margin: '10px 0 0 0',
1857:                 backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
1858:                 color: 'white',
1859:                 border: 'none',
1860:                 borderRadius: '5px',
1861:                 cursor: 'pointer',
1862:                 fontSize: '13px'
1863:             });
1864:             cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
1865:                 overlay.remove();
1866:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
1867:             };
1868:             modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
1869: 
1870:             overlay.appendChild(modal);
1871:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
1872:         };
1873: 
1874:         // Step 3: Handle selection — add to hand (or trigger cascade), shuffle deck, broadcast
1875:         const selectScroll = (element, scrollName, index) => {
1876:             const sp = self.spellSystem;
1877:             const deck = sp.scrollDecks[element];
1878:             if (!deck) return;
1879: 
1880:             // Remove chosen scroll from deck
1881:             deck.splice(index, 1);
1882: 
1883:             // Shuffle the deck afterwards
1884:             if (sp.shuffleDeck) {
1885:                 sp.shuffleDeck(deck);
1886:                 console.log(`🔮 Scholar's Insight: ${element} deck shuffled after search`);
1887:             }
1888: 
1889:             const scrolls = sp.getPlayerScrolls(false);
1890:             const scrollInfo = sp.patterns?.[scrollName];
1891: 
1892:             if (scrolls.hand.size >= sp.MAX_HAND_SIZE) {
1893:                 // Hand full — trigger cascade system
1894:                 const canCascadeToActive = scrolls.active.size < sp.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
1895:                 sp.showCascadePrompt(scrollName, scrollInfo, element, canCascadeToActive);
1896:             } else {
1897:                 // Hand has room — add directly
1898:                 scrolls.hand.add(scrollName);
1899:                 sp.updateScrollCount();
1900:             }
1901: 
1902:             if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
1903:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
1904: 
1905:             const displayName = scrollInfo?.name || scrollName;
1906:             updateStatus(`Scholar's Insight: added "${displayName}" to your hand!`);
1907: 
1908:             // Broadcast in multiplayer
1909:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
1910:                 broadcastGameAction('scholars-insight', {
1911:                     playerIndex: casterIndex,
1912:                     element: element,
1913:                     scrollName: scrollName
1914:                 });
1915:             }
1916: 
1917:             // Clean up selection mode
1918:             self.selectionMode = null;
1919:         };
1920: 
1921:         // Set selection mode (allows cancellation)
1922:         this.selectionMode = {
1923:             type: 'scholars-insight',
1924:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
1925:             cleanup: () => {
1926:                 const modal = document.getElementById('scholars-insight-modal');
1927:                 if (modal) modal.remove();
1928:             }
1929:         };
1930: 
1931:         // Start by showing the deck picker
1932:         showDeckPicker();
1933:     },
1934: 
1935:     // ============================================
1936:     // CREATE MODAL (Void Scroll V)
1937:     // ============================================
1938: 
1939:     showCreateStoneModal(casterIndex) {
1940:         const self = this;
1941:         const STONE_RANKS = {
1942:             earth: { rank: 5, color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲' },
1943:             water: { rank: 4, color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯' },
1944:             fire:  { rank: 3, color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦' },
1945:             wind:  { rank: 2, color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋' },
1946:             void:  { rank: 1, color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺' }
1947:         };
1948: 
1949:         const existing = document.getElementById('create-stone-modal');
1950:         if (existing) existing.remove();
1951: 
1952:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
1953:         overlay.id = 'create-stone-modal';
1954:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
1955:             position: 'fixed',
1956:             top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
1957:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
1958:             zIndex: '3000',
1959:             display: 'flex',
1960:             justifyContent: 'center',
1961:             alignItems: 'center'
1962:         });
1963: 
1964:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
1965:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
1966:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
1967:             border: '2px solid #9458f4',
1968:             borderRadius: '10px',
1969:             padding: '20px',
1970:             color: 'white',
1971:             minWidth: '250px',
1972:             maxWidth: '350px'
1973:         });
1974: 
1975:         const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
1976:         titleEl.textContent = 'Create: Choose a Stone Type';
1977:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
1978:         titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
1979:         titleEl.style.color = '#9458f4';
1980:         modal.appendChild(titleEl);
1981: 
1982:         const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
1983:         subtitle.textContent = 'Draw stones equal to that element\'s rank (max 5 in pool).';
1984:         subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
1985:         subtitle.style.fontSize = '13px';
1986:         subtitle.style.marginBottom = '15px';
1987:         subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
1988:         modal.appendChild(subtitle);
1989: 
1990:         ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].forEach(element => {
1991:             const info = STONE_RANKS[element];
1992:             const currentCount = (typeof stoneCounts !== 'undefined' ? stoneCounts[element] : 0) || 0;
1993:             const capacity = 5;
1994:             const room = capacity - currentCount;
1995: 
1996:             const btn = document.createElement('button');
1997:             btn.textContent = `${info.symbol} ${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} — rank ${info.rank} (${currentCount}/${capacity})`;
1998:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
1999:                 display: 'block',
2000:                 width: '100%',
2001:                 padding: '10px',
2002:                 margin: '5px 0',
2003:                 backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
2004:                 color: info.color,
2005:                 border: `1px solid ${info.color}`,
2006:                 borderRadius: '5px',
2007:                 cursor: room > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
2008:                 fontSize: '14px',
2009:                 fontWeight: 'bold',
2010:                 opacity: room > 0 ? '1' : '0.4'
2011:             });
2012: 
2013:             if (room > 0) {
2014:                 btn.onmouseenter = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d55';
2015:                 btn.onmouseleave = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
2016:                 btn.onclick = () => {
2017:                     overlay.remove();
2018:                     const drawn = self.drawStonesToPool(element, info.rank, casterIndex);
2019:                     const message = `Create: drew ${drawn} ${element} stone${drawn === 1 ? '' : 's'} (rank ${info.rank})!`;
2020:                     updateStatus(message);
2021:                     console.log(`🔮 Create: drew ${drawn} ${element} stones (rank ${info.rank}) for player ${casterIndex}`);
2022: 
2023:                     // Broadcast in multiplayer
2024:                     if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2025:                         broadcastGameAction('create-stones', {
2026:                             playerIndex: casterIndex,
2027:                             element: element,
2028:                             count: drawn
2029:                         });
2030:                     }
2031:                 };
2032:             }
2033:             modal.appendChild(btn);
2034:         });
2035: 
2036:         // Cancel button
2037:         const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
2038:         cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
2039:         Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
2040:             display: 'block',
2041:             width: '100%',
2042:             padding: '10px',
2043:             margin: '10px 0 0 0',
2044:             backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
2045:             color: 'white',
2046:             border: 'none',
2047:             borderRadius: '5px',
2048:             cursor: 'pointer',
2049:             fontSize: '14px'
2050:         });
2051:         cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
2052:             overlay.remove();
2053:             updateStatus('Create cancelled.');
2054:         };
2055:         modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
2056: 
2057:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
2058:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
2059:     },
2060: 
2061:     // ============================================
2062:     // TILE SWAP MODE (Earth Scroll II)
2063:     // ============================================
2064: 
2065:     enterTileSwapMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
2066:         const self = this;
2067:         console.log(`🔀 Entering tile swap mode for player ${casterIndex}`);
2068: 
2069:         // Get eligible tiles (no stones, no players, not player tiles)
2070:         const eligibleTiles = this.getEligibleTilesForSwap();
2071:         console.log(`   Found ${eligibleTiles.length} eligible tiles for swap`);
2072: 
2073:         if (eligibleTiles.length < 2) {
2074:             updateStatus('Not enough eligible tiles to swap!');
2075:             return;
2076:         }
2077: 
2078:         // Highlight eligible tiles
2079:         this.highlightTiles(eligibleTiles, '#69d83a');
2080: 
2081:         // Create cancel button
2082:         const cancelBtn = this.createCancelButton('Cancel Swap', () => {
2083:             self.cancelSelectionMode();
2084:         });
2085: 
2086:         // Track selected tiles
2087:         let selectedTiles = [];
2088: 
2089:         // Store selection mode state (completionPayload: { scrollName, spell, effectName } for onSelectionEffectComplete)
2090:         this.selectionMode = {
2091:             type: 'tile-swap',
2092:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
2093:             eligibleTiles: eligibleTiles,
2094:             selectedTiles: selectedTiles,
2095:             cancelBtn: cancelBtn,
2096:             completionPayload: completionPayload || null,
2097: 
2098:             handleTileClick(tile) {
2099:                 console.log(`🔀 Tile clicked for swap: ${tile.id}`);
2100: 
2101:                 // Re-validate: tile must be unoccupied (no stones, no players) at click time
2102:                 if (self.tileHasStones(tile) || self.tileHasPlayers(tile)) {
2103:                     console.log(`   Tile ${tile.id} has stones or players - cannot swap`);
2104:                     updateStatus('Cannot swap: tile has stones or players on it.');
2105:                     return;
2106:                 }
2107: 
2108:                 // Must also be in initial eligible set (e.g. not a player tile)
2109:                 if (!eligibleTiles.find(t => t.id === tile.id)) {
2110:                     console.log(`   Tile ${tile.id} is NOT eligible`);
2111:                     updateStatus('Cannot swap: tile has stones or players on it.');
2112:                     return;
2113:                 }
2114: 
2115:                 // Check if already selected
2116:                 const existingIndex = selectedTiles.findIndex(t => t.id === tile.id);
2117:                 if (existingIndex >= 0) {
2118:                     // Deselect
2119:                     selectedTiles.splice(existingIndex, 1);
2120:                     self.unhighlightTile(tile);
2121:                     self.highlightTile(tile, '#69d83a'); // Back to eligible highlight
2122:                     updateStatus(`Deselected tile. Select ${2 - selectedTiles.length} more.`);
2123:                     return;
2124:                 }
2125: 
2126:                 // Select tile
2127:                 selectedTiles.push(tile);
2128:                 self.highlightTile(tile, '#2ecc71', 4); // Selected highlight
2129:                 console.log(`   Tile ${tile.id} selected. Total selected: ${selectedTiles.length}`);
2130: 
2131:                 if (selectedTiles.length === 1) {
2132:                     updateStatus('First tile selected. Select second tile to swap.');
2133:                 } else if (selectedTiles.length === 2) {
2134:                     // Re-validate both tiles before swapping (state may have changed)
2135:                     const t1 = selectedTiles[0], t2 = selectedTiles[1];
2136:                     if (self.tileHasStones(t1) || self.tileHasPlayers(t1)) {
2137:                         updateStatus('Cannot swap: first tile now has stones or players on it.');
2138:                         selectedTiles.length = 0;
2139:                         self.selectionMode.cleanup();
2140:                         self.selectionMode = null;
2141:                         return;
2142:                     }
2143:                     if (self.tileHasStones(t2) || self.tileHasPlayers(t2)) {
2144:                         updateStatus('Cannot swap: second tile now has stones or players on it.');
2145:                         selectedTiles.length = 0;
2146:                         self.selectionMode.cleanup();
2147:                         self.selectionMode = null;
2148:                         return;
2149:                     }
2150:                     // Capture payload and cleanup FIRST (remove highlights while tile refs are still valid)
2151:                     const payload = self.selectionMode.completionPayload;
2152:                     self.selectionMode.cleanup();
2153:                     self.selectionMode = null;
2154: 
2155:                     // Then perform swap (no DOM re-use of tile elements; highlights already cleared)
2156:                     console.log(`   Performing swap between ${t1.id} and ${t2.id}`);
2157:                     self.performTileSwap(t1, t2);
2158: 
2159:                     // Signal that selection effect is complete so game exits "waiting for tiles" phase
2160:                     if (payload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
2161:                         self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(payload.scrollName, payload.effectName, payload.spell);
2162:                     }
2163:                 }
2164:             },
2165: 
2166:             cleanup() {
2167:                 // Remove highlights
2168:                 eligibleTiles.forEach(tile => self.unhighlightTile(tile));
2169:                 // Remove cancel button
2170:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
2171:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
2172:                 }
2173:             }
2174:         };
2175: 
2176:         updateStatus('Select two tiles to swap (any distance).');
2177:     },
2178: 
2179:     performTileSwap(tile1, tile2) {
2180:         // Only swap unoccupied tiles (no stones, no players)
2181:         if (this.tileHasStones(tile1) || this.tileHasPlayers(tile1)) {
2182:             updateStatus('Cannot swap: tile has stones or players on it.');
2183:             return;
2184:         }
2185:         if (this.tileHasStones(tile2) || this.tileHasPlayers(tile2)) {
2186:             updateStatus('Cannot swap: tile has stones or players on it.');
2187:             return;
2188:         }
2189: 
2190:         // Swap positions
2191:         const tempX = tile1.x;
2192:         const tempY = tile1.y;
2193: 
2194:         tile1.x = tile2.x;
2195:         tile1.y = tile2.y;
2196:         tile2.x = tempX;
2197:         tile2.y = tempY;
2198: 
2199:         // Update visual transforms
2200:         if (tile1.element) {
2201:             tile1.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile1.x}, ${tile1.y}) rotate(${tile1.rotation || 0})`);
2202:         }
2203:         if (tile2.element) {
2204:             tile2.element.setAttribute('transform', `translate(${tile2.x}, ${tile2.y}) rotate(${tile2.rotation || 0})`);
2205:         }
2206: 
2207:         // Broadcast in multiplayer
2208:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2209:             broadcastGameAction('tile-swap', {
2210:                 tile1Id: tile1.id,
2211:                 tile2Id: tile2.id,
2212:                 tile1NewPos: { x: tile1.x, y: tile1.y },
2213:                 tile2NewPos: { x: tile2.x, y: tile2.y }
2214:             });
2215:         }
2216: 
2217:         // Ensure pulse is cleared on the two swapped tiles
2218:         this.unhighlightTile(tile1);
2219:         this.unhighlightTile(tile2);
2220: 
2221:         updateStatus('Tiles swapped!');
2222:         console.log(`🔀 Swapped tiles: ${tile1.id} <-> ${tile2.id}`);
2223:     },
2224: 
2225:     // ============================================
2226:     // TILE FLIP MODE (Earth Scroll IV)
2227:     // ============================================
2228: 
2229:     enterTileFlipMode(casterIndex, completionPayload, onComplete) {
2230:         const self = this;
2231: 
2232:         // Get eligible tiles (no stones, no players, not player tiles)
2233:         const eligibleTiles = this.getEligibleTilesForFlip();
2234: 
2235:         if (eligibleTiles.length === 0) {
2236:             updateStatus('No eligible tiles to flip!');
2237:             // Still signal completion so the next queued Psychic scroll can run
2238:             if (typeof onComplete === 'function') onComplete();
2239:             else if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem?.onSelectionEffectComplete) {
2240:                 self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
2241:             }
2242:             return;
2243:         }
2244: 
2245:         // Highlight eligible tiles
2246:         this.highlightTiles(eligibleTiles, '#69d83a');
2247: 
2248:         // Create cancel button
2249:         const cancelBtn = this.createCancelButton('Cancel Flip', () => {
2250:             self.cancelSelectionMode();
2251:             if (typeof onComplete === 'function') onComplete();
2252:         });
2253: 
2254:         // Store selection mode state
2255:         this.selectionMode = {
2256:             type: 'tile-flip',
2257:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
2258:             eligibleTiles: eligibleTiles,
2259:             cancelBtn: cancelBtn,
2260: 
2261:             handleTileClick(tile) {
2262:                 // Check if tile is eligible
2263:                 if (!eligibleTiles.find(t => t.id === tile.id)) {
2264:                     updateStatus('Cannot flip: tile has stones or players on it.');
2265:                     return;
2266:                 }
2267: 
2268:                 // Perform flip
2269:                 self.performTileFlip(tile, casterIndex);
2270:                 self.selectionMode.cleanup();
2271:                 self.selectionMode = null;
2272: 
2273:                 // Signal completion (for normal casts via onSelectionEffectComplete,
2274:                 // or for Psychic-chained casts via the onComplete callback)
2275:                 if (typeof onComplete === 'function') {
2276:                     onComplete();
2277:                 } else if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem?.onSelectionEffectComplete) {
2278:                     self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
2279:                 }
2280:             },
2281: 
2282:             cleanup() {
2283:                 // Remove highlights
2284:                 eligibleTiles.forEach(tile => self.unhighlightTile(tile));
2285:                 // Remove cancel button
2286:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
2287:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
2288:                 }
2289:             }
2290:         };
2291: 
2292:         updateStatus('Select a tile to flip (reveal/hide).');
2293:     },
2294: 
2295:     performTileFlip(tile, casterIndex) {
2296:         if (tile.flipped) {
2297:             // Currently hidden -> reveal it
2298:             if (typeof revealTile === 'function') {
2299:                 revealTile(tile.id);
2300:                 updateStatus(`Revealed ${tile.shrineType} shrine!`);
2301:             } else {
2302:                 // Manual reveal
2303:                 tile.flipped = false;
2304:                 // The revealTile function should handle scroll drawing
2305:                 console.log(`👣 Revealed tile: ${tile.id} (${tile.shrineType})`);
2306:             }
2307:         } else {
2308:             // Currently revealed -> hide it
2309:             tile.flipped = true;
2310: 
2311:             // Update visual - need to recreate as flipped
2312:             if (typeof recreateTileAsFlipped === 'function') {
2313:                 recreateTileAsFlipped(tile);
2314:             }
2315: 
2316:             // Broadcast
2317:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2318:                 broadcastGameAction('tile-hide', {
2319:                     tileId: tile.id
2320:                 });
2321:             }
2322: 
2323:             updateStatus(`Hid ${tile.shrineType} shrine tile.`);
2324:             console.log(`👣 Hid tile: ${tile.id}`);
2325:         }
2326:     },
2327: 
2328:     // ============================================
2329:     // HELPER FUNCTIONS
2330:     // ============================================
2331: 
2332:     getEligibleTilesForSwap() {
2333:         if (typeof placedTiles === 'undefined') return [];
2334: 
2335:         return placedTiles.filter(tile => {
2336:             // Not a player tile
2337:             if (tile.isPlayerTile) return false;
2338: 
2339:             // No stones on tile
2340:             if (this.tileHasStones(tile)) return false;
2341: 
2342:             // No players on tile
2343:             if (this.tileHasPlayers(tile)) return false;
2344: 
2345:             return true;
2346:         });
2347:     },
2348: 
2349:     getEligibleTilesForFlip() {
2350:         // Same criteria as swap
2351:         return this.getEligibleTilesForSwap();
2352:     },
2353: 
2354:     // Wandering River: any non-player tile (revealed or unrevealed) can be transformed
2355:     getEligibleTilesForWanderingRiver() {
2356:         if (typeof placedTiles === 'undefined') return [];
2357:         return placedTiles.filter(tile => {
2358:             if (tile.isPlayerTile || tile.shrineType === 'player') return false;
2359:             return true;
2360:         });
2361:     },
2362: 
2363:     tileHasStones(tile) {
2364:         if (typeof placedStones === 'undefined') return false;
2365: 
2366:         // Use same radius as findTileAtPosition (game-core): TILE_SIZE * 4 covers full tile
2367:         // TILE_SIZE * 2.5 was too small and missed stones on outer hexes
2368:         const tileRadius = typeof TILE_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? TILE_SIZE * 4 : 80;
2369: 
2370:         return placedStones.some(stone => {
2371:             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - tile.y, 2));
2372:             return dist < tileRadius;
2373:         });
2374:     },
2375: 
2376:     tileHasPlayers(tile) {
2377:         if (typeof playerPositions === 'undefined') return false;
2378: 
2379:         // Match tileHasStones / findTileAtPosition radius
2380:         const tileRadius = typeof TILE_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? TILE_SIZE * 4 : 80;
2381: 
2382:         return playerPositions.some(pos => {
2383:             if (!pos) return false;
2384:             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(pos.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(pos.y - tile.y, 2));
2385:             return dist < tileRadius;
2386:         });
2387:     },
2388: 
2389:     highlightTiles(tiles, color) {
2390:         tiles.forEach(tile => this.highlightTile(tile, color));
2391:     },
2392: 
2393:     highlightTile(tile, color, strokeWidth = 3) {
2394:         if (!tile.element) return;
2395: 
2396:         // Try multiple selectors to find hex elements
2397:         let hexes = tile.element.querySelectorAll('.hex-tile');
2398:         if (hexes.length === 0) {
2399:             hexes = tile.element.querySelectorAll('polygon');
2400:         }
2401: 
2402:         hexes.forEach(hex => {
2403:             hex.setAttribute('data-original-stroke', hex.getAttribute('stroke') || 'none');
2404:             hex.setAttribute('data-original-stroke-width', hex.getAttribute('stroke-width') || '1');
2405:             hex.setAttribute('stroke', color);
2406:             hex.setAttribute('stroke-width', strokeWidth);
2407:         });
2408: 
2409:         // Also add a pulsing animation
2410:         tile.element.style.animation = 'tilePulse 1s ease-in-out infinite';
2411: 
2412:         // Add pulse animation if not already in DOM
2413:         if (!document.getElementById('tile-pulse-style')) {
2414:             const style = document.createElement('style');
2415:             style.id = 'tile-pulse-style';
2416:             style.textContent = `
2417:                 @keyframes tilePulse {
2418:                     0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
2419:                     50% { opacity: 0.7; }
2420:                 }
2421:             `;
2422:             document.head.appendChild(style);
2423:         }
2424:     },
2425: 
2426:     unhighlightTile(tile) {
2427:         if (!tile.element) return;
2428: 
2429:         let hexes = tile.element.querySelectorAll('.hex-tile');
2430:         if (hexes.length === 0) {
2431:             hexes = tile.element.querySelectorAll('polygon');
2432:         }
2433: 
2434:         hexes.forEach(hex => {
2435:             const origStroke = hex.getAttribute('data-original-stroke') || 'none';
2436:             const origWidth = hex.getAttribute('data-original-stroke-width') || '1';
2437:             hex.setAttribute('stroke', origStroke);
2438:             hex.setAttribute('stroke-width', origWidth);
2439:         });
2440: 
2441:         tile.element.style.animation = '';
2442:     },
2443: 
2444:     createCancelButton(text, onClick) {
2445:         const btn = document.createElement('button');
2446:         btn.textContent = text;
2447:         btn.id = 'scroll-cancel-btn';
2448:         Object.assign(btn.style, {
2449:             position: 'fixed',
2450:             bottom: '20px',
2451:             left: '50%',
2452:             transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
2453:             padding: '10px 20px',
2454:             backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
2455:             color: 'white',
2456:             border: 'none',
2457:             borderRadius: '5px',
2458:             cursor: 'pointer',
2459:             fontSize: '16px',
2460:             fontWeight: 'bold',
2461:             zIndex: '1000'
2462:         });
2463:         btn.onclick = onClick;
2464:         document.body.appendChild(btn);
2465:         return btn;
2466:     },
2467: 
2468:     drawStonesToPool(stoneType, count, playerIndex) {
2469:         // Draw stones from source pool to player pool
2470:         if (typeof stonePools === 'undefined') {
2471:             console.warn('Stone pools not available');
2472:             return 0;
2473:         }
2474: 
2475:         // Determine the target player pool.
2476:         // If an explicit playerIndex is given, use playerPools[playerIndex] directly
2477:         // so that response scrolls (cast by a non-active player) modify the correct pool.
2478:         let targetPool = null;
2479:         const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
2480:         if (playerIndex !== undefined && playerIndex !== null && pools && pools[playerIndex]) {
2481:             targetPool = pools[playerIndex];
2482:         } else if (typeof stoneCounts !== 'undefined') {
2483:             targetPool = stoneCounts;
2484:         }
2485: 
2486:         if (!targetPool) {
2487:             console.warn('No target player pool available');
2488:             return 0;
2489:         }
2490: 
2491:         // Get player pool capacity (default 5)
2492:         const capacity = (typeof playerPoolCapacity !== 'undefined' && playerPoolCapacity[stoneType])
2493:             ? playerPoolCapacity[stoneType]
2494:             : 5;
2495:         const currentCount = targetPool[stoneType] || 0;
2496:         const roomInPool = capacity - currentCount;
2497: 
2498:         // Can only draw up to: min(requested, available in source, room in player pool)
2499:         const sourceAvailable = stonePools[stoneType] || 0;
2500:         const toDraw = Math.min(count, sourceAvailable, roomInPool);
2501: 
2502:         if (toDraw > 0) {
2503:             stonePools[stoneType] -= toDraw;
2504:             targetPool[stoneType] += toDraw;
2505: 
2506:             // Update UI
2507:             if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') {
2508:                 updateStoneCount(stoneType);
2509:             }
2510: 
2511:             console.log(`📜 Drew ${toDraw} ${stoneType} stones to player ${playerIndex ?? 'active'} pool (had ${currentCount}/${capacity})`);
2512:         } else if (roomInPool <= 0) {
2513:             console.log(`📜 Cannot draw ${stoneType} stones - pool is full (${currentCount}/${capacity})`);
2514:         }
2515: 
2516:         return toDraw;
2517:     },
2518: 
2519:     // Quick Reflexes: search for a level 1 scroll, add to hand, draw 2 stones of that type
2520:     enterQuickReflexesMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
2521:         const self = this;
2522:         const STONE_TYPES_LOCAL = {
2523:             earth: { color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲' },
2524:             water: { color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯' },
2525:             fire: { color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦' },
2526:             wind: { color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋' },
2527:             void: { color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺' }
2528:         };
2529: 
2530:         const sp = self.spellSystem;
2531: 
2532:         // Collect all available level-1 scrolls across elemental decks (catacomb excluded)
2533:         const level1Elements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
2534:         const available = []; // [{ element, scrollName, index }]
2535:         level1Elements.forEach(element => {
2536:             const deck = sp?.scrollDecks?.[element];
2537:             if (!deck) return;
2538:             deck.forEach((scrollName, index) => {
2539:                 const def = sp?.patterns?.[scrollName];
2540:                 if (def && def.level === 1) {
2541:                     available.push({ element, scrollName, index });
2542:                 }
2543:             });
2544:         });
2545: 
2546:         if (available.length === 0) {
2547:             if (typeof updateStatus === 'function') {
2548:                 updateStatus('Quick Reflexes: no level 1 scrolls available in any deck!');
2549:             }
2550:             self.selectionMode = null;
2551:             return;
2552:         }
2553: 
2554:         // Build and show modal
2555:         const showPicker = () => {
2556:             const existing = document.getElementById('quick-reflexes-modal');
2557:             if (existing) existing.remove();
2558: 
2559:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
2560:             overlay.id = 'quick-reflexes-modal';
2561:             Object.assign(overlay.style, {
2562:                 position: 'fixed',
2563:                 top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
2564:                 backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
2565:                 zIndex: '3000',
2566:                 display: 'flex',
2567:                 justifyContent: 'center',
2568:                 alignItems: 'center'
2569:             });
2570: 
2571:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
2572:             Object.assign(modal.style, {
2573:                 backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
2574:                 border: '2px solid #ffce00',
2575:                 borderRadius: '10px',
2576:                 padding: '20px',
2577:                 color: 'white',
2578:                 minWidth: '300px',
2579:                 maxWidth: '420px',
2580:                 maxHeight: '80vh',
2581:                 overflowY: 'auto'
2582:             });
2583: 
2584:             const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
2585:             titleEl.textContent = '⚡ Quick Reflexes: Choose a Level 1 Scroll';
2586:             titleEl.style.marginBottom = '5px';
2587:             titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
2588:             titleEl.style.color = '#ffce00';
2589:             modal.appendChild(titleEl);
2590:

2592:             subtitle.textContent = 'Add it to your hand and draw 2 stones of its type.';
2593:             subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';

2595:             subtitle.style.marginBottom = '15px';
2596:             subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
2597:             modal.appendChild(subtitle);
2598: 
2599:             available.forEach(({ element, scrollName, index }) => {
2600:                 const scrollInfo = sp?.patterns?.[scrollName];
2601:                 if (!scrollInfo) return;
2602:                 const info = STONE_TYPES_LOCAL[element] || { color: '#fff', symbol: '?' };
2603:

2605:                 Object.assign(card.style, {
2606:                     backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',

2610:                     marginBottom: '8px',

2612:                     transition: 'border-color 0.15s, background-color 0.15s'
2613:                 });

2615:                 card.onmouseleave = () => card.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
2616:

2618:                 nameEl.textContent = `${info.symbol} ${scrollInfo.name || scrollName}`;
2619:                 nameEl.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
2620:                 nameEl.style.color = info.color;
2621:                 nameEl.style.marginBottom = '4px';
2622:                 card.appendChild(nameEl);
2623:

2626:                 descEl.style.fontSize = '12px';
2627:                 descEl.style.color = '#95a5a6';
2628:                 card.appendChild(descEl);
2629:

2631:                 bonusEl.textContent = `Draws 2 ${element} stones`;
2632:                 bonusEl.style.fontSize = '11px';
2633:                 bonusEl.style.color = info.color;
2634:                 bonusEl.style.marginTop = '4px';
2635:                 bonusEl.style.fontStyle = 'italic';
2636:                 card.appendChild(bonusEl);
2637:

2639:                     overlay.remove();
2640:                     selectScroll(element, scrollName, index);
2641:                 };
2642: 
2643:                 modal.appendChild(card);
2644:             });
2645:

2647:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
2648:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
2649:             Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
2650:                 display: 'block',
2651:                 width: '100%',
2652:                 padding: '10px',
2653:                 margin: '10px 0 0 0',
2654:                 backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',

2660:             });

2664:             };

2666:

2669:         };
2670: 
2671:         // Handle scroll selection
2672:         const selectScroll = (element, scrollName, deckIndex) => {
2673:             const deck = sp.scrollDecks[element];
2674:             if (!deck) return;
2675: 
2676:             // Remove from deck and shuffle
2677:             deck.splice(deckIndex, 1);
2678:             if (sp.shuffleDeck) {
2679:                 sp.shuffleDeck(deck);
2680:                 console.log(`⚡ Quick Reflexes: ${element} deck shuffled after search`);
2681:             }
2682: 
2683:             // Add scroll to hand (or cascade if full)
2684:             const scrolls = sp.getPlayerScrolls(false);
2685:             const scrollInfo = sp.patterns?.[scrollName];
2686:             if (scrolls.hand.size >= sp.MAX_HAND_SIZE) {
2687:                 const canCascadeToActive = scrolls.active.size < sp.MAX_ACTIVE_SIZE;
2688:                 sp.showCascadePrompt(scrollName, scrollInfo, element, canCascadeToActive);
2689:             } else {
2690:                 scrolls.hand.add(scrollName);
2691:                 sp.updateScrollCount();
2692:             }
2693: 
2694:             // Draw 2 stones of the scroll's element type
2695:             const drawn = self.drawStonesToPool(element, 2, casterIndex);
2696: 
2697:             if (typeof updateScrollDeckUI === 'function') updateScrollDeckUI();
2698:             if (typeof updateHUD === 'function') updateHUD();
2699:             if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2700: 
2701:             const displayName = scrollInfo?.name || scrollName;
2702:             if (typeof updateStatus === 'function') {
2703:                 updateStatus(`⚡ Quick Reflexes: added "${displayName}" to hand, drew ${drawn} ${element} stone${drawn === 1 ? '' : 's'}. Level 1 scrolls cost 0 AP this turn.`);
2704:             }
2705: 
2706:             // Multiplayer broadcast — includes buffActive flag so the remote client
2707:             // can set activeBuffs.quickReflexes and correctly price level-1 scrolls
2708:             // in the response window affordability check.
2709:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2710:                 broadcastGameAction('quick-reflexes-search', {
2711:                     playerIndex: casterIndex,
2712:                     element: element,
2713:                     scrollName: scrollName,
2714:                     stonesDrawn: drawn,
2715:                     buffActive: true
2716:                 });
2717:             }
2718: 
2719:             self.selectionMode = null;
2720:         };
2721: 
2722:         // Register selection mode for cancellation support
2723:         this.selectionMode = {
2724:             type: 'quick-reflexes',
2725:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
2726:             cleanup: () => {
2727:                 const modal = document.getElementById('quick-reflexes-modal');
2728:                 if (modal) modal.remove();
2729:             }
2730:         };
2731: 
2732:         showPicker();
2733:     },
2734: 
2735:     // Check if extended placement is active for a stone type
2736:     hasExtendedPlacement(stoneType, playerIndex) {
2737:         // Earth extended placement (5 hex range for earth stones)
2738:         if (stoneType === 'earth' && this.activeBuffs.earthExtendedPlacement) {
2739:             const buff = this.activeBuffs.earthExtendedPlacement;
2740:             if (buff.playerIndex === playerIndex) {
2741:                 return { active: true, range: buff.range };
2742:             }
2743:         }
2744:         return { active: false, range: 1 };
2745:     },
2746: 
2747:     // Check if global placement is active
2748:     hasGlobalPlacement(playerIndex) {
2749:         if (this.activeBuffs.globalPlacement) {
2750:             return this.activeBuffs.globalPlacement.playerIndex === playerIndex;
2751:         }
2752:         return false;
2753:     },

2759:         }
2760:         return false;
2761:     },
2762:

2766:     },
2767: 
2768:     // Track last scroll cast this turn (for Reflect)
2769:     lastScrollCastThisTurn: null,
2770:     stonesPlacedThisTurn: 0,
2771:

2775:             name: scrollName,

2777:         };

2779:
