2781:     recordStonePlaced() {
2782:         this.stonesPlacedThisTurn++;
2783:     },
2784: 
2785:     // Clear turn tracking (called on End Turn)
2786:     clearTurnTracking() {
2787:         this.lastScrollCastThisTurn = null;
2788:         this.stonesPlacedThisTurn = 0;
2789:     },
2790: 
2791:     // At start of a player's turn: if they have pending Reflects, run all stored scrolls and count as water activation.
2792:     // Returns array of { triggered: true, playerIndex, scrollName, definition } for all reflects processed so caller can broadcast.
2793:     // Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) are chained sequentially via onComplete callbacks.
2794:     // onAllComplete: optional callback fired after the last reflect fully resolves.
2795:     // Use this to chain processPsychicPending after all reflects finish.
2796:     processReflectPending(playerIndex, onAllComplete) {
2797:         const pendingArray = this.activeBuffs.reflectPending;
2798:         if (!Array.isArray(pendingArray) || pendingArray.length === 0) {
2799:             if (typeof onAllComplete === 'function') onAllComplete();
2800:             return null;
2801:         }
2802: 
2803:         // Filter to only this player's reflects
2804:         const myReflects = pendingArray.filter(p => p.playerIndex === playerIndex);
2805:         if (myReflects.length === 0) {
2806:             if (typeof onAllComplete === 'function') onAllComplete();
2807:             return null;
2808:         }
2809: 
2810:         console.log(`🪞 processReflectPending for player ${playerIndex}: ${myReflects.length} reflects queued:`, myReflects.map(r => r.scrollName));
2811: 
2812:         // Remove this player's reflects from the array
2813:         this.activeBuffs.reflectPending = pendingArray.filter(p => p.playerIndex !== playerIndex);
2814: 
2815:         const results = [];
2816:         let waterActivated = false;
2817:         const self = this;
2818: 
2819:         // Store original active player so we can restore it after interactive selections
2820:         const originalActivePlayer = (typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') ? activePlayerIndex : null;
2821: 
2822:         // Run each pending reflect one at a time. Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) chain
2823:         // via onComplete so they fully resolve before the next one starts.
2824:         // When all are done, calls onAllComplete so Psychic (or other follow-up) can begin.
2825:         const runNext = (index) => {
2826:             if (index >= myReflects.length) {
2827:                 // All reflects finished — fire the completion callback (starts Psychic, etc.)
2828:                 if (typeof onAllComplete === 'function') onAllComplete();
2829:                 return;
2830:             }
2831: 
2832:             const pending = myReflects[index];
2833:             console.log(`🪞 Processing reflect #${index + 1}/${myReflects.length}: ${pending.scrollName}`);
2834:             const scrollName = pending.scrollName;
2835:             const definition = pending.definition;
2836:             const displayName = definition?.name || scrollName;
2837:             updateStatus(`Reflect triggers: activating ${displayName}!`);
2838: 
2839:             // Broadcast reflect-triggered for this scroll immediately before executing,
2840:             // so remote clients receive them in order and can queue them sequentially.
2841:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2842:                 const fullDef = definition?.element ? definition : (self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName] || definition);
2843:                 broadcastGameAction('reflect-triggered', {
2844:                     playerIndex: playerIndex,
2845:                     scrollName: scrollName,
2846:                     element: fullDef?.element,
2847:                     elements: fullDef?.element === 'catacomb' ? fullDef?.patterns?.[0]?.map(p => p.type) : null,
2848:                     isCatacomb: fullDef?.element === 'catacomb'
2849:                 });
2850:             }
2851: 
2852:             // Run the reflected scroll's ability with full context
2853:             const result = self.execute(scrollName, playerIndex, {
2854:                 spell: definition,
2855:                 scrollName,
2856:                 onComplete: () => {
2857:                     // Restore activePlayerIndex after interactive selection resolves
2858:                     if (originalActivePlayer !== null && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
2859:                         activePlayerIndex = originalActivePlayer;
2860:                     }
2861:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2862:                     runNext(index + 1);
2863:                 }
2864:             });
2865: 
2866:             // Restore activePlayerIndex immediately for non-interactive scrolls
2867:             if (!result?.requiresSelection) {
2868:                 if (originalActivePlayer !== null && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
2869:                     activePlayerIndex = originalActivePlayer;
2870:                 }
2871:             }
2872: 
2873:             // Only mark water as activated ONCE (even if multiple reflects trigger)
2874:             if (result.success && self.spellSystem && !waterActivated) {
2875:                 self.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2876:                 const activated = self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated;
2877:                 activated.add('water');
2878:                 waterActivated = true;
2879:                 console.log(`🪞 processReflectPending activated water for player ${playerIndex}:`, Array.from(activated));
2880:                 if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
2881:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
2882:                 }
2883:             }
2884: 
2885:             const fullDef = definition?.element ? definition : (self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName] || definition);
2886:             results.push({ triggered: true, playerIndex, scrollName, definition: fullDef });
2887: 
2888:             // For non-interactive scrolls, immediately advance to the next
2889:             if (!result?.requiresSelection) {
2890:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2891:                 runNext(index + 1);
2892:             }
2893:             // Interactive scrolls will call runNext via onComplete when the player finishes
2894:         };
2895: 
2896:         runNext(0);
2897: 
2898:         return results.length > 0 ? results : null;
2899:     },
2900: 
2901:     // At start of a player's turn: if they have pending Psychics, run all stolen scrolls and count as void activation.
2902:     // Returns array of { triggered: true, playerIndex, scrollName, definition } for all psychics processed so caller can broadcast.
2903:     // Interactive scrolls (requiresSelection) are chained sequentially via onComplete callbacks.
2904:     processPsychicPending(playerIndex) {
2905:         const pendingArray = this.activeBuffs.psychicPending;
2906:         if (!Array.isArray(pendingArray) || pendingArray.length === 0) return null;
2907: 
2908:         // Filter to only this player's psychics
2909:         const myPsychics = pendingArray.filter(p => p.playerIndex === playerIndex);
2910:         if (myPsychics.length === 0) return null;
2911: 
2912:         console.log(`🔮 processPsychicPending for player ${playerIndex}: ${myPsychics.length} psychics queued:`, myPsychics.map(r => r.scrollName));
2913: 
2914:         // Remove this player's psychics from the array
2915:         this.activeBuffs.psychicPending = pendingArray.filter(p => p.playerIndex !== playerIndex);
2916: 
2917:         const results = [];
2918:         let voidActivated = false;
2919:         const self = this;
2920: 
2921:         // Run each pending psychic scroll one at a time. If the scroll is interactive
2922:         // (requiresSelection), the next one only starts after the player finishes the
2923:         // selection (via the onComplete callback). Non-interactive scrolls run immediately
2924:         // and advance to the next in the same tick.
2925:         const runNext = (index) => {
2926:             if (index >= myPsychics.length) return; // All done
2927: 
2928:             const pending = myPsychics[index];
2929:             console.log(`🔮 Processing psychic #${index + 1}/${myPsychics.length}: ${pending.scrollName}`);
2930:             const scrollName = pending.scrollName;
2931:             const definition = pending.definition;
2932:             const displayName = definition?.name || scrollName;
2933:             updateStatus(`Psychic triggers: activating ${displayName}!`);
2934: 
2935:             const fullDef = definition?.element ? definition : (self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName] || definition);
2936: 
2937:             // Broadcast this trigger to remote clients immediately (before interactive selection starts)
2938:             // so they can queue it on their side. This replaces the broadcast loop in game-ui.js.
2939:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
2940:                 broadcastGameAction('psychic-triggered', {
2941:                     playerIndex,
2942:                     scrollName,
2943:                     element: fullDef?.element,
2944:                     elements: fullDef?.element === 'catacomb' ? fullDef?.patterns?.[0]?.map(p => p.type) : null,
2945:                     isCatacomb: fullDef?.element === 'catacomb'
2946:                 });
2947:             }
2948: 
2949:             // CRITICAL: Temporarily set activePlayerIndex to the Psychic caster
2950:             // so the stolen scroll executes with the correct player context
2951:             const originalActivePlayer = typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? activePlayerIndex : null;
2952:             if (typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
2953:                 activePlayerIndex = playerIndex;
2954:             }
2955: 
2956:             // Run the stolen scroll's ability (with flag to prevent marking its elements as activated)
2957:             // Pass onComplete so interactive scrolls (e.g. Heavy Stomp) can chain the next one
2958:             const result = self.execute(scrollName, playerIndex, {
2959:                 spell: definition,
2960:                 scrollName,
2961:                 skipActivationTracking: true,  // Only void counts toward win condition
2962:                 onComplete: () => {
2963:                     // Restore activePlayerIndex after interactive selection resolves
2964:                     if (originalActivePlayer !== null && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
2965:                         activePlayerIndex = originalActivePlayer;
2966:                     }
2967:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2968:                     runNext(index + 1);
2969:                 }
2970:             });
2971: 
2972:             // Restore activePlayerIndex immediately for non-interactive scrolls
2973:             // (interactive ones restore it inside the onComplete callback above)
2974:             if (!result?.requiresSelection) {
2975:                 if (originalActivePlayer !== null && typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined') {
2976:                     activePlayerIndex = originalActivePlayer;
2977:                 }
2978:             }
2979: 
2980:             // Only mark void as activated ONCE (even if multiple psychics trigger)
2981:             if (result.success && self.spellSystem && !voidActivated) {
2982:                 self.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
2983:                 const activated = self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex].activated;
2984:                 activated.add('void');
2985:                 voidActivated = true;
2986:                 console.log(`🔮 processPsychicPending activated void for player ${playerIndex}:`, Array.from(activated));
2987:                 if (typeof updatePlayerElementSymbols === 'function') {
2988:                     updatePlayerElementSymbols(playerIndex);
2989:                 }
2990:             }
2991: 
2992:             results.push({ triggered: true, playerIndex, scrollName, definition: fullDef });
2993: 
2994:             // For non-interactive scrolls, immediately advance to the next
2995:             if (!result?.requiresSelection) {
2996:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
2997:                 runNext(index + 1);
2998:             }
2999:             // Interactive scrolls will call runNext via onComplete when the player finishes
3000:         };
3001: 
3002:         runNext(0);
3003: 
3004:         return results.length > 0 ? results : null;
3005:     },
3006: 
3007:     // ============================================
3008:     // WATER SCROLL MODES
3009:     // ============================================
3010: 
3011:     // Water V - Control the Current: This turn, transform water stones that are adjacent to you (no Done button; eligibility updates when you move)
3012:     enterWaterTransformMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
3013:         const self = this;
3014: 
3015:         const playerPos = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions[casterIndex] : (typeof playerPosition !== 'undefined' ? playerPosition : null);
3016:         if (!playerPos) {
3017:             updateStatus('Cannot find player position!');
3018:             return;
3019:         }
3020: 
3021:         const initialAdjacent = this.getAdjacentWaterStones(playerPos, casterIndex);
3022:         this.highlightStones(initialAdjacent, '#5894f4');
3023: 
3024:         this.selectionMode = {
3025:             type: 'water-transform',
3026:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
3027:             highlightedStones: initialAdjacent,
3028:             completionPayload: completionPayload || null,
3029: 
3030:             handleStoneClick(stone) {
3031:                 if (stone.type !== 'water') {
3032:                     updateStatus('Only water stones can be transformed.');
3033:                     return;
3034:                 }
3035:                 const pos = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions[self.selectionMode.casterIndex] : (typeof playerPosition !== 'undefined' ? playerPosition : null);
3036:                 if (!pos) return;
3037:                 if (!self.isStoneAdjacentToPosition(stone.x, stone.y, pos.x, pos.y)) {
3038:                     updateStatus('That water stone is not adjacent to you. Move next to it to transform it.');
3039:                     return;
3040:                 }
3041:                 self.showWaterTransformPopup(stone, self.selectionMode.casterIndex, () => {
3042:                     self.refreshWaterTransformHighlights();
3043:                 });
3044:             },
3045: 
3046:             cleanup() {
3047:                 if (self.selectionMode && self.selectionMode.highlightedStones) {
3048:                     self.selectionMode.highlightedStones.forEach(s => self.unhighlightStone(s));
3049:                 }
3050:             }
3051:         };
3052: 
3053:         updateStatus('Control the Current: transform adjacent water stones this turn. Move next to water stones to transform them.');
3054:     },
3055: 
3056:     // Update which stones are highlighted based on current player position (call after move or after a transform)
3057:     refreshWaterTransformHighlights() {
3058:         if (!this.selectionMode || this.selectionMode.type !== 'water-transform') return;
3059:         const casterIndex = this.selectionMode.casterIndex;
3060:         const playerPos = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions[casterIndex] : (typeof playerPosition !== 'undefined' ? playerPosition : null);
3061:         if (!playerPos) return;
3062:         const prev = this.selectionMode.highlightedStones || [];
3063:         prev.forEach(s => this.unhighlightStone(s));
3064:         const next = this.getAdjacentWaterStones(playerPos, casterIndex);
3065:         this.highlightStones(next, '#5894f4');
3066:         this.selectionMode.highlightedStones = next;
3067:     },
3068: 
3069:     // Get water stones adjacent to player (same rule as break/place: exactly one hex step away)
3070:     getAdjacentWaterStones(playerPos, playerIndex) {
3071:         if (typeof placedStones === 'undefined') return [];
3072: 
3073:         return placedStones.filter(stone => {
3074:             if (stone.type !== 'water') return false;
3075:             return this.isStoneAdjacentToPosition(stone.x, stone.y, playerPos.x, playerPos.y);
3076:         });
3077:     },
3078: 
3079:     // Same hex-adjacency logic as game-core isAdjacentToPlayer (one hex step only)
3080:     isStoneAdjacentToPosition(stoneX, stoneY, playerX, playerY) {
3081:         const tileSize = typeof TILE_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? TILE_SIZE : 20;
3082:         const playerHex = this.pixelToHex(playerX, playerY, tileSize);
3083:         const targetHex = this.pixelToHex(stoneX, stoneY, tileSize);
3084:         const dq = Math.abs(playerHex.q - targetHex.q);
3085:         const dr = Math.abs(playerHex.r - targetHex.r);
3086:         const ds = Math.abs((-playerHex.q - playerHex.r) - (-targetHex.q - targetHex.r));
3087:         const hexDistance = Math.max(dq, dr, ds);
3088:         return hexDistance === 1;
3089:     },
3090: 
3091:     pixelToHex(x, y, s) {
3092:         const q = (x * Math.sqrt(3) / 3 - y / 3) / s;
3093:         const r = (y * 2 / 3) / s;
3094:         return this.hexRound(q, r);
3095:     },
3096: 
3097:     hexRound(q, r) {
3098:         const s = -q - r;
3099:         let rq = Math.round(q);
3100:         let rr = Math.round(r);
3101:         const rs = Math.round(s);
3102:         const qDiff = Math.abs(rq - q);
3103:         const rDiff = Math.abs(rr - r);
3104:         const sDiff = Math.abs(rs - s);
3105:         if (qDiff > rDiff && qDiff > sDiff) rq = -rr - rs;
3106:         else if (rDiff > sDiff) rr = -rq - rs;
3107:         return { q: rq, r: rr };
3108:     },
3109: 
3110:     // Show popup to transform water stone
3111:     showWaterTransformPopup(stone, casterIndex, onComplete) {
3112:         const existing = document.getElementById('water-transform-modal');
3113:         if (existing) existing.remove();
3114: 
3115:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
3116:         overlay.id = 'water-transform-modal';
3117:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
3118:             position: 'fixed',
3119:             top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
3120:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
3121:             zIndex: '3000',
3122:             display: 'flex',
3123:             justifyContent: 'center',
3124:             alignItems: 'center'
3125:         });
3126: 
3127:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
3128:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
3129:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
3130:             border: '2px solid #5894f4',
3131:             borderRadius: '10px',
3132:             padding: '20px',
3133:             color: 'white',
3134:             minWidth: '300px'
3135:         });
3136: 
3137:         const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
3138:         titleEl.textContent = 'Transform Water Stone';
3139:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '10px';
3140:         titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
3141:         modal.appendChild(titleEl);
3142: 
3143:         const descEl = document.createElement('p');
3144:         descEl.textContent = 'Choose an element to transform this water stone into:';
3145:         descEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
3146:         descEl.style.fontSize = '14px';
3147:         descEl.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
3148:         modal.appendChild(descEl);
3149: 
3150:         const elements = ['earth', 'fire', 'wind', 'void']; // Not water - we're transforming FROM water
3151:         const elementColors = {
3152:             earth: '#69d83a',
3153:             fire: '#ed1b43',
3154:             wind: '#ffce00',
3155:             void: '#9458f4'
3156:         };
3157: 
3158:         elements.forEach(element => {
3159:             // Check if source pool has stones available
3160:             const available = typeof stonePools !== 'undefined' ? (stonePools[element] || 0) : 0;
3161: 
3162:             const btn = document.createElement('button');
3163:             btn.textContent = `${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} (${available} available)`;
3164:             btn.disabled = available <= 0;
3165:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
3166:                 display: 'block',
3167:                 width: '100%',
3168:                 padding: '12px',
3169:                 margin: '8px 0',
3170:                 backgroundColor: available > 0 ? '#2d2d44' : '#1a1a1a',
3171:                 color: available > 0 ? elementColors[element] : '#555',
3172:                 border: `2px solid ${available > 0 ? elementColors[element] : '#333'}`,
3173:                 borderRadius: '5px',
3174:                 cursor: available > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
3175:                 fontSize: '14px',
3176:                 fontWeight: 'bold'
3177:             });
3178: 
3179:             if (available > 0) {
3180:                 btn.onmouseenter = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d54';
3181:                 btn.onmouseleave = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
3182:                 btn.onclick = () => {
3183:                     overlay.remove();
3184:                     this.transformWaterStone(stone, element, casterIndex);
3185:                     if (onComplete) onComplete();
3186:                 };
3187:             }
3188:             modal.appendChild(btn);
3189:         });
3190: 
3191:         const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
3192:         cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
3193:         Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
3194:             marginTop: '15px',
3195:             padding: '10px 20px',
3196:             backgroundColor: '#7f8c8d',
3197:             color: 'white',
3198:             border: 'none',
3199:             borderRadius: '5px',
3200:             cursor: 'pointer',
3201:             width: '100%'
3202:         });
3203:         cancelBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
3204:         modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
3205: 
3206:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
3207:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
3208:     },
3209: 
3210:     // Transform a water stone into another element
3211:     transformWaterStone(stone, newElement, casterIndex) {
3212:         // Return water stone to source pool
3213:         if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined') {
3214:             stonePools.water = (stonePools.water || 0) + 1;
3215:         }
3216: 
3217:         // Take stone from new element's source pool
3218:         if (typeof stonePools !== 'undefined') {
3219:             stonePools[newElement] = (stonePools[newElement] || 0) - 1;
3220:         }
3221: 
3222:         // Update the stone's type and visual
3223:         stone.type = newElement;
3224: 
3225:         // Remove any water stone indicators (mimicry/chain rings) before transformation
3226:         if (stone.element) {
3227:             const mimicryIndicator = stone.element.querySelector('.mimicry-indicator');
3228:             if (mimicryIndicator) {
3229:                 mimicryIndicator.remove();
3230:             }
3231:             const chainIndicator = stone.element.querySelector('.chain-indicator');
3232:             if (chainIndicator) {
3233:                 chainIndicator.remove();
3234:             }
3235:         }
3236: 
3237:         // Update the stone's visual appearance - both color and symbol
3238:         if (stone.element && typeof STONE_TYPES !== 'undefined' && STONE_TYPES[newElement]) {
3239:             const circle = stone.element.querySelector('circle');
3240:             const text = stone.element.querySelector('text');
3241: 
3242:             if (circle) {
3243:                 circle.setAttribute('fill', STONE_TYPES[newElement].color);
3244:             }
3245: 
3246:             if (text) {
3247:                 text.textContent = STONE_TYPES[newElement].symbol;
3248:             }
3249:         }
3250: 
3251:         updateStatus(`Transformed water stone into ${newElement}!`);
3252: 
3253:         // Broadcast in multiplayer
3254:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
3255:             broadcastGameAction('water-stone-transformed', {
3256:                 stoneX: stone.x,
3257:                 stoneY: stone.y,
3258:                 newElement: newElement
3259:             });
3260:         }
3261: 
3262:         // Signal completion to trigger win condition broadcast
3263:         // Note: Control the Current allows multiple transforms per turn, so we call this after each transform
3264:         // The win condition is only activated once (when the scroll is first cast), but we need to broadcast it
3265:         if (this.selectionMode && this.selectionMode.completionPayload) {
3266:             const payload = this.selectionMode.completionPayload;
3267:             if (this.spellSystem && typeof this.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
3268:                 this.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(payload.scrollName, payload.effectName, payload.spell);
3269:             }
3270:         }
3271:     },
3272: 
3273:     // Highlight stones with click handlers
3274:     highlightStones(stones, color) {
3275:         stones.forEach(stone => this.highlightStone(stone, color));
3276:     },
3277: 
3278:     highlightStone(stone, color) {
3279:         if (!stone.element) return;
3280:         const circle = stone.element.querySelector('circle');
3281:         if (circle) {
3282:             circle.setAttribute('data-original-stroke', circle.getAttribute('stroke') || 'none');
3283:             circle.setAttribute('data-original-stroke-width', circle.getAttribute('stroke-width') || '0');
3284:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', color);
3285:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', '4');
3286: 
3287:             // Add pulsing animation class
3288:             circle.style.animation = 'stonePulse 1s ease-in-out infinite';
3289: 
3290:             // Make clickable with cursor change
3291:             stone.element.style.cursor = 'pointer';
3292:             stone.element.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
3293: 
3294:             // Add direct click handler to stone element for more reliable clicking
3295:             const self = this;
3296:             stone._clickHandler = function(e) {
3297:                 e.preventDefault();
3298:                 e.stopPropagation();
3299:                 if (self.selectionMode && self.selectionMode.handleStoneClick) {
3300:                     self.selectionMode.handleStoneClick(stone);
3301:                 }
3302:             };
3303:             stone.element.addEventListener('click', stone._clickHandler);
3304: 
3305:             // Also handle touch for mobile
3306:             stone._touchHandler = function(e) {
3307:                 e.preventDefault();
3308:                 if (self.selectionMode && self.selectionMode.handleStoneClick) {
3309:                     self.selectionMode.handleStoneClick(stone);
3310:                 }
3311:             };
3312:             stone.element.addEventListener('touchend', stone._touchHandler);
3313:         }
3314: 
3315:         // Add pulse animation if not already in DOM
3316:         if (!document.getElementById('stone-pulse-style')) {
3317:             const style = document.createElement('style');
3318:             style.id = 'stone-pulse-style';
3319:             style.textContent = `
3320:                 @keyframes stonePulse {
3321:                     0%, 100% { stroke-width: 4px; opacity: 1; }
3322:                     50% { stroke-width: 6px; opacity: 0.8; }
3323:                 }
3324:             `;
3325:             document.head.appendChild(style);
3326:         }
3327:     },
3328: 
3329:     unhighlightStone(stone) {
3330:         if (!stone.element) return;
3331:         const circle = stone.element.querySelector('circle');
3332:         if (circle) {
3333:             const origStroke = circle.getAttribute('data-original-stroke') || 'none';
3334:             const origWidth = circle.getAttribute('data-original-stroke-width') || '0';
3335:             circle.setAttribute('stroke', origStroke);
3336:             circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', origWidth);
3337:             circle.style.animation = '';
3338:         }
3339: 
3340:         // Remove click handlers
3341:         if (stone._clickHandler) {
3342:             stone.element.removeEventListener('click', stone._clickHandler);
3343:             delete stone._clickHandler;
3344:         }
3345:         if (stone._touchHandler) {
3346:             stone.element.removeEventListener('touchend', stone._touchHandler);
3347:             delete stone._touchHandler;
3348:         }
3349: 
3350:         // Reset cursor
3351:         stone.element.style.cursor = '';
3352:         stone.element.style.pointerEvents = '';
3353:     },
3354: 
3355:     // Water II - Refreshing Thought: Discard a scroll to draw another
3356:     enterScrollDiscardMode(casterIndex, mode) {
3357:         const self = this;
3358: 
3359:         // Get player's scrolls
3360:         const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex];
3361:         if (!playerScrolls || playerScrolls.hand.size === 0) {
3362:             updateStatus('No scrolls to discard!');
3363:             return;
3364:         }
3365: 
3366:         // Create scroll selection UI
3367:         const scrollArray = Array.from(playerScrolls.hand);
3368:         this.showScrollSelectionModal(scrollArray, 'Select a scroll to discard:', (selectedScroll) => {
3369:             // Get scroll element type
3370:             const scrollDef = this.spellSystem?.patterns?.[selectedScroll];
3371:             const element = scrollDef?.element;
3372: 
3373:             // Remove from hand, add to common area using proper method
3374:             playerScrolls.hand.delete(selectedScroll);
3375:             if (this.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea) {
3376:                 this.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(selectedScroll);
3377:             }
3378: 
3379:             // Draw a new scroll of the same element from the deck
3380:             let newScroll = null;
3381:             if (element && this.spellSystem?.scrollDecks?.[element]?.length > 0) {
3382:                 newScroll = this.spellSystem.scrollDecks[element].pop();
3383:             }
3384: 
3385:             if (newScroll) {
3386:                 playerScrolls.hand.add(newScroll);
3387:                 updateStatus(`Discarded ${scrollDef?.name || selectedScroll}. Drew a new ${element} scroll!`);
3388:             } else {
3389:                 updateStatus(`Discarded ${scrollDef?.name || selectedScroll}. No ${element} scrolls left in deck!`);
3390:             }
3391: 
3392:             // Update UI
3393:             if (this.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) {
3394:                 this.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3395:             }
3396:         });
3397:     },
3398: 
3399:     // Water III - Inspiring Draught: Select 1 deck, draw 2 from it, add to hand, then show ALL scrolls
3400:     // of that element and player chooses one to put back; that deck is then shuffled.
3401:     enterInspiringDraughtMode(casterIndex) {
3402:         const self = this;
3403:         const spellSystem = this.spellSystem;
3404:         if (!spellSystem) return;
3405: 
3406:         this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
3407:         const playerScrolls = spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex];
3408:         if (!playerScrolls) return;
3409: 
3410:         // Step 1: Select ONE deck to draw from
3411:         this.showDeckSelectionModal(1, (selectedDecks) => {
3412:             if (!selectedDecks || selectedDecks.length === 0) {
3413:                 updateStatus('No deck selected.');
3414:                 return;
3415:             }
3416:             const deckType = selectedDecks[0];
3417:             const deck = spellSystem.scrollDecks?.[deckType];
3418:             if (!deck || deck.length === 0) {
3419:                 updateStatus('That deck has no scrolls!');
3420:                 return;
3421:             }
3422: 
3423:             // Step 2: Draw up to 2 scrolls from that deck (add to hand immediately)
3424:             const drawnScrolls = [];
3425:             for (let i = 0; i < 2 && deck.length > 0; i++) {
3426:                 const scroll = deck.pop();
3427:                 drawnScrolls.push(scroll);
3428:                 playerScrolls.hand.add(scroll);
3429:             }
3430: 
3431:             if (drawnScrolls.length === 0) {
3432:                 updateStatus('No scrolls available to draw!');
3433:                 return;
3434:             }
3435: 
3436:             // Step 3: Collect ALL scrolls the player has of this element (hand + active)
3437:             const getScrollElement = spellSystem.getScrollElement.bind(spellSystem);
3438:             const handOfType = [...playerScrolls.hand].filter(name => getScrollElement(name) === deckType);
3439:             const activeOfType = [...(playerScrolls.active || [])].filter(name => getScrollElement(name) === deckType);
3440:             const allOfElement = [...new Set([...handOfType, ...activeOfType])];
3441: 
3442:             if (allOfElement.length === 0) {
3443:                 updateStatus('No scrolls of that element to put back.');
3444:                 if (spellSystem.updateScrollCount) spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3445:                 return;
3446:             }
3447: 
3448:             const elementName = deckType.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + deckType.slice(1);
3449: 
3450:             // Step 4: Show modal - choose one scroll to put back; deck will be shuffled
3451:             this.showScrollSelectionModal(
3452:                 allOfElement,
3453:                 `Choose one scroll to put back into the ${elementName} deck (deck will be shuffled):`,
3454:                 (selectedToReturn) => {
3455:                     // Remove from hand or active
3456:                     playerScrolls.hand.delete(selectedToReturn);
3457:                     playerScrolls.active.delete(selectedToReturn);
3458:                     // Put back into deck and shuffle
3459:                     spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType].push(selectedToReturn);
3460:                     this.shuffleDeck(spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType]);
3461:                     updateStatus(`Put 1 scroll back into the ${elementName} deck and shuffled.`);
3462:                     if (spellSystem.updateScrollCount) spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3463:                 }
3464:             );
3465:         });
3466:     },
3467: 
3468:     ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex) {
3469:         if (this.spellSystem && typeof this.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure === 'function') {
3470:             this.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIndex);
3471:         }
3472:     },
3473: 
3474:     // Generic deck draw mode (e.g. other effects: select N decks, draw 1 from each)
3475:     enterDeckDrawMode(casterIndex, drawCount) {
3476:         const self = this;
3477:         const drawnScrolls = [];
3478:         const deckSources = [];
3479: 
3480:         this.showDeckSelectionModal(drawCount, (selectedDecks) => {
3481:             selectedDecks.forEach(deckType => {
3482:                 if (this.spellSystem?.scrollDecks?.[deckType]?.length > 0) {
3483:                     const scroll = this.spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType].pop();
3484:                     drawnScrolls.push({ scroll, deckType });
3485:                 }
3486:             });
3487: 
3488:             if (drawnScrolls.length === 0) {
3489:                 updateStatus('No scrolls available to draw!');
3490:                 return;
3491:             }
3492: 
3493:             if (drawnScrolls.length === 1) {
3494:                 const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex];
3495:                 if (playerScrolls) {
3496:                     this.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(casterIndex);
3497:                     playerScrolls.hand.add(drawnScrolls[0].scroll);
3498:                 }
3499:                 updateStatus(`Drew 1 scroll (kept it).`);
3500:                 if (this.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) this.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3501:                 return;
3502:             }
3503: 
3504:             this.showScrollSelectionModal(
3505:                 drawnScrolls.map(d => d.scroll),
3506:                 'Select one scroll to put back:',
3507:                 (selectedToReturn) => {
3508:                     const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex];
3509:                     drawnScrolls.forEach(({ scroll, deckType }) => {
3510:                         if (scroll === selectedToReturn) {
3511:                             this.spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType].push(scroll);
3512:                             this.shuffleDeck(this.spellSystem.scrollDecks[deckType]);
3513:                         } else {
3514:                             if (playerScrolls) playerScrolls.hand.add(scroll);
3515:                         }
3516:                     });
3517:                     updateStatus('Drew 2 scrolls, put 1 back.');
3518:                     if (this.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) this.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3519:                 }
3520:             );
3521:         });
3522:     },
3523: 
3524:     // Water IV - Wandering River: Change tile element (any non-player tile)
3525:     enterTileElementChangeMode(casterIndex) {
3526:         const self = this;
3527: 
3528:         // Any tile except player tiles
3529:         const eligibleTiles = this.getEligibleTilesForWanderingRiver();
3530: 
3531:         if (eligibleTiles.length === 0) {
3532:             updateStatus('No tiles to modify!');
3533:             return;
3534:         }
3535: 
3536:         this.highlightTiles(eligibleTiles, '#5894f4');
3537: 
3538:         const cancelBtn = this.createCancelButton('Cancel', () => {
3539:             self.cancelSelectionMode();
3540:         });
3541: 
3542:         this.selectionMode = {
3543:             type: 'tile-element-change',
3544:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
3545:             eligibleTiles: eligibleTiles,
3546:             cancelBtn: cancelBtn,
3547: 
3548:             handleTileClick(tile) {
3549:                 if (!eligibleTiles.find(t => t.id === tile.id)) {
3550:                     updateStatus('Cannot modify this tile.');
3551:                     return;
3552:                 }
3553: 
3554:                 // Show element selection
3555:                 self.showElementSelectionModal((selectedElement) => {
3556:                     // Apply temporary element change (affects all players: anyone who reveals draws that element's scroll)
3557:                     self.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver = self.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver || [];
3558:                     const entry = {
3559:                         tileId: tile.id,
3560:                         originalElement: tile.shrineType,
3561:                         newElement: selectedElement,
3562:                         expiresNextTurn: true,
3563:                         playerIndex: casterIndex
3564:                     };
3565:                     self.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver.push(entry);
3566: 
3567:                     // Visual indicator: tile looks like the chosen element (symbol + color)
3568:                     self.applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tile, selectedElement);
3569: 
3570:                     // Broadcast so other players see and are affected by the transformation
3571:                     if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
3572:                         broadcastGameAction('wandering-river-apply', {
3573:                             tileId: tile.id,
3574:                             newElement: selectedElement,
3575:                             playerIndex: casterIndex
3576:                         });
3577:                     }
3578: 
3579:                     updateStatus(`Tile now counts as ${selectedElement} until your next turn!`);
3580:                     self.selectionMode.cleanup();
3581:                     self.selectionMode = null;
3582:                 });
3583:             },
3584: 
3585:             cleanup() {
3586:                 eligibleTiles.forEach(tile => self.unhighlightTile(tile));
3587:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
3588:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
3589:                 }
3590:             }
3591:         };
3592: 
3593:         updateStatus('Select a tile to change its element.');
3594:     },
3595: 
3596:     // Effective tile element for game logic (Wandering River override)
3597:     getEffectiveTileElement(tile) {
3598:         if (!tile || !this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver || !Array.isArray(this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver)) return tile ? tile.shrineType : null;
3599:         const id = Number(tile.id);
3600:         const entry = this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver.find(e => Number(e.tileId) === id);
3601:         return entry ? entry.newElement : (tile.shrineType || null);
3602:     },
3603: 
3604:     // Add visual indicator: tile looks like the chosen element (symbol + color)
3605:     applyWanderingRiverIndicator(tile, newElement) {
3606:         if (!tile || !tile.element) return;
3607:         const stoneTypes = (typeof STONE_TYPES !== 'undefined') ? STONE_TYPES : { earth: { color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲' }, water: { color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯' }, fire: { color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦' }, wind: { color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋' }, void: { color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺' }, catacomb: { color: '#8b4513', symbol: '🔅' } };
3608:         const info = stoneTypes[newElement] || { color: '#888', symbol: newElement.charAt(0).toUpperCase() };
3609:         tile.element.classList.add('wandering-river-transformed', 'wandering-river-' + newElement);
3610:         tile.element.setAttribute('data-wandering-river-element', newElement);
3611:         let label = tile.element.querySelector('.wandering-river-label');
3612:         if (label) label.remove();
3613:         label = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
3614:         label.setAttribute('class', 'wandering-river-label');
3615:         label.setAttribute('x', 0);
3616:         label.setAttribute('y', -8);
3617:         label.setAttribute('text-anchor', 'middle');
3618:         label.setAttribute('dominant-baseline', 'middle');
3619:         label.setAttribute('fill', info.color);
3620:         label.setAttribute('font-size', '16');
3621:         label.setAttribute('font-weight', 'bold');
3622:         label.setAttribute('stroke', '#000');
3623:         label.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1');
3624:         label.textContent = info.symbol;
3625:         tile.element.appendChild(label);
3626:     },
3627: 
3628:     // Remove Wandering River indicator when buff expires
3629:     removeWanderingRiverIndicator(tile) {
3630:         if (!tile || !tile.element) return;
3631:         const el = tile.element.getAttribute('data-wandering-river-element');
3632:         if (el) tile.element.classList.remove('wandering-river-' + el);
3633:         tile.element.classList.remove('wandering-river-transformed');
3634:         tile.element.removeAttribute('data-wandering-river-element');
3635:         const label = tile.element.querySelector('.wandering-river-label');
3636:         if (label) label.remove();
3637:     },
3638: 
3639:     // Clear Wandering River buffs for a player when their next turn starts
3640:     clearWanderingRiverForPlayer(playerIndex) {
3641:         if (!this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver || !Array.isArray(this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver)) return;
3642:         const removed = this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver.filter(e => e.playerIndex === playerIndex);
3643:         this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver = this.activeBuffs.wanderingRiver.filter(e => e.playerIndex !== playerIndex);
3644:         if (typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined') {
3645:             removed.forEach(e => {
3646:                 const tid = Number(e.tileId);
3647:                 const tile = placedTiles.find(t => Number(t.id) === tid);
3648:                 if (tile) this.removeWanderingRiverIndicator(tile);
3649:             });
3650:         }
3651:     },
3652: 
3653:     // ============================================
3654:     // FIRE SCROLL MODES
3655:     // ============================================
3656: 
3657:     // Fire III - Sacrificial Pyre: Activate scroll from hand ignoring pattern
3658:     enterScrollSacrificeMode(casterIndex) {
3659:         const self = this;
3660: 
3661:         // Get player's scrolls
3662:         const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex];
3663:         if (!playerScrolls || playerScrolls.hand.size === 0) {
3664:             updateStatus('No scrolls to sacrifice!');
3665:             return;
3666:         }
3667: 
3668:         // Only show the modal on the caster's client (in multiplayer)
3669:         const isMultiplayer = typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.isMultiplayer;
3670:         const myPlayerIndex = typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.myPlayerIndex : null;
3671:         if (isMultiplayer && myPlayerIndex !== null && casterIndex !== myPlayerIndex) {
3672:             console.log(`🔥 Sacrificial Pyre: Skipping modal for non-local player ${casterIndex} (I am player ${myPlayerIndex})`);
3673:             return;
3674:         }
3675: 
3676:         const scrollArray = Array.from(playerScrolls.hand);
3677:         this.showScrollSelectionModal(scrollArray, 'Select a scroll to sacrifice and activate:', (selectedScroll) => {
3678:             // Remove from hand
3679:             playerScrolls.hand.delete(selectedScroll);
3680: 
3681:             // Add to common area (not discard) using proper method
3682:             if (this.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea) {
3683:                 this.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(selectedScroll);
3684:             }
3685: 
3686:             // Get the scroll definition
3687:             const scrollDef = this.spellSystem?.patterns?.[selectedScroll];
3688:             if (!scrollDef) {
3689:                 updateStatus(`Error: Could not find scroll definition for ${selectedScroll}`);
3690:                 return;
3691:             }
3692: 
3693:             // Activate the scroll: add stones to pool and track element
3694:             if (scrollDef.element === 'catacomb') {
3695:                 // Catacomb scrolls: count how many of each element and add stones
3696:                 const elementCounts = {};
3697:                 if (scrollDef.patterns && scrollDef.patterns[0]) {
3698:                     scrollDef.patterns[0].forEach(pos => {
3699:                         elementCounts[pos.type] = (elementCounts[pos.type] || 0) + 1;
3700:                     });
3701:                 }
3702: 
3703:                 const rewards = [];
3704:                 Object.entries(elementCounts).forEach(([element, count]) => {
3705:                     const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : [];
3706:                     const poolCaps = typeof playerPoolCapacity !== 'undefined' ? playerPoolCapacity : {};
3707:                     if (pools[casterIndex] && poolCaps) {
3708:                         pools[casterIndex][element] = Math.min(
3709:                             poolCaps[element] || 5,
3710:                             (pools[casterIndex][element] || 0) + count
3711:                         );
3712:                         rewards.push(`+${count} ${element}`);
3713:                     }
3714:                     if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') updateStoneCount(element);
3715:                 });
3716:                 updateStatus(`Sacrificed ${scrollDef.name}! Added ${rewards.join(', ')} stones!`);
3717:             } else {
3718:                 // Regular element scrolls: add stones based on level
3719:                 const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : [];
3720:                 const poolCaps = typeof playerPoolCapacity !== 'undefined' ? playerPoolCapacity : {};
3721:                 if (pools[casterIndex] && poolCaps) {
3722:                     pools[casterIndex][scrollDef.element] = Math.min(
3723:                         poolCaps[scrollDef.element] || 5,
3724:                         (pools[casterIndex][scrollDef.element] || 0) + scrollDef.level
3725:                     );
3726:                 }
3727:                 if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') updateStoneCount(scrollDef.element);
3728: 
3729:                 updateStatus(`Sacrificed ${scrollDef.name}! Added +${scrollDef.level} ${scrollDef.element} stones!`);
3730:             }
3731: 
3732:             // NOTE: Only FIRE is marked as activated (from casting Sacrificial Pyre itself)
3733:             // The sacrificed scroll's elements do NOT count toward win condition
3734:             // Fire activation is already handled by the normal executeSpell flow for FIRE_SCROLL_3
3735: 
3736:             // If the scroll has a special effect, execute it too
3737:             const effect = self.getEffect(selectedScroll);
3738:             if (effect) {
3739:                 self.execute(selectedScroll, casterIndex, {});
3740:             }
3741: 
3742:             // Broadcast stone gains to other players (for resource tracking only, not win condition)
3743:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') {
3744:                 syncPlayerState();
3745:             }
3746: 
3747:             if (this.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) {
3748:                 this.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
3749:             }
3750:             if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') {
3751:                 updateCommonAreaUI();
3752:             }
3753:         });
3754:     },
3755: 
3756:         // Fire IV - Combust: Destroy stones on a tile
3757:     enterScorchedEarthMode(casterIndex) {
3758:         const self = this;
3759: 
3760:         // Get tiles that have stones on them (but not player tiles)
3761:         const tilesWithStones = (typeof placedTiles !== 'undefined' ? placedTiles : []).filter(tile => {
3762:             if (tile.isPlayerTile) return false;
3763:             return this.tileHasStones(tile);
3764:         });
3765: 
3766:         if (tilesWithStones.length === 0) {
3767:             updateStatus('No tiles with stones to combust!');
3768:             return;
3769:         }
3770: 
3771:         this.highlightTiles(tilesWithStones, '#ed1b43');
3772: 
3773:         const cancelBtn = this.createCancelButton('Cancel', () => {
3774:             self.cancelSelectionMode();
3775:         });
3776: 
3777:         this.selectionMode = {
3778:             type: 'scorched-earth',
3779:             casterIndex: casterIndex,
3780:             eligibleTiles: tilesWithStones,
3781:             cancelBtn: cancelBtn,
3782: 
3783:             handleTileClick(tile) {
3784:                 if (!tilesWithStones.find(t => t.id === tile.id)) {
3785:                     updateStatus('No stones on this tile to destroy.');
3786:                     return;
3787:                 }
3788: 
3789:                 // Destroy all stones on this tile
3790:                 self.destroyStonesOnTile(tile);
3791:                 updateStatus('Combust! All stones on the tile destroyed.');
3792: 
3793:                 self.selectionMode.cleanup();
3794:                 self.selectionMode = null;
3795:             },
3796: 
3797:             cleanup() {
3798:                 tilesWithStones.forEach(tile => self.unhighlightTile(tile));
3799:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
3800:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
3801:                 }
3802:             }
3803:         };
3804: 
3805:         updateStatus('Select a tile to destroy all stones on it.');
3806:     },
3807: 
3808:     // Fire IV - Transmute: discard stones/scrolls for AP
3809:     enterTransmuteMode(casterIndex) {
3810:         const self = this;
3811:         const overlayId = 'transmute-modal';
3812:         const existing = document.getElementById(overlayId);
3813:         if (existing) existing.remove();
3814: 
3815:         const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
3816:         const source = typeof stonePools !== 'undefined' ? stonePools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.stonePools);
3817:         const sourceCap = typeof sourcePoolCapacity !== 'undefined' ? sourcePoolCapacity : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.sourcePoolCapacity);
3818: 
3819:         const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem?.playerScrolls?.[casterIndex];
3820:         if (!playerScrolls) {
3821:             updateStatus('Transmute failed: no scroll data for player.');
3822:             return;
3823:         }
3824: 
3825:         let totalGained = 0;
3826:         const getMaxTotalAP = () => {
3827:             const voidCap = pools?.[casterIndex]?.void || 0;
3828:             return 5 + voidCap;
3829:         };
3830:         const getCurrentTotalAP = () => {
3831:             return (typeof currentAP !== 'undefined' ? currentAP : 0) + (typeof voidAP !== 'undefined' ? voidAP : 0);
3832:         };
3833:         const clampVoidAPToPool = () => {
3834:             if (typeof voidAP === 'undefined' || !pools?.[casterIndex]) return;
3835:             const maxVoid = pools[casterIndex].void || 0;
3836:             const oldVoid = voidAP;
3837:             voidAP = Math.min(voidAP, maxVoid);
3838:             if (oldVoid !== voidAP) {
3839:                 const display = document.getElementById('void-ap-display');
3840:                 if (display) {
3841:                     if (voidAP > 0) {
3842:                         display.textContent = `(+${voidAP} Void AP)`;
3843:                         display.style.display = 'inline';
3844:                     } else {
3845:                         display.style.display = 'none';
3846:                     }
3847:                 }
3848:             }
3849:         };
3850: 
3851:         const gainAPCapped = (amount) => {
3852:             const maxTotal = getMaxTotalAP();
3853:             const currentTotal = getCurrentTotalAP();
3854:             const room = Math.max(0, maxTotal - currentTotal);
3855:             const gain = Math.min(amount, room);
3856:             if (gain <= 0) {
3857:                 updateStatus('Transmute: AP is already at max.');
3858:                 return 0;
3859:             }
3860:             if (typeof addAP === 'function') addAP(gain);
3861:             return gain;
3862:         };
3863:         const atMaxAP = () => getCurrentTotalAP() >= getMaxTotalAP();
3864: 
3865:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
3866:         overlay.id = overlayId;
3867:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
3868:             position: 'fixed',
3869:             top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
3870:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
3871:             zIndex: '3000',
3872:             display: 'flex',
3873:             justifyContent: 'center',
3874:             alignItems: 'center'
3875:         });
3876: 
3877:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
3878:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
3879:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
3880:             border: '2px solid #ed1b43',
3881:             borderRadius: '10px',
3882:             padding: '20px',
3883:             color: 'white',
3884:             minWidth: '320px',
3885:             maxWidth: '420px'
3886:         });
3887: 
3888:         const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
3889:         titleEl.textContent = 'Transmute';
3890:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '10px';
3891:         titleEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
3892:         titleEl.style.color = '#ed1b43';
3893:         modal.appendChild(titleEl);
3894: 
3895:         const subtitle = document.createElement('div');
3896:         subtitle.textContent = 'Discard stones or scrolls to gain 2 AP each.';
3897:         subtitle.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
3898:         subtitle.style.fontSize = '13px';
3899:         subtitle.style.marginBottom = '10px';
3900:         subtitle.style.textAlign = 'center';
3901:         modal.appendChild(subtitle);
3902: 
3903:         const gainedEl = document.createElement('div');
3904:         gainedEl.textContent = 'AP gained: 0';
3905:         gainedEl.style.textAlign = 'center';
3906:         gainedEl.style.marginBottom = '10px';
3907:         modal.appendChild(gainedEl);
3908: 
3909:         const clearSuppress = () => {
3910:             const sup = self.activeBuffs.suppressVoidAPSync;
3911:             if (sup && sup.playerIndex === casterIndex) {
3912:                 delete self.activeBuffs.suppressVoidAPSync;
3913:             }
3914:         };
3915: 
3916:         const updateGained = () => {
3917:             gainedEl.textContent = `AP gained: ${totalGained}`;
3918:         };
3919: 
3920:         const sectionHeader = (text) => {
3921:             const h = document.createElement('div');
3922:             h.textContent = text;
3923:             h.style.marginTop = '10px';
3924:             h.style.marginBottom = '6px';
3925:             h.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
3926:             h.style.color = '#f39c12';
3927:             return h;
3928:         };
3929: 
3930:         // Stones
3931:         modal.appendChild(sectionHeader('Stones'));
3932:         const stoneTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
3933:         stoneTypes.forEach(type => {
3934:             const count = pools?.[casterIndex]?.[type] || 0;
3935:             const btn = document.createElement('button');
3936:             btn.textContent = `Discard 1 ${type} (${count})`;
3937:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
3938:                 display: 'block',
3939:                 width: '100%',
3940:                 padding: '8px',
3941:                 margin: '4px 0',
3942:                 backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
3943:                 color: 'white',
3944:                 border: '1px solid #444',
3945:                 borderRadius: '5px',
3946:                 cursor: count > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
3947:                 opacity: count > 0 ? '1' : '0.4'
3948:             });
3949:             btn.onclick = () => {
3950:                 const available = pools?.[casterIndex]?.[type] || 0;
3951:                 if (atMaxAP()) {
3952:                     updateStatus('Transmute: AP is already at max.');
3953:                     return;
3954:                 }
3955:                 if (available <= 0) return;
3956:                 pools[casterIndex][type] = available - 1;
3957:                 if (source && sourceCap && typeof source[type] === 'number') {
3958:                     source[type] = Math.min(sourceCap[type], source[type] + 1);
3959:                 }
3960:                 if (typeof updateStoneCount === 'function') updateStoneCount(type);
3961:                 if (type === 'void') clampVoidAPToPool();
3962:                 const gained = gainAPCapped(2);
3963:                 totalGained += gained;
3964:                 btn.textContent = `Discard 1 ${type} (${pools[casterIndex][type]})`;
3965:                 updateGained();
3966:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
3967:             };
3968:             modal.appendChild(btn);
3969:         });
3970: 
3971:         // Scrolls
3972:         modal.appendChild(sectionHeader('Scrolls'));
3973:         const renderScrollButtons = (label, scrollSet) => {
3974:             const arr = Array.from(scrollSet || []);
3975:             if (arr.length === 0) {
3976:                 const empty = document.createElement('div');
3977:                 empty.textContent = `No ${label} scrolls`;
3978:                 empty.style.color = '#7f8c8d';
3979:                 empty.style.fontSize = '12px';
3980:                 empty.style.marginBottom = '4px';
3981:                 modal.appendChild(empty);
3982:                 return;
3983:             }
3984:             arr.forEach(scrollName => {
3985:                 const def = self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollName];
3986:                 const btn = document.createElement('button');
3987:                 btn.textContent = `Discard ${def?.name || scrollName} (${label})`;
3988:                 Object.assign(btn.style, {
3989:                     display: 'block',
3990:                     width: '100%',
3991:                     padding: '8px',
3992:                     margin: '4px 0',
3993:                     backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
3994:                     color: 'white',
3995:                     border: '1px solid #444',
3996:                     borderRadius: '5px',
3997:                     cursor: 'pointer'
3998:                 });
3999:                 btn.onclick = () => {
4000:                     if (atMaxAP()) {
4001:                         updateStatus('Transmute: AP is already at max.');
4002:                         return;
4003:                     }
4004:                     if (label === 'hand') playerScrolls.hand.delete(scrollName);
4005:                     if (label === 'active') playerScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
4006:                     if (self.spellSystem?.discardToCommonArea) {
4007:                         self.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(scrollName);
4008:                     }
4009:                     if (self.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) self.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
4010:                     if (typeof updateCommonAreaUI === 'function') updateCommonAreaUI();
4011:                     const gained = gainAPCapped(2);
4012:                     totalGained += gained;
4013:                     btn.disabled = true;
4014:                     btn.style.opacity = '0.5';
4015:                     updateGained();
4016:                     if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
4017:                 };
4018:                 modal.appendChild(btn);
4019:             });
4020:         };
4021: 
4022:         renderScrollButtons('hand', playerScrolls.hand);
4023:         renderScrollButtons('active', playerScrolls.active);
4024: 
4025:         // Done button
4026:         const doneBtn = document.createElement('button');
4027:         doneBtn.textContent = 'Done';
4028:         Object.assign(doneBtn.style, {
4029:             display: 'block',
4030:             width: '100%',
4031:             padding: '10px',
4032:             margin: '10px 0 0 0',
4033:             backgroundColor: '#27ae60',
4034:             color: 'white',
4035:             border: 'none',
4036:             borderRadius: '5px',
4037:             cursor: 'pointer',
4038:             fontSize: '14px'
4039:         });
4040:         // Helper: close the scroll inventory popup (if open) and reopen it to reflect Transmute changes
4041:         const refreshInventoryPopup = () => {
4042:             const openInv = document.getElementById('scroll-inventory-popup');
4043:             if (openInv && self.spellSystem?.showInventory) {
4044:                 openInv.remove();
4045:                 self.spellSystem.showInventory();
4046:             }
4047:         };
4048: 
4049:         doneBtn.onclick = () => {
4050:             overlay.remove();
4051:             // Refresh inventory popup so discarded scrolls no longer appear in hand/active lists
4052:             refreshInventoryPopup();
4053:         };
4054:         modal.appendChild(doneBtn);
4055: 
4056:         // Cancel button
4057:         const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
4058:         cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
4059:         Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
4060:             display: 'block',
4061:             width: '100%',
4062:             padding: '10px',
4063:             margin: '8px 0 0 0',
4064:             backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
4065:             color: 'white',
4066:             border: 'none',
4067:             borderRadius: '5px',
4068:             cursor: 'pointer',
4069:             fontSize: '14px'
4070:         });
4071:         cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
4072:             overlay.remove();
4073:             // Refresh inventory even on Cancel — some items may have been discarded before cancelling
4074:             refreshInventoryPopup();
4075:         };
4076:         modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
4077: 
4078:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
4079:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
4080: 
4081:         // Cleanup suppress flag when modal closes (Done or Cancel)
4082:         const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
4083:             if (!document.body.contains(overlay)) {
4084:                 observer.disconnect();
4085:                 clearSuppress();
4086:             }
4087:         });
4088:         observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
4089:     },
4090: 
4091:     // Wind IV - Take Flight: Teleport any player to an unoccupied hex of your choice
4092:     enterTakeFlightMode(casterIndex, completionPayload) {
4093:         const self = this;
4094:         const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 1;
4095: 
4096:         // Build list of all players (including self, but exclude Excavate-immune opponents)
4097:         const allPlayers = [];
4098:         for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
4099:             // Allow self-targeting, but skip immune opponents
4100:             if (i !== casterIndex && this.hasExcavateImmunity(i)) continue;
4101:             allPlayers.push(i);
4102:         }
4103: 
4104:         if (allPlayers.length === 0) {
4105:             updateStatus('No players to target!');
4106:             return;
4107:         }
4108: 
4109:         // Step 1: Select target player
4110:         const showPlayerModal = () => {
4111:             const existing = document.getElementById('take-flight-player-modal');
4112:             if (existing) existing.remove();
4113: 
4114:             const overlay = document.createElement('div');
4115:             overlay.id = 'take-flight-player-modal';
4116:             Object.assign(overlay.style, {
4117:                 position: 'fixed',
4118:                 top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
4119:                 backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
4120:                 zIndex: '3000',
4121:                 display: 'flex',
4122:                 justifyContent: 'center',
4123:                 alignItems: 'center'
4124:             });
4125: 
4126:             const modal = document.createElement('div');
4127:             Object.assign(modal.style, {
4128:                 backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
4129:                 border: '2px solid #ffce00',
4130:                 borderRadius: '10px',
4131:                 padding: '20px',
4132:                 color: 'white',
4133:                 minWidth: '200px'
4134:             });
4135: 
4136:             const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
4137:             titleEl.textContent = 'Take Flight: Select a player to teleport';
4138:             titleEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
4139:             modal.appendChild(titleEl);
4140: 
4141:             allPlayers.forEach(playerIdx => {
4142:                 const name = (typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function')
4143:                     ? getPlayerColorName(playerIdx)
4144:                     : `Player ${playerIdx + 1}`;
4145: 
4146:                 const btn = document.createElement('button');
4147:                 btn.textContent = playerIdx === casterIndex ? `${name} (you)` : name;
4148:                 Object.assign(btn.style, {
4149:                     display: 'block',
4150:                     width: '100%',
4151:                     padding: '10px',
4152:                     margin: '5px 0',
4153:                     backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
4154:                     color: 'white',
4155:                     border: 'none',
4156:                     borderRadius: '5px',
4157:                     cursor: 'pointer',
4158:                     fontSize: '14px'
4159:                 });
4160:                 btn.onclick = () => {
4161:                     overlay.remove();
4162:                     enterHexSelectionForPlayer(playerIdx);
4163:                 };
4164:                 modal.appendChild(btn);
4165:             });
4166: 
4167:             // Cancel button
4168:             const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
4169:             cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
4170:             Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
4171:                 display: 'block',
4172:                 width: '100%',
4173:                 padding: '10px',
4174:                 margin: '10px 0 0 0',
4175:                 backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
4176:                 color: 'white',
4177:                 border: 'none',
4178:                 borderRadius: '5px',
4179:                 cursor: 'pointer',
4180:                 fontSize: '14px'
4181:             });
4182:             cancelBtn.onclick = () => {
4183:                 overlay.remove();
4184:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
4185:             };
4186:             modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
4187: 
4188:             overlay.appendChild(modal);
4189:             document.body.appendChild(overlay);
4190:         };
4191: 
4192:         // Step 2: Drag the target pawn to an unoccupied hex
4193:         const enterHexSelectionForPlayer = (targetPlayerIndex) => {
4194:             const cancelBtn = self.createCancelButton('Cancel Take Flight', () => {
4195:                 if (window.takeFlightState?.onCancel) {
4196:                     window.takeFlightState.onCancel();
4197:                 }
4198:                 self.cancelSelectionMode();
4199:             });
4200: 
4201:             const targetPlayer = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined') ? playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex] : null;
4202:             if (!targetPlayer) {
4203:                 updateStatus('Take Flight: target player not found.');
4204:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
4205:                 return;
4206:             }
4207: 
4208:             const cleanup = () => {
4209:                 if (cancelBtn && cancelBtn.parentNode) {
4210:                     cancelBtn.parentNode.removeChild(cancelBtn);
4211:                 }
4212:                 if (window.takeFlightState) {
4213:                     window.takeFlightState.active = false;
4214:                     window.takeFlightState = null;
4215:                 }
4216:                 self.selectionMode = null;
4217:             };
4218: 
4219:             const onComplete = (destX, destY) => {
4220:                 const targetName = (typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function')
4221:                     ? getPlayerColorName(targetPlayerIndex)
4222:                     : `Player ${targetPlayerIndex + 1}`;
4223:                 updateStatus(`Take Flight! Teleported ${targetName} to a new location.`);
4224:                 console.log(`🌬️ Take Flight: player ${targetPlayerIndex} teleported to (${destX.toFixed(1)}, ${destY.toFixed(1)})`);
4225: 
4226:                 // Broadcast teleport in multiplayer
4227:                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
4228:                     broadcastGameAction('take-flight', {
4229:                         targetPlayerIndex: targetPlayerIndex,
4230:                         x: destX,
4231:                         y: destY
4232:                     });
4233:                 }
4234: 
4235:                 // Disposition: goes to opponent's hand if targeting another player, stays in active area if self
4236:                 if (self.spellSystem) {
4237:                     const scrollName = completionPayload?.scrollName || 'WIND_SCROLL_4';
4238:                     if (targetPlayerIndex !== casterIndex) {
4239:                         // Remove from caster's active area and add to target's hand
4240:                         const casterScrolls = self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[casterIndex];
4241:                         if (casterScrolls?.active.has(scrollName)) {
4242:                             casterScrolls.active.delete(scrollName);
4243:                         }
4244:                         self.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(targetPlayerIndex);
4245:                         self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[targetPlayerIndex].hand.add(scrollName);
4246:                         self.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
4247:                         updateCommonAreaUI();
4248:                     }
4249:                     // If self-targeting, scroll stays in active area — no action needed
4250:                 }
4251: 
4252:                 // Signal completion
4253:                 if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
4254:                     self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
4255:                 }
4256: 
4257:                 cleanup();
4258:             };
4259: 
4260:             const onCancel = () => {
4261:                 updateStatus('Take Flight cancelled.');
4262:                 cleanup();
4263:             };
4264: 
4265:             window.takeFlightState = {
4266:                 active: true,
4267:                 casterIndex,
4268:                 targetPlayerIndex,
4269:                 startPos: { x: targetPlayer.x, y: targetPlayer.y },
4270:                 onComplete,
4271:                 onCancel
4272:             };
4273: 
4274:             self.selectionMode = {
4275:                 type: 'take-flight-drag',
4276:                 casterIndex,
4277:                 targetPlayerIndex,
4278:                 cancelBtn,
4279:                 cleanup
4280:             };
4281: 
4282:             const targetName = (typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function')
4283:                 ? getPlayerColorName(targetPlayerIndex)
4284:                 : `Player ${targetPlayerIndex + 1}`;
4285:             updateStatus(`Take Flight: Drag ${targetName} to an unoccupied hex.`);
4286:         };
4287: 
4288:         showPlayerModal();
4289:     },
4290: 
4291:     // Fire V - Arson: Destroy stone from opponent pool
4292:     enterArsonMode(casterIndex, completionPayload = null) {
4293:         const self = this;
4294: 
4295:         // Get opponents (exclude Excavate-immune players)
4296:         const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 1;
4297:         const opponents = [];
4298:         for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
4299:             if (i !== casterIndex && !this.hasExcavateImmunity(i)) {
4300:                 opponents.push(i);
4301:             }
4302:         }
4303: 
4304:         if (opponents.length === 0) {
4305:             updateStatus('No opponents to target!');
4306:             return;
4307:         }
4308: 
4309:         // Show opponent selection modal
4310:         this.showOpponentSelectionModal(opponents, (selectedOpponent) => {
4311:             // Get the stone types this opponent actually has (playerPools is per-player pool from game-core)
4312:             const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
4313:             const opponentStones = pools && pools[selectedOpponent] ? pools[selectedOpponent] : null;
4314:             if (!opponentStones) {
4315:                 updateStatus('Cannot access opponent stone pool!');
4316:                 return;
4317:             }
4318: 
4319:             // Filter to only elements the opponent has > 0 stones
4320:             const availableElements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'].filter(element =>
4321:                 opponentStones[element] && opponentStones[element] > 0
4322:             );
4323: 
4324:             if (availableElements.length === 0) {
4325:                 const name = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[selectedOpponent]?.username)
4326:                     ? playerPositions[selectedOpponent].username
4327:                     : `Player ${selectedOpponent + 1}`;
4328:                 updateStatus(`${name} has no stones in their pool to destroy!`);
4329:                 return;
4330:             }
4331: 
4332:             // Show element selection with only available elements
4333:             self.showArsonElementModal(availableElements, opponentStones, (selectedElement) => {
4334:                 // Destroy one stone from opponent's pool
4335:                 self.destroyOpponentStone(selectedOpponent, selectedElement, completionPayload);
4336:             });
4337:         });
4338:     },
4339:

4518:         });
4519: 
4520:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
4521:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
4522:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
4523:             border: '2px solid #5894f4',
4524:             borderRadius: '10px',
4525:             padding: '20px',
4526:             color: 'white'
4527:         });
4528:
