4530:         titleEl.textContent = count === 1
4531:             ? 'Select 1 deck to draw 2 scrolls from:'
4532:             : `Select ${count} deck(s) to draw from:`;
4533:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
4534:         modal.appendChild(titleEl);
4535: 
4536:         const selected = [];
4537:         const elements = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
4538:         const elementColors = {
4539:             earth: '#69d83a',
4540:             water: '#5894f4',
4541:             fire: '#ed1b43',
4542:             wind: '#ffce00',
4543:             void: '#9458f4'
4544:         };
4545:

4547:             const deckSize = this.spellSystem?.scrollDecks?.[element]?.length || 0;
4548:             const btn = document.createElement('button');
4549:             btn.textContent = `${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} (${deckSize} left)`;
4550:             btn.disabled = deckSize === 0;
4551:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
4552:                 display: 'block',
4553:                 width: '100%',
4554:                 padding: '10px',
4555:                 margin: '5px 0',
4556:                 backgroundColor: deckSize > 0 ? '#2d2d44' : '#1a1a1a',
4557:                 color: deckSize > 0 ? elementColors[element] : '#555',
4558:                 border: 'none',
4559:                 borderRadius: '5px',
4560:                 cursor: deckSize > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed'
4561:             });
4562: 
4563:             if (deckSize > 0) {
4564:                 btn.onclick = () => {
4565:                     if (selected.includes(element)) {
4566:                         selected.splice(selected.indexOf(element), 1);
4567:                         btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
4568:                     } else if (selected.length < count) {
4569:                         selected.push(element);
4570:                         btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d5a3d';
4571:                     }
4572:                 };
4573:             }
4574:             modal.appendChild(btn);
4575:         });
4576: 
4577:         const confirmBtn = document.createElement('button');
4578:         confirmBtn.textContent = 'Confirm';
4579:         Object.assign(confirmBtn.style, {
4580:             marginTop: '15px',
4581:             padding: '10px 20px',
4582:             backgroundColor: '#27ae60',
4583:             color: 'white',
4584:             border: 'none',
4585:             borderRadius: '5px',
4586:             cursor: 'pointer'
4587:         });
4588:         confirmBtn.onclick = () => {
4589:             overlay.remove();
4590:             onSelect(selected);
4591:         };
4592:         modal.appendChild(confirmBtn);
4593: 
4594:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
4595:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
4596:     },

4734: 
4735:     // ============================================
4736:     // STONE DESTRUCTION HELPERS
4737:     // ============================================
4738: 
4739:     destroyStonesOnTile(tile) {
4740:         if (typeof placedStones === 'undefined') return;
4741: 
4742:         // Use same radius as tileHasStones and findTileAtPosition: TILE_SIZE * 4
4743:         const tileRadius = typeof TILE_SIZE !== 'undefined' ? TILE_SIZE * 4 : 80;
4744: 
4745:         // Track which stones we're removing for multiplayer sync
4746:         const removedStoneIds = [];
4747: 
4748:         // Find and remove ALL stones on this tile (iterate backwards for safe splice)
4749:         for (let i = placedStones.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
4750:             const stone = placedStones[i];
4751:             const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(stone.x - tile.x, 2) + Math.pow(stone.y - tile.y, 2));
4752:             if (dist < tileRadius) {
4753:                 // Track stone ID for broadcast
4754:                 removedStoneIds.push(stone.id);
4755: 
4756:                 // Remove stone from DOM
4757:                 if (stone.element && stone.element.parentNode) {
4758:                     stone.element.parentNode.removeChild(stone.element);
4759:                 }
4760:                 // Remove from array
4761:                 placedStones.splice(i, 1);
4762:             }
4763:         }
4764: 
4765:         // Broadcast in multiplayer
4766:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
4767:             broadcastGameAction('stones-destroyed', {
4768:                 tileId: tile.id,
4769:                 stoneIds: removedStoneIds
4770:             });
4771:         }
4772:     },
4773: 
4774:     destroyOpponentStone(opponentIndex, stoneType, completionPayload = null) {
4775:         const pools = typeof playerPools !== 'undefined' ? playerPools : (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.playerPools);
4776:         const opponentStones = pools && pools[opponentIndex] ? pools[opponentIndex] : null;
4777:         if (!opponentStones) {
4778:             updateStatus('Cannot access opponent stone pools.');
4779:             return;
4780:         }
4781:         if (opponentStones[stoneType] > 0) {
4782:             opponentStones[stoneType]--;
4783:             const name = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[opponentIndex]?.username)
4784:                 ? playerPositions[opponentIndex].username
4785:                 : `Player ${opponentIndex + 1}`;
4786:             updateStatus(`Arson! Destroyed 1 ${stoneType} stone from ${name}'s pool.`);
4787: 
4788:             if (typeof updateOpponentPanel === 'function') updateOpponentPanel();
4789: 
4790:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
4791:                 broadcastGameAction('opponent-stone-destroyed', {
4792:                     opponentIndex,
4793:                     stoneType
4794:                 });
4795:             }
4796: 
4797:             // Send Arson to common area after use
4798:             if (completionPayload && this.spellSystem) {
4799:                 const scrollName = completionPayload.scrollName || 'FIRE_SCROLL_5';
4800:                 this.spellSystem.handleScrollDisposition(scrollName, false, true);
4801:             }
4802: 
4803:             // Signal selection effect complete (triggers win check, broadcast)
4804:             if (completionPayload && this.spellSystem && typeof this.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
4805:                 this.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
4806:             }
4807:         } else {
4808:             updateStatus(`${stoneType} pool is empty!`);
4809:         }
4810:     },
4811: 
4812:     // Catacomb Scroll 8 - Plunder: Discard a target player's active scroll to common area
4813:     enterPlunderMode(casterIndex, completionPayload = null) {
4814:         const self = this;
4815:         // The scroll currently being cast — exclude it from plunderable lists
4816:         // (it's still in the caster's active set until handleScrollDisposition runs)
4817:         const castingScrollName = completionPayload?.scrollName || null;
4818: 
4819:         // Get all players (including self, but exclude Excavate-immune opponents)
4820:         const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 1;
4821:         const targets = [];
4822:         for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
4823:             // Allow self-targeting, but skip immune opponents
4824:             if (i !== casterIndex && this.hasExcavateImmunity(i)) continue;
4825:             targets.push(i);
4826:         }
4827: 
4828:         if (targets.length === 0) {
4829:             updateStatus('No players to target!');
4830:             return;
4831:         }
4832: 
4833:         // Step 1: Select target player
4834:         this.showPlunderPlayerModal(targets, casterIndex, castingScrollName, (targetPlayerIndex) => {
4835:             // Step 2: Get target's active scrolls
4836:             if (!self.spellSystem) {
4837:                 updateStatus('Plunder: spell system unavailable.');
4838:                 return;
4839:             }
4840:             self.spellSystem.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(targetPlayerIndex);
4841:             const targetScrolls = self.spellSystem.playerScrolls[targetPlayerIndex];
4842: 
4843:             // Build plunderable list, excluding the scroll being cast if targeting self
4844:             let activeScrollArray = targetScrolls ? Array.from(targetScrolls.active) : [];
4845:             if (targetPlayerIndex === casterIndex && castingScrollName) {
4846:                 activeScrollArray = activeScrollArray.filter(s => s !== castingScrollName);
4847:             }
4848: 
4849:             if (activeScrollArray.length === 0) {
4850:                 const name = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex]?.username)
4851:                     ? playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex].username
4852:                     : `Player ${targetPlayerIndex + 1}`;
4853:                 updateStatus(`${name} has no active scrolls to plunder!`);
4854:                 // Still signal completion so scroll disposition happens
4855:                 if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
4856:                     self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
4857:                 }
4858:                 return;
4859:             }
4860: 
4861:             // Step 3: Show target's active scrolls for caster to choose
4862:             self.showScrollSelectionModal(activeScrollArray, 'Select an active scroll to plunder:', (selectedScroll) => {
4863:                 // Remove from target's active area
4864:                 targetScrolls.active.delete(selectedScroll);
4865: 
4866:                 // Discard to common area
4867:                 if (self.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea) {
4868:                     self.spellSystem.discardToCommonArea(selectedScroll);
4869:                 }
4870: 
4871:                 const scrollDef = self.spellSystem?.patterns?.[selectedScroll];
4872:                 const scrollDisplayName = scrollDef?.name || selectedScroll;
4873:                 const targetName = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex]?.username)
4874:                     ? playerPositions[targetPlayerIndex].username
4875:                     : `Player ${targetPlayerIndex + 1}`;
4876:                 updateStatus(`Plunder! Sent ${scrollDisplayName} from ${targetName}'s active area to the common area.`);
4877:                 console.log(`🏴‍☠️ Plunder: moved ${selectedScroll} from player ${targetPlayerIndex}'s active to common area`);
4878: 
4879:                 // Update UI
4880:                 if (self.spellSystem?.updateScrollCount) {
4881:                     self.spellSystem.updateScrollCount();
4882:                 }
4883:                 if (typeof updateOpponentPanel === 'function') updateOpponentPanel();
4884: 
4885:                 // Broadcast in multiplayer
4886:                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
4887:                     broadcastGameAction('scroll-plundered', {
4888:                         casterIndex: casterIndex,
4889:                         targetIndex: targetPlayerIndex,
4890:                         scrollName: selectedScroll
4891:                     });
4892:                 }
4893: 
4894:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
4895: 
4896:                 // Signal selection effect complete
4897:                 if (completionPayload && self.spellSystem && typeof self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete === 'function') {
4898:                     self.spellSystem.onSelectionEffectComplete(completionPayload.scrollName, completionPayload.effectName, completionPayload.spell);
4899:                 }
4900:             });
4901:         });
4902:     },
4903: 
4904:     // Plunder: player selection modal (allows targeting any player including self)
4905:     showPlunderPlayerModal(targets, casterIndex, castingScrollName, onSelect) {
4906:         const existing = document.getElementById('plunder-player-modal');
4907:         if (existing) existing.remove();
4908: 
4909:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
4910:         overlay.id = 'plunder-player-modal';
4911:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
4912:             position: 'fixed',
4913:             top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
4914:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
4915:             zIndex: '3000',
4916:             display: 'flex',
4917:             justifyContent: 'center',
4918:             alignItems: 'center'
4919:         });
4920: 
4921:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
4922:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
4923:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
4924:             border: '2px solid #ff8c00',
4925:             borderRadius: '10px',
4926:             padding: '20px',
4927:             color: 'white',
4928:             minWidth: '200px'
4929:         });
4930: 
4931:         const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
4932:         titleEl.textContent = 'Plunder: Select a target player';
4933:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
4934:         titleEl.style.color = '#ff8c00';
4935:         modal.appendChild(titleEl);
4936: 
4937:         targets.forEach(playerIdx => {
4938:             const name = (typeof getPlayerColorName === 'function')
4939:                 ? getPlayerColorName(playerIdx)
4940:                 : (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[playerIdx]?.username)
4941:                     ? playerPositions[playerIdx].username
4942:                     : `Player ${playerIdx + 1}`;
4943: 
4944:             // Get the player's hex color for styling
4945:             const playerHexColor = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[playerIdx]?.color)
4946:                 ? playerPositions[playerIdx].color
4947:                 : '#ffffff';
4948: 
4949:             // Check if this player has plunderable active scrolls
4950:             // Exclude the scroll being cast if this is the caster
4951:             const sp = this.spellSystem;
4952:             let activeCount = 0;
4953:             if (sp) {
4954:                 sp.ensurePlayerScrollsStructure(playerIdx);
4955:                 const activeSet = sp.playerScrolls[playerIdx]?.active;
4956:                 if (activeSet) {
4957:                     activeCount = activeSet.size;
4958:                     if (playerIdx === casterIndex && castingScrollName && activeSet.has(castingScrollName)) {
4959:                         activeCount--;
4960:                     }
4961:                 }
4962:             }
4963: 
4964:             const btn = document.createElement('button');
4965:             btn.textContent = playerIdx === casterIndex ? `${name} (you) - ${activeCount} active` : `${name} - ${activeCount} active`;
4966:             Object.assign(btn.style, {
4967:                 display: 'block',
4968:                 width: '100%',
4969:                 padding: '12px',
4970:                 margin: '6px 0',
4971:                 backgroundColor: activeCount > 0 ? '#2d2d44' : '#1a1a22',
4972:                 color: activeCount > 0 ? playerHexColor : '#666',
4973:                 border: activeCount > 0 ? `1px solid ${playerHexColor}` : '1px solid #333',
4974:                 borderRadius: '5px',
4975:                 cursor: activeCount > 0 ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
4976:                 opacity: activeCount > 0 ? '1' : '0.5',
4977:                 fontSize: '14px',
4978:                 fontWeight: 'bold'
4979:             });
4980:             if (activeCount > 0) {
4981:                 btn.onmouseenter = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d54';
4982:                 btn.onmouseleave = () => btn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
4983:                 btn.onclick = () => {
4984:                     overlay.remove();
4985:                     onSelect(playerIdx);
4986:                 };
4987:             }
4988:             modal.appendChild(btn);
4989:         });
4990: 
4991:         const cancelBtn = document.createElement('button');
4992:         cancelBtn.textContent = 'Cancel';
4993:         Object.assign(cancelBtn.style, {
4994:             marginTop: '15px',
4995:             padding: '10px 20px',
4996:             backgroundColor: '#7f8c8d',
4997:             color: 'white',
4998:             border: 'none',
4999:             borderRadius: '5px',
5000:             cursor: 'pointer',
5001:             width: '100%'
5002:         });
5003:         cancelBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
5004:         modal.appendChild(cancelBtn);
5005: 
5006:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
5007:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
5008:     },
5009: 
5010:     shuffleDeck(deck) {
5011:         for (let i = deck.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
5012:             const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
5013:             [deck[i], deck[j]] = [deck[j], deck[i]];
5014:         }
5015:     },
5016: 
5017:     // Check if water transformation buff is active (for Water V)
5018:     hasWaterTransformation(playerIndex) {
5019:         return this.activeBuffs.waterTransformation?.playerIndex === playerIndex;
5020:     },
5021: 
5022:     // Check if Unbidden Lamplight is active (for Fire I)
5023:     hasUnbiddenLamplight(casterIndex) {
5024:         // Returns true if any OTHER player has lamplight active
5025:         if (this.activeBuffs.unbiddenLamplight) {
5026:             return this.activeBuffs.unbiddenLamplight.playerIndex !== casterIndex;
5027:         }
5028:         return false;
5029:     },
5030: 
5031:     // Check if a player has Excavate immunity (cannot be targeted by scrolls)
5032:     hasExcavateImmunity(playerIndex) {
5033:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.excavate;
5034:         return buff && buff.playerIndex === playerIndex;
5035:     },
5036: 
5037:     // Clear Excavate immunity and trigger teleport option when a player's turn starts
5038:     clearExcavateForPlayer(playerIndex) {
5039:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.excavate;
5040:         if (buff && buff.playerIndex === playerIndex) {
5041:             delete this.activeBuffs.excavate;
5042:             console.log(`⛏️ Excavate immunity cleared for player ${playerIndex}`);
5043:         }
5044:     },
5045: 
5046:     // Process Excavate teleport at start of turn (returns true if teleport is pending)
5047:     processExcavateTeleport(playerIndex) {
5048:         const buff = this.activeBuffs.excavateTeleport;
5049:         if (!buff || buff.playerIndex !== playerIndex) return false;
5050: 
5051:         // Only trigger for the local player in multiplayer
5052:         const localPlayer = (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined')
5053:             ? myPlayerIndex : (typeof activePlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? activePlayerIndex : -1);
5054:         if (playerIndex !== localPlayer) {
5055:             // Not the local player — just clear the buff silently
5056:             delete this.activeBuffs.excavateTeleport;
5057:             return false;
5058:         }
5059: 
5060:         delete this.activeBuffs.excavateTeleport;
5061:         console.log(`⛏️ Excavate teleport available for player ${playerIndex}`);
5062: 
5063:         // Show teleport prompt modal
5064:         this.showExcavateTeleportModal(playerIndex);
5065:         return true;
5066:     },
5067: 
5068:     // Excavate: modal asking if player wants to teleport
5069:     showExcavateTeleportModal(playerIndex) {
5070:         const self = this;
5071: 
5072:         const existing = document.getElementById('excavate-teleport-modal');
5073:         if (existing) existing.remove();
5074: 
5075:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
5076:         overlay.id = 'excavate-teleport-modal';
5077:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
5078:             position: 'fixed',
5079:             top: '0', left: '0', right: '0', bottom: '0',
5080:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)',
5081:             zIndex: '3000',
5082:             display: 'flex',
5083:             justifyContent: 'center',
5084:             alignItems: 'center'
5085:         });
5086: 
5087:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
5088:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
5089:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
5090:             border: '2px solid #8b4513',
5091:             borderRadius: '10px',
5092:             padding: '20px',
5093:             color: 'white',
5094:             minWidth: '280px',
5095:             textAlign: 'center'
5096:         });
5097: 
5098:         const titleEl = document.createElement('h3');
5099:         titleEl.textContent = '⛏️ Excavate';
5100:         titleEl.style.marginBottom = '10px';
5101:         titleEl.style.color = '#8b4513';
5102:         modal.appendChild(titleEl);
5103: 
5104:         const descEl = document.createElement('p');
5105:         descEl.textContent = 'You emerge from the catacombs! You may teleport to any unoccupied hex on a revealed tile.';
5106:         descEl.style.marginBottom = '15px';
5107:         descEl.style.fontSize = '14px';
5108:         modal.appendChild(descEl);
5109: 
5110:         const teleportBtn = document.createElement('button');
5111:         teleportBtn.textContent = 'Teleport';
5112:         Object.assign(teleportBtn.style, {
5113:             display: 'block',
5114:             width: '100%',
5115:             padding: '12px',
5116:             margin: '8px 0',
5117:             backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
5118:             color: '#8b4513',
5119:             border: '2px solid #8b4513',
5120:             borderRadius: '5px',
5121:             cursor: 'pointer',
5122:             fontSize: '14px',
5123:             fontWeight: 'bold'
5124:         });
5125:         teleportBtn.onmouseenter = () => teleportBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d54';
5126:         teleportBtn.onmouseleave = () => teleportBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
5127:         teleportBtn.onclick = () => {
5128:             overlay.remove();
5129:             self.enterExcavateTeleportMode(playerIndex);
5130:         };
5131:         modal.appendChild(teleportBtn);
5132: 
5133:         const stayBtn = document.createElement('button');
5134:         stayBtn.textContent = 'Stay Here';
5135:         Object.assign(stayBtn.style, {
5136:             display: 'block',
5137:             width: '100%',
5138:             padding: '12px',
5139:             margin: '8px 0',
5140:             backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
5141:             color: '#999',
5142:             border: '1px solid #555',
5143:             borderRadius: '5px',
5144:             cursor: 'pointer',
5145:             fontSize: '14px'
5146:         });
5147:         stayBtn.onmouseenter = () => stayBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d54';
5148:         stayBtn.onmouseleave = () => stayBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
5149:         stayBtn.onclick = () => {
5150:             overlay.remove();
5151:             updateStatus('Your turn begins!');
5152:         };
5153:         modal.appendChild(stayBtn);
5154: 
5155:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
5156:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
5157:     },
5158: 
5159:     // Excavate: hex selection for teleport at start of turn
5160:     enterExcavateTeleportMode(playerIndex) {
5161:         const self = this;
5162: 
5163:         updateStatus('Excavate: Click any unoccupied hex on a revealed tile to teleport there.');
5164: 
5165:         this.selectionMode = {
5166:             type: 'excavate-teleport',
5167:             casterIndex: playerIndex,
5168: 
5169:             handleHexClick(hexPos) {
5170:                 const destX = hexPos.x;
5171:                 const destY = hexPos.y;
5172: 
5173:                 // Check hex is on at least one revealed (non-player) tile
5174:                 const hasRevealedTile = hexPos.tiles && hexPos.tiles.some(t => !t.flipped && !t.isPlayerTile);
5175:                 if (!hasRevealedTile) {
5176:                     updateStatus('Cannot teleport there - not on a revealed tile!');
5177:                     return;
5178:                 }
5179: 
5180:                 // Check not occupied by a stone
5181:                 const hasStone = (typeof placedStones !== 'undefined') && placedStones.some(s => {
5182:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(s.x - destX, 2) + Math.pow(s.y - destY, 2));
5183:                     return dist < 5;
5184:                 });
5185:                 if (hasStone) {
5186:                     updateStatus('Cannot teleport there - a stone is on that space!');
5187:                     return;
5188:                 }
5189: 
5190:                 // Check not occupied by a player
5191:                 const hasPlayer = (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined') && playerPositions.some(p => {
5192:                     if (!p) return false;
5193:                     const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(p.x - destX, 2) + Math.pow(p.y - destY, 2));
5194:                     return dist < 5;
5195:                 });
5196:                 if (hasPlayer) {
5197:                     updateStatus('Cannot teleport there - a player is on that space!');
5198:                     return;
5199:                 }
5200: 
5201:                 // Teleport the player
5202:                 if (typeof placePlayer === 'function') {
5203:                     placePlayer(destX, destY);
5204:                 }
5205: 
5206:                 updateStatus(`Excavate: Teleported! Your turn begins.`);
5207:                 console.log(`⛏️ Excavate teleport: player ${playerIndex} to (${destX.toFixed(1)}, ${destY.toFixed(1)})`);
5208: 
5209:                 // Broadcast in multiplayer
5210:                 if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer && typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
5211:                     broadcastGameAction('excavate-teleport', {
5212:                         playerIndex: playerIndex,
5213:                         x: destX,
5214:                         y: destY
5215:                     });
5216:                 }
5217: 
5218:                 if (typeof syncPlayerState === 'function') syncPlayerState();
5219: 
5220:                 self.selectionMode = null;
5221:             },
5222: 
5223:             cleanup() {
5224:                 // No cancel button to clean up
5225:             }
5226:         };
5227:     }
5228: };
5229: 
5230: // Export for use
5231: if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
5232:     window.ScrollEffects = ScrollEffects;
5233: }
</file>

<file path="css/components.css">
  1: /* ============================================
  2:    BUTTON STYLES
  3:    ============================================ */
  4: button {
  5:     background: var(--bg-card);

<file path="js/config.js">
 1: // ========================================
 2: // SUPABASE MULTIPLAYER SETUP
 3: // ========================================
 4: const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://lovybwpypkaarstnvkbz.supabase.co';
 5: const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imxvdnlid3B5cGthYXJzdG52a2J6Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NjkwMzI4NTgsImV4cCI6MjA4NDYwODg1OH0.lqobDTaopRJ5sA0yZQvzDwudq2x4zz9HMtTkSuJulFU';
 6: 
 7: const supabase = window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
 8: 
 9: // ========================================
10: // GAME CONSTANTS
11: // ========================================
12: const TILE_SIZE = 20;
13: const SNAP_THRESHOLD = 40;
14: const STONE_SIZE = 12;
15: 
16: const STONE_TYPES = {
17:     earth: { color: '#69d83a', symbol: '▲' },
18:     water: { color: '#5894f4', symbol: '◯' },
19:     fire: { color: '#ed1b43', symbol: '♦' },
20:     wind: { color: '#ffce00', symbol: '≋' },
21:     void: { color: '#9458f4', symbol: '✺' },
22:     catacomb: { color: '#8b4513', symbol: '🔅' }
23: };
24: 
25: const PLAYER_COLORS = {
26:     green: '#69d83a',
27:     blue: '#5894f4',
28:     red: '#ed1b43',
29:     yellow: '#ffce00',
30:     purple: '#9458f4'
31: };
32: 
33: // Elemental source pool - stones available from shrines (max 25 each)
34: const sourcePool = { earth: 20, water: 20, fire: 20, wind: 20, void: 20 };
35: const sourcePoolCapacity = { earth: 25, water: 25, fire: 25, wind: 25, void: 25 };
36: const playerPoolCapacity = { earth: 5, water: 5, fire: 5, wind: 5, void: 5 };
37: const stoneCapacity = playerPoolCapacity;
38: 
39: // Helper function to convert numbers to roman numerals
40: function toRoman(num) {
41:     const map = { 1: 'I', 2: 'II', 3: 'III', 4: 'IV', 5: 'V' };
42:     return map[num] || num;
43: }
</file>

<file path="js/tutorial.js">
  1: /**
  2:  * Tutorial System for Godaigo
  3:  *
  4:  * Lightweight modal with multiple pages.
  5:  * Dismissed per session (closing once hides it for the rest of the session).
  6:  *
  7:  * Type "tutorial" on keyboard during a game to re-enable tutorials.
  8:  */
  9: 
 10: const tutorialSystem = (function() {
 11:     const STEPS = [
 12:         {
 13:             id: 'welcome',
 14:             title: 'Welcome to Godaigo!',
 15:             content: `Your goal is to <strong>master all 5 elements</strong> by collecting and activating one scroll of each type.
 16:                 <div style="margin-top: 12px; display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; font-size: 22px;">
 17:                     <span style="color: #69d83a;">Earth</span>
 18:                     <span style="color: #5894f4;">Water</span>
 19:                     <span style="color: #ed1b43;">Fire</span>
 20:                     <span style="color: #ffce00;">Wind</span>
 21:                     <span style="color: #9458f4;">Void</span>
 22:                 </div>
 23:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px; color: #aaa; font-size: 13px;">Be the first to activate all five to win!</div>`
 24:         },
 25:         {
 26:             id: 'placement',
 27:             title: 'Place Your Player Tile',
 28:             content: `Each player places their Player Tiles to build the board. <strong>Drag these hexagonal tile from the menu to the left</strong> and place your tile next to the edge of two tiles on the board.
 29:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px; color: #aaa; font-size: 13px;">Each tile hides a shrine that will be revealed when a player lands on it.</div>`
 30:         },
 31:         {
 32:             id: 'movement',
 33:             title: 'Movement & Action Points',
 34:             content: `You have <strong>5 Action Points (AP)</strong> each turn. <strong>Drag your pawn</strong> to move \u2014 each hex costs 1 AP.
 35:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px; color: #aaa; font-size: 13px;">Land on face-down tiles to flip them and discover shrines. Your AP resets at the start of your next turn.</div>`
 36:         },
 37:         {
 38:             id: 'shrines',
 39:             title: 'Shrines & Stones',
 40:             content: `When you <strong>end your turn</strong> on a shrine, you gather <strong>elemental stones</strong> of that type and draw a <strong>scroll</strong>.
 41:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px;">Check the <strong>Scrolls</strong> menu to see what you found and interact with it.</div>
 42:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px; color: #aaa; font-size: 13px;">Drag stones from your pool onto the board to form patterns that match your scrolls. Each type of stone has special abilities!</div>`
 43:         },
 44:         {
 45:             id: 'scrolls',
 46:             title: 'Scrolls',
 47:             content: `Scrolls go to your <strong>hand</strong> (max 2).
 48:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px;">Move a scroll to your <strong>Active area (max 2)</strong> to prepare it. Match its stone pattern on the board, then press <strong>Cast Spell</strong> to activate it.</div>
 49:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px; color: #aaa; font-size: 13px;">Click the Scrolls button to view and manage your scrolls.</div>`
 50:         },
 51:         {
 52:             id: 'casting',
 53:             title: 'Casting & Responses',
 54:             content: `After casting a spell, opponents get a brief window to <strong>respond</strong> with counter or reaction scrolls.
 55:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px; color: #aaa; font-size: 13px;">Once the response window closes, your scroll's effect activates! Some scrolls can block or counter enemy spells. Every scroll costs 2 action points to cast, and you can cast as many times as you want.</div>`
 56:         },
 57:         {
 58:             id: 'endturn',
 59:             title: 'Ending Your Turn',
 60:             content: `Press <strong>End Turn</strong> when you're done. Your AP refreshes at the <strong>start of your next turn</strong>.
 61:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px;">Consider saving some AP \u2014 you can spend it on <strong>response scrolls</strong> during other players' turns!</div>
 62:                 <div style="margin-top: 8px; color: #aaa; font-size: 13px;">Before ending, make sure you've moved, placed stones, and cast any spells you want.</div>`
 63:         }
 64:     ];
 65: 
 66:     let dismissed = false;
 67:     let activeModal = null;
 68:     let currentIndex = 0;
 69: 
 70:     function showStep(stepId) {
 71:         if (dismissed) return;
 72:         const idx = STEPS.findIndex(s => s.id === stepId);
 73:         if (idx < 0) return;
 74:         openModal(idx);
 75:     }
 76: 
 77:     function openModal(index) {
 78:         ensureModal();
 79:         render(index);
 80:     }
 81: 
 82:     function ensureModal() {
 83:         if (activeModal) return;
 84: 
 85:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 86:         overlay.className = 'tutorial-modal';
 87: 
 88:         overlay.innerHTML = `
 89:             <div class="tutorial-content">
 90:                 <div class="tutorial-header">
 91:                     <span class="tutorial-step-label"></span>
 92:                     <h3 class="tutorial-title"></h3>
 93:                     <button class="tutorial-close">&times;</button>
 94:                 </div>
 95:                 <div class="tutorial-body"></div>
 96:                 <div class="tutorial-footer" style="display: flex; gap: 8px; justify-content: space-between;">
 97:                     <button class="tutorial-prev">Back</button>
 98:                     <div style="flex: 1"></div>
 99:                     <button class="tutorial-next">Next</button>
100:                     <button class="tutorial-got-it">Close</button>
101:                 </div>
102:             </div>
103:         `;
104: 
105:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
106:         activeModal = overlay;
107: 
108:         const close = () => {
109:             dismissed = true;
110:             overlay.classList.add('tutorial-fade-out');
111:             setTimeout(() => {
112:                 overlay.remove();
113:                 activeModal = null;
114:             }, 200);
115:         };
116: 
117:         overlay.querySelector('.tutorial-close').addEventListener('click', close);
118:         overlay.querySelector('.tutorial-got-it').addEventListener('click', close);
119:         overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
120:             if (e.target === overlay) close();
121:         });
122: 
123:         overlay.querySelector('.tutorial-prev').addEventListener('click', () => {
124:             if (currentIndex > 0) render(currentIndex - 1);
125:         });
126:         overlay.querySelector('.tutorial-next').addEventListener('click', () => {
127:             if (currentIndex < STEPS.length - 1) render(currentIndex + 1);
128:         });
129: 
130:         requestAnimationFrame(() => {
131:             overlay.classList.add('tutorial-visible');
132:         });
133:     }
134: 
135:     function render(index) {
136:         if (!activeModal) return;
137:         const step = STEPS[index];
138:         if (!step) return;
139:         currentIndex = index;
140: 
141:         const label = activeModal.querySelector('.tutorial-step-label');
142:         const title = activeModal.querySelector('.tutorial-title');
143:         const body = activeModal.querySelector('.tutorial-body');
144:         const prevBtn = activeModal.querySelector('.tutorial-prev');
145:         const nextBtn = activeModal.querySelector('.tutorial-next');
146: 
147:         if (label) label.textContent = `Page ${index + 1} of ${STEPS.length}`;
148:         if (title) title.textContent = step.title;
149:         if (body) body.innerHTML = step.content;
150:         if (prevBtn) prevBtn.disabled = index === 0;
151:         if (nextBtn) nextBtn.disabled = index === STEPS.length - 1;
152:     }
153: 
154:     function reset() {
155:         dismissed = false;
156:         console.log('Tutorial system re-enabled!');
157:     }
158: 
159:     // Secret keyboard sequence "tutorial" to re-enable tutorials
160:     (function() {
161:         const SECRET = 'tutorial';
162:         let buffer = '';
163:         document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
164:             if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') return;
165:             buffer += e.key.toLowerCase();
166:             if (buffer.length > SECRET.length) {
167:                 buffer = buffer.slice(-SECRET.length);
168:             }
169:             if (buffer === SECRET) {
170:                 reset();
171:                 buffer = '';
172:                 // Show a brief confirmation
173:                 const msg = document.createElement('div');
174:                 msg.textContent = 'Tutorials re-enabled!';
175:                 Object.assign(msg.style, {
176:                     position: 'fixed', top: '20px', left: '50%', transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
177:                     background: '#d9b08c', color: '#1a1a1a', padding: '10px 24px',
178:                     borderRadius: '8px', fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: '14px',
179:                     zIndex: '10001', transition: 'opacity 0.5s'
180:                 });
181:                 document.body.appendChild(msg);
182:                 setTimeout(() => { msg.style.opacity = '0'; }, 1500);
183:                 setTimeout(() => msg.remove(), 2000);
184:             }
185:         });
186:     })();
187: 
188:     return {
189:         showStep,
190:         reset,
191:         get dismissed() { return dismissed; }
192:     };
193: })();
</file>

<file path="css/base.css">

 9:     margin: 0;
10:     padding: 0;
11:     background: var(--bg-dark);
12:     font-family: var(--font-terminal);
13:     font-size: 32px;
14:     color: var(--text-primary);
15:     user-select: none;
16:     overflow: hidden;
17:     cursor: crosshair;
18:

20: }
