<file path="js/scrolls/response-window.js">
   1: /**
   2:  * Response Window System for Godaigo
   3:  *
   4:  * When a player casts a scroll, a "response window" opens allowing ONE other player
   5:  * to respond with their own scroll.
   6:  *
   7:  * Rules:
   8:  * - Response costs normal 2 AP
   9:  * - Responder must have valid scroll in active area AND valid pattern on board
  10:  * - Earth I (Iron Stance) can counter any scroll
  11:  * - Response window can be skipped if no player has a valid response
  12:  * - Only ONE response is allowed, then the stack resolves immediately
  13:  */
  14: 
  15: class ResponseWindowSystem {
  16:     constructor(spellSystem) {
  17:         this.spellSystem = spellSystem;
  18:         this.isResponseWindowOpen = false;
  19:         this.responseStack = []; // Stack of pending scroll casts
  20:         this.currentCaster = null; // Player who initiated the current scroll
  21:         this.pendingScrollData = null; // Data about the scroll being responded to
  22:         this.respondingPlayers = new Set(); // Players who have passed or responded
  23:         this.responseTimeout = null;
  24:         this.RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_MS = 15000; // 15 seconds to respond
  25:         this.responseModalElement = null;
  26:     }
  27: 
  28:     /**
  29:      * Check if a player can respond to a scroll
  30:      * @param {number} playerIndex - The player to check
  31:      * @returns {object} { canRespond: boolean, validScrolls: array, reason: string }
  32:      */
  33:     canPlayerRespond(playerIndex) {
  34:         // Determine player's available AP (responses may be free with buffs)
  35:         const playerAP = this.getPlayerAP(playerIndex);
  36: 
  37:         // Get player's active scrolls and common area scrolls
  38:         const playerScrolls = this.spellSystem.playerScrolls[playerIndex];
  39:         if (!playerScrolls) {
  40:             return { canRespond: false, validScrolls: [], reason: 'No scrolls available' };
  41:         }
  42: 
  43:         const activeScrolls = Array.from(playerScrolls.active || []);
  44:         const commonScrolls = this.spellSystem.getCommonAreaScrolls();
  45:         const allCastableScrolls = [...activeScrolls, ...commonScrolls];
  46: 
  47:         if (allCastableScrolls.length === 0) {
  48:             return { canRespond: false, validScrolls: [], reason: 'No scrolls in active area or common area' };
  49:         }
  50: 
  51:         // Check which scrolls have valid patterns on the board
  52:         const validScrolls = [];
  53:         const playerPos = this.getPlayerPosition(playerIndex);
  54: 
  55:         if (!playerPos) {
  56:             return { canRespond: false, validScrolls: [], reason: 'Player position not found' };
  57:         }
  58: 
  59:         for (const scrollName of allCastableScrolls) {
  60:             const patternOk = this.checkPatternForPlayer(scrollName, playerIndex);
  61:             if (patternOk) {
  62:                 const scrollDef = this.spellSystem.patterns[scrollName];
  63:                 const isCounter = scrollDef?.canCounter === 'any';
  64:                 const isResponse = scrollDef?.isResponse === true;
  65: 
  66:                 // Only include scrolls that are counter scrolls OR response scrolls
  67:                 // Regular scrolls can't be cast as responses
  68:                 if (isCounter || isResponse) {
  69:                     const cost = this.spellSystem?.getSpellCost ? this.spellSystem.getSpellCost(scrollDef, playerIndex) : 2;
  70:                     if (playerAP < cost) {
  71:                         console.log(`  ↳ ${scrollName}: pattern OK, isResponse=${isResponse} but can't afford (AP=${playerAP}, cost=${cost})`);
  72:                         continue;
  73:                     }
  74:                     validScrolls.push({
  75:                         name: scrollName,
  76:                         definition: scrollDef,
  77:                         isCounter: isCounter,
  78:                         isResponse: isResponse,
  79:                         fromCommonArea: commonScrolls.includes(scrollName),
  80:                         cost: cost
  81:                     });
  82:                 } else {
  83:                     console.log(`  ↳ ${scrollName}: pattern OK but not a counter/response scroll`);
  84:                 }
  85:             } else {
  86:                 console.log(`  ↳ ${scrollName}: pattern NOT matched for player ${playerIndex}`);
  87:             }
  88:         }
  89: 
  90:         if (validScrolls.length === 0) {
  91:             return { canRespond: false, validScrolls: [], reason: `No valid responses you can afford (AP=${playerAP})` };
  92:         }
  93: 
  94:         return { canRespond: true, validScrolls, reason: null };
  95:     }
  96: 
  97:     /**
  98:      * Check if any player can respond (used to skip response window)
  99:      * @param {number} excludePlayer - Player to exclude from check (the caster cannot respond to their own scroll)
 100:      * @returns {boolean}
 101:      */
 102:     canAnyPlayerRespond(excludePlayer = -1) {
 103:         const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 0;
 104:         console.log(`Response window: checking ${numPlayers} players for valid responses (excluding player ${excludePlayer})`);
 105: 
 106:         for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
 107:             // Skip the caster - you cannot respond to your own scroll
 108:             if (i === excludePlayer) {
 109:                 console.log(`  Player ${i}: skipped (caster)`);
 110:                 continue;
 111:             }
 112:             const result = this.canPlayerRespond(i);
 113:             console.log(`  Player ${i}: canRespond=${result.canRespond}, reason=${result.reason || 'can respond'}, validScrolls=${result.validScrolls.length}`);
 114:             if (result.canRespond) {
 115:                 return true;
 116:             }
 117:         }
 118:         return false;
 119:     }
 120: 
 121:     /**
 122:      * Open response window after a scroll is cast
 123:      * @param {object} scrollData - Data about the cast scroll
 124:      * @param {number} casterIndex - Index of the player who cast the scroll
 125:      * @param {function} onComplete - Callback when response window closes
 126:      */
 127:     openResponseWindow(scrollData, casterIndex, onComplete) {
 128:         const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 0;
 129:         const hasOtherPlayer = numPlayers > 1;
 130:         if (!hasOtherPlayer) {
 131:             console.log('Response window skipped - only one player');
 132:             if (onComplete) onComplete({ skipped: true, responses: [] });
 133:             return;
 134:         }
 135: 
 136:         // Quick check: can any non-caster player actually respond?
 137:         // Skip the response window entirely if no one has valid counter/response scrolls.
 138:         // This prevents the "waiting for players" screen from getting stuck when
 139:         // no opponent can respond (e.g. passes are lost or delayed in multiplayer).
 140:         if (!this.canAnyPlayerRespond(casterIndex)) {
 141:             console.log('Response window skipped - no player can respond (no valid counter/response scrolls)');
 142:             if (onComplete) onComplete({ skipped: true, responses: [] });
 143:             return;
 144:         }
 145: 
 146:         this.isResponseWindowOpen = true;
 147:         this.currentCaster = casterIndex;
 148:         this.pendingScrollData = scrollData;
 149:         this.respondingPlayers.clear();
 150:         // The caster counts as already having "responded" (they cast the spell)
 151:         this.respondingPlayers.add(casterIndex);
 152:         this.responseStack = [{
 153:             scrollData,
 154:             casterIndex,
 155:             isOriginal: true
 156:         }];
 157: 
 158:         // Store callback
 159:         this.onCompleteCallback = onComplete;
 160: 
 161:         // Broadcast in multiplayer FIRST so other players see the window
 162:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) {
 163:             this.broadcastResponseWindowOpened(scrollData, casterIndex);
 164:         }
 165: 
 166:         // For the caster, show "waiting for responses" instead of the response modal
 167:         const myIndex = typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
 168:         if (myIndex === casterIndex) {
 169:             // Caster waits for others
 170:             this.showWaitingForResponses(scrollData);
 171:         } else {
 172:             // Non-caster sees the response modal
 173:             this.showResponseModal();
 174:         }
 175: 
 176:         // Start timeout timer
 177:         this.startResponseTimeout();
 178:     }
 179: 
 180:     /**
 181:      * Show the response window modal overlay
 182:      */
 183:     showResponseModal() {
 184:         // Remove existing modal if present
 185:         if (this.responseModalElement) {
 186:             this.responseModalElement.remove();
 187:         }
 188: 
 189:         // Create overlay backdrop
 190:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 191:         overlay.id = 'response-window-overlay';
 192:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
 193:             position: 'fixed',
 194:             top: '0',
 195:             left: '0',
 196:             right: '0',
 197:             bottom: '0',
 198:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)',
 199:             zIndex: '2000',
 200:             display: 'flex',
 201:             justifyContent: 'center',
 202:             alignItems: 'center'
 203:         });
 204: 
 205:         // Create modal
 206:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
 207:         modal.id = 'response-window-modal';
 208:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
 209:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
 210:             border: '3px solid #e94560',
 211:             borderRadius: '15px',
 212:             padding: '25px',
 213:             minWidth: '450px',
 214:             maxWidth: '600px',
 215:             maxHeight: '80vh',
 216:             overflowY: 'auto',
 217:             color: 'white',
 218:             boxShadow: '0 0 30px rgba(233, 69, 96, 0.5)'
 219:         });
 220: 
 221:         // Header
 222:         const header = document.createElement('div');
 223:         header.style.textAlign = 'center';
 224:         header.style.marginBottom = '20px';
 225: 
 226:         const title = document.createElement('h2');
 227:         title.textContent = 'RESPONSE WINDOW';
 228:         title.style.color = '#e94560';
 229:         title.style.margin = '0 0 10px 0';
 230:         title.style.textTransform = 'uppercase';
 231:         title.style.letterSpacing = '3px';
 232:         header.appendChild(title);
 233: 
 234:         // Show what scroll was cast
 235:         const scrollInfo = document.createElement('div');
 236:         const scrollDef = this.spellSystem.patterns[this.pendingScrollData.name];
 237:         scrollInfo.innerHTML = `<strong>${this.getPlayerName(this.currentCaster)}</strong> cast <span style="color: ${this.getElementColor(scrollDef?.element)}">${scrollDef?.name || this.pendingScrollData.name}</span>`;
 238:         scrollInfo.style.fontSize = '16px';
 239:         scrollInfo.style.marginBottom = '10px';
 240:         header.appendChild(scrollInfo);
 241: 
 242:         // Timer display
 243:         const timerDiv = document.createElement('div');
 244:         timerDiv.id = 'response-timer';
 245:         timerDiv.style.fontSize = '24px';
 246:         timerDiv.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
 247:         timerDiv.style.color = '#f39c12';
 248:         timerDiv.textContent = `${Math.ceil(this.RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_MS / 1000)}s`;
 249:         header.appendChild(timerDiv);
 250: 
 251:         modal.appendChild(header);
 252: 
 253:         // Check if current player can respond
 254:         const myIndex = typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
 255:         const responseCheck = this.canPlayerRespond(myIndex);
 256: 
 257:         if (responseCheck.canRespond) {
 258:             // Show available response scrolls
 259:             const scrollsSection = document.createElement('div');
 260:             scrollsSection.style.marginBottom = '20px';
 261: 
 262:             const scrollsHeader = document.createElement('h3');
 263:             scrollsHeader.textContent = 'Your Available Responses:';
 264:             scrollsHeader.style.color = '#16a085';
 265:             scrollsHeader.style.marginBottom = '15px';
 266:             scrollsSection.appendChild(scrollsHeader);
 267: 
 268:             responseCheck.validScrolls.forEach(scrollInfo => {
 269:                 const scrollCard = this.createScrollCard(scrollInfo);
 270:                 scrollsSection.appendChild(scrollCard);
 271:             });
 272: 
 273:             modal.appendChild(scrollsSection);
 274:         } else {
 275:             // Show why player can't respond
 276:             const noResponseDiv = document.createElement('div');
 277:             noResponseDiv.style.textAlign = 'center';
 278:             noResponseDiv.style.padding = '20px';
 279:             noResponseDiv.style.color = '#95a5a6';
 280:             noResponseDiv.innerHTML = `<p>You cannot respond:</p><p><em>${responseCheck.reason}</em></p>`;
 281:             modal.appendChild(noResponseDiv);
 282:         }
 283: 
 284:         // Pass button
 285:         const buttonContainer = document.createElement('div');
 286:         buttonContainer.style.display = 'flex';
 287:         buttonContainer.style.justifyContent = 'center';
 288:         buttonContainer.style.gap = '15px';
 289:         buttonContainer.style.marginTop = '20px';
 290: 
 291:         const passBtn = document.createElement('button');
 292:         passBtn.textContent = 'Pass (No Response)';
 293:         Object.assign(passBtn.style, {
 294:             padding: '12px 30px',
 295:             fontSize: '16px',
 296:             backgroundColor: '#7f8c8d',
 297:             color: 'white',
 298:             border: 'none',
 299:             borderRadius: '8px',
 300:             cursor: 'pointer',
 301:             fontWeight: 'bold'
 302:         });
 303:         passBtn.onmouseenter = () => passBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#95a5a6';
 304:         passBtn.onmouseleave = () => passBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#7f8c8d';
 305:         passBtn.onclick = () => this.playerPasses(myIndex);
 306:         buttonContainer.appendChild(passBtn);
 307: 
 308:         modal.appendChild(buttonContainer);
 309: 
 310:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
 311:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
 312: 
 313:         this.responseModalElement = overlay;
 314:     }
 315: 
 316:     /**
 317:      * Create a scroll card for the response modal
 318:      */
 319:     createScrollCard(scrollInfo) {
 320:         const card = document.createElement('div');
 321:         const elementColor = this.getElementColor(scrollInfo.definition?.element);
 322: 
 323:         // Determine border color based on scroll type
 324:         let borderColor = elementColor;
 325:         if (scrollInfo.isCounter) {
 326:             borderColor = '#e74c3c'; // Red for counter
 327:         } else if (scrollInfo.isResponse) {
 328:             borderColor = '#f39c12'; // Orange for response
 329:         }
 330: 
 331:         Object.assign(card.style, {
 332:             backgroundColor: '#2d2d44',
 333:             border: '2px solid ' + borderColor,
 334:             borderRadius: '10px',
 335:             padding: '15px',
 336:             marginBottom: '10px',
 337:             cursor: 'pointer',
 338:             transition: 'all 0.2s'
 339:         });
 340: 
 341:         card.onmouseenter = () => {
 342:             card.style.backgroundColor = '#3d3d54';
 343:             card.style.transform = 'scale(1.02)';
 344:         };
 345:         card.onmouseleave = () => {
 346:             card.style.backgroundColor = '#2d2d44';
 347:             card.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
 348:         };
 349: 
 350:         // Header
 351:         const headerDiv = document.createElement('div');
 352:         headerDiv.style.display = 'flex';
 353:         headerDiv.style.justifyContent = 'space-between';
 354:         headerDiv.style.alignItems = 'center';
 355: 
 356:         const nameSpan = document.createElement('span');
 357:         nameSpan.textContent = scrollInfo.definition?.name || scrollInfo.name;
 358:         nameSpan.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
 359:         nameSpan.style.color = elementColor;
 360:         nameSpan.style.fontSize = '16px';
 361:         headerDiv.appendChild(nameSpan);
 362: 
 363:         if (scrollInfo.isCounter) {
 364:             const counterBadge = document.createElement('span');
 365:             counterBadge.textContent = 'COUNTER';
 366:             Object.assign(counterBadge.style, {
 367:                 backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
 368:                 color: 'white',
 369:                 padding: '3px 8px',
 370:                 borderRadius: '4px',
 371:                 fontSize: '10px',
 372:                 fontWeight: 'bold'
 373:             });
 374:             headerDiv.appendChild(counterBadge);
 375:         } else if (scrollInfo.isResponse) {
 376:             const responseBadge = document.createElement('span');
 377:             responseBadge.textContent = 'RESPONSE';
 378:             Object.assign(responseBadge.style, {
 379:                 backgroundColor: '#f39c12',
 380:                 color: 'white',
 381:                 padding: '3px 8px',
 382:                 borderRadius: '4px',
 383:                 fontSize: '10px',
 384:                 fontWeight: 'bold'
 385:             });
 386:             headerDiv.appendChild(responseBadge);
 387:         }
 388: 
 389:         if (scrollInfo.fromCommonArea) {
 390:             const commonBadge = document.createElement('span');
 391:             commonBadge.textContent = 'COMMON';
 392:             Object.assign(commonBadge.style, {
 393:                 backgroundColor: '#9b59b6',
 394:                 color: 'white',
 395:                 padding: '3px 8px',
 396:                 borderRadius: '4px',
 397:                 fontSize: '10px',
 398:                 fontWeight: 'bold',
 399:                 marginLeft: '5px'
 400:             });
 401:             headerDiv.appendChild(commonBadge);
 402:         }
 403: 
 404:         card.appendChild(headerDiv);
 405: 
 406:         // Description
 407:         const descDiv = document.createElement('div');
 408:         descDiv.textContent = scrollInfo.definition?.description || '';
 409:         descDiv.style.fontSize = '12px';
 410:         descDiv.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
 411:         descDiv.style.marginTop = '8px';
 412:         card.appendChild(descDiv);
 413: 
 414:         // Cost info
 415:         const costDiv = document.createElement('div');
 416:         const displayCost = (scrollInfo && typeof scrollInfo.cost === 'number') ? scrollInfo.cost : 2;
 417:         costDiv.textContent = `${displayCost} AP`;
 418:         costDiv.style.fontSize = '12px';
 419:         costDiv.style.color = '#f39c12';
 420:         costDiv.style.marginTop = '5px';
 421:         card.appendChild(costDiv);
 422: 
 423:         // Click to respond
 424:         card.onclick = () => this.playerResponds(scrollInfo);
 425: 
 426:         return card;
 427:     }
 428: 
 429:     /**
 430:      * Handle player choosing to respond with a scroll
 431:      * NOTE: Only ONE response is allowed per scroll cast - no stack continuation
 432:      */
 433:     playerResponds(scrollInfo) {
 434:         const myIndex = typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
 435:         console.log(`playerResponds called: myIndex=${myIndex}, scroll=${scrollInfo.name}`);
 436: 
 437:         // Double check they can still afford it
 438:         const myAP = this.getPlayerAP(myIndex);
 439:         const cost = (scrollInfo && typeof scrollInfo.cost === 'number')
 440:             ? scrollInfo.cost
 441:             : (this.spellSystem?.getSpellCost ? this.spellSystem.getSpellCost(scrollInfo.definition, myIndex) : 2);
 442:         console.log(`  Player AP: ${myAP}, cost=${cost}`);
 443:         if (myAP < cost) {
 444:             this.showResponseError(`Not enough AP! Need ${cost}, have ${myAP}`);
 445:             return;
 446:         }
 447: 
 448:         // Spend the AP for the response
 449:         this.spendPlayerAP(myIndex, cost);
 450:         console.log(`  Spent ${cost} AP for response`);
 451: 
 452:         // Add response to stack
 453:         this.responseStack.push({
 454:             scrollData: {
 455:                 name: scrollInfo.name,
 456:                 definition: scrollInfo.definition,
 457:                 fromCommonArea: scrollInfo.fromCommonArea || false
 458:             },
 459:             casterIndex: myIndex,
 460:             isCounter: scrollInfo.isCounter,
 461:             isResponse: scrollInfo.isResponse,
 462:             fromCommonArea: scrollInfo.fromCommonArea || false,
 463:             isOriginal: false
 464:         });
 465:         console.log(`  Added to response stack, stack size: ${this.responseStack.length}`);
 466: 
 467:         // Broadcast response in multiplayer
 468:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) {
 469:             this.broadcastResponse(scrollInfo, myIndex);
 470:             console.log(`  Broadcasted response`);
 471:         }
 472: 
 473:         // Close the current modal
 474:         this.closeResponseModal();
 475: 
 476:         const isCasterClient = !isMultiplayer || myIndex === this.currentCaster;
 477:         if (isCasterClient) {
 478:             // Only ONE response allowed - immediately resolve the stack
 479:             console.log(`  One response received (caster client), resolving stack immediately`);
 480:             this.resolveResponseStack();
 481:         } else {
 482:             // Non-caster: we sent our response, now wait for the caster
 483:             // to receive it, resolve, and broadcast 'response-resolved'
 484:             console.log(`  Response sent, waiting for caster to resolve`);
 485:             this.clearResponseTimeout();
 486:         }
 487:     }
 488: 
 489:     /**
 490:      * Handle player passing (no response)
 491:      */
 492:     playerPasses(playerIndex) {
 493:         this.respondingPlayers.add(playerIndex);
 494: 
 495:         // Broadcast pass in multiplayer
 496:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) {
 497:             this.broadcastPass(playerIndex);
 498:         }
 499: 
 500:         const myIndex = typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex : null;
 501:         const isCasterClient = !isMultiplayer || myIndex === this.currentCaster;
 502: 
 503:         if (isCasterClient) {
 504:             // Caster's client: check if all others responded, then resolve
 505:             const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 1;
 506:             if (this.respondingPlayers.size >= numPlayers) {
 507:                 this.resolveResponseStack();
 508:             } else {
 509:                 this.showWaitingForOthers();
 510:             }
 511:         } else {
 512:             // Non-caster's client: just close the modal and wait for
 513:             // the caster to resolve and broadcast 'response-resolved'
 514:             this.closeResponseModal();
 515:             this.clearResponseTimeout();
 516:         }
 517:     }
 518: 
 519:     /**
 520:      * Show waiting message while other players decide
 521:      */
 522:     showWaitingForOthers() {
 523:         const modal = document.getElementById('response-window-modal');
 524:         if (!modal) return;
 525: 
 526:         // Update modal content
 527:         modal.innerHTML = '';
 528: 
 529:         const waitDiv = document.createElement('div');
 530:         waitDiv.style.textAlign = 'center';
 531:         waitDiv.style.padding = '40px';
 532: 
 533:         const spinner = document.createElement('div');
 534:         spinner.innerHTML = '&#x21bb;'; // Circular arrow
 535:         spinner.style.fontSize = '48px';
 536:         spinner.style.animation = 'spin 1s linear infinite';
 537:         waitDiv.appendChild(spinner);
 538: 
 539:         const text = document.createElement('p');
 540:         text.textContent = 'Waiting for other players...';
 541:         text.style.fontSize = '18px';
 542:         text.style.marginTop = '20px';
 543:         waitDiv.appendChild(text);
 544: 
 545:         modal.appendChild(waitDiv);
 546: 
 547:         // Add spin animation if not already present
 548:         if (!document.getElementById('response-spin-style')) {
 549:             const style = document.createElement('style');
 550:             style.id = 'response-spin-style';
 551:             style.textContent = '@keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }';
 552:             document.head.appendChild(style);
 553:         }
 554:     }
 555: 
 556:     /**
 557:      * Show waiting screen for the caster while others respond
 558:      */
 559:     showWaitingForResponses(scrollData) {
 560:         // Remove existing modal if present
 561:         if (this.responseModalElement) {
 562:             this.responseModalElement.remove();
 563:         }
 564: 
 565:         // Create overlay backdrop
 566:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
 567:         overlay.id = 'response-window-overlay';
 568:         Object.assign(overlay.style, {
 569:             position: 'fixed',
 570:             top: '0',
 571:             left: '0',
 572:             right: '0',
 573:             bottom: '0',
 574:             backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)',
 575:             zIndex: '2000',
 576:             display: 'flex',
 577:             justifyContent: 'center',
 578:             alignItems: 'center'
 579:         });
 580: 
 581:         // Create modal
 582:         const modal = document.createElement('div');
 583:         modal.id = 'response-window-modal';
 584:         Object.assign(modal.style, {
 585:             backgroundColor: '#1a1a2e',
 586:             border: '3px solid #27ae60',
 587:             borderRadius: '15px',
 588:             padding: '25px',
 589:             minWidth: '400px',
 590:             maxWidth: '500px',
 591:             color: 'white',
 592:             textAlign: 'center',
 593:             boxShadow: '0 0 30px rgba(39, 174, 96, 0.5)'
 594:         });
 595: 
 596:         const title = document.createElement('h2');
 597:         title.textContent = 'SCROLL CAST';
 598:         title.style.color = '#27ae60';
 599:         title.style.margin = '0 0 15px 0';
 600:         modal.appendChild(title);
 601: 
 602:         const scrollName = document.createElement('div');
 603:         const scrollDef = this.spellSystem?.patterns?.[scrollData.name];
 604:         scrollName.textContent = scrollDef?.name || scrollData.name;
 605:         scrollName.style.fontSize = '20px';
 606:         scrollName.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
 607:         scrollName.style.color = this.getElementColor(scrollDef?.element);
 608:         scrollName.style.marginBottom = '20px';
 609:         modal.appendChild(scrollName);
 610: 
 611:         const waitDiv = document.createElement('div');
 612:         waitDiv.style.padding = '20px';
 613: 
 614:         const spinner = document.createElement('div');
 615:         spinner.innerHTML = '&#x21bb;';
 616:         spinner.style.fontSize = '36px';
 617:         spinner.style.animation = 'spin 1s linear infinite';
 618:         waitDiv.appendChild(spinner);
 619: 
 620:         const text = document.createElement('p');
 621:         text.textContent = 'Waiting for other players to respond...';
 622:         text.style.fontSize = '16px';
 623:         text.style.marginTop = '15px';
 624:         text.style.color = '#bdc3c7';
 625:         waitDiv.appendChild(text);
 626: 
 627:         modal.appendChild(waitDiv);
 628: 
 629:         // Timer display
 630:         const timerDiv = document.createElement('div');
 631:         timerDiv.id = 'response-timer';
 632:         timerDiv.style.fontSize = '20px';
 633:         timerDiv.style.fontWeight = 'bold';
 634:         timerDiv.style.color = '#f39c12';
 635:         timerDiv.style.marginTop = '10px';
 636:         timerDiv.textContent = `${Math.ceil(this.RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_MS / 1000)}s`;
 637:         modal.appendChild(timerDiv);
 638: 
 639:         overlay.appendChild(modal);
 640:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
 641:         this.responseModalElement = overlay;
 642: 
 643:         // Add spin animation if not already present
 644:         if (!document.getElementById('response-spin-style')) {
 645:             const style = document.createElement('style');
 646:             style.id = 'response-spin-style';
 647:             style.textContent = '@keyframes spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }';
 648:             document.head.appendChild(style);
 649:         }
 650:     }
 651: 
 652:     /**
 653:      * Resolve the response stack (LIFO order)
 654:      * FIFO for resolution: responses resolve first, then original scroll
 655:      */
 656:     resolveResponseStack() {
 657:         this.clearResponseTimeout();
 658:         this.closeResponseModal();
 659: 
 660:         // Process stack - responses first, then original
 661:         const results = [];
 662:         let cancelled = false;
 663:         let originalScroll = null;
 664: 
 665:         // Separate responses from original
 666:         const responses = [];
 667:         while (this.responseStack.length > 0) {
 668:             const entry = this.responseStack.pop();
 669:             if (entry.isOriginal) {
 670:                 originalScroll = entry;
 671:             } else {
 672:                 responses.push(entry);
 673:             }
 674:         }
 675: 
 676:         // Process responses first (FIFO - they were added in order)
 677:         for (const entry of responses) {
 678:             const scrollDef = entry.scrollData?.definition || this.spellSystem?.patterns?.[entry.scrollData?.name];
 679: 
 680:             if (entry.isCounter) {
 681:                 // This is a counter - it cancels the original scroll
 682:                 cancelled = true;
 683:                 const counterEntry = {
 684:                     ...entry,
 685:                     result: 'countered-original'
 686:                 };
 687:                 results.push(counterEntry);
 688: 
 689:                 // AP was already spent when the counter was played (line ~439)
 690:                 // Do NOT spend again here — spendPlayerAP ignores playerIndex
 691:                 // and would charge the original caster's AP instead
 692: 
 693:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
 694:                     window.logScrollEvent('response_counter', {
 695:                         casterIndex: entry.casterIndex,
 696:                         scrollName: entry.scrollData?.name,
 697:                         triggeringScroll: originalScroll?.scrollData?.name || null
 698:                     });
 699:                 }
 700: 
 701:                 // Execute the counter's effect (if any) — must pass counterEntry so
 702:                 // the scroll-resolved listener sees result === 'countered-original'
 703:                 this.executeScrollEffect(counterEntry, originalScroll);
 704:             } else if (entry.isResponse || scrollDef?.isResponse) {
 705:                 // This is a response scroll (like Unbidden Lamplight)
 706:                 // It executes but does NOT cancel the original
 707:                 const resolvedEntry = {
 708:                     ...entry,
 709:                     result: 'response-resolved'
 710:                 };
 711:                 results.push(resolvedEntry);
 712: 
 713:                 // AP was already spent when the response was played (line ~439)
 714:                 // Do NOT spend again here — spendPlayerAP ignores playerIndex
 715:                 // and would charge the original caster's AP instead
 716: 
 717:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
 718:                     window.logScrollEvent('response_resolved', {
 719:                         casterIndex: entry.casterIndex,
 720:                         scrollName: entry.scrollData?.name,
 721:                         triggeringScroll: originalScroll?.scrollData?.name || null
 722:                     });
 723:                 }
 724: 
 725:                 // Execute the response scroll's effect, passing the original scroll info
 726:                 this.executeScrollEffect(resolvedEntry, originalScroll);
 727:             }
 728:         }
 729: 
 730:         // Now resolve the original scroll (if not cancelled)
 731:         if (originalScroll) {
 732:             if (cancelled) {
 733:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
 734:                     window.logScrollEvent('original_countered', {
 735:                         casterIndex: originalScroll.casterIndex,
 736:                         scrollName: originalScroll.scrollData?.name
 737:                     });
 738:                 }
 739:                 results.push({
 740:                     ...originalScroll,
 741:                     result: 'countered'
 742:                 });
 743:             } else {
 744:                 if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.logScrollEvent) {
 745:                     window.logScrollEvent('original_resolved', {
 746:                         casterIndex: originalScroll.casterIndex,
 747:                         scrollName: originalScroll.scrollData?.name
 748:                     });
 749:                 }
 750:                 const originalResolvedEntry = { ...originalScroll, result: 'resolved' };
 751:                 results.push(originalResolvedEntry);
 752:                 this.executeScrollEffect(originalResolvedEntry, null);
 753:             }
 754:         }
 755: 
 756:         // Close response window state
 757:         this.isResponseWindowOpen = false;
 758:         this.pendingScrollData = null;
 759:         this.currentCaster = null;
 760: 
 761:         // Broadcast resolution to all clients so they close their windows
 762:         if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) {
 763:             this.broadcastResponseResolved(results, originalScroll);
 764:         }
 765: 
 766:         // Call completion callback
 767:         if (this.onCompleteCallback) {
 768:             this.onCompleteCallback({
 769:                 skipped: false,
 770:                 responses: results
 771:             });
 772:         }
 773:     }
 774: 
 775:     /**
 776:      * Execute a scroll's effect
 777:      * @param {object} entry - The scroll entry to execute
 778:      * @param {object} triggeringScroll - For response scrolls, the original scroll that triggered this response
 779:      */
 780:     executeScrollEffect(entry, triggeringScroll = null) {
 781:         // This delegates back to the main spell system
 782:         // The actual effect execution is handled there
 783:         if (this.spellSystem && typeof this.spellSystem.executeSpell === 'function') {
 784:             // Note: We don't call executeSpell directly here because that would
 785:             // open another response window. Instead, we'll emit an event that
 786:             // the main game loop handles to apply effects without re-triggering responses.
 787:             if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
 788:                 // Resolve the scroll definition from scrollData: it may be stored
 789:                 // as .definition OR .spell depending on the source.
 790:                 const trigDef = triggeringScroll
 791:                     ? (triggeringScroll.scrollData?.definition
 792:                        || triggeringScroll.scrollData?.spell
 793:                        || this.spellSystem.patterns?.[triggeringScroll.scrollData?.name])
 794:                     : null;
 795: 
 796:                 window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('scroll-resolved', {
 797:                     detail: {
 798:                         ...entry,
 799:                         // Promote fromCommonArea to top-level so the listener can access it directly
 800:                         fromCommonArea: entry.fromCommonArea ?? entry.scrollData?.fromCommonArea ?? false,
 801:                         triggeringScroll: triggeringScroll ? {
 802:                             name: triggeringScroll.scrollData?.name,
 803:                             casterIndex: triggeringScroll.casterIndex,
 804:                             definition: trigDef
 805:                         } : null
 806:                     }
 807:                 }));
 808:             }
 809:         }
 810:     }
 811: 
 812:     /**
 813:      * Close the response modal
 814:      */
 815:     closeResponseModal() {
 816:         if (this.responseModalElement) {
 817:             this.responseModalElement.remove();
 818:             this.responseModalElement = null;
 819:         }
 820:     }
 821: 
 822:     /**
 823:      * Start the response timeout timer
 824:      */
 825:     startResponseTimeout() {
 826:         this.clearResponseTimeout();
 827: 
 828:         let remaining = this.RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_MS;
 829:         const timerEl = document.getElementById('response-timer');
 830: 
 831:         this.responseTimeout = setInterval(() => {
 832:             remaining -= 1000;
 833:             if (timerEl) {
 834:                 timerEl.textContent = `${Math.ceil(remaining / 1000)}s`;
 835:                 if (remaining <= 5000) {
 836:                     timerEl.style.color = '#e74c3c';
 837:                 }
 838:             }
 839: 
 840:             if (remaining <= 0) {
 841:                 this.clearResponseTimeout();
 842:                 // Time's up - force resolve
 843:                 const myIndex = typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
 844:                 const isCasterClient = !(typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) || myIndex === this.currentCaster;
 845:                 if (isCasterClient) {
 846:                     // Caster: all remaining players are treated as passes — force resolve
 847:                     console.log('⏰ Response timeout on caster client — force resolving');
 848:                     this.resolveResponseStack();
 849:                 } else {
 850:                     // Non-caster: auto-pass
 851:                     this.playerPasses(myIndex);
 852:                 }
 853:             }
 854:         }, 1000);
 855:     }
 856: 
 857:     /**
 858:      * Clear the response timeout
 859:      */
 860:     clearResponseTimeout() {
 861:         if (this.responseTimeout) {
 862:             clearInterval(this.responseTimeout);
 863:             this.responseTimeout = null;
 864:         }
 865:     }
 866: 
 867:     /**
 868:      * Show error message in response modal
 869:      */
 870:     showResponseError(message) {
 871:         const modal = document.getElementById('response-window-modal');
 872:         if (!modal) return;
 873: 
 874:         const errorDiv = document.createElement('div');
 875:         Object.assign(errorDiv.style, {
 876:             backgroundColor: '#e74c3c',
 877:             color: 'white',
 878:             padding: '10px',
 879:             borderRadius: '5px',
 880:             textAlign: 'center',
 881:             marginBottom: '10px'
 882:         });
 883:         errorDiv.textContent = message;
 884:         modal.insertBefore(errorDiv, modal.firstChild);
 885: 
 886:         setTimeout(() => errorDiv.remove(), 3000);
 887:     }
 888: 
 889:     // Helper methods that interface with the game state
 890:     getPlayerAP(playerIndex) {
 891:         // In multiplayer, each player tracks their own AP via playerAPs
 892:         if (typeof playerAPs !== 'undefined' && playerAPs[playerIndex]) {
 893:             const ap = playerAPs[playerIndex];
 894:             return (ap.currentAP || 0) + (ap.voidAP || 0);
 895:         }
 896:         // Fallback to global currentAP for single player or active player
 897:         if (typeof currentAP !== 'undefined') {
 898:             const voidAP = typeof voidAPCount !== 'undefined' ? voidAPCount : 0;
 899:             return currentAP + voidAP;
 900:         }
 901:         return 0;
 902:     }
 903: 
 904:     spendPlayerAP(playerIndex, amount) {
 905:         if (typeof spendAP === 'function') {
 906:             spendAP(amount);
 907:         }
 908:     }
 909: 
 910:     getPlayerPosition(playerIndex) {
 911:         if (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[playerIndex]) {
 912:             return playerPositions[playerIndex];
 913:         }
 914:         return null;
 915:     }
 916: 
 917:     getPlayerName(playerIndex) {
 918:         if (typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' && playerPositions[playerIndex]?.username) {
 919:             return playerPositions[playerIndex].username;
 920:         }
 921:         return `Player ${playerIndex + 1}`;
 922:     }
 923: 
 924:     getElementColor(element) {
 925:         const colors = {
 926:             earth: '#69d83a',
 927:             water: '#5894f4',
 928:             fire: '#ed1b43',
 929:             wind: '#ffce00',
 930:             void: '#9458f4',
 931:             catacomb: '#9b59b6'
 932:         };
 933:         return colors[element] || '#ffffff';
 934:     }
 935: 
 936:     checkPatternForPlayer(scrollName, playerIndex) {
 937:         // Delegate to spell system's pattern check for specific player
 938:         if (this.spellSystem && typeof this.spellSystem.checkPatternForPlayer === 'function') {
 939:             return this.spellSystem.checkPatternForPlayer(scrollName, playerIndex);
 940:         }
 941:         // Fallback to basic check if method doesn't exist
 942:         if (this.spellSystem && typeof this.spellSystem.checkPattern === 'function') {
 943:             return this.spellSystem.checkPattern(scrollName);
 944:         }
 945:         return false;
 946:     }
 947: 
 948:     // Multiplayer broadcast methods
 949:     broadcastResponseWindowOpened(scrollData, casterIndex) {
 950:         if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 951:             // Include the current common area state so receiving clients can apply it
 952:             // before checking canPlayerRespond — avoids a race condition where
 953:             // common-area-update (e.g. Psychic moving there) hasn't arrived yet.
 954:             const commonAreaSnapshot = this.spellSystem?.commonArea
 955:                 ? { ...this.spellSystem.commonArea }
 956:                 : null;
 957:             broadcastGameAction('response-window-opened', {
 958:                 scrollName: scrollData.name,
 959:                 casterIndex: casterIndex,
 960:                 commonArea: commonAreaSnapshot
 961:             });
 962:         }
 963:     }
 964: 
 965:     broadcastResponse(scrollInfo, playerIndex) {
 966:         if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 967:             broadcastGameAction('scroll-response', {
 968:                 scrollName: scrollInfo.name,
 969:                 playerIndex: playerIndex,
 970:                 isCounter: scrollInfo.isCounter
 971:             });
 972:         }
 973:     }
 974: 
 975:     broadcastPass(playerIndex) {
 976:         if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 977:             broadcastGameAction('response-pass', {
 978:                 playerIndex: playerIndex
 979:             });
 980:         }
 981:     }
 982: 
 983:     broadcastResponseResolved(results, originalScroll = null) {
 984:         if (typeof broadcastGameAction === 'function') {
 985:             // Resolve the original scroll's definition for the broadcast so remote
 986:             // clients can store it (e.g. for Reflect's deferred activation).
 987:             let trigDef = null;
 988:             if (originalScroll) {
 989:                 trigDef = originalScroll.scrollData?.definition
 990:                     || originalScroll.scrollData?.spell
 991:                     || this.spellSystem?.patterns?.[originalScroll.scrollData?.name]
 992:                     || null;
 993:             }
 994:             broadcastGameAction('response-resolved', {
 995:                 results: results.map(r => ({
 996:                     scrollName: r.scrollData?.name,
 997:                     casterIndex: r.casterIndex,
 998:                     result: r.result,
 999:                     isResponse: r.isResponse
1000:                 })),
1001:                 triggeringScroll: originalScroll ? {
1002:                     name: originalScroll.scrollData?.name,
1003:                     casterIndex: originalScroll.casterIndex,
1004:                     definition: trigDef
1005:                 } : null
1006:             });
1007:         }
1008:     }
1009: 
1010:     /**
1011:      * Handle remote response resolution - close window on all clients
1012:      */
1013:     handleRemoteResolved() {
1014:         console.log('Remote response window resolved');
1015:         this.clearResponseTimeout();
1016:         this.closeResponseModal();
1017:         this.isResponseWindowOpen = false;
1018:         this.pendingScrollData = null;
1019:         this.currentCaster = null;
1020:         this.respondingPlayers.clear();
1021:     }
1022: 
1023:     // Methods for handling remote multiplayer events
1024: 
1025:     /**
1026:      * Show response modal for a non-casting player (called when receiving broadcast)
1027:      */
1028:     showResponseModalForOtherPlayer(scrollData, casterIndex) {
1029:         this.isResponseWindowOpen = true;
1030:         this.currentCaster = casterIndex;
1031:         this.pendingScrollData = scrollData;
1032:         this.respondingPlayers.clear();
1033:         // The caster is already considered to have "responded" (they cast the spell)
1034:         this.respondingPlayers.add(casterIndex);
1035:         this.responseStack = [{
1036:             scrollData,
1037:             casterIndex,
1038:             isOriginal: true
1039:         }];
1040: 
1041:         // Only show the modal if THIS player can respond; otherwise auto-pass
1042:         const myIndex = typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex : activePlayerIndex;
1043:         const responseCheck = this.canPlayerRespond(myIndex);
1044:         if (responseCheck.canRespond) {
1045:             this.showResponseModal();
1046:             this.startResponseTimeout();
1047:         } else {
1048:             if (typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) {
1049:                 this.broadcastPass(myIndex);
1050:             }
1051:             // Mark as responded locally so caster can resolve
1052:             this.respondingPlayers.add(myIndex);
1053:             this.checkAllPlayersResponded();
1054:         }
1055:     }
1056: 
1057:     /**
1058:      * Handle a remote player passing
1059:      */
1060:     handleRemotePass(playerIndex) {
1061:         console.log(`Remote player ${playerIndex} passed`);
1062:         this.respondingPlayers.add(playerIndex);
1063: 
1064:         // Check if all non-caster players have responded
1065:         this.checkAllPlayersResponded();
1066:     }
1067: 
1068:     /**
1069:      * Handle a remote player responding with a scroll
1070:      * NOTE: Only ONE response is allowed - resolve immediately after receiving it
1071:      */
1072:     handleRemoteResponse(scrollName, playerIndex, isCounter) {
1073:         console.log(`Remote player ${playerIndex} responded with ${scrollName}`);
1074: 
1075:         const scrollDef = this.spellSystem.patterns[scrollName];
1076:         this.responseStack.push({
1077:             scrollData: { name: scrollName, definition: scrollDef },
1078:             casterIndex: playerIndex,
1079:             isCounter: isCounter,
1080:             isResponse: scrollDef?.isResponse || false,
1081:             isOriginal: false
1082:         });
1083: 
1084:         // Close current modal
1085:         this.closeResponseModal();
1086: 
1087:         // Only the caster's client should resolve the response stack.
1088:         // Non-caster clients wait for the 'response-resolved' broadcast.
1089:         const myIndex = typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex : null;
1090:         const isCasterClient = !(typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) || myIndex === this.currentCaster;
1091:         if (isCasterClient) {
1092:             // Only ONE response allowed - immediately resolve the stack
1093:             console.log(`  One response received from remote player (caster client), resolving stack immediately`);
1094:             this.resolveResponseStack();
1095:         } else {
1096:             console.log(`  Response received, waiting for caster to resolve`);
1097:             this.clearResponseTimeout();
1098:         }
1099:     }
1100: 
1101:     /**
1102:      * Check if all players have responded and resolve if so
1103:      */
1104:     checkAllPlayersResponded() {
1105:         // Only the caster's client should resolve the response stack.
1106:         // Non-caster clients wait for the 'response-resolved' broadcast.
1107:         const myIndex = typeof myPlayerIndex !== 'undefined' ? myPlayerIndex : null;
1108:         const isCasterClient = !(typeof isMultiplayer !== 'undefined' && isMultiplayer) || myIndex === this.currentCaster;
1109:         if (!isCasterClient) {
1110:             return; // Non-caster: do nothing, wait for broadcast
1111:         }
1112: 
1113:         const numPlayers = typeof playerPositions !== 'undefined' ? playerPositions.length : 1;
1114: 
1115:         // Count how many non-caster players should respond
1116:         let expectedResponders = 0;
1117:         for (let i = 0; i < numPlayers; i++) {
1118:             if (i !== this.currentCaster) {
1119:                 expectedResponders++;
1120:             }
1121:         }
1122: 
1123:         const requiredResponders = expectedResponders + 1; // include caster (already counted)
1124:         console.log(`Response check: ${this.respondingPlayers.size} responded, ${requiredResponders} expected`);
1125: 
1126:         if (this.respondingPlayers.size >= requiredResponders) {
1127:             // All players have responded - resolve the stack
1128:             this.resolveResponseStack();
1129:         }
1130:     }
1131: }
1132: 
1133: // Export for use
1134: if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
1135:     window.ResponseWindowSystem = ResponseWindowSystem;
1136: }
</file>

<file path="js/scrolls/scroll-definitions.js">
  1: /**
  2:  * Scroll Definitions for Godaigo
  3:  *
  4:  * This file contains all scroll pattern definitions.
  5:  * Each scroll has:
  6:  * - name: Display name
  7:  * - description: What the scroll does
  8:  * - level: Power level (affects stone gains)
  9:  * - element: The element type (earth, water, fire, wind, void, catacomb)
 10:  * - patterns: Array of valid pattern configurations (relative hex coordinates)
 11:  * - canCounter: (optional) Special scrolls that can counter other scrolls
 12:  */
 13: 
 14: // Pattern templates shared across element types
 15: const LEVEL_1_PATTERNS = [
 16:     [{ q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }],
 17:     [{ q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }],
 18:     [{ q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 0 }]
 19: ];
 20: 
 21: const LEVEL_2_PATTERNS = [
 22:     [{ q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }],
 23:     [{ q: 1, r: -2 }, { q: -1, r: 2 }],
 24:     [{ q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: -2, r: 1 }]
 25: ];
 26: 
 27: const LEVEL_3_PATTERNS = [
 28:     [{ q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }],
 29:     [{ q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }]
 30: ];
 31: 
 32: const LEVEL_4_PATTERNS = [
 33:     [{ q: 1, r: -2 }, { q: -2, r: 1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }],
 34:     [{ q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 2 }]
 35: ];
 36: 
 37: const LEVEL_5_PATTERNS = [
 38:     [{ q: 0, r: -1 }, { q: 0, r: 1 }, { q: 2, r: -1 }, { q: -2, r: 1 }],
 39:     [{ q: 1, r: -1 }, { q: -1, r: 1 }, { q: -1, r: -1 }, { q: 1, r: 1 }],
 40:     [{ q: 1, r: 0 }, { q: -1, r: 0 }, { q: 1, r: -2 }, { q: -1, r: 2 }]
 41: ];
 42: 
 43: // Helper to convert Roman numerals
 44: function toRoman(num) {
 45:     const romans = ['I', 'II', 'III', 'IV', 'V'];
 46:     return romans[num - 1] || num.toString();
 47: }
 48: 
 49: // Helper function to rotate hex coordinate by 60 degrees
 50: function rotateHex(q, r, steps) {
 51:     let nq = q, nr = r;
 52:     for (let i = 0; i < steps; i++) {
 53:         const tempQ = nq;
 54:         nq = -nr;
 55:         nr = -(-tempQ - nr);
 56:     }
 57:     return { q: nq, r: nr };
 58: }
 59: 
 60: // Earth scroll effect definitions
 61: const EARTH_SCROLL_EFFECTS = {
 62:     1: { name: 'Iron Stance', description: 'Counter the most recently cast scroll. That scroll is cancelled.', isCounter: true },
 63:     2: { name: 'Shifting Sands', description: 'Select two tiles to swap their positions. Tiles must have no stones or players on them.' },
 64:     3: { name: "Mason's Savvy", description: 'Draw up to 5 earth stones. This turn, place earth stones within 5 hexes of player.' },
 65:     4: { name: 'Heavy Stomp', description: 'Select a tile to flip. Hidden tiles are revealed (draw scroll). Revealed tiles become hidden.' },
 66:     5: { name: 'Avalanche', description: 'This turn, place any stones anywhere on the board (not just adjacent).' }
 67: };
 68: 
 69: // Water scroll effect definitions
 70: const WATER_SCROLL_EFFECTS = {
 71:     1: { name: 'Reflect', description: 'Duplicate the effect of the scroll that was last cast this turn.', isResponse: true },
 72:     2: { name: 'Refreshing Thought', description: 'Discard a scroll to the common area, then draw a scroll of that element type.' },
 73:     3: { name: 'Inspiring Draught', description: 'Draw 2 scrolls from any decks, then put 1 back and shuffle that deck.' },
 74:     4: { name: 'Wandering River', description: 'Select a tile. Until your next turn, that tile counts as any element type you choose.' },
 75:     5: { name: 'Control the Current', description: 'Click adjacent water stones to transform them into any other element (free, no AP cost).' }
 76: };
 77: 
 78: // Fire scroll effect definitions
 79: const FIRE_SCROLL_EFFECTS = {
 80:     1: { name: 'Unbidden Lamplight', description: 'Response: Send the triggering scroll to your hand after it resolves (scroll still resolves).', isResponse: true },
 81:     2: { name: 'Burning Motivation', description: 'Until end of turn, gain 2 AP for each stone you place. Stacks if activated multiple times.' },
 82:     3: { name: 'Sacrificial Pyre', description: 'Activate any scroll in your hand (ignoring pattern). The scroll goes to the common area.' },
 83:     4: { name: 'Transmute', description: 'Discard any number of stones or scrolls to regain 2 AP each.' },
 84:     5: { name: 'Arson', description: 'Destroy one elemental stone from an opponent\'s pool. Move Arson to the common area.' }
 85: };
 86: 
 87: // Void scroll effect definitions
 88: const VOID_SCROLL_EFFECTS = {
 89:     1: { name: 'Psychic', description: 'Counter the previous scroll, then play it during your turn. Move Psychic to the common area.', isCounter: true },
 90:     2: { name: "Scholar's Insight", description: 'Search through a Scroll Deck and add a scroll of your choice to your hand. Shuffle that deck afterwards.' },
 91:     3: { name: 'Simplify', description: 'Scrolls cost 1 AP to activate until the end of your turn.' },
 92:     4: { name: 'Telekinesis', description: 'Move a tile unoccupied by stones or players. It must be touching 1 other tile. Cannot move a tile if it would strand an adjacent tile.' },
 93:     5: { name: 'Create', description: 'Choose a stone type and draw stones equal to that stone\'s rank (Earth 5, Water 4, Fire 3, Wind 2, Void 1). Cannot exceed 5 of that type.' }
 94: };
 95: 
 96: // Wind scroll effect definitions
 97: const WIND_SCROLL_EFFECTS = {
 98:     1: { name: 'Sigh of Recollection', description: 'Draw a scroll and a stone of the type that was just activated, if available. Draw one stone of each if it was a Catacomb scroll.', isResponse: true },
 99:     2: { name: 'Respirate', description: 'Draw 2 wind stones. At end of turn, return all your wind stones to the source pools.' },
100:     3: { name: 'Breath of Power', description: 'Until end of turn, you may move adjacent stones to another adjacent empty space.' },
101:     4: { name: 'Take Flight', description: 'Teleport target player to an unoccupied space of your choice. If targeting an opponent, Take Flight goes to their hand. If targeting yourself, it stays in your active area.' },
102:     5: { name: 'Freedom', description: 'Until your next turn, the centers of elemental shrines act as catacomb tiles (only applies to you).' }
103: };
104: 
105: // Catacomb scroll effect definitions (keyed by scroll number, e.g. 1 = CATACOMB_SCROLL_1)
106: const CATACOMB_SCROLL_EFFECTS = {
107:     1: { name: 'Mudslide', description: 'Until end of turn, earth and water stones act as wind stones for movement (free movement).' },
108:     2: { name: 'Mine', description: 'If the center of this pattern is an elemental shrine, that shrine produces twice as many stones this turn (cannot exceed 5).' },
109:     3: { name: 'Call to Adventure', description: 'Until end of turn, when you reveal a tile, immediately draw Elemental Stones as if you had ended your turn on that tile\'s center.' },
110:     4: { name: 'Excavate', description: 'End your turn. You, your scrolls, and stones cannot be the target of any scroll until your next turn. At the beginning of your turn, you may teleport to any unoccupied hex.' },
111:     5: { name: 'Steam Vents', description: 'Until end of turn, spending an AP to move allows you to move two spaces instead of one.' },
112:     6: { name: 'Seed the Skies', description: 'Gather up to 5 water stones. This turn, you may place water and wind stones on any valid hex (not just adjacent).' },
113:     7: { name: 'Reflecting Pool', description: 'Regain 2 AP for each different stone type within 5 spaces of you. This can be used once per turn.' },
114:     8: { name: 'Plunder', description: 'Choose a target player. Select one of their active scrolls and discard it to the common area.' },
115:     9: { name: 'Quick Reflexes', description: 'Search for an available level 1 scroll and add it to your hand. Draw 2 stones of that type. Until your next turn, level 1 scrolls cost 0 AP to activate. Shuffle the deck searched.' },
116:     10: { name: 'Combust', description: 'Select a tile and destroy all stones on it. Cannot target player tiles.' }
117: };
118: 
119: // Generate elemental scroll definitions
120: function generateElementalScrolls() {
121:     const scrolls = {};
122:     const elementTypes = ['earth', 'water', 'fire', 'wind', 'void'];
123:     const patternLevels = [LEVEL_1_PATTERNS, LEVEL_2_PATTERNS, LEVEL_3_PATTERNS, LEVEL_4_PATTERNS, LEVEL_5_PATTERNS];
124: 
125:     elementTypes.forEach(element => {
126:         patternLevels.forEach((patterns, level) => {
127:             const scrollName = `${element.toUpperCase()}_SCROLL_${level + 1}`;
128: 
129:             // Check for custom effect definitions
130:             let name, description, isCounter = false;
131:             const effectMaps = {
132:                 earth: EARTH_SCROLL_EFFECTS,
133:                 water: WATER_SCROLL_EFFECTS,
134:                 fire: FIRE_SCROLL_EFFECTS,
135:                 wind: WIND_SCROLL_EFFECTS,
136:                 void: VOID_SCROLL_EFFECTS
137:             };
138: 
139:             let isResponse = false;
140:             if (effectMaps[element] && effectMaps[element][level + 1]) {
141:                 const effect = effectMaps[element][level + 1];
142:                 name = effect.name;
143:                 description = effect.description;
144:                 isCounter = effect.isCounter || false;
145:                 isResponse = effect.isResponse || false;
146:             } else {
147:                 name = `${element.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + element.slice(1)} Scroll ${toRoman(level + 1)}`;
148:                 description = `Stand in pattern to gain +${level + 1} ${element} stones (2 AP)`;
149:             }
150: 
151:             scrolls[scrollName] = {
152:                 name: name,
153:                 description: description,
154:                 level: level + 1,
155:                 element: element,
156:                 patterns: patterns.map(pattern =>
157:                     pattern.map(pos => ({ ...pos, type: element }))
158:                 ),
159:                 // Earth I (Iron Stance) can counter any scroll
160:                 canCounter: isCounter ? 'any' : null,
161:                 // Fire I (Unbidden Lamplight) is a response scroll (shows in response window but doesn't cancel)
162:                 isResponse: isResponse,
163:                 hasEffect: !!(effectMaps[element] && effectMaps[element][level + 1]) // Flag to indicate this scroll has a special effect
164:             };
165:         });
166:     });
167: 
168:     return scrolls;
169: }
170: 
171: // Generate catacomb scroll definitions (multi-element patterns)
172: function generateCatacombScrolls() {
173:     const catacombBase = {
174:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_1: [
175:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "water" },
176:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "water" },
177:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "earth" },
178:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "earth" }
179:         ],
180:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_2: [
181:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "earth" },
182:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "earth" },
183:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "fire" },
184:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "fire" }
185:         ],
186:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_3: [
187:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "wind" },
188:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "wind" },
189:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "earth" },
190:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "earth" }
191:         ],
192:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_4: [
193:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "void" },
194:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "void" },
195:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "earth" },
196:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "earth" }
197:         ],
198:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_5: [
199:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "water" },
200:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "water" },
201:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "fire" },
202:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "fire" }
203:         ],
204:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_6: [
205:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "wind" },
206:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "wind" },
207:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "water" },
208:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "water" }
209:         ],
210:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_7: [
211:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "void" },
212:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "void" },
213:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "water" },
214:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "water" }
215:         ],
216:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_8: [
217:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "fire" },
218:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "fire" },
219:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "wind" },
220:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "wind" }
221:         ],
222:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_9: [
223:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "void" },
224:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "void" },
225:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "wind" },
226:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "wind" }
227:         ],
228:         CATACOMB_SCROLL_10: [
229:             { q: -1, r: -1, type: "fire" },
230:             { q: 1, r: 1, type: "fire" },
231:             { q: 1, r: -2, type: "void" },
232:             { q: -1, r: 2, type: "void" }
233:         ]
234:     };
235: 
236:     const scrolls = {};
237: 
238:     Object.entries(catacombBase).forEach(([scrollName, basePattern]) => {
239:         const scrollNum = parseInt(scrollName.split('_')[2]);
240: 
241:         // Create 3 rotational variations (0, 120, 240 degrees)
242:         const variations = [
243:             basePattern,
244:             basePattern.map(pos => ({
245:                 ...rotateHex(pos.q, pos.r, 2),
246:                 type: pos.type
247:             })),
248:             basePattern.map(pos => ({
249:                 ...rotateHex(pos.q, pos.r, 4),
250:                 type: pos.type
251:             }))
252:         ];
253: 
254:         // Check for custom catacomb effect definitions
255:         const catEffect = CATACOMB_SCROLL_EFFECTS[scrollNum];
256:         const catName = catEffect ? catEffect.name : `Catacomb Scroll ${scrollNum}`;
257:         const catDesc = catEffect ? catEffect.description : `Multi-element pattern: gain +2 of each stone type (2 AP)`;
258: 
259:         scrolls[scrollName] = {
260:             name: catName,
261:             description: catDesc,
262:             level: 2,
263:             element: 'catacomb',
264:             patterns: variations,
265:             hasEffect: !!catEffect
266:         };
267:     });
268: 
269:     return scrolls;
270: }
271: 
272: // Build complete scroll definitions
273: const SCROLL_DEFINITIONS = {
274:     ...generateElementalScrolls(),
275:     ...generateCatacombScrolls()
276: };
277: 
278: // Initial deck configurations
279: const SCROLL_DECKS = {
280:     earth: ['EARTH_SCROLL_1', 'EARTH_SCROLL_2', 'EARTH_SCROLL_3', 'EARTH_SCROLL_4', 'EARTH_SCROLL_5'],
281:     water: ['WATER_SCROLL_1', 'WATER_SCROLL_2', 'WATER_SCROLL_3', 'WATER_SCROLL_4', 'WATER_SCROLL_5'],
282:     fire: ['FIRE_SCROLL_1', 'FIRE_SCROLL_2', 'FIRE_SCROLL_3', 'FIRE_SCROLL_4', 'FIRE_SCROLL_5'],
283:     wind: ['WIND_SCROLL_1', 'WIND_SCROLL_2', 'WIND_SCROLL_3', 'WIND_SCROLL_4', 'WIND_SCROLL_5'],
284:     void: ['VOID_SCROLL_1', 'VOID_SCROLL_2', 'VOID_SCROLL_3', 'VOID_SCROLL_4', 'VOID_SCROLL_5'],
285:     catacomb: ['CATACOMB_SCROLL_1', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_2', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_3', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_4', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_5',
286:                'CATACOMB_SCROLL_6', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_7', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_8', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_9', 'CATACOMB_SCROLL_10']
287: };
288: 
289: // Export for use in other modules
290: if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
291:     window.SCROLL_DEFINITIONS = SCROLL_DEFINITIONS;
292:     window.SCROLL_DECKS = SCROLL_DECKS;
293: }
</file>

558:     <script src="js/tutorial.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
559:     <!-- Scroll System (load before main.js) -->
560:     <script src="js/scrolls/scroll-definitions.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
561:     <script src="js/scrolls/effects/scroll-effects.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
562:     <script src="js/scrolls/response-window.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
563:     <script src="js/multiplayer-state.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
564:     <script src="js/game-core.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
565:     <script src="js/game-ui.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
566:     <script src="js/gamification.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
567:     <script src="js/gamification-ui.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
568:     <script src="js/lobby.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
569:     <script src="js/emoji-system.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
570:     <script src="js/cosmetics-system.js" charset="UTF-8"></script>
571:     <script>
572:     (function() {
573:         const _clickSnd = new Audio('minecraft-click-cropped.mp3');
574:         _clickSnd.volume = 0.25;
575:         window.uiSoundEnabled   = localStorage.getItem('godaigo_ui_sound')   !== 'false';
576:         window.gameSoundEnabled = localStorage.getItem('godaigo_game_sound') !== 'false';
577:         document.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
578:             if (window.uiSoundEnabled && e.target.closest('button')) {
579:                 _clickSnd.currentTime = 0;
580:                 _clickSnd.play().catch(() => {});
581:             }
582:         });
583:     })();
584:     </script>
585: 
586:     <script>
587:     function showStoneInfoPopup() {
588:         if (document.getElementById('stone-info-overlay')) return;
589:         const stones = [
590:             {
591:                 name: 'Earth', symbol: '▲', color: '#69d83a',
592:                 cost: 5,
593:                 desc: 'The strongest stone. Costs the most AP to break. Earns the most XP when broken by opponents. Immune to transmutation by default.'
594:             },
595:             {
596:                 name: 'Water', symbol: '◯', color: '#5894f4',
597:                 cost: 4,
598:                 desc: 'Mimics the element of an adjacent stone when determining XP rewards. Can be transformed into another stone type using the Control the Current scroll.'
599:             },
600:             {
601:                 name: 'Fire', symbol: '♦', color: '#ed1b43',
602:                 cost: 3,
603:                 desc: 'A mid-rank offensive stone. Adjacent void stones nullify fire — the fire stone\'s element is suppressed and earns no XP when broken.'
604:             },
605:             {
606:                 name: 'Wind', symbol: '≋', color: '#ffce00',
607:                 cost: 2,
608:                 desc: 'A low-cost stone, quick to place and cheap to break. Effective for filling territory or protecting more valuable stones.'
609:             },
610:             {
611:                 name: 'Void', symbol: '✺', color: '#9458f4',
612:                 cost: 1,
613:                 desc: 'The cheapest stone to break. Nullifies adjacent fire stones, removing their element bonus. Strategic for countering fire-heavy players.'
614:             }
615:         ];
616: 
617:         const rows = stones.map(s => `
618:             <div class="stone-row">
619:                 <div class="stone-icon" style="background:${s.color};color:#111;">${s.symbol}</div>
620:                 <div class="stone-row-info">
621:                     <div class="stone-row-name" style="color:${s.color};">${s.name}</div>
622:                     <div class="stone-row-desc">${s.desc}</div>
623:                     <div class="stone-row-cost">Break cost: ${s.cost} AP</div>
624:                 </div>
625:             </div>`).join('');
626: 
627:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
628:         overlay.id = 'stone-info-overlay';
629:         overlay.className = 'stone-info-overlay';
630:         overlay.innerHTML = `
631:             <div class="stone-info-modal" role="dialog" aria-label="Stone types">
632:                 <button class="stone-info-close" onclick="document.getElementById('stone-info-overlay').remove()" aria-label="Close">×</button>
633:                 <h3>Stone Types &amp; Abilities</h3>
634:                 ${rows}
635:             </div>`;
636:         overlay.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); });
637:         document.body.appendChild(overlay);
638:     }
639:     </script>
640: </body>
641: </html>
</file>

</files>
